a ini en kos mgo ngaran to kovuyyahan ni isas rays no lubbad ni avid woy braham
i braham kos amoy ni saac woysi saac kos amoy ni acob woysi acob kos amoy ni uda woy to mgo suwod din
i uda kos amoy ni ares woy ara si amar kos inoy ran
a si ares kos amoy ni srom woysi srom kos amoy ni ram
i ram kos amoy ni minadab woysi minadab kos amoy ni aason woysi aason kos amoy ni almon
a si almon nokoosawa ki ahab woy dos anak dan si oas
ni mandad si oas nokoosawa ki uth woy dos anak dan si bed
i bed amoy ni sai woy si sai kos amoy ni arin avid
ni si avid amoy ni olomon woy dos inoy rin sawa ni rias dangan
a si olomon kos amoy ni oboam woysi oboam kos amoy ni bias woysi bias mandad kos amoy ni sa
i sa kos amoy ni osafat woysi osafat kos amoy ni oram woysi oram mandad kos amoy ni zias
i zias kos amoy ni otam woysi otam kos amoy ni caz woysi caz kos amoy ni sequias
i sequias kos amoy ni anases woysi anases kos amoy ni mos woysi mos kos amoy ni osias
a si osias kos amoy ni econias woy to mgo suwod din
dda en no timpu id dakop kos mgo toho srael woy id piyod diyon to abilonia
opongnga idda id tobbow si alatiel no iddos amoy rin si econias
a ini mandad si alatiel amoy ni orobabel
i orobabel kos amoy ni biud woysi biud kos amoy ni liaquim woysi liaquim kos amoy ni zor
a si zor kos amoy ni adoc woysi adoc kos amoy ni quim woysi quim kos amoy ni liud
i liud kos amoy ni leazar woysi leazar kos amoy ni atan woysi atan kos amoy ni acob
i acob kos amoy ni ose no sawa ni aria
a si aria kos inoy ni isas no id ngoranan to esiyas
een duwon sopuuoppat no linubbaran pomon ki braham taman ki avid woy sopuuoppat mandad no linubbaran pomon ki avid taman to koddakop to mgo toho srael nid piyod diyot abilonia
uwon mandad sopuuoppat no linubbaran pomon to koddakop taman to kodtobbow taddot esiyas
a iling kaay kos kodtobbow ni isas rays
ddos inoy rin no si aria od osowan ni ose
o waa pa sikandan id poogkottoy movoddos don sikandin ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
i ose nod osawa kandin morumoruma to mgo suhu to onama piru dii sikandin od kopiyan nod koilawan si aria
een nokopuhawang sikandin nod suwayan din si aria no waa duma nod pokosaddoo
a to id puhawang din pa idda id pokita kandin kos ponolihan to onama ukit to tohenoppon
id ikahi iddos ponolihan to ose no koubbaran ni avid yo kod aangaang nod osawa ki aria su iyon unayan no movoddos sikandin ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
d anak sikandin to mama woy ngoraniyu sikandin ki isas oyya su sikandin kos od tobbus to mgo minuvu rin pomon diyot saa ran
a notomanan inis langun su amoy od kotuman iddos id poikahi dangan to onama ukit to propeta no mid ungketen to os sokkad no mongovay od movoddos woy od anak sikandin to mama
ddon anak od ngoranan to mmanuel no iddos kohulugan dos onama duma keta
een to nokohimata si ose id puungan din iddos id suhu to ponolihan woy id osawa rin si aria
iru waa rin loyuki si aria to waa pa tobbawi
a to id tobbawan don sikandin id ngoranan ni ose iddos anak ki isas
a to id tobbow si isas diyot bonuwa to etlehem no sakup to udea iddot timpu no si erodes kos hari duwon mgo minuvu no id pomon tid tollak nid inguma riyot erusalem
ikandan od kotuig nod ontong to kohulugan to mgo bituon
a mid intud sikandan kahi ran to ngkon man iddos id tobbow no hari to mgo udio
u nokita roy iddos bituon nid loppow riyon lomig tid tollak no patow to kodtobbow rin deen mid undini koy amoyd simba kandin
o norinog idda ni arin erodes dii ron sikandin od pokodtoii woy ungketen dad en mandad iddos langun nid oubpa riyot erusalem
een id poumow rin iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
a id inturan din sikandan kahi rin to ngkon man od tobbow iddos esiyas
id tavak sikandan to iyot etlehem no sakup to udea su ini en kos id sulat to propeta no mid ungketen to ikkow etlehem no riyot prubinsya to udea ahad disok ka no bonuwa od kovantug ka taddot dumon mgo bonuwa no sakup to udea
yyos od pomon duwot kikow iddos sokkad no ponguunod hari to koddin mgo minuvu no idda en so koubbaran ni srael
o norinog idda ni erodes id poumow rin iddon mgo minuvu no siksikandan da
oy id inturan din ko kannu id loppow dos bituon
a id poundiyon din sikandan to etlehem kahi rin to ndiyon kow woy ooyyari row tod nangkap iddos anak
oy otid kokita rowd livod kow vo kaay woy ponudtuli a su od undiyon a mandad amoyd simba kandin
opongnga idda id logkiyat don iddon mgo minuvu
o kodipanow ran nokita ran mandon iddos bituon no nokita ran to riyon pa sikandan to lomig tid tollak woy dakkoo en kos kahaan dan
d ikuu ran idda taman to id soro riyot pantok to baoy no rutun en iddos anak
a id usok dan taddon baoy woy nokita ran don iddos anak woy dos inoy rin no si aria
id lingkood sikandan amoyd simba taddot anak
d ukaa ran iddos mahaa no mgo piniyoddan dan woy id boggoy ran taddot anak iddos buawan mammut no insenso woy dos pomammut no mira
o koduli ran id baya sikandan to osson daan su id pomonduwan sikandan to onama ukit to tohenoppon no dii ran don od livod diyot ki erodes
a to nokoipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu no id pomon tid tollak id pokita ki ose iddos ponolihan to onama ukit to tohenoppon woy kahi rin to nnow ka
iyoddow kos anak woy inoy woy paahuy kow poundiyon to hipto
ubpa kow pa tahad dutun taman tod oseng a koniyu no od pokolivod kowd oyyos konnod kouhoy id poinangkap ni erodes kos anak amoyd imotayan
een id onnow si ose woy id piyod din iddos anak duma taddot inoy woy id ipanow ran to idda ra en no bulli poundiyon to hipto
a riyon en sikandan id oubpa taman tid patoy si erodes
otomanan ini amoyd kotuman iddos id ikahi to onama nod ongaggon ukit to propeta no mid ungketen to d umow ku kos koddin anak nod leggua pomon diyot hipto
o nosorollan ni erodes no iddos mgo minuvu nid pomon lomig tid tollak waa id tuman taddot tandu ran nod livod diyot kandin nolinglingasa sikandin
een id suhu rin kos mgo sundau rin nod imotayan kos langun no anak no mama pomon diyot lammid tobbow taman to oruwon lahun kos idad no id oubpa riyot etlehem woy riyot mgo bonuwa no morani rutun
yon din id ikuu iddos timpu no id ponudtuu taddot mgo minuvu no id pomon tid tollak iddot id inturan din sikandan ko kannu id loppow iddos bituon
een notuman iddos id ikahi to propeta no si eremias no mid ungketen to d korinog kos kodpondaawit diyon to ama
d sinoggow si aquel atag to mgo anak din woydii ron od kouus kos ginawa rin oyyos id patoy ron man dos mgo anak din
a to id patoy ron si erodes duwon ponolihan to onama nod ongaggon no id pokita ki ose riyot hipto ukit to tohenoppon
ahi taddot ponolihan to nnow ka
iyoddow kos anak woy inoy woy livod kow riyot ingod to srael oyya su id patoy ron iddos od kopiyan nod imatoy ruwot anak
een id onnow si ose woy id piyod din iddos anak woy dos inoy woy id uli sikandan diyot ingod to srael
iru to norinog ni ose no si rquelao no anak ni erodes kos id suvaa nid hari riyot udea novaakkan sikandin nod undiyon
a id pomonduwan don mandon sikandin to onama ukit to tohenoppon deen id undiyon sikandan to prubinsya to alilea
a diyon don en sikandan mid oubpa to bonuwa to azaret
een notuman don iddos id ikahi to mgo propeta no mid ungketen to d ngoranan sikandin no toho azaret
a to id lihad kos pilon mgo lahun mid undiyon si uan no ohodboutismu to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa to udea
d ponudtuu rin kos kahit onama riyot mgo minuvu no mid undiyon to kandin
ahi rin to ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row su asow ron kos kodharit onama
i uan en iddos od tommanon ni propeta saias no uwon monokkaan bawos diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no mid ungketen to onaya row kos pusung dow atag tod ongaggon woy tulidda row kos od ukitan din
a iddos umpak ni uan binovallan pomot bowvuu to kamelyo woy dos ollon din binovallan pomot kindaa to oyama
yon kouyahan din mgo apang woy tonnob
id undiyon to kandin iddos mgo minuvu no id pomon diyot erusalem pomon diyon to intirut prubinsya to udea woy pomon diyot mgo lugaa no moranit weg to ordan
d ponudtuu ran no id sondit woy id tanan don sikandan to mgo saa ran woy id poboutismu sikandan ki uan diyot weg to ordan
a duwon mandad mgo ponguu to pomokayon to udio nod ngoranan no ariseo woy aduseo no id undiyon amoyd poboutismu
iru to nokita rin sikandan id ikohiyan din to ikiyu iling kow to mgo uwod nod laas
unan dow ayu kod pokolegguang kowd taddot od ingumon kodsilut to onama otid koboutismuwan kowd
tik bonnaa en no id sondit woy id tanan kowd to mgo saa row posivonnali row ini ukit to koniyun pinuungan
o kowd pososalig no dii kow od silutan pomon to koubbaran kow ni braham
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no ahad inis mgo batu od kovovallan to onama no koubbaran ni braham
omotawi row
os kodsilut to onama koniyu nokoiling to porokuu no nopanoy ron nid tampod to kayu
a iddos ipat kayu no diid bovunga to moppiya od tompoddon woy id lumbag diyot apuy
d boutismuwan ku sikiyu to oweg patow no id sondit woy id tanan kowd to mgo saa row
iru konnod kouhoy duwon od tundug koddi no lampas pa no motuus su konna a ollog ahad kodbitbit da to sandalyas din
his no spiritu woy apuy kos id boutismu rin koniyu
d podossan din iddos mgo minuvu no moppiya woy morat iling to minuvu nod oottap to trigu
os moppiyon trigu id taaw rin diyot budiga piru iddos mgo ottap od tirukkan din diyot apuy no konnod koovukkan
a riyot timpu to kodboutismu ni uan mid undiyon si isas to weg to ordan pomon diyot prubinsya to alilea amoyd poboutismu kandin
iru dii nanoy od boutismu si uan kandin
ahi rin to iyak kos ollog nod boutismuwan du konna siyak kos od boutismu kikow
iru mid tavak si isas to outismui a en su ollog en nod kotuman ta iddos langun no id kopiit onama
een id boutismuwan ni uan si isas
o noboutismuwan don si isas id goun sikandin diyot oweg
oy idda ron en nopokes kos langit woy nokita rin no id lonna iddos his no spiritu riyot kandin iling to soopati
a duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ni en kos nak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy oraroy ku nid kahaai
a id piyod si isas to his no spiritu riyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa amoy od geddaman ni oivuyan kod kopiyod sikandin nod puung to saa
d puasa si isas daom to oppatnopuun allow woy bulli woy nopongnga oraroy sikandin id gutasan
a id porani si oivuyan kandin woy mid kahi to tik mooggot ka en no nak to onama suhuwow inis batu nod kovovallan no paan
iru mid tavak si isas to oikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no onna ra kokaan kos od pokouyag to minuvu ko konna iddos ipat kahi to onama
opongnga idda id piyod sikandin ni oivuyan diyot erusalem woy id poohinat din diyot orayn motikang no sakup to templo
a id ikohiyan din si isas to tik sikkow en kos nak to onama timballu ka riyot dosiyung su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no d suhuwon to onama iddos mgo ponolihan din to kodtavang kikow amoy dii ka od komonnu
d saakon ka nikandan amoy ahad ikos paa ru diid kohisgisan
iru mid tavak si isas to oikahi mandad diyot osulat no ahit onama no o ru geddami kos onama nod ongaggon du
opongnga idda id piyod sikandin ni oivuyan diyot orayn mowwet no buvungan
oy id pokita rin iddos langun no kohoriyan kaay to ampowt ingod woy dos mgo korotuwan dutun
ahin oivuyan to d boggoy ku kikow inis langun otid lingkood ka woy od simba koddi
id tavak si isas to wa ka oivuyan
oikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no yon du ra simbaana iddos onama nod ongaggon du woy sikandin da kos duurumanniyu
a mid awa ron si oivuyan woy id inguma iddos mgo ponolihan amoyd tuhanuu ki isas
a to norinog ni isas no noprisu si uan id livod sikandin diyot alilea
id tanan sikandin diyot azaret woy id undiyon to apernaum amoyd oubpa rutun
nin bonuwa diyon lomig to ibpit to anowt alilea no sakup to livuta to koubbaran ni abulon woy eptali
otomanan ini su amoy od kotuman iddos id poikahi to onama ki propeta saias no mid ungketen to dos mgo ingod to abulon woy eftali nokoibpit to lanow woy nokoripaa to weg to ordan
nin mgo lugaa sakup to prubinsya to alilea nid oubpan to konna mgo udio
ddos mgo minuvu rutun nokoiling tid oubpa riyot mosukirom
ling to id patoy ron sikandan oyyos waa ran id kilaa to onama
iru init od ingumon allow od kokita ran don kos maawang no seaa nod taddow kandan
a pomon taddon timpu mid tigkanoy si isas to kodponudtuu to kahit onama
ahi rin to ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row su asow ron kos kodharit onama
okkad no allow laggun tid ipanow si isas diyot ibpit to anowt alilea nokita rin iddos oruwon toosuwod no si imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro woy dos ari rin no si ndres
d ooppan dan to pukut su mgo tohodngongaap meen sikandan
ahin isas kandan to uma kow koddi
onnad ngaap kos od ingutollon dow ko konna od nonawwan ku sikiyu nod ingutoo to mgo minuvu
dda ron en id tonanan dan iddos mgo pukut dan woy mid duma ran kandin
a ponayun mid ipanow si isas diyot ibpit to lanow woy nokita rin iddos oruwa mandad no toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan no mgo anak ni ebedeo
d ounsad sikandan diyot bollangay duma to amoy ran no id oupiya to mgo pukut
a id umow sikandan ni isas amoyd duma kandin
dda ron en id tonanan dan iddos amoy ran woy dos bollangay woy mid duma ran ki isas
a id lingkus ni isas iddos intirut prubinsya to alilea
d nonaw sikandin diyot mgo simbaan to udio woy id ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to kodharit onama woy id bowiyan din kos nokodossoosson bohok
een novantug sikandin diyon to intirut lugaa to iria
omon tadda id piyod to mgo minuvu iddos langun nod kovohokan diyot kandin dos id geddam to orayn mosakit dos id ponlosuran to busow dos od pombovuyon woy dos mgo minuvu nid patoy kos lawa
a langun dan nouliyan
urisu ahad ingkon sikandin od isau orayn mouraa kos mgo minuvu nod dumoruma kandin pomon diyot alilea diyot ecapolis diyot erusalem woy riyon to dipaat weg to ordan
o nokita ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu id tikoddog sikandin diyot lovuntud woy mid ounsad dutun
oy id lolivuung diyot kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din
a mid tigkanoy sikandin id nonaw kahi rin to oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no nokosaddoo no waa en kogahan dan otik waa tavang to onama oyyos sikandan kos od pokolonug to kodhari rin
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nid lanu pomon to saa oyyos od uuson to onama kos ginawa ran
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod poobbava oyyos sikandan en kos od pokokomunoy to lammin ingod init morin allow
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvun dakkoo kos ingowollon nod puung to id kopiit onama oyyos od tovangan din en sikandan nod puung tadda
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvun eeruwon oyya su iddos onama od pokita to eru kandan
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvun molinis kos pusung oyyos od kokita ran kos onama
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod poduli to koroniyan oyyos sikandan en kos od ngoranan no mgo anak to onama
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nid posupittan pomon to kodtuman to id kopiit onama oyyos sikandan en kos noiraom to kodhari rin
oppiya kod kotomanan dow otik duwon od sumpalit od posuppit woyd doddoraat koniyu pomon to koddumoruma row koddi
ngketen dad en mandad kos id puungan dan taddot mgo propeta dangan
een kahaa kow oyya su dakkoo kos ganti no id panoy koniyu riyot datas to langit
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to ikiyu no mgo tinodduwan ku nokoiling kow to assin kaay to ampowt ingod
iru otid motabbang don ini dii ron en id pokopolivod kos nanam
orad mandad koruanon kaay deen id sowela ron woyd geeheddan to mgo minuvu
okoiling kow mandad to suu nod pokomaawang to poomdom to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
ddos bonuwa no riyot buvungan oraroy en idda nod kokita
aa minuvu nod loottom to suu woy kopongnga od poongkobban din to lobban ko konna id taaw rin idda riyot od sopatan amoyd kotorawwan kos langun diyot baoy
een iling dad mandad tadda pooglogga row kos koniyun suu riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu amoyd kokita ran kos moppiyon pinuungan dow woy od doongon dan kos moy row riyot datas to langit
o row poomdomma no mid undini a to ampowt ingod amoy od worannon kos mgo uhu ni oises woy dos id sulat to mgo propeta
id undini a amoyd tumanon ku idda
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no laggun to duwon pa kos langit woy livuta waa en ahad songolitra o songotulduk nod kowora riyot mgo uhu to onama oyyos ponayun en idda taman tod kotuman don kos langun
een iddos ahad ondoy nod lempang to ahad sokkad no uhu to onama woy id nonaw rin mandad diyot duma nod puung to ungketen sikandin kos moobbava to langun diyon to kodharit onama
iru iddos od tuman woyd nonaw mandad to duma nod tuman tadda sikandin kos mowwet diyon to kodharit onama
urisu od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no koilangan no iddos kodtuman dow to id kopiit onama od lampas taddot kodtuman dow to mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy taddot mgo ariseo su otik konna dii kow en od kolonug to kodharit onama
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to orinog dowd iddos suhu to keton kovuyyahan no mid ungketen to o kowd imatoy
u iddos ahad ondoy nod imatoy koilangan nod piyoddon sikandin diyot tohodhukum amoyd silutan
iru siyak ini kos od ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy no duwon langot diyot duma od silutan en
oy dos od poilow to duma nod ikahi no aa utok du od piyoddon diyot mowwet no tohodhukum
oy idda mandad so od ikahi no angog ka en iyon din od ingumannon iddos linowt apuy
een ahad diyon kad to daom to templo amoy od boggoyt buwis piru nosompottan du no duwon minuvun nomorat kikow su nokopuung ka to konna ollog diyot kandin na tuwos du pa riyot isowwan to buwisanan kos buwis du
nnaaw pa upiyanni kos koroniyan du taddon minuvu idda pa livod ka amoy od boggoy to kikown buwis diyot onama
tik duwon minuvu nod uug kikow no nokopuung ka to saa noonokkaliyu nod pokodusoy kow goos to dii pa od inguma riyot hukumanan
u otid pokouma kowd dutun saddook id boggoy ka to tohodhukum diyon to pulis woy id poprisu ka
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku kikow no dii ka en od pokolegguang otik dii ru od kovorayan kos langun no multa ru
orinog dowd mandad iddos suhu no mid ungketen to o kowd loivug
iru siyak ini kos od ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy nod tongtong to baay no molibmit kos kandin no poomdom nokoloivug don sikandin diyot ginawa rin
een otik mata ru kos unayan nod pokosaa ka kootowd baling ika woy lumbag du
u moppiya pa nod koworan ka to sokkad no sakup to lawa kuntra to intirut lawa ru kos id lumbag diyon to linowt apuy
oy otik kowanan no bollad du kos unayan nod pokosaa ka tompoddowd baling ika woy id lumbag du
yya su moppiya pa nod koworan ka to sokkad no sakup to lawa kuntra to intirut lawa ru kos id lumbag diyon to linowt apuy
a duwon mandad suhu no mid ungketen to ddos ahad ondoy no mama nod suwoy to sawa rin koilangan nod boggoy to kosulatan diyot sawa rin no od posivonnaa to kodposuwayoy ran
iru siyak ini kos od ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoyn mama nod suwoy to sawa rin no waa nopuungan no morat iling to id usung din kos sawa rin diyot kodloivug otid osawa mandon
oy idda mandad so mama nod osawa kandin nokoloivug mandad
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to orinog dow mandad iddos suhu riyot keton kovuyyahan no mid ungketen to tid pongulivot kow koilangan en nod tumanon dow kos tandu row riyot isowwan tod ongaggon
iru siyak ini kos od ikohiyon ku koniyu no otik od totandu kow yo kowd pongulivot diyon to langit su idda en kos trunu to onama
o kow mandad od pongulivot kaay to livuta oyyos kaay en kos sikuwayan to paa rin
oy yo kowd pongulivot to erusalem su idda en kos bonuwa to novantug no ari
o kow od pongulivot nod ikahi to d bottu pok uu ku ko id ouhus a oyyos konna man sikiyu kos id bovaa to koniyun lawa
had songosilag to bowvuu row dii kow man od pokopomoputi o od pokopometom
yon dow ra osenga no yya o onna su otid pongulivot kow pa id pomon don idda ki oivuyan
orinog dow mandad iddos suhu no mid ungketen to os minuvu nod pokovutud to mata to duma od ungketennon en mandad kos mata rin woy dos od pokopengow to ngipon to duma od pengawan mandad
iru siyak ini kos od ikohiyon ku koniyu no yo kowd puung to morat diyot minuvu no id puung to morat koniyu
yon dow puungi otid tobpiyon kos kowanan no bonnong dow potabpi row mandad kos divauy
a otik duwon od kasu koniyu woy od ahaw to umpak dow boggoy row mandad ahad iddos lapid no umpak dow
tik duwon od pohos koniyu nod povava to piniyoddan din taman to sokkad no kilometro bovaaw idda ahad taman to oruwon kilometro
tik duwon od bovuyu koniyu boggayi row sikandin woy otik duwon od samboy posombaya row
orinog dow iddos suhu dangan no mid ungketen to inowanni row kos mgo oukuy row woy kolingasai row iddos od pongkuntra koniyu
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no ginowanni row iddos od pongkuntra koniyu woy dasaa kow atag taddot mgo minuvu nod posuppit koniyu
u otid puungan dow ini iddos botasanon dow od pokoiling to botasanon to moy row riyot datas to langit
yyos waa od podmusingon din su id posealan din to allow iddos moppiyon mgo minuvu woy idda mandad so morat
d popiyoddan din to uran iddos mgo motallong woy idda mandad so konna motallong
u otik iyon dow ra od ginowannon iddos id ginawa koniyu duwon bo ganti nod kotanggap dow riyot onama
aa en
yya su ahad iddos mgo tohodsukut to buhis nod loimbung od ginawa man mandad taddot id ginawa kandan
oy otik iyon dow ra od olitoliton iddos mgo oukuy row duwon bo nopuungan dow no moppiya pa taddot duma
aa en
u ahad iddos mgo minuvu no waa id kilaa to onama od puung man to ungketen
een pokita row kos waa kulang no kopiyannoy riyot duma iling taddot moy row riyot datas to langit no waa en kulang to kopiyannoy rin
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to yyadayyad kow no konna kow od puung to moppiya amoyd pokitakita to mgo minuvu
u otik ungketen waa od kotanggap dow no ganti pomon diyot moy row no riyot datas to langit
een otid boggoy kow riyot mgo worowora yo row idda id pokitakita iling to id puungan taddot duma riyot daom to simbaan to mgo udio woy riyon to doraanon
d puungan dan idda su amoy od doongon sikandan to mgo minuvu
iru bonnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no worad od kotanggap dan no ganti pomon diyot onama oyyos nokotanggap don man sikandan to koddoong to mgo minuvu
iru sikiyu otid boggoy kow riyot worowora yo yo row idda ponudtuu ahad diyot oraroy row no oukuy su amoy waa en od pokosaddoo
a iddos moy row riyot datas to langit no iyon nokokita taddot ollos nid puungan dow sikandin kos od kotuig koniyu
a otid dasaa kow yo kow od iling to mgo minuvu nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
yya su id kotoosi ran nod dasaa riyot simbaan to mgo udio woy riyot doraanon amoyd kokita to mgo minuvu
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no pomon to notanggap dan don iddos koddoong to minuvu worad od kotanggap dan no ganti pomon diyot onama
iru sikiyu otid dasaa kow usok kow riyot kwartu row woy lookkob kow
a rutun dasaa kow riyot onamon moy row no konnod kokita
oy dos moy row no nokokita to langun no pinuungan dow sikandin don kos od kotuig koniyu
a riyot koddasaa row yo row mouralla kos osengan dow no waa mgo koruanon iling taddot id puungan to mgo minuvu no waa onama
u kunan dan kod pominoggon to onama kos dosalon dan otik mowwet
o kow od iling kandan oyya su iddos onamon moy row nokosaddoo ron tapoy taddot koilonganon dow ahad waa kow pa id buyu kandin
iyot koniyun koddasaa ungketenna row to moy roy riyot datas to langit muopa nod posivontuhon kos ngaran du
uopa no iddos kikown kodhari od inguma rinit ampowt ingodamoy iddos kikown id kopii od kotuman dinit ingod iling taddot diyot datas to langit
oggayi koy to kokaan nod koilonganon doy inin allow
osinsiyai koy to mgo saa roy iling to kodposinsya roy taddot nokosaa konami
ovangi koy no dii koyd kopiyod to kodpuung to saa woy id polegguanga koy riyot kororattan
a otid posinsyan dow iddos nokosaa koniyu od posinsyan kow mandad to moy row riyot datas to langit
iru otik dii row sikandan od posinsyan na dii kow mandad od posinsyan to moy row riyot datas to langit
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to tid puasa kow yo row idda pokita riyot bonnong dow iling tod puungan to mgo minuvu no od pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
yyos od livonglivong dan no diid pondappug woy diid ponuwat amoy od kokita to duma no id puasa sikandan
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no pomon to nokotanggap don man sikandan to koddoong to mgo minuvu worad od kotanggap dan no ganti pomon diyot onama
iru sikiyu otid puasa kow iyon moppiya pondappug woy ponuwat kow su amoy waa od pokosaddoo no id puasa kow
yon da nokosaddoo tadda idda ra en so moy row no konnod kokita woy nokokita to langun no pinuungan dow woy sikandin don kos od kotuig koniyu
o kow od loimud to mgo korotuwan kaay to ampowt ingod oyyos od kotkotton da en ini to anoy woy tangis woy od usokkon ini to mgo tokawon diyot baoy row
yon moppiya no loimud kow to mgo korotuwan diyot datas to langit oyya su rutun waa en anoy woy tangis nod kotkot woy waa mandad od pokousok nod takow tadda
u otik ingkon nokotaaw kos koniyun korotuwan diyon en mandad kos koniyun ginawa
a inis mata nokoiling to suu to lawa
een otik maawang kos kodontong du maawang mandad kos tivuk no lawa ru
iru otik mosukirom kos kodontong du mosukirom mandad kos tivuk no lawa ru
een otid ikahi ka no maawang kos lawa ru piru iyon bonnaa mosukirom bos na orayn mosukirom kos tivuk no lawa ru
aa minuvu nod pouripon to oruwon amu oyyos od dokollan din to ginawa kos sokkad woy dos sokkad id kolingasai rin
d dumoruma sikandin taddot sokkad woy dos sokkad id podtohon din
a iling mandad tadda otid pouripon kow to soopi dii kow en od pokopouripon to onama
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no yo kow od kaaggow to mgo koilonganon dow to kodoubpa iling to kokaan inommon woyd umpakon dow
u iddos koniyun umuu lampas pa kos koruanon taddot kokaan woy dos lawa row lampas pa kos koruanon taddot umpak
ntongngi row man kos mgo manuk nod layanglayang
aa ran id pomuwa waa id kottu woy waa mandad budiga ran piru id boggayan man sikandan to kokaan to moy ta no riyot datas to langit
a iyon kow pobbo no lampas pa kos koruanon taddot mgo manuk
oy sokkad pa ondoy man koniyu kos od pokopoowwet to umuu row ahad sokkad da no uras ukit to laggow
aa en
oy mambot od kaaggow kow tod umpakon dow
oomdomma row man iddos mgo bulak no id pontuvu
aa ran id puung woy waa id ponobbii tod umpakon dan
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no ahad si arin olomon no novantug to korotuwan din dangan waa nokoumpak iling to kogolingoy to ahad sokkad kaayn mgo bulak
a otik id pomogoling man to onama kos mgo sabbot nod kouyag da koungkay piru simag od tirukkan don konna vo lampas kow pa nod umpakan din
oy koniyu
rayn disok kos kopomakoy row
een yo kow od kaaggow woyd ikahi to omonnu kid man moho ini
ndan don kos od kannon woyd inommon ta
ndan don kos od umpakon ta
yya su iddos inaayun od kaaggow tadda idda en so mgo minuvu no waa id kilaa to onama
iru sikiyu yo kowd kaaggow su iddos moy row no riyot datas to langit nokosaddoo no od koilonganon dow en idda
iru iyon dow unnaa tod nangkap iddos kodharit onama woy dos kodikuu to kandin nid kopii woy id potommu rin kos langun no koilonganon dow
een yo kowd od kaaggow taddot simag
u ollog don iddos kosupittan no id inguma inin allow
onna tad od timulan kos kosupittan ukit to laggow ta taddot simag
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to o kowd hukum to duma amoy dii kow mandad od hukuman to onama
u iddos kodhukum dow to duma ungketen dad en mandad kos kodhukum koniyu to onama
ambot oraroy kow od kita to disok no possok diyot mata to duma piru id podtohon dow kos batang duwot mata row
omonnu kow man od pokooseng diyot duma no d ongayon ku kos possok to mata ru no duwon man batang duwot mata row
d pouvaguvag kow no motallong
nnaa row pa ongaya kos batang duwot mata row amoy oraroy row od kokita tod angoy kos possok to duma
o kowd avoy od nonaw to kahit onama riyot mgo minuvu no konnod kopiyan nod pominog su nokoiling sikandan to mgo tuyyang woy bavuy
yya su ahad od boggayan dow peen to mahaa kos tuyyang od kahaton kow rad en
oy ahad od lumbahan dow to perlas kos mgo bavuy od geeheddan dan da en idda
ovuyu kow riyot onama woy od kovoggayan kow nangkap kow woyd pokokita kow ponoktok kow woy od kolukatan kow
u iddos ahad ondoy nod bovuyu od pokotanggap en woy dos od nangkap od pokokita en woy idda mandad so od ponoktok od lukatan en
ikiyu no mgo amoy otid bovuyu kos anak dow to paan od boggayan dow vo sikandin to batu
oy otid bovuyu sikandin to ngaap od boggayan dow vo sikandin to uwod
ii en
a otik sikiyu no mgo mosaasaa od kotuig nod boggoy to moppiya riyot mgo anak dow iyon pobbo iddos moy row no riyot datas to langit od boggoy en to mgo moppiya riyot od bovuyu kandin
een puungi row riyot duma iddos id kopii row nod puungan dan koniyu
yya su ini en kos kohulugan taddot mgo uhu ni oises woy taddot id sulat to mgo propeta
sok kow riyot moliggot no sobbangan
u mowwag kos sobbangan nod undiyon to linowt apuy woy dos daan tadda moomok nod ikulon deen mouraa kos od usok dutun
iru iddos sobbangan no iyon od ingumannon iddos umuun waad tomanon moliggot woy mosuppit woy simbokkad da kos od pokotuntuu tadda
antoy kow su saddook od kopiyod kow to konna bonnaan mgo propeta nod unduwon to koniyu
tid ontongngan sikandan moppiya kos botasan dan
d kokilaa row sikandan ukit to pinuungan dan iling to kayu nod kokilaa ukit to kandin no bunga
onunggeleng iddos kayun duhiyon diid bovunga to ubas woy dos baahon dii en od bovunga to igera
os moppiyon kayu od bovunga to moppiya piru iddos morat no kayu od bovunga en mandad to morat
u iddos moppiyon kayu konna en od bovunga to morat woy dos morat no kayu konnod bovunga to moppiya
os ipat kayu no konnod bovunga to moppiya od tompoddon woy id lumbag diyot apuy
een iling mandad tadda od kokilaa row iddos konna bonnaan mgo propeta ukit to pinuungan dan
onna langun taddot od ikahi koddi no ongaggon ongaggon od pokolonug diyon to kodharit onama ko konna idda ra en so od puung to id kopiit moy ku no riyot datas to langit
a otid inguma ron kos allow to kodhukum mouraa kos od ikahi koddi to ongaggon pousokka koy su ukit to ngaran du id ponudtuu roy iddos id poposaddoo to onama konami woy id poleggua roy dos mgo busow woy id puung koy to mouraan mokososoobbu
iru od tovakon ku en sikandan to aa a mid kilaa koniyu
oriyu kow koddi sikiyu langun nod puung to morat
a iddos ahad ondoy nod pominog to koddin mgo osengan woyd puung tadda nokoiling sikandin to minuvu no moraom kos koovottan no id poohinat to baoy riyot batu
had id dunnas kos monokkaan uran woy id lanog woy nosuhat to monokkaan kaamag iddon baoy waa en nopiloy oyya su iddos pounsaran tadda idda en so batu
a idda mandad so minuvu no id pominog to koddin osengan piru waa rin puungi nokoiling sikandin to minuvu no id poohinat to baoy riyot paok
o id dunnas kos monokkaan uran woy id lanog nosuhat to monokkaan kaamag iddos baoy nopiloy idda woy nohobbahobba en
a to nopongnga osenga ni isas idda nosoobbuwan iddos mgo minuvu su iddos nonaw rin duwon en kotuusan konna iling taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
a to id potupang si isas pomon diyot lovuntud mouraan minuvu kos id tintinundug kandin
uwon sokkad no minuvu no duwon bohok no etet no id porani ki isas woy mid lingkood diyot isowwan din woy mid ikahi to ongaggon nokosaddoo a nod pokouli ka kaayt molibmit no bohok ku otik id kopii ru
a id somaddan ni isas iddos minuvu woy id ikohiyan din to yya id kopii ku en
a od kouliyan kad
dda ron en worad iddos etet din
ahin isas kandin to o ru vo id ponudtuu ini riyot ahad ondoy ko konna undiyon ka to tohodbuwis amoyd poontong to lawa ru
oy boggoy ka to buwis no id suhu ni oises amoyd posivonnaa riyot mgo minuvu no nouliyan kad
a to id inguma si isas diyot apernaum duwon sokkad no kopitan to mgo sundau to oma no mid porani amoyd nganoy kandin
ahi rin to ongaggon duwon sudsuhuwon ku no diid pokowaong woy lampas no mosakit kos od geddamon din
ahin isas kandin to yya kuo kid meen sud bowiyan ku sikandin
iru mid tavak iddos kopitan to ongaggon motuus ka koddi deen konna a ollog nod pousok kikow riyot baoy ku
sengow robbo woy od kouliyan en iddos sudsuhuwon ku
okosaddoo a kaay oyyos ahad siyak noiraom a to kotungud taddot mowwet pa koddi woy duwon mandad mgo sundau no noiraom to koddin kotungud
tid ikahi a riyot sokkad no panow kad na od ipanow en sikandin
oy otid ikahi a riyot sokkad no ndini ka na od undini en sikandin
oy otid ikohiyan ku iddos koddin uripon no uungiyu ini na od puungan din en
o norinog idda ni isas nosoobbuwan sikandin woy id osengan din iddos mgo minuvu nid tintinundug kandin kahi rin to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no waa poron nokita ku no minuvu no duwon dakkoon kodsalig no iling kaay ahad dini to srael
omotawi row
nit morin allow mouraa kos od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama no id pomon diyon tid tollak woy pomon diyon tid saop woy od unsad sikandan amoyd kaan duma ongki braham ki saac woy ki acob
iru iddos koubbaran ni srael no sikandan en nanoy kos od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama id lumbag diyot mosuksukirom
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon dan woyd pogkihot sikandan to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon dan
a mid ikahi si isas diyot kopitan to li kad bo su notuman don iddos id pomokayan du
dda ron en nouliyan don iddos sudsuhuwon to kopitan
a mid undiyon si isas to baoy ni edro
o kodinguma rin dutun nokita rin iddos baay no onuhang ni edro no id oilogga su id momonit
d somaddan ni isas kos bollad din woy idda ron en nouliyan sikandin
a mid onnow sikandin woy id sondad to kokaan atag ki isas
o od kosagkup don id piyod to mgo minuvu riyot ki isas iddos mouraan id losuran to busow woy dos nongovohokan
o kodsuhu rin da en mid leggua iddos mgo busow woy nouliyan dos langun no novohokan
otomanan ini su amoy od kotuman iddos id poikahi to onama ki propeta saias no mid ungketen to ikandin en kos id awa to od ponggeddamon to lawa ta woy sikandin kos id awa to mgo bohok ta
a to nokita ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu no id lolivuung diyot kandin mid ikahi sikandin diyot mgo tinodduwan din to d undiyon ki to dipaat lanow
iru to waa pa sikandan nokoipanow duwon sokkad no tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises no id porani ki isas woy mid ikahi to ohodnonaw od duma a kikow ahad ingkon ka od undiyon
id tavak si isas to oppiya pa kos mgo lokivot su duwon od koubpan woy dos mgo manuk su duwon saag
iru siyak no nak to inuvu waa en notooo nod koimooyyan ku
a duwon mandad sokkad taddot od pondumoruma kandin no mid ikahi to ongaggon od uli a pa woy otik nolobbong don iddos amoy ku od duma a kikow
iru kahin isas kandin to odtohonowd iddos minatoy no od lobbong taddot mgo minuvu no waa umuun waad tomanon
iru sikkow duma ka koddi
a id sakoy si isas to bollangay woy mid duma kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din
igkow id doppot kos monokkaan kaamag woy id lapow ron kos mgo baud diyot bollangay deen asow ran don od koonnod
iru si isas nokotintinuhon
a id porani iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id sukaa ran sikandin kahi ran to ongaggon tovangi koy
d koonnod kid man moho ini
id tavak si isas to ambot od kovaakkan kow
rayn disok kos kopomakoy row
a id lohinat sikandin woy id sugga rin iddos kaamag woy mgo baud amoyd soro woy idda ron en id tivonok kos langun
rayn nosoobbuwan iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id poikohiyoy ran to ndoy moho inin minuvu no ahad iddos kaamag woy mgo baud id dumoruma kandin
a id ponayun onsi isas taman to id inguma ran diyot dipaa to lanow no riyot lugaa to mgo toho adara
o kodponog din mid sinuggung kandin iddos oruwon minuvu no id losuran to mgo busow
d pomon sikandan diyot langub nod lovongngan woy oraroy ran no movuut deen waa od pokoukit taddon lugaa
igkow sikandan id pomehes kahi ran to ikkow no nak to onama ondan man kos lavut du konami
d silutan koy vo nikkow ahad konna pa ini kos ollog no timpu
a konna orayn moriyu rutun duwon mouraan bavuy nid ponuwaa
een id poerueru ki isas iddos mgo busow kahi ran to tid poowan koy nikkow poolina koy nod lasud duwot mgo bavuy
a kahin isas to iyon kowd
een id ponleggua iddos mgo busow woy id losuran dan iddos mgo bavuy
dda ron en id pouharus diyot daama iddos mgo bavuy woy nongouug diyot lanow woy nongoonnod
o nokita idda taddot mgo tohodtamong to mgo bavuy id lungkossu ran poundiyot bonuwa woy id ponudtuu ran iddos langun no notomanan taddot oruwon minuvu nid losuran to mgo busow
urisu iddos langun no minuvu nid oubpa taddon bonuwa id undiyot ki isas woy id poerueru ran nod awa sikandin diyot lugaa ran
a id sakoy onsi isas to bollangay woy id livod diyot dipaa to lanow amoy od uli riyot kandin no bonuwa
o riyon don sikandin duwon mgo minuvu nid undiyon to kandin no id sayung to minuvu nid patoy kos lawa no id oilogga riyot ikam
o nokita ni isas no dakkoo kos kodsalig dan id ikohiyan din iddos novohokan to uwod yo kod kaanu su id posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru
a rutun duwon mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises kohingginawa ran to e id sosumpalit ikon minuvu su imman moho to sikandin kos onama
iru nosorollan ni isas kos diyot poomdom dan woy id ikohiyan din sikandan to ambot ungketen kos poomdom dow
ngkon man musing kos moomok nod osengon
dda vo so od ikahi no d posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru o iddos od ikahi no ohinat woy ipanow ka
iru id pokita ku koniyu no siyak no nak to inuvu duwon kotungud ku kaay to ampowt ingod nod posinsya to mgo saa
a id osengan din iddos minuvu no id patoy kos lawa kahi rin to ohinat ka piyoddow kos ikam du woy uli kad bo
dda ron en id lohinat sikandin woy id uli
o nokita idda to mgo minuvu nosoobbuwan sikandan woy novaakkan woy id doong dan kos onama no id boggoy to kotungud no iling tadda riyon to minuvu
a ponayun mid ipanow si isas pomon dutun woy nokita rin iddos tohodsukut to buhis no id ngoranan ki ateo nid ounsad diyot od boovoyaran to buhis
ahin isas to uma ka koddi
een id lohinat si ateo woy id duma kandin
opongnga idda id kaan onsi isas diyot baoy ni ateo woy duwon id inguma no mouraan tohodsukut to buhis woy duma pon mosaasaa no id lommung nid kaan duma ki isas woy taddot mgo tinodduwan din
o nokita idda to mgo ariseo id ikohiyan dan iddos mgo tinodduwan ni isas to ambo moho to ikos tohodnonaw row id lommung nid kaan duwot mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dumon mosaasaa
o norinog idda ni isas id tavak din sikandan ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos mgo minuvu no waa bohok konnod koilangan to doktor ko konna idda ra en so duwon bohok
oyyari row tod labbot iddos kohulugan taddot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to aa en koruanon diyot koddi iddos mgo buwis dow
yon ku id kopii no od koeruwan kow to dumaa ponayun mid ikahi si isas to aa a mid undini amoyd nangkap taddot mgo motallong ko konna idda en so mgo mosaasaa
a duwon mgo tinodduwan ni uan no ohodboutismu no id porani ki isas woy mid intud kahi ran to ikami woy dos mgo ariseo od puasa koy
iru mambot ikos mgo tinodduwan du dii man od puasa
id tavak si isas to tik duwon kosaa od kaanu vo iddos mgo oukuy no moranit ginawa taddot lammid osawa laggun to duma ran pa sikandin
ii en
iru od inguma kos timpu nod puasa ran otid ongayon don pomon diyot kandan iddos id osawa
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas kahi rin to aa minuvu nod tapong to lammin ogget diyot tapoyn umpak
yya su otid pippiyan don idda od kipos dos ogget nid tapong woy od lowwag peen kos bendas
ling mandad tadda waa minuvu nod taaw to lammin binu nod bovuwak poron diyot tapoyn tootawwan no binovallan pomot kindaa to oyama oyyos od bottu en moho idda
a od korattan da en iddos tootawwan woy od kouwakkan dos binu
urisu koilangan no iddos lammin binu diyon en mandad id taaw to lammin tootawwan amoy waa od kouwakkan
aggun tid ooseng pa si isas duwon id inguma no sokkad no ponguu to simbaan to mgo udio
d lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan ni isas woy mid ikahi to ddos baayn anak ku id patoy gena piru ahad ungketen undiyon ka pa woy somaddiyu sikandin amoyd kouyag
een id lohinat si isas woy mid duma kandin
d duma mandad iddos mgo tinodduwan din
a laggun tid ipanow ran duwon sokkad no baay no noosayan to bohok din su id longossan sikandin no diid soro daom don to sopuuoruwon lahun
d porani sikandin diyot inoyyuhan ni isas amoyd somaddan din kos ubpu to umpak ni isas
u kohingginawa rin no had od pokosomad a ra to umpak din od kouliyan ad en
o id loingoy si isas nokita rin iddos baay woy kahi rin to ri yo kod kaanu
ouliyan kad pomon to kopomakoy ru
dda ron en nouliyan sikandin
o id inguma ron si isas diyot baoy taddot ponguu nokita rin iddos id lolaantuy atag to kodlobbong woy dos mouraan minuvu no id pondaawit
d ikohiyan din sikandan to eggua kow pa
aa id patoy inis anak ko konna id tinuhon da
iru id kosuatan dan da en sikandin
o id ponleggua ron iddos mgo minuvu mid usok si isas woy id somaddan din iddos bollad taddot anak woy id onnow sikandin
a iddos dinoggan mokaatag kaayn notomanan nokosoob diyot intiru taddon ingod
a to id ipanow si isas pomon dutun duwon oruwon mama no butud nid tinundug kandin woy id pomehes sikandan no mid ungketen to ubbad ni avid koeruwan ka konami
o kodinguma ni isas diyot baoy nod undiyonnan din id porani kandin iddos oruwon butud
a mid intud si isas kandan kahi rin to d pomakoy kow vo nod pokouli a koniyu
id tavak sikandan to yya od ongaggon
a id somaddan ni isas kos mata ran woy kahi rin to d kopuungan en ini rinit koniyu pomon to kopomakoy row
dda ron en nokokita ron sikandan
ahin isas kandan to d loglohottan ku sikiyu no yo row ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy inis id puungan ku koniyu
iru id ipanow sikandan woy id soob dan da en tid ponudtuu riyot langun dutun no lugaa iddos mokaatag ki isas
o mid awa ron iddos oruwa duwon mandon id inguma riyot ki isas woy id piyod dan kos minuvun noommow su id losuran to busow
a nopongnga id poleggua ni isas dos busow od pokoooseng don iddos minuvu
rayn nosoobbuwan kos mgo minuvu kahi ran to uu
aa poron kotomanan no iling kaay rini to intirut ingod to srael
iru duwon mgo ariseo no mid ikahi to d pokopoleggua sikandin to mgo busow oyyos id boggayan man sikandin to kotuusan ni oivuyan no ponguu ran
a id lingkus ni isas iddos langun no bonuwa woy bariyu taddon lugaa
d nonaw sikandin diyot mgo simbaan to udio woy id ponudtuu rin iddos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to kodharit onama woy id bowiyan din kos nokodossoosson bohok
o nokita rin iddos mouraan minuvu noeruwan sikandin su id posupittan sikandan woy notompoddan to puhawang iling to mgo karnero no waa tohodtamong
een kahi rin diyot mgo tinodduwan din to ddos mgo minuvu od pokoiling to ommoy no ollog don nod kottuwon
rayn dakkoo kos od kottuwon piru disok da kos mgo tohodkottu
urisu buyuwa row riyot onama no komunoy taddot ommayon amoyd popiyod sikandin to mgo tohodkottu
a id umow ni isas iddos sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din woy id boggayan din sikandan to kotungud to kodpoleggua to mgo busow woy kotungud nod pokouli to nokodossoosson bohok
a ini en kos mgo ngaran taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles
i imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro woy dos suwod din no si ndres dos toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan no mgo anak ni ebedeo si elipe si artolome si omas si ateo no tohodsukut to buhis si antiago no anak ni lfeo si adeo si imon no mohingginawa to ingod din woy si udas scariote nod boligya ki isas
d suhu ni isas iddos sopuuoruwon apostoles din woy id pomonduwan din sikandan kahi rin to o kowd undiyon to mgo lugaa to konna mgo udio woy riyot mgo bonuwa to toho amaria
yon dow undiyonni iddos mgo duma ta no koubbaran ni srael su nokoiling sikandan to notarin no mgo karnero
iyot iponawon dow ponudtuu row no asow ron iddos kodharit onama
owii row iddos od pongkovohokan bodnawa row iddos id poomatoy bowii row kos duwon bohok no etet woy polegguaa row kos mgo busow
aa bayad dow kaayt kotungud no id boggoy ku koniyu deen yo kow mandad od povayad diyon to kodtavang dow
o kowd piyod to soopi ahad sinsilyu ra
o kow mandad od piyod to kavii ilisan no umpak sandalyas woy tukod
yya su iddos minuvu nod puung ollog nod boggayan to langun no koilonganon din
a otid inguma kow riyot sokkad no bonuwa o bariyu nangkap kow to moppiyon minuvu nod tanggap koniyu
iyon kow vo tahad oubpa to baoy rin taman tod awa kowd taddon bonuwa
iyot kodusok dow to sokkad no baoy oseng kow to uopa nod pokotanggap kow to kopiyannoy to onama
tik moppiya kos kodtanggap koniyu taddot id ubpa tadda na id pokita en to onama kos kopiyannoy rin kandan
iru otik dii ran od tanggap koniyu konna en mandad idda od puungan to onama riyot kandan
tik duwon ubpan o bonuwa no diid tanggap o diid pominog koniyu na tanan kow rutun
iyot kodawa row podpara row kos boubbuk to livuta riyot paa row patow no waa id pokosondit dan koniyu
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no riyot allow to kodhukum movoggat pa kos silut taddot id oubpa taddon bonuwa kuntra taddot mgo toho odoma woy mgo toho omora
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to omotawi row
d popiyod ku sikiyu riyot morat no mgo minuvu
d pokoiling kow to mgo karnero nod isau riyot movuut no mgo tuyyang
een koilangan no mopandoy kow piru koilangan mandad no waa id pokosawoy koniyu
antoy kow oyyos duwon mgo minuvu nod ammot koniyu
d boggoy kow nikandan diyot bollad to mgo tohodhukum woy od ponlompossan kow riyot mgo simbaan to udio
omon to kopomakoy row koddi id poisau kow riyot mgo gubernador woy mgo hari
a rutun id pokoponudtuu row kos oppiyon inoggan diyot kandan woy riyon to konna mgo udio
tid intudinturan kow nikandan yo kowd kaaggow ko ondan kos id tavak dow su idda ra en no uras od tuntulan kow to ollog nod osengon dow
yya su iddos osengan dow konnad koniyu ko konna pomon en to spiritu to onamon moy ta
a iddon timpu duwon mgo toosuwod nod unoy od boggoy to suwod dan diyot bollad to dumon minuvu amoyd imotayan
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo amoy id boggoy ran kos mgo anak dan amoyd poimotayan
dda mandad so mgo anak od atu to amoy woy inoy ran woyd poimotayan dan
d kolingasai kow to langun no minuvu pomon to kopomakoy row koddi
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod tiis to kosupittan taman to kotompusan od kotobbus en
tid posupittan kow riyot sokkad no bonuwa lukut kow poriyu riyon to osson bonuwa
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no to dii row pa od kopongnga kos id popuungan ku koniyu riyot langun no bonuwa to srael siyak no nak to inuvu od livod don
aa tinodduwan no lampas pa taddot kandin no tohodnonaw woy waa uripon no lampas pa taddot kandin no amu
een iddos tinodduwan od posolamat sikandin ko nokoloppa sikandin taddot tohodnonaw rin
oy dos uripon od posolamat sikandin ko nokoloppa sikandin taddot amu rin
tik siyak no ponguu row od ngoranan a nikandan no ponguu to mgo busow iyon kow pobbo no mgo sakup ku lampas peen no morat kos id ngaran dan koniyu
een yo kowd kovaakki kandan oyyos waa id tombunan no konnod kokita woy waa id ollos no konnod kosorollan
ddos id ponudtuu ku koniyu riyot mosukirom koilangan no id ponudtuu row riyot koowangan
oy dos id nonaas ku koniyu koilangan no id pomehes dow amoyd korinog to mouraan minuvu
o row id kovaakki kos mgo minuvu nod pokopatoy ra to lawa piru diid pokopatoy to gimukud
yon ollog no id kovaakki row iddos onama oyyos sikandin kos duwon kotuusan nod lumbag diyon to linowt apuy konna ra iddos lawa ko konna idda mandad so gimukud
oomdomma row iddos kodtuhanuu to onama koniyu
u ahad iddos oruwon maya no od kovolli ra to orayn disok no kontidad waa en sokkad kandan nod patoy otik dii id kopiit onama
a iyon kow pobbo su ahad iddos bowvuut uu row nosorollan din kos kouralloy
een yo kowd kovaakki oyyos lampas peen kos koruanon dow taddot mouraan maya
ddos ahad ondoy nod tanggap koddi riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu od tonggapon ku mandad sikandin diyot isowwan to moy ku riyot datas to langit
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod elle koddi riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu od elleyan ku mandad sikandin diyot isowwan to moy ku riyot datas langit
o row poomdomma no mid undini a amoy duwon kosunayan kaay to ampowt ingod
u iyon bonnaa od kovaad iddos mgo minuvu pomon koddi
onunggeleng iddos mgo anak no mama od pokodsupak taddot amoy ran
dda mandad so mgo anak no baay od pokodsupak taddot inoy ran woy dos mgo mokaamung no baay od pokodsupak taddot onuhang dan no baay
ddos od pongkuntra to minuvu od pomon da en diyot sakup to kandin no pomilya
os ahad ondoy nod ginawa to amoy woy inoy rin no lampas pa taddot kodginawa rin koddi konna ollog no tinodduwan ku
oy dos id ginawa to mgo anak din no lampas pa taddot kodginawa rin koddi konna mandad ollog no tinodduwan ku
ddos ahad ondoy no diid tiyang to kandin no krus konna ollog no tinodduwan ku
yya su iddos minuvu nod konuhunan to umuu rin od koworan da en baling tadda
iru iddos od dumoruma koddi ahad od undag idda to kopotayan din duwon umuun waad tomanon
a iddos ahad ondoy nod tanggap koniyu id tanggap a mandad nikandin woy dos od tanggap koddi od tanggap mandad taddot id popiyod koddi
os ahad ondoy nod tanggap to propeta pomon to timbang bivig sikandin to onama duwon en ganti nod kotanggap din iling taddot od kotanggap to propeta
oy iddos ahad ondoy nod tanggap to motallong no minuvu pomon to motallong sikandin duwon en ganti nod kotanggap din iling taddot od kotanggap to motallong no minuvu
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy nod boggoy to ahad songopokawan no mohonnown oweg diyot minuvu nid poobbava pomon to kopomakoy rin koddi duwon en ganti nod kotanggap din pomon diyon to onama
opongnga id nonaw ni isas iddos langun tadda riyot sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din id ipanow sikandin woy id undiyon to mgo bonuwa no morani rutun amoyd nonaw woy od ponudtuu to kahit onama
a si uan no ohodboutismu diyon poron sikandin to prisuwan
o norinog din iddos id puungan ni isas rays id poundiyon din kos mgo tinodduwan din
o kodinguma ran dutun id inturan dan si isas kahi ran to ikkow ron been iddos id oongatan doy o od angat koy pa to ossa
id tavak si isas to ivod kow riyot ki uan woy ponudtuli row sikandin to langun no nokita woy norinog dow
yya su iddos mgo butud nokokita ron dos mgo pungku od pokoipanow ron dos duwon bohok no etet nouliyan don dos diid dinog od pokorinog don dos id poomatoy nongovadnow woy noponudtulan don mandad to oppiyon inoggan iddos mgo worowora
onudtuu row mandad kandin no moppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no waa kodduworuwa koddi
a to id ipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu nid suhu ni uan mid ikahi si isas mokaatag ki uan diyot mouraan minuvu kahi rin to o kodundiyon dow to ki uan to riyon pa sikandin to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa ondan man kos id imman dow nod kokita
dda vo so minuvu no od kopalinpalin kos poomdom iling to aggi nod kopiyodpiyod to kaamag
ndan man kos id kopii row nod kokita rutun
dda vo so minuvu no id oumpak to mahaa
onna en su iddos od oumpak to ungketen diyon da id oubpa to polasyu
ndan kos id kopii row nod kokita rutun
dda vo so propeta
yya en woy od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no iddos nokita row lampas pa sikandin to dumon mgo propeta
yyos sikandin en iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d popiyod ku iddos koddin tohodponudtuu no od unna kikow amoyd panoy to kodinguma ru
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no waa poron minuvu nid tobbow kaay to ampowt ingod no lampas pa ki uan no ohodboutismu
iru iddos minuvu no moobbava to langun no noiraom to kodharit onama lampas pa sikandin ki uan
omon poron to timpu to kodtigkanoy ni uan no ohodboutismu taman koungkay id udsuu peen iddos kodsoob to kodharit onama woy duwon mandad od pomohos nod kolonug sikandan diyon to kodhari rin
ddos langun no propeta woy dos diyot mgo uhu ni oises id posaddoo en taddot id poponudtuu to onama kandan mokaatag to kodhari rin taman to mid inguma si uan amoyd tuman taddon ponudtulon
oy otid tonggapon dow iddos id ponudtuu ran od koovottan dow no ini si uan sikandin en si lias no od livod
a sikiyu su duwon man tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to ndan man kos od koponunggelengan ku to mgo minuvu to inin timpu
okoiling sikandan to mgo anak nod ponggaaw riyot plasa
d poikohiyoy ran diyot mgo duma ran to d totogunggu koy atag koniyu piru waa kow man id sayow
d pondaawit koy piru waa kow man id sinoggow
os mgo minuvu to inin timpu od pokoiling en mandad taddon mgo anak oyyos iddot kodundini ni uan no ohodboutismu no inaayun id puasa woy waa id inom tod pokohubug od ikohiyon dan moho no id losuran sikandin to busow
oy siyak no nak to inuvu diyot kodundini ku nokita ran no mid kaan woy id inom a
een od ikohiyon dan moho no sopeton a woy polohubug woy oukuy a kun to mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dumon mosaasaa
iru ahad ungketen kos id ikahi ran ukit taddot pinuungan to onama od koposivonnalan no moraom kos koovottan din
opongnga tadda id sawoy ni isas iddos id ponoubpa riyot mgo bonuwa nid puungan din to mouraan mokososoobbu oyyos waa ran id sondit woyd tanan to mgo saa ran
ahi rin to okaaratarat kod kotomanan dow no mgo toho orazin woy sikiyu mandad no toho etsaida
u mouraa kos id puungan ku no mokososoobbu ruwot koniyu piru waa kow en id sondit woyd tanan to mgo saa row
tik diyon ku pa idda puungi to iro woy idon nouhoy ran don nanoy id oumpak to saku woy mid ounsad diyot ibmukon patow to kodsondit to mgo saa ran
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no riyot allow to kodhukum otik movoggat man kos silut taddot mgo toho iro woy idon iyon kow pobbo no toho orazin woy toho etsaida
oy sikiyu mandad no toho apernaum kunan dow ayu kod inguma kow taman to langit
iru id subbuk kow ra vos en baling diyon to linowt apuy
tik diyon ku pa puungi to odoma iddos mgo mokososoobbu nid puungan ku riyot koniyu tadda poron nanoy kos odoma taman koungkay
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no riyot allow to kodhukum otik movoggat man kos silut atag taddot mgo toho odoma iyon kow pobbo no toho apernaum
a iddon timpu id dasaa si isas kahi rin to moy ku sikkow en kos onama no komunoy to langit woy livuta
d doongon ku sikkow su iddos kovonnaan no waa ru id posaddoo riyot mgo minuvu nod ikahi no mopandoy woy moraom kos koovottan diyon du id posaddoo to mgo minuvu no movavow kos koovottan iling to mgo anak
yya en moy ku od doongon ku sikkow su ini meen kos kikown id kopii
opongnga idda mid ikahi si isas diyot mgo minuvu to d sanna koddi to moy ku iddos langun
yyos waa osson nokokilaa koddi idda ra en so moy ku su anak a man nikandin
oy waa mandad osson nokokilaa to moy ku siyak da en woy dos mgo minuvu no id kopii ku nod pokokilaa kandin
orani kow koddi sikiyu langun no novoggatan woy novolloy su od poimaayyon ku sikiyu
umoruma kow to koddin mgo suhu woy pohinonaw kow koddi amoy duwon koimooyyan dow su mosunay a woy mopoobbava
yya su iddos koddin mgo suhu moomok da nod tumanon woy mahan nod puungan
okkad no timpu to llowt odimolloy nokovaya onsi isas diyot kamot no duwon pinomuwon trigu
omon to id gutasan iddos mgo tinodduwan din id pomadti ran iddos mgo trigu woy id kusukusu ran idda woy id sungit
o nokita idda to mgo ariseo id ikohiyan dan si isas to ambot id puungan to mgo tinodduwan du iddos id diiyan diyon to llowt odimolloy
id tavak si isas to aa kow vo nokovasa taddot id puungan ni arin avid woy taddot mgo duma rin iddot id gutasan sikandan
d usok sikandin diyon to baoyt onama woy id kaan din iddos paan no id buwis diyot onama
ddon paan id diiyan nod kannon to ahad ondoy woy idda ra en so mgo tohodbuwis kos od pokokaan tadda
o row mandad osenga no waa kow nokovasa taddot nosulat diyon to mgo uhu ni oises no iddos mgo tohodbuwis od puung diyot undae to ipat llowt odimolloy ahad id diiyan kos kodpuung taddon allow
iru waa ran man nokosaa
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no duwon dini koungkay no iddos kotungud din lampas pa taddot templo
uwon id posulat to onama no mid ungketen to aa en koruanon diyot koddi iddos mgo buwis dow
yon ku id kopii no eeruwon kow riyot duma
tik noovottan dow nanoy kos kohulugan kaay dii row od hukuman iddos minuvu no waa saa
yyos siyak no nak to inuvu duwon kotungud ku ko ondan kos od puungan ahad diyon to llowt odimolloy
a mid tanan si isas dutun woy id undiyon sikandin to simbaan to mgo udio
utun duwon minuvu no id patoy kos divauyn bollad
uwon mandad mgo ariseo rutun no od nangkap to pounayan nod kouug dan si isas no nokopuung to saa
een id inturan dan sikandin kahi ran to ndan nokoikuu vo riyot mgo uhu ni oises iddos kodbawi riyon to llowt odimolloy
id tavak si isas to onunggeleng duwon sokkad no karnero row woy nouug idda riyot moraom no bobbo sasang to llowt odimolloy
ndan dii row vo idda od botunon
tik dakkoo man kos koruanon taddot karnero iyon pobbo iddos minuvu
een id ikuu en diyot mgo uhu ni oises iddos keton kodtavang to duma ahad diyon to llowt odimolloy
a id ikohiyan ni isas iddos minuvu to otongngow kos bollad du
a id kottong din kos bollad din woy idda ron en nouliyan idda no nokoiling don taddot divauyn bollad din
dda mandad so mgo ariseo id leggua woy id pomuhawang ko momonnu ran od koimotayan si isas
osorollan ni isas iddos puhawang dan deen id awa sikandin dutun
ouraa kos minuvu nid tinundug kandin woy id bowiyan din iddos langun nod kovohokan
iru id ikohiyan din sikandan no konna ran id ponudtuu riyot duma iddos mokaatag kandin
omon kaay notuman iddos id poposaddoo to onama ukit ki propeta saias no mid ungketen to ni en kos sinuhuwan no id aam ku
d dokollan ku sikandin to ginawa woy oraroy ku nid kahaai
d poiroomman ku sikandin to koddin spiritu woyid posaddoo rin diyot konna mgo udio ko momonnu ran od komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
ii sikandin od pokidapuu o od pomehes woydii mandad sikandin od ooseng to monokkaa riyot doraanon
d tovangan din nod mosalig iddos moomet diyot kopomakoy woydos notompoddan to puhawang
onna sikandin od soro taman tod kotuman iddos motallong no dontulon to onama
oy sikandin kos od immanon to langun no minuvu
a duwon minuvun novutud woy noommow su id losuran sikandin to busow woy id piyod sikandin diyot ki isas
d poleggua rin iddos busow woy nokoooseng don iddos minuvu woy nokokita ron
een nosoobbuwan iddos nongolivuung dutun kahi ran to ikandin ayu iddos lubbad ni avid no id oongatan ta nod hari keta
iru to norinog idda to mgo ariseo mid ikahi sikandan to e
d pokopoleggua sikandin to mgo busow su iyon id boggoy kandin to kotuusan si elsebul no ponguu to mgo busow
a nosorollan ni isas kos diyot poomdom dan deen mid ikahi sikandin to ddos ahad ondoy no hari to sokkad no kohoriyan nod pounayoy od povunuwoy taddot mgo sakup din konnod kouhoy od kohobba en kos kohoriyan din
oy dos mgo sakup to sokkad no bonuwa o pomilya otid pounayoy nod poimotayoy od pokodsuwoysuwoy en sikandan
een otid unayon ni oivuyan to kodpaawa iddos mgo sakup din iyon kohulugan tadda no id unoy rin kos kougolingun din woy od kohobba iddos kandin da en no kohoriyan
a od tommanon dow no nokopoleggua a to busow pomon to kotuusan ni elsebul
tik bonnaa idda dos mgo tinodduwan dow ukit bo mandad to kotuusan ni elsebul iddos kodpoleggua ran to mgo busow
had sikandan od pokoposivonnaa en no soyup kos id oseng dow
iru pomon to id poleggua ku man kos mgo busow ukit to kotuusan to spiritu to onama posivonnaa ini no iddos kodharit onama kaay ron to koniyu
otalu kud si oivuyan oyya su id poleggua kud iddos mgo busow no mgo sakup din
yyos waa minuvu nod pokousok diyot baoy to monokkaan minuvu amoyd ahaw to korotuwan din otik konna pa unna od bokuwon iddos monokkaan minuvu idda pa od kaahaw rin idda
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to ddos ahad ondoy no diid poomig koddi id supak en koddi
oy dos diid tavang koddi nod limud to mgo minuvu to onama od podsuwoy kandan
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no od koposinsyan to onama dos ahad ondan no saa to minuvu ahad pa iddos kodsumpalit kandin
iru iddos kodsumpalit to his no spiritu konnad en od koposinsyan
os ahad ondoy nod ooseng to morat mokaatag koddi no nak to inuvu od koposinsyan pa
iru iddos od sumpalit to his no spiritu konna en od koposinsyan to inin timpu ahad init od inguma pa
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos moppiyon kayu moppiya mandad kos bunga
ling mandad tadda dos morat no kayu morat mandad kos bunga
yyos od kokilaa iddos kayu ukit to bunga tadda
ikiyu iling kow to mgo uwod nod laas
aa moppiya nod kooseng dow su morat kos diyot ginawa row
o ondan kos diyot ginawa to minuvu idda en mandad kos od leggua to bivig din
os moppiyon minuvu od ooseng to moppiya oyya su moppiya kos diyot ginawa rin
iru iddos morat no minuvu od ooseng to morat oyyos morat meen kos diyot ginawa rin
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no riyot allow to kodhukum dos ipat sokkad koilangan nod tavak to langun no waa koruan no nooseng dan
u ukit taddot mgo nooseng dow idda en kos od gomiton to onama to kodhukum koniyu kod silutan kow o dii
a duwon mgo ariseo woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no mid ikahi to ohodnonaw pokitanna koy to mokososoobbu nod posivonnaa no id popiyod ka en to onama
iru mid tavak sikandin to ikiyu no mgo minuvu to inin timpu oraroy kow no morat woy id inoyyuhan dow kos onama
d kopii row nod pokokita to mokososoobbu piru waa id pokita ku koniyu ko konna idda ra en so notomanan ni onas no propeta
yyos si onas diyon sikandin to gottok to dakkoon ngaap daom to otollun allow woy bulli
ling mandad tadda siyak no nak to inuvu diyon a to lovongngan ku daom to otollun allow woy bulli
iyot allow to kodhukum od lohinat iddos mgo toho inive woy od oseng no iddos mgo minuvu to inin timpu ollog en nod silutan
yya su dangan to norinog dan iddos kodponudtuu ni onas id sondit sikandan woy id tanan to mgo saa ran
iru koungkay dini ron kos lampas pa ki onas piru waa kow man id sondit woy id tanan to mgo saa row
a ungketen dad en mandad iddos ayna to iba
iyot allow to kodhukum od lohinat sikandin woy od ooseng no iddos mgo minuvu to inin timpu ollog en nod silutan
u ahad orayn moriyu iddos id ubpan din piru mid undiyon sikandin to ki arin olomon amoyd pominog da en taddot osengan to hari no moraom kos koovottan
iru koungkay dini ron kos lampas pa ki olomon no moraom kos koovottan piru waa kow man id pominog to nonaw rin
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to tid leggua kos busow riyot minuvu od louklouk idda riyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa lugaa su od nonangkap tod koimooyyan din piru waad kokita rin
een od ikahi sikandin to d livod a ron baling diyot id ubpan ku
a riyot kodinguma rin nokita rin no waa id ubpa rutun id lemasan idda woy notooo ron
d ipanow sikandin woyd pongakat to pittun mgo busow no lampas pa kos komorattoy
d losuran dan iddos minuvu woy od ubpan dan don
a iddos od kotomanan taddon minuvu od lampas peen no morat taddot unna
ngketen en mandad kos od kotomanan to morat no mgo minuvu to inin timpu
aggun to id ooseng pa si isas diyot mgo minuvu mid inguma iddos inoy woy mgo suwod din
d aangat sikandan diyot lama woy id poumow ran sikandin su duwon od osengon dan
een duwon mid ikahi kandin to ir iddos inoy ru woy mgo suwod du id aangat diyot leggua su duwon kun od osengon dan kikow
id tavak si isas to yya piru id pokita ku koniyu ko ondoy kos inoy ku woy mgo suwod ku
a id toddu rin iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin to ikandan en kos inoy ku woy mgo suwod ku
u iddos ahad ondoy nod tuman to id kopiit moy ku no riyot datas to langit sikandan en kos inoy ku mgo tobboy woy mgo suwod ku
a iddon allow id leggua si isas to baoy woy id undiyon to ibpit to lanow woy mid unsad sikandin dutun
omon to orayn mouraa kos minuvu no id lolivuung diyot kandin id penek sikandin diyot bollangay woy mid unsad amoyd nonaw
os mgo minuvu nid loohinat diyot ibpit to lanow id pominog kandin
a mouraa kos id nonaw rin kandan ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to uwon sokkad no minuvu no id undiyon to kamot amoyd savud to bonni
a riyot kodsavud din duwon mgo bonni no nongouug diyot daan woy id ponuktuk idda to mgo manuk nod layanglayang
os duma nongouug diyot botuwon
a pomon to movavow ra kos livuta goos da idda id lottob
iru to mokountud don kos allow naanos idda woy pomon to waa goli nokodoralig nahangu ron
os duma nongouug diyot mgo sopiniton
o id tuvu iddos sopinit id poomatoy dos lammid tuvu su nokubmutan to mgo sopinit
iru iddos duma nongouug diyot moppiyon livuta
a moppiya kos tuvu tadda woy id bovunga
os duma ollogollog da kos bunga dos duma mandad dakkoo woy dos duma pa orayn dakkoo
a kahin isas to ikiyu su duwon man tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
a id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan woy mid intud kahi ran to ambot id poukit du to ponunggelengan otid nonaw ka to mgo minuvu
id tavak sikandin to ikiyu id boggayan kowd to onama to koovottan taddot waa rin id posaddoo dangan mokaatag to kodhari rin
iru riyot dumon minuvu waa rin ini id posaddoo
u iddos minuvu nod pomakoy taddot norinog din koddi od duhangan peen kos koovottan din
iru iddos minuvu no diid pomakoy od ongayon peen diyot kandin ahad iddos disok no koovottan din
ni en kos unayan no id nonaw a kandan ukit to mgo ponunggelengan su amoy ahad od totongtong dan dii ran od pokokita woy ahad od pominog dan dii ran od pokaabbot
a notuman don diyot kandan iddos id poposaddoo to onama ukit ki saias no mid ungketen to had peen id saud dan kos tolinga ran dii en sikandan od pokaabbot
had ayas dan peen od totongtong dii en sikandan en od pokokita
u inin mgo minuvu motoggas kos uu
d povovongoo ran woy id povovutud
u otik dii ran idda od puungan saddook od pokokita ran woyd pokorinog woy od pokaabbot sikandan
d livod sikandan diyot koddi woy od posinsyan ku kos mgo saa ran
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to iru sikiyu moppiya kod kotomanan dow su od pokokita woyd pokorinog kow
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no mouraa iddos mgo propeta woy motallong no mgo minuvu no od kopiyan nod pokokita taddot nokita row piru waa ran en idda nokita
d kopii ran nod pokorinog taddot norinog dow piru waa ran en idda norinog
a paayyad kow pominog amoyd pokaabbot kow to kohulugan taddot ponunggelengan mokaatag to minuvu no id savud to bonni
os daan no nouuhan to bonni idda en so mgo minuvu no nokorinog mokaatag to kodharit onama piru waa ran nokaabbot
een id undiyon si oivuyan woy id sukabmit din iddos kahit onama no nokopomuwa riyot pusung dan
a iddos botuwon no nouuhan to bonni idda en so nokorinog to kahit onama woy idda ron en nahaa ran to kodtanggap tadda
iru waa goli idda nokodoralig diyot pusung dan woy sinsinahaw ra kos kopomakoy ran
yya su otid inguma kos kosupittan pomon to kodtanggap dan to kahit onama konnad sikandan od ponayun
os sopiniton no nouuhan to bonni idda en so nokorinog to kahit onama piru inaayun dan od popoomdom to mgo sowkuu to koubpa ran woy dos kodginawa ran to soopi
een iling to id kubmutan iddos kahi no norinog dan woy waa nokovunga
a iddos moppiyon livuta no nouuhan to bonni idda en so mgo minuvu no nokorinog to kahit onama woy noovottan dan idda woy moppiya kos bunga tadda riyot koubpa ran
os duma ollogollog da kos bunga to kopomakoy ran dos duma mandad dakkoo woy dos duma pa orayn dakkoo
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to os kodharit onama iling kaay
uwon minuvu no id savud to moppiyon bonni riyot kamot din
okkad no bulli to nokotinuhon don sikandin woy dos mgo tohodpuung din id undiyon iddos kuntra rin woy id sovuran din idda to bonnit sabbot woy id ipanow sikandin
o id tuvu ron iddos mgo moppiyon bonni woy id bovunga ron idda rin pa nokilaa no duwon bos mgo sabbot no nokosambut tadda
a mid undiyon to komunoy taddot kamot iddos mgo tohodpuung woy kahi ran to ir moppiyon bonni iddos id savud du riyot kamot du
ngkon man pomon dos mgo sabbot
id tavak iddos komunoy to ddos id puung kaay dos kuntra kuahi taddot mgo tohodpuung to d kopiyan ka vo nod pomoruton doy iddos mgo sabbot
id tavak iddos komunoy to o row pa su otid pomoruton dow iddos mgo sabbot saddook od kaapii iddos pinomuwa
odtohona row ron nod tuvu iddos sabbot duma taddot pinomuwa taman to tingkottu
yyos diyon kangkan to tingkottu od suhuwon ku iddos mgo tohodkottu nod unnan dan tod pomarut iddos mgo sabbot woy od bogkosson idda amoyd loowon
opongnga id polimud ku kandan iddos nokottu ran diyon to budiga
a id itulan dan ni isas to sokkad mandon no ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos kodharit onama nokoiling to orayn disok no bonni no id pomuwa riyot kamot
rayn disok ini to langun no bonni piru otid tuvu ron mowwet pa ini to dumon pinomuwa taman tod kovovallan no kayu
oy od ponsosaag diyot mgo panga kaay iddos mgo manuk nod layanglayang
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas
ahi rin to ddos kodharit onama nokoiling to potuvu to paan no id angoy to baay woy id podsambut din idda to oruwompuulimmon kilu no horina taman to id tuvu iddos tivuk no horina
a diyot langun no kodnonaw ni isas to mgo minuvu mokaatag to kodharit onama id poukit din to mgo ponunggelengan
aa sikandin id nonaw kandan no konna ukit to mgo ponunggelengan
d puungan din ini su amoy od kotuman iddos osengan to sokkad no propeta no mid ungketen to d poukit ku to mgo ponunggelengan kos kodnonaw ku kandan
d ponudtuu ku iddos waa pa id posaddoo pomon poron to kodbovaa to ingod
a nopongnga idda id tanan si isas diyot mgo minuvu woy mid usok sikandin diyot baoy
d porani kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid intud kahi ran to aabbotlabbot du konami kos kohulugan taddot ponunggelengan mokaatag to mgo sabbot diyot kamot
id tavak si isas to ddos minuvu no mid savud taddot moppiyon bonni siyak en idda no nak to inuvu
a iddos kamot ini en so ingod
os moppiyon bonni idda en so mgo minuvu no sakup to kodharit onama
oy dos mgo sabbot idda en so mgo minuvu no sakup ni oivuyan
ddos kuntra no id savud taddot mgo unda idda en si oivuyan
os tingkottu idda en so kotompusan to ingod woy dos mgo tohodkottu idda en so mgo ponolihan
a iling taddot mgo sabbot nod limuron amoyd loowon ungketen dad en mandad kos od kotomanan diyot kotompusan to ingod
iyak no nak to inuvu od suhu to mgo ponolihan ku no od limuron pomon diyot koddin kodhari iddos langun nod ookoy to duma nod puung to saa woy dos langun no id puung to kororattan
oy id lumbag sikandan diyon to linowt apuy
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon dan woyd pogkihot sikandan to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon dan
iru iddos motallong no mgo minuvu to onama od seaa iling to allow riyon to kodharit onamon moy ran
een su duwon man tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
a ponayun mid ituu si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos kodharit onama nokoiling to buawan no id lobbong diyot livuta
o nokita idda to sokkad no minuvu oray sikandin no nahaa
a id tombunan din mandon idda woy id boligya rin iddos langun no koruwonnan din amoyd kovolli rin iddon livuta
a iling mandad kaay kos kodharit onama
uwon sokkad no nigusyanti no od nangkap to motoos no mgo perlas
o nokita rin kos sokkad no perlas no dakkoo kos koruanon id boligya rin kos langun no koruwonnan din amoy id bolli tadda
a iling mandad kaay kos kodharit onama riyon to mgo minuvu rin
uwon pukut no id tuntun diyot dahat woy nokodossoosson okodossoosson ngaap kos noutoo
tid koponnu ron iddos pukut od goyoron idda to mgo tohodngongaap poundiyon to ibpit
a od ounsad sikandan dutun woy od podossan dan iddos ngaap
os moppiyon ngaap id lasud dan diyot bukag woy dos morat id lumbag dan
ngketen dad en mandad kos od kotomanan diyot kotompusan to ingod
d undini kos mgo ponolihan woy od ossan dan kos morat no mgo minuvu pomon diyot mgo motallong
oy id lumbag sikandan diyon to linowt apuy
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon dan woyd pogkihot sikandan to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon dan
a mid intud si isas taddot mgo tinodduwan din kahi rin to okaabbot kow vo kaayt langun no id oseng ku koniyu
id tavak sikandan to yya nokaabbot koy
ahin isas to urisu iddos ipat tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises no dakkoo kos sinorollan mokaatag to kodharit onama od pokoiling sikandin to minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan no id pokopoleggua rin pomon diyot kandin no budiga
yyos konna ra iddos tapoyn nonaw kos id pokononaw rin ko konna idda mandad so lammi
opongnga id nonaw ni isas iddon mgo ponunggelengan id tanan sikandin dutun woy id livod diyot bonuwa no id dokollan din
a id nonaw sikandin diyot ambaan to mgo udio woy nosoobbuwan iddos mgo minuvu nid pominog kandin kahi ran to h ingkon ayu pomon kos moraom no koovottan kaayn minuvu woy kotuusan to kodpuung to mokososoobbu
onna vo anak da man sikandin to panday woy dos inoy rin si aria
onna vo iddos mgo suwod din onsi antiago si ose si imon woy si udas
oy konna vo iddos mgo tobboy rin dini mandad id oubpa
ngkon man pomon kos moraom no koovottan woy kotuusan din
a nomorat sikandan ki isas woy waa ran id pomakoy kandin
ahin isas kandan to ddos propeta mowwet kos kodontong kandin to langun piru riyot kandin no ingod woy riyot mgo sakup to pomilya rin od poddisokkan sikandin to kodontong
a pomon to waa ran id pomakoy kandin waa goli sikandin id puung to mokososoobbu rutun
a iddon timpu si erodes no gubernador to alilea norinog din iddos mokaatag taddot pinuungan ni isas
oy id ikohiyan din kos mgo sudsuhuwon din to ni si isas sikandin en si uan no ohodboutismu no novadnow pomon diyot kopotayan
ni en kos unayan nod pokopuung sikandin to mgo mokososoobbu
d ikahi idda ni erodes su iddot id lihad id paammot din si uan id povaku woy id poprisu
d puungan din idda pomon to kodsugga ni uan kandin su id ahaw rin si erodias no sawa taddot ari rin no si elipe
yya su inaayun od ikohiyan ni uan si erodes to upak diyot mgo uhu ni oises no od ahawon du kos sawa to suwod du
omon tadda id kopii ni erodes nod poimotayan din si uan piru novaakkan sikandin to mouraan minuvu oyyos id pomakoy ran no propeta en si uan
a riyot kodsampot ni erodes to allowt kodtobbow rin id pista sikandin woy id sayow iddos mongovay no anak ni erodias ki elipe riyot isowwan to langun nid inggat din
rayn notoosan si erodes taddot kodsayow to mongovay
een id totandu sikandin kahi rin to d pongulivot a no id boggoy ku en kikow kos ahad ondan nod buyuwon du
a pomon to id sutsutan to inoy rin iddos mongovay mid ikahi sikandin to oggoy ru koddi no nokotaaw riyot bondihadu iddos uu ni uan no ohodboutismu
o norinog idda ni erodes nokodsondit sikandin
iru pomon to id pongulivot don sikandin woyd koilow taddot id poninggat din mid suhu sikandin no id boggoy iddos id buyu taddot mongovay
een id poundiyon din to prisuwan iddos sokkad taddot mgo sundau rin amoyd tompoddan to liyog si uan
a id piyod din iddos uu ni uan no nokotaaw ron diyot bondihadu woy id boggoy rin idda riyot mongovay
d piyod mandad idda taddot mongovay riyon to inoy rin
o norinog taddot mgo tinodduwan ni uan iddon notomanan id undiyon dan to prisuwan woy id angoy ran iddos lawa ni uan amoy id lobbong
opongnga idda id undiyon dan to ki isas amoy id ponudtuu ran kandin iddos mokaatag tadda
a to norinog onni isas iddon notomanan id tanan dan dutun woy mid sakoy to bollangay poundiyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no siksikandan da
iru to nokosaddoo iddos mouraan minuvu no id pomon diyot nokodossoosson bonuwa mid lupug dan kandin nid pongulibpit diyot lanow
o koddunggu onni isas woy to kodponog din nokita rin iddos mouraan minuvu no nolivuung
oeruwan sikandin woy id bowiyan din iddos od pongkovohokan
o od komapun don id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan woy mid ikahi to okaawoyawoy inin lugaa woy asow ron od saop kos allow
yon ayu moppiya no od poundiyonnon du to mgo bariyu inis mouraan minuvu amoyd pokovolli ran to kokaan
id tavak si isas to onnad koilangan nod undiyon sikandan
ikiyu kos od pokaan kandan
ahi ran to h toonaw ra man limmon molison no paan woy oruwon ngaap inis kaayt keta
ahin isas to iyodda row idda rinit koddi
a id osengan din iddos mgo minuvu no od unsad diyot sobbotton
opongnga idda id angoy rin iddos limmon molison no paan woy oruwon ngaap
id langngag sikandin diyot datas to langit woy id posolamat diyon to onama
opongnga id pontoppiktoppik din idda woy id boggoy rin diyot mgo tinodduwan din amoy id sondad diyot mgo minuvu
a nokokaan dan langun woy nongovuung
opongnga id temmos dan iddos nongosama woy nokoponnu pa en idda to sopuuoruwon bukag
os mgo minuvu nid kaan mgo limmon maan   no mama waa pa apii to kodiyap iddos mgo baay woy mgo anak
opongnga idda id posakoy ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din diyot bollangay woy id pounna rin sikandan diyot dipaa to lanow laggun tid popouli rin pa iddos mgo minuvu
o id ipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu mid tikoddog sikandin poundiyot buvungan amoyd dasaa
o od kosagkup don diyon poron si isas no siksikandin da
a idda mandad so mgo tinodduwan din no id pomollangay diyon don sikandan to moriyu pomon diyot ibpit to lanow
osinuggung dan kos kaamag deen nosuhat to doorakkoon mgo baud iddos bollangay
o od kaallowallow ron id undiyonnan sikandan ni isas no id ipanow riyon to ampowt oweg
o nokita sikandin taddot mgo tinodduwan oraroy ran no novaakkan woy id pomehes dan to mattag allak kahi ran to h busow
iru idda ron en mid ikahi si isas kandan to o kowd kovaakki su siyak ini
a kahin edro kandin to ongaggon otik mooggot en no sikkow ika pounduwonna a to kikow nod ipanow kaay to ampowt oweg
id ikahi si isas to a undini ka
een id ponog si edro taddot bollangay woy id ipanow sikandin diyon to ampowt oweg poundiyot ki isas
iru to noheddam din iddos monokkaan kaamag woy to nokita rin iddos doorakkoon baud novaakkan sikandin woy enotenot don od koonnod
a id pomehes sikandin no mid ungketen to ongaggon tovangi a
dda ron en id sout sikandin tid apput ni isas woy id somaddan
ahi rin to ray mohon disok kos kopomakoy ru
ambot id duworuwa ka
a mid sakoy sikandan diyot bollangay woy idda ron en id soro iddos kaamag
os id sakoy taddot bollangay mid simba kandin woy kahi ran to ooggot ka en no nak to onama
a to nokorunggu ran diyot dipaa to lanow nokoinguma ran diyot lugaa to enesaret
o nokilaa si isas to mgo minuvu taddon lugaa id posaddoo ran diyot langun no lugaa no nokolingkus dutun no riyon sikandin
een id piyod to mgo minuvu riyot kandin iddos langun nod kovohokan
d poerueru ran ki isas no od posomaddon iddos od pongkovohokan ahad ubpu robbo taddot umpak din
a iddos langun no nokosomad kandin nouliyan en
a duwon mgo ariseo woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no id pomon diyot erusalem
d porani ran ki isas woy mid intud kahi ran to ambot id supak moho to mgo tinodduwan du iddos botasanon to kovuyyahan ta amoyd molinis diyot kodontong to onama
yyos id kaan dan no waa id ounab to bollad amoyd ikuu to botasanon atag to kodlinis
id tavak si isas to a sikiyu mambot id supak dow kos mgo suhu to onama ukit to kodikuu row to koniyun botasanon
u id suhu to onama no ispitu kow to amoy woy inoy row woy ddos ahad ondoy nod oseng to morat diyot amoy o inoy rin koilangan en nod imotayan
iru sikiyu ossa moho kos nonaw row
u iddos minuvu no duwon nanoy id pokotavang diyot amoy woy inoy rin od bolivad baling sikandin woyd oseng to uwon nanoy tavang ku koniyu piru id ossa kud ini atag to onama
een id podwora row iddos suhu to onama ukit to kodikuu row taddot koniyun botasanon
ikiyu nod pouvaguvag no motallong
onnaa en iddos id poposaddoo to onama ukit ki saias mokaatag koniyu no mid ungketen to nin mgo minuvu taman da to dila kos kodposivantug dan koddi piru moriyu kos pusung dan koddi
aa koruanon to kodsimba ran koddi su iddos id nonaw ran id bobbovallan da to mgo minuvu
a id poporani ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu woy id ikohiyan din to ominog kow woy ooyyari row ini tod labbotlabbot
onnod pokolibmit iddos kokaan no id sungit to minuvu riyot bivig din
yon od pokolibmit kandin idda en so morat no osengan nod leggua to bivig din
a id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid ikahi to okosaddoo ka vo no nomorat kos mgo ariseo taddot id oseng du
id tavak si isas to ddos ipat pinomuwa no waa id pomuwa taddot moy ku no riyot datas to langit od boruton
odtohona row sikandan su nokoiling dan to mgo butud nod inahak to iling dan no butud
tik butud kos od inahak to iling din no butud od pokodtapik en sikandan nod kouug diyot moraom no bobbo
a mid ikahi si edro to aabbotlabbot du konami iddos kohulugan taddot ponunggelengan
ahin isas to osoobbuwan a koniyu su iling kow vos mandad to dumon minuvu no waa poron nokaabbot
aa kow vos nokosaddoo no iddos ahad ondan no kokaan nod usok diyot bivig to minuvu od undiyon to gottok woy od leggua
iru iddos od leggua to bivig id pomon idda riyot ginawa woy idda en kos od pokolibmit to minuvu
yyos id pomon diyot ginawa iddos morat no poomdom no idda en kos od piyod kandin nod puung to kodimatoy kodloivug woy dumon molibmit no pinuungan kodponakow kodposivonnaa to uhus woy koddoddoraat to duma
a ini en langun kos od pokolibmit to minuvu
iru iddos kodkaan no waa mid ikuu to botasanon mokaatag to kodounab to bollad konna idda kos od pokolibmit to minuvu
a id tanan si isas dutun woy mid undiyon to lugaa no sakup to mgo bonuwa to iro woy idon
a duwon sokkad no baay no id oubpa rutun
ddon baay konna udio su toho anaan sikandin
d porani sikandin ki isas woy id poerueru kahi rin to ongaggon lubbad ni avid koeruwan ka koddi
u iddos anak ku no baay orayn noosayan pomon to busow no id lasud kandin
iru waa mid tavak si isas ahad songokahi
