een id porani kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid ikahi to oowaaw kos baay su id tinundug sikandin keta no orayd pokoulingoo
ahin isas taddot baay to d popiyod a to onama atag da to koubbaran ni srael no nokoiling to nongotarin no karnero
iru id porani ra en sikandin ki isas woy mid lingkood diyot isowwan din
ahi rin to ongaggon tovangi a
d tavak si isas kandin ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to onna en ollog nod ongayon iddos kokaan to mgo anak woy id sunggud diyot mgo tuyyang
ahi taddot baay to yya ongaggon piru ahad pa iddos mgo tuyyang od pokokaan man to mgo mumu nod pongouug diyot silob to lomisa taddot amu ran
id tavak si isas to iya dakkoo kos kopomakoy ru
d kotuman en kos od buyuwon du
a idda ron en nouliyan iddos anak din
a id awa si isas dutun woy id pongulibpit diyon to anowt alilea
d tikoddog sikandin diyot lovuntud woy mid unsad dutun
ouraa kos minuvu nid undiyon to kandin
d duma ran iddos mgo pungku mgo butud mgo minuvu no id patoy kos paa mgo ommow woy duma pa
d piyod dan idda riyot isowwan ni isas woy langun dan nouliyan ukit to kotuusan din
a nosoobbuwan iddos mgo minuvu no nokokita tadda oyyos od pokoooseng don iddos mgo ommow nouliyan iddos mgo pungku nokoipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu nid patoy kos paa woy nokokita ron iddos mgo butud
een id doong dan kos onama nod simbaanon to mgo toho srael
a id poporani ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din to oeruwan a kaayt mouraan minuvu oyyos notolluwan don nid duma ran koddi no worad tasak dan
ii a od kopiyan nod pouliyon ku sikandan no diid pokokaan su saddook od moomet dan to gutas diyot daan
ahi taddot mgo tinodduwan din to yya en piru ingkon ki man od pokoangoy to kokaan no ollog kaayt orayn mouraan minuvu no ini ki man to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
id intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ilon molison kos paan duwot koniyu
id tavak sikandan to ittu woy pilopilon moollimot no ngaap
a id pounsad ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu
oy id angoy rin iddos pittun paan woy dos mgo ngaap woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
opongnga id pontoppiktoppik din idda woy id boggoy riyot mgo tinodduwan din amoy id sondad diyot mgo minuvu
a nokokaan dan langun woy nongovuung
oy nokolimud peen iddos mgo tinodduwan din to nongosama no nokoponnu to pittun doorakkoon bukag
ddos kouralloy to minuvu nid kaan mgo oppat no maan   no mama waa pa apii to kodiyap iddos mgo baay woy mgo anak
opongnga idda id popouli ni isas iddos mgo minuvu woy mid sakoy sikandin to bollangay poundiyot agadan
a duwon mgo ariseo woy mgo aduseo no id porani ki isas
d kopii ran nod posaharon sikandin deen id buyu ran kandin no od pokitannon sikandan to mokososoobbu nod posivonnaa no id popiyod en sikandin to onama
iru mid tavak si isas to tid saop don kos allow od ikahi kow to d tollak been moho simag su moollutu kos langit
oy otid kaallow ron od ikahi kow to d uran been moho koungkay su moollutu kos langit woy od mosukirom
d kotuig kow nod otuk to timpu ukit to kodontong dow to kooowayan piru dii kow man od kotuig nod otuk to kohulugan to mgo kotomanan to inin timpu
ikiyu no mgo minuvu to inin timpu oraroy kow no morat oyya su id inoyyuhan dow kos onama
d buyu kow to mokososoobbu piru waa id pokita ku koniyu idda ra en so mokososoobbun notomanan ni onas
opongnga idda id tanan si isas kandan woy mid ipanow
a to id dunggu onsi isas diyot dipaa to lanow nolingow iddos mgo tinodduwan din nid piyod to tasak dan no paan
ahin isas kandan to antoy kow taddot potuvu to paan to mgo ariseo woy mgo aduseo
d poikohiyoy iddos mgo tinodduwan din to addook id oseng din idda su wora ki man
a nokosaddoo si isas taddot mgo osengan dan deen mid ikahi sikandin to oy koniyu orayn disok kos kopomakoy row
ambot nosasow kow no waa kow nokopiyod to paan
aa kow pobbos nokaabbot
olingow kowd bo taddot limmon molison no paan no id pokaan ku taddot limmon maan   no minuvu
oy pilon bukag iddos noponnu row taddot nongosama
oy nolingow kowd bo taddot pittun molison no paan no id pokaan ku taddot oppat no maan   no minuvu
oy pilon doorakkoon bukag kos noponnu row taddot nongosama
een nosoobbuwan a no waa kow poron nokaabbot no konna mokaatag to paan iddos id ikahi ku
d uliton ku tod oseng antoy kow taddot potuvu to paan to mgo ariseo woy mgo aduseo
a idda pa sikandan nokaabbot no iddos id ponudtuu ni isas kandan konna mokaatag to potuvu to paan ko konna koilangan nod bantoy ran taddot nonaw to mgo ariseo woy mgo aduseo
a to id inguma onsi isas diyot bonuwa to esarea ilipos id inturan din iddos mgo tinodduwan din kahi rin to ndak poomdom to mgo minuvu mokaatag koddi
iyot poomdom dan siyak no nak to inuvu ondoy a man
id tavak sikandan to uwon id ikahi no sikkow kun si uan no ohodboutismu
os duma mid ikahi no sikkow si lias woy duwon duma nid ikahi no sikkow si eremias o sokkad ka taddot dumon mgo propeta
a kahin isas to iru atag koniyu ondoy a man
id tavak si imon edro to ikkow kos esiyas no nak to maantoyn onama
ahin isas kandin to imon no anak ni onas moppiya kod kotomanan du oyyos konna minuvu kos id posaddoo kaay riyot kikow ko konna iddos moy ku riyot datas to langit
a od ikahi a kikow no sikkow si edro no iddos kohulugan batu
oy kaayn batu od poohinaton ku kos koddin simbaan no idda en so langun nod pompomakoy
oy konna en od pokotalu kandan iddos kotuusan to kopotayan
d boggoy ku kikow kos kotungud no iling to tusi nod pokes to kodharit onama
os ahad ondan nod diiyan du kaay to ampowt ingod od diiyan mandad diyot datas to langit
oy dos ahad ondan nod omanan du kaay to ampowt ingod od omanan mandad diyot datas to langit
a id loglohottan ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din no dii ran id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy no sikandin kos esiyas
a pomon tadda id tigkanoy ron si isas to kodpaabbotlabbot diyot mgo tinodduwan din mokaatag tod kotomanan din
ahi rin to oilangan nod undiyon a to erusalem
oy rutun od ukit a to mouraan kodposuppit tod pombuyyahon ta mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d poimotayan a nikandan piru riyot ikootollun allow od kovadnow a
a id piyod ni edro si isas diyot ibpit woy id sugga rin kahi rin to ongaggon muopa no diid aman kos onama ruwot id oseng du
onna en idda od kotuman duwot kikow
iru id isau si isas ki edro woy mid ikahi to wa ka oivuyan
d boovahan a nikkow su iddos poomdom du konna pomon to onama ko konna pomon to minuvu
a mid ikahi si isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din to ddos ahad ondoy no od kopiyan nod kovovallan no tinodduwan ku koilangan nod inoyyuhan din kos kandin nid kopii woy od tiyangon din iddos kandin no krus amoyd dumoruma koddi
u iddos minuvu nod konuhunan to umuu rin od koworan da en baling tadda
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod patoy pomon to koddumoruma rin koddi duwon umuun waad tomanon
yyos ahad od kokomunoy to minuvu kos langun no korotuwan kaay to ampowt ingod waa en koruanon otid koworan sikandin to umuun waad tomanon su iddos od ingumannon din idda en so linowt apuy
yyos waa korotuwan no id pokovullas to minuvu amoyd kaawi rin iddos umuun waad tomanon
u siyak no nak to inuvu od livod duma to mgo ponolihan ku nod dumannan to seaa to kotuusan to moy ku
a od boggayan ku to ganti iddos ipat sokkad ukit taddot nopuungan din
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no duwon duma kaay no dii pa od patoy taman to dii ran pa od kokita iddos kodundini woy kodhari ku no nak to inuvu
a to id lihad don kos annom no allow id poruma ni isas si edro woy dos toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan poundiyon to mowwet no buvungan no siksikandan da
aggun tid totongtong dan ki isas tigkow nopalin kos boyo rin
ddos bonnong din id seaa iling to allow woy dos umpak din id sellasella pomon to koputiyoy
a idda ron en nokita ran si oises woy si lias no id tongko ki isas
ahin edro ki isas to ongaggon moppiya en no kaay ki
tid kopiyan ka od sosabbung a to otollu sokkad atag kikow sokkad atag ki oises woy sokkad atag ki lias
aggun tod ooseng poron sikandin duwon moseaa no souhapun no id tambun kandan woy duwon bawos nid pomon diyot souhapun no mid ungketen to ni en kos nak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy oraroy ku sikandin id kahaai
ominogga row sikandin
o norinog idda taddot mgo tinodduwan din mid lingkood sikandan no iddos bonnong dan nokouma riyot livuta pomon to dakkoon allak dan
a mid porani si isas woy id somad kandan kahi rin to ohinat kow
o kowd kovaakki
o id laangngag sikandan worad dumon nokita ran si isas dobbo
aggun tod potupang sikandan id loglohottan dan ni isas kahi rin to o row en id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy iddos nokita row taman to siyak no nak to inuvu od kovadnow ron
a id inturan dan si isas kahi ran to ambot od ikohiyon to mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no koilangan no unna pa od undini si lias idda pa iddos esiyas
id tavak si isas to onnaa en no unna pa od undini si lias amoyd panoy to langun
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no id inguma ron si lias piru waa sikandin kilaanna to mgo minuvu
oy id puungan dan peen diyot kandin iddos ahad ondan no morat nid kopii ran
ngketen dad en mandad koddi no nak to inuvu od posupittan a nikandan
a idda pa nokaabbot iddos mgo tinodduwan no iddos od tommanon din si uan no ohodboutismu
a to id inguma ron onsi isas diyot mouraan minuvu nid porani kandin woy mid lingkood diyot isowwan din
ahi rin to ongaggon koeruwan ka kaayt anak ku
uwon bohok din nod bovuyun woy noompasan oraroy kos kodoilasoy rin su inaayun sikandin od kopiloy riyot apuy woy oweg
d piyod kud sikandin diyot mgo tinodduwan du piru waa ran man nokouli kandin
ahin isas to ikiyu no mgo minuvu to inin timpu waa kopomakoy row woy mgo ebbaw kow
omonnu kouhayyoy kos koddumoruma ku koniyu woy kannu pa ayu od kotaman inis kodtiis ku koniyu
iyoddow kos anak du kaayt koddi
o riyon don to morani ni isas iddos anak id suhu rin nod leggua kos busow woy idda ron en nouliyan iddos anak
a id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din no siksikandan da woy mid intud kahi ran to ambot waa koy nokopoleggua taddot busow
id tavak si isas to yyos kulang kos kopomakoy row
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad iling da korisokkoy to bonnit mustasa kos kopomakoy row od kopuungan dow en kos langun
d pokosuhu kow ruwot buvungan nod alin woy od alin en idda
iru iddos iling taddon busow dii kow en od pokopoleggua otik dii kow od ponayun nod dasaa woyd puasa okkad no allow si isas duma to mgo tinodduwan din id lolivuung diyot alilea woy id ikohiyan din sikandan to iyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy a riyot bollad taddot od pongkuntra koddi
d imotayan a nikandan piru od kovadnow a riyot ikootollun allow
o norinog idda to mgo tinodduwan din oraroy ran no naaggow
o id inguma ran diyot apernaum id poroniyan si edro to mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy mid intud kandin kahi ran to ddos tohodnonaw row id bayad bo sikandin to buhis atag to templo
id tavak si edro to yya
a to id usok si edro riyot baoy id unna mid ooseng si isas kahi rin to iyot kikow imon ondoy ayu kos od sukutan to buhis to mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod
dda vo so mgo anak dan o iddos dumon minuvu
ahin edro to dda en so dumon minuvu
id ikahi si isas to a ko ungketen iling mandad to mgo anak to onama konna koilangan nod bayad atag to baoy rin
iru amoy konna ran od komorat keta undiyon ka to lanow woy pomunuwit ka
oy riyot bivig to unnon ngaap nod koutoo ru od kokita ru kos soopi
a piyoddow vo idda woy bayad du to buhis atag keta oruwa
a iddon timpu id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid intud kahi ran to ndoy man kos mowwet to langun diyon to kodharit onama
een id poporani ni isas iddos sokkad no anak woy id poohinat din diyot tongannan dan
ahin rin to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no konna kow od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama otik dii row od lommiyon kos poomdom dow woy otik dii kow od poobbava iling to anak
u iddos ahad ondoy nod poobbava to kougolingun din iling kaayt anak sikandin kos mowwet to langun diyon to kodharit onama
oy dos ahad ondoy nod tanggap to mopoobbavon minuvu iling kaayt anak pomon to kopomakoy rin koddi siyak kos id tanggap din
a iddos ahad ondoy nod pokookoy nod puung to saa kos mopoobbavon minuvu iling kaayt disok no anak no od pomakoy koddi moppiya pa nod ikottan kos liyog din to orayn dakkoon gilingan no batu woy id lumbag diyot kinoroomman to dahat
okaaratarat kod kotomanan taddot mgo minuvu no unayan nod kookoy kos duma riyot kodpuung to saa
d inguma en kos mgo kodgeddam piru mokaaratarat iddos silut taddot minuvu no nokoiling to daan tadda
een otik ikos bollad o paa ru kos unayan nod pokopuung ka to saa tompoddowd baling ika woy lumbag du
u moppiya pa nod pokotanggap ka to umuun waad tomanon no sokkad da kos bollad o paa kuntra to duwon oruwon bollad o paa ru no id lumbag ka riyon to linowt apuy no konna od koovukkan
oy otik ikos mata ru kos unayan nod pokosaa ka kootowd baling ika woy lumbag du
yyos moppiya pa nod pokotanggap ka to umuun waad tomanon no sokkad da kos mata kuntra to duwon oruwon mata ru no id lumbag ka riyon to linowt apuy
yyadayyad kow no konna kow od lommot to ahad sokkad nod poobbava iling kaayt moollimot poron no mgo anak
yyos od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no iddos mgo ponolihan no id tavang kandan inaayun duma to moy ku no riyot datas to langit
u siyak no nak to inuvu mid undini to ingod amoyd nangkap to mgo minuvu no moriyu to onama woy od tobbus kandan iyot koniyu ondan ayu kos od puungan to minuvu otik duwon mahatus no karnero woy od kotorinan idda to sokkad
d tuwos din en iddos siyowmpuusiyow riyot posobsavan amoy od nongkapon din iddos sokkad no notarin
o nokita rin don idda bonnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no lampas pa kos kahaan din taddot sokkad no karnero kuntra taddot siyowmpuusiyow no waa notarin
a ungketen dad en mandad kos moy row no riyot datas to langit
onna sikandin od kopiyan nod kotarin kos ahad sokkad da to mgo sakup din iling kaayt moollimot poron no mgo anak
tik duwon suwod du riyot kopomakoy no nokosaa kikow undiyonniyu sikandin woy ponudtuu ru iddos saa rin kikow no siksikoniyu ra
tid pominog sikandin woy od tonggapon din kos osengan du na nokoduli ron kos songnga rin kikow
iru otik dii en sikandin od pominog piyod ka to sokkad o oruwon minuvu amoy duwon od posivonnaa koniyu
a otik dii peen sikandin od pominog kandan posaddoo ru idda riyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy
oy otik dii en sikandin od pominog taddot id pomandu tod pompomakoy poiling dud sikandin to sokkad no minuvu no waa onama o orayd loimbung no tohodsukut to buhis
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no iddos ahad ondan nod diiyan dow kaay to ampowt ingod od diiyan mandad idda riyot datas to langit
oy dos ahad ondan nod omanan dow kaay to ampowt ingod od omanan mandad idda riyot datas to langit
d ikohiyan ku mandad sikiyu no otik duwon oruwa no nokodsokkad to ahad ondan nod buyuwon dan diyot onama id boggoy en idda to moy ku no riyot datas to langit
u ahad oruwa o otollu kos od lolivuung pomon to kopomakoy ran koddi diyon a mandad duma kandan
a id undiyon si edro to ki isas woy mid intud kahi rin to ongaggon kopila ku od posinsyan kos suwod ku no nokopuung to saa koddi
opittu vo
id tavak si isas to onna ra kopittu ko konna kopittumpuu pittu
u iddos kodharit onama od pokoiling kaayn ponunggelengan
uwon hari nod sosukut to utang diyot mgo sudsuhuwon din
o id tigkanoy pa sikandin id sosukut duwon sokkad no sudsuhuwon no id piyod diyot kandin no nokoutang to maanmaan no soopi
a pomon to waa id pokovayad din id suhu taddot hari no id boligya iddon sudsuhuwon amoyd uriponnon apii iddos sawa woy mgo anak din
oy id suhu mandad taddot hari no id povoligya kos langun no koruwonnan din amoy id bayad to utang
omon tadda mid lingkood iddos sudsuhuwon woy id poerueru riyot hari kahi rin to ir boggayi a pa to timpu su od boyaran ku en sikkow taddot langun no utang ku
a noeruwan iddos hari deen id posinsyan din sikandin woy id podwora rin don iddos utang din woy id pouli
o mid leggua ron iddon sudsuhuwon nosinuggung din iddos duma rin no sudsuhuwon no duwon mandad utang kandin piru disok da
dda ron en id pokkoo rin iddos nokoutang kandin woy kahi rin to oyariyud en iddos utang du koddi
a iddos duma rin no sudsuhuwon mid lingkood woy id poerueru kandin kahi rin to oggayi a pa to timpu su od boyaran ku en sikkow
iru waa en sikandin id aman woy id poprisu rin da en baling taman tod kovoyaran din iddos utang
o nokita to dumon mgo sudsuhuwon iddon notomanan oraroy ran no nosokitan
oy mid undiyon sikandan to hari woy id ponudtuu ran iddos langun no notomanan
een id poumow taddot hari iddon sudsuhuwon kahi rin to rayn morat kos botasan du
d posinsyan ku sikkow taddot langun no utang du su id poerueru ka koddi
ambo moho to waa eru ru riyot duma ru no sudsuhuwon iling taddot id pokita ku kikow
omon to lingasa taddot hari id suhu rin nod prisuwon woyd posokitan iddon sudsuhuwon taman tod pokovayad taddot langun no utang din
a mid ikahi si isas to ngketen dad en mandad kos od puungan koniyu to moy ku no riyot datas to langit otik dii row od posinsyan to bonnaavonnaa iddos nokopuung to saa koniyu
opongnga mid nonaw si isas taddon ponunggelengan id tanan sikandin diyot prubinsya to alilea woy id undiyon sikandin to udea no riyot dipaa to weg to ordan
ouraa oraroy kos minuvu nid tinundug kandin woy id bowiyan din iddos od pongkovohokan
a duwon mgo ariseo nid porani ki isas amoyd posahad kandin ukit to kodintud kahi ran to ndan nokoikuu vo riyot mgo uhu ni oises iddos kodsuwoy to mama to sawa rin to ahad ondan no unayan
id tavak si isas to o row osenga no waa kow nokovasa taddot osulat no ahit onama no riyot tigkonayan to id bovallan to onama kos minuvu id bovallan din kos mama woy baay
oy mid ikahi iddos onama to ni en kos unayan no od tanan kos mama to amoy woy inoy rin amoyd pokodsokkad don sikandan to sawa rin woy dos oruwa od kosokkad don
a konnad sikandan oruwa ko konna sokkad don
een iddos id podsokkad don to onama konnod podsuwayon to minuvu
id ikahi iddos mgo ariseo kandin to o ungketen mambot id aman si oises no od boggoy kos mama riyot sawa rin to kosulatan to kodposuwayoy woy kopongnga od pokodsuwoy ran don to sawa rin
id tavak si isas to d aman si oises nod suwayan dow kos sawa row su motoggas man kos uu row
iru riyot tigkonayan konna ungketen kos dontulon to onama
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no iddos ahad ondoy no mama nod suwoy to sawa rin no waa id loivug woy iddon mama od osawa to duma nokoloivug en sikandin
a mid ikahi iddos mgo tinodduwan diyot ki isas to o ungketen kos toosawa moppiya pa no konnod osawa
id tavak si isas to onna langun no minuvu od pokotanggap duwot osengan dow ko konna idda ra en so id boggayan to onama to kogahan nod pokotiis no konnod osawa
okodossoossa kos mgo unayan no konna od osawa kos minuvu
os duma konna od osawa pomon to duwon kulang diyot lawa ran pomon poron to kodtobbow ran
ddos duma konna od osawa pomon to id kopun sikandan
dda mandad so duma konna od osawa su iyon dan id popoomdom dos kodpuung atag to kodharit onama
a iddos ahad ondoy nod pokogaha nod tanggap kaayn nonaw koilangan en nod tonggapon din ini
okkad no allow duwon mgo minuvu nid piyod to mgo anak dan diyot ki isas
d kopii ran no id pokita ni isas kos kopiyannoy rin diyot mgo anak ukit to kodtoddung din to bollad din taddot uu ran diyon to koddasaa
iru id sugga to mgo tinodduwan din iddos mgo minuvu
ahin isas to odtohona row ron kos mgo anak nod porani koddi woy yo row sikandan suggaa
u iddos mgo minuvu nod salig to onama iling to kodsalig to mgo anak sikandan en kos noiraom diyon to kodharit onama
a id torungngan ni isas to bollad din kos uu taddot mgo anak diyon to koddasaa rin atag kandan woy nopongnga id ipanow sikandin
a duwon sokkad no minuvu no id undiyot ki isas woy mid intud kandin kahi rin to ohodnonaw ondan kos moppiya nod puungan ku amoyd kotanggap ku kos umuun waad tomanon
id tavak si isas to ambot id inturan a nikkow ko ondan kos moppiya
okkad da kos moppiya idda ra en so onama
a mokaatag taddot intud du otid kopiyan ka nod pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon tumanow kos mgo suhu to onama
id intud mandon iddos minuvu kahi rin to ndan bo iddon mgo suhu
d tavak si isas to o kod imatoy yo kod loivug yo kod ponakow woy yo kod posivonnaa to uhus
ispitu ka to amoy woy inoy ru woy ginowanniyu kos dumon minuvu iling to kodginawa ru to kikown kougolingun
ahi taddot minuvu to angun duwon no suhu id puungan kud
ndan pa kos koilangan nod puungan ku
ahin isas kandin to tid kopiyan ka no waa en kulang diyot kikow boligya ru kos korotuwan du woy pomboggoy ru kos bayad riyot worowora
a otid puungan du ini duwon en korotuwan du riyot datas to langit
opongnga livod ka woy duma ka koddi
o norinog idda taddot minuvu id ipanow sikandin no naanu oyyos dakkoo man kos kandin no korotuwan
a kahin isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no mosuppit en taddot minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan nod kolonug diyon to kodharit onama
d uliton ku tod oseng moomok pa iddos kodusok to kamelyo riyon to bobbot simat kuntra to minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan nod lonug diyon to kodharit onama
o norinog idda taddot mgo tinodduwan din oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy mid intud sikandan to o ungketen ondoy pobbo kos od kotobbus
d tongtong si isas kandan woy mid ikahi to onna ini od kopuungan to minuvu piru iddos onama od kopuungan din en kos langun
ahin edro to a sikami id tonanan doyd kos langun pomon to koddumoruma kikow
ndan man kos od kotanggap doy
id tavak si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no riyot timpu nod kolammi ron inis ingod siyak no nak to inuvu od unsad diyot koddin trunu amoyd hari woy od kokita iddos seaa to kotuusan ku
a sikiyu no mgo tinodduwan ku od unsad mandad diyot sopuuoruwon trunu woy od hukuman dow iddos sopuuoruwon tribu to srael
os ahad ondoy nod tanan to ubpan din mgo suwod o tobboy amoy o inoy rin mgo anak din woy mgo kamot pomon to koddumoruma koddi od pokotanggap sikandin to lampas pa taddot id tonanan din woy od pokotanggap sikandin to umuun waad tomanon
iru iddos mowwet koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu od poobbovan woy dos moobbava koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu od porotason
a mid ikahi si isas to ddos kodharit onama od pokoiling kaayn ponunggelengan
uwon sokkad no minuvu no duwon pinomuwon ubas
okkad no allow to sollom poron id ipanow sikandin amoyd nangkap to mgo minuvu nod popuungon taddot kamot din
uwon nokita rin woy id potonduwoy ran no od boyaran din sikandan to ollog no bayad to sokkad no allow no kodpuung
a id poundiyon din sikandan to ubasan amoyd puung
o mgo alas nuwebe ron to sollom id ipanow ron mandon dos komunoy to kamot woy nokita rin iddos waa od pongkopuungan diyot plasa
ahi rin kandan to ndiyon kow mandad to ubasan ku woy puung kow rutun woy od boyaran ku sikiyu to ollog no bayad
een mid undiyon sikandan to ubasan amoyd puung
o mgo alas dose ron id ipanow mandon iddos komunoy amoyd nangkap tod popuungon din woy ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan din to alas tres to mapun
a to mgo alas singko ron to mapun id undiyon mandon sikandin to polingki woy nokita rin iddos waad pongkopuungan dutun
ahi rin kandan to ambo moho to id uuwakkan dow kos timpu no waa od pongkopuungan laroyt allow
id tavak sikandan to aa man od popuung konami
ahi taddot komunoy to ndiyon kow to ubasan ku woy puung kow rutun
o od kosagkup don id osengan taddot komunoy to ubasan iddos ponguu tat id popuung din
ahi rin to mawow iddos mgo tohodpuung woy boyariyu sikandan
nnaaw tod bayad dos mori nid puung taman taddot unna nid puung
a iddos id puung to mgo alas singko ron id undiyon woy ipat sokkad kandan id boyaran to ollog no bayad to kodpuung to sokkad no allow
een to id inguma iddos unna nid puung kunan dan ko lampas pa kos bayad nod kotanggap dan piru ipat sokkad kandan nokodiling da vos en kos bayad to kodpuung to sokkad no allow
o id tanggap dan iddos bayad kandan id pommivig dan taddot komunoy to ubasan
ahi ran to kos mori no id popuung du sokkad dobbon uras kos kodpuung dan piru sikami moho noiladilad koy to monit laroyt allow
iru mid ikahi iddos komunoy diyot sokkad kandan to uwod waa a mid loimbung koniyu
onna vo id potonduwoy kid man no iddos id bayad ku koniyu idda en so ollog no bayad to kodpuung to sokkad no allow
ngayow inis bayad du woy uli kad
oddin id kopii nod bayad diyot mori nid puung iling taddot id bayad ku koniyu
aa vo kotungud ku nod puung to ahad ondan nid kopii ku su koddi man no soopi idda
addook nosina ka ayu su moppiya kos id puungan ku kandan
a mid ikahi si isas to ngketen dad en mandad kos od kotomanan diyon to kodharit onama
ddos moobbava koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu od poratason woy dos mowwet koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu od poobbovan
a to id ipanow onsi isas poundiyot erusalem id livuung din iddos sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din diyot ibpit to daan woy id ikohiyan din to ominog kow od undiyon kid to erusalem
a rutun siyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy a riyot bollad to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy riyot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d silutan a nikandan to kopotayan
d boggoy a nikandan diyot bollad to konna mgo udio amoyd sumpoliton woy od pomodasan
opongnga id pakpak a nikandan diyon to krus piru riyot ikootollun allow od kovadnow a
a id undiyot ki isas iddos sawa ni ebedeo duma taddot oruwon anak din no mama no si antiago woy si uan
d lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan din woy mid ikahi to ongaggon duwon od buyuwon ku kikow
id intud si isas kandin kahi rin to ndan man kos id kopii ru
d tavak iddos baay to d kopii ku no otid inguma ron kos timpu to kodhari ru od pounsaron du inis oruwon anak ku riyot duug du sokkad diyot kowanan woy dos sokkad diyot ivang du
id ikahi si isas to aa row nosorolli ko ondan kos od buyuwon dow
d pokogaha kow vo nod ukit to kosupittan iling tod koukitan ku
d tavak iddos oruwon toosuwod to yya od pokogaha koy
ahin isas to onnaa rad en no iddos kosupittan nod koukitan ku od koukitan dow mandad
iru mokaatag to kodpounsad diyot kowanan woy ivang ku konna siyak kos od aam tadda
yya su id panoy ron tapoy to moy ku ko ondoy kos od pounsaron din tadda
o norinog idda taddot sopuun tinodduwan no duma ran nolingasa sikandan taddot oruwon toosuwod
een id umow ni isas iddos langun no tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din to osorollan dow no iddos od ponguu to konna mgo udio id pomohos dan iddos id kopii ran woy dos mgo minuvu no mowwet kos kotundanan id pokita ran en kos kandan no kotungud
iru sikiyu konna kow iling kandan su iddos ahad ondoy koniyu nod kopiyan nod kovovallan no mowwet koilangan no od poobbava woyd pouripon
oy dos ahad ondoy nod kopiyan no mowwet to langun koniyu koilangan no od pouripon sikandin to duma
u ahad siyak no nak to inuvu waa a mid undini to ingod amoyd uripon to mgo minuvu ko konna amoy od pouripon a woy id boggoy ku kos umuu ku atag to kodtobbus to mouraan minuvu
o id leggua ran don pomon diyot erico mouraan minuvu kos mid tinundug ki isas
uwon oruwon butud no mid ounsad diyot ibpit to daan woy norinog dan nid lihad si isas
een id pomehes sikandan no mid ungketen to ongaggon lubbad ni avid koeruwan ka konami
d sugga sikandan taddot mouraan minuvu amoyd poonongonong
iru ayas da en sikandan id pomehes nid ungketen to ongaggon lubbad ni avid koeruwan ka konami
a id soro si isas woy id umow rin iddos mgo butud woy id inturan kahi rin to ndan man kos id kopii row nod puungan ku koniyu
id tavak sikandan to ongaggon id kopii roy nod pokokita
a noeruwan si isas kandan woy id somaddan din kos mata ran
dda ron en nokokita ron sikandan woy id duma ran ki isas
a to morani ron sikandan diyot erusalem od kopantow ran don iddos bariyu to etpahe no riyot banod to uvungan to mgo libo
d pounna ni isas dutun iddos oruwa taddot mgo tinodduwan din
ahi rin kandan to ndiyon kow to bariyu no riyot kounnan woy to kodinguma row rutun idda ron en od kokita row iddos asnu nid ikot duma to nati rin
kasa row vo idda woy tuyuka row rinit koddi
tik duwon od intud koniyu tovaka row no d koilonganon ini tod ongaggon woy goos din da ini id pouli
opuungan ini su amoy od kotuman iddos id poponudtuu to onama ukit to propeta no mid ungketen to onudtuli row iddos mgo toho ion no d inguma ron kos koniyun hari no mopoobbava woy id sakoy sikandin to natit asnu
a mid ipanow iddos oruwon tinodduwan woy id puungan dan kos id suhu ni isas kandan
d tuyuk dan iddos asnu woy dos nati poundiyon to ki isas
d ompasan dan idda to umpak woy mid sakoy sikandin
ouraa kos minuvu rutun no id ampas to mgo umpak dan diyot daan nod ukitan din to kodposivantug kandin
oy dos duma id tampod to moollimot no mgo panga to kayu woy id ampas dan idda riyot daan
a iddos mgo minuvu no riyot kounnan din woy dos id tinundug id pehes dan no mid ungketen to d doongon kos lubbad ni avid
d posivontuhan ta kos id popiyod to onama nod ongaggon
d doongon kos onama riyot datas to langit
o kodinguma ni isas diyot erusalem nohuyakot kos langun nid oubpa rutun woy kahi ran to ndoy man inin minuvu
id tavak iddos mouraan minuvu nid tinundug kandin kahi ran to ikandin en si isas dos propeta no id pomon diyot azaret no sakup to alilea
a mid usok si isas diyot templo woy id paawa rin iddos langun nod pombovoligya riyot lama woy dos id pombovolli rutun
d ponlingkuwab din iddos mgo lomisa taddot tohodbovullas to soopi woy id pompiloy rin iddos mgo unsaran taddot od pombovoligya to mgo soopati
id ikahi sikandin to oikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos aoyt onama od ngoranan no baoy atag to koddasaa
iru sikiyu id bovallan dow moho ini nod oubpan to mgo tokawon
a duwon mgo butud woy mgo pungku no mid porani kandin diyot templo woy id bowiyan din sikandan
iru iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises oraroy ran no nolingasa to nokita ran iddos mokososoobbun pinuungan ni isas woy to norinog dan no ahad iddos mgo anak id pehes to kahaan no mid ungketen to d doongon ta inis lubbad ni avid
een id intud sikandan ki isas kahi ran to orinog du vo iddos osengan dan
id tavak si isas to yya
aa kow vo nokovasa taddot osulat no ahit onama no had iddos moollimot poron no mgo anak id nonawwan to onama nod doong kandin
a mid tanan si isas kandan woy id undiyon to etania woy riyon sikandin id owwot
a to nosollom don to id livod onsi isas diyot erusalem id gutasan sikandin
okita rin iddos kayu nod ngoranan to igera diyot ibpit to daan
d porani sikandin tadda amoyd ontongngan ko duwon bunga piru paanan da en mgo doun kos nokita rin
een id ikohiyan din iddos kayu to omon koungkay konna kad od bovunga
a idda ron en nahangu iddos kayu
o nokita idda taddot mgo tinodduwan din oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan kahi ran to h
ambot tigkow moho nahangu ikon kayu
ahin isas kandan to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no otik duwon kopomakoy row woy waa kodduworuwa row od kopuungan dow kos iling taddot id puungan ku kaayn kayu
oy konna ra idda ahad od ikahi kow ra kaayt buvungan to d koonnat ka woyd pokoantug diyot dahat od kopuungan en idda
had ondan kos od buyuwon dow riyon to onama id boggoy rin en idda koniyu otid pomakoy kow
a id livod si isas diyot templo woy laggun tid nonaw sikandin id porani kandin iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
ahi ran to ndak kotungud du kaayt langun nid puungan du
oy ondoy kos id boggoy kikow kaayn kotungud
id tavak si isas kandan to o dii ku pa od tovakon kos intud dow duwon intud ku koniyu
ovaka row ini woy id ponudtuu ku koniyu ko ondoy kos id boggoy koddi to kotungud to kodpuung kaay
os kotungud ni uan to kodboutismu id pomon bo riyot onama o riyot minuvu
a id posisipoy ran kod monnuwon dan idda tod tavak kahi ran to tid ikahi ki no ddos onama kos id boggoy kandin to kotungud na od ikahi sikandin to ambot waa kow id pomakoy ki uan
iru otid ikahi ki no inuvu kos id boggoy kandin to kotungud na od kovaakkan ki to mgo minuvu su id pomakoy ran no propeta en si uan
een mid tavak sikandan to aa koy nokosaddoo ko ingkon idda id pomon
a kahin isas kandan to o ungketen dii ku mandad sikiyu od ponudtulan ko ingkon id pomon kos kotungud ku to kodpuung kaay
a id itulan dan ni isas to sokkad no ponunggelengan kahi rin to ndan kos poomdom dow mokaatag kaay
uwon sokkad no amoy no oruwa kos anak din no mama
d ikahi sikandin diyot kakoy to nak undiyon ka to ubasan koungkayn allow woy puung ka rutun
id tavak iddos kakoy to ii a
iru riyot mori nopalin kos poomdom din woy id undiyon sikandin to ubasan
a iddos amoy id undiyon mandad to ari woy ungketen dad en kos id suhu rin
id tavak iddos ari to yya od undiyon a en
iru waa man sikandin id undiyon
ahin isas to a atag koniyu ingkon musing taddot oruwon anak kos id tuman taddot id kopii to amoy ran
d tavak sikandan to dda en so kakoy
een mid ikahi si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos mgo mosaasaan minuvu iling to orayd loimbung no mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dos mgo baay nod bovoligya to lawa ran od unna sikandan koniyu nod lonug to kodharit onama
u iddot mid undini si uan no ohodboutismu woy id nonaw koniyu to motallong no koubpa waa kow moho id pomakoy kandin
iru iddos orayd loimbung no mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dos morat no mgo baay id pomakoy ran kandin
had peen nokita row nid pomakoy ran waa kow mid sondit woyd tanan to koniyun mgo saa woy waa kow id pomakoy kandin
a kahin isas kandan to ominogga row inis ossa pa no ponunggelengan
uwon sokkad no minuvu no id pomuwa to ubas diyot kamot din
a id kuralan din idda woy id bovaa sikandin tod toviran to ubas woy id poohinat sikandin to motikang no sabbung nod ubpan tod tamong tadda
opongnga id popursintuwan din iddos kamot woy id undiyon sikandin to osson ingod
o timpu ron to kodpomupu to ubas id suhu rin kos mgo sudsuhuwon din diyot id pomursintu amoyd angoy to kandin no taad
iru to kodinguma taddot mgo sudsuhuwon din id ammot dan taddot id pomursintu
os sokkad id pomodasan dan dos sokkad id imotayan woy dos sokkad id ponlumbahan dan to batu taman tid patoy
a id suhu mandon taddot komunoy iddos duma pon mgo sudsuhuwon no mouraa pa taddot unna piru ungketen dad en kos id puungan taddot id pomursintu
iyot mori id suhu taddot komunoy iddos anak din su kohingginawa rin to d rispituwon dan en kos anak ku
iru to nokita taddot id pomursintu no idda ron so anak to komunoy kos od inguma id poikohiyoy ran to ka ron kos anak to komunoy
uo kid od imotayan ta sikandin amoy siketa ron kos od pokokomunoy kaayt ubasan
een id goyod dan sikandin poundiyot leggua to ubasan woy id imotayan
a kahin isas to ndan ayu kos od puungan taddot komunoy to ubasan diyot id pomursintu
id tavak sikandan to d imotayan din en iddon morat no mgo minuvu woy od popursintuwan din iddos ubasan to ossa nod boggoy kandin to taad diyot timpu to kodpomupu to ubas
ahin isas kandan to aa kow vo nokovasa taddot osulat no ahit onama no ddos batu no id oovoddan to tohodbovaoy su kunan dan ko waa koruanon idda vos en kos batu no mosalig no pounsaran
os od ongaggon kos id puung tadda woy motoos idda nod tongtongngan
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no konnad sikiyu no mgo udio kos od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama ko konna idda ron so mgo minuvu nod tuman to kandin nid kopii
ddos ahad ondoy nod pokovuntug taddon batu od kotoppuwan en woy dos od kouuhan tadda od koubpot en o norinog taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy taddot mgo ariseo iddos mgo ponunggelengan ni isas noovottan dan no sikandan kos id suhat din
urisu od omotton dan nanoy sikandin piru novaakkan dan taddot mouraan minuvu su id pomakoy ran no propeta en si isas
a id itulan dan mandon si isas to ponunggelengan
ahi rin to ddos kodharit onama iling kaay
uwon sokkad no hari no id panoy to dakkoon kodpokaan atag to anak din nod osawa
o id inguma ron kos allowt kosaa id poundiyonnan din to mgo sinuhuwan din iddos mgo minuvun noinggat amoy od posampot kandan nod undiyon to kosaa
iru langun dan id bolivad
een id popiyod din mandon iddos duma pon uripon din amoy od ikahi taddot nongoinggat no osumbali ron kos mgo baka woy dos id paambog no mgo natin baka woy nopanoy ron kos langun
een undini kowd to kosaa to anak ku
iru iddos nongoinggat id podtohon dan da en idda woy id ponayun dan iddos pinuungan dan
os sokkad id undiyon to kamot din woy idda mandad so sokkad diyot nigusyu rin
oy dos duma id ammot dan moho iddos mgo sinuhuwan taddot hari id pomodasan dan idda woy id imotayan
rayn nolingasa iddos hari deen id polusuran din iddon mgo minuvu to mgo sundau rin amoyd imotayan dan iddos id imatoy taddot mgo sinuhuwan din woy od tirukkan dos bonuwa ran
a id poumow taddot hari iddos dumon mgo uripon din kahi rin to opanoy ron kos langun atag to kosaa piru iddos nongoinggat ku konna ollog nod sakup tadda
ndiyonni row dos mgo minuvu riyot mgo doraanon woy inggata row nod undini to kosaa iddos ahad ondoy nod kokita row
een id undiyon to doraanon iddos mgo sinuhuwan woy id livuung dan iddos langun no nosuggung dan dos moppiya woy dos morat no mgo minuvu woy noponnu iddos baoy nod kosalan
odtahad id usok iddos hari amoyd olitolit taddot mgo minuvu no nolivuung dutun
a nokita rin no duwon sokkad no minuvu no waa id sukub to umpak atag to kosaa
d inturan sikandin taddot hari kahi rin to uwod mambot kaay ka no waa ka man id sukub to umpak atag to kosaa
iru waa en sikandin nokotavak
een mid ikahi iddos hari riyot mgo sinuhuwan din to okuwa row kos bollad woy paa rin woy lumbag dow sikandin diyot mosuksukirom
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon din woyd pogkihot sikandin to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon din
a mid ikahi si isas to ouraa kos id poninggat piru disok da kos id aam to onama nod kolonug diyot kodhari rin
a mid awa iddos mgo ariseo woy id pomuhawang dan nod posaharon si isas ukit to osengan din
oy id poundiyon dan to ki isas iddos kandan no mgo tinodduwan woy dos mgo minuvu ni erodes
o kodinguma ran id ikohiyan dan si isas to ohodnonaw nokosaddoo koy no bonnaa en kos langun nid nonaw ru woy iyon du id nonaw iddos kovonnaan mokaatag to id kopiit onama
ddos ahad ondoy nod isowwon du id podiling du kos kodnonaw ru kandan oyyos waa od podmusingon du
urisu ponudtuli koy ko ondak poomdom du mokaatag kaay
iyot mgo uhu ni oises ollog bo iddos kodbayad to buhis diyot hari to oma o dii
iru nosorollan ni isas no morat kos dontulon dan deen kahi rin to ikiyu no orayd pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy mambot od geddaman a nikiyu
okitanna a veen to soopi nid bayad dow to buhis
a id toyawwan dan sikandin to soopi
ahin isas kandan to ndoy man bonnong woy ngaran kos od kokita kaay
id tavak sikandan to ddos hari to oma
a kahin isas to o ungketen boggoy row riyot hari to oma iddos kandin woy boggoy row riyot onama iddos kandin
o norinog dan idda oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy mid awa ran dutun woyd ipanow
a iddon allow duwon mgo aduseo no id porani ki isas
nin mgo minuvu konnod pomakoy nod bodnawon to onama iddos id poomatoy ron
ahi ran to ohodnonaw nosulat diyot mgo uhu ni oises no otik duwon mama nod patoy no waa anak dan taddot sawa rin koilangan no od pomoowwon tat suwod din amoyd pokoanak dan atag taddot id patoy
onunggeleng duwon pittun toosuwod no mama no id oubpa kaay
os kinokokayan id osawa piru id patoy no waa anak dan
a id pomau taddot ikooruwon suwod din iddon baay
ngketen dad en mandad kos notomanan taddot ikooruwon suwod woy taddot ikootollu taman to ikopittu
d poomatoy ran langun no waa anak
iyot mori id patoy mandad iddos baay
a init allow to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron ondoy musing kandan kos tullid no sawa taddot baay
u iddos langun taddot pittun toosuwod nokoosawa man kandin
id tavak si isas to oyup kow oyyos waa kow nokaabbot taddot osulat no ahit onama woy taddot kotuusan to onama
u init allow to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron od pokoiling don sikandan to mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit no konnod poosoway
a mokaatag to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron yo row osenga no waa kow nokovasa taddot id ikahi to onama koniyu no mid ungketen to iyak kos onama ni braham ni saac woy ni acob
a ungketen kos noikahi ahad nouhoy ron id poomatoy onsi braham
os kohulugan tadda no od kovadnow en iddos poomatoy ron oyya su iddos onama konna sikandin onama taddot id poomatoy ron ko konna onama taddot nongouyag
o norinog idda taddot mgo minuvu oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan taddot nonaw rin
a to norinog taddot mgo ariseo no waa nokotavak iddos mgo aduseo ki isas id porumannoy ran nid undiyot kandin
okkad kandan no orayd kotuig no tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises id geddam ki isas ukit to kodintud
ahi rin to ohodnonaw diyot langun no uhu ni oises ingkon musing tadda kos lampas to langun kos koruanon
id tavak si isas to inowanniyu kos onama nod ongaggon du riyot tivuk no pusung du diyot tivuk no umuu ru woy riyot tivuk no poomdom du
ni en kos suhu no lampas to langun kos koruanon
oy iddos ikooruwon suhu no lampas to langun kos koruanon idda en so inowanniyu kos duma iling to kodginawa ru to kougolingun du
aay en pantok to oruwon suhu id pomon iddos langun no suhu no id boggoy to onama ki oises woy dos langun no id sulat to mgo propeta
o nolivuung pa iddos mgo ariseo mid intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ndan kos poomdom dow mokaatag to esiyas
ndoy man kos kovuyyahan din
id tavak sikandan to ubbad sikandin ni avid
ahin isas to o ungketen mambo man to id ngoranan sikandin ni avid no ongaggon
yya su iddot noiroomman si avid to his no spiritu id ooseng sikandin to id ikahi iddos onama riyon tod ongaggon ku no nsad ka lomig to kowanan ku taman tod kotalu kud iddos od pongkuntra kikow
a su id ngoranan man sikandin ni avid no ongaggon momonnu vo no lubbad ni avid iddos esiyas
aa en nokotavak taddot intud ni isas ahad songokahi
opongnga idda worad sikandan nokoaku nid intud kandin
a mid ooseng si isas diyot mouraan minuvu woy riyot mgo tinodduwan din
ahi rin to ddos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos mgo ariseo duwon kotungud dan nod paabbotlabbot to mgo uhu ni oises
een koilangan en nod tumanon dow woy od puungan dow iddos langun no id ponudtuu ran koniyu
iru yo kowd iling kandan su konna ran od puungan iddos id nonaw ran
d povoggatan dan kos mgo minuvu nod tuman taddot id podluntudluntud dan no mgo suhu no id pohos dan nod ikulon
iru waa ran man id tavang kandan nod tuman tadda ahad disok da
iyot langun nod puungan dan id pokitakita ran to mgo minuvu amoyd doongon
een id poowaggan dan iddos tawwan to mgo bersikulu no id pomon to osulat no ahit onama nid ikot diyot uu woy bollad dan
oy id supayyan dan iddos ubpu to umpak dan no mowwet amoyd pokitakita to duma no oraroy ran no mopompomakoy
yon dan id dokollan to ginawa iddos kodunsad diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu riyot mgo pista woy ahad diyot mgo simbaan to udio no id panoy atag taddot od rispituwon no mgo minuvu
raroy ran mandad od kotoosan nod kumustan woyd rispituwon diyot od kolivuungan to mgo minuvu woy od kotoosan dan nod ngoranan no ohodnonaw
iru sikiyu yo kow od aman nod ngoranan no ohodnonaw su sokkad da en kos koniyun ohodnonaw woy langun dow iling to mgo toosuwod
oy yo kow od ngaran to moy to ahad ondoy kaay to ampowt ingod oyyos sokkad da kos moy row no riyot datas to langit
oy yo kowd aman nod ngoranan kow no onguu oyyos sokkad da en kos onguu row no idda en so esiyas
os ahad ondoy koniyu no od kopiyan no lampas kos koruanon to langun koilangan nod kovovallan sikandin no sudsuhuwon dow
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod poratasdatas to kandin no kougolingun od poobbovan woy dos od poobbava od porotason
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
u iling tid lokobban dow kos sobbangan amoy diid pokousok kos mgo minuvu riyon to kodharit onama
d elle kow nod lonug taddot kodhari rin woy id boovahan dow iddos od kopiyan nod lonug
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy to onama
u id ahaw row iddos mgo koruwonnan taddot mgo baayn bau
oy od tombunan dow iddos morat no pinuungan ukit to mowwet no dosalon no uvag kun to moppiya kow no mgo minuvu
urisu lampas en no mokaaratarat kos kodsilut to onama koniyu okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
yyos od undiyon kow to dipaat dahat woy riyot moriyun mgo ingod amoy duwon ahad sokkad dobbon minuvu nod kopiyod dow nod ikuu taddot nonaw row
oy to nopiyod dowd sikandin od kovovallan dow sikandin no lampas peen koniyu nod silutan diyon to linowt apuy
ling kow moho to butud no od inahak to duma rin no butud
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow
u id nonaw row no otik duwon id pongulivot dow riyot templo konna kun saa otik dii rin idda od tumanon
iru id ikahi kow no iddos ahad ondoy nod pongulivot ukit to buawan diyot templo koilangan en nod tumanon din idda
go bangog kow woy mgo butud
ngkon musing kaay iddos lampas kos koruanon
dda vo so buawan o iddos templo no nokopouhis taddot buawan
d nonaw row mandad no otik duwon od pongulivot ukit to buwisanan konna kun saa otik dii rin idda od tumanon
iru otid pongulivot sikandin ukit taddot id buwis diyot buwisanan koilangan en kun nod tumanon din idda
oompasan kow no butud
ngkon musing iddos lampas kos koruanon
dda vo so buwis o iddos buwisanan no nokopouhis taddon buwis
dda en so buwisanan
urisu iddos minuvu no id pongulivot ukit taddot buwisanan konna ra iddos buwisanan kos id pongulivottan din ko konna ahad iddos id buwis dutun
oy dos minuvu no id pongulivot ukit to templo konna ra iddos templo kos id pongulivottan din ko konna ahad iddos onama no id oubpa rutun
oy dos ahad ondoy no id pongulivot ukit to langit konna ra langit kos id pongulivottan din ko konna ahad iddos trunu to onama woy dos mid unsad dutun
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
u od boggoy kow to koniyun ikosopuu ahad pa iddos id pomon to pinomuwa row no mgo loggu
iru id podtohon dow man iddos mgo uhu ni oises no koilangan nod puung kow to motallong eeruwon kow woyd kosolihan
llog en no id boggoy row kos ikosopuu piru yo row podtohona iddos kodpuung taddot dumon suhu no lampas pa kos koruanon
ling kow moho to butud no od inahak to duma rin no butud
d noonokkalan dow tod ikuu iddos disok no mgo suhu piru id podtohon dow iddos mgo suhu no lampas kos koruanon
ling kow to minuvu no od solan din kos tovisok diyot oweg amoy dii rin idda od koinom piru iyon din baling noommod iddos kamelyo
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
okoiling kow to minuvu no idda ra en so leggua to pokawan woy oyyug to pinggan kos id linisan din piru riyot daom molibmit poron
yya su id pokitakita kow ra to moppiyon botasan piru iddos pusung dow noponnut kodloupig woy orayd akonakon
ikiyu no mgo ariseo mgo butud kow
nnaa row pa linisi kos daom to pokawan woy pinggan dow amoyd molinis mandad kos diyot leggua
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
ling kow to lobbong no id pinturan to moputi
oppiya nod ontongngan kos diyot leggua piru riyot daom noponnut mgo tullan woy duma pon molibmit
ngketen kow rad en mandad oyyos od pokitakita kow no motallong kos mgo botasan dow piru iddos kovonnaan od pouvaguvag kow woy noponnu kos ginawa row to langun no kororattan
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo
raroy kow nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
d povovallan dow to lovongngan iddos mgo propeta woy id pomotoos dow iddos lovongngan to motallong no mgo minuvu
oy mid ikahi kow no tik duwon koyd nanoy iddot timpu to kovuyyahan doy dii koy en od lonug to kodimatoy to mgo propeta
iru ukit taddot id ikahi row id posivonnaa no koubbaran kow taddot id imatoy to mgo propeta
vaya row ipongngaa row iddos id tigkonayan taddot koniyun kovuyyahan
ling kow to mgo uwod nod laas
ii kow en od pokoleggua taddot silut to onama koniyu riyon to linowt apuy
een id popiyod ku ruwot koniyu iddos mgo propeta dos mgo minuvu no moraom kos koovottan woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to kahit onama
iru iddos duma od imotayan dow woy dos duma id pakpak dow riyon to krus
dda mandad so duma od bodasan dow riyot mgo simbaan dow
had ingkon sikandan od paahuy od loupuhon dow amoyd posupittan
omon kaay od sukutan kow to onama taddot kodimatoy to kovuyyahan dow to mgo motallong pomon poron ki bel taman ki acarias no anak ni araquias no id imotayan dow riyot ollot to templo woy buwisanan
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no sikiyu no mgo minuvu to inin timpu kos od silutan to kodimatoy kandan langun
oyoy koniyu no toho erusalem oraroy a nod kosowkuu koniyu
u id ponlumbahan dow to batu iddos mgo propeta woy id ponimotayan dow sikandan woy dos duma no id pounduwon to onama to koniyu
opila kud nanoy tod kupkup koniyu iling to mommiyak piru dii row ini id kopii
ikiyu nod ponoubpa kaayn bonuwa pomotawi row
d inguma kos timpu no od inoyyuhan kowd to onama
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no dii ad en nikiyu od kokita taman tod pokoikahi kowd to d posivontuhon ta iddos id popiyod to onama nod ongaggon
a to id tanan si isas diyot templo woy mid ipanow id porani kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id toddu ran kandin iddos motoos no kodbovaa taddot langun diyot templo
ahin isas kandan to yya motoos en
iru bonnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no od inguma kos timpu no wora ahad sokkad duwot mgo batu no id podluntudluntud nod kosama oyyos od gobban en
a to id unsad si isas diyot uvungan to mgo libo id undiyot kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din no siksikandan da woy mid intud kandin
ahi ran to onudtuli koy kannu man od kotuman inis id ikahi ru woy ondan kos kilaannan to kodlivod du woy dos kotompusan to ingod
id tavak si isas to antoy kow no konna kow od kookalan
u mouraa kos od loppow no od pouvaguvag nod piyod to koddin ngaran nod ikahi no iyak en kos esiyas woy mouraa kos od kookalan dan
d pokorinog kow no duwon gira kaayt morani row woy riyot moriyu piru yo kowd kovaakki
yyos koilangan en nod kotuman ini langun piru konna pa ini kos kotompusan to ingod
yya su iddos sokkad no ingod od pokidgira taddot osson ingod woy dos sokkad no kohoriyan od pokidgira to osson kohoriyan
uwon mandad od inguma no dakkoon gutas woy mgo linug diyot nokodossoosson lugaa
a ini langun iling to tigkonayan da to mosakit nod geddamon to baay nod sokalan
d omotton kow od posupittan woyd imotayan
d kolingasai kow to langun no minuvu pomon to kopomakoy row koddi
ddon timpu mouraa kos od tanan to kopomakoy woyd pookaloy woy id kolingasai ran kos duma nod pompomakoy
a od loppow iddos mouraa no konna bonnaan mgo propeta woy mouraa kos od kookalan dan
omon to lampas don kos kororattan kaay to ampowt ingod od mohonnow ron kos ginawa to kourallan to minuvu
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod tiis to kosupittan taman to kotompusan od kotobbus en
oy to dii pa od inguma kos kotompusan id ponudtuu riyon to intirut ingod iddos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to kodharit onama amoyd pokosaddoo kos langun no minuvu
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to d inguma kos timpu no od kokita row riyot daom to templo iddos od piyod to kororattan amoyd supak to onama
oy ini en kos id posaddoo dangan ni propeta aniel
tag taddot od basa kaay koilangan nod loblovotton dow ini a otid inguma ron inin kotomanan iddos id ponoubpa riyot udea koilangan nod paahuy riyot buvunganon
ddos minuvu no riyot atop to baoy rin koilangan no dii ron sikandin od usok diyot baoy amoyd ponemmos pa
dda mandad so minuvu riyot kamot din koilangan no dii ron od uli amoyd angoy to umpak din
oy iddon timpu mokoerueru iddos mgo movoddos woy dos duwon anak nod susu poron
asaa kow no iddos kodpaahuy row konnod pokosasang to timmohonnow woy llowt odimolloy
u iddos kosupittoy to iddon timpu od lampas pa taddot kosupittoy pomon poron to tigkonayan to ingod taman koungkay
oy worad en od inguma pa no kosupittoy no iling tadda
iru ko waa poobbavaa to onama iddon timpu waa en ahad sokkad no minuvu nod kouyag
iru atag da en taddot id ponaam din id poobbovan din iddon timpu
a otik duwon mgo minuvu nod ikahi koniyu to ntongngi row ini ron kos esiyas o dda ron sikandin yo kowd pomakoy kandan
yyos od loppow en iddos od ikahi no sikandan kun kos esiyas woy dos duma od ikahi no sikandan kun kos mgo propeta
d puung dan to mgo mokososoobbu amoyd aakaa nanoy taddot mgo minuvu nid aam to onama
omotawi row
u id ponudtuu kud tapoy ini koniyu to dii pa od inguma iddon kotomanan
een otik duwon mgo minuvu nod ikahi to ntongngi row diyon sikandin to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa na yo kowd undiyon
tid ikahi ran to ntongngi row id oollos sikandin dutun yo kow ron en od pomakoy kandan
yya su iddos kodlivod ku no nak to inuvu od pokoiling to kilat no tigkow od seaa riyot koowaggan to langit woy od kokita to langun kaay to ampowt ingod
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to tid kokita nod lolivuung iddos mgo uwak od kosorollan no morani kos bangkoy
ling mandad tadda otid kokita iddos mgo kilaannan od kosorollan no morani ron kos kotompusan to ingod
a kopongnga iddos timpu to kosupittan od mosukirom kos allow woy konnad od seaa kos buwan
d pongoumpad kos bituon woy od pongoantog iddos duma pa no riyot datas to langit
opongnga tadda od loppow riyot datas to langit iddos kilaannan no asow ron kos kodlivod ku no nak to inuvu
a od pondaawit kos langun no minuvu riyot nokodossoosson ingod otid kokita ran iddos lampas no seaa to kotuusan ku riyot kodinguma ku nod dumannan to souhapun
a duwon monokkaan dahing to trumpeta woy id popiyod ku kos mgo ponolihan ku amoy od limud taddot mgo minuvu nid aam ku pomon diyot ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod
a mid ikahi si isas to oomdomma row iddos kayu no igera amoyd pokopohinonaw kow
tid kokita row nod sosuving don idda od kosorollan dow no asow ron kos tintollak
ling mandad tadda otid kokita rowd inin mgo kotomanan od kosorollan dow no asow ron kos kodlivod ku
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no od kotuman en inis langun to dii pa od poomatoy kos mgo minuvu no nouyag to inin timpu
d kowora kos langit woy livuta piru inis mgo kahi ku dii en od kowora taman to waad tomanon
iru mokaatag taddot timpu to kodlivod ku waa ahad sokkad no minuvu no nokosaddoo ahad iddos mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit ahad siyak no nak to onama ko konna idda ra en so onamon moy
ddos pinuungan to mgo minuvu riyot timpu to kodlivod ku no nak to inuvu od pokoiling taddot pinuungan to mgo minuvu iddot timpu ni oe
u iddon timpu to waa pa iddos dakkoon lanog iyon id pompuungan to mgo minuvu iddos kodkaan kodoinom woy kodpoosoway taman to allow nid usok si oe riyot arka
aa ran nosorolli ko ondan kos od kotomanan dan taman tid inguma iddos dakkoon lanog woy langun dan nongoonnod
a iling dad en mandad tadda kos od kotomanan init timpu no siyak no nak to inuvu od livod
o iddon timpu otik duwon oruwon mama nod puung diyot kamot dos sokkad od ongayon woy dos sokkad od kotuwos
tik duwon oruwon baay nod gohiling dos sokkad od ongayon woy dos sokkad od kotuwos
een panoypanoy kow oyyos waa row nosorolli iddos allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon dow
otaaw row ini riyot koniyun poomdom no otik od kosorollan pa nanoy to komunoy to baoy ko kannu od inguma kos tokawon od bantoy en sikandin amoy dii od pokousok kos tokawon
urisu sikiyu mandad koilangan no nopanoy kow su siyak no nak to inuvu od inguma en diyot uras no waa row poomdomma
a mid nonaw mandon si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos sudsuhuwon nod kosolihan woy duwon moraom no koovottan sikandin kos od solihan to amu to kodtamong to duma rin no mgo sudsuhuwon woy to kodtaadtaad to kokaan dan diyot ollog no timpu
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot sudsuhuwon no riyot kodlivod to amu rin od kokita nid puungan din kos langun no id popuungan kandin
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no id salig en taddot amu iddos langun no koruwonnan din diyot od kosolihan no sudsuhuwon
iru ko morat iddon sudsuhuwon od oungketen kos ginawa rin to ouhoy pa od uli kos amu ku
d pomodasan din iddos duma rin no mgo sudsuhuwon woy iyon din da en od puungan dos kodkaan woy kodoinom duma to mgo polohubug
a od inguma iddos amu rin diyot allow woy uras no waa rin immana
d silutan sikandin woy id poommung diyot mgo minuvu nod pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon dan woyd pogkihot sikandan to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon dan
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to ddos kodharit onama iling kaay
uwon sopuun mongovay no id piyod to ilowan dan su od tommu taddot od osawa amoyd sakup to kosaa
os limma kandan mgo leaw woy idda mandad so limma moraom kos koovottan
ddos leaw waa ran id piyod to gaas no id sullug dan otid koominan dos ilowan
iru iddos moraom kos koovottan id piyod peen to gaas no id sullug dan otid koominan dos ilowan
a pomon to nouhoy id inguma iddos od osawa id tintinuhon dan taman to nouromurom sikandan
a riyot tongngovulli ron duwon id umow no mid ungketen to aay ron iddos od osawa
ndini kow woy tommu kow kandin
dda ron en id onnow dos mgo mongovay woy id panoy ran iddos mgo ilowan dan
os mgo leaw mid ooseng diyot limma no moraom kos koovottan kahi ran to oggayi koy pa uvag to disok no gaas su asow ron od koovukkan inis mgo ilowan doy
iru mid tavak iddos moraom kos koovottan kahi ran to h konna su saddook kulang don ini atag keta langun
oppiya pa undiyon kow baling to tindahan woy bolli kow
a laggun tid ipanow ran id inguma ron iddos od osawa
oy dos limmon mongovay no nopanoy ron mid usok duma kandin diyot kosalan woy id lokobban don iddos sobbangan
odtahad id inguma riyot leggua to sobbangan iddos leaw no mgo mongovay woy mid umow ran nid ungketen to ir ir
ousokka koy
iru mid tavak iddos od osawa to aa a nokokilaa koniyu
a kahin isas to een panoypanoy kow oyyos waa row nosorolli ko ondan ollawa o urasa iddos kodlivod ku
a id itulan dan ni isas to ossa pa no ponunggelengan
ahi rin to ddos kodharit onama iling kaay
uwon minuvu no to waa pa sikandin id ipanow poundiyot moriyun ingod id poumow rin kos mgo sudsuhuwon din amoy id salig din kandan iddos soopi rin
os ipat sokkad taddot sudsuhuwon din id solihan din to loppa tod kogaha ran
ddos sokkad id solihan to limmon maan   no buawan no soopi woy dos sokkad id solihan din to oruwa maan   woy idda mandad so sokkad id solihan din to sokkad no maan  
a idda pa id ipanow sikandin
os sudsuhuwon no nokotanggap to limmon maan   no buawan no soopi idda ron en id nigusyu rin idda woy limmon maan   mandad kos gononsya rin
ngketen dad en mandad kos id puungan taddot nokotanggap to oruwon maan   no buawan no soopi nokogononsya sikandin to oruwon maan  
iru idda moho so nokotanggap to sokkad no maan   no buawan no soopi id kokali riyot livuta woy id lobbong din iddos soopi to amu rin amoy id totaaw
o nouhoyn timpu id uli ron iddos amu taddon mgo sudsuhuwon woy id poumow rin sikandan amoyd kosorollan ko momonnu ron kos soopi rin
a id porani iddos nokotanggap to limmon maan   no buawan no soopi woy id boggoy rin idda riyot amu rin duma to gononsya rin
ahi rin to ir id solihan a nikkow to limmon maan   no buawan no soopi
a ini ron kos soopi ru duma to limma maan   no gononsya
ahi taddot amu rin to oppiya kos id puungan du
oppiya ka woy kosolihan no sudsuhuwon
omon tod kosolihan ka man to disok od solihan ku sikkow to dakkoo
a usok ka rini woy lonug ka to kahaan ku
a id porani mandad iddos nokotanggap to oruwon maan   no buawan no soopi
ahi rin to ir id solihan a nikkow to oruwon maan   no buawan no soopi
a ini ron kos soopi ru duma to oruwon maan   no gononsya
ahi taddot amu rin to oppiya kos id puungan du
oppiya ka woy kosolihan no sudsuhuwon
omon tod kosolihan ka man to disok od solihan ku sikkow to dakkoo
a usok ka rini woy lonug ka to kahaan ku
a id porani iddos nokotanggap to sokkad no maan   no buawan no soopi woy mid ikahi to ir nokosaddoo a no oraroy ka no istriktu
d ongayon du peen iddos konna kikow woy od kottuwon du ahad iddos waa ru oiluggati tid pomuwa
ovaakkan a deen id ipanow a woy id lobbong ku inis soopi ru
a ini rad kos soopi
ahi taddot amu rin to orat ka woy poggulon no sudsuhuwon
okosaddoo ka rad bos en no od ongayon ku iddos konna koddi woy od kottuwon ku ahad iddos waa ku oiluggati tid pomuwa
a ko ungketen kos poomdom du mambot waa ru moho id taaw kos soopi ku riyot bangku amoy od kotanggap ku nanoy no duwon don tuvu
a mid ikahi iddos amu riyot dumon sudsuhuwon din to ngaya row kos soopi ruwot kandin woy boggoy row riyot duwon sopuun maan   no buawan no soopi
u iddos od kosolihan od duhangan peen iddos diyot kandin
iru iddos diid kosolihan od ongayon peen ahad iddos disok dobbo no riyot kandin
a ikos waa koruan no sudsuhuwon lumbag dow riyot mosuksukirom
a rutun mopet dobbo kos sinoggawon to mgo minuvu woyd pogkihot sikandan to ngipon pomon to mosakit nod geddamon dan
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to iyot timpu to kodlivod ku duma to langun no ponolihan siyak no nak to inuvu od unsad a riyot koddin trunu amoyd hari woy od kokita iddos seaa to kotuusan ku
d livuungon kos langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod diyot isowwan ku woy od podossan ku sikandan iling to tohodtamong to oyama nod podossan kos mgo karnero woy mgo kambing
ddos mgo minuvu no id poiling ku to karnero id taaw ku riyon lomig to kowanan ku woy dos id poiling ku to mgo kambing diyon lomig to ivang
a siyak no ari od osengan ku iddos mgo minuvu no riyon lomig to kowanan ku kahi ku to ikiyu no nokotanggap to kopiyannoy to moy ku undini kow woy lonug kow to kohoriyan ku no id panoy atag koniyu pomon poron to tigkonayan to ingod
yya su id gutasan a id pokaan a nikiyu woy notokkangan a id poinom a nikiyu
d undiyon a to koniyu no waa od kopenekkan ku id olitolit a nikiyu
aa umpak ku id umpakan a nikiyu
ovohokan a id tuhanuu a nikiyu woy to id prisu a id lowwi a nikiyu
a iddos motallong no mgo minuvu no riyon lomig to kowanan ku od ikahi to ongaggon kannu roy man sikkow nokita nid gutasan no id pokaan doy woy notokkangan no id poinom doy
annu ka man id undiyot konami no waa od kopenekkan du woy id olitolit doy woy waa umpak du no id umpakan doy
annu ka man novohoki no id tuhanuu roy woy kannu ka id prisu no id lowwi roy
a siyak no ari od tavak a kandan nod ungketen to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad ondan kos id puungan dow amoyd tavang kaayt mopoobbava to langun no suwod ku id puungan dow ini atag koddi
d osengan ku iddos mgo minuvu no riyon lomig to ivang ku kahi ku to ikiyu no id silutan to onama awa kow kaay
iyon kow to linowt apuy no konna od koovukkan no id panoy ron tapoy atag ki oivuyan woy taddot mgo sakup din
yya su id gutasan a piru waa a nikiyu pokanna woy notokkangan a piru waa a nikiyu poinomma
d undiyon a to koniyu no waa od kopenekkan ku piru waa a nikiyu olitolita
aa umpak ku piru waa a nikiyu umpaki
ovohokan a woy id prisu piru waa a nikiyu lowwiya
a od intud dan mandad koddi nod ungketen to ongaggon kannu roy man sikkow nokita nid gutasan notokkangan id undiyot konami no waad kopenekkan waa umpak novohokan woy id prisu no waa roy tovangi
d tavak a kandan to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad ondan no waa row puungi amoyd tavang kaayt mopoobbava to langun no suwod ku iling mandad to waa kow id tavang koddi
urisu od poowan sikandan amoyd silutan to waad tomanon piru iddos motallong no mgo minuvu od pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
a to nopongnga id nonaw ni isas idda langun id ikohiyan din iddos mgo tinodduwan din to osorollan dow no oruwa robbon allow pomon koungkay od inguma ron kos pista to odlihad to onolihan
oy siyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy riyot bollad to mgo minuvu amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
a id lolivuung iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio riyot baoy ni aifas no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
d pomuhawang sikandan to kodammot ki isas no waa od pokosaddoo oyyos od poimotayan dan sikandin
ahi ran to onna ta id posasang to pista kos kodammot kandin su saddook od koukag kos mgo minuvu
o riyon don onsi isas to etania mid undiyon sikandan to baoy ni imon no duwon bohok no etet no nouliyan don
a duwon sokkad no baay nid inguma no id piyod to orayn mahaa no pomammut no nokotaaw riyot tootawwan no binovallan pomot batu nod ngoranan to alabastro
aggun tid kaan onsi isas id porani kandin iddon baay woy id daddas din iddos pomammut diyot uu ni isas
o nokita idda to mgo tinodduwan din id langot sikandan woy kahi ran to uu
ambo moho tid uuwakkan din ika
u otik id boligya pa nanoy ikon pomammut maanmaan kos kontidad woy dos bayad id boggoy riyot mgo worowora
iru nokosaddoo si isas taddot osengan dan woy mid ikahi sikandin to ambot od sowayon dow sikandin
u moppiya man kos id puungan din koddi
yya su iddos mgo worowora inaayun dow od koruma
iru siyak konna a nikiyu inaayun od koruma
nis koddaddas din to pomammut kaayt lawa ku id panoy rin atag to kodlobbong koddi
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod id ponudtuu iddos oppiyon inoggan id ponudtuu en mandad inis id puungan din koddi amoyd kosompottan sikandin
okkad taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles no id ngoranan ki udas scariote id undiyon to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis
oy mid ikahi sikandin to ila kos id boggoy row koddi otik id boggoy ku riyot koniyun bollad si isas
a id iyap dan to otollumpuun plata no soopi woy id boggoy ran idda riyot kandin
omon taddon timpu id nangkap si udas to poukit to kodboligya ki isas
a riyot unnon allow to pista to aan no aa otuvu id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinudduwan din woy mid intud kandin
ahi ran to ongaggon ingkon koy od panoy to lavung ta atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
ahin isas to ndiyonni row iddos sokkad no minuvu no riyot bonuwa to erusalem woy osengi row sikandin no id ikahi iddos ohodnonaw no id inguma ron kos timpu nid panoy to onama atag kandin
ikami no mgo tinodduwan din id poundini rin to baoy ru amoy kaay koy od lavung atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
a id puungan taddot mgo tinodduwan iddos id pomandu ni isas woy id panoy ran to lavung atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
o od kosagkup don mid kaan si isas duma taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles
aggun tid kaan sikandan mid ikahi si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no sokkad koniyu od boligya koddi
a orayn naanu iddos mgo tinodduwan woy ipat sokkad kandan mid intud kandin kahi ran to ongaggon siyak bo kos od tommanon du
id tavak si isas to ddos id aggom to paan kaayt yohung duma koddi sikandin en kos od boligya koddi
iyak no nak to inuvu od patoy a en iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
iru mokaaratarat kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod boligya koddi
oppiya pa nanoy ko waa sikandin nominuvu
a si udas nod boligya ki isas mid ikahi to ohodnonaw siyak bo kos od tommanon du
d tavak si isas to ooseng dud en
aggun tid kaan sikandan mid angoy si isas to paan woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
opongnga id toppiktoppik din idda woy id toyyow riyot mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin to wata row ini woy kanna row
ni en kos lawa ku no id buwis atag koniyu
a mid angoy sikandin to kupa woy id posolamat diyot onama
opongnga id toyyow rin idda riyot kandan woy kahi rin to wata row ini woy inom kow langun
ni en kos longossa ku no id posivonnaa to kodpotonduwoy to onama
d tihis kos longossa ku atag to mouraan minuvu amoyd koposinsyan kos mgo saa ran
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no dii ad od uman nod inom to ammis to ubas taman tod inguma ron iddos timpu no od inom a to lammin ammis duma koniyu init timpu nod hari ron kos onamon moy ku
a id kanta ran atag to koddoong to onama woy nopongnga mid undiyon dan to uvungan to mgo libo
a kahin isas kandan to ni en no bulli langun dow od paahuy woyd tanan koddi oyya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no d imotayan ku iddos tohodtamong to karnero woy od pokodsuwoysuwoy kos mgo karnero
iru riyot timpu nod kovadnow ad od unna a koniyu riyon to alilea
a kahin edro ki isas to had od tanan dan langun kikow konna a en od tanan kikow
ahin isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku kikow edro no to dii pa od ukkaa kos manuk to ini en no bulli kootollu rud kangkan tod elle no waa ka id kilaa koddi
iru mid tavak si edro to had od patoy a duma kikow konna ku en id elle no waa ku sikkow nokilaa
a ungketen dad en mandad kos id ikahi taddot dumon mgo tinodduwan din
a id undiyon si isas to lugaa nod ngoranan to etsemane duma taddot mgo tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din sikandin to nsad kow pa kaay laggun tod dasaa a riyot kounnan
d poruma rin si edro woy dos oruwon anak ni ebedeo
d tigkanoy kos id geddam din no lampas no lanu woy orayn movoggat kos ginawa rin
ahi rin to ampas kos lanu ku no imman tod patoy ad
olintotuwos kow pa kaay woy yo kowd tinuhon
a id poriyu boyow sikandin diyot kounnan woy rutun id laangkob sikandin diyot livuta woy mid dasaa kahi rin to moy ku otid kopakoy yo ad poukita tod ingumon koosayan
iru konna inis id kopii ku kos od kotuman ko konna idda rad en so kikown id kopii
o id livod sikandin diyot otollun tinodduwan din nokita rin sikandan no nokotinuhon
ahi rin ki edro to ambot id tinuhon kow moho
onna kow vo od pokogaha no diid tinuhon ahad sokkad da no uras
o kowd tinuhon woy dasaa kow amoy dii kowd kopiyod diyot kodpuung to saa
os ginawa row od kopiyan nanoy nod puung to motallong piru iddos lawa row moomet
a ikooruwon timpu id undiyon mandon si isas to kounnan amoyd dasaa
ahi rin to moy ku otik koilangan en nod pokoukit a to od ingumon koosayan muopa no iddos kikown id kopii kos od kotuman
opongnga id livod mandon sikandin diyot mgo tinodduwan din woy nokita rin sikandan no nokotinuhon su oraroy ron no movoggat kos mata ran
a id tanan mandon si isas kandan woy mid undiyon to kounnan amoyd dasaa to ikootollun timpu iling taddot unnon dosalon din
opongnga idda id livod mandon sikandin diyot mgo tinodduwan woy mid ikahi to ambot id tinuhon kow poron woyd oimolloy
ntongngi row id inguma ron kos uras no siyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy riyot bollad to mgo mosaasaa
nnow kowd su ini ron kos minuvu nod boligya koddi
aggun tod ooseng pa si isas id inguma si udas no sokkad taddot sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din
d duma kandin iddos orayn mouraan minuvu no posidpiyod to mgo polihuma woy mgo badas
yon id suhu kandan iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
apoy id posaddoo ni udas kandan iddos kilaannan kahi rin to ddos minuvu no od pongumustan ku ukit to kodarok sikandin en iddos od nongkapon dow
a omotta row sikandin
een to kodinguma ni udas idda ron en id porani sikandin ki isas woy mid ikahi to ohodnonaw moppiyon bulli
oy id pongumusta sikandin ki isas ukit to kodarok
id tavak si isas to uwod lukutowd woy puungiyud iddos dontulon to kodundini row
a id ammot dan si isas woy id ponoggasan dan tid somad
dda ron en sokkad taddot id duma ki isas id tadnus to polihuma rin woy id tibbas din iddos uripon taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis deen noutas kos divauyn tolinga
iru mid ikahi si isas kandin to olivod du kos polihuma ru ruwot lipi su iddos langun nod tadnus to polihuma od patoy en ukit to polihuma
aa ka vo nokosaddoo no otik id kopii ku od pokoumow a riyot moy ku nod tavang koddi woy idda ron en od popiyod sikandin to maanmaan no ponolihan
iru otid buyu a to tavang konna od kotuman iddos osulat no ahit onama no ini en kos koilangan nod kotomanan
a mid ikahi si isas diyot mgo minuvu to riminal a vo su goli kow od piyod to mgo polihuma woy mgo badas to kodammot koddi
llowallow a man id unsad woy id nonaw riyot templo piru waa a man nikiyu omotta
iru od kotomanan ini langun su amoy od kotuman iddos noikahi to mgo propeta riyot osulat no ahit onama
a id tanan kandin iddos langun no tinodduwan woy id paahuy
a iddos id ponammot ki isas id piyod kandin diyot baoy to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no si aifas
iyon mandad id lolivuung iddos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
i edro id tintinundug no moriyu boyow taman diyot lama to baoy taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
d usok sikandin dutun woy mid ounsad duma to mgo tohodtamong taddon baoy amoyd kokita ko ondan kos od kotomanan ni isas
a iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos langun no sakup to hukumanan to mgo udio id nangkap sikandan to unayan ahad konna bonnaa amoyd uuhon dan to saa si isas woyd poimotayan
iru waa nokita ran ahad mouraa kos id posivonnaa to uhus mokaatag kandin
a riyot mori duwon oruwon minuvu no id undiyon to isowwan taddot mgo ponguu
oy kahi ran to d oseng inin minuvu to d gobban ku kos templo woy od poohinaton ku mandon daom to otollun allow
a id lohinat iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy id inturan din si isas kahi rin to aa vo id pokotavak du taddot id oseng dan mokaatag kikow
iru id poonongonong da en si isas
a id ooseng mandon iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis kahi rin to ongulivot ka ukit to ngaran to maantoyn onama no od ponudtulan koy nikkow ko sikkow veen kos esiyas dos nak to onama
id tavak si isas to ooseng dud en
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no init morin allow od kokita row no siyak no nak to inuvu od unsad diyon lomig to kowanan to onamon otuus woy od undini a pomon diyot datas to langit nod dumannan to souhapun
a id bendas taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis iddos umpak din pomon to lingasa rin woy mid kahi sikandin to d sosumpalit sikandin to onama
onnad koilangan nod angoy ki pa to duma nod posivonnaa taddot saa rin
ikiyu ron en kos nokorinog taddot kodsosumpalit din
a ondan kos od kooseng dow kaay
id tavak sikandan to llog en sikandin nod imotayan
a id ilobban dan sikandin diyot bonnong woy id ponsuntuk woy dos duma id pontabpi kandin
ahi ran to a sikkow no esiyas kun uvag otukow veen ko ondoy kos id tabpi kikow
aggun tid ounsad si edro riyot lama duwon sokkad no baay no sudsuhuwon to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no id porani kandin woy mid ikahi to ikkow mandad sokkad ka en no duma ni isas no toho alilea
iru mid elle si edro riyot isowwan to langun kahi rin to e waa moho saddoo ku ruwot id oseng du
aa nouhoy pomon tadda mid undiyon sikandin to sobbangan to lama
a rutun duwon mandon sokkad no baayn sudsuhuwon no nokokita kandin woy id osengan din iddos mgo minuvu rutun
ahi rin to kon minuvu sokkad en sikandin nid duma ki isas no toho azaret
iru mid elle rad mandon si edro no golid pongulivot kahi rin to aa a moho nokokilaa ruwon no minuvu
odtahad id porani ki edro iddos mgo minuvu nid loohinat dutun woy kahi ran to onnaa en no sokkad ka en kandan su riyot kodlituk du iling mandad taddot kodlituk to mgo toho alilea
iru id pongulivot peen sikandin kahi rin to had od patoy a pa koungkay ko id ouhus a su nosorollan to onama no waa ku en moho nokilaa ikon minuvu
a idda ron en id ukkaa iddos manuk
oy nosompottan ni edro iddos id ikahi ni isas kandin no o dii pa od ukkaa kos manuk to ini en no bulli kootollu rud kangkan tod elle no waa ka id kilaa koddi
a mid awa sikandin woy orayn mopet kos sinoggawon din
o od kaallow ron id pomuhawang iddos langun no ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio ko momonnu ran od koimotayan si isas
d baku ran iddos bollad din woy id piyod dan sikandin diyot ki ilato no gubernador to oma
a si udas no id boligya ki isas to nokita rin no id silutan si isas to kopotayan nokodsondit sikandin taddot id puungan din woy id pouli rin iddos otollumpuun plata no soopi riyot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woyd pombuyyahon to mgo udio
ahi rin kandan to okosaa a su id boligya ku iddos minuvu no waa saa
id tavak sikandan to e
ndan mak lavut doy
ikkow ron man kos bahala tadda
a id sovuwak ni udas iddos soopi riyot osag to templo
id awa sikandin woy id pongoggot ukit to kodbovitin
a id pomurut taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis iddos soopi woy kahi ran to d diiyan diyot keton mgo uhu no id timuu ini riyot tootawwan to soopi to templo oyya su nahamit man ini atag to kodbayad to kodimatoy to minuvu
een id pomuhawang dan nod gomiton iddon soopi to kodbolli to livuta riyot minuvu no tohodbovaa to kuron amoy od lovongngan atag to mgo moholiyug nod patoy
urisu taman koungkay id ngoranan don iddon livuta to ivuta nid oyaran to ongossa
kit tadda notuman iddos id ikahi dangan ni propeta eremias no mid ungketen to d angoy ran iddos otollumpuun plata no soopi no idda en no kontidad kos nounduhan to dumon koubbaran ni srael no id bolli kandin
oy id gamit idda amoy id bolli to livuta riyot minuvu no tohodbovaa to kuron iling taddot id suhu koddi to onama
a si isas mid lohinat diyot isowwan to gubernador woy id intud kandin iddos gubernador kahi rin to ikkow vo kos hari to mgo udio
id tavak si isas to ooseng dud en
iru waa tovaka ni isas iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio no id uug kandin no nokopuung sikandin to saa
a mid ikahi si ilato to aa ru vo norinog iddos mouraan saa no id uug dan kikow
iru waa en id tavak si isas ahad sokkad taddot saa nid uug dan kandin deen orayn nosoobbuwan dos gubernador
a ipat pista to odlihad to onolihan nooyami ron to gubernador nod poleggua to sokkad no pinirisu no od buyuwon to mouraan minuvu
ddon timpu duwon pinirisu no novantug nod puung to morat no id ngoranan ki arabas
een to nolivuung don iddos mouraan minuvu id intud si ilato kandan kahi rin to ndoy man kos id kopii row nod polegguangon ku si arabas bo o si isas no id ngoranan no esiyas
d oseng ni ilato idda su nosorollan din no kosina kos unayan no id boggoy ran si isas diyot bollad din
aggun to id unsad pa si ilato diyot unsaran to kodhukum duwon id inguma no id piyod to sulat pomon diyot sawa ni ilato
oy nokosulat dutun no o ru monnuwa kos minuvu no waa saa su genot bulli duwon morat no tohenoppon ku mokaatag kandin woy noosayan a oraroy taddon tohenoppon
iru id sutsutan taddot mgo tohodbuwis woyd pombuyyahon to mgo udio iddos mgo minuvu no iyon dan od buyuwon nod polegguangon si arabas woy od poimotayan si isas
a mid intud mandon si ilato kahi rin to ndoy musing kaayt oruwa kos id kopii row nod polegguangon ku
id tavak sikandan to i arabas
ahi rin mandon to ndan kos od puungan ku ki isas no id ngoranan no esiyas
a langun dan mid tavak to d pakpak sikandin diyon to krus
iru mid ikahi si ilato kandan to ambo
ndan man kos saa no nopuungan din
a id ayas peen id pehes iddos mgo minuvu no mid ungketen to d pakpak en sikandin diyon to krus
o nokita ni ilato no worad en koruanon taddot osengan din diyot mgo minuvu woy od koukag don nanoy sikandan id angoy sikandin to oweg woy id ounab to bollad din diyot isowwan to mouraan minuvu
ahi rin to aa en lavut ku to kopotayan kaayn minuvu
oniyu ron no saa
id tavak iddos langun no minuvu to yya
ikami woy dos mgo anak doy kos od sukutan taddot kandin no kopotayan
a id poleggua ni ilato si arabas piru si isas id polompossan din woy id boggoy rin diyot bollad to mgo sundau amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
a id piyod to mgo sundau si isas diyot baoy to gubernador woy nokolingkus kandin iddos langun no duma ran no mgo sundau
d lusutan dan si isas woy id umpakan dan tod momoollutun umpak iling to umpak to hari
d podlambed dan kos duhiyon no baahon woy id bovallan dan idda no kuruna no id takos diyot uu ni isas
opongnga id posomad sikandin to bookayu riyot kowanan no bollad din no uvag kun to bastun to hari
a mid lingkood dan diyot isowwan din woy id sumpalit dan sikandin kahi ran to uopa no mowwet kos umuu ru sikkow no ari to mgo udio
a id ponilobban dan sikandin woy id angoy ran iddos id somaddan din no bookayu woy id pipit dan idda riyot uu rin
o nopongnga ran mid sumpalit kandin id lusut dan iddos od momoollutun umpak woy id posukub dan mandon iddos umpak din
opongnga id piyod dan sikandin diyot leggua amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
o id leggua ran don pomon diyot bonuwa nosinuggung dan iddos minuvu no id ngoranan ki imon no toho irene woy id pohos dan sikandin nod tiyang taddot krus ni isas
a id inguma ran don diyot lugaa nod ngoranan to olgota no iddos kohulugan lugaa to ongovongo
d boggayan dan si isas to binu no id sombutan to mopet no bawi nod pokotogka to mosakit
iru to id geddaman din idda mid elle sikandin nod inom tadda
a id pakpak dan si isas diyon to krus woy id bunutbunut dan atag taddot ogget ni isas ko ondan kos od kokomunoy to ipat sokkad kandan
opongnga idda mid unsad sikandan amoyd tamong kandin
a riyot lomig datas to uu ni isas id tawwan dan to korotula woy nokosulat dutun iddos saa nid uug dan kandin no mid ungketen to ni en si isas no ari to mgo udio
a duwon oruwon kriminal no id pakpak dan mandad diyon to krus no riyot tapad ibpit ni isas
ddos sokkad diyon lomig to kowanan din woy dos sokkad diyon lomig to ivang
a iddos mgo minuvu nid lihad dutun id ponlingilingi ran woy id sumpalit dan sikandin
ahi ran to omman du od gobban du iddos templo woyd poohinaton du mandon daom da to otollun allow
tik mooggot en iddos id oseng du tovangiyu kos kougolingun du
oy otik mooggot ka en no nak to onama ponog ka ruwot krus
