id sumpalit mandad kandin iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
ahi ran to e id tovangan din kos duma piru dii man sikandin od pokotavang to kougolingun din
omman din no ari sikandin to srael
tid pokoponog sikandin duwot krus od pomakoy ki kandin
d salig man sikandin to onama woy id ikahi rin peen no nak sikandin to onama
a od ontongngan ta veen kod tovangan sikandin to onama
had peen iddos mgo kriminal nid pakpak diyon to krus no duug din iling dad en mandad tadda kos kodsumpalit dan kandin
a to mokountud don kos allow tigkow id mosukirom kos intirut ingod daom to otollun uras
o mgo alas tres don to mapun id pehes si isas to monokkaa no mid ungketen to li li lema sabactani no iddos kohulugan onama ku onama ku mambot id tonanan a nikkow
o norinog idda taddot dumon minuvu nod loohinat dutun mid ikahi sikandan to d umow rin si lias
okkad kandan id lungkossu woy mid angoy to immat bukoo nid aggom diyot suka woy id takos din idda riyot ubpu to panga to kayu
opongnga id bullow rin idda amoy id poinom kandin
iru mid ikahi iddos duma to odtohona row sikandin
d ongatan ta woyd ontongngan ta kod loppow vo si lias amoyd tavang kandin
a id pehes mandon si isas to monokkaa woy id salig din kos ispiritu rin diyot onama
dda ron en iddos orayn mokoppaan kurtina riyon to templo novendas pomon diyot datas poundiyot dosiyung
a id linug woy nongotobbag dos doorakkoon mgo batu
opokes kos mgo lovongngan woy mouraan minuvu to onama nid poomatoy no nongovadnow
d leggua sikandan pomon diyot lovongngan
oy to novadnow ron si isas iddos id poomatoy no nongovadnow mid undiyot erusalem woy mouraan minuvu no nokokita kandan
a iddos kopitan to mgo sundau woy dos mgo sakup din no id tamong ki isas nokorinog taddon linug woy nokita ran iddos mgo notomanan woy oraroy ran no novaakkan
ahi ran to onnaa vos en no nak sikandin to onama
a duwon mouraan baay rutun no id pomantow riyot moriyu boyow
ikandan iddos id dumoruma ki isas pomon poron diyot alilea woy id tovangan dan sikandin
os duma kandan si aria no toho agdala si aria no inoy ni antiago woy ose woy dos sawa ni ebedeo
o od kosagkup don id inguma iddos od koruwonnan no minuvu no id ngoranan ki ose no toho rimatea
okkad sikandin taddot od pondumoruma ki isas
id undiyon sikandin to ki ilato amoy od buyuwon din nod ongayon iddos bangkoy ni isas
a id aman si ilato tadda
een id angoy ni ose iddon bangkoy woy id bukusan din to lammi woy mahaa no ogget
oy id taaw rin idda riyot langub no lovongngan no lammi rin id bongbangan atag to kougolingun din
a id lokobban din idda to dakkoon batu woy mid ipanow sikandin
ddos mgo baay no si aria no toho agdala woy dos sokkad pa no aria id unsad dutun nid isau riyot lovongngan
o soop no allow no idda en kos llowt odimolloy mid undiyot ki ilato iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos mgo ariseo
ahi ran to ir nosompottan doy no iddot nouyag pa iddos bouhuson no minuvu mid ikahi sikandin no od kovadnow kun sikandin otid lihad kos ikootollun allow
een iyon ayu moppiya no od suhu ka to minuvu nod potomongngon tat lovongngan din taman to otollun allow su saddook od undiyon iddos mgo tinodduwan din amoyd takow taddot bangkoy rin woyd osengon dan no novadnow ron sikandin
o ungketen kos od puungan dan iddos kodouhus dan od lampas peen taddot unna
ahin ilato kandan to yya piyoddow kos mgo sundau woy ooyyari row tod tamong dos lovongngan
een id ipanow ran woy id tawwan dan to patow dos batu riyot sobbangan to lovongngan amoyd kosorollan ko duwon od lukat tadda
opongnga id tuwos dan iddos mgo sundau amoyd tamong tadda
a to sollom poron oraroy to allowt inggu nopongnga iddos llowt odimolloy mid undiyon si aria no toho agdala woy dos sokkad pa no aria amoyd ontong taddot lovongngan
a tigkow duwon monokkaan linug su id ponog iddos sokkad no ponolihan pomon diyot datas to langit
d poibpit din iddos dakkoon batu woy mid unsad sikandin diyot ampow tadda
ddos bonnong din id sella iling to kilat woy dos umpak din golid seaa to koputiyoy
os mgo tohodtamong dutun id pongookoo to mattag allak dan woy novantang sikandan iling to minuvu nid patoy ron
a id osengan taddot ponolihan iddos oruwon baay kahi rin to o kowd kovaakki
okosaddoo a nod nangkap kow ki isas nid pakpak diyon to krus
orad sikandin kaay su id badnow ron iling taddot id ikahi rin dangan
ndini kow woy ontongngi row iddos id tawwan kandin
a lukut kow woy ponudtuu row riyot mgo tinodduwan din no novadnow ron sikandin woy id unna sikandin diyot alilea woy rutun od kokita ran sikandin
o kowd kolingow taddot id ponudtuu ku koniyu
een id lukut dan id awa riyot lovongngan no nokodsambut kos id geddam dan su novaakkan woy noponnu ran mandad to kahaan
d lungkossu ran amoyd ponudtuu taddot langun diyot mgo tinodduwan din
aggun tid lungkossu ran tigkow ran notommu si isas diyot daan woy mid ikahi sikandin to d poingkon kow
a id porani ran ki isas mid lingkood id somad sikandan to paa rin woy id simba kandin
ahin isas kandan to o kowd kovaakki
ndiyon kow to mgo suwod ku woy ponudtuli row sikandan nod undiyon dan to alilea woy riyon koyd od pokitannoy
aggun to riyon pa to daan iddos mgo baay mid undiyon to bonuwa iddos dumon tohodtamong woy id ponudtuu ran diyot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis iddos langun no notomanan
a iddon mgo ponguu id lolivuung duma taddot od pombuyyahon to mgo udio woy nopuhawang dan nod boggayan to paandog iddos mgo sundau woy id puungan dan en idda
ahi ran to oilangan nod osengon dow riyot mgo minuvu no laggun to id tinuhon kow id undiyon dos mgo tinodduwan ni isas to tongngovulli woy id takow ran iddos bangkoy rin
a otid korinog to gubernador no nokotinuhon kow yo kowd kaaggow su sikami ron kos od kotuig nod oseng kandin amoy konna kowd komonnu
een id tanggap taddot mgo sundau iddos soopi woy id puungan dan iddos id suhu kandan
aman koungkay ini en kos itulan no id posoob to mgo udio
a iddos sopuusokkad no tinodduwan mid undiyon to alilea no riyot sokkad no buvungan no idda en kos id oseng ni isas nod tommuwan dan
o nokita ran sikandin dutun mid lingkood dan amoyd simba kandin piru iddos duma kandan duwon poron kodduworuwa
a id porani si isas kandan woy mid ikahi to d boggoy koddi kos langun no kotungud diyot datas to langit woy kaay to ampowt ingod
een undiyon kow to langun no minuvu riyot nokodossoosson ingod amoyd kovovallan sikandan no mgo tinodduwan ku
outismui row sikandan diyot ngaran to moy nak woy his no spiritu
oy nonawwi row sikandan nod tuman to langun no id suhu ku koniyu
omuwa row riyot poomdom dow no inaayun a od duma koniyu taman to kotompusan to ingod
a ini en kos tigkonayan to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays no nak to onama
oikahi riyot id posulat to onama ki propeta saias no d popiyod ku kos koddin tohodponudtuu nod unna kikow amoy od panoy to kodinguma ru
yyos duwon monokkaan bawos diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no mid ungketen to onaya row kos pusung dow atag tod ongaggon woy tulidda row kos od ukitan din
otuman en idda su id inguma si uan no ohodboutismu no riyon id oubpa to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
d nonaw sikandin to mgo minuvu kahi rin to ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row woy poboutismu kow amoyd posinsyan kow to onama
a mid undiyot kandin iddos mgo minuvu no id pomon diyon to intirut prubinsya to udea woy pomon diyot bonuwa to erusalem
d ponudtuu ran iddos mgo saa ran woy id poboutismu ran ki uan diyot weg to ordan
ddos umpak ni uan binovallan pomot bowvuu to kamelyo woy dos ollon din binovallan pomot kindaa to oyama
yon kokaan din mgo apang woy tonnob
a id posaddoo si uan diyot mgo minuvu kahi rin to uwon od tundug koddi no lampas pa koddi su konna a ollog ahad kodakas da en to sandalyas din
d boutismuwan ku sikiyu to oweg piru sikandin his no spiritu kos id boutismu rin koniyu
a riyot timpu to kodboutismu ni uan mid inguma si isas pomon diyot bonuwa to azaret no sakup to prubinsya to alilea woy id boutismuwan sikandin ni uan diyot weg to ordan
o id goun don si isas diyot oweg idda ron en nokita rin no nopokes kos langit woy id lonna iddos his no spiritu riyot kandin iling to soopati
a duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ikkow en kos nak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy oraroy a no nahaa kikow
o nopongnga boutismui si isas idda ron en id poundiyon sikandin to his no spiritu to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
a daom to oppatnopuun allow id ubpa sikandin diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no riyon en iddos mgo monnanap to puwaason woy id geddaman sikandin ni oivuyan
iru mid undiyot ki isas iddos mgo ponolihan amoyd tuhanuu kandin
a to noprisu si uan id livod si isas diyot alilea amoyd ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan to onama
ahi rin to ni ron en kos timpu no id ponudtuu to mgo propeta dangan oyyos asow ron kos kodharit onama
ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row woy pomokaya row kos oppiyon inoggan
okkad no allow laggun tid ipanow si isas diyot ibpit to anowt alilea nokita rin iddos oruwon toosuwod no si imon woy si ndres
d ooppan dan to pukut su mgo tohodngongaap meen sikandan
ahin isas kandan to uma kow koddi
onnad ngaap kos od ingutollon dow ko konna od nonawwan ku sikiyu nod ingutoo to mgo minuvu
dda ron en id tonanan dan iddos mgo pukut woy id duma ran kandin
a ponayun mid ipanow si isas diyot kounnan boyow woy nokita rin iddos oruwa mandad no toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan no mgo anak ni ebedeo
d ounsad sikandan diyot bollangay no id oupiya to mgo pukut
dda ron en id umow sikandan ni isas no od duma kandin
a id tonanan dan iddos amoy ran no si ebedeo riyon to bollangay duma taddot mgo minuvu no id popuung dan woy mid duma ran mandad ki isas
a id undiyon onsi isas to bonuwa to apernaum
oy riyon to llowt odimolloy id usok si isas diyot simbaan to mgo udio woy mid nonaw to mgo minuvu
osoobbuwan dan taddot kodnonaw rin su duwon en kotungud konna iling taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
a riyot simbaan to mgo udio duwon sokkad no minuvu no id losuran to busow woy id pomehes kahi rin to isas no toho azaret ondak lavut du konami
d undini ka vo amoyd silutan koy nikkow
d kilaa a kikow su sikkow en kos his no nak to onama
a id sugga ni isas iddos busow kahi rin to oonongonong ka
eggua kad kandin
dda ron en id pokookoo to busow iddon minuvu woy ayas mid pomehes to waa pa sikandin id leggua riyot minuvu
osoobbuwan iddos langun no minuvu woy id poikohiyoy ran to h ondan man ini
ammi inin nonaw su duwon kotungud din nod sugga to mgo busow woy id leggua en
omon tadda goos nokosoob iddos mokaatag ki isas diyot mgo lugaa no nokolingkus to intirut prubinsya to alilea
a to id leggua onsi isas diyot simbaan to mgo udio mid undiyon sikandin to baoy onni imon woy ndres duma ongki antiago woy uan
utun iddos baay no onuhang ni imon id oilogga su id momonit
o mid inguma ron si isas id ponudtulan sikandin to mgo minuvu atag taddot novohokan
een id poroniyan ni isas iddos novohokan woy id somaddan din kos bollad woy id poonnow rin
a idda ron en nouliyan sikandin woy id sondad kandan to kokaan
o od kosagkup don id piyod to mgo minuvu riyot ki isas iddos langun nod kovohokan woy dos id ponlosuran to busow
angun to mgo minuvu riyot bonuwa nolivuung diyot lama to baoy
a nouliyan ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu no duwon nokodossoosson bohok woy id poleggua rin iddos mouraan busow woy waa poosenga ni isas iddos mgo busow su nokokilaa ran man ko ondoy sikandin
osukirom poron mid onnow si isas woy id undiyon to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa amoy od dasaa rutun
a id nonangkap kandin onsi imon
o nokita ran don sikandin mid ikahi ran to d nongkapon ka to langun no minuvu
iru kahin isas kandan to d undiyon ki pa to dumon bonuwa no morani kaay su amoy id pokoponudtuu ku mandad kandan iddos oppiyon inoggan oyyos ini en kos dontulon to kodundini ku
een id lingkus ni isas iddos langun no bonuwa riyon to alilea
d ponudtuu rin kos kahit onama riyot mgo simbaan to udio woy id poleggua rin iddos mgo busow no id lasud diyot mgo minuvu
a duwon sokkad no minuvu no duwon bohok no etet no id porani ki isas
id lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan din woy id poerueru kahi rin to okosaddoo a nod pokouli ka kaayt molibmit no bohok ku otik id kopii ru
omon to orayn noeruwan si isas kandin id somaddan din iddos minuvu woy id ikohiyan din to yya id kopii ku en
a od kouliyan kad
dda ron en worad iddos etet din woy nouliyan don sikandin
o waa pa poiponawa ni isas iddos minuvu id loglohottan din sikandin kahi rin to o ru vo ponudtuu ini riyot ahad ondoy ko konna undiyon ka to tohodbuwis amoyd ontongngan din kos lawa ru
oy boggoy ka to buwis no id suhu ni oises amoyd posivonnaa riyot mgo minuvu no nouliyan kad
iru mid ipanow iddos minuvu woy id posaddoo rin iddos langun no pinuungan ni isas deen nokosoob iddos dinoggan
a pomon tadda dii ron od pokoundiyon si isas to dumon bonuwa su otid kokita sikandin to mgo minuvu od livuungan en sikandin
urisu diyon da sikandin id oubpa to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa piru id ponundiyon dad en to kandin iddos mgo minuvu no pomon diyot nokodossoosson lugaa
a to id lihad kos pilon allow id livod mandon si isas diyot bonuwa to apernaum woy nokosoob kos dinoggan no id uli ron sikandin diyot baoy
een mouraan minuvu no id lolivuung dutun woy pomon tadda worad lugaa nod kousokkan ahad pa riyot sobbangan
oy id ponudtuu ni isas kandan iddos kahit onama
a duwon oppat no minuvu nid inguma no id sayung to minuvu nid patoy kos lawa
iru pomon to mouraan minuvu riyot daom waa ran nokoporani ki isas
een id akas dan iddos atop no riyot pantok ni isas
opongnga idda id tuntun dan don iddos minuvu nid patoy kos lawa no id ilogga riyot ikam
o nokita ni isas no dakkoo kos kodsalig dan id ikohiyan din iddos minuvu to uwod id posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru
a duwon mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no id ounsad dutun
o norinog dan iddos id ikahi ni isas kohingginawa ran to e mambo moho tod ikahi ikon minuvu to iling duwon
d sumpalit din kos onama oyyos waa en minuvu nod pokoposinsya to saa ko konna idda ra en so onama
iru nosorollan ni isas kos diyot poomdom dan deen id ikohiyan din sikandan to ambot ungketen kos poomdom dow
ngkon man musing kos moomok nod osengon atag kaayt minuvu no id patoy kos lawa
dda vo so od ikahi no d posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru o iddos od ikahi no ohinat ka piyoddow kos ikam du woy ipanow ka
iru id pokita ku koniyu no siyak no nak to inuvu duwon kotungud kaay to ampowt ingod no od posinsya to mgo saa
a id isau si isas diyot mama no id patoy kos lawa woy mid ikahi sikandin to ohinat ka woy piyoddow kos ikam du woy uli kad bo
dda ron en id lohinat sikandin nid piyod to ikam din woy id baya riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu
a nosoobbuwan dan woy id doong dan kos onama kahi ran to omon poron ini ki peen nokokita to iling kaayn notomanan
opongnga idda mid livod mandon si isas diyot ibpit to anowt alilea woy id nonaw sikandin taddot mouraan minuvu nid lolivuung no id undiyot kandin
odtahad id ipanow ron mandon sikandin woy nokita rin si evi no anak ni lfeo no mid unsad diyot od boovoyaran to buhis
ahin isas kandin to uma ka koddi
een mid lohinat si evi woy id duma kandin
okkad no allow id kaan si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din diyot baoy ni evi
uwon mandad mouraan tohodsukut to buhis woy duma pon mosaasaa no id kaan duma ongki isas su mouraa kos id dumoruma kandin
a rutun duwon mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no sakup to mgo ariseo
o nokita ran no id kaan si isas duma to mgo mosaasaa woy taddot mgo tohodsukut to buhis id ikahi ran diyot mgo tinodduwan din to ambo moho tid lommung sikandin nid kaan duwot mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dumon mosaasaa
o norinog ni isas idda id tavak din sikandan ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos mgo minuvu no waa bohok konna od koilangan to doktor ko konna idda ra en so duwon bohok
a iling mandad tadda waa a mid undini amoyd nangkap to mgo motallong ko konna idda en so mgo mosaasaa
okkad no timpu id puasa iddos mgo tinodduwan ni uan no ohodboutismu woy dos mgo ariseo
a duwon mgo minuvu no id porani ki isas woy mid intud kahi ran to ddos mgo tinodduwan ni uan no ohodboutismu woy dos mgo ariseo duwon timpu nod puasa ran
iru mambot ikos mgo tinodduwan du dii man od puasa
id tavak si isas to tik duwon kosaa od puasa vo iddos korumannan taddot lammid osawa laggun to duma ran pa sikandin
ii en
a ungketen dad en mandad kos mgo tinodduwan ku konna pa sikandan od puasa laggun to duma a pa nikandan
iru od inguma en kos timpu nod puasa ran otid ongayon don pomon diyot kandan iddos id osawa
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas kahi rin to aa minuvu nod tapong to lammin ogget diyot tapoyn umpak
yya su otid pippiyan don idda od kipos dos ogget nid tapong woy od lowwag peen kos bendas
ling mandad tadda waa minuvu no od taaw to lammin binu nod bovuwak poron diyot tapoyn tootawwan no binovallan pomot kindaa to oyama su otid puungan din idda od kovendas iddon tawwan
a od korattan da en iddos od tootawwan woy od kouwakkan dos binu
urisu koilangan no iddos lammin binu diyon en mandad id taaw to lammin tootawwan
okkad no timpu to llowt odimolloy nokovaya si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din diyot kamot no duwon pinomuwon trigu
aggun tid ipanow ran id pomadti iddos mgo tinodduwan din to mgo trigu id kusukusu ran idda woy id sungit
o nokita idda to mgo ariseo id ikahi ran ki isas to ambot id puungan to mgo tinodduwan du iddos id diiyan diyon to llowt odimolloy
id tavak si isas to aa kow vo nokovasa taddot id puungan ni arin avid woy taddot mgo duma rin iddot timpu no id gutasan sikandan
d usok sikandin diyon to baoyt onama woy id kaan din iddos paan no id buwis diyot onama woy id boggayan din mandad iddos mgo duma rin
ddon paan id diiyan nod kannon to ahad ondoy su iyon da od pokokaan tadda iddos mgo tohodbuwis
otomanan idda timpu no si biator kos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
a kahin isas diyot mgo ariseo to d bovallan to onama kos llowt odimolloy atag to kopiyannan to mgo minuvu
aa rin bovalli kos mgo minuvu atag to llowt odimolloy
een siyak no nak to inuvu kos duwon kotungud ko ondan kos od puungan ahad diyon to llowt odimolloy
a mid livod mandon si isas diyot simbaan to mgo udio
iyot daom duwon sokkad no minuvu no id patoy kos divauyn bollad
oy duwon mandad mgo minuvu no od nangkap to pounayan amoyd kouug dan si isas no nokopuung to saa
een id ponulan dan sikandin kod bowiyan din iddos minuvu riyon to llowt odimolloy
a id osengan ni isas iddos minuvu no id patoy kos bollad kahi rin to ohinat ka rinit isowwan to langun
d inturan ni isas iddos mgo minuvu rutun kahi rin to ngkon musing kaay kos nokoikuu to mgo uhu ni oises diyon to llowt odimolloy
dda vo so kodpuung to moppiya o iddos kodpuung to morat
dda vo so kodtavang to minuvu o iddos kodimatoy
iru id poonongonong da en sikandan
olingasa si isas nid tongtong taddot mgo minuvu no nokolingkus kandin woy naanu sikandin pomon to motoggas kos pusung dan
a id osengan din iddos minuvu no id patoy kos bollad kahi rin to otongngow kos bollad du
a id kottong din idda woy idda ron en nouliyan sikandin
opongnga idda id leggua iddos mgo ariseo woy id polivuungoy ran duma to mgo sakup ni erodes amoyd nangkap to poukit to kodimatoy ki isas
a mid undiyon si isas to ibpit to anowt alilea duma iddos mgo tinodduwan din
d tinundug kandin iddos mouraan minuvu no id pomon diyot alilea woy duwon mandad duma no id pomon diyot udea
uwon mandad id pomon diyot erusalem diyot dumea diyot dipaa to weg to ordan woy id pomon diyot mgo lugaa no sumbaoy to bonuwa to iro woy idon
id undiyon dan to ki isas su nokorinog dan to langun no mokososoobbun pinuungan din
a pomon to mouraa kos minuvu id suhu ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din no od panoy to bollangay nod sokayan din amoy dii sikandin od kolipit to mgo minuvu
omon to mouraan novohokan kos nouliyan din deen od poohawoy iddos dumon od pongkovohokan amoyd porani ki isas su amoy od pokosomad dan kandin
a iddos id ponlosuran to busow otid pokokita sikandan ki isas od ponlaangkob dan diyot isowwan din woy od popeheson sikandan taddot mgo busow nod ungketen to ikkow en kos nak to onama
iru id loglohottan ni isas tid sugga iddos mgo busow no konna ran id ponudtuu to mgo minuvu ko ondoy sikandin
opongnga idda mid tikoddog si isas diyot buvungan woy id umow rin iddos id kopii rin nod dumannon deen id porani sikandan
a mid aam sikandin to sopuuoruwon tinodduwan no id ngoranan din no mgo apostoles
ahi rin kandan to d aam ku sikiyu nod dumoruma koddi woy id popiyod ku sikiyu amoyd ponudtuu to kahit onama
oy od boggayan ku sikiyu to kotungud to kodpoleggua to mgo busow
a ini en kos mgo ngaran to sopuuoruwa no id aam ni isas
i imon no id ngoranan din ki edro si antiago woy dos ari rin no si uan no id ngoranan sikandan ni isas to oanerges no iddos kohulugan baansi
ikandan mgo anak ni ebedeo
os duma si ndres si elipe si artolome si ateo si omas si antiago no anak ni lfeo si adeo si imon no mohingginawa to ingod din woy si udas scariote nod boligya ki isas
a to id uli ron si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din nolivuung mandon iddos mouraan minuvu riyot kandin
een waa ran nokosakat nid kaan
o norinog idda to mgo korumannan din id undiyonnan dan sikandin amoyd ongayon dan nanoy oyyos duwon id ikahi no od busawon don kun sikandin
a duwon mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no id pomon diyot erusalem no mid ikahi to i isas id losuran ni oivuyan no ponguu to mgo busow
een od pokopoleggua sikandin to mgo busow
o norinog idda ni isas id poporani rin iddos mgo minuvu woy id osengan din sikandan ukit to mgo ponunggelengan kahi rin to ambot od poowan ni oivuyan iddos kandin da en no mgo sakup
tik duwon mgo sakup to sokkad no kohoriyan nod pounayoy od povunuwoy konnod kouhoy od kohobba en iddon kohoriyan
ngketen dad en mandad kos od kotomanan taddot mgo sakup to sokkad no pomilya
tid pounayoy sikandan od poimotayoy od pokodsuwoysuwoy en sikandan
ngketen dad en mandad kos kohoriyan ni oivuyan
tid pounayoy od poimotayoy iddos kandin da en no sakup konnod kouhoy od kohobba en iddos kohoriyan din woyd kotaman
iru notalu kud si oivuyan oyya su id poleggua kud iddos mgo busow no mgo sakup din
aa minuvu nod pokousok diyot baoy to monokkaan minuvu amoyd ahaw to mgo korotuwan din otik konna pa unna od bokuwon iddos monokkaan minuvu idda pa od kaahaw rin idda
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad ondan no saa nod kopuungan to mgo minuvu od koposinsyan pa to onama ahad iddos kodsumpalit dan kandin
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod sumpalit to his no spiritu konna en od koposinsyan
yya su iddos saa rin konnad en od kaawa riyot kandin taman to waad tomanon
a id oseng ni isas ini su duwon id ikahi no iddos kotuusan din id pomon to busow nid lasud kandin
a mid inguma iddos inoy woy mgo suwod ni isas
d aangat sikandan diyot lama woy id poumow ran sikandin su duwon od osengon dan
iyot daom duwon mouraan minuvu nid ounsad no nokolingkus kandin
a duwon mid ikahi kandin to ir iddos inoy ru woy mgo suwod du id aangat diyot leggua su duwon kun od osengon dan kikow
id ikahi sikandin to yya piru id pokita ku koniyu ko ondoy kos inoy woy mgo suwod ku
a id tongtong sikandin diyot mgo minuvu no nokolingkus kandin woy kahi rin to ni en no mgo minuvu kos inoy ku woy mgo suwod ku
u iddos ahad ondoy nod tuman to id kopiit onama sikandan en kos inoy ku mgo tobboy woy mgo suwod ku
okkad no allow id nonaw mandon si isas to mgo minuvu riyot ibpit to anowt alilea
omon to orayn mouraan minuvu no id lolivuung diyot kandin mid unsad sikandin diyot bollangay amoyd nonaw
ddos mgo minuvu no riyot ibpit to lanow id pominog kandin
a mouraa kos id nonaw rin kandan ukit to ponunggelengan
ahi rin to oyyari row tod pominog ini
uwon sokkad no minuvu nid undiyon to kamot amoyd savud to bonni
a riyot kodsavud din duwon mgo bonni no nongouug diyot daan woy id ponuktuk idda to mgo manuk nod layanglayang
os duma nongouug diyot botuwon
omon to movavow ra man kos livuta goos da idda id tuvu
iru to mokountud don kos allow naanos idda woy pomon to waa goli nokodoralig nahangu ron
os duma nongouug diyot sopiniton
o id tuvu dos mgo sopinit nokubmutan don iddos lammid tuvu deen worad idda nokobovunga
iru iddos dumon bonni nongouug diyot moppiyon livuta
a moppiya kos tuvu tadda woy id bovunga
os duma ollogollog da kos bunga dos duma mandad dakkoo woy dos duma orayn dakkoo
a kahin isas to ikiyu su duwon man tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
o id awa ron iddos mgo minuvu id porani kandin iddos sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din woy dos dumon minuvu woy mid intud dan kandin mokaatag to mgo ponunggelengan
ahin isas to ikiyu id boggayan kowd to onama to koovottan taddot waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan mokaatag to kodhari rin
iru riyot dumon minuvu id nonaw ku kandan iddos langun no kovonnaan ukit to ponunggelengan su amoy ahad od totongtong dan dii ran od pokokita woy ahad od pominog dan dii ran od pokaabbot
u otid pokaabbot dan od sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran woy od posinsyan sikandan to onama
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to aa kow pobbos nokaabbot taddot ponunggelengan
tik dii kow od pokaabbot kaay momonnu kow vo od pokaabbot to duma pon ponunggelengan ku
ni kos kohulugan taddot ponunggelengan
os bonni no id savud idda en so kahit onama no id nonaw riyot mgo minuvu
a iddos daan no nouuhan to bonni idda en so mgo minuvu no nokorinog to kahit onama piru idda ron en id ahaw ni oivuyan iddos kahi no nokopomuwa riyot pusung dan
a iddos botuwon no nouuhan to bonni idda en so nokorinog to kahit onama woy idda ron en nahaa ran to kodtanggap tadda
iru waa goli idda nokodoralig diyot pusung dan woy sinsinahaw ra kos kopomakoy ran
yya su otid inguma kos kosupittan pomon to kodtanggap dan to kahit onama konnad sikandan od ponayun
os sopiniton no nouuhan to bonni idda en so nokorinog to kahit onama piru inaayun dan od popoomdom to mgo sowkuu to koubpa ran dos kodginawa to soopi woy od kolewang dan to mgo ingowollon to koubpa ran
een iling to id kubmutan iddos kahi no norinog dan woy waa nokovunga
a iddos moppiyon livuta no nouuhan to bonni idda en so mgo minuvu no nokorinog to kahit onama woy id tanggap dan idda woy moppiya kos bunga tadda riyot koubpa ran
os duma ollogollog da kos bunga to kopomakoy ran dos duma mandad dakkoo woy dos duma pa orayn dakkoo
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas
ahi rin to aa minuvu nod loottom to suu no od poongkobban to lobban o id taaw rin diyot silob to katri ko konna id taaw rin idda riyot od sopatan
ling mandad tadda iddos iddos ahad ondan no nokoollos woy diid koovottan koungkay od kosorollan woyd koovottan en diyot mori
een su duwon man mgo tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to aayyad kow pominog su otik ungketen oraroy kow od pokaabbot woy od duhangan peen to onama kos koovottan dow
u iddos minuvu no nokaabbot to norinog din od duhangan peen kos koovottan din
iru iddos waa id paayyad id pominog od ongayon peen ahad iddos disok no koovottan din
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to ddos kodharit onama iling kaay
uwon sokkad no minuvu no id savud to bonni riyot kamot din
aggun tid ponayun sikandin to ipat allow no pinuungan din woy riyot od tinuhon don sikandin to bulli id tuvu iddos bonni no waa rin nosorolli kos poukit to kodtuvu tadda
os livuta kos od potuvu woy od povunga to pinomuwa
iyot unna od tuvu iddos lawa soop tadda od movoddos woy kopongnga od bovunga ron
tid koutuwan don idda od gaavon don su tingkottu ron man
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to ndan man kos od koilingan to kodharit onama
ndan man kos od koponunggelengan kaay
okoiling idda to sokkad no bonni to mustasa no id pomuwa ron diyot kamot
rayn disok ini to langun no bonni kaay to ampowt ingod
iru otik id pomuwa ron ini woy od tuvu mowwet pa ini to dumon mgo pinomuwa
d lapung kos panga kaay woy riyot mallung od sosaag kos mgo manuk nod layanglayang
a iddos kodnonaw ni isas to kahit onama riyot mgo minuvu id poukit din to mgo ponunggelengan woy idda ra en so od koovottan dan kos id nonaw rin
aa sikandin id nonaw kandan no konna poukit to mgo ponunggelengan
iru ko idda ra en so mgo tinodduwan din kos duma rin id paabbotlabbot din kandan iddos langun no kohulugan tadda
a to od kosagkup don to idda ra en no allow mid ikahi si isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din to d undiyon ki to dipaat lanow
een id tanan onsi isas pomon diyot mouraan minuvu woy id sakoy iddos mgo tinodduwan din taddot bollangay no riyon en mid unsad si isas
d undiyon dan to dipaa duma iddos dumon id pomollangay
a tigkow mid doppot kos monokkaan kaamag woy nosuhat to doorakkoon mgo baud iddos bollangay
een od koponnu ron asow to oweg
iru si isas no riyon lomig to ubpu to bollangay nokotintinuhon diyot uunan
d sukaa ran sikandin kahi ran to ohodnonaw tovangi koy
d koonnod kid man moho ini
a id onnow si isas woy id sugga rin iddos kaamag woy id ikohiyan din iddos mgo baud to oro kad
ivonok kowd
dda ron en id soro iddos kaamag woy id tivonok kos langun
ahin isas kandan to ambot novaakkan kow
aa pobbos kodsalig dow koddi
a oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy id pointuroy ran to ndoy moho inin minuvu no ahad iddos kaamag woy mgo baud id dumoruma kandin
a id dunggu onsi isas diyot dipaa to anowt alilea riyot lugaa to mgo toho erasa
o id ponog si isas taddon bollangay duwon minuvu no id sinuggung kandin pomon diyot lovongngan
nin minuvu id losuran to mgo busow woy riyon sikandin id oubpa to mgo lovongngan
had pa od bokuwon sikandin to kodina konna en od kotoholan
a komouraa ron sikandin bokuwa to mgo kodina woy id pasung kos paa rin woy bollad din piru id ponbudtus din iddos mgo kodina woy id pondorattan din iddos pasung
aa en minuvu nod pokotohoo kandin su orayn monokkaa
llow bulli od livonglivong sikandin diyot lovongngan woy riyot buvunganon no laayun od pomehes woy id ponpoliyan din kos lawa rin to mgo batu
o nopantow rin si isas mid sinuggung sikandin nid lungkossu
oy riyot kodinguma rin id lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan ni isas
a id pehes sikandin no mid ungketen to isas nak to onama no ampas to angun ondak lavut du koddi
olimulimu pongulivot ka riyot ngaran to onama no konna a nikkow od silutan
d oseng din idda su id ikohiyan don man ni isas iddos busow to ikkow no busow leggua ka kaayn minuvu a id inturan sikandin ni isas kahi rin to ndoy kos ngaran du
id tavak iddos busow to aanmaan kos ngaran ku su mouraa koy
yas id poerueru ki isas iddos mgo busow no konna rin sikandan od poowan taddon ingod
a riyot londig no morani rutun duwon mouraan bavuy nid ponuwaa
d poerueru ki isas iddos mgo busow kahi ran to oolina koy nod lasud duwot mgo bavuy
een id aman si isas
a id ponleggua iddos mgo busow woy id losuran dan dos mgo bavuy no iddos kouralloy tadda mgo oruwon maan  
dda ron en id pouharus diyot daama iddos mgo bavuy woy nongouug diyot lanow woy nongoonnod
o nokita idda taddot mgo tohodtamong to mgo bavuy id lungkossu ran woy id ponudtuu ran iddos notomanan diyot langun no id ubpa riyot bonuwa woy riyot mgo lugaa no nokolingkus dutun
o norinog idda to mgo minuvu mid undiyon dan amoyd kokita ko ondan kos notomanan
a riyot kodinguma ran id porani sikandan ki isas woy nokita ran iddos minuvu no id losuran to maanmaan no mgo busow
d ounsad sikandin nokooumpak don woy motallong don kos poomdom din
een oraroy ran no novaakkan
os mgo minuvu no nokokita taddon notomanan id ponudtuu ran diyot langun iddos mokaatag taddon minuvu woy dos notomanan taddot mgo bavuy
o norinog idda to mgo minuvu id poerueru ran nod awa si isas diyot lugaa ran
a to id penek don sikandin diyot bollangay id poerueru kandin iddos minuvu no nouliyan don no od porumannon sikandin ni isas
iru id ikohiyan din iddos minuvu to yon moppiya uli kad diyot koniyu woy ponudtuu ru riyot korumannan du iddos id puungan tod ongaggon atag kikow woy dos eru rin kikow
een id uli ron iddos minuvu woy id ponudtuu rin diyot sopuun bonuwa no sakup to ecapolis iddos langun nid puungan ni isas atag kandin
a iddos langun no nokorinog kandin oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
a id sakoy mandon onsi isas diyot bollangay woy id livod sikandan diyot dipaa to lanow
o kodponog din id livuungan sikandin to mouraan minuvu
uwon mandad id inguma no sokkad no ponguu to simbaan to mgo udio no id ngoranan ki airo
o nokita rin si isas id porani sikandin woy mid lingkood diyot isowwan din
d poerueru sikandin no mid ikahi to ohodnonaw iddos baayn anak ku od oumasoy ron
olimulimu duma ka koddi woy somaddiyu sikandin amoy od kouliyan woyd kouyag
een id duma si isas kandin
a mid tinundug mandad iddos orayn mouraan minuvu no id pososokoy riyot kandin
utun duwon mandad sokkad no baay no novohokan su sopuuoruwa ron no lahun diid soro nod longossan
a noosayan oraroy sikandin taddot kodbawi to mouraan doktor
aamin din don kos langun no koruwonnan din amoy id bayad kandan piru waa sikandin nouliyan ko konna id ayas baling dos bohok din
o nokorinog sikandin mokaatag ki isas id lotlot sikandin diyot mouraan minuvu woy id porani riyot inoyyuhan ni isas amoyd somaddan din kos umpak ni isas
u kohingginawa rin no had od pokosomad a ra to umpak din od kouliyan ad en
o nokosomad don sikandin idda ron en id soro iddos bohok din nod longossan
a noheddam din no nouliyan don sikandin
dda ron en noheddam ni isas no duwon kotuusan no id leggua pomon kandin
a id loingoy sikandin woy mid intud diyot mgo minuvu kahi rin to ndoy kos id somad to umpak ku
id tavak dos mgo tinodduwan din to ntongngiyu man mouraa kos od sosok kikow
ambo man tod intud ka ko ondoy kos id somad kikow
iru id loloingoy peen sikandin amoyd kokita ko ondoy kos mid somad to umpak din
omon to nosorollan en taddot baay iddos notomanan din id kookoo sikandin to mattag allak woy id porani ki isas
id lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan din woy id ponudtuu rin kos langun
a kahin isas kandin to ri nouliyan kad pomon to kopomakoy ru
li kad bo duma to kosunayan su konnad od livod dos bohok du
aggun tid oseng din idda duwon mgo minuvu nid inguma pomon diyot baoy ni airo
ahi ran to oonna ruk ginawa ru worad iddos anak du
o rud lewanga kos ohodnonaw
iru id podtohon ni isas iddos osengan dan
ahi rin ki airo to o kod kaanu
alig ka ra
a waa rin porumanna iddos dumon minuvu si edro ra woy dos toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan kos id poruma rin
o id inguma ron sikandan diyot baoy ni airo nokita ni isas no od kohuyakot kos mgo minuvu woy norinog din iddos od pondaawit
a to nokousok don sikandin mid ikahi sikandin to ambot od kohuyakot woyd pondaawit kow
aa id patoy inis anak ko konna id tinuhon da
iru id kosuatan dan da en sikandin
d poleggua rin iddos mgo minuvu woy id poruma rin iddos amoy woy inoy tat anak woy dos otollu taddot mgo tinodduwan din
d usok dan diyot kwartu no id pooyyasan tat anak
a id somaddan ni isas iddos bollad taddot anak woy kahi rin to alita kumi no iddos kohulugan di onnow kad
dda ron en id onnow dos anak woy id oipanow
ddon anak sopuuoruwa ron kos idad din o nokita ran idda oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
a id loglohottan dan ni isas no konna ran id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy iddon notomanan woy id ikohiyan din sikandan no od pokannon dos anak
a mid tanan si isas taddon bonuwa duma taddot mgo tinodduwan din woy id undiyon sikandan to bonuwa to azaret no id dokollan din
o id inguma ron kos llowt odimolloy id undiyon si isas to simbaan to mgo udio woy mid nonaw
a rutun mouraan minuvu no id lolivuung
o norinog dan iddos nonaw ni isas oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
ahi ran to e ingkon ayu id pomon kos langun no sinorollan kaayn minuvu
ndoy ayu kos id boggoy kandin to moraom no koovottan
ambot od pokopuung sikandin to mokososoobbu
onna vo sikandin man iddos panday no anak ni aria woy suwod onni antiago ose udas woy imon
onna vo iddos mgo tobboy rin dini man id oubpa
a nomorat sikandan ki isas woy waa ran id pomakoy kandin
een mid ikahi si isas kandan to ddos propeta mowwet kos kodontong kandin to langun piru riyot kandin no ingod diyot mgo korumannan din woy riyot mgo sakup to pomilya rin od poddisokkan sikandin to kodontong
a pomon to dii sikandan od pomakoy waa sikandin id puung to mokososoobbu riyot ingod din idda ra en so pilopilon novohokan nid somaddan din kos nouliyan
rayn nosoobbuwan si isas taddot mgo minuvu pomon to waa ran id pomakoy kandin
a id undiyon si isas to langun no bariyu amoyd ponudtuu to kahit onama
a id umow ni isas iddos sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din woy id suhu rin sikandan no tinduwa
d boggayan din sikandan to kotungud to kodpoleggua to mgo busow
o waa pa sikandan id ipanow id pomonduwan din sikandan kahi rin to o kowd piyod to kokaan kavii woy soopi
yon dow ra piyodda iddos tukod dow
ukub kow to sandalyas piru yo kowd piyod to ilisan
had ingkon kow od undiyon woy otik duwon od inggat koniyu nod oubpa riyot baoy rin yo kowd alin diyot osson baoy taman tod awa kow taddon bonuwa
iru otid pokoinguma kow riyot lugaa no waad tanggap koniyu o konnod pominog to nonaw row na tonani row idda woy podpara row kos boubbuk to livuta riyot paa row to kodawa row patow no waa id pokosondit dan koniyu riyot timpu nod silutan sikandan to onama
een id ipanow ran woy id ponudtuu ran diyot mgo minuvu no koilangan od sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran
a id poleggua ran iddos mgo busow woy id doddasan dan to lana iddos od pongkovohokan woy nouliyan sikandan
a norinog ni arin erodes iddos mokaatag taddot pinuungan ni isas pomon to orayn novantug kos ngaran din
yyos duwon mgo minuvu nid ikahi to ni en si uan no ohodboutismu no novadnow pomon diyot kopotayan
ni en kos unayan nod pokopuung sikandin to mgo mokososoobbu
uwon duma nid ikahi to ikandin si lias
uwon mandad duma no mid ikahi to okkad sikandin taddot mgo propeta dangan
a to norinog ni erodes iddos mokaatag ki isas mid ikahi sikandin to ikandin en si uan no ohodboutismu no id potompoddan kud to liyog piru nouyag mandon
d ikahi ni erodes idda oyyos sikandin man kos id paammot id povaku woy id poprisu dangan ki uan
d puungan din idda pomon to kodsugga ni uan kandin su id ahaw rin si erodias no sawa taddot ari rin no si elipe
yya su inaayun od ikohiyan ni uan si erodes no upak diyot mgo uhu ni oises no od ahawon du kos sawa to suwod du
omon tadda nolingasa si erodias ki uan woyd poimotayan din nanoy sikandin piru waa rin nopuungi idda su konnod aman si erodes
u novaakkan si erodes ki uan oyyos nosorollan din no motallong sikandin no minuvu woy molinis kos pusung
een waa rin poimotayi si uan
d kopii rin nod pominog to nonaw ni uan ahad od pokovoggoy idda to taong diyot poomdom din
a riyot kodsampot ni erodes to allowt kodtobbow rin nokokita si erodias to poukit to kodimatoy ki uan
d poninggat ni erodes iddos langun no ponguu no noiraom kandin dos mgo kopitan to sundau woy dos od kilaannon no mgo minuvu riyot alilea amoy od sakup to pista to allowt kodtobbow rin
o nolivuung don sikandan iddos mongovay no anak ni erodias ki elipe mid usok woy id sayow
a orayn notoosan si erodes woy dos langun nid poninggat din
een id ikohiyan ni erodes iddos mongovay to uyu ka koddi to ahad ondan nid kopii ru su id boggoy ku en kikow
d pongulivot peen sikandin kahi rin to had ondan kos od buyuwon du id boggoy ku en kikow ahad pa inis kotongnga kaayt kohoriyan ku
a id leggua iddos mongovay su od undiyot inoy rin woy mid intud kandin kahi rin to ndan man kos od buyuwon ku
d tavak dos inoy to yon du buyuwa iddos uu ni uan no ohodboutismu
dda ron en id livod iddos mongovay riyot hari woy mid ikahi sikandin to d kopii ku nid boggoy ru koddi ini ron en iddos uu ni uan no ohodboutismu no nokotaaw riyot bondihadu
a to norinog idda to hari oray sikandin no naanu
iru pomon to id pongulivot don meen sikandin diyot isowwan taddot id poninggat din waa sikandin nokobolivad
urisu idda ron en id suhu rin iddos sokkad taddot mgo sundau rin no od tompoddan to liyog si uan
een id ipanow dos sundau poundiyot prisuwan woy id tampod din iddos liyog ni uan
a id piyod din iddos uu ni uan no nokotaaw riyot bondihadu woy id boggoy rin idda riyot mongovay
d boggoy mandad idda taddot mongovay riyon to inoy rin
o norinog taddot mgo tinodduwan ni uan iddon notomanan id undiyon dan to prisuwan woy id angoy ran iddos lawa ni uan amoy id lobbong
o id livod don diyot ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan no id suhu rin id ponudtuu ran kandin iddos langun no id puungan woy id nonaw ran
omon to orayn mouraan minuvu no od pokodsuvaasuvaa nod inguma konna ran od pokosakat ahad diyot kodkaan dan
een id osengan ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din kahi rin to d undiyon ki to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa amoyd pokoimolloy ki pa
urisu id sakoy ran to bollangay amoy od undiyon dan to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
iru to kodlogkiyat dan nokita sikandan to mouraan minuvu no nokokilaa kandan
d ponlungkossu ran no id pongulibpit diyot lanow pomon diyot nokodossoosson bonuwa woy nokounna ran peen id inguma riyot lugaa nod undiyonnan onni isas
o koddunggu onni isas woy to kodponog din to bollangay nokita rin iddos mouraan minuvu no nolivuung
oeruwan sikandin su nokoiling dan to mgo karnero no waa tohodtamong
a mouraa kos id nonaw rin kandan
o od komapun don id porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid ikahi to okaawoyawoy inin lugaa woy asow ron od saop kos allow
yon ayu moppiya no od poundiyonnon du to mgo bariyu inis mgo minuvu amoyd pokovolli ran to kokaan
iru kahin isas kandan to ikiyu kos od pokaan kandan
ahi ran to ikami vo kos od bolli to kokaan dan
oilangan ayu nod puung koy daom to waun buwan amoyd pokovolli koy to paan no id pokaan kandan
id intud si isas to ilon molison no paan kos id piyod dow
ntongngi row veen
o noontongngan dan don idda id ikahi ran to h toonaw ra man limmon molison no paan woy oruwon ngaap inis kaayt keta
a id suhu ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din no od livuungon kos langun no minuvu riyot mgo grupu woy od pounsaron sikandan diyot sobbotton
een id ponunsad iddos mgo minuvu to tinlimmompuu woy idda mandad so duma simbokkad no gatus
a id angoy ni isas iddos limmon molison no paan woy oruwon ngaap woy id langngag sikandin diyot datas to langit woy id posolamat diyot onama
opongnga id pontoppiktoppik din iddos mgo paan woy id boggoy riyot mgo tinodduwan din amoy id sondad diyot mgo minuvu
ngketen dad en mandad taddot mgo ngaap id pontoppiktoppik din idda woy id pomboggoy riyot langun no minuvu
a nokokaan dan langun woy nongovuung
opongnga id temmos taddot mgo tinodduwan din iddos nongosama no nokoponnu peen to sopuuoruwon bukag
a iddos kouralloy to mgo minuvu nid kaan mgo limmon maan   no mama
a idda ron en id posakoy ni isas dos mgo tinodduwan din diyot bollangay woy id pounna rin sikandan diyot etsaida no riyon to dipaa taddot lanow laggun tid popouli rin pa iddos mgo minuvu
o id ipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu mid tikoddog sikandin poundiyot buvungan amoyd dasaa
o od kosagkup don diyon poron si isas to buvungan no siksikandin da piru iddos mgo tinodduwan din id pomollangay riyot tongannan to dakkoon lanow
a nopantow ni isas no noosayan iddos mgo tinodduwan nod bovadsoy su nosinuggung dan kos kaamag
o od kaallowallow ron id undiyonnan dan ni isas no mid ipanow riyon to ampowt oweg no uvag kun tod lihad kandan
o nokita ran sikandin nid ipanow riyon to ampowt oweg id pomehes sikandan to mattag allak oyyos kunan dan ko busow sikandin
u iddos langun nokokita kandin woy noodoratan
iru idda ron en mid ikahi si isas to o kowd kovaakki
ahaa kow su siyak ini
o id sakoy si isas diyot bollangay idda ron en id soro dos kaamag
a oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
yyos ahad pa nokokita ran taddot mokososoobbun id puungan din taddot paan waa ran nokaabbot taddot kohulugan tadda su motoggas man kos uu ran
a to nokorunggu ran don diyot dipaa to lanow nokoinguma ran diyot lugaa to enesaret woy id ikot dan iddos bollangay ran
o kodponog dan to bollangay idda ron en nokilaa ron to mgo minuvu si isas
a id ponlungkossu ran diyot langun no lugaa no nokolingut woy id sayung dan diyot ki isas iddos od pongkovohokan amoyd povowiyan dan kandin ahad ingkon dan od korinog no riyon sikandin
had ingkon od undiyon si isas diyon to mgo bariyu diyot mgo bonuwa o riyot mgo lugaa no nokolingkus dutun od soyungon dan iddos od pongkovohokan diyot od kolivuungan to mgo minuvu
d poerueru ran ki isas no od posomaddon dan ahad ubpu robbo taddot umpak din
a iddos langun no nokosomad nouliyan en
okkad no timpu duwon mgo ariseo woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises nid pomon diyon to erusalem no id undiyot ki isas
okita ran no duwon mgo tinodduwan din no mid kaan no waa id ounab to bollad dan
os id puungan dan supak diyot botasanon no koilangan molinis dan diyot kodontong to onama
u iddos mgo udio labbi ron iddos mgo ariseo konna ran od kaan otik dii ran pa unna od ikulon dos botasanon to kovuyyahan dan mokaatag to kodounab to bollad
had od uli ran pomon diyot polingki konna ran od kaan otik dii ran od unnan tod ikuu iddos botasanon to kodounab to bollad su saddook nokosomad dan to molibmit diyot kodontong to onama
a duwon pa dumon botasanon nod ikulon dan iling to kodounab to mgo pokawan mgo kondiru woy brunsi no mgo kopitira
een mid intud iddos mgo ariseo woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
ahi ran to ambot id supak moho to mgo tinodduwan du iddos botasanon to kovuyyahan ta
yyos mid kaan sikandan no waa id ounab to bollad
id tavak si isas to onnaa en iddos id poposaddoo to onama ukit ki saias
yya su oraroy kow od pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to nin mgo minuvu taman da to dila kos kodposivantug dan koddi piru moriyu kos pusung dan koddi
aa koruanon to kodsimba ran koddi su iddos id nonaw ran id bobbovallan da to mgo minuvu
a bonnaa en no id puungan dow iddos id sulat ni saias oyyos id tonanan dow iddos suhu to onama woy iyon dow baling id ikuu iddos mgo botasanon nid bobbovallan da to mgo minuvu
id ikahi peen si isas to raroy kow od kotuigtuig nod inoyyug to suhu to onama amoyd koikuu row ra en iddos botasanon dow
yyos duwon id ikahi ni oises no mid ungketen to ispitu ka to amoy woy inoy ru woy ddos ahad ondoy nod oseng to morat diyot amoy o inoy rin koilangan en nod imotayan
iru sikiyu ossa moho kos nonaw row
u iddos minuvu no duwon nanoy id pokotavang diyot amoy woy inoy rin od bolivad baling sikandin nod ikahi to orban no iddos kohulugan id ossa kud ini atag to onama
a otid ikulon din iddos kodnonaw row konnad sikandin od pokotavang to amoy woy inoy rin
een id podwora row kos suhu to onama ukit to kodikuu row to botasanon no id pomon diyot kovuyyahan dow
oy duwon peen mouraan id puungan dow no iling kaay
a id poporani ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu woy id ikohiyan din to ominog kow woy ooyyari row ini tod labbotlabbot
onnod pokolibmit diyot kodontong to onama iddos ahad ondan no kokaan nod usok diyot bivig to minuvu
yon od pokolibmit idda en so morat no osengan nod leggua to bivig din
a sikiyu su duwon man tolinga row paayyad kow pominog
opongnga idda id tanan sikandin taddot mouraan minuvu woy mid usok diyot baoy
d intud ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din ko ondan kos kohulugan taddot ponunggelengan din
ahin isas to aa kow vos mandad nokaabbot
onna iddos ahad ondan no kokaan nod usok diyot bivig to minuvu kos od pokolibmit kandin diyot kodontong to onama
yyos dii man idda od pokousok diyot ginawa rin ko konna diyon da to gottok woy od legguakit kaayn osengan id paabbotlabbot ni isas no od pokokaan ki to ahad ondan no kokaan a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to yon od pokolibmit to minuvu riyot kodontong to onama idda en so nokotaaw riyot ginawa rin no od leggua riyot bivig din
yyos pomon diyot daom to minuvu nokotaaw riyot ginawa rin iddos morat no poomdom
oy pomon tadda od puung don sikandin to morat iling to kodlaayuk to konna rin sawa kodponakow kodimatoy kodloivug kodakonakon morat no ingowollon to lawa kodaakaa kodpuung to kororattan od kosina koddoddoraat to duma kodporatasdatas woy koongollan
a langun kaay id pomon diyot daom to ginawa to minuvu woy ini en kos od pokolibmit kandin diyot kodontong to onama
a id tanan si isas diyot alilea woy id undiyon sikandin to mgo lugaa no moranit bonuwa to iro
o kodinguma rin dutun id owwot sikandin diyot sokkad no baoy su id kopii rin nanoy no waa od pokosaddoo to kodinguma rin
iru ahad ungketen nosorollan en ko ingkon sikandin
utun duwon sokkad no inoy no iddos baayn anak din id losuran to busow
o norinog din nid inguma si isas idda ron en id undiyon sikandin woy mid lingkood nid ounduk diyot isowwan ni isas
d poerueru sikandin no od polegguangon ni isas iddos busow nid lasud diyot anak din
a iddon baay konna udio su nominuvu sikandin diyot prubinsya to enicia woy dos kinohiyan din riego
iru mid ooseng si isas kandin ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to oilangan no unna pa od kovuung kos mgo anak
u konna en ollog nod ongayon iddos kokaan to mgo anak woy id sunggud diyot mgo tuyyang
iru kahi taddot baay to yya ongaggon piru ahad pa iddos mgo tuyyang no riyot silob to lomisa od pokokaan man to mgo mumu nod pongouug to mgo anak
ahin isas to omon to iling duwon kos id oseng ru od pokouli kad su id leggua ron iddos busow nid lasud diyot anak du
a id uli ron dos baay woy nokita rin iddos anak din no id oilogga no nouliyan don
o id tanan si isas diyot bonuwa to iro id baya sikandin diyot bonuwa to idon woy riyot mgo lugaa no moranit bonuwa to ecapolis idda pa sikandin id livod diyon to anowt alilea
a rutun duwon mgo minuvu no id piyod diyot ki isas to sokkad no minuvu no diid pokorinog woy ommow
d poerueru ran kandin no od somaddan din iddon minuvu amoyd kouliyan
een id piyod ni isas iddos minuvu riyot moriyu boyow pomon diyot kourallan
a id tiyuk din to tintoddu rin woy id somaddan din iddos dila taddot minuvu
opongnga id ilobban din iddos tintoddu rin woy id somoddan din iddos dila taddot minuvu
a id langngag si isas diyot datas to langit woy id songnga sikandin to moraom pomon to eru rin woy kahi rin to fata no iddos kohulugan d kopokesan ka
dda ron en nokorinog don dos minuvu woy naawa iddos unayan no noommow sikandin woy motallong don kos kodooseng din
d ikohiyan ni isas dos mgo minuvu no konna ran id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy iddos nokita ran
iru ahad kopila rin sikandan id osengan id ayas dan da en baling id posoob tid ponudtuu iddos nokita ran
a langun taddot nokorinog orayn nosoobbuwan
ahi ran to oppiya kos langun nid puungan din oyya su ahad iddos diid pokorinog woy dos mgo ommow od pokoooseng don
okkad no timpu nolivuung mandon iddos mouraan minuvu
aamin don kos tasak dan deen id poporani ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din to oeruwan a kaayt mouraan minuvu oyyos notolluwan don nid duma ran koddi no worad tasak dan
a otid pouliyon ku sikandan no diid pokokaan od moomet dan to gutas diyot daan su duwon duma no moriyu pa kos od uliyan
ahi taddot mgo tinodduwan din to yya en piru ingkon ki man od pokoangoy to id pokaan ta kaayt mouraan minuvu su ini ki man to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
id intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ilon molison kos paan duwot koniyu
d tavak sikandan to ittu
a id pounsad ni isas iddos mouraan minuvu woy id angoy rin iddos pittun paan woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
opongnga id pontoppiktoppik din idda woy id boggoy riyot mgo tinodduwan din amoy id sondad diyot mgo minuvu
uwon mandad pilopilon ngaap
d posolamat mandon si isas tadda riyon to onama woy id posondad din mandad idda taddot mgo tinodduwan din diyot mgo minuvu
a nokokaan dan langun woy nongovuung
o nopongnga ran mid kaan nokolimud iddos mgo tinodduwan to nongosama no nokoponnu to pittun doorakkoon bukag
os kouralloy to minuvu nid kaan mgo oppat no maan  
opongnga idda id popouli ni isas iddos mgo minuvu
oy id sakoy sikandin to bollangay duma to mgo tinodduwan din poundiyot lugaa to almanuta
a to kodinguma ran diyot almanuta duwon mgo ariseo no id porani ki isas amoyd opilon sikandin diyot opulanan su id kopii ran nod posaharon sikandin
een id buyu ran kandin no od pokitannon sikandan to mokososoobbu nod posivonnaa no id popiyod en sikandin to onama
d songnga si isas to moraom su id mosakit kos ginawa rin woy mid ikahi sikandin to oy koniyu no mgo minuvu to inin timpu
ambot od buyu kow pa nod pokitannon to mokososoobbu
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no waa en mokososoobbu no id pokita ku koniyu
a id tanan onsi isas kandan woy mid sakoy mandon to bollangay woy id tollus dan diyot dipaa to lanow
a nolingow iddos mgo tinodduwan ni isas no id piyod to tasak dan no paan woy sokkad dobbon molison no paan kos diyot bollangay ran
d osengan sikandan ni isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to antoy kow taddot potuvu to paan to mgo ariseo woy ki arin erodes
o id oseng ni isas idda id poikohiyoy ran to addook id oseng din idda su wora ki man nokopiyod to paan
a nokosaddoo si isas taddot mgo osengan dan deen mid ikahi sikandin to ambot nosasow kow no waa kow nokopiyod to paan
aa kow pobbos nokaabbot
ambot motoggas kow nod pokaabbot
uwon mata row piru konna kow od pokokita woy duwon tolinga row piru konna kow od pokorinog
olingow kowd bo taddot id puungan ku
ddot id pontoppiktoppik ku iddos limmon molison no paan nid pokaan ku taddot limmon maan   no minuvu pilon bukag kos noponnu row tat nongosama
id tavak sikandan to opuuoruwa
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to ddot id pontoppiktoppik ku iddos pittun molison no paan nid pokaan ku taddot oppat no maan   no minuvu pilon doorakkoon bukag kos noponnu row tat nongosama
id tavak sikandan to ittu
ahi rin kandan to aa kow pobbos nokaabbot no inis id nonaw ku konna mokaatag to paan
o id inguma onsi isas diyot bonuwa to etsaida duwon mgo minuvu no id undiyot ki isas woy id piyod sikandan to butud no mama
d poerueru ran nod somaddan din iddos butud amoyd kouliyan
a id pikit ni isas iddos butud woy id leggua ran taddon bariyu
o nokoleggua ron sikandan id ilobban din iddos mata taddot butud id somaddan din sikandin woy id inturan kahi rin to ndan duwon don od kokita ru
a id langngag boyow iddos butud woy mid tavak to yya od pokokita a to mgo minuvu piru iling da to mgo kayu nod ipopanow
d somaddan mandon ni isas iddos mata taddot butud
a id totongtong iddos minuvu woy moppiya ron kos kodontong din
opongnga idda id pouli sikandin ni isas woy id ikohiyan din to o ka vo od baya riyot bonuwa nid pomonnan ta
a mid undiyon si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din to mgo bariyu no sakup to bonuwa to esarea ilipos woy laggun tid ipanow ran id intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ndoy a man diyot poomdom to mgo minuvu
id tavak sikandan to uwon id ikahi no sikkow kun si uan no ohodboutismu
os duma mid ikahi no sikkow si lias woy duwon duma nid ikahi no sokkad ka taddot mgo propeta dangan
ahin isas to iru atag koniyu ondoy a man
id tavak si edro to ikkow en kos esiyas
a id loglohottan din iddos mgo tinodduwan no dii ran id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy iddos mokaatag kandin
a mid tigkanoy ron si isas to kodpaabbotlabbot diyot mgo tinodduwan din mokaatag tod kotomanan din
ahi rin to iyak no nak to inuvu koilangan nod ukit to mouraan kodposuppit woy od elleyan a tod pombuyyahon to mgo udio taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d imotayan a piru riyot ikootollun allow od kovadnow a
ddos langun no id ponudtuu ni isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din mokaatag to kopotayan din moomok da nod koovottan
o norinog idda ni edro id piyod din si isas diyot ibpit woy id sugga rin kahi rin to o kod oseng to ungketen
iru mid isau si isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din woy id sugga rin si edro kahi rin to wa ka oivuyan
u iddos poomdom du konna pomon to onama ko konna pomon to minuvu
a id poporani ni isas iddos mgo minuvu woy dos mgo tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din to ddos ahad ondoy no od kopiyan nod kovovallan no tinodduwan ku koilangan nod inoyyuhan din kos kandin nid kopii woy od tiyangon din iddos kandin no krus amoyd dumoruma koddi
yya su iddos minuvu nod konuhunan to umuu rin od koworan da en baling tadda
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod patoy pomon to koddumoruma rin koddi woy pomon to kodponudtuu rin to oppiyon inoggan duwon umuun waad tomanon
u ahad od kokomunoy to minuvu kos langun no korotuwan kaay to ampowt ingod waa en koruanon otid koworan sikandin to umuun waad tomanon
yyos waa korotuwan no id pokovullas to minuvu amoyd kaawi rin iddos umuun waad tomanon
os mgo minuvu to inin timpu orayn mosaasaa su id inoyyuhan dan kos onama
a otik id koilow a nikandan woy dos mgo nonaw ku siyak no nak to inuvu id koilow ku mandad sikandan init kodlivod ku nod dumannan to seaa to kotuusan to moy ku woy taddot uhis no mgo ponolihan
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no duwon duma kaay no dii pa od patoy taman to dii ran pa od kokita iddos kotuusan to kodharit onama
o id lihad don kos annom no allow id poruma ni isas si edro si antiago woy si uan poundiyon to mowwet no buvungan no siksikandan da
aggun tid totongtong dan ki isas idda ron en nopalin kos boyo rin
ddos umpak din id sellasella pomot koputiyoy no waa en iling tadda kaay to ampowt ingod
a nokita ran si lias woy si oises no id tongko ki isas
ahin edro ki isas to ohodnonaw moppiya en no kaay ki
d sosabbung koy to otollu sokkad atag kikow sokkad atag ki oises woy sokkad atag ki lias
d oseng ni edro idda pomon to waa rin nonongnongngi ko ondan kod osengon din su oraroy sikandan no novaakkan
a duwon souhapun no id tambun kandan woy duwon bawos nid pomon diyot souhapun no mid ungketen to ni en kos nak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa
ominogga row sikandin
dda ron en id langulangu ran woy waa osson nokita ran si isas dobbo
a laggun tod potupang dan id loglohottan dan ni isas
ahi rin to o row en id ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy iddos nokita row taman to siyak no nak to inuvu od kovadnow ron
een id totaaw ran diyot poomdom dan iddos id ikahi ni isas woy waa ran en id ponudtuu iddos nokita ran
iru id pointuroy sikandan kahi ran to ndan ayu kos kohulugan taddot id oseng din nod kovadnow sikandin
a mid intud sikandan ki isas kahi ran to ambot od ikohiyon to mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no koilangan no unna od undini si lias idda pa iddos esiyas
id tavak si isas to onnaa en no unna pa od undini si lias amoyd panoy to langun
oikahi mandad diyot osulat no ahit onama no dakkoo kos koosayan ku no nak to inuvu woy od elleyan a nikandan pomon to lingasa ran koddi
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no id inguma ron si lias woy id puungan to mgo minuvu iddos langun no morat no id kopii ran nod puungan diyot kandin
oy ini en kos noikahi mokaatag kandin diyot osulat no ahit onama
a to id inguma onsi isas diyot dumon mgo tinodduwan din no id polintotuwos nokita ran no id lingut kandan iddos mouraan minuvu
oy duwon mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no mid apuu taddon mgo tinodduwan
o nokita si isas taddot mgo minuvu oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy id ponlungkossu ran amoy od tommu kandin woyd olitolit
id intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ndan kos opulanan dow
a duwon sokkad nid tavak kahi rin to ohodnonaw duwon anak ku no id piyod ku kaayt kikow su id losuran to busow unayan no konnad sikandin od pokoooseng
tid ingumannan sikandin od kopiloy nod pokovuntug diyot livuta od bovuwak kos bivig din od kihot kos ngipon woyd koggaa sikandin
d nganoy ad diyot mgo tinodduwan du nod polegguangon dan iddos busow piru waa ran man nokouli kandin
ahin isas to ikiyu no mgo minuvu no waa kopomakoy woy ebbaw
omonnu kouhayyoy kos kodumoruma ku koniyu
annu pa ayu od kotaman inis kodtiis ku koniyu
iyodda row kos anak kaayt koddi
a id piyod dan iddos anak diyot ki isas
o nokokita ki isas dos busow idda ron en id pokookoo to busow iddos anak
d gohulivid mandon iddos anak woy nopiloy no nokovuntug mandon diyot livuta woy id likidlikid sikandin nid bovuwak kos bivig
id intud si isas taddot amoy kahi rin to annu man sikandin noiling kaay
d tavak dos amoy to omon poron to koonakoy rin
opila ron nanoy sikandin od imotayan to busow nid lasud kandin woy od pokoumbag sikandin diyot apuy woy oweg
iru otid pokogaha ka koerui koy woy tovangi koy
ahin isas to ambot od ikahi ka no otid pokogaha a
yyos od kopuungan en kos langun otid pomakoy kos minuvu
a id nganoy kandin iddos amoy taddot anak kahi rin to uwon kopomakoy ku piru moomet en
ovangi a nod mosalig kos kopomakoy ku
o nokita ni isas no id lukutlukut id porani iddos mouraan minuvu id suhu rin iddos busow nid lasud diyot anak
ahi rin to ikkow no busow no id poommow woyd povongoo kaayt anak leggua ka woy yo kad od livod nod lasud kandin
a id pomehes dos busow woy ayas din peen id pokookoo iddos anak idda pa mid leggua sikandin
ddos anak imman tid patoy ron su worad man nokowaong
een mid ikahi iddos mgo minuvu to h id patoy ron bos moho ika
iru id somaddan ni isas iddos bollad taddot anak woy id poonnow rin woy id lohinat dos anak no nouliyan don
o id usok onsi isas diyot baoy nid oubpan dan id inturan sikandin to mgo tinodduwan din no siksikandan da kahi ran to ambot waa koy nokopoleggua taddot busow
id tavak si isas to aa ossa nod pokopoleggua to iling taddon busow idda ra en so koddasaa
a id tanan onsi isas taddon lugaa woy id baya sikandan diyot alilea
d kopii ni isas no konnod kosorollan to mgo minuvu ko ingkon sikandin
d puungan din idda su amoy waad pokolewang to kodnonaw rin to mgo tinodduwan din
a kahin isas kandan to iyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy a riyot bollad taddot od pongkuntra koddi
d poimotayan a nikandan piru od kovadnow a riyot ikootollun allow
aa ran nokaabbot to kohulugan taddot id ikahi ni isas kandan piru od kovaakkan dan nod intud kandin
a id inguma ron onsi isas diyot bonuwa to apernaum
o riyon don sikandan to daom to baoy id inturan ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din kahi rin to ndan kos opulanan dow riyot daan
iru id poonongonong da en sikandan su id poopuloy ran man ko ondoy kandan kos mowwet to langun
a id ounsad si isas woy id poporani rin iddos sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din
ahi rin kandan to ddos ahad ondoy nod kopiyan nod kovovallan no mowwet to langun koilangan no od poobbava sikandin woyd pouripon to langun
d angoy ni isas iddos disok no anak woy id poohinat din diyot tongannan dan
d sopipi rin iddon anak woy mid kahi sikandin to ddos ahad ondoy nod tanggap to mopoobbavon minuvu iling kaayt anak pomon to kopomakoy rin koddi siyak kos id tanggap din
oy konna ra siyak kos id tanggap din ko konna idda mandad so onamon moy ku no id popiyod koddi
a mid ikahi si uan ki isas to ohodnonaw nokokita koy to sokkad no minuvu no nokopoleggua to mgo busow ukit to ngaran du
d sugga roy sikandin oyyos konna ta man duma
iru kahin isas to o row sikandin suggaa oyyos waa minuvu no kopongnga od puung to mokososoobbu ukit to ngaran ku od ooseng don to morat mokaatag koddi
u iddos minuvu no konnod supak keta od poomig keta
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy nod poinom koniyu to sokkad no pokawan no oweg pomon to mgo tinodduwan kow to esiyas od pokotanggap sikandin to ganti
a iddos ahad ondoy nod pokookoy nod puung to saa kos mopoobbavon minuvu iling kaayt disok no anak no od pomakoy koddi moppiya pa nod ikottan kos liyog din to orayn dakkoon gilingan no batu woy id lumbag sikandin diyot dahat
een otik ikos bollad du kos unayan nod pokosaa ka tompoddowd baling ika
u moppiya pa nod pokotanggap ka to umuun waad tomanon no sokkad da kos bollad kuntra to duwon oruwon bollad du no id lumbag ka riyon to linowt apuy
yyos dutun duwon mgo tagkoy no diid patoy nod kaan taddot mgo lawa ran woy dos apuy no konnod koovukkan a otik ikos paa ru kos unayan nod pokosaa ka tompoddowd baling ika
u moppiya pa nod pokotanggap ka to umuun waad tomanon no sokkad da kos paa kuntra to duwon oruwon paa ru no id lumbag ka riyon to linowt apuy
yyos dutun duwon mgo tagkoy no diid patoy nod kaan taddot mgo lawa ran woy dos apuy no konnod koovukkan tik ikos mata ru kos unayan nod pokosaa ka kootowd baling ika
u moppiya pa nod lonug ka riyon to kodharit onama no sokkad da kos mata kuntra to duwon oruwon mata ru no id lumbag ka riyon to linowt apuy
yyos dutun duwon mgo tagkoy no diid patoy nod kaan taddot mgo lawa ran woy dos apuy no konnod koovukkan
onnaa en no duwon mgo kosupittan nod koukitan to langun nod pompomakoy amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy ran
u iddos mgo kosupittan nokoiling taddot assin woy apuy nod pokaawa to ahad ondan no konna moppiya
oppiya kos assin su od pokovoggoyt nanam to kokaan ta piru kod motabbang don ini dii ron en id pokopolivod kos nanam
urisu sikiyu nod pomakoy koddi koilangan nod pokoiling kow to assin ukit to kodpotovangoy no od moppiya kos koroniyan dow
a id tanan onsi isas diyot prubinsya to alilea woy id undiyon sikandan to udea woy riyot dipaa to weg to ordan
utun id livuungan mandon sikandin to mouraan minuvu woy mid nonaw sikandin su idda en kos nooyami rin nod puungan
uwon mgo ariseo no id porani ki isas amoyd posahad kandin ukit to kodintud
ahi ran to ndan nokoikuu vo riyot mgo uhu ni oises iddos kodsuwoy to mama taddot sawa rin
iru mid tavak si isas kandan ukit to intud kahi rin to ndan man kos id suhu ni oises koniyu mokaatag kaay
d tavak sikandan to d aman si oises no od bovaa kos mama to kosulatan to kodposuwayoy idda pa od suwayan din kos sawa rin
ahin isas to d aman si oises no od suwayan dow kos sawa row su motoggas man kos uu row
iru riyot tigkonayan to kodbovaa to ingod id bovallan to onama kos mama woy baay
ni en kos unayan no od tanan kos mama to amoy woy inoy rin amoyd pokodsokkad don sikandan to sawa rin woy dos oruwa od kosokkad don
a konnad sikandan oruwa ko konna sokkad don
een iddos id podsokkad don to onama konnod podsuwayon to minuvu
o id inguma onsi isas diyot baoy id intud don mandon kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din mokaatag to kodposuwayoy
id ikahi si isas to ddos ahad ondoy no mama nod suwoy to sawa rin woy od osawa to duma nokoloivug sikandin taddot unnon sawa rin
oy ungketen dad en mandad diyot baay
tid suwoy sikandin to sawa rin woyd osawa to duma nokoloivug sikandin taddot unnon sawa rin
okkad no allow duwon mgo minuvu no id piyod to mgo anak dan diyot ki isas amoy ukit to kodtoddung din to bollad din taddot uu ran diyon to koddasaa id pokita to onama iddos kopiyannoy rin diyot mgo anak
iru id sugga to mgo tinodduwan din iddos mgo minuvu
o nokita idda ni isas nolingasa sikandin woy mid ikahi to odtohona row ron kos mgo anak nod porani koddi woy yo row sikandan suggaa
u iddos mgo minuvu no od salig to onama iling to kodsalig to mgo anak sikandan en kos od kolonug to kodharit onama
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy no diid salig to onama iling to kodsalig to anak dii en od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama
a id ponsopipi rin iddos mgo anak woy ukit to kodtoddung din to bollad din taddot uu ran diyon to koddasaa id buyu rin no iddos onama od pokita to kopiyannoy rin diyot kandan
o kodlogkiyat onni isas to iponawon dan duwon sokkad no minuvu no id lungkossu poundiyot kandin
d lingkood sikandin diyot isowwan din woy mid intud kahi rin to oppiyon ohodnonaw ondan kos od puungan ku amoyd pokotanggap a to umuun waad tomanon
id tavak si isas to ambot od ngoranan a nikkow no moppiya
yyos sokkad da kos moppiya idda ra en so onama
okosaddoo kad taddot mgo suhu to onama no mid ungketen to o kod imatoy yo kod loivug yo kod ponakow yo kod posivonnaa to uhus yo kod loimbung woy rispitu ka to amoy woy inoy ru
ahi taddot minuvu to ohodnonaw langun duwon no suhu id puungan kud pomon poron to koonakoy ku
a id tongtongngan ni isas iddos minuvu duma to kodginawa woy id ikohiyan din to uwon pa sokkad no kulang diyot kikow
li ka woy boligya ru kos korotuwan du woy pomboggoy ru kos bayad diyot worowora
tid puungan du ini duwon en korotuwan du riyot datas to langit
opongnga livod ka woy duma ka koddi
o norinog idda taddot minuvu od kokita riyot bonnong din no naanu sikandin woy id ipanow no noponnut lanu oyyos dakkoo man kos korotuwan din
a id tongtong si isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin kandan to osuppit en taddot minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan nod kolonug diyon to kodharit onama
osoobbuwan iddos mgo tinodduwan din taddot id oseng din
iru id ikahi mandon si isas to go anak mosuppit en oraroy iddos kodlonug diyon to kodharit onama
oomok pa iddos kodusok to kamelyo riyon to bobbot simat kuntra to minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan nod lonug diyon to kodharit onama
a orayn nosoobbuwan iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id pointuroy ran to o ungketen ondoy pobbo kos od kotobbus
d tongtong si isas kandan woy mid ikahi to onna ini od kopuungan to minuvu piru iddos onama od kopuungan din en kos langun
ahin edro to a sikami id tonanan doyd kos langun pomon to koddumoruma kikow
ahin isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy nod tanan to ubpan din mgo suwod o tobboy rin amoy o inoy rin mgo anak din woy mgo kamot din pomon to koddumoruma rin koddi woy pomon to kodponudtuu rin to oppiyon inoggan duwon ganti no id boggoy to onama kandin to inin timpu
yyos od pokotanggap sikandin to lampas pa taddot id tonanan din no mgo ubpan mgo suwod mgo tobboy mgo inoy mgo anak woy mgo kamot
d ukit mandad sikandin to kodposuppit pomon to kopomakoy rin piru riyot mori od pokotanggap sikandin to umuun waad tomanon
iru mouraan mowwet koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu no od poobbovan woy mouraa mandad no moobbava koungkay riyot kodontong to minuvu no od porotason
aggun to riyon pa onsi isas to daan poundiyot erusalem id unna sikandin
osoobbuwan iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy dos mgo minuvu nid tinundug kandan novaakkan
een id livuung ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy id ponudtuu rin mandon kandan iddos mokaatag tod kotomanan din
ahi rin to ominog kow od undiyon kid to erusalem
a rutun siyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy riyot bollad to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy riyot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d silutan a nikandan to kopotayan woy kopongnga id boggoy a riyot bollad to konna mgo udio
d sumpoliton a nikandan od ilobban woyd pomodasan
opongnga od imotayan a piru riyot ikootollun allow od kovadnow a
a mid porani ki isas si antiago woy si uan no mgo anak ni ebedeo woy kahi ran to ohodnonaw duwon od buyuwon doy kikow
id intud si isas kandan kahi rin to ndan man kos od buyuwon dow koddi
d tavak sikandan to tid inguma ron iddos timpu to kodhari ru nod dumannan to seaa to kotuusan du muopa nod pounsaron koy nikkow riyot duug du sokkad diyot kowanan du woy sokkad diyot ivang
ahin isas to aa row nosorolli ko ondan kos od buyuwon dow
d pokogaha kow vo nod ukit to koosayan iling tod koukitan ku
oy od pokogaha kow vo nod tiis to kopotayan iling to kopotayan ku
id tavak sikandan to yya od pokogaha koy
ahin isas to onnaa rad en no iddos kosupittan nod koukitan ku od koukitan dow mandad
oy dos kopotayan nod koukitan ku od koukitan dow en mandad
iru mokaatag to kodpounsad diyot kowanan woy ivang ku konna siyak kos od aam tadda
yya su id panoy ron tapoy to onama ko ondoy kos od pounsaron din tadda
o norinog idda taddot sopuun tinodduwan no duma ran nolingasa ran ki antiago woy ki uan
a id poporani ran langun ni isas woy id ikohiyan din sikandan to osorollan dow no iddos od ponguu to konna mgo udio id pomohos dan iddos kopii ran woy dos mgo minuvu no mowwet kos kotundanan id pokita ran en kos kandan no kotungud
iru sikiyu konna kow iling kandan su iddos ahad ondoy koniyu no od kopiyan nod kovovallan no mowwet koilangan nod pouripon sikandin
oy dos ahad ondoy nod kopiyan no mowwet to langun koniyu koilangan nod pouripon sikandin to duma
u ahad siyak no nak to inuvu waa a mid undini to ingod amoyd uripon to mgo minuvu ko konna amoy od pouripon a woyd boggoy to umuu ku atag to kodtobbus to mouraan minuvu
a id inguma si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din diyot bonuwa to erico
o id tanan don sikandan dutun orayn mouraa kos minuvu nid duma kandan
uwon sokkad no butud no mid ounsad diyot ibpit to daan amoyd pokilimus
ikandin si artimeo no anak ni imeo
o norinog din nod lihad si isas no toho azaret id pehes sikandin no mid ungketen to isas lubbad ni avid koeruwan ka koddi
d sugga sikandin taddot mouraan minuvu no od poonongonong da piru ayas da en baling sikandin id pehes nid ungketen to ubbad ni avid koeruwan ka koddi
een id soro si isas woy mid ikahi to oundiniya row sikandin
a id umow ran iddos butud woy kahi ran to ahaa ka woy lohinat ka su id umow ka nikandin
dda ron en id lusut din kos mowwet no umpak din woy id lohinat sikandin nid ipanow poundiyot ki isas
a id inturan sikandin ni isas kahi rin to ndan man kos id kopii ru nod puungan ku kikow
id tavak iddos butud to ohodnonaw id kopii ku nod pokokita
ahin isas to a uli kad bo
ouliyan ka pomon to kopomakoy ru
dda ron en nokokita ron iddos butud woy id duma sikandin ki isas
a to morani ron onsi isas diyot erusalem od kopantow ran don iddos bariyu to etpahe woy etania no riyot banod to uvungan to mgo libo
d pounna ni isas dutun iddos oruwa taddot mgo tinodduwan din
ahi rin kandan to ndiyon kow to bariyu no riyot kounnan woy to kodinguma row rutun idda ron en od kokita row kos natit asnu no waa pa nosokayi no id ikot
kasa row vo idda woy tuyuka row rinit koddi
tik duwon od intud koniyu no ambot od okasan dow kos natit asnu tovaka row sikandin to d koilonganon ini tod ongaggon woy goos din da ini id pouli
a id ipanow sikandan woy to kodinguma ran nokita ran iddos natit asnu nid ikot diyot sobbangan to ubpan no riyot ibpit to daan woy id akas dan idda
uwon mgo minuvu rutun no mid ikahi kandan to ambot od okasan dow kos natit asnu
d tavak sikandan iling taddot id pomandu ni isas kandan deen id aman iddos mgo minuvu
a id tuyuk dan iddos natit asnu poundiyon to ki isas
d ompasan dan idda to mgo umpak dan woy id sakoy ron si isas
ouraa kos minuvu rutun no id ampas to mgo umpak dan diyot od ukitan ni isas to kodposivantug kandin
dda mandad so duma id tampod to mgo panga to kayu no dorounon woy id ampas dan idda riyot daan
a iddos mgo minuvu no riyot kounnan woy dos id tinundug ki isas id pehes dan no mid ungketen to d doongon kos onama
d posivontuhan ta kos id popiyod to onama nod ongaggon
d pokita to onama iddos kopiyannoy rin taddot od ingumon hari nod suvaa to kovuyyahan doy no si avid
d doongon kos onama riyot datas to langit
o kodinguma ni isas diyot erusalem mid undiyon sikandin to lama to templo woy id tongtongngan din iddos langun dutun
opongnga id undiyon sikandin to etania duma taddot sopuuoruwon tinodduwan din oyyos od kosagkup don
oop no allow id tanan sikandan diyot etania amoyd livod diyot erusalem
o riyon pa sikandan to daan id gutasan si isas
a nopantow rin iddos kayu nod ngoranan to igera no maapung kos doun
o kodporani rin taddot kayu amoyd ontongngan din ko duwon bunga paanan da en mgo doun kos nokita rin oyyos konna pa timpu nod bovunga iddon kayu
een kahi rin diyot kayu to omon koungkay konna kad od bovunga
a norinog idda taddot mgo tinodduwan din
o kodinguma onni isas diyot erusalem mid undiyon sikandin to templo woy id paawa rin iddos od pombovoligya riyot lama woy dos od pombovolli rutun
d ponlingkuwab din iddos mgo lomisa taddot mgo tohodbullas to soopi woy id pompiloy rin iddos mgo unsaran taddot od pombovoligya to mgo soopati
aa rin poukita iddos mgo minuvu nod piyod to ahad ondan no od baya riyot lama to templo
a id nonaw sikandin diyot mgo minuvu
ahi rin to oikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos aoyt onama od ngoranan no baoy atag to koddasaa to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
iru sikiyu id bovallan dow moho ini nod oubpan to mgo tokawon
o norinog taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises iddos id puungan ni isas id nangkap dan to poukit to kodimatoy kandin
yyos novaakkan dan kandin su iddos mouraan minuvu orayn notoosan woy nosoobbuwan taddot nonaw rin
o id saop don kos allow id tanan onsi isas diyot erusalem
o nosollom don to id livod sikandan diyot erusalem noliharan dan iddos kayu no igera woy nokita ran no nahangu ron idda pomon to ubbus taman to dalig
a nosompottan ni edro iddos id oseng ni isas diyot kayu no igera woy mid ikahi sikandin to ohodnonaw ontongngiyu
kos kayu nid osengan du govoni no konnad od bovunga nahangu ron
ahin isas kandan to omakoy kow to onama
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no iddos ahad ondoy nod pomakoy to onama woy waa kodduworuwa od kogaha rin tod ikahi kos buvungan to oonnat ka woyd pokoantug diyot dahat na od puungan en idda to onama
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no ahad ondan kos od buyuwon dow riyon to onama pomokaya row no notanggap dowd idda woy od kotanggap dow en idda
a otid dasaa kow woy duwon poron id totaaw row no morat no ginawa riyot duma posinsyai row sikandin amoyd posinsyan kow mandad to moy row riyot datas to langit
u otik dii row od posinsyan iddos duma dii kow mandad od posinsyan to moy row riyot datas to langit a id inguma mandon onsi isas diyot erusalem
aggun tid ipanow sikandin diyot lama to templo id porani kandin iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
id intud sikandan ki isas kahi ran to ndak kotungud du kaayt langun nid puungan du
oy ondoy kos id boggoy kikow kaayn kotungud
ahin isas kandan to o dii ku pa od tovakon kos intud dow duwon intud ku koniyu
ovaka row ini woy id ponudtuu ku koniyu ko ondoy kos id boggoy koddi to kotungud to kodpuung kaay
ddos kotungud ni uan to kodboutismu id pomon bo riyot onama o riyot minuvu
a id posisipoy ran kod monnuwon dan idda tod tavak
ahi ran to tid ikahi ki no ddos onama kos id boggoy kandin to kotungud na od ikahi sikandin to ambot waa kow id pomakoy ki uan
iru otid ikahi ki no inuvu kos id boggoy kandin to kotungud na od kolingasa kos mgo minuvu keta
d kovaakkan dan to mgo minuvu su nosorollan to langun no propeta en si uan een id tavak dan si isas to aa koy nokosaddoo ko ingkon idda id pomon
a kahin isas kandan to o ungketen dii ku mandad sikiyu od ponudtulan ko ingkon id pomon kos kotungud ku to kodpuung kaay
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to uwon sokkad no minuvu no id pomuwa to ubas diyot kamot din
d kuralan din idda woy mid bovaa sikandin to toviran to ubas woy id poohinat sikandin to motikang no sabbung no od ubpan tod tamong tadda
opongnga id popursintuwan din iddos kamot woy mid undiyon sikandin to osson ingod
o timpu ron to kodpomupu to ubas id suhu rin kos sudsuhuwon din diyot id pomursintu amoyd angoy to kandin no taad
iru to kodinguma taddot sudsuhuwon din id ammot dan sikandin id pomodasan woy id pouli no waa nopiyod
omon tadda id suhu mandon taddot komunoy iddos ossa pa no sudsuhuwon
o id inguma sikandin dutun id pomipitan dan kos uu rin woy ayas dan id poilawan
a id suhu mandon taddot komunoy iddos sokkad pa no sudsuhuwon piru id imotayan dan sikandin
oy duwon pa mouraa nid suhu rin piru iddos duma id pomodasan dan woy dos duma id ponimotayan dan
yon dobbo nosama nod kosuhu rin iddos soosokkad no anak din no id dokollan din to ginawa
urisu idda en kos id suhu rin su kohingginawa rin no d rispituwon dan en inis anak ku
iru to nokoinguma ron iddos anak din id poikohiyoy iddos id pomursintu to ka ron kos anak to komunoy
uo kid od imotayan ta sikandin amoy siketa ron kos od pokokomunoy kaayt ubasan
een id goyod dan sikandin id imotayan woy id lumbag dan iddos lawa rin diyot leggua to ubasan
a kahin isas to ndan ayu kos od puungan taddot komunoy to ubasan
d undiyonnan din iddos id pomursintu woyd imotayan woy od popursintuwan din to ossa iddos ubasan
aa kow vo nokovasa taddot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ddos batu no id oovoddan to mgo tohodbovaoy su kunan dan ko waa koruanon idda vos en kos batu no mosalig no pounsaran
os od ongaggon kos id puung tadda woy motoos idda nod tongtongngan
o norinog idda taddot mgo ponguu to udio noovottan dan no sikandan kos id suhat din
een od omotton dan nanoy sikandin piru novaakkan dan taddot mouraan minuvu nid pominog kandin
urisu mid awa iddos mgo ponguu woy id ipanow
a to id awa ron iddos mgo ponguu to udio duwon mandad duma pon mgo ariseo woy mgo minuvu ni erodes no id suhu ran nod intud ki isas amoy od posaharon dan sikandin ukit to osengan din
o kodinguma ran mid ikahi sikandan to ohodnonaw nokosaddoo koy no bonnaa en kos nonaw ru
osorollan doy no iddos ahad ondoy nod isowwon du id podiling du kos kodnonaw kandan oyyos waa od podmusingon du woy iyon du id nonaw iddos kovonnaan mokaatag to id kopiit onama
een duwon intud doy kikow
iyot mgo uhu ni oises ollog bo iddos kodbayad to buhis diyot hari to oma o dii
iru nosorollan ni isas iddos kodpouvaguvag dan
een kahi rin to ambo man tod geddaman a nikiyu
okitanna a to soopi to oma
een id toyawwan dan si isas to soopi
a mid ikahi sikandin to ndoy man bonnong woy ngaran kos od kokita kaay
id tavak sikandan to ddos hari to oma
ahin isas to o ungketen boggoy row riyot hari to oma iddos kandin woy boggoy row riyot onama iddos kandin
a nosoobbuwan dan oraroy taddot tavak ni isas
a duwon mgo aduseo no id porani ki isas
nin mgo minuvu konnod pomakoy nod bodnawon to onama iddos id poomatoy ron
ahi ran to ohodnonaw nosulat diyot mgo uhu ni oises no otik duwon mama nod patoy no waa anak dan taddot sawa rin koilangan no od pomoowwon idda to suwod din amoyd pokoanak dan atag taddot id patoy
