onunggeleng duwon pittun toosuwod no mama
ddos kinokokayan id osawa piru id patoy no waa anak
a id pomau taddot ari iddon baay
d patoy mandad sikandin no waa anak
ngketen dad en mandad kos notomanan taddot ikootollun suwod din
angun taddot pittun toosuwod nokoosawa taddot baay piru waa ran man nokoanak
iyot mori id patoy mandad iddos baay
a init allow to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron ondoy musing kandan kos tullid no sawa taddot baay
u iddos langun tat pittun toosuwod nokoosawa man kandin
id tavak si isas to oyup kow oyyos waa kow nokaabbot taddot osulat no ahit onama woy taddot kotuusan to onama
u otid bodnawon don iddos id poomatoy ron konnad en sikandan od poosoway oyyos od pokoiling don sikandan to mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit no konnod poosoway
a mokaatag to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron waa kow vo nokovasa taddot id sulat ni oises mokaatag taddot id oseng to onama kandin diyot mid loglog no sopinit
ahi rin to iyak kos onama ni braham ni saac woy ni acob
a ungketen kos noikahi ahad nouhoy ron id poomatoy onsi braham
os kohulugan tadda no od kovadnow en iddos poomatoy ron oyya su iddos onama konna sikandin onama taddot id poomatoy ron ko konna onama taddot nongouyag
een soyup kow
a duwon tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises no id pominog taddot id ikahi ni isas diyot mgo aduseo
osorollan din no ollog en iddos mgo tavak ni isas taddot mgo aduseo
a id porani sikandin woy mid intud kahi rin to ndan man kos suhu no lampas to langun kos koruanon
id tavak si isas to ni en kos suhu no lampas to langun kos koruanon
ikiyu no koubbaran ni srael pominogga row ini
okkad da kos ongaggon ta no idda en so onama
inowanniyu kos onama nod ongaggon du riyot tivuk no pusung du diyot tivuk no umuu ru diyot tivuk no poomdom du woy riyot tivuk no konokkaan du
a ini en kos ikooruwon suhu no lampas to langun kos koruanon
inowanniyu kos duma iling to kodginawa ru to kougolingun du
orad en osson suhu no lampas pa kaayt oruwa
ddos tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises mid ikahi to ohodnonaw ollog kos tavak du oyyos sokkad da kos onama woy worad en ossa
oy bonnaa en iddos id oseng du no od ginowannan ta kos onama riyot tivuk no pusung ta diyot tivuk no poomdom woy riyot tivuk no konokkaan ta
onnaa en mandad nod ginowannan ta iddos duma iling to kodginawa ta to keton kougolingun
akkoo kos koruanon taddot id loow no oyama no id buwis diyot onama piru lampas pa no dakkoo kos koruanon otid tumanon ta inis oruwon suhu
o norinog ni isas no ollog iddos tavak din mid ikahi sikandin to sow kad od kolonug to kodharit onama
opongnga idda worad od pokoaku nod intud ki isas
aggun tid nonaw si isas to mgo minuvu riyot templo mid intud sikandin kahi rin to ambo man tid ikahi iddos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no lubbad ni avid iddos esiyas
yya su iddot noiroomman si avid to his no spiritu id oseng sikandin to id ikahi iddos onama riyon tod ongaggon ku no nsad ka lomig to kowanan ku taman tod kotalu kud iddos od pongkuntra kikow
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to i avid en kos id oseng no iddos esiyas ongaggon din
o ungketen iddos esiyas konna ra lubbad ni avid ko konna ongaggon din mandad
a notoosan nid pominog iddos mouraan minuvu taddot nonaw ni isas
a ponayun mid nonaw si isas kahi rin to antoy kow taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no od kotoosan nod oumpak to mowwet woyd pokitakita to mgo minuvu
d kopii ran nod kumustan woyd rispituwon diyot od kolivuungan to mgo minuvu
tik diyon sikandan to simbaan to mgo udio o riyot pista id kopii ran nod unsad diyot mgo unsaran no id panoy atag taddot od rispituwon no mgo minuvu
d okalan dan iddos mgo baayn bau amoy od kaahaw ran iddos koruwonnan dan
oy amoy od kotombunan iddos morat no pinuungan dan od poowetton dan kos dosalon dan no uvag kun no moppiya sikandan no mgo minuvu
urisu lampas en no mokaaratarat iddos silut to onama kandan
a id ounsad si isas diyot isowwan to tootawwan to soopi riyot templo woy id tongtongngan din iddos mouraan minuvu no id taaw to soopi rutun
oy mouraa kos od koruwonnan nid taaw to dakkoon soopi
uwon mandad sokkad no worowora no baayn bau nid inguma woy id taaw sikandin to oruwon pisus
a id poporani ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no dakkoo pa kos id boggoy kaayt worowora no bau kuntra taddot langun no nokovoggoy
u iddos id boggoy to dakkoon soopi sama robbo idda taddot langun no koruwonnan dan
iru inin bau ahad worowora sikandin id boggoy rin iddos sapuu uvag no soopi rin
a to id leggua si isas diyot templo sokkad taddot mgo tinodduwan din mid ikahi to ohodnonaw ontongngiyu man kos motoos no templo no id bovallan pomot doorakkoon batu
ahin isas to yya motoos en woy dakkoo piru od inguma kos timpu no wora ahad sokkad duwot mgo batu no id podluntudluntud nod kosama oyyos od gobban en
o riyon don sikandan to uvungan to mgo libo id unsad si isas nid isau riyot templo
a mid intud kandin onsi edro si antiago si uan woy si ndres no siksikandan da
ahi ran to onudtuli koy kannu man od kotuman inis id oseng du woy ondan kos kilaannan no asow ron od kotuman inis langun
id tavak si isas to antoy kow no konna kow od kookalan
u mouraa kos od loppow no od pouvaguvag nod piyod to koddin ngaran nod ikahi no iyak en kos esiyas woy mouraa kos od kookalan dan
tid pokorinog kow no duwon gira kaayt morani woy riyot moriyu yo kowd kovaakki
yyos koilangan en nod kotuman ini langun piru konna pa ini kos kotompusan to ingod
u iddos sokkad no ingod od pokidgira to osson ingod woy dos sokkad no kohoriyan od pokidgira to osson kohoriyan
uwon mandad mgo linug diyot nokodossoosson lugaa woy duwon dakkoon gutas
a ini langun tigkonayan da to kosupittan iling taddot mosakit nod geddamon to baay nod sokalan
iru sikiyu bantoy kow su id boggoy kow riyot bollad to mgo tohodhukum woy od ponlompossan kow nikandan diyot mgo simbaan to udio
d piyoddon kow nikandan diyot isowwan to mgo gubernador woy mgo hari pomon to kopomakoy row koddi
a idda ron en kos timpu no od pokoposivonnaa kow kandan mokaatag koddi
yyos to dii pa od inguma iddos kotompusan to ingod koilangan no unna pa id ponudtuu kos oppiyon inoggan diyot langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
tid piyoddon kow nikandan diyot tohodhukum yo kowd kaanu ko ondak od osengon dow
ddon timpu iddos onama kos od boggoy koniyu to kotuihan su iddos osengan dow konna pomon koniyu ko konna pomon to his no spiritu
a iddon timpu duwon mgo toosuwod nod unoy od boggoy to suwod dan diyot bollad to dumon minuvu amoyd poimotayan
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo amoy id boggoy ran kos mgo anak dan amoyd poimotayan
dda mandad so mgo anak od atu to amoy woy inoy ran woyd poimotayan dan
a id kolingasai kow to langun no minuvu pomon to kopomakoy row koddi
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod tiis to kosupittan taman to kotompusan od kotobbus en
a ponayun mid ikahi si isas to d inguma kos timpu no od kokita row riyot lugaa no konna en ollog nod tawwan iddos od piyod to kororattan amoyd supak to onama
tag taddot od basa kaay koilangan nod loblovotton dow ini
tid inguma ron inin kotomanan iddos id ponoubpa riyot udea koilangan nod paahuy riyot buvunganon
ddos minuvu no riyot atop to baoy rin koilangan no konnad sikandin od usok diyot baoy amoyd ponemmos pa
dda mandad so minuvu riyot kamot din koilangan no dii ron od uli amoyd angoy to umpak din
oy iddon timpu mokoerueru iddos mgo movoddos woy dos duwon anak nod susu poron
a dasaa kow riyon to onama no iddos kodpaahuy row konnod pokosasang to timmohonnow
u iddos kosupittoy to iddon timpu lampas pa taddot kosupittoy pomon poron to tigkonayan to kodbovaa to ingod taman koungkay
oy worad en od inguma pa no kosupittoy no iling tadda
iru ko waa poobbavaa to onama iddon timpu waa en ahad sokkad no minuvu nod kouyag
iru atag da en taddot id ponaam din id poobbovan din iddon timpu
a otik duwon mgo minuvu nod ikahi koniyu to ntongngi row ini ron kos esiyas o dda ron sikandin yo kowd pomakoy kandan
yyos od loppow en iddos od ikahi no sikandan kun kos esiyas woy dos duma od ikahi no sikandan kun kos mgo propeta
d puung dan to mokososoobbu amoyd aakaa nanoy taddot mgo minuvu nid aam to onama
omotawi row
u id ponudtuu kud tapoy ini koniyu to dii pa od inguma iddon kotomanan
a kopongnga iddos timpu to kosupittan od mosukirom kos allow woy konnad od seaa kos buwan
d pongkouug kos mgo bituon woyod pongoantog iddos duma pa no riyot datas to langit
a od kokita to langun iddos lampas no seaa to kotuusan ku no nak to inuvu riyot kodinguma ku nod dumannan to souhapun
oy id popiyod ku iddos mgo ponolihan ku amoy od limud taddot mgo minuvu nid aam ku pomon diyot ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod
a mid ikahi si isas to oomdomma row iddos kayu no igera amoyd pokopohinonaw kow
tid kokita row nod sosuving don idda od kosorollan dow no asow ron kos tintollak
ling mandad tadda otid kokita rowd inin mgo kotomanan od kosorollan dow no asow ron kos kodlivod ku
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no od kotuman en inis langun to dii pa od poomatoy kos mgo minuvu no nouyag to inin timpu
d kowora kos langit woy livuta piru inis mgo kahi ku dii en od kowora
iru mokaatag taddot timpu to kodlivod ku waa ahad sokkad no minuvu no nokosaddoo ahad iddos mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit ahad siyak no nak to onama ko konna idda ra en so onamon moy
een bantoy kow woy panoypanoy kow oyyos waa row nosorolli ko kannu ini od kotuman
yya su iddos kodlivod ku nokoiling to sokkad no minuvu nid ipanow riyot moriyun ingod no waa rin id ponudtuu ko kannu sikandin od livod
d sanna rin diyot mgo sudsuhuwon din iddos langun no riyot baoy rin woy dos ipat sokkad kandan duwon od puungan
d suhu rin mandad iddos tohodtamong to sobbangan amoy inaayun od panoypanoy to kodlivod din
een panoypanoy kow oyyos waa row nosorolli iddos kodlivod ku iling taddot kodlivod to komunoy to baoy
aa row nosorolli ko riyot timpu vo nod saop kos allow riyot tongngovulli vo to dii pobbo od kaallow o riyot timpu vo nod kosollom don
u otik tigkow a od inguma saddook od ingumannan ku sikiyu no nokotinuhon
nis id ikahi ku koniyu od ikohiyon ku mandad diyon to langun
anoypanoy kow
a oruwa robbon allow idda pa od inguma iddos pista to odlihad to onolihan woy dos pista to aan no aa otuvu
os mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises id nangkap dan to poukit to kodammot ki isas no waa od pokosaddoo woy od poimotayan dan sikandin
ahi ran to onna ta id posasang to pista kos kodammot kandin su saddook od koukag kos mgo minuvu
a to riyon don onsi isas to etania mid undiyon sikandan to baoy ni imon no duwon bohok no etet no nouliyan don
o mid kaan sikandan duwon sokkad no baay nid inguma no id piyod to orayn mahaa no pomammut
ddon pomammut lumbus no nardo no nokotaaw riyot tootawwan no binovallan pomot batu nod ngoranan to alabastro
d toppu rin iddos liyog taddot tootawwan woy id daddas din iddos pomammut diyot uu ni isas
iru duwon mgo minuvu rutun no nolingasa woy id poikohiyoy ran to uu
ambo moho tid uuwakkan din ikon pomammut
u otik id boligya pa nanoy ikon pomammut maanmaan kos kontidad duwon woy dos bayad id boggoy riyot mgo worowora
yas dan id sawoy iddos baay
iru kahin isas kandan to odtohona row ron sikandin
ambot od sowayon dow sikandin
u moppiya man iddos id puungan din koddi
u iddos mgo worowora inaayun dow od koruma woy ahad ondan no timpu od kotovangan dow sikandan
iru siyak konna a nikiyu inaayun od koruma
nis baay id puungan din ko ondan kos od kogaha rin su inis koddaddas din to pomammut kaayt lawa ku id panoy rin atag to kodlobbong koddi
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod id ponudtuu iddos oppiyon inoggan id ponudtuu en mandad inis id puungan din koddi amoyd kosompottan sikandin
a si udas scariote no sokkad taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles mid undiyon to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis amoy od pomuhawang to kodboligya ki isas diyot kandan
o norinog dan iddon puhawang oraroy ran no nahaa woy id totandu ran nod boggoyt soopi ki udas
een id nangkap sikandin to ollog no timpu to kodboligya ki isas
a riyot unnon allow to pista to aan no aa otuvu id buwis to mgo udio iddos natit karnero atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
d porani ki isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy mid intud kahi ran to ongaggon ingkon koy od panoy to keton lavung atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
a id suhu rin iddos oruwa taddot mgo tinodduwan din woy id ikohiyan din to ndiyon kow to bonuwa to erusalem woy rutun duwon sokkad no mama nod kosinuggung dow no id tiyang to gunsu no duwon oweg
undug kow vo kandin diyot baoy nod undiyonnan din
tid inguma kow rutun osengi row iddos komunoy taddot baoy no id intud iddos ohodnonaw ko ingkon lomig kos kwartu no od kannan din to kodlavung atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan duma to mgo tinodduwan din
a id pokita rin koniyu iddos mowwag no kwartu riyot ikooruwon ondana no nopanoy ron tapoy iddos langun nod koilonganon ta
onaya row rutun iddos lavung ta
a id ipanow iddos oruwon tinodduwan din poundiyot erusalem woy nokita ran iddos langun nid ikahi ni isas kandan woy id panoy ran iddos lavung atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
o od kosagkup don id inguma si isas diyot baoy duma taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles
aggun tid kaan dan mid ikahi si isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no sokkad koniyu nod tuhon koddi od boligya koddi
a oraroy ran no naanu woy ipat sokkad kandan mid intud kandin kahi ran to iyak bo kos od tommanon du
id tavak si isas to ddos sokkad koniyu nid aggom to paan kaayt yohung duma koddi sikandin en kos od boligya koddi
yyos siyak no nak to inuvu od patoy en iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
iru mokaaratarat en kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod boligya koddi
oppiya pa nanoy ko waa sikandin nominuvu
aggun tid kaan sikandan mid angoy si isas to paan woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
opongnga id toppiktoppik din idda woy id toyyow riyot mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin to wata row ini woy kanna row
ni en kos lawa ku no id buwis atag koniyu
a mid angoy sikandin to kupa woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
opongnga id toyyow rin idda riyot kandan woy langun dan id inom tadda
ahin isas kandan to ni en kos longossa ku no id posivonnaa to kodpotonduwoy to onama
d tihis kos longossa ku atag to mouraan minuvu
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no dii ad od uman nod inom to ammis to ubas taman tod inguma ron iddos timpu no od inom a to lammin ammis duma koniyu init timpu nod hari ron kos onama
a id kanta ran atag to koddoong to onama woy nopongnga id undiyon dan to uvungan to mgo libo
a to riyon don sikandan to daan mid ikahi si isas to angun dow od paahuy woyd tanan koddi oyya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no d imotayan ku iddos tohodtamong to karnero woy od pokodsuwoysuwoy kos mgo karnero
iru riyot timpu nod kovadnow ad od unna a koniyu riyon to alilea
a kahin edro ki isas to had od tanan dan langun kikow konna a en od tanan kikow
ahin isas to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku kikow edro no to dii pa od ukkaa kos manuk to kooruwa to ini en no bulli kootollu rud tod elle no waa ka id kilaa koddi
iru ayas peen id totandu si edro kahi rin to had od patoy a duma kikow konna ku en id elle no waa ku sikkow nokilaa
a iling dad en mandad tadda kos id ikahi taddot langun no duma rin no tinodduwan
o mid inguma si isas woy dos mgo tinodduwan din diyot lugaa nod ngoranan to etsemane id ikohiyan din sikandan to nsad kow pa kaay laggun tod dasaa a
a id poruma rin onsi edro si antiago woy si uan
d geddam din kos lampas no lanu woy orayn movoggat kos ginawa rin
ahi rin to ampas kos lanu ku no imman tod patoy ad
olintotuwos kow pa kaay woy yo kowd tinuhon
a id poriyu boyow sikandin diyot kounnan woy rutun id laangkob sikandin diyot livuta woy id dasaa no otid kopakoy konna rin od koukitan iddos koosayan nod inguma kandin
ahi rin to moy ku od kopuungan du kos langun
o ad poukita tod ingumon koosayan
iru konna inis id kopii ku kos od kotuman ko konna idda rad en so kikown id kopii
o id livod sikandin diyot otollun tinodduwan din nokita rin sikandan no nokotinuhon
ahi rin ki edro to imon nokotinuhon ka vos
onna ka vo od pokogaha no diid tinuhon ahad sokkad da no uras
o kowd tinuhon ko konna dasaa kow amoy dii kowd kopiyod diyot kodpuung to saa
os ginawa row od kopiyan nanoy nod puung to motallong piru iddos lawa row moomet
a id poriyu mandon boyow si isas kandan woy mid dasaa sikandin iling taddot unnon dosalon din
opongnga id livod mandon sikandin diyot mgo tinodduwan din woy nokita rin sikandan no nokotinuhon su oraroy ron no movoggat kos mata ran
aa ran nosorolli ko ondan kos id tavak dan kandin
o id livod mandon si isas diyot kandan to ikootollun timpu mid ikahi sikandin to ambot id tinuhon kow poron woyd oimolloy
llog don
d inguma ron kos timpu no siyak no nak to inuvu id boggoy riyot bollad to mgo mosaasaa
nnow kowd su ini ron kos minuvu nod boligya koddi
uo kid oyyos od tommu kid kandin
aggun tod ooseng pa si isas idda ron en id inguma ron si udas no sokkad taddot mgo tinodduwan din
d duma kandin iddos mouraan minuvu no posidpiyod to mgo polihuma woy mgo badas
yon id suhu kandan iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio
apoy id posaddoo ni udas kandan iddos kilaannan
ahi rin to ddos minuvu nod pongumustan ku ukit to kodarok sikandin en iddos od nongkapon dow
a omotta row sikandin woy piyodda row
oooyyari row sikandin tod tamong
een to kodinguma ni udas idda ron en id porani sikandin ki isas woy mid ikahi to ohodnonaw
oy id pongumusta sikandin ki isas ukit to kodarok
a id ammot dan si isas woy id ponoggasan dan tid somad
iru duwon sokkad no minuvu riyot morani no mid tadnus to polihuma rin woy id tibbas din iddos uripon taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis deen noutas kos divauyn tolinga rin
a mid ikahi si isas diyot mgo minuvu to riminal a vo su goli kow od piyod to mgo polihuma woy mgo badas to kodammot koddi
llowallow a man duma koniyu nid nonaw riyot templo piru waa a man nikiyu omotta
iru od kotomanan ini langun amoy od kotuman iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
o id oseng ni isas idda mid tanan kandin iddos langun no tinodduwan din woy id paahuy
a duwon sokkad no konakan no id kokoumbung to monipis no ogget
d tundug sikandin ki isas
o od omotton dan mandad nanoy sikandin iyon dan nosomaddan iddos ogget din woy nokopaahuy sikandin no nousutan don
a id piyod dan si isas diyot baoy to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy rutun id lolivuung iddos langun no ponguu to tohodbuwis dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
i edro id tintinundug no moriyu boyow taman to nokoinguma sikandin diyot lama to baoy taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
d ounsad sikandin diyot morani to apuy duma to mgo tohodtamong to baoy woy id oinarang sikandin
a iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos langun no sakup to hukumanan to mgo udio id nangkap sikandan to unayan ahad konna bonnaa amoy od uuhon dan to saa si isas woyd poimotayan
iru waa nokita ran no id uug dan kandin
ouraa kos id posivonnaa to uhus amoyd uuhon dan to saa si isas piru waa nokodiling iddos kodponudtuu ran
a duwon mgo minuvu no id lohinat amoyd posivonnaa to uhus mokaatag kandin
ahi ran to orinog doy nid oseng si isas no od gobban din inis templo no binovallan to minuvu woy daom to otollun allow od poohinaton din mandon iddos osson baoy no konna binovallan to minuvu
iru ahad iling tadda kos id oseng dan waa rad en nokodiling iddos kodponudtuu ran
a id lohinat iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis diyot isowwan to langun woy id inturan din si isas kahi rin to aa vo id pokotavak du taddot id oseng dan mokaatag kikow
iru id poonongonong da en si isas
a id intud mandon iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis kahi rin to ikkow veen kos esiyas dos nak to od posivontuhon no onama
id tavak si isas to iyak en idda
d kokita row no siyak no nak to inuvu od unsad lomig to kowanan to onamon otuus woy od kokita row mandad iddos kodlivod ku pomon diyot datas to langit no od dumannan to souhapun
a id bendas taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis iddos umpak din pomon to lingasa rin woy mid ikahi sikandin to onnad koilangan nod angoy ki pa to duma nod posivonnaa taddot saa rin
ikiyu ron en kos nokorinog taddot kodsosumpalit din
ndak od kooseng dow kaay
a langun dan id ikahi no ollog en sikandin nod silutan to kopotayan
a duwon id ponilob ki isas woy id tombunan dan kos mata rin woy id ponsuntuk dan sikandin
ahi ran to tukow veen ko ondoy kos mid suntuk kikow
dda mandad so mgo tohodtamong to baoy id pontabpi ran sikandin
aggun to riyon si edro to lama duwon sokkad no baay nid lihad kandin
ddon baay sokkad taddot sudsuhuwon to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
o nokita rin si edro no id oinarang id porani sikandin nid totongtong ki edro woy kahi rin to ikkow mandad sokkad ka en no duma ni isas no toho azaret
iru mid elle si edro kahi rin to aa a nokosaddoo woy waa a moho nokaabbot duwot id oseng du
a id leggua sikandin diyot sobbangan to lama woy idda ron en duwon manuk nid ukkaa
okita mandon si edro taddot baay woy id osengan din iddos mgo minuvu no id loohinat dutun kahi rin to kon minuvu sokkad en sikandin taddot mgo duma ni isas
iru mid elle rad mandon si edro
odtahad id oseng mandad ki edro iddos id ponloohinat dutun kahi ran to okkad ka en no duma ni isas su toho alilea ka man mandad
iru id pongulivot si edro nid ungketen to had od patoy a pa koungkay ko id ouhus a su nosorollan to onama no waa ku en moho nokilaa ikos minuvu nod tommanon dow
dda ron en id ukkaa iddos manuk to kooruwon timpu
a nosompottan ni edro iddos id ikahi ni isas kandin no o dii pa od ukkaa kos manuk to kooruwon timpu to ini en no bulli kootollu rud tod elle no waa ka id kilaa koddi
a id sinoggow si edro woy mopet oraroy kos sinoggawon din
o od kaallow ron id pomuhawang iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos langun no tohodhukum ko ondan kos od puungan dan ki isas
a id baku ran kos bollad din woy id piyod dan sikandin diyot ki ilato no gubernador to oma
d inturan ni ilato si isas kahi rin to ikkow vo kos hari to mgo udio
id tavak si isas to ooseng dud en
a iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis mouraa kos saa no id uug dan ki isas
een id intud mandon si ilato kahi rin to orinog du iddos mouraan saa no id uug dan kikow
ndan waa vo id pokotavak du
iru waa en id tavak si isas deen orayn nosoobbuwan si ilato
a ipat pista to odlihad to onolihan nooyami ron ni ilato no od poleggua to sokkad no pinirisu nod buyuwon to mgo udio
ddon timpu duwon mgo minuvu no noprisu pomon to kodsupak dan to guberno
okkad kandan id ngoranan ki arabas no nokoimatoy to minuvu riyot nosamuk don
o id undiyot ki ilato iddos mouraan minuvu id buyu ran nod polegguangon din iddos sokkad no pinirisu su idda meen kos od puungan din ipat lahun
a mid intud si ilato kandan kahi rin to d kopiyan kow vo nod polegguangon ku inis ari to mgo udio
d oseng ni ilato idda su nosorollan din no iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis kosina kos unayan no id boggoy ran si isas diyot bollad din
iru id sutsutan taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis iddos mgo minuvu no iyon dan od buyuwon nod polegguangon si arabas konna si isas
d intud mandon si ilato kahi rin to ndak id kopii row nod puungan ku kaayt minuvu no id ngoranan dow no ari to mgo udio
a id pehes dan no mid ungketen to d pakpak sikandin diyon to krus
ahin ilato kandan to ambo
ndan man kos saa no nopuungan din
iru ayas peen id pehes iddos mgo minuvu nid ungketen to d pakpak sikandin diyon to krus
een id poleggua ni ilato si arabas su id kopii rin nod kahaa kos mgo minuvu woy id polompossan din si isas
opongnga id boggoy rin sikandin diyot bollad to mgo sundau amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
a id piyod to mgo sundau si isas diyot lama to baoyt gubernador woy id livuung dan iddos langun no duma ran no mgo sundau
d umpakan dan si isas tod momoollutun umpak iling to umpak to hari
d podlambed dan iddos duhiyon no baahon woy id bovallan dan idda no kuruna no id takos diyot uu ni isas
a id pouvaguvag dan nod posivantug kandin woy kahi ran to uopa nod mowwet kos umuu ru sikkow no hari to mgo udio
a id pomipitan dan kos uu rin to bookayu woy id ponilobban dan sikandin woy id ponlingkood dan diyot isowwan din no uvag kun tod simba ran kandin
opongnga ran sikandin tid sumpalit id lusut dan iddos od momoollutun umpak woy id posukub dan mandon iddos kandin no umpak
opongnga id piyod dan sikandin diyot leggua amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
aggun to riyon sikandan to daan nokosuggung dan to sokkad no minuvu no toho irene no id pomon diyot bariyu
d pohos dan sikandin nod tiyang taddot krus ni isas
os ngaran din si imon no amoy onni lejandro woy ufo
d piyod dan si isas diyot lugaa nod ngoranan to olgota no iddos kohulugan lugaa to ongovongo
d boggayan dan si isas to binu no id sombutan to bawi nod ngoranan no mira piru waa sikandin id inom tadda
a id pakpak dan sikandin diyon to krus
d bunutbunut dan atag taddot ogget ni isas ko ondan kos od kokomunoy to ipat sokkad kandan
go alas nuwebe to sollom kos uras to kodpakpak dan ki isas diyon to krus
a riyot korotula nokosulat iddos saa no id uug dan kandin no mid ungketen to ni en si isas no ari to mgo udio
a duwon oruwon kriminal no id pakpak dan mandad diyon to krus no riyot tapad ibpit ni isas
ddos sokkad diyon lomig to kowanan din woy dos sokkad diyon lomig to ivang
kit kaay notuman iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to iyot kodontong to mgo minuvu id poiling sikandin to sokkad no kriminal a iddos mgo minuvu nid lihad dutun id ponlingilingi ran woy id sumpalit dan sikandin
ahi ran to omman du od gobban du iddos templo woyd poohinaton du mandon daom da to otollun allow
tik mooggot en iddos id oseng du tovangiyu kos kougolingun du woy ponog ka ruwot krus
ngketen dad en mandad kos id puungan taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d sumpalit dan sikandin kahi ran to e id tovangan din kos duma piru dii man sikandin od pokotavang to kougolingun din
tik bonnaa en no sikandin kos esiyas no ari to srael od pokoponog nanoy sikandin duwot krus amoy od kokita ta woyd pomakoy ki kandin
a ahad iddos oruwon minuvu no id pakpak diyon to krus no riyot tapid ibpit din id sumpalit mandad kandin
a to mokountud don kos allow tigkow id mosukirom kos intirut ingod daom to otollun uras
o alas tres don to mapun id pehes si isas to monokkaa no mid ungketen to loi loi lema sabactani no iddos kohulugan onama ku onama ku mambot id tonanan a nikkow
o norinog idda taddot dumon minuvu no id loohinat dutun mid ikahi sikandan to d umow rin si lias
a duwon sokkad no minuvu nid lungkossu woy id angoy sikandin to immat bukoo nid aggom diyot suka woy id takos din idda riyot ubpu to panga to kayu
opongnga id bullow rin idda amoy id poinom kandin
id ikahi iddos minuvu riyot mgo duma rin to d ongatan ta kod loppow vo si lias amoy od angoy kandin duwot krus
a id pehes si isas to monokkaa woy novudtus don kos songnga rin
ddos orayn mokoppaan kurtina riyon to templo novendas pomon diyot datas poundiyot dosiyung
o norinog taddot kopitan to mgo sundau no id lohinat diyot isowwan to krus iddos kodpehes ni isas woy to nokita rin iddos notomanan mid ikahi sikandin to ooggot bos en no nak sikandin to onama
a duwon mandad mgo baay nid pomantow
ikandan onsi aria no toho agdala si alome woy si aria no inoy ni ose woy dos ari rin no si antiago
ikandan iddos mgo baay no id dumoruma ki isas woy id tavang kandin to riyon pa sikandin to alilea
uwon mandad mouraa pon mgo baay no id duma kandin to kodundiyon din to erusalem
a iddot kodpatoy ni isas nokosasang idda to allow to kodpanoy atag to llowt odimolloy
een to id saop don kos allow duwon minuvu nid inguma no id ngoranan ki ose no toho rimatea
okkad sikandin nod rispituwon no sakup to owwet no ukumanan to mgo udio woy id aangat sikandin to timpu to kodharit onama
o iddon mapun waa sikandin id aangaang nid undiyot ki ilato woy id buyu rin nod ongayon iddos bangkoy ni isas
o kodbuyu ni ose tadda nosoobbuwan si ilato su kunan din ko waa pa id patoy si isas
a id poumow rin iddos kopitan to mgo sundau woy id inturan din ko mooggot been no id patoy ron si isas
d ikahi iddos kopitan to mgo sundau no id patoy ron en si isas deen id aman si ilato no od ongayon ni ose iddos bangkoy ni isas
omon tadda id ipanow si ose
d bolli sikandin to mahaa no ogget woy id angoy rin iddos bangkoy ni isas diyon to krus woy id bukusan din idda taddot ogget
opongnga id taaw rin idda riyot lovongngan no id bongbangan no pahang iling to langub
uwon dakkoon batu rutun no id lokkob din taddot lobbong
a nokita ni aria no toho agdala woy ni aria no inoy ni ose ko ingkon din lomig id lobbong iddos bangkoy ni isas
o id lihad don iddos llowt odimolloy id bovolli to pomammut onsi aria no toho agdala si alome woy si aria no inoy ni antiago su od undiyon dan to lobbong amoyd busbusan dan to pomammut iddos bangkoy ni isas
a sollom poron to allowt inggu to lammi pa id bottuk allow mid undiyon sikandan to lobbong ni isas
o waa pa sikandan id inguma rutun id pointuroy ran nid ungketen to ndoy kos od poibpit taddot batu no riyot sobbangan to lovongngan din
iru to kodinguma ran dutun nokita ran no nokoibpit don iddos batu
o id usok don sikandan nokita ran no duwon sudduwan no mama no moputi kos umpak woy mid unsad sikandin diyon lomig to kowanan dan woy novaakkan sikandan
ahi rin kandan to o kowd kovaakki
okosaddoo a nod nangkap kow ki isas no toho azaret no id pakpak diyon to krus
iru worad sikandin kaay su id badnow ron
ntongngi row man ikos lugaa nid tawwan kandin
a ipanow kow woy ponudtuu row ini riyot mgo tinodduwan din labbi ron en ki edro
sengi row no id unna ron si isas diyot alilea woy rutun od kokita ran sikandin iling taddot id ponudtuu rin kandan
a id ponleggua ran diyot lovongngan woy id pompaahuy sikandan su id kookoo ran to mattag allak
aa ahad sokkad no id ponudtulan dan oyyos novaakkan dan
a to novadnow ron si isas to sollom poron to allowt inggu unna sikandin id pokita ki aria no toho agdala no id losuran dangan to pittun busow nid poleggua rin
opongnga idda id undiyonnan ni aria iddos mgo tinodduwan ni isas
oingumannan din sikandan no id ponlanu woy id ponsinoggow
o norinog dan iddos ponudtulon ni aria no nokita rin si isas no novadnow ron waa ran id pongimbonnaa
opongnga id pokita si isas ki aria no toho agdala id pokita mandad sikandin diyot oruwa taddot mgo tinodduwan din laggun tod ipanow ran pomon diyot bonuwa
iru waa ran goos nokokilaa kandin su nopalin kos boyo rin
a id livod sikandan diyot erusalem amoy id ponudtuu ran diyot mgo duma ran no nokita ran si isas piru waa mandad sikandan id pongimbonnaa
iyot mori id pokita si isas diyot sopuusokkad no tinodduwan din laggun tid kaan dan
d sawoy rin sikandan su kulang kos kopomakoy ran woy motoggas kos uu
yyos waa ran man id pongimbonnaa taddot osengan to mgo minuvu no nokokita no novadnow ron sikandin
a kahin isas kandan to ndiyon kow to langun no tribu kaay to ampowt ingod woy id ponudtuu row kos oppiyon inoggan diyon to langun
os ahad ondoy nod pomakoy woyd poboutismu od kotobbus en
iru iddos konnod pomakoy od silutan to kopotayan
oy dos od pomakoy koddi od boggayan to kotuusan to kodpuung to mokososoobbu
yyos od pokopoleggua sikandan to mgo busow woy od pokooseng dan to mgo kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi
tid pokosomad sikandan to mgo uwod woyd pokoinom dan to ahad ondan nod pokoilu konna ran od komonnu
a od somaddan dan iddos uu tod pongkovohokan woy od kouliyan en
opongnga mid ikahi si isas nod ongaggon diyon to mgo tinodduwan din novatun don sikandin diyot datas to langit woy mid unsad sikandin lomig to kowanan to onama
a id ipanow iddos mgo tinodduwan din amoyd ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot ahad ingkon no ingod
d boggayan sikandan tod ongaggon to kotuusan to kodpuung to mokososoobbu amoy od posivonnalan din iddos id ponudtuu ran
iyon to kikow eofilo no oraroy nod rispituwon
o uraan minuvu kos id boggoy to dakkoon timpu to kodsulat taddot mgo notomanan dinit keta
d sulat dan iddos id ponudtuu keta taddot mgo minuvu no nokokita ron en to pinuungan ni isas rays pomon to tigkonayan woy sikandan don en kos id ponudtuu to kahi tod ongaggon
a eofilo id ooyyaran ku ini tid pohinonaw pomon to tigkonayan su nopuhawang ku mandad nod sulaton iddos moka atag ka ayn mgo notomanan woy id ooyyaran ku ini tid tapid atag kikow
d puungan ku ini amoyd kosorollan du no mooggot en iddos mgo notomanan no id nonaw kikow
a iddot timpu no si erodes kos hari to udea duwon minuvu no id ngoranan ki acarias no sokkad no tohodbuwis no id pomon to koubbaran ni bias
os sawa rin no si lisabet lubbad mandad to mgo tohodbuwis no koubbaran dad en ni aron
ikandan no toosawa paanan motallong diyot kod ontong to onama
oy riyot kodtuman dan to langun no suhu woy bola ud to onama waa en id pokosawoy kandan
iru waa anak dan su dii en od poko anak si lisabet woy buyyag don mandad sikandan
okkad no timpu si acarias woy dos mgo duma rin no koubbaran ni bias id suvaa ran nod bovuwis diyon to templo
a duwon botasanon to mgo tohodbuwis no od bunutbunut amoyd kosorollan ko ondan kos pinuungan to ipat sokkad kandan
e en si acarias kos na aam nod poko usok diyot templo amoy od loow to insenso
aggun tid loow sikandin to insenso riyot daom duwon mo uraan minuvu no nolivuung diyot leggua no mid dasaa
a idda ron en duwon id pokita kandin no ponolihan to onama no id lohinat lomig diyot kowanan taddot buwisanan to insenso
o nokita ni acarias iddos ponolihan notigkawan sikandin woy no oratan
iru mid ikahi iddos ponolihan to o kod kovaakki acarias
d tavak to onama iddos dosalon du oyyos si lisabet no sawa ru od anak to mama woy ngoraniyu sikandin ki uan
raroy ka en nod kahaa pomon kandin woy mo uraa mandad kos od kahaa to kodtobbow rin
u dakkoo kos koru anon din diyot kod ontong to onama
onna sikandin od inom to binu o ahad ondan nod pokohubug no inommon
d ko iroomman sikandin to his no spiritu ahad diyon pa sikandin to gottok to inoy rin
d polivoddon din iddos mo uraan koubbaran ni srael nod pomakoy riyot onama no od simba anon to kovuyyahan dan
d unna sikandin tod ongaggon woy duwon kotuusan din nod ponudtuu to kahit onama iling ki lias no propeta
d pod uliyon din kos koroniyan taddot mgo amoy woy mgo anak
oy dos mgo minuvu no diid dumoruma to id kopi it onama od tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran woy od moraom kos koovottan dan iling to motallong no minuvu ukit to nonaw rin
a ukit mandad kandin mo uraan minuvu nod kopanoy atag to kod inguma tod ongaggon
iru mid ikahi si acarias diyot ponolihan to omonnu ku od kosorollan nod kotuman kos id oseng du
yyos sikami no toosawa buyyag koyd man
id tavak iddos ponolihan to iyak si abriel no sinuhuwan to onama woy id suhu a nikandin amoy od posaddoo kikow ka ayt moppiyon dinoggan
iru pomon to waa ru man pomokaya inis id ponudtuu ku kikow ini ron en od ko ommow ka taman tod inguma iddos allow no od kotuman don kos langun nid ponudtuu ku
a iddos mgo minuvu nid aangat ki acarias diyot leggua orayn nosoobbuwan su nouhoy sikandin diyot daom to templo
o kodleggua rin konnad sikandin od poko ooseng diyot mgo minuvu de en id sinyas dobbo sikandin
omon ka ay noovottan dan no duwon id pokita kandin to onama riyot daom
o nopongnga ron iddos mgo allow to pinuungan ni acarias diyot templo id uli ron sikandin
aa nouhoy pomon tadda movoddos don iddos sawa rin no si lisabet
oy daom to limmon buwan waa sikandin id leggua riyot baoy ran
id ikahi si lisabet to o eruwan en koddi iddos onama su id awa rin don kos id ko ilawi ku riyot mgo minuvu no dii a od poko anak
a to annom don no buwan dos kodmovoddos ni lisabet id suhu mandon to onama iddos ponolihan no si abriel nod undiyon to azaret no sokkad taddot mgo bonuwa no sakup to alilea
d undiyonnan din iddos mongovay no id ngoranan ki aria
a ini si aria id posoyuran don ni ose no sokkad taddot koubbaran ni arin avid
o kod inguma taddot ponolihan mid ikahi sikandin to aria kahaa ka oraroy su id pokita tod ongaggon iddos kopiyannoy rin kikow woy od dumannan ka nikandin
o norinog idda ni aria oray sikandin no notaong woy waa nokaabbot ko ondan kos kohulugan tadda
iru mid ikahi iddos ponolihan to o kod kovaakki aria
d aam ka to onama su nahaa sikandin kikow
d movoddos ka woyd anak to mama woy ngoraniyu sikandin ki isas
raroy sikandin od kovantug woy od kilaannon sikandin no nak to onama no ampas to angun
d boggoy kandin to onama nod ongaggon iddos kohoriyan taddot kovuyyahan din no si avid
d hari sikandin to koubbaran ni acob taman to waad tomanon oyya su iddos kodhari rin dii en od kotaman
a mid ikahi si aria to d monnuwon man su mongovay a pa
id tavak iddos ponolihan to d ko iroomman ka to his no spiritu woy od koheddam du iddos kotuusan to onama no ampas to angun
e en iddos anak nid pototobbow ru uhis woyd kilaannon sikandin no nak to onama
oomdommow man iddos ig agaw ru no si lisabet
had id popoomdom kos duma no konnad sikandin od poko anak pomon to buyyag don piru ko ungkay annom don no buwan iddos kodmovoddos din
yya su atag to onama waa en ahad ondan no dii rin od kopuungan
ahin aria to udsuhuwon a to onama
uopa nod kotuman ka ayt koddi iddos langun no id oseng du
a id tanan don kandin iddos ponolihan
aa nouhoy pomon tadda id logkiyat si aria nid lukut po undiyon to bonuwa no id ubpan onni acarias no riyon lomig to buvunganon no sakup to udea
o kod inguma rin diyot baoy ran id ponguras sikandin ki lisabet
o norinog ni lisabet iddos kodponguras ni aria noheddam din no ayas id waong dos anak diyot gottok din
dda ron en no iroomman sikandin to his no spiritu
a id ooseng sikandin to monokkaa pomon to kahaan kahi rin to oppiya ka to langun no ba ay woy moppiya mandad kos anak duwot gottok du
raroy a no nahaa su ondoy a man nod lowwiyon du no inoy tod ongaggon ku
yyos to norinog ku kos kodponguras du ayas id waong inis anak ka ayt gottok ku pomon to kahaan
oppiya kod kotomanan du su id pomakoy ka man no od kotuman en iddos id ikahi tod ongaggon
ahin aria to d doongon ku en kos onama nod ongaggon diyot tivuk no pusung ku
oy orayd kahaa kos ginawa ku taddot onama no ohodtobbus ku
yyos waa a en nikandin lingawi ahad moobbava a ra no sudsuhuwon din
omon ko ungkay od osengon to langun no minuvu no moppiya kod kotomanan ku
yya su otuus kos onama woy mokososoobbu kos id puungan din koddi
otallong sikandin woy uhis kos ngaran din
omon poron to unnon linubbaran taman ko ungkay woy taman to waad tomanon eeruwon sikandin to langun no minuvu no duwon allak kandin
d pokita rin kos kandin no kotuusan ukit to pinuungan din
d podsuwoysuwoy rin iddos mgo minuvu nod poratasdatas woyd pobporoong
d pa awa rin iddos mgo hari riyot kodponguu ran woy od porotason din iddos od poobbava
d ivuung din iddos id ponggutasan to kopiyannan piru id pa awa rin iddos pongkoruwonnan no waa en nopiyod
d tovangan ki nikandin no koubbaran ni srael no uripon din woy dii en sikandin od kolingow taddot tandu rin nod ko eruwan keta
yya su id tandu rin no id ko eru i rin si braham woy dos koubbaran din taman to waad tomanon
a id oubpa pa si aria riyot ongki lisabet daom to mgo otollun buwan woy nopongnga id uli ron sikandin
o id inguma ron kos timpu nod pototobbow ron si lisabet id aanak sikandin to mama
a norinog taddot mgo sumbaoy woy korumannan onni lisabet no dakkoo kos eru to onama kandin woy nahaa sikandan duma kandin
o wau ron no allow iddos anak pomon to kodtobbow id lolivuung sikandan amoyd tupuwan dos anak
a id posangoy ran nanoy iddos anak ki acarias no amoy rin
iru mid ikahi si lisabet to onnod kopakoy
uan kos id ngaran kandin
ahi ran ki lisabet to ambo man
aa man moho ahad sokkad no korumannan dow no id ngoranan to uan
a id sinyasan dan iddos amoy ko ondan kos id kopi i rin no id ngaran taddot anak
d sinyas sikandin no od boggayan to popii amoyd sulatan woy id sulat sikandin no mid ungketen to uan kos ngaran din
e en nosoobbuwan sikandan langun
a idda ron en noko ooseng don sikandin woy id doong din kos onama
osoobbuwan iddos langun no sumbaoy ran pomon to ponudtulon moka atag taddon notomanan woy nokoso ob idda riyot mgo minuvu no id pon ubpa riyot buvunganon no sakup to udea
a iddos langun no minuvu no nokorinog tadda id popoomdom woy id po inturoy
ahi ran to ndan ayu kod ingumannon ka ayn anak otid dakkoo ron sikandin
yyos od kokita man no riyon en to kandin iddos kotuusan to onama
a si acarias no amoy taddot anak no iroomman to his no spiritu woy id oseng din iddos id poposaddoo kandin to onama
ahi rin to d doongon ta iddos od ongaggon no onama to koubbaran ni srael su id undini sikandin amoyd tobbus to mgo minuvu rin
d po undini rin iddos ohodtobbus no motuus no id pomon to koubbaran ni arin avid no sudsuhuwon din
ni en mandad kos id ikahi rin dangan ukit taddot mgo propeta no id aam din
d tandu sikandin no od polegguangon ki nikandin pomon diyot bollad tod pongkuntra ketawoy pomon diyot langun nod kolingasa keta
d ikahi mandad sikandin no id ko eru i rin iddos kovuyyahan ta woy dii rin od lingawan iddos uhis no kodpotonduwoy rin kandan
u ini en kos kodpotonduwoy no id pongulivottan din diyot ko opuwan ta no si braham no od polegguangon ki nikandin pomon diyot bollad taddot od pongkuntra keta su amoy od pokopuung ki atag to onama no waa id kovaakki ta
oy amoy od molinis woyd komotallong ki riyot kod ontong din taman tod kovudtus kos songnga ta
a sikkow mandad no anak ku od ngoranan ka no propeta to onama no ampas to angun
d unna ka tod ongaggon su amoy od panoy to mgo minuvu taddot kod inguma rin
d nonaw ka to mgo minuvu rin no od kotobbus sikandan ukit to kodposinsya to onama taddot mgo saa ran
yya su iddos onama ta eeruwon woy mohingginawa
e en id popiyod din iddos ohodtobbus pomon diyot datas to langit iling to se aa to lammid bottun allow
nin se aa od boggoy to ko owangan to mgo minuvu no riyot mosukirom woy dos novaakkan to kopotayan
d potuntuu ki nikandin no od pokod uli kos koroniyan ta riyot onama woy riyon to duma
a id dakkoo si uan woy id mosalig kos kopomakoy rin diyon to onama
d oubpa sikandin diyot noka awoy awoyn lugaa taman tid tigkanoy ron sikandin to kodnonaw to mgo udio
a iddon timpu si ugusto no hari to oma id poponog to suhu no iddos langun no minuvu riyon to intirut kohoriyan din ko ilangan nod polista
dda en kos unnon kodlista iddot timpu no si irenio pa kos gubernador riyot prubinsya to iria
e en posid uli iddos langun no minuvu riyot bonuwa to kovuyyahan dan amoyd polista
i ose mandad id ipanow pomon diyot bonuwa to azaret no sakup to alilea po undiyon to etlehem no sokkad no bonuwa to udea su idda en kos bonuwa ni arin avid no kovuyyahan din
d poruma rin si aria nod osowan din no movoddos don iddon timpu
o riyon don sikandan to etlehem nokosasang no id pototobbow si aria
d aanak sikandin to mama no ponganoy rin
d bukusan din to lamping iddos anak woy id po ilogga rin diyot pokannan to oyama su worad man lugaa riyot baoy nod oowottan to mgo moholiyug
ddon bulli duwon mgo tohodtamong to karnero riyot posobsavan no morani rutun no id tamong to mgo karnero ran
a tigkow duwon ponolihan tod ongaggon no id pokita kandan woy nolingkus dan to se aa to kotuusan tod ongaggon woy oraroy ran no novaakkan
iru mid ikahi iddos ponolihan to o kowd kovaakki su id undini a amoyd posaddoo koniyu to moppiyon dinoggan no od pokovoggoy to dakkoon kahaan to langun no minuvu
yya su inin bulli id tobbow ron diyot bonuwa ni arin avid iddos ohodtobbus no idda en so esiyas nod ongaggon
os patow no mooggot en inis ikahi ku oyyos od kokita row iddos anak no id bukusan to lamping woy id po ilogga riyot pokannan to oyama
opongnga idda osenga to ponolihan tigkow id loppow iddos duma rin no maanmaan no ponolihan pomon diyot datas to langit
d doong dan kos onama kahi ran to d posivontuhan ta iddos onama riyot datas to langit woy ka ay to ampowt ingod duwon kosunayan to mgo minuvu no id kahaa i rin
o id livod don iddos mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit id po ikohiyoy iddos mgo tohodtamong to karnero to uo kid od undiyon kid to etlehem amoyd kokita ta iddos notomanan no id posaddoo keta to onama nod ongaggon
e en id lukutlukut dan nid undiyon woy rutun nokita ran si aria woy si ose woy dos anak no riyot pokannan to oyama
o nokita ran don iddos anak id ponudtuu ran diyot langun iddos id ikahi kandan tat ponolihan moka atag taddot anak
a iddos langun no nokorinog taddot id ikahi to mgo tohodtamong to karnero nosoobbuwan
iru si aria id tota aw rin diyot poomdom din iddos langun no notomanan woy inaayun din idda od oonongngon
a id uli iddos mgo tohodtamong to karnero no mid doong woy id posivantug to onama pomon taddot langun no norinog woy nokita ran
yyos bonnaa en iddos id ponudtuu to ponolihan kandan
a to wau ron no allow iddos anak id potupuwan sikandin woy id ngoranan ki isas
ni en kos ngaran no id ponudtuu taddot ponolihan to waa pa sikandin diyot gottok to inoy rin
o id inguma ron iddos allow to kodtuman onni ose woy aria taddot suhu ni oises moka atag to botasanon to kodlinis to ba ay no lammi tobbawi mid undiyon sikandan to erusalem amoyd bovuwis
d piyod dan si isas amoy id po ossa atag to onama nod ongaggon
yya su ini en kos nosulat diyot uhu tod ongaggon no mid ungketen to o ilangan no iddos ponganoy no anak no mama id po ossa atag tod ongaggon
a moka atag taddot botasanon to kodlinis id bovuwis sikandan iling taddot no ikahi riyot uhu tod ongaggon no o ilangan no id buwis iddos oruwon limukon o oruwon pispis to soopati
ddon timpu duwon sokkad no buyyag diyot erusalem no id ngoranan ki imeon no id aangat to kod inguma taddot ohodtobbus amoyd tovangan iddos koubbaran ni srael
otallong sikandin no minuvu woy mopompomakoy woy no iroomman to his no spiritu
apoy id posaddoo kandin to his no spiritu no konna pa sikandin od patoy taman tod kokita rin iddos esiyas no id tandu to onama
kit to kodpomandu kandin to his no spiritu id usok sikandin diyot templo
okosasang en mandad no id piyod onni ose si isas amoyd puungan dan iddos no ikahi riyot uhu moka atag kandin
o nokita ni imeon iddos anak id sopipi rin woy id doong din kos onama
ahi rin to ongaggon notuman don iddos tandu ru koddi no uripon du
opanoy ad ahad kannu ru od ongayon kos umuu ku oyyos id lonna ron kos ginawa ku
u matamata kud en tid kita ka ayt id popiyod du no ohodtobbus no id panoy ru atag to langun no minuvu to intirut ingod
ikandin en iddos od poma awang to poomdom to konna mgo udio no waa poron id kilaa kikow
oy ukit kandin od posivontuhon iddos minuvu ru no koubbaran ni srael
e en nosoobbuwan iddos amoy woy inoy ni isas taddot id ikahi ni imeon moka atag kandin
a id dasaa si imeon no iddos onama od pokita to kopiyannoy rin diyot kandan
opongnga id osengan din iddos inoy no si aria kahi rin to nin anak id aam to onamasu amoy ukit kandin mo uraa kos minuvu to srael nod kotobbus piru mo uraa mandad kos od silutan
d kilaannon sikandin no patow pomon diyot onama piru mo uraa mandad kos od kolingasa kandin
kit kandin od kosorollan iddos poomdom to mo uraan minuvu
oy sikkow aria pomon to lampas no kodlanu ru od geddamon du no iling tid pillak kos pusung du
a riyot templo duwon mandad ba ayn propeta no id ngoranan ki na no anak ni anuel no lubbad ni ser
uyyag don sikandin woy noko osawa sikandin daom da to pittun lahun
opongnga novau ron sikandin taman ko ungkay no waumpuu oppat kos idad din
naayun sikandin diyot templo su allow bulli od simba sikandin od dasaa woyd puasa
o idda ra en no timpu id porani si na ki ose woy ki aria woy id posolamat sikandin diyot onama
d ponudtuu rin iddos moka atag taddot anak diyot langun no id aangat to allow to kodtobbus to onama to mgo minuvu riyot erusalem
o notuman don onni ose woy aria iddos langun no no ikahi riyot uhu tod ongaggon id uli ron sikandan diyot kandan no bonuwa to azaret no sakup to alilea
a id tuvu iddos anak woy id monokkaa sikandin id moraom pe en kos koovottan din woy id kahaa i sikandin to onama
a ipat lahun od undiyon to erusalem iddos amoy woy inoy ni isas amoyd sakup to pista to odlihad to onolihan
o sopuu oruwa ron kos idad ni isas id sakup sikandan taddon pista su idda me en kos noyaami ran nod puungan
opongnga iddos pista id logkiyat don si ose woy si aria amoyd uli piru waa saddoo ran no id polintotuwos bos si isas
unan dan ko nokoruma rad si isas taddot ko urallan to duma ran nid ipanow
o sokkad don no allow to kod ipanow ran idda pa sikandan nokosaddoo no waa vos dutun si isas
e en id ponaap dan sikandin diyot mgo korumannan dan woy riyot mgo oukuy ran
omon to waa ran sikandin nokita id poolivod sikandan diyot erusalem amoyd ponaap kandin
o otollu ron no allow kos mid lihad idda pa nokita ran sikandin no id ounsad diyot templo duma to mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d pominog sikandin woy mid ointud kandan
a iddos langun no nokorinog kandin nosoobbuwan taddot sinorollan woy mgo tavak din
o nokokita ki isas iddos amoy woy inoy rin oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
ahi taddot inoy rin to nak ku mambot id puungan du ini konami
iyak woy inis amoy ru oraroy koyd no no ipong to kodponaap kikow
id tavak si isas to ambot id ponaap kow pa koddi
aa row vo nosorolli no ko ilangan en no ka ay a to baoyt moy ku
iru waa ran nokaabbot taddot kohulugan to id ikahi rin
opongnga idda id duma si isas kandan nid uli riyot azaret woy id dumoruma sikandin to langun no suhu ran kandin
a iddos langun no notomanan id tota aw ni aria riyot poomdom din
a id tuvu si isas woy id moraom pe en kos koovottan din woy id kahaa i sikandin to onama woy to mgo minuvu
a riyot iko sopuu limmon lahun don to kodponguu ni iberio no hari to oma duwon ponudtulon to onama ki uan no anak ni acarias
d oubpa si uan diyot noka awoy awoyn lugaa
o idda ra en no timpu si oncio ilato kos gubernador diyot prubinsya to udea si arin erodes kos ponguu riyot prubinsya to alilea woy dos ari rin no si elipe kos ponguu riyot prubinsya to turea woy rakonite
a si arin isanias mandad sikandin kos ponguu riyot prubinsya to bilene
i nas woy si aifas mandad kos mowwet no mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis
omon to ponudtulon to onama ki uan mid undiyon sikandin to langun no lugaa no moranit weg to ordan amoy od ponudtuu to kahit onama
ahi rin diyot mgo minuvu to ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row woy poboutismu kow amoyd posinsyan kow to onama
kit ka ayt id puungan ni uan notuman iddos id sulat ni propeta saias no uwon monokkaan bawos diyot noka awoy awoyn lugaa no mid ungketen to onaya row kos pusung dow atag tod ongaggon woy tulidda row kos od ukitan din
ddos ipat sobbong no lugaa od bunbunan woy dos ipat lovuntud woy buvungan od potaddon
os bengkog no daan od tuliddon woy dos botuwon od upiyannan
a od kokita to langun no minuvu iddos po ukit to onama to kodtobbus kandan
o uraan minuvu kos mid undiyon to ki uan amoyd poboutismu
ahi rin kandan to ikiyu iling kow to mgo uwod nod laas
unan dow ayu kod pokolegguang kowd taddot od ingumon kodsilut to onama otid koboutismuwan kowd
tik bonnaa en no id sondit woy id tanan kowd to mgo saa row posivonnali row ini ukit to koniyun pinuungan
o kowd pososalig no dii kow od silutan to onama pomon to koubbaran kow ni braham
d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no ahad inis mgo batu od kovovallan to onama no koubbaran ni braham
omotawi row
os kodsilut to onama koniyu noko iling to porokuu no nopanoy ron nid tampod to kayu
oy dos ipat kayu no diid bovunga to moppiya od tompoddon woyd lumbag diyot apuy
a mid intud ki uan iddos mo uraan minuvu kahi ran to o ungketen ondan man kos od puungan doy
id tavak si uan to ddos duwon oruwon umpak ko ilangan no id boggoy rin kos sokkad diyot waa umpak
dda mandad so duwon koka an ko ilangan nod boggoy riyot waa koka an
uwon mandad mgo tohodsukut to buhis no id porani ki uan amoyd poboutismu
ahi ran to ohodnonaw ondan kos od puungan doy
id tavak si uan to o kowd ponukut to buhis no lampas taddot id posukut koniyu to guberno
uwon mandad mgo sundau nid intud kandin kahi ran to a sikami ondan mandad kos od puungan doy
id tavak si uan to o kowd pongimallak woy yo kowd ampoo to mgo minuvu amoyd ponoopi
ahaa kowd taddot bayad koniyu
a pomon taddot id pon ikahi ni uan notimulan pe en iddos kod imman to mgo minuvu no sikandin don en kos esiyas no nouhoy ran don od oongatan
oy kohingginawa ran no sikandin don en ayu kos esiyas
iru kahin uan kandan to d boutismuwan ku sikiyu to oweg patow no id sondit woy id tanan kowd to mgo saa row
iru konnod kouhoy duwon od tundug koddi no lampas pa koddi su konna a ollog ahad kod akas da to sandalyas din
his no spiritu woy apuy kos id boutismu rin koniyu
d pod ossan din iddos mgo minuvu no moppiya woy morat iling to minuvu nod oottap to trigu
os moppiyon trigu id ta aw rin diyon to budiga piru iddos mgo ottap od tirukkan din diyot apuy no konnod ko ovukkan
a mo uraa pe en kos nonaw ni uan moka atag to oppiyon inoggan woy id ikohiyan din iddos mgo minuvu no ko ilangan nod sondit woy od tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran
had si erodes no gubernador id sugga rin su id ahaw rin si erodias no sawa taddot ari rin woy id sugga rin mandad sikandin taddot duma pon morat no pinuungan din
iru si erodes ayas da en baling id puung to morat oyyos id poprisu rin si uan
o waa pa noprisu si uan mo uraa kos id poboutismu kandin woy id poboutismu mandad kandin si isas
aggun tid dasaa pa si isas nopokes kos langit
oy id lonna riyot kandin iddos his no spiritu no iling to soopati
a duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ikkow en kos nak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy oraroy ku nid kahaa i
o mgo otollumpuu ron kos lahun ni isas id tigkanoy sikandin to pinuungan din
iyot poomdom to mgo minuvu anak sikandin ni ose
i ose anak ni li
i li anak ni atat
i atat anak ni evi
i evi anak ni elqui
i elqui anak ni anai
i anai anak ni ose
i ose anak ni atatias
i atatias anak ni mos
i mos anak ni ahum
i ahum anak ni sli
i sli anak ni agai
i agai anak ni aat
i aat anak ni atatias
i atatias anak ni emei
i emei anak ni osec
i osec anak ni uda
i uda anak ni oana
i oana anak ni esa
i esa anak ni orobabel
i orobabel anak ni alatiel
i alatiel anak ni eri
i eri anak ni elqui
i elqui anak ni di
i di anak ni osam
i osam anak ni lmadam
i lmadam anak ni r
i r anak ni osue
i osue anak ni liezer
i liezer anak ni orim
i orim anak ni atat
i atat anak ni evi
i evi anak ni imeon
i imeon anak ni uda
i uda anak ni ose
i ose anak ni onan
i onan anak ni liakim
i liakim anak ni elea
i elea anak ni ena
i ena anak ni atata
i atata anak ni atan
i atan anak ni avid
i avid anak ni sai
i sai anak ni bed
i bed anak ni oas
i oas anak ni almon
i almon anak ni aason
i aason anak ni minadab
i minadab anak ni dmin
i dmin anak ni rni
i rni anak ni srom
i srom si ares
i ares anak ni uda
i uda anak ni acob
i acob anak ni saac
i saac anak ni braham
i braham anak ni era
i era anak ni ahor
i ahor anak ni erug
i erug anak ni agau
i agau anak ni eleg
i eleg anak ni ber
i ber anak ni ala
i ala anak ni ainan
i ainan anak ni rfaxad
i rfaxad anak ni em
i em anak ni oe
i oe anak ni amec
i amec anak ni etusela
i etusela anak ni noc
i noc anak ni ared
i ared anak ni ahalaleel
i ahalaleel anak ni ainan
i ainan anak ni nos
i nos anak ni et
i et anak ni dan
i dan anak to onama
a to noboutismuwan don si isas id tanan sikandin diyot weg to ordan
o iroomman sikandin to his no spiritu woy id piyod sikandin diyot noka awoy awoyn lugaa
oy rutun daom to oppat no puun allow id geddaman sikandin ni oivuyan kod kopiyod sikandin nod puung to saa
ddon timpu waa sikandin id ka an de en oray sikandin id gutasan diyot kotompusan
a kahin oivuyan kandin to tik mooggot ka en no nak to onama suhuwow inis batu nod kovovallan no paan
iru mid tavak si isas to o ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no onna ra koka an kos od poko uyag to minuvu
opongnga idda id piyod sikandin ni oivuyan diyot orayn mowwet no buvungan
oy id pokita rin iddos langun to kohoriyan ka ay to ampowt ingod to songo kodpollokpollok da
ahin oivuyan to d boggoy ku kikow kos kotungud to kodponguu ka ayt langun no kohoriyan woy dos kodpongomunoy to korotuwan dan
u inis langun id boggoy koddi de en id pokovoggoy ku mandad ini riyot ahad ondoy no id kopi i ku nod boggayan
a otid simba ka koddi kikow ron ini langun
iru mid tavak si isas to o ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no yon du ra simba ana iddos onama nod ongaggon du woy sikandin da kos duurumanniyu
opongnga idda id piyod sikandin ni oivuyan diyon to erusalem woy id poohinat din sikandin diyot orayn motikang no sakup to templo
ahi rin to tik sikkow en kos nak to onama timballu ka riyot dosiyung
u no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no d suhuwon to onama iddos mgo ponolihan din to kodtavang kikow amoy dii ka od komonnu
d saakon ka nikandan amoy ahad ikos pa a ru diid kohisgisan to batu
iru mid tavak si isas to o ikahi mandad diyot osulat no ahit onama no o ru geddami kos onama nod ongaggon du
o nopongnga iddos langun no po ukit ni oivuyan to kodgeddam ki isas id tonanan din pa sikandin tahad woy id puhawang din no duwon dad allow nod geddaman din si isas
a id livod si isas diyot alilea no no iroomman to his no spiritu woy nokoso ob iddos dinoggan moka atag kandin diyon to langun no bonuwa no morani rutun
d nonaw sikandin diyot mgo simba an to udio woy id doong sikandin to langun
a id undiyon si isas to bonuwa to azaret dos lugaa no id dokollan din
iyon to llowt od imolloy mid undiyon sikandin to simba an to mgo udio su idda me en kos nooyami rin nod puungan
d lohinat sikandin diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu amoy od basa to kahit onama
d toyawwan sikandin taddot id luun no popii no id sulat ni propeta saias
a id bollat din idda woy to nokita rin don id basa rin no mid ungketen to o iroomman a to spiritu to onama nod ongaggon su id aam a nikandin amoy od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot mgo worowora
d popiyod a nikandin amoyd posaddoo no duwon don kolegguangan taddot nongo uripon amoy od pokokita ron iddos mgo butud woy amoy od tavang taddot od pon ooyuwon
d popiyod a mandad nikandin amoyd posaddoo to mgo minuvu no id inguma ron kos timpu nid pokita to onama kos kopiyannoy rin kandan
opongnga ni isas tid basa iddos osulat no ahit onama id luun din idda woy id po uli riyot sinolihan dutun
id unsad sikandin amoyd nonaw woy langun to mgo minuvu rutun id totongtong nid pominog kandin
a id tigkanoy sikandin nid nonaw kandan kahi rin to ddos no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama nid basa ku notuman don ko ungkay to norinog dow ini
d doong kandin iddos langun no minuvu woy nosoobbuwan dan taddot kotuihan din to kod ooseng
ahi ran to onna vo anak da man sikandin ni ose
ahin isas kandan to okosaddoo a nid kopi i row nod ikahi koddi ka ayt ponunggelengan no mid ungketen to ikkow no doktor unna aw pa tod bawi kos ko ugolingun du
oy id kopi i row nod ikahi koddi to ddos norinog doy nid puungan du riyot bonuwa to apernaum ko ilangan mandad nod puungan du ka ayt kikow ron en no bonuwa
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no waa propeta nod tonggapon diyot kandin da en no ingod
ompotta row iddos notomanan iddot timpu ni propeta lias
aom to mgo otollu woyd tongngot lahun waa id uran woy duwon dakkoon gutas
ddon timpu mo uraan bau ka ay to sael no id ponggutasan
iru iddos onama waa rin po undiyonna si lias nod tavang to ahad ondoy kandan ko konna id po undiyon din sikandin to arepta no sakup to idon amoy od tavang taddot ba ayn bau no konna udio
oy iddot timpu ni propeta liseo mo uraa mandad no minuvu riyot srael no duwon bohok no et et
iru waa ahad sokkad kandan no no uliyan ko konna idda ra en so konna udio no si aaman no toho iria
a to norinog idda to langun no minuvu riyot simba an to mgo udio oraroy ran no nolingasa
osidlohinat sikandan woy id pohos dan sikandin nid poleggua riyot bonuwa woy id goyod dan po undiyot ibpit to daama to buvungan no id poohinatan taddot bonuwa ran su amoy od uuhon dan sikandin dutun
iru id baya si isas diyot tongannan to mo uraan minuvu woy ponayun don id ipanow
a id undiyon si isas to bonuwa to apernaum no sakup to alilea
oy riyon to llowt od imolloy id nonaw sikandin diyot mgo minuvu
osoobbuwan dan taddot kodnonaw rin su duwon en kotuusan to kod ooseng din
a riyot simba an to mgo udio duwon sokkad no minuvu no id losuran to busow woy id pomehes sikandin no mid ungketen to isas no toho azaret ondak lavut du konami
d undini ka vo amoyd silutan koy nikkow
d kilaa a kikow su sikkow en kos his no nak to onama
a id sugga ni isas iddos busow kahi rin to o onong onong ka
eggua kad kandin
dda ron en to kodleggua taddot busow id buntug din iddos minuvu riyot isowwan to ko urallan piru waa sikandin nomonnu
osoobbuwan iddos langun no mgo minuvu woy id po ikohiyoy ran to h ondan man inin mgo nonaw
uwon kotuusan woy kotungud din nod sugga to mgo busow woy id leggua en
omon tadda nokoso ob iddos moka atag ki isas diyon to langun no mgo lugaa rutun
a to id leggua si isas diyot simba an to mgo udio mid undiyon sikandin to baoy ni imon
utun iddos ba ayn onuhang ni imon orayn id momonit
e en id nganoy ran ki isas amoyd ko uliyan sikandin
d poroniyan din iddos novohokan woy id sugga rin iddos kodmomonit woy idda ron en no uliyan sikandin
a id onnow sikandin woy id sondad kandan to koka an
o od kosagkup don id piyod to mgo minuvu riyot ki isas iddos langun nod kovohokan
d somaddan ni isas kos uu taddot ipat sokkad woy no uliyan sikandan
a id poleggua rin mandad iddos mgo busow no id lasud taddot mo uraan minuvu
o id leggua iddos mgo busow id pomehes sikandan no mid ungketen to ikkow en kos nak to onama
iru id sugga sikandan ni isas woy waa rin po osenga su nosorollan dan man no sikandin en kos esiyas
o na allow ron mid undiyon si isas to noka awoy awoyn lugaa
d nonangkap kandin iddos mgo minuvu woy to nokita ran don sikandin id owiran dan sikandin no diid awa riyot bonuwa ran
iru kahin isas kandan to o ilangan no id pokoponudtuu ku riyot osson mgo bonuwa iddos oppiyon inoggan moka atag to kodharit onama
yya su ini en kos dontulon to kodpopiyod koddi
a id ponayun sikandin nid ponudtuu to kahit onama riyot mgo simba an to udio no riyot mgo bonuwa to sakup to udea
okkad no allow to riyon si isas to ibpit to anowt enesaret id pososokoy iddos mo uraan minuvu no id porani kandin amoyd pominog to kahit onama
a rutun nokita ni isas iddos oruwon bollangay no id tonanan to mgo tohodngongaap su id loinis to mgo pukut dan
d penek si isas taddot sokkad no bollangay no si imon kos komunoy
oy id ikohiyan din sikandin to sungow ve en boyow inis bollangay riyot oweg
a mid unsad si isas woy id nonaw riyot mgo minuvu
opongnga id nonaw si isas id ikohiyan din si imon to d ossud ki riyot moraom woy uuha row kos mgo pukut amoyd poko utoo kow
ahin imon to ohodnonaw nouggat koy laroyt bulli nid ngongaap piru waad en no utoo roy
nggad su sikkow man kos id suhu konami od puungan doy kos suhu ru
a to id uug dan iddos mgo pukut doddohusun ngaap kos mid sahad woy disok sama novendas iddos mgo pukut dan
e en id kamoy ran iddos mgo duma ran no riyot osson bollangay amoy od dubpu woyd tavang kandan
a id iponnu ran to ngaap iddos tapad bollangay woy asow ran don od koonnod
o nokita idda ni imon edro id lingko od sikandin diyot isowwan ni isas woy mid ikahi to ongaggon poriyu ka koddi su mosaasaa a no minuvu
d oseng idda ni edro oyyos sikandin woy dos mgo duma rin orayn nosoobbuwan taddot doddohusun ngaap no no utoo ran
osoobbuwan mandad iddos mgo duma ni edro no si antiago woy si uan no mgo anak ni ebedeo
a kahin isas ki imon to o kod kovaakki oyyos pomon ko ungkay konnad ngaap kos od ingutollon du ko konna mgo minuvu ron
e en id po ibpit dan iddos mgo bollangay woy id tonanan dan kos langun woy mid duma ran ki isas
okkad no allow to riyon si isas to sokkad no bonuwa duwon minuvu nid inguma no noso ob to et et
o nokita rin si isas mid lingko od sikandin woy id ounduk diyot isowwan din woy id po eru eru
ahi rin to ongaggon nokosaddoo a nod poko uli ka ka ayt molibmit no bohok ku otik id kopi i ru
a id somaddan ni isas iddos minuvu woy id ikohiyan din to yya id kopi i ku en
d ko uliyan kad
dda ron en worad iddos et et din
ahin isas kandin to o ru vo id ponudtuu ini riyot ahad ondoy ko konna undiyon ka to tohodbuwis amoyd ontongngan din kos lawa ru
oy boggoy ka to buwis no id suhu ni oises amoyd posivonnaa riyot mgo minuvu no no uliyan kad
iru ahad ungketen kos id ikahi ni isas ayas da en baling id so ob iddos dinoggan moka atag kandin
e en orayn mo uraan minuvu kos mid undiyot kandin amoy od pominog woy amoyd ko uliyan iddos mgo bohok dan
iru si isas inaayun od undiyon to noka awoy awoyn lugaa amoyd dasaa
okkad no allow to id nonaw si isas duwon id ounsad no mgo ariseo woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no id pomon diyot ipat bariyu no sakup to alilea udea woy erusalem
a riyot ki isas iddos kotuusan to onama nod ongaggon oyyos od pokovawi sikandin tod pongkovohokan
ddon timpu duwon mgo minuvu nid inguma no id sayung to minuvu nid patoy kos lawa no id ilogga riyot ikam
d po usok dan nanoy sikandin diyot baoy amoy id poonna riyot isowwan ni isas
iru pomon to mo uraan minuvu waad kovoyan dan nod usok
e en id pomenek dan diyot atop woy id akas dan kos pilon atop woy id tuntun dan sikandin diyot tongannan to mgo minuvu riyot isowwan ni isas
o nokita rin no dakkoo kos kodsalig dan mid ikahi sikandin to uwod id posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru
o norinog idda taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy taddot mgo ariseo kohingginawa ran to e ondoy man moho ikon minuvu nod sumpalit to onama
yyos waa minuvu nod pokoposinsya to saa ko konna onama ra en
iru nosorollan ni isas kos diyot poomdom dan de en id ikohiyan din sikandan to ambot ungketen kos poomdom dow
ngkon man musing kos moomok nod osengon
dda vo so od ikahi no d posinsyan don kos mgo saa ru o iddos od ikahi no ohinat ka woy ipanow ka
iru id pokita ku koniyu no siyak no nak to inuvu duwon kotungud ka ay to ampowt ingod no od posinsya to mgo saa
a id osengan din iddos minuvu no id patoy kos lawa kahi rin to ohinat ka piyoddow kos ikam du woy uli kad bo
dda ron en mid lohinat sikandin diyot isowwan to langun id piyod din iddos ikam woy id uli sikandin no id doong din kos onama
a nosoobbuwan iddos langun woy id doong dan kos onama duma to allak kahi ran to uu
rayn mokososoobbu kos nokita ta ko ungkay
opongnga idda id ipanow si isas woy nokita rin iddos tohodsukut to buhis no id ngoranan ki evi
d unsad sikandin diyot od boovoyaran to buhis
a kahin isas to uma ka koddi
e en mid lohinat si evi id tonanan din kos langun woy id duma kandin
a id pista si evi riyot baoy rin atag ki isas
uwon mandad mo uraan tohodsukut to buhis woy duma pon mgo minuvu no mid ka an duma kandan
uwon mgo ariseo woy mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises dutun
d sawoy ran iddos mgo tinodduwan ni isas
ahi ran to ambo moho to id lommung kow nid ka an woyd inom duma ruwot mgo tohodsukut to buhis woy dumon mosaasaa
iru mid tavak si isas kandan ukit to ponunggelengan kahi rin to ddos mgo minuvu no waa bohok konna od ko ilangan to doktor ko konna idda ra en so duwon bohok
ling mandad tadda waa a mid undini amoyd nangkap to mgo motallong ko konna idda en so mgo mosaasaa su amoy od sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran
a duwon mgo minuvu no mid ikahi ki isas to ddos mgo tinodduwan ni uan no ohodboutismu inaayun od puasa woyd dasaa woy ungketen dad en mandad iddos mgo tinodduwan to mgo ariseo
iru ikos mgo tinodduwan du od ka an moho woyd inom
id tavak si isas to tik duwon kosaa od puasa vo iddos korumannan taddot lammid osawa laggun to duma ran pa sikandin
onna en
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo tinodduwan ku
iru od inguma en kos timpu no od puasa ran otid ongayon don pomon diyot kandan iddos id osawa
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas kahi rin to aa minuvu nod bendas diyot lammin umpak amoy id tapong diyot tapoy
yya su otid puungan din idda od kovendas en iddos lammin tapong woy dos lammi diid dappan taddot tapoy
ling mandad tadda waa minuvu no od ta aw to lammin binu nod bovuwak poron diyot tapoyn tootawwan no binovallan pomot kindaa to oyama oyyos od bottu en moho idda
a od korattan da en iddos tootawwan woyd ko uwakkan dos binu
urisu ko ilangan no iddos lammin binu diyon en mandad id ta aw to lammin tootawwan
a waa en minuvu no od kopiyan pa od geddam to lammin binu otik naayam don sikandin taddot tapoy oyya su atag kandin idda ra en so tapoy kos monanam
okkad no timpu to llowt od imolloy nokovaya onsi isas diyot kamot no duwon pinomuwon trigu
aggun tid ipanow ran id pomadti iddos mgo tinodduwan din to mgo trigu woy id kusukusu ran idda woy id sungit
iru duwon mgo ariseo no nokokita taddot id puungan dan woy kahi ran ki isas to ambot id puungan dow iddos id diiyan diyon to llowt od imolloy
id tavak si isas to aa kow vo nokovasa taddot id puungan ni arin avid woy taddot mgo duma rin iddot timpu no id gutasan sikandan
d usok sikandin diyon to baoyt onama woy id ka an din iddos paan no id buwis diyot onama woy id boggayan din mandad iddos mgo duma rin
ddon paan id diiyan nod kannon to ahad ondoy su iyon da od pokoka an tadda iddos mgo tohodbuwis
oy id ikahi pe en si isas to a siyak no nak to inuvu kos duwon kotungud ko ondak od puungan ahad diyon to llowt od imolloy
okkad mandon no timpu to llowt od imolloy mid usok si isas diyot simba an to mgo udio woy id nonaw
a rutun duwon minuvu no id patoy kos kowanan no bollad
uwon mandad mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy mgo ariseo no od nangkap to po unayan amoyd ko uug dan si isas no nokopuung to saa
e en id ponulan dan sikandin kod bowiyan din iddos minuvu riyon to llowt od imolloy
iru nosorollan ni isas kos diyot poomdom dan woy id osengan din iddos minuvu no id patoy kos bollad kahi rin to ohinat ka rinit isowwan to langun
e en id lohinat sikandin woy id porani
a id inturan ni isas iddos mgo minuvu rutun
ahi rin to ngkon musing ka ay kos noko ikuu to mgo uhu ni oises diyon to llowt od imolloy
dda vo so kodpuung to moppiya o iddos kodpuung to morat
dda vo so kodtavang to minuvu o iddos kod imatoy
d tongtongngan dan langun ni isas woy id ikohiyan din iddos minuvu to otongngow kos bollad du
a id kottong din idda woy idda ron en no uliyan sikandin
iru orayn nolingasa iddos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises woy dos mgo ariseo de en id pomuhawang sikandan ko ondan kos od puungan dan ki isas
aa nouhoy pomon tadda mid tikoddog si isas diyot buvungan amoyd dasaa
aroyt bulli id dasaa sikandin diyon to onama
a to na allow ron id livuung din iddos langun no tinodduwan din woy id aam din pomon diyot kandan iddos sopuu oruwa no id ngoranan din no mgo apostoles
os ngaran dan si imon no id ngoranan ni isas ki edro woy dos suwod din no si ndres dos toosuwod no si antiago woy si uan
os duma si elipe si artolome si ateo si omas si antiago no anak ni lfeo woy si imon no id ngoranan no atriota su mohingginawa sikandin to ingod din
d aam din mandad si udas no anak taddot sangoy ni antiago woy si udas scariote nod boligya ki isas
a id potupang si isas duma to mgo apostoles taman to id inguma ran diyot pattad
oy rutun nolivuung iddos mo uraan minuvu nod pondumoruma kandin woy dos orayn mo uraan minuvu no id pomon diyon to intirut udea woy riyot erusalem
uwon mandad id pomon diyot bonuwa to iro woy idon no riyot ibpit to dahat
id undiyon iddon mgo minuvu amoyd pominog to nonaw ni isas woy amoy od ko uliyan kos bohok dan
dda mandad so mgo minuvu no id posupittan to mgo busow nid lasud kandan no uliyan oyyos id poleggua ni isas iddos mgo busow
d nokkaanokkaa iddos langun no minuvu amoyd pokosomad ki isas su duwon kotuusan no id pomon diyot kandin no nokovawi kandan langun
opongnga idda id tongtongngan ni isas iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy kahi rin to oppiya kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no worowora oyyos od pokolonug kow to kodharit onama
oppiya kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no id gutasan ko ungkay oyyos od ivuungon kow rad
oppiya kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no id sinoggow ko ungkay oyyos od kosu at kow rad kangkan pomon to kahaan
oppiya kod kotomanan dow otik id kolingasa i kow to mgo minuvu id pa awa kow id sumpalit woy id doddorattan pomon to koddumoruma row koddi no nak to inuvu
e en otik od puungan dan ini koniyu kahaa kow woy sayow kow to kahaan oyya su dakkoo kos ganti no id panoy atag koniyu riyot datas to langit
u iddos id puungan dan koniyu ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan to kovuyyahan dan diyot mgo propeta
iru sikiyu no noratu ko ungkay moko eru eru kow su notanggap dowd kos kahaan ka ay to ampowt ingod
oka arat arat kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no novuung ko ungkay oyyos od inguma en kos timpu nod gutasan kow
oka arat arat kod kotomanan dow sikiyu nod kosu at ko ungkay oyyos od inguma kos timpu nod kaanu woyd pondaawit kow
oka arat arat kod kotomanan dow sikiyu no od doongon ko ungkay to mgo minuvu su ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan to kovuyyahan dan diyot od po uvag uvag no mgo propeta
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no id pominog koddi ginowanni row kos od kuntra koniyu woy puungi row to moppiya iddos nolingasa koniyu
uyu kow riyot onama no od pokita sikandin to kopiyannoy taddot od doddora at koniyu woy dasaa kow atag taddot od ayu ayu koniyu
tik duwon od tabpit bonnong dow potabpi row mandad kos divauy
tik duwon od ahaw to lapid no umpak dow boggoy row ahad iddos umpak dow
oggayi row iddos langun nod bovuyu koniyu woy otik duwon od ahaw to mgo koruwonnan dow yo rowd idda owiya
uungi row riyot duma iddos id kopi i row nod puungan dan koniyu
tik iyon dow ra od ginowannon iddos id ginawa koniyu ondan man kos nokomoppiya tadda
u ahad iddos mgo mosaasaa od ginawa man taddot id ginawa kandan
oy otik iyon dow ra od puungan to moppiya iddos od puung to moppiya koniyu ondan man kos nokomoppiya tadda
u ahad iddos mgo mosaasaa od puung man mandad to ungketen
tik iyon dow ra od posombayon iddos duwon id pokovullas ondan man kos nokomoppiya tadda
u ahad iddos mgo mosaasaa od posamboy man mandad diyot od pokovullas kandan
iru sikiyu ginowanni row iddos od kuntra koniyu woy puungi row iddos od pokomoppiya kandan
osamboy kow woy yo kowd angat to bullas
a ko ungketen kos od puungan dow dakkoo kos ganti nod kotanggap dow woy od kokita no mgo anak kow en to onama no ampas to angun
u moppiya sikandin ahad taddot diid kotuig nod posolamat woy riyot morat no mgo minuvu
e en ko ilangan no eeruwon kow iling taddot onamon moy ta no eeruwon
o kowd hukum to duma amoy dii kow mandad od hukuman to onama
o kowd oseng no ko ilangan en sikandan od silutan su amoy konna kow mandad od silutan to onama
osinsya i row iddos duma amoyd posinsyan kow mandad to onama
oggoy kow woy od boggayan kow mandad to onama
rayn dakkoo kos id boggoy rin koniyu oyyos iling to boggas no id lasud diyot saku od dosokkon idda woy kopongnga od timulan taman tod koponnuponnu
e en iddos korokolloy no id boggoy row riyot duma ungketen dad en mandad kos id boggoy to onama koniyu
a duwon mandon ponunggelengan ni isas kahi rin to aa en butud nod poko inahak to iling din no butud su od pokodtapik dan da en nod ko uug diyot moraom no bobbo
aa tinodduwan nod pokolampas to tohodnonaw rin
iru od pokoloppa ra kos tinodduwan taddot kandin no tohodnonaw otik notuihan din don iddos langun no sinorollan tat tohodnonaw rin
ambot oray kowd kita to disok no possok diyot mata to duma piru id podtohon dow kos batang duwot mata row
a momonnu kow man od poko oseng diyot duma no uwod od ongayon ku kos possok to mata ru no waa row man nokita kos batang duwot mata row
d po uvag uvag kow
nna a row pa man ongaya kos batang duwot mata row amoy oraroy row od kokita tod angoy iddos possok to duma
ddos moppiyon kayu konna en od bovunga to morat woy iling mandad tadda dos morat no kayu konnod bovunga to moppiya
os ipat kayu od kokilaa ukit to bunga tadda
onunggeleng iddos kayu no duhiyon waa od kopupu no igera pomon tadda woy waa od ka angoy no ubas pomon diyot baahon
a iling mandad tadda od kokilaa ta kos minuvu ukit to osengan din
os moppiyon minuvu moppiya kos pusung din de en moppiya mandad kos osengan din
iru iddos morat no minuvu morat kos pusung din de en morat mandad kos osengan din
yyos ko ondan kos diyot pusung to minuvu idda en mandad kos od leggua riyot bivig din
ambot od ngoranan a nikiyu no ongaggon no waa kow man id tuman tod osengon ku koniyu
d paabbotlabbot ku koniyu iddos minuvu nod porani koddi dos id pominog to koddin mgo osengan woy dos od tuman tadda
oko iling sikandin to minuvu no id poohinat to baoy
d po unsad din iddos tuddok diyot moraom no duwon mosalig no batu
o id lonoggan iddon baoy waa en nomonnu su mosalig man kos po unsaran
a idda mandad so minuvu no nokorinog to koddin mgo osengan piru waa id tuman noko iling sikandin to minuvu no mid poohinat to baoy no waa po unsaran
o id lonoggan iddon baoy idda ron en nopiloy idda woy nohobbahobba en
opongnga ni isas tid oseng idda langun diyon to mgo minuvu mid undiyon sikandin to apernaum
a rutun duwon sokkad no kopitan to mgo sundau to oma
uwon sudsuhuwon din no id dokollan din to ginawa no novohokan woy asow ron od patoy
o norinog taddot kopitan iddos moka atag ki isas id popiyod din iddos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio amoyd nganoy ki isas no od undiyonnan din woyd bowiyan iddos sudsuhuwon din
o kod inguma ran id po eru eru sikandan ki isas
ahi ran to olimulimu tovangiyu iddos kopitan su ollog en sikandin nod tovangan oyyos dakkoo kos ginawa rin keta no mgo udio woy sikandin kos id povovaa to simba an doy ka ayn lugaa
e en id duma si isas kandan
iru to morani ron sikandin diyot baoy id suhu taddot kopitan iddos mgo oukuy rin no od tommuwon dan si isas woyd po osengan to ongaggon yo kad od luggatluggat nod allus su konna a ollog nod po usok kikow riyot baoy ku
onna a ollog ahad kodtommu ra en kikow
sengow robbo woy od ko uliyan en iddos sudsuhuwon ku
okosaddoo a ka ay oyyos ahad siyak no iraom a to kotungud taddot mowwet pa koddi woy duwon mandad mgo sundau no no iraom to koddin kotungud
tid ikahi a riyot sokkad no panow kad na od ipanow en sikandin
oy otid ikahi a riyot sokkad no ndini ka na od undini en sikandin
oy otid ikohiyan ku iddos koddin uripon no uungiyu ini na od puungan din en
o norinog idda ni isas nosoobbuwan sikandin woy id isau riyot mgo minuvu no id tintinundug kandin kahi rin to d ikohiyan ku sikiyu no waa poron nokita ku no minuvu no dakkoo kos kodsalig iling ka ay ahad dini to srael
a to id uli ron iddos id popiyod taddot kopitan nokita ran no no uliyan don iddos sudsuhuwon
aa nouhoy pomon tadda mid undiyon si isas to bonuwa no id ngoranan to ain
d duma mandad kandin iddos mgo tinodduwan din woy dos orayn mo uraan minuvu
o morani ron sikandan diyot sobbangan to bonuwa nokosuggung dan to mgo minuvu nid sayung to minatoy amoy id lobbong
os id patoy budtung no anak to ba ayn bau
o uraa kos mgo minuvu no id duma taddot bau amoyd loobbong
o nokita ni isas iddos bau no eruwan sikandin woy id ikohiyan din to o kad od sinoggow
a id porani si isas woy id somaddan din iddos id soyungan taddot minatoy de en id soro iddos id ponsayung
ahin isas to to onnow kad
dda ron en id livod kos songnga taddot konakan woy id onnow sikandin woy noko ooseng don
opongnga id ikohiyan ni isas dos inoy to o uyag don kos anak du ini rad sikandin
o nokita idda taddot mgo minuvu oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy id doong dan kos onama
ahi ran to d po undini to onama ka ayt keta inis motuus no propeta su amoy od tavang keta no mgo minuvu rin
a iddos dinoggan moka atag taddot id puungan ni isas nokoso ob diyot langun no lugaa no sakup to udea woy riyot morani no mgo bonuwa
a iddos mgo tinodduwan ni uan no ohodboutismu id undiyon to prisuwan amoy od ponudtuu kandin moka atag taddot langun no pinuungan ni isas
o norinog idda ni uan id po undiyon din to ki isas iddos oruwon tinodduwan din amoy od intud ko sikandin don be en kos esiyas o od angat pa to ossa
o id inguma ron sikandan diyot ki isas mid intud dan kandin kahi ran to d po undini koy ni uan no ohodboutismu amoy od intud ko sikkow ron be en kos esiyas o od angat koy pa to ossa
a daom to iddon allow id bowiyan ni isas dos mo uraan od kovohokan
d poleggua rin iddos mgo busow no id lasud to mgo minuvu woy id bowiyan din iddos mgo butud
d osengan ni isas iddos id suhu ni uan kahi rin to ivod kow riyot ki uan woy ponudtuu row kandin iddos langun no nokita woy norinog dow
yya su iddos mgo butud nokokita ron dos mgo pungku od poko ipanow ron iddos duwon bohok no et et no uliyan don dos diid dinog nokorinog don woy dos id poomatoy nongovadnow woy noponudtulan don mandad to oppiyon inoggan iddos mgo worowora
onudtuu row mandad kandin no moppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no waa kodduworuwa koddi
a to id ipanow ron iddos mgo minuvu no id suhu ni uan mid ooseng si isas moka atag ki uan diyon to mo uraan minuvu
ahi rin to o kod undiyon dow to ki uan to riyon pa sikandin to noka awoy awoyn lugaa ondan man kos id imman dow nod kokita
