aggun tid loohinat si edro no id oinarang id inturan mandon sikandin taddot dumon id loohinat dutun kahi ran to onna vo sokkad ka me en mandad taddot mgo tinodduwan duwon no minuvu
d elle mandon si edro woy mid ikahi to e
onna en
a rutun duwon sokkad no sudsuhuwon taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no korumannan taddot mama no id tibbas ni edro kos tolinga
id intud sikandin to onna vo sikkow me en iddos nokita ku gena no duma rin diyot duwon mgo pinomuwa no olibo
iru mid elle mandon si edro woy idda ron en id ukkaa kos manuk
a to sollom poron id piyod dan si isas pomon diyot ki aifas po undiyon to polasyu to gubernador to oma
ddos mgo udio waa id usok diyot polasyu pomon to botasanon dan to kodlinis
u otid poko usok dan to baoy to konna udio molibmit don sikandan woy od diiyan dan nod lommung od ka an diyot pista to odlihad to onolihan
e en si ilato kos id leggua woy mid intud kandan kahi rin to ndan man kos saa ka ayn minuvu no id popenek dow rinit koddi
ahi ran to tik waa morat no nopuungan ka ayn minuvu waa roy nanoy piyodda rinit kikow
ahin ilato kandan to iyodda row sikandin woy sikiyu ron kos od hukum kandin ukit to pomokayon dow
id tavak sikandan to aa kotungud doy nod silut to kopotayan diyot ahad ondoy
otomanan ini su amoy od kotuman iddos id oseng ni isas moka atag to po ukit to kopotayan din
a id livod si ilato riyot daom to polasyu woy id po umow rin si isas woy id inturan din to ikkow vo kos hari to mgo udio
ahin isas to d ointud ka vo no pomon diyot kikown poomdom o duwon id ponudtuu kikow moka atag koddi
ahin ilato kandin to ndan man kos kod ontong du koddi udio a
ddos mgo duma ru woy dos mgo ponguu row no tohodbuwis kos id piyod kikow ka ayt koddi
ndan man bos en kos nopuungan du
id tavak si isas to ddos kodhari ku konna ka ay to ampowt ingod
u otik ka ay pa idda to ingod id pon atu ron nanoy kos mgo tinodduwan ku amoy dii a od ka ammot to mgo udio
iru iddos kovonnaan konna en ka ay to ampowt ingod kos kodhari ku
e en kahin ilato kandin to o ungketen hari ka vos en
ahin isas to llog en kos id oseng du no hari a
yon unayan no mid undini a to ingod woy nominuvu su amoy od nonaw a to kovonnaan
e en iddos langun nid ginawa to kovonnaan od pominog koddi
ahin ilato kandin to e
ndan man kos kovonnaan
o nopongnga osenga ni ilato idda id leggua mandon sikandin diyot mgo udio woy id ikohiyan din sikandan to aa nokita ku no saa ka ayn minuvu
ooyami row man no ipat pista to odlihad to onolihan od buyu kow nod poleggua a to sokkad no pinirisu
a od kopiyan kow vo nod polegguangon ku inis ari to mgo udio
iru id pehes iddos mgo minuvu no mid ungketen to onna sikandin
i arabas kos polegguangow
a ini si arabas id supak to guberno to oma
e en id pa angoy ni ilato si isas woy id polompossan din
opongnga id podlambed to mgo sundau iddos duhiyon no baahon woy id bovallan dan idda no kuruna no id takos diyot uu ni isas
d umpakan dan sikandin tod momoollutun umpak iling to umpak to hari
a id porani ran kandin kahi ran to uopa nod mowwet kos umuu ru sikkow no hari to mgo udio
opongnga idda id tabpi ran sikandin
a id leggua mandon si ilato woy id ikohiyan din iddos mgo minuvu to d polegguangon ku sikandin dinit koniyu amoy od kosorollan dow no waa nokita ku no unayan nod silutan to kopotayan inin minuvu
e en id poleggua ran si isas no id kurunan to duhiyon no baahon woy id umpakan dan sikandin tod momoollutun umpak
ahin ilato kandan to a ontongngi row inin minuvu
o nokita si isas taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy taddot mgo tohodtamong to templo id pehes dan no mid ungketen to d pakpak sikandin
d pakpak sikandin diyon to krus
a kahin ilato kandan to o ungketen piyodda row sikandin woy sikiyu ron kos od pakpak kandin diyon to krus su atag koddi waa nokita ku no unayan nod silutan to kopotayan inin minuvu
id tavak iddos mgo udio to uwon suhu ni oises konami no iddos iling ka ayn minuvu ko ilangan nod imotayan su id oseng din no nak kun sikandin to onama
o norinog idda ni ilato oraroy pe en sikandin no novaakkan
urisu id po usok din mandon si isas diyot daom to polasyu woy id inturan din pe en sikandin
iru waa en id tavak si isas
e en kahin ilato kandin to ambot dii ka od tavak
aa ka vo nokosaddoo no duwon kotungud ku nod savuk o pakpak kikow riyon to krus
ahin isas to aa nanoy kotungud du koddi otik waa idda id boggoy to onama kikow
e en lampas pa kos saa taddot minuvu no id boggoy koddi ka ayt kikow
a pomon tadda id nangkap sikandin to po ukit amoyd pokoleggua si isas
iru ponayun id pehes iddos mgo udio no mid ungketen to tid sovukan du ikon minuvu od korattan kos ngaran du riyot hari to oma
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod ikahi no hari sikandin id supak en to harit oma
o norinog idda ni ilato id poleggua rin mandon si isas woy mid unsad sikandin diyot unsaran to kodhukum no riyot lugaa nod ngoranan to sag no atu
tik diyot ebreo no kinohiyan abata ddon timpu moko untud don kos allow woy idda en kos kodpanoy atag to pista to odlihad to onolihan
a id ikohiyan din iddos mgo udio to ntongngi row ini ron kos hari row
iru ponayun id pehes iddos mgo minuvu no mid ungketen to d imotayan ikon minuvu
d imotayan sikandin
d pakpak sikandin diyon to krus
e en id intud si ilato kandan kahi rin to ndan id popakpak dow kos hari row
id tavak iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis kahi ran to dda ra en so hari to oma kos hari roy worad ossa
urisu id boggoy ni ilato si isas diyot bollad dan amoy id pakpak diyon to krus
a id potiyang dan si isas to krus po undiyon to lugaa nod ngoranan no ongovongo
tik diyot ebreo no kinohiyan olgota
utun id pakpak dan sikandin diyon to krus
iyot tapad ibpit ni isas duwon mandad oruwon minuvu no id pakpak diyot mgo krus
a duwon id posulat ni ilato riyot korotula woy id potakos din idda riyot krus ni isas
ni en kos nokosulat tadda i isas no toho azaret iddos ari to mgo udio
o uraa kos udio no nokovasa tadda su morani ra man diyot erusalem iddos lugaa no id pokpakan dan ki isas woy nosulat idda riyot kinohiyan no ebreo atin woy riego
a iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis id osengan dan si ilato kahi ran to onna ollog iddos id sulat du no ari to mgo udio
oppiya pa nod buwassan du idda to d oseng inin minuvu no ari sikandin to mgo udio
iru kahin ilato kandan to o ondan kos nosulat kud idda ron en
a to nopakpak don to mgo sundau si isas diyon to krus id angoy ran iddos mgo umpak din woy id ba ad idda taddot oppat no sundau
d angoy ran mandad iddos mowwet no umpak din no waa tinobbilan
d po ikohiyoy iddos mgo sundau to ii ta ra ini od bendason ko konna od bunutbunut ki ra ko ondoy kos od pokokomunoy ka ay
ni en kos notomanan su amoy od kotuman iddos no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d ba adba ad dan iddos mgo umpak ku woy id bunutbunut dan atag taddot mowwet no umpak ku
ling en tadda kos id puungan to mgo sundau
a riyot morani to krus ni isas id loohinat iddos inoy rin dos suwod to inoy rin si aria no sawa ni leopas woy si aria no toho agdala
o nokita ni isas iddos inoy rin woy dos id ginowannan din no tinodduwan no id loohinat dutun mid ikahi sikandin diyot inoy rin to na po iling dud sikandin to anak du
d ikahi mandad si isas diyot tinodduwan din to o iling dud sikandin to inoy ru
omon tadda id po ubpa ron taddon tinodduwan iddos inoy ni isas diyon to baoy rin
a nosorollan ni isas no nopongnga ron kos langun de en mid ikahi sikandin to otokkangan a
d oseng din idda su amoy od kotuman iddos no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
utun duwon sokkad no tootawwan no noponnut suka
e en mid angoy sikandan to immat bukoo woy id aggom dan idda taddot suka
opongnga id takos dan idda riyot ubpu to panga to kayu nod ngoranan no isopo woy id bullow ran diyot bivig ni isas
o noheddaman din idda mid ikahi sikandin to opongnga ron kos langun
a idda ron en mid unduk sikandin woy id polivod din diyon to onama iddos ispiritu rin
a iddon timpu idda en kos kodpanoy atag to llowt od imolloy to so op no sollom tadda woy dakkoo kos koru anon taddon allow su nokosasang mandad idda to pista
e en id buyu ran ki ilato no od ponoppuwan to pa a iddos id ponpakpak diyon to krus amoy go os od poomatoy woy od ka angoy ron iddos mgo bangkoy
yyos id diiyan to mgo udio nod koomaggan iddos mgo bangkoy riyon to krus su od inguma ron kos llowt od imolloy
urisu id undiyon iddos mgo sundau woy id ponoppuwan dan to pa a iddos oruwon minuvu nid pakpak diyon to krus no riyot tapad ibpit ni isas
iru to id porani ran ki isas nokita ran no id patoy ron sikandin de en waa ran ponoppuwa iddos pa a rin
yon id puungan taddot sokkad no sundau id pillak din kos tokeleran ni isas woy idda ron en duwon id aus no oweg woy longossa
a siyak nid sulat ka ay nosorollan ku no bonnaa en idda su matamata ku ron en moho tid kita taddon notomanan
oy id posivonnalan ku idda su amoy od pomakoy kow mandad
otomanan idda amoy od kotuman iddos no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to aa en ahad sokkad no tullan din nod toppuwon
uwon mandad nosulat dutun no mid ungketen to d tongtongngan dan en iddos minuvu no id pillak dan
opongnga idda duwon minuvu no id ngoranan ki ose no toho rimatea
okkad sikandin taddot od pondumoruma ki isas piru waa rin id posaddoo su od kovaakkan sikandin to mgo ponguu to udio
a id buyu rin ki ilato no od ongayon iddos bangkoy ni isas woy id aman si ilato de en id angoy rin iddos bangkoy ni isas
d duma kandin si icodemo dos id undiyon dangan to ki isas to tongngovulli
d piyod sikandin to lampas to otollumpuun kilu no pomammut no id podsambut to mira woy aloe
a id angoy ran iddos bangkoy ni isas woy id bodboddan dan idda to moputin ogget no id tawwan taddot pomammut
u idda en kos botasanon to mgo udio otid loobbong to minatoy
iyot morani to id pokpakan ki isas diyon to krus duwon mgo pinomuwon kayu
oy iddon lugaa duwon langub no lovongngan no lammi pa id bongbangan no waa poron ta aw
a pomon to morani ra man idda woy timpu ron to kodpanoy to mgo udio atag to llowt od imolloy de en diyon dan id lobbong si isas
a mosukirom poron to allowt inggu mid undiyon to lovongngan si aria no toho agdala
o kod inguma rin dutun nokita rin no noko ibpit don iddos batu no id lokkob tadda
e en id lungkossu sikandin po undiyot ki imon edro woy riyot tinodduwan no id ginowannan ni isas
o kod inguma rin mid ikahi sikandin to d angoy iddos od ongaggon pomon diyot lovongngan
aa koy nokosaddoo ko ingkon sikandin piyodda
a idda ron en mid undiyon to lovongngan si edro woy iddon tinodduwan
apad dan id ponlungkossu piru mosiyapat pe en iddos duma ni edro de en unna sikandin noko inguma riyot lovongngan
o kod inguma rin dutun id lungaung sikandin woy nokita rin iddos ogget nid bodbod no nokotuwos piru waa sikandin id usok
odtahad id inguma si edro no nokotinundug kandin woy id tollus sikandin diyot daom to lovongngan
a nokita rin iddos ogget no nokotuwos woy dos ogget no id bodbod to uu ni isas
orad idda nokoddani taddot ogget nid bodbod to lawa rin ko konna nouppi ron woy noko ossa
a id usok mandad iddos tinodduwan no noko unna riyot lovongngan
o nokita rin no ogget dobbo kos nokotuwos mid pomakoy sikandin no novadnow ron si isas
d pomakoy sikandin ahad so iddon timpu waa ran poron nokaabbot taddot no ikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ko ilangan od kovadnow si isas
opongnga id uli ron iddos oruwon tinodduwan
a si aria id loohinat pa no id sinoggow riyot leggua to lovongngan
aggun tid sinoggow poron sikandin id lungaung sikandin diyot daom
okita rin iddos oruwon ponolihan no moputi kos umpak no id ounsad diyot id tawwan taddot bangkoy ni isas
os sokkad diyon lomig to uuwan woy dos sokkad diyon lomig to sikuwayan
a mid intud ki aria iddos mgo ponolihan kahi ran to ri mambot id sinoggow ka
d tavak sikandin to d angoy dos od ongaggon ku woy waa a nokosaddoo ko ingkon sikandin piyodda
opongnga rin osenga idda id loingoy sikandin woy nokita rin no duwon minuvu nid lohinat dutun piru waa saddoo rin no si isas bos idda
a mid intud si isas kandin kahi rin to ri mambot id sinoggow ka
ndoy kos od nongkapon du
unan ni aria ko sikandin kos tohod okudi to mgo pinomuwa rutun
e en mid ikahi sikandin to ir otik sikkow kos id angoy kandin ponudtuli a ko ingkon du sikandin piyodda su od ongayon ku
ahin isas to aria
a idda ron en id isau si aria ki isas woy riyot ebreo no kinohiyan mid ikahi sikandin to abboni
os kohulugan tadda tohodnonaw ahin isas kandin to o kod somad koddi oyyos waa a pa id livod diyon to moy ku
ndiyonniyu iddos mgo tinodduwan ku woy ponudtuu ru kandan no od livod ad diyot moy ku no moy row mandad woy onama ku no onama row mandad
e en id undiyonnan ni aria no toho agdala iddos mgo tinodduwan woy id ikohiyan din to okita ku iddos od ongaggon
a id ponudtuu rin kandan iddos langun nid oseng ni isas
a riyot bulli ron to iddon allowt inggu id lolivuung iddos mgo tinodduwan din diyot sokkad no baoy
omon to allak dan to mgo ponguu to udio id ponoggasan dan iddos mgo lokkob
a tigkow id lohinat si isas diyot isowwan dan woy mid ikahi sikandin to ddos kosunayan inaayun duwon to koniyu
opongnga rin osenga idda id pokita rin iddos bollad woy tokeleran din
a orayn nahaa iddos mgo tinodduwan to nokita ran iddos od ongaggon
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to ddos kosunayan inaayun duwon to koniyu
ling taddot kodpopiyod koddi to moy ku id popiyod ku mandad sikiyu
opongnga rin osenga idda id irupan din sikandan woy id ikohiyan to onggapa row kos his no spiritu
tid posinsyan dow iddos ahad ondoy no nokosaa od posinsyan mandad sikandan to onama
iru ko dii row sikandan od posinsyan dii ran mandad od posinsyan to onama
a iddot timpu no id pokita si isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din waa rutun si omas no iddos angga rin opping
okkad sikandin taddot sopuu oruwon tinodduwan din
e en id ponudtulan sikandin taddot duma rin no mgo tinodduwan no nokita ran iddos od ongaggon
iru kahin omas to ii a od pomakoy no novadnow sikandin oyya kod kokita ku woyd kosamsam to tintoddu ku iddos ukit to pansaa riyot bollad din woy dos pali riyot tokeleran din
o id lihad don kos sokkad no simana id lolivuung mandon dutun no baoy iddos mgo tinodduwan woy duma ran don si omas
had id ponoggasan dan iddos mgo lokkob tigkow mandon id lohinat si isas diyot tongannan dan woy mid ikahi sikandin to ddos kosunayan inaayun duwon to koniyu
a id osengan din si omas to ndini ka ontongngiyu inis bollad ku
omsamow to tintoddu ru inis bollad ku woy ini mandad so tokeleran ku
o kad od duworuwa
omakoy kad
ahin omas kandin to ikkow en kos od ongaggon woy onama ku
ahin isas to d pomakoy kad su nokita ad man nikkow
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot id pomakoy koddi ahad waa a nikandan nokita
uwon pa mo uraan mokososoobbu no id pokita ni isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din no waa nosulat ka ayn libru
iru inis nosulat ka ay id sulat amoy od pomakoy kow no si isas en kos esiyas woy nak to onama
oy ukit to kopomakoy row kandin od pokotanggap kow to umuun waad tomanon
a to id lihad kos pilon allow id pokita mandon si isas to mgo tinodduwan din diyot ibpit to anowt iberias
ling ka ay dos notomanan
d lolivuung onsi imon edro si omas no iddos angga rin opping si atanael no toho ana no sakup to alilea dos mgo anak ni ebedeo woy idda mandad so oruwa taddot duma pon mgo tinodduwan ni isas
a kahin edro kandan to d ngongaap a pa
ahi ran to d duma koy kikow
e en id sakoy sikandan to bollangay amoyd ngongaap piru laroyt bulli waad en no utoo ran
ulari tod ka allow ron duwon nokita ran no id lohinat diyot ibpit to lanow
iru waa saddoo ran no si isas bos idda
a mid umow si isas kandan kahi rin to go suwod duwon dad no utoo row
d tavak sikandan to aad en moho
ahin isas to uha row kos pukut duwon lomig to kowanan to bollangay amoy od poko utoo kow
e en to id puungan dan idda dii ran don od kogaha tod go un iddos pukut pomon to ko uralloy to ngaap no no utoo ran
a iddos tinodduwan no id ginowannan ni isas mid ikahi ki edro to ddos od ongaggon man bos idda
o norinog idda ni edro id sukub din iddos umpak nid lusut din id ballu sikandin diyot oweg woy id languy po undiyon to ki isas
os dumon tinodduwan id tinundug nid sakoy taddot bollangay
d goyod dan dobbo iddos pukut no noponnut ngaap su morani ron man sikandan diyot ibpit to lanow no mgo limmompuun leppa robbo kos koriyuwoy
o nokogo un don sikandan nokita ran iddos apuy no duwon mgo ngaap no id tuwog woy duwon mandad mgo paan
a kahin isas to iyod kow rini to mgo ngaap no no utoo row
e en mid undiyon si edro to bollangay woy id goyod din nid po ibpit iddos pukut
oponnu idda to doorakkoon ngaap no id inguma to sokkad no gatus woy limmompuu otollun  molison kos ko uralloy
a ahad iling tadda kos ko uralloy waad en novendas iddos pukut
ahin isas to ndini kowd su od lammag kid
a iddos langun taddot mgo tinodduwan od ka aang aang nod intud ko ondoy sikandin su nokosaddoo ran no sikandin kos od ongaggon
a mid angoy si isas to paan woy id toyyow rin idda riyot kandan woy ungketen dad en mandad taddot tinuwog no mgo ngaap
a ini en kos iko otollun kodpokita ni isas diyot mgo tinodduwan din nopongnga sikandin novadnow
o nopongnga ran id lammag id inturan ni isas si imon edro
ahi rin to imon no anak ni uan id dokollan a vo nikkow to ginawa lampas pa taddot kodginawa koddi to mgo duma ru
id tavak si edro to yya od ongaggon nokosaddoo ka no id ginowannan ku sikkow
ahin isas kandin to uhonulow kos mgo natin karnero ku
a mid intud mandon si isas kandin kahi rin to imon no anak ni uan id dokollan a ve en nikkow to ginawa
d tavak si edro to yya od ongaggon nokosaddoo ka no id ginowannan ku sikkow
ahin isas to omongngiyu kos mgo karnero ku
id intud mandon si isas to iko otollun timpu kahi rin to imon no anak ni uan id ginowannan a vo nikkow
a immat id kommos kos pusung ni edro oyyos ko otollu ron sikandin inturi ni isas
e en mid ikahi sikandin to ongaggon nosorollan du kos langun woy nokosaddoo ka no id ginowannan ku en sikkow
ahin isas kandin to a tuhonulow kos mgo karnero ku
onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku kikow no dangan to sudduwan ka pa od poko oumpak ka woyd poko undiyon to ahad ingkon nid kopi i ru
iru otid kovuyyag kad od poleppan kos bollad du woy osson minuvu kos od baku kikow woy od tuyukon ka po undiyon to lugaa no dii ru id kopi i
d oseng ni isas idda su amoy id paabbotlabbot din kos po ukit to kopotayan ni edro woy ukit tadda od koposivontuhan din kos onama
a mid ikahi si isas ki edro to uma ka koddi
opongnga osenga ni isas idda id loingoy si edro woy nokita rin iddos tinodduwan no id ginowannan ni isas
ikandin en kos id duug ki isas iddot kodlavung dan woy dos mid intud ko ondoy kos od boligya kandin
o nokita ni edro iddon tinodduwan mid intud sikandin ki isas kahi rin to ongaggon ondan bo mandad kos od kotomanan din
id tavak si isas to tik id kopi i ku nod ko uyag sikandin taman to kodlivod ku ka ay to ampowt ingod konnad ko ilangan nod kosorollan du idda
yon du puungi duma ka koddi
a pomon taddot id oseng ni isas nokoso ob kos dinoggan diyon tod pompomakoy no iddon tinodduwan dii kun od patoy
iru iyon bonnaa waa mid ikahi si isas no diid patoy iddon tinodduwan ko konna iddos id ikahi rin tik id kopi i ku nod ko uyag sikandin taman to kodlivod ku ka ay to ampowt ingod konnad ko ilangan nod kosorollan du idda
ddos tinodduwan nod tommanon ni isas sikandin en kos id posivonnaa woy mid sulat langun ka ay woy nosorollan doy no mooggot en kos kodposivonnaa rin
a mo uraa pa kos id puungan ni isas
tid ipanon idda tod sulat saddook kulang pa inis intirut ingod no od tawwan taddot langun no libru nod sulatan tadda
iyon to kikow eofilo
ddot unnon sulat ku kikow id ponudtuu ku iddos langun no pinuungan ni isas woy dos kodnonaw rin pomon taddot kodtigkanoy to kandin no pinuungan taman taddot allow no novatun sikandin diyot datas to langit
ling kaay kos notomanan
opongnga iddos kopotayan ni isas diyon to krus woy dos kodbadnow kandin komouraa sikandin id pokita riyot mgo apostoles daom to oppatnopuun allow amoy id posivonnaa rin no nouyag en sikandin
oy id nonaw mandad sikandin diyot mgo apostoles mokaatag to kodharit onama
o waa pa sikandin id batun duwon mgo ponaannon din diyot id ponaam din no mgo apostoles ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
okkad no ponaannon din kandan laggun tid porumannoy ran nid kaan mid ikahi sikandin to o kowd awa riyot bonuwa to erusalem
ngati row iddos kodinguma to his no spiritu no id tandu to moy ku no idda en so id ikahi kud dangan koniyu
yyos si uan oweg kos id boutismu rin to mgo minuvu piru pilon allow pomon koungkay his no spiritu kos id boutismu koniyu
a sokkad no timpu id lolivuung kos mgo apostoles duma ki isas woy mid intud sikandan kahi ran to ongaggon od poowan du vo koungkay no timpu iddos mgo minuvu no id hari keta amoyd poohinaton mandon iddos kohoriyan to srael
id tavak si isas to dda ra en so moy ku kos nokosaddoo to timpu nod puungan din iddos id kopii rin kaay to ampowt ingod
iru sikiyu konna atag koniyu inin sinorollan ko kannu ini od kopuungan
iru otik od koiroomman kowd to his no spiritu od pokotanggap kowd to kotuusan
oy od pokoposivonnaa kowd mokaatag koddi riyon to erusalem woy riyot langun no lugaa no sakup to udea ahad diyot bonuwa to amaria woy ahad ingkon kaay to intirut ingod
opongnga mid ooseng si isas tadda id batun don sikandin diyot datas to langit laggun tid ponontong kandin iddos mgo apostoles taman to worad od kokita ran su nosoungan don man sikandin to souhapun
aggun tod totongtong dan diyot datas to langit tigkow ron duwon oruwon mama no moputi kos umpak no id lohinat diyot morani ran
a mid ikahi iddos oruwon mama to ikiyu no mgo toho alilea mambot od loohinat kow nod langngag diyot datas to langit
i isas no id batun don od livod dad sikandin kaay to ampowt ingod iling taddot kodbatun kandin
a id tanan don iddos mgo apostoles diyot uvungan to mgo libo woy mid livod sikandan diyot erusalem
ddon buvungan mgo sokkad no kilometro kos koriyuwoy pomon diyot erusalem
o nokoinguma ran don dutun id penek dan diyot kwartu nid oubpan dan
ikandan onsi edro si uan si antiago si ndres si elipe si omas si artolome si ateo si antiago no anak ni lfeo si imon no mohingginawa to ingod din woy si udas no anak ni antiago
angun dan inaayun od posokaddoy to koddasaa riyot onama woy mid lonug kandan si aria no inoy ni isas woy dos duma pon mgo molitan woy mgo suwod ni isas
okkad no allow id lolivuung dan
ddos kouralloy tod pompomakoy rutun mgo sokkad no gatus woy oruwompuu a id lohinat si edro woy id osengan din sikandan kahi rin to go suwod koilangan nod kotuman iddos id posulat dangan to onama ki avid ukit to his no spiritu mokaatag ki udas no id piyod taddot mgo minuvu nid ammot ki isas
i udas sokkad sikandin dangan no duma ta no apostoles woy id aam tod ongaggon amoyd lonug to pinuungan din
a iddos soopi no id bayad ki udas taddot morat nid puungan din ki isas id bolli idda to livuta
iyon en mandad no livuta nouug sikandin no nokounna kos uu woy id bossot kos gottok din woy novukayat peen kos bituka rin
een to norinog inin notomanan taddot langun no toho erusalem id ngoranan dan iddon livuta no keldama riyot kinohiyan dan no ramaic no iddos kohulugan ivuta no id oyaran to ongossa a ponayun mid ikahi si edro to yya su noikahi riyot libru to almo no oilangan en nod tonanan dos ubpan din woyworad od pokooubpa tadda
oy duwon mandad nosulat dutun no mid ungketen to oilangan no duwon sokkad nod suvaa to kotundanan din
urisu koilangan nod aam ki to sokkad no minuvu nod suvaa ki udas amoy od lonug keta to kodposivonnaa taddot kodbadnow ki isas
ddos minuvu nod aamon ta koilangan no id dumoruma keta daom to timpu no kaay pa si isas nod ongaggon pomon taddot timpu nid boutismu si uan taman tid batun don sikandin diyot datas to langit
een duwon oruwon ngaran no id boggoy ran amoyd aaman taddot od pokosuvaa ki udas
ddos sokkad si ose no id ngoranan ki arsabas no id ngoranan mandad ki usto woy dos sokkad si atias
opongnga idda id dasaa sikandan no mid ungketen to ongaggon nosorollan du iddos diyot pusung to langun no minuvu
okita ru konami ko ondoy musing kaay to oruwa kos id aam du no id suvaa ki udas taddot id tonanan din no kotundanan no apostoles su id undiyon sikandin to lugaa no ollog kandin
o nopongnga ran id dasaa id bunutbunut sikandan woy dos naaam si atias
a pomon tadda sokkad don sikandin taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles
a to id inguma ron iddos allow to entecostes id lolivuung diyot sokkad no baoy iddos langun tod pompomakoy
oy tigkow ron duwon dahing pomon diyot datas to langit no iling to monokkaan kaamag nod gohonugguu woy dos dohingon tadda nokosoob diyot daom to baoy nid lolivuungan dan
okokita ran to immat dila no mgo loglog to apuy no id mouraa woy id latun idda riyot uu to ipat sokkad kandan
angun dan noiroomman to his no spiritu woy id tigkanoy no posidooseng to nokodossoosson kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi su idda man so his no spiritu kos id boggoy kandan to kogahan
a iddon timpu duwon mgo udio no mid oubpa riyot erusalem no duwon allak to onama
d pomon sikandan diyot nokodossoosson ingod
o norinog dan iddos dohingon id pondupak dan diyon tod pompomakoy
oy oraroy ran no nongotaong su iddos ipat sokkad kandan nokorinog no iddos od pompomakoy nokoooseng moho taddot ipat sokkad no kinohiyan dan
urisu oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan woy id ponikahi ran to ambo moho tod pokoooseng don to nokodossoosson kinohiyan inin mgo minuvu no toho alilea man nanoy sikandan
ambo ayu tod pokoooseng don sikandan taddot ipat sokkad no kinohiyan to lugaa nid pomonnan ta
yya su duwon duma ta kaay no toho artia toho edia toho lam toho esopotamia toho udea toho apadocia toho onto woy pomon diyot sia
oy duwon mandad toho rigia toho amfilia toho hipto woy duwon id pomon diyot mgo lugaa no sakup to ibya no moranit bonuwa to irene woy duwon peen id pomon diyot oma no mgo udio woy konna mgo udio no nongopiyod tod pomokayon to mgo udio
oy duwon peen mandad id pomon diyot reta woy riyot rabia
had waa nokodiling kos keton mgo kinohiyan piru noovottan ta rad man iddos langun no id ikahi ran mokaatag to mgo mokososoobbun pinuungan to onama
a pomon to nosoobbuwan woy notaong dan id pointuroy ran no mid ungketen to ndan ayu kos kohulugan kaay
iru duwon duma no id yangyang dan iddos od pompomakoy kahi ran to ongohubug da ikon mgo minuvu
iru si edro mid lohinat duma taddot dumon sopuusokkad no apostoles diyot isowwan to mouraan minuvu woy id ooseng sikandin to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ikiyu no duma roy no mgo udio woy langun no mid oubpa kaayt erusalem ooyyari row tod pominog inis od ikohiyon ku koniyu
d popoomdom kow no od pongkohubug inis mgo duma ku piru waa moho minuvu nod kohubug to alas nuwebe poron to sollom
nin notomanan ini en iddos id poposaddoo dangan to onama ki propeta oel no mid ungketen to nit morin allow id busbus ku riyot langun no minuvu iddos koddin spiritu
a ukit tadda id poposaddoo ku iddos koddin kahi taddot mgo anak dow no mama woy baay
uwon id pokita ku riyot mgo konakan dow
oy dos mgo buyyag dow no mama duwon mandad id potohenop ku kandan
ddon mgo allow ahad pa iddos mgo uripon ku no mama woy baay id boggoy ku kandan iddos koddin spiritu amoyd pokoponudtuu ran to koddin kahi
oy duwon id pokita ku no mgo mokososoobbu riyot datas to langit woy kaay to ampowt ingod oyya su duwon od kokita no longossa woy apuy woy mokoppaan obboo
d mosukirom kos allow woy dos buwan od moollutu iling to longossa
a idda pa od inguma iddos mokaaratarat no allow to kodhukum tod ongaggon
ddos ahad ondoy nod nganoy tod ongaggon od kotobbus
a mid ikahi peen si edro to ikiyu no mgo duma ku no toho srael pominogga row inis od osengon ku koniyu
i isas no toho azaret id popiyod to onama rinit keta woy id posivonnalan din ini to mgo mokososoobbun pinuungan ni isas
okosaddoo kowd kaay su id puungan meen ini kaayt koniyu
ni si isas id boggoy row riyot bollad to mgo mosaasaan minuvu amoyd poimotayan ukit to kodpakpak diyon to krus
a langun kaay nopuungan don su id ikuu ini to puhawang to onama woy tapoy rin don nosorolli
iru id badnow si isas to onama woy id polegguang sikandin pomon diyot kotuusan to kopotayan oyyos konnod kopakoy nod kotalu sikandin to kopotayan
oomdomma row iddos id ikahi dangan ni arin avid mokaatag kandin no mid ungketen to naayun id duma koddi iddos onama nod ongaggon deen konna a od kovaakkan su rini man sikandin to tokeleran ku amoyd tavang koddi
ni en kos unayan no dakkoo kos kahaan ku woy od kanta kos pusung ku to koddoong diyot onama
had pa od patoy a duwon en koimmanan ku
yyos nosorollan ku en no konna a nikkow od podtohonon diyot lovongngan
ii ka od aman nod koobbuu kos lawa to uhis no uripon du
d pokita ru koddi iddos daan nod poundiyon to umuun waad tomanon
een oraroy a nod kahaa su inaayun ka man duma koddi
a ponayun mid ikahi si edro to go suwod id paabbotlabbot ku koniyu no si arin avid no keton kovuyyahan waa sikandin id ooseng kaay mokaatag to kougolingun din su nosorollan ta no id patoy woy id lobbong sikandin
oy dos lobbong din duwon poron taman koungkay
omon to si avid sokkad man no propeta tapoy rin don nosorolli iddos tandu to onama no od pohoriyon iddos sokkad taddot koubbaran din
osorollan din don tapoy iddos kodbadnow taddot esiyas deen mid ikahi si avid to aa sikandin podtohona to onama riyot lovongngan woy waa en mandad noobbuu kos lawa rin
d badnow to onama si isas woy sikami langun od pokoposivonnaa oyya su nokita roy ron en moho no nouyag sikandin
a id batun si isas to onama woy id posivontuhan ukit to kodpounsad diyon lomig to kowanan din
oy notanggap din iddos his no spiritu nid tandu to moy rin
ddos mokososoobbun nokita woy norinog dow koungkay ini en kos pinuungan to his no spiritu no id boggoy ni isas woy id popiyod din kaayt konami
osorollan ta no iddos id oseng ni avid konna en mokaatag kandin su konna man si avid kos novatun diyot datas to langit ko konna si isas en
yyos duwon id sulat ni avid no mid ungketen to os onama mid ikahi riyon tod ongaggon ku nsad ka lomig to kowanan ku taman tid poiraom kud to kikown kodponguu iddos od pongkuntra kikow
een sikiyu langun no koubbaran ni srael koilangan nod pokosaddoo kow no si isas no id pakpak dow riyon to krus id aam sikandin to onama amoy od kovovallan no esiyas woyd ongaggon
a to norinog to mgo minuvu iddos osengan ni edro nokobbit kos pusung dan
een id inturan dan si edro woy dos duma rin no mgo apostoles kahi ran to go suwod ondan man kos ollog nod puungan doy
id tavak si edro to ondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row woy koilangan no ipat sokkad koniyu od poboutismu su ini en kos kodposivonnaa no nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays
uungi row ini amoyd koposinsyan kow woy od kotanggap dow iddos his no spiritu no id boggoy to onama koniyu
u ini en kos id tandu to onama koniyu woy riyot koubbaran dow ahad pa iddos id ponoubpa riyot moriyu woy dos ahad ondoy nod umawon to onama nod ongaggon ta
a mouraa pa iddos mgo osengan ni edro kandan woy id loglohottan din sikandan no mid ungketen to oriyu kow to mgo minuvu to inin timpu nod puung to morat su mooggot en nod silutan sikandan to onama
ddon allow mouraa kos mid pomakoy taddot ponudtulon ni edro woy id poboutismu sikandan
uwon otollun maan   no minuvu no nokotimuu riyon tod pompomakoy
a id boggoy ran langun kos kandan no timpu to kodpominog taddot nonaw to mgo apostoles ponayun dan nid porumannoy woy id kaan taddot id toppiktoppik no paan atag to kodsampot to kopotayan ni isas woy ponayun dan mid dasaa
a mouraa kos mgo mokososoobbun pinuungan to onama ukit to mgo apostoles
een iddos langun no minuvu duwon don allak dan to onama
onayun nid lolivuung iddos langun nod pompomakoy woy id povoggayoy ran diyot ahad ondoy no duwon koilonganon
d boligya ran iddos mgo koruwonnan dan woy dos bayad tadda id baadbaad dan diyot mgo suwod dan to kopomakoy no duwon koilonganon
pat allow ponayun dan id lolivuung diyot templo
a riyon mandad to baoy ran id pontoppiktoppik dan to paan woy mid kaan sikandan nid dumannan to bonnaavonnaan kahaan
onayun dan to koddoong to onama woy mowwet kos kodontong kandan to langun no minuvu
pat allow id timuu peen tod ongaggon iddos kouralloy to minuvu no notobbus
okkad no allow to mgo alas tres to mapun mid undiyon to templo si edro woy si uan su idda en kos timpu to koddasaa to mgo udio
iyot sobbangan to templo nod ngoranan no otoos no obbangan duwon sokkad no minuvun pungku pomon poron to kodtobbow rin
a ipat allow duwon od sayung kandin woy od taaw kandin taddon sobbangan amoyd pokilimus taddot od ponusok diyon to templo
o nokokita sikandin ki edro woy ki uan no od usok don diyot templo id bovuyu sikandin to soopi
a id tongtongngan ni edro woy uan iddos pungku woy id ikohiyan ni edro to ntong ka konami
een mid ontong kandan iddos pungku su id aangat sikandin no duwon od kotanggap din
iru mid ikahi si edro to aa soopi ku piru duwon kaayt koddi no id pokovoggoy ku kikow
kit to kotuusan to ngaran ni isas rays no toho azaret ipanow ka
a id somaddan ni edro iddos kowanan no bollad taddot pungku woy id poohinat din
oy idda ron en id monokkaa kos paa rin
een id lohinat sikandin woy id oipanow woy id duma ron kandan nid usok diyot templo
aggun tid ipanow ran id oumbottut sikandin pomon to kahaan woy id doong din kos onama
a langun to mgo minuvu rutun nokita ran iddos pungku no nokoipanow ron woy id doong diyon to onama
een oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan taddot notomanan din oyyos nokilaa ran man no sikandin en iddos laayun od ounsad nod pokilimus diyot otoos no obbangan
a diyot lugaa nod ngoranan no alkon ni olomon waa id pitas nid somad ongki edro iddos pungku pomon to kahaan no nouliyan don sikandin
os mouraan minuvu posidlungkossu no id porani kandan su oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan
o nokita ni edro iddos mgo minuvu id ikohiyan din sikandan to go duma ku no koubbaran ni srael mambot od kosoobbuwan kow tadda woy mambot od totongtong kow konami
d popoomdom kow vo no sikami kos nokopoipanow kandin pomon to konamin kotuusan woy pomon to morumoruma koy to onama
onna
u iddos onama to keton kovuyyahan no si braham si saac woy si acob sikandin en kos id puung kaay amoyd koposivontuhan iddos uripon din no si isas
iru sikiyu id boggoy row moho sikandin diyot bollad to mgo ponguu woy id inoyyuhan dow peen sikandin diyot isowwan ni ilato no gubernador ahad nopuhawang din don nanoy nod sovukan sikandin
his sikandin woy otallong piru id inoyyuhan dow
oy iyon dow baling id buyu riyot ki ilato nod sovukan iddos minuvun mongimatoy
d imotayan dow iddos id pomonnan to umuun waad tomanon piru id badnow sikandin to onama woy sikami od pokoposivonnaa en kaay
a idda en no kotuusan ni isas kos id ponokkaa kaayn minuvu no nokita woy nokilaa row
kit to kopomakoy rin ki isas nouliyan sikandin no matamata row ron en tid kita
go suwod nokosaddoo a no sikiyu woy iddos mgo ponguu row to id poimotayan dow si isas waa row nosorolli ko ondoy sikandin
iru id posaddoo ron tapoy to onama ukit to langun no propeta no koilangan nod tiis to mgo kodposuppit iddos esiyas
a pomon taddot id puungan dow kandin notuman en iddos id ikahi to onama ukit kandan
een sondit kow woy tanan kowd to mgo saa row woy livod kowd diyot onama amoyd kaawa ron kos koniyun mgo saa na od maawang kos ginawa row
oy od popiyod din mandon si isas rays no esiyas no id aam din nod hari keta
iru koilangan nod oubpa pa sikandin diyot datas to langit taman tod lommiyon don to onama iddos langun iling taddot id posaddoo rin ukit to mgo propeta rin dangan
yyos duwon id ikahi ni oises no mid ungketen to d popiyod kos onama to propeta nod pomon da en dinit keta iling taddot kodpopiyod din koddi kaayt koniyu
oilangan nod dumoruma kow to langun nod osengon din koniyu
os ahad ondoy no konnod dumoruma taddot osengan din od poowan pomon diyot mgo minuvu to onama amoyd silutan to kopotayan no waad tomanon
a kahin edro to ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo propeta no pomon poron to timpu ni amuel woy dos langun no nokotundug kandin id ponudtuu mandad mokaatag to kotomanan inin mgo allow
yyos duwon id tandu dangan to onama riyot keton kovuyyahan ukit to mgo propeta woy siketa no mgo udio apii taddon tandu
yya su mid ikahi sikandin ki braham to kit to kikown lubbad od boggayan ku to kopiyannan iddos langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
een id aam to onama iddos uripon din no si isas rays woy id popiyod din unna rinit keta no mgo udio su amoy od kotovangan ki nod sondit woyd tanan to morat no pinuungan ta
a laggun tod ooseng pa si edro woy si uan diyot mgo minuvu id poroniyan sikandan to mgo tohodbuwis duma to kopitan to mgo tohodtamong to templo woy ahad iddos mgo aduseo
olingasa ran su id nonaw iddos oruwon apostoles diyon to mgo minuvu no novadnow en si isas woy id ponudtuu ran no idda en kos id posivonnaa no od kovadnow mandad iddos langun nid poomatoy
een id ammot dan si edro woy si uan woy id prisu pa tahad sikandan taman to sollom su od kovulli ron man iddot kodammot kandan
iru ahad iling tadda dos mouraan nokorinog taddot nonaw ni edro mid pomakoy ran
oy iddos kouralloy taddot mgo mama ra no id pomakoy id inguma to mgo limmon maan  
oop no allow id lolivuung diyot erusalem iddos mgo ponguu to udio duma tod pombuyyahon dan woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d lonug kandan si nas no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis si aifas si uan si lejandro woy dos duma pon korumannan ni nas
a id paangoy ran si edro woy si uan woy id piyod diyot isowwan dan amoyd inturan kahi ran to ngkon pomon kos kotuusan dow no nokouli kaayt pungku
ndoy man kos id boggoy koniyu kaayn kotungud
a si edro no noiroomman to his no spiritu mid ikahi to go ponguu woy od pombuyyahon otik iyon dow od inturon konami iddos moppiya nid puungan doy kaayt pungku woy ko momonnu sikandin nouliyan ini kos od kooseng doy koniyu
ikiyu woy dos langun no koubbaran ni srael koilangan nod koovottan dow no inis minuvu nid lohinat kaayt isowwan dow koungkay nouliyan pomon to kotuusan ni isas rays no toho azaret
ikandin kos id pakpak dow riyon to krus piru id badnow sikandin to onama
i isas iddos batu nod ikohiyon diyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ddos batu nid oovoddan to mgo tohodbovaoy idda vos en kos batu no mosalig no pounsaran
aa ossa nod pokotobbus keta oyyos kaay to intirut ingod waa ossa no id popiyod to onama nod tobbus keta ko konna si isas da en
a pomon to waa kodaangaang no kodooseng ni edro woy uan nosoobbuwan iddos mgo ponguu to udio su nosorollan dan man no moobbava ra kos noiskwilan dan woy waa goli nokilaa kos ngaran dan
oy noponulan dan no inis oruwa id dumoruma ki isas
omon to nokita ran no nouliyan don iddos minuvun pungku nid lohinat diyot duug ni edro woy uan worad id pokooseng taddot mgo ponguu
een id poleggua ran pa tahad si edro woy si uan pomon diyot owwet no ukumanan amoy od potongkooy pa sikandan
ahi ran to ndan man kos od puungan ta kaayn mgo minuvu
u nosorollan to langun kaayt erusalem no nokopuung dan to mokososoobbu
een dii ki od pokooseng no konna mooggot iddon notomanan
iru amoy konnod pokosoob inis notomanan od diiyan tad sikandan nod nonaw mokaatag ki isas
een id poumow ran si edro woy si uan woy id loglohottan no dii ron en od ikahi woy od nonaw mokaatag ki isas
iru mid tavak si edro woy si uan kahi ran to odtiitimbanga row veen ko ingkon musing kos ollog diyot kodontong to onama
dda vo sod dumoruma koy taddot koniyun id kopii o iddos id kopiit onama
u atag konami konna koy en od pokosoro nod ponudtuu taddot langun no nokita woy norinog doy pomon ki isas
o norinog idda taddot mgo ponguu id kotasan dan peen si edro woy si uan
iru id sovukan dan dad oyyos waa man ollog no unayan to kodsilut kandan woy novaakkan dos mgo ponguu to mouraan minuvu no mid doong to onama pomon taddot mokososoobbun notomanan
yya su inis minuvu no nouliyan don ukit to mokososoobbun pinuungan lampas don to oppatnopuu kos idad din
a to id sovukan don si edro woy si uan id tollus dan diyot duma ran nod pompomakoy
oy id ponudtuu ran iddos langun nid ikahi taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woyd pombuyyahon to mgo udio
o norinog idda to mgo duma ran id posokaddoy sikandan nid dasaa riyot onama kahi ran to ongaggon no otuus sikkow kos mid bovaa to langit livuta dahat woy ahad iddos langun no nokotaaw kaay
kit to his no spiritu id pooseng du iddos kovuyyahan doy no si avid no uripon du no mid ungketen to ambot oraroy nod kolingasa kos konna mgo udio
ambot od popoomdom dan taddot waa koruanon no mgo puhawang
u iddos mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod woy dos mgo ponguu nolivuung donamoyd supak to onama nod ongaggon woy taddot id aam din no esiyas
onama notuman don iddos id posulat du ki avid oyyos kaay to erusalem nolivuung don onsi arin erodes woy dos gubernador no si oncio ilato
okodsokkad don sikandan duma to langun no udio woy taddot konna mgo udio amoyd supak ki isas no uhis no uripon nid aam du no esiyas
ddos langun no id puungan dan id ikuu taddot tapoyn puhawang du ukit to kikown kotuusan woy id kopii
a koungkay od ongaggon nosorollan du iddos kodkatas dan konami
ovangi koy no mgo uripon du amoy dii koy od aangaang nod nonaw to kikown kahi
okita ru kos kikown kotuusan amoyd kouliyan iddos od pongkovohokan woy puungiyu iddos mgo mokososoobbu ukit to kotuusan to ngaran ni isas no uhis no uripon du
o nopongnga ran don id dasaa nouva iddos baoy nid lolivuungan dan
angun dan id poiroomman to his no spiritu woy to waa kodaangaang id nonaw ran kos kahit onama
a langun tod pompomakoy nosokkad dos poomdom woy ginawa ran
oy waa ahad sokkad kandan no noohoddan taddot koruwonnan dan ko konna inaayun dan od potovangoy
ddos mgo apostoles ponayun dan id posivonnaa mokaatag taddot kodbadnow ki isas nod ongaggon ukit to dakkoon kotuusan no id boggoy kandan
oy id busbus to onama dos kopiyannoy rin diyot langun nod pompomakoy
aa sokkad kandan no nokulangan to koilonganon dan oyyos duwon man duma nod pompomakoy no id boligya to mgo livuta woy baoy ran woy dos bayad tadda id piyod dan diyot mgo apostoles amoy id pomboggoy riyot duwon mgo koilonganon
a iling dad en mandad tadda kos id puungan ni ose no toho ipre no sokkad taddot koubbaran ni evi
d ngoranan sikandin to mgo apostoles ki ernabe no iddos kohulugan tohodinniyat to ginawa
id bovoligya sikandin to livuta woy id piyod din iddos bayad tadda riyot mgo apostoles
a duwon toosawa no id boligya mandad to livuta ran
ddos mama id ngoranan ki nanias woy dos sawa rin si afira
o novoligya ran don idda id piyod ni nanias iddos bayad diyot mgo apostoles piru waa rin id amin id boggoy
oy dos sawa rin nokosaddoo rad tadda
a kahin edro to nanias mambot id aman ka nod poiraom to kotuusan ni oivuyan woy id uhusan du kos his no spiritu
u iddos dumon soopi no id bayad taddot koniyun livuta id ollos dow moho
o waa row pa novoligya iddon livuta koniyu meen idda
oy to novoligya rowd koniyu rad en mandon kos bayad tadda
a mambo moho tid pomuhawang kow nod puung to morat no iling kaay
onna ra sikami kos id uhusan dow ko konna ahad iddos onama
o norinog idda ni nanias idda ron en nopiloy sikandin woy id patoy
a id porani iddos sudduwan no mgo mama woy id bukusan dan iddos minatoy woy id sayung dan poundiyot leggua amoy id lobbong
omon tadda orayn novaakkan iddos langun no nokorinog mokaatag taddon notomanan
a mgo otollun uras pomon tadda id inguma iddos sawa ni nanias piru waa saddoo rin taddon notomanan
id intud si edro kandin kahi rin to onudtuu ka koddi to bonnaa
ni ra veen langun kos bayad taddot livuta row
id tavak si afira to yya ika ra en langun
ahin edro kandin to ambot nokodiling kow no toosawa nod geddam to his no spiritu
ntongngiyu
ka ron to sobbangan kos mid loobbong to sawa ru su id lobbong ka rad en mandad nikandan
a idda ron en nopiloy sikandin diyot isowwan ni edro woy id patoy
o kodusok taddot sudduwan no mgo mama nokita ran no id patoy ron mandad sikandin deen id sayung dan idda poundiyot leggua amoy id lobbong duug taddot sawa rin
a noodoratan iddos langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy woy dos langun no nokorinog taddon notomanan
a mouraa kos mokososoobbun pinuungan to mgo apostoles diyot mgo minuvu
ddos langun nod pompomakoy inaayun od lolivuung diyot alkon ni olomon
had mowwet kos kodontong to mgo minuvu kandan duwon en duma no waa id pongaku nod lonug kandan pomon to allak dan
iru ahad iling tadda ayas peen id mouraa kos id pomakoy diyon tod ongaggon mgo mama woy mgo baay
a pomon to mokososoobbun pinuungan to mgo apostoles id piyod to mgo minuvu iddos od pongkovohokan poundiyot ibpit to doraanon woy id poilogga ran diyot katri woy ikam amoy otid ukit si edro od kovoyan sikandan ahad od kopontokkan dobbot aung din iddos duma
oy id poninguma iddos mouraan minuvu nid pomon diyot mgo bonuwa no nokolingkus to erusalem no id pompiyod mandad tod pongkovohokan woy ahad iddos id ponlosuran to busow nongouliyan dan langun
iru iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy dos langun no duma rin no aduseo orayn nosina taddot mgo apostoles
een id paammot dan iddos mgo apostoles woy id prisu
iru iddon bulli id lukatan to ponolihan tod ongaggon iddos lokkob taddot prisuwan woy id poleggua rin iddos mgo apostoles
oy id ikohiyan din sikandan to ndiyon kow to templo woy ponudtuu row riyot mgo minuvu rutun iddos mokaatag taddot lammin umuu no id pomon diyot ki isas
een id dumoruma iddos mgo apostoles taddot id ikahi to ponolihan
o sollom poron tadda mid undiyon dan to templo woy id nonaw
a idda mandad so mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy dos mgo duma rin id poumow ran iddos langun no ponguu to mgo udio duma taddot od pombuyyahon dan amoyd kolivuung diyot owwet no ukumanan
a id paangoy ran iddos mgo apostoles diyot prisuwan
iru to kodinguma taddot id ponsuhu riyot prisuwan worad dutun iddos mgo apostoles
urisu id poolivod dan diyon to mgo ponguu woy mid ikahi sikandan to o kodinguma roy rutun nokita roy no id ponoggasan tid lokkob iddos prisuwan woy dos langun no tohodtamong dutun dad man id ponloohinat to sobbangan piru to id lukatan doy iddos lokkob worad dutun iddos mgo pinirisu nid paangoy row nanoy konami
o norinog idda to kopitan to mgo tohodtamong to templo woy taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis nongotaong sikandan taddon notomanan to mgo apostoles
a duwon id inguma riyot kandan no mid ikahi to os mgo minuvu no id prisu row diyon don to templo woy mid nonaw to mgo minuvu
dda ron en iddos kopitan to mgo tohodtamong to templo duma taddot mgo minuvu rin id undiyon woy id ammot dan mandon iddos mgo apostoles
iru waa ran posokiti su od kovaakkan dan to mgo minuvu kod ponlumbahon dan to batu
a id piyod dan iddos mgo apostoles diyot isowwan to mgo ponguu to udio woy id sugga sikandan taddot mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
ahi rin to d loglohottan doyd man nanoy sikiyu no diid nonaw mokaatag taddon minuvu
iru ayas dow ra en moho id soob kos nonaw row kaay to intirut erusalem woy iyon dow id kopii no sikami kos od sonditan dow taddot kandin no kopotayan
iru mid tavak si edro woy dos dumon mgo apostoles kahi ran to oilangan no iyon doyd dumannan iddos id kopiit onama konna id kopiit mgo minuvu
os onama to keton kovuyyahan sikandin kos id badnow ki isas nid imotayan dow ukit to kodpakpak diyon to krus
opongnga sikandin novadnow id batun don to onama woy id posivontuhan ukit to kodpounsad diyon lomig to kowanan din su amoy sikandin kos od hari woy od tobbus keta
d puungan din idda amoy siketa no koubbaran ni srael od sondit woy od tanan to mgo saa amoyd koposinsyan
a od posivonnalan doy no inis langun kaay bonnaa en woy id posivonnalan mandad ini to his no spiritu no id boggoy to onama riyot mgo minuvu nid dumoruma kandin
o norinog idda taddot mgo ponguu to udio ayas peen sikandan id langot woy kopii ran nod imotayan iddos mgo apostoles
iru duwon sokkad no ariseo no tohodnonaw to mgo uhu ni oises woy mowwet kos kodontong kandin to langun no minuvu
ddos ngaran din si amaliel
id lohinat sikandin woy id suhu to mgo minuvu nod polegguangon pa tahad iddos mgo apostoles
o nokoleggua ron sikandan mid ikahi si amaliel to go duma ku no koubbaran ni srael ayyadayyad kow tod puungan dow taddon mgo minuvu
u dangan duwon sokkad no minuvu nid ngoranan ki eudas no mid pokita woy id pokilaa nod bontuhon kun sikandin no minuvu woy duwon mgo oppat no gatus no minuvu no sakup din
iru to id imotayan don sikandin iddos langun taddot mgo minuvu rin nokodsuwoysuwoy woy dos pinuungan din nowora
oy riyot timpu no id suhu to gubernador no id polista kos mgo minuvu id loppow si udas no toho alilea
uwon mouraan minuvu no nopiyod din piru id imotayan dad sikandin woy nokodsuwoysuwoy rad en mandad iddos mgo minuvu rin
een koungkay ini kos od osengon ku koniyu
o row monnuwa iddon mgo minuvu woy podtohona row ron sikandan oyya su otik iddos pinuungan dan puhawang da to minuvu konna en idda od pokoponayun
iru ko iddos pinuungan dan puhawang to onama dii kow en od pokoposoro kandan
onna ra idda od pokosupak kow peen to onama
een to norinog taddot mgo ponguu to udio iddos id ikahi ni amaliel id dumoruma sikandan
a id poumow ran iddos mgo apostoles woy id polompossan
opongnga id diiyan dan don sikandan nod nonaw mokaatag ki isas idda pa id sovukan
a id leggua iddos mgo apostoles no duwon dakkoon kahaan su riyot kodontong to onama od pokogaha ran nod tiis to kodpoilow pomon to ngaran ni isas
a ipat allow riyot templo woy riyon mandad to mgo baoy ran id ponayun sikandan nid nonaw woy id ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas no sikandin en iddos esiyas
a iddon timpu to mid enotenot don id mouraa kos od pompomakoy id langot iddos mgo udio no riego kos kinohiyan diyon to mgo udio no ebreo kos kinohiyan
yya su iddos mgo bau no molitan to udio no riego waa novoggayi to allowallow no kokaan dan
een id poumow taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles iddos langun nod pompomakoy
ahi ran to onna moppiya nod tonanan doy iddos kodponudtuu to kahit onama amoyd possi to mgo bau no molitan
een mgo suwod aam kow pomon kaayt koniyu to pittun mama no waa id pokosawoy woy noiroomman to his no spiritu woy moraom kos koovottan oyyos sikandan don kos od tuwossan doy to kotungud taddon pinuungan
oy sikami no mgo apostoles od kahamit doy kos langun no timpu riyot koddasaa woy kodponudtuu to kahit onama
a iddos langun nod pompomakoy nahaa taddon puhawang deen id aam dan si steban no mopompomakoy woy noiroomman to his no spiritu
oy dos duma no id aam dan onsi elipe si rocoro si icanor si imon si armenas woy si icolas no toho ntioquia no konna udio piru nopiyod sikandin to pomokayon to mgo udio
opongnga id poohinat sikandan diyot isowwan to mgo apostoles
a id dasaa iddos mgo apostoles laggun tid torungngan dan to bollad dan iddos uu taddot pittun mama patow no sikandan en kos id tuwossan to kotungud
een ponayun no nokosoob kos kahit onama
d mouraa peen iddos mgo tinodduwan diyot erusalem woy mouraa mandad kos mgo tohodbuwis no id pomakoy ron to oppiyon inoggan
a ini si steban noponnu to eru to onama woy id boggayan din to kotuusan
een mouraa kos mokososoobbu no id puungan din diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu
iru duwon dumon mgo minuvu nod ponapuu to nonaw ni steban
go sakup sikandan to simbaan to mgo udio nod ngoranan no okolegguang omon diyot oduripon
nin mgo udio toho irene toho lejandria woy duwon mandad toho ilicia woy toho sia
iru waa ran en nokogaha to kodapuu ki steban oyya su id boggayan man sikandin to moraom no koovottan pomon to his no spiritu ukit to kodooseng din
een duwon id boyaran dan no mgo minuvu amoyd ooseng to uhus no uvag kun to norinog dan no si steban id sosumpalit ki oises woy riyot onama
omon tadda noukag iddos mgo minuvu dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio woy dos mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
d ammot dan si steban woy id piyod diyot isowwan tod pombuyyahon to mgo udio
a id umow ran kos dumon mgo minuvu amoy od posivonnaa to uhus mokaatag ki steban
ahi ran to kon minuvu inaayun od ooseng to morat no od pokosumpalit kaayt uhis no templo woy ahad taddot mgo uhu ni oises
orinog doy no mid ikahi sikandin no od gobban ni isas no toho azaret inis templo woy od buwassan iddos mgo botasanon no id poikuu ni oises keta
a ayas tongtongngi si steban taddot langun no sakup to mgo tohodhukum no id ponunsad dutun woy nokita ran no iddos bonnong din id seaa iling to bonnong to ponolihan
a iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis mid intud ki steban kahi rin to ooggot bo inis langun no id ponudtuu kaayn mgo minuvu mokaatag kikow
id tavak si steban to go suwod woy od pombuyyahon to mgo udio pominogga row pa inis od osengon ku koniyu
angan to riyon pa to prubinsya to esopotamia iddos keton kovuyyahan no si braham id pokita kandin iddos onama no otuus to angun to waa pa sikandin id alin diyot bonuwa to aran
id ikahi iddos onama ki braham to onaniyu inis ingod du woy dos mgo korumannan du woy undiyon ka to ingod no id pokita ku kikow
een id tanan sikandin diyot ingod to aldea woy id alin nid oubpa riyot aran
o id patoy ron kos amoy rin id paalin mandon sikandin to onama kaayt ingod no id ubpan ta koungkay
ddon timpu waa pa boggayi to onama si braham to livuta ahad songopaad dobbo
iru id tandu to onama no inin livuta id boggoy rin en amoy sikandin kos od pongomunoy woy dos koubbaran din
iru iddon timpu to kodtandu to onama ki braham kaay waa pa anak din
id ikahi iddos onama kandin to os koubbaran du od ubpa riyot konna kandan no ingod woy rutun od uriponnon sikandan woyd ponooyuwon daom to oppat no gatus no lahun
iru od silutan ku en iddos ingod nod uripon kandan
oy kopongnga od polegguangon ku sikandan taddon ingod woy od livod mandon kaayn lugaa amoy dini ran od simba koddi
a id suhu to onama si braham no od tupuwan iddos langun no mama su idda en kos patow taddot tandu rin
een id tupuwan ni braham si saac to ikowaun allow pomon to kodtobbow rin
d tupuwan mandad ni saac si acob woy ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan ni acob taddot sopuuoruwon anak din no keton kovuyyahan
a si ose no sokkad taddot mgo anak ni acob nosina moho kandin iddos mgo suwod din deen id boligya ran sikandin diyot mgo minuvu nod undiyot ingod to hipto amoyd uriponnon
iru id dumannan dad sikandin to onama su id polegguang sikandin pomon taddot langun no kosupittan woy id boggayan mandad sikandin to onama to moraom no koovottan deen orayn nahaa iddos harit hipto kandin
d aam din si ose nod ponguu riyon to intirut hipto woy ahad pa iddos langun no korotuwan to hari noiraom to kandin no kodponguu
a id inguma iddos dakkoon gutas diyon to hipto woy ahad diyot anaan deen orayn nosupittan iddos keton kovuyyahan oyya su worad od koongayan dan to kokaan
iru to norinoggan ni acob no duwon kokaan diyot hipto id poundiyon din iddos mgo anak din no keton kovuyyahan amoyd bovolli to kokaan
dda en kos unnon kodundiyon dan to hipto
a riyot ikooruwon kodundiyon dan id pokilaa ron si ose riyot mgo suwod din woy id posaddoo rin mandad diyot hari iddos mokaatag to mgo korumannan din
a id paangoy ni ose iddos amoy rin no si acob duma taddot langun no korumannan din woy dos kouralloy ran pittumpuu limma langun
een id undiyon si acob to hipto duma iddos keton kovuyyahan woy riyon dan id ponubpa woy rutun dan en mandad id poomatoy
iru iddos mgo bangkoy ran id piyod dad diyot bonuwa to iquem no sakup to ingod to anaan su riyon id lobbong to lovongngan no id bolli dangan ni braham pomon diyot mgo anak ni amor
o asow ron iddos timpu nod puungan to onama iddos tandu rin ki braham ayas peen id mouraa kos koubbaran taddot keton kovuyyahan diyot hipto
a id inguma kos allow no duwon id suvaa no hari riyot hipto no waa sinorollan mokaatag ki ose
d okalan taddon hari iddos keton kovuyyahan woy ayas din sikandan id posupittan woy id pohos din sikandan nod tanan taddot mgo anak dan no lammi pa id tobbow amoyd poomatoy
o idda en mandad no timpu id tobbow si oises no anak no orayn motoos diyot kodontong to onama
a id tuhanuu sikandin to inoy woy amoy rin diyot baoy ran daom to otollun buwan
o nopohos don sikandan nod tanan ki oises diyot leggua nokita sikandin to baay no anak to hari
d onnat din idda woy id uyag din iling to kandin don en no anak
a id nonawwan sikandin to langun no sinorollan to mgo toho hipto
oy novantug sikandin pomon to kotuihan to kodooseng woy pinuungan din
o oppatnopuun lahun don si oises nokopuhawang sikandin nod lowwi to iling din no koubbaran ni srael
o kodinguma rin dutun nokita rin iddos iling din no lubbad ni srael no id ayuayu taddot sokkad no toho hipto
een id ponovangan din idda woy id imotayan din iddos toho hipto
unan ni oises kod koovottan to iling din no tribu no ukit kandin od polegguangon sikandan to onama pomon diyot koduripon piru waa ran bos nokaabbot
oop no allow nokita ni oises iddos oruwon koubbaran ni srael no id poimotayoy
d porani sikandin amoyd gollangon woyd poduliyon din nanoy
ahi rin to go suwod mambot od poimotayoy kow moho no tooruma kow man
iru iddos minuvun id ayuayu tat duma rin id osikoy rin da en baling si oises woy id ikohiyan din to h ondoy ka man nod ponguu woy od hukum konami
ndan id kopii ru ayu nod imatoy koddi iling taddot id puungan du taddot toho hipto govoni
o norinog idda ni oises id paahuy sikandin woy id oubpa ron diyot ingod to idian no konna kandin no ingod
a dutun don sikandin nokoosawa woy riyon en mandad id tobbow iddos oruwon anak din no mama
o id lihad kos oppatnopuun lahun duwon ponolihan to onama no mid pokita ki oises diyot id loglog no sopinit laggun to riyon pa sikandin to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no moranit uvungan to inai
rayn nosoobbuwan si oises taddot nokita rin deen id poroniyan din iddos sopinit amoyd ontongngan din
iru to riyon don sikandin to morani norinog din kos bawos tod ongaggon no mid ungketen to iyak kos onama to kovuyyahan du no onsi braham si saac woy si acob
o norinog idda ni oises id pongookoo sikandin to mattag allak din woy dii sikandin od pokogaha nod tongtong tadda
a mid ikahi iddos onama kandin to usutow kos sandalyas du su uhis no lugaa inis id lohinatan du
okita ku iddos mopet no notomanan to koddin mgo minuvu no id uripon diyot hipto
oy norinog ku iddos kodnganoy ran deen id undini a su od polegguangon ku sikandan pomon diyot koduripon
a undini kad su sikkow kos id popiyod ku riyot hipto
a si oises en kos id elleyan taddot iling din no koubbaran ni srael no id ponooseng to h ondoy ka man nod ponguu woy od hukum konami
iru sikandin en kos id aam to onama nod ponguu woy od polegguang kandan pomon diyot koduripon ukit to kodtavang taddot ponolihan no id pokita kandin diyot id loglog no sopinit
i oises en kos id ponguu taddot keton kovuyyahan to kodleggua pomon diyot hipto
ouraa kos mokososoobbun pinuungan din dutun ahad diyot kodukit dan to oollutun ahat woy riyon mandad to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa daom to oppatnopuun lahun
oy sikandin en kos id oseng diyot keton kovuyyahan no mid ungketen to d popiyod kos onama to propeta nod pomon da en dinit keta iling dad en to kodpopiyod din koddi kaayt koniyu
i oises en kos duma to keton kovuyyahan iddot nolivuung pa sikandan diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
oy sikandin en kos id tongko taddot ponolihan diyot uvungan to inai woy sikandin kos id tanggap taddot kahit onama no od pokovoggoy to umuu amoy id boggoy mandad keta
iru waa id dumoruma ki oises iddos keton kovuyyahan ko konna id elleyan dan da en baling sikandin su iyon od nongkapon to ginawa ran iddos kodlivod diyot hipto
a laggun to riyon pa si oises to uvungan to inai id oseng iddos mgo minuvu ki aron no kakoy ni oises kahi ran to ovaa kad moho to mgo monama nod ponguu keta
u ini si oises nid piyod keta pomon diyot hipto waa tad nosorolli ko ondan don kos notomanan din
een id bovaa ran don to konna bonnaan monama no iddos boyo iling to natit baka
opongnga id buwisan dan idda woy id pista ran oyya su nahaa ran taddot id bovallan dan
iru pomon taddot id puungan dan id inoyyuhan sikandan to onama
d podtohon din sikandan nod simba to mgo bituon diyot datas to langit su ini en kos id sulat taddot mgo propeta no mid ungketen to ikiyu no koubbaran ni srael to riyon kow pa to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa daom to oppatnopuun lahun id bovuwis kow to mgo oyama row piru konna atag koddi
yon dow od piipiyoddon iddos tolda nod simbaanan dow to konna bonnaan monama row no si oloc woyiddos konna bonnaan monama row no si epan no binovallan pomot boyo to bituon
ni en kos unayan no id paammot woyid popiyod ku sikiyu riyot lugaa no lomig pa riyot ingod to abilonia
angan to riyon pa to nokaawoyawoy no lugaa iddos keton kovuyyahan id piyod sikandan to tolda no simbaanan
dda en kos patow taddot tandu to onama no inaayun en sikandin od duma kandan
d bovallan dan iddon tolda ukit to ikulan no id pokita to onama riyot ki oises
o notanggap taddot koubbaran dan iddos tolda id piyod dan idda to kodundini ran timpu to kodponguu ni osue no nokosuvaa ki oises
u id popaawa to onama iddos mgo minuvu no id ponoubpa kaayn livuta su amoy idda en so keton kovuyyahan kos od pokokomunoy tadda
ddon tolda dutun poron to iddon lugaa taman to timpu no id hari si avid
a id buyu ni avid diyot onama no od poohinat sikandin to notooo no baoy atag to onama amoy diyon od simba iddos koubbaran ni acob
iru ahad id kahaai si avid to onama waa en sikandin omani ko konna si olomon no anak din kos id poohinat tadda
iru iddos onama no ampas to angun dii en sikandin od oubpa riyot mgo baoy no binovallan da to mgo minuvu
yyos duwon id sulat taddot sokkad no propeta no mid ungketen to ddos langit kos unsaran ku to kodhariwoy dos livuta kos od unturan to paa ku
een konnod kopakoy nod poohinat kow to baoy nod oubpan ku woykonna en mandad od kopakoy nod poohinat kow tod imooyyan ku
yyos siyak en kos id bovaa to langit woylivuta ahad iddos langun no nokotaaw kaay
a ponayun mid ikahi si steban to ikiyu mgo motoggas kos uu row woy nokoiling kow to mgo minuvu no waa sinorollan to kahit onama su od povovongoo kow to kahi rin
aa en moho od suwayan dow to koniyun kovuyyahan no inaayun od supak to his no spiritu
aa en ahad sokkad taddot mgo propeta no waa posuppiti taddot kovuyyahan dow
yya su id ponimotayan dan iddos langun no propeta nid nonaw mokaatag to kodundini taddot otallong no uripon din no si isas
oy sikiyu en kos id boligya kandin diyot od pongkuntra kandin woy id imotayan dow peen sikandin
oy sikiyu iddos nokotanggap taddot mgo uhu to onama ukit to mgo ponolihan piru waa kow id tuman tadda
a to norinog taddot sakup to mgo tohodhukum iddon mgo osengan ni steban id pongongitoo sikandan to mattag langot dan
iru si steban no noiroomman to his no spiritu id langngag diyot datas to langit
okita rin iddos seaa to kotuusan to onama no orayn mosella woy nokita rin mandad si isas no id lohinat diyon lomig to kowanan to onama
ahin steban to ntongngi row
okita ku iddos langit no nopokesan woy dos nak to inuvu no id lohinat lomig to kowanan to onama
o norinog dan idda id pomehes sikandan woy id sosabpong to tolinga ran amoy diid pokorinog taddot osengan ni steban
oy idda ron en id porongnganoy ran nid dubpu kandin
a id goyod dan sikandin poundiyot leggua to bonuwa woy rutun id ponlumbahan dan sikandin to batu
oy idda mandad so mgo minuvu no id posivonnaa to uhus mokaatag ki steban id ponlousut to umpak dan no mowwet so bollad amoy moomok kandan nod lumbag to batu
oy id potomongngan dan iddon umpak to sokkad no sudduwan nod ngoranan ki aulo
aggun tid ponlumbahan dan si steban to batu id dasaa sikandin no mid ungketen to isas nod ongaggon tonggapow inis gimukud ku
a id lingkood sikandin woy id oseng to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ongaggon yo ru sikandan sukuti kaayt saa ran
o nokooseng da en si steban tadda novudtus kos songnga rin
a id lobbong si steban to mgo minuvu no mopompomakoy to onama woy oraroy ran id pondaawit taddot kopotayan din
iru si aulo nahaa taddot kodimatoy ki steban
omon taddot allow to kodpatoy rin id tigkanoy kos dakkoon kodposuppit tod pompomakoy riyot erusalem
dda en kos unayan no iddos langun nod pompomakoy nokodsuwoysuwoy riyot mgo prubinsya to udea woy riyot amaria
iru iddos mgo apostoles waa id tanan dutun
a ayas id posupittan ni aulo iddos od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
d ipan din ponusokki iddos mgo baoy woy id ammot din iddos mgo mama ahad iddos mgo baay woy id poprisu
a iddos od pompomakoy no nokodsuwoysuwoy id ponudtuu ran iddos kahit onama riyot ahad ingkon no lugaa nod koingumannan dan
okkad kandan si elipe
id undiyon sikandin to bonuwa to amaria woy id ponudtuu rin iddos mokaatag to esiyas
o norinog taddot mouraan minuvu iddos ponudtulon din woy to nokita ran iddos mgo mokososoobbu nid puungan din id ooyyaran dan sikandin tid pominog
yyos duwon mgo minuvu no id losuran to mgo busow no nouliyan
d pomomehes to monokkaa iddos mgo busow laggun to id ponleggua riyot id ponlosuran dan
ouraa mandad kos mgo minuvu no id patoy kos lawa woy ahad iddos mgo pungku no nouliyan don
een orayn nahaa iddos mgo minuvu riyot amaria
o idda ra en no bonuwa duwon sokkad no minuvu no od kotuig nod madyik no id ngoranan ki imon
oy nouhoy ron orayd kosoobbuwan iddos langun no toho amaria pomon to kandin no kotuihan
d pobporoong sikandin no duwon kotuusan din
angun to worowora woyd koruwonnan to iddon bonuwa od pominoggon dan sikandin
ahi ran to addook sikandin en iddos duwon kotuusan to onama no id ngoranan to akkoon otuusan
dda en kos unayan no oraroy sikandin od pominoggon taddot mgo toho amaria su nouhoy ron no timpu no id kosoobbui ran sikandin taddot kodmadyik din
iru to id inguma si elipe no mid ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to kodharit onama woy mokaatag ki isas rays id pomakoy sikandan woy id poboutismu ron iddos mgo mama woy mgo baay
a ahad si imon id pomakoy woy id poboutismu ron mandad deen inaayun don sikandin id dumoruma ki elipe ahad ingkon
oy nosoobbuwan sikandin taddot nokita rin no mokososoobbun pinuungan ni elipe
o norinog to mgo apostoles diyot erusalem no id pomakoy ron to kahit onama iddos mgo toho amaria id poundiyon dan si edro woy si uan
o kodinguma ran dutun id dasaa ran atag tod pompomakoy amoyd kotanggap dan iddos his no spiritu
yyos waa ran poron notanggap iddos his no spiritu to noboutismuwan sikandan ukit da to ngaran ni isas rays nod ongaggon
a id torungngan onni edro woy uan to bollad dan iddos uu taddot od pompomakoy woy idda ron en notanggap dan iddos his no spiritu
o nokita ni imon no nokotanggap don to his no spiritu iddos od pompomakoy ukit to kodtoddung to mgo apostoles to bollad dan diyot uu ran od boggayan din nanoy to soopi si edro woy si uan
ahi rin to oggayi a ruwon no kotuusan su amoy iddos ahad ondoy nod kotorungngan to koddin bollad diyot ampow to uu ran od pokotanggap mandad to his no spiritu
iru mid tavak si edro to d pokosahap ka nanoy duma ikos kikown soopi riyon to linowt apuy su kunan du kod kovolli ru kos kotuusan no id boggoy to onama
aa lavut du kaayt id popuungan to onama konami oyya su ikos poomdom du konna motallong diyot kodontong to onama
een sondit ka woy tanan kad to morat no puhawang du woy dasaa ka riyon tod ongaggon su saddook od posinsyan din pa kos morat no ingowollon du
u nosorollan ku no oraroy ka en no nosina woy nouripon ka to saa
a kahin imon kandan to asaa kow riyon tod ongaggon atag koddi amoy konna ku od kosahapan iddos id ikahi row
o nopongnga id posivonnaa woy id ponudtuu to kahi tod ongaggon si edro woy si uan diyot bonuwa to amaria id livod sikandan diyot erusalem
a id ponudtuu ran iddos oppiyon inoggan diyot mouraan bariyu no nongovoyan dan no sakup to amaria
a duwon ponolihan tod ongaggon no id pokita ki elipe woy id ikohiyan sikandin to orava ka koungkay woy ikuu ka to daan no pomon diyot erusalem poundiyon to aza
ddon daan konna oraroy od kovoyan urisu mid ipanow si elipe
o riyon pa sikandin to daan nokita rin iddos sokkad no minuvu no toho tiopia nod uli ron pomon to kodsimba riyot erusalem
ddon minuvu sinolihan sikandin to ayna to tiopia nod ngoranan no andace woy mowwet kos kotundanan din su tohodtamong man sikandin to langun no korotuwan taddot ayna
aggun tid sakoy sikandin to kolisa rin id basa rin iddos libru ni propeta saias
a iddos his no spiritu mid ikahi ki elipe to outow iddos kolisa woy daag ka tadda
een id lupug ni elipe iddos kolisa woy to nosoutan din don idda norinog din no id basa taddot sinolihan iddos libru ni propeta saias
a mid intud si elipe kandin kahi rin to oovottan du vo kos id basa ru
id tavak iddos sinolihan to aa en oyyos waa man od paabbotlabbot koddi
a id posakoy rin si elipe riyot kolisa woy id pounsad diyot duug din
ddos nokotaaw taddot id basa rin diyot osulat no ahit onama mid ungketen to okoiling sikandin to karnero no od tuyukon amoyd sumboliyon woy nokoiling mandad sikandin to natit karnero no diid pomehes laggun tod bongulan su od tivunok sikandin
d poilawan sikandin woy konna ollog kos kodhukum kandin
ora od pokooituu mokaatag to koubbaran din oyya su id poobbavan da man iddos umuu rin kaay to ampowt ingod
a mid ikahi iddos sinolihan diyot ki elipe to onudtuu ru koddi ko ondoy inis minuvu nod tommanon ni saias kaayt id sulat din
okaatag bo ini to kougolingun din o riyot ossa
omon dad en diyon tid basa rin id paabbotlabbot ni elipe kandin iddos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas
odtahad id inguma ran diyot lugaa no duwon oweg
ahi taddot sinolihan diyot ki elipe to a duwon man oweg ikoi
opakoy vo nod boutismuwan a nikkow
id tavak si elipe to tik mooggot kos kopomakoy ru ki isas rays no waa kodduworuwa kopakoy nod boutismuwan ka
ahi taddot sinolihan to d pomakoy a en no si isas rays kos nak to onama a id posoro taddot sinolihan kos kolisa woy id ponog dan nid undiyot oweg woy id boutismuwan sikandin ni elipe
o id goun dan don pomon diyot oweg tigkow ron no nowora si elipe su id piyod don to his no spiritu
orad sikandin nokita taddot sinolihan piru id ponayun don sikandin nid uli duma to dakkoon kahaan
a si elipe nokotaud to riyon don sikandin to bonuwa to soto
oy id ponudtuu rin iddos oppiyon inoggan diyot langun no bonuwa no id boyan din taman tid inguma sikandin diyot esarea
a iddon timpu id ayas peen iddos lingasa ni aulo taddot od pompomakoy tod ongaggon woy id kotasan din sikandan nod imotayan
d undiyon sikandin to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis amoy od buyu to mgo sulat diyot mgo ponguu to simbaan to udio no riyot amasco
ddon mgo sulat id boggoy kandin to kotungud nod ammot to ahad ondoy nod kokita rin nod ikuu taddot nonaw mokaatag ki isas mama man o baay woy od piyoddon din diyot erusalem amoyd prisuwon
a to od poundiyon don si aulo to amasco woy asow ron sikandin od inguma tigkow duwon seaa pomon diyot datas to langit no nokotaddow kandin
opiloy sikandin woy duwon bawos no norinog din no mid ungketen to aulo aulo mambot id posupittan a nikkow
id ikahi si aulo to ir ondoy ka man
d tavak iddos bawos no mid ungketen to iyak si isas no id posupittan du
a lohinat ka woy ponayun ka undiyon taddon bonuwa su rutun duwon od ponudtuu kikow ko ondak od puungan du
ddos mgo duma ni aulo nokoloohinat da en to mattag allak dan su nokorinog sikandan piru waa ran man nokita ko ondoy iddos id ooseng
a mid lohinat si aulo piru to kodgimollat din dii ron sikandin od pokokita
een id pikit dobbo sikandin taddot mgo duma rin taman diyot amasco
aom to otollun allow dii sikandin od pokokita woy waa sikandin id kaan ahad id inom
a riyot amasco duwon sokkad no tinodduwan ni isas nod ngoranan ki nanias
d pokita iddos od ongaggon kandin woy mid ikahi to nanias
d tavak si nanias to ongaggon ini a rad
ahi tod ongaggon to ndiyon ka to daan nod ngoranan no otullid woy ointud ka riyot baoy ni udas mokaatag taddot minuvu no toho arso no id ngoranan ki aulo
ni en no timpu id dasaa sikandin dutun woy id pokita ku kandin iddos iling to tohenoppon no od usok ka riyot id ubpan din woy id taaw ru kos bollad du riyot mata rin amoyd pokokita mandon sikandin
iru kahin nanias to ongaggon duwon mouraan nokoponudtuu koddi mokaatag taddon minuvu woy dos langun no morat no pinuungan din diyot mgo minuvu ru nid oubpa riyot erusalem
oy koungkay dini ron kun sikandin to amasco no id boggayan to kotungud to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis amoyd omotton koy langun no id simba kikow
iru kahi tod ongaggon ki nanias to ndiyon kad su sikandin en kos id aam ku amoyd nonaw mokaatag koddi riyot konna mgo udio diyot mgo hari ran woy riyot koubbaran ni srael
oy id pokita ku kandin no koilangan nod pokoukit sikandin to mouraan koosayan atag da en koddi
een id undiyonnan ni nanias iddos baoy no riyon en si aulo
oy to kodusok din dutun id taaw rin kos bollad din diyot mata ni aulo woy kahi rin to uwod ku no aulo iddos od ongaggon no si isas no id pokita kikow riyot daan to kodundini ru sikandin en kos id popiyod koddi kaayt kikow amoyd pokokita ka mandon woy od koiroomman ka to his no spiritu
dda ron en duwon nouug no immat mgo onnii pomon diyot mata ni aulo woy nokokita ron mandon sikandin
a id lohinat sikandin woy id poboutismu
opongnga idda id kaan sikandin woy id livod don iddos konokkaa rin
a daom to pilon allow id oubpa pa si aulo riyot amasco duma tod pompomakoy
id undiyon sikandin to mgo simbaan to udio woy id ponudtuu rin iddos mokaatag ki isas no sikandin en kos nak to onama
a iddos langun no nokorinog kandin nosoobbuwan woy id pointuroy kahi ran to onna vo ika meen no minuvu kos id posuppit taddot id pomakoy ki isas diyot erusalem
addook idda en kos dontulon din to kodundini amoyd omotton kos od pompomakoy woyd piyoddon din diyot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis
iru iddos komonitoy to kodponudtuu ni aulo to kahit onama id ayas peen woy orayn oggot kos kodposivonnaa rin no si isas en kos esiyas
urisu iddos mgo udio no id ponoubpa riyot amasco waa nokotavak kandin
o nouhoyn timpu no id oubpa sikandin dutun nosokkad kos puhawang to mgo udio nod imotayan si aulo
llow bulli id oyanan dan si aulo riyot mgo sobbangan taddon bonuwa amoyd imotayan otid kokita ran sikandin
iru duwon nokoponudtuu ki aulo mokaatag taddon puhawang
een sokkad no bulli id lasud dan si aulo riyot dakkoon bukag woy id tuntun taddot mgo tinodduwan din diyot divauy to motikang no aavat no nokolingkus tat bonuwa
a mid undiyon si aulo to erusalem woy to kodinguma rin dutun id kopii rin nanoy nod lonug tod pompomakoy
iru waa ran id pongimbonnaa no id pomakoy ron sikandin deen langun dan novaakkan kandin
iru id tovangan sikandin ni ernabe ukit to kodpiyod kandin diyot mgo apostoles woy id paabbotlabbot din kandan iddos kodpokita tod ongaggon ki aulo woy dos kodoseng kandin to riyon pa sikandin to daan
d ituu mandad ni ernabe kandan no riyot amasco waa kodaangaang ni aulo to kodponudtuu mokaatag ki isas
een pomon tadda duma ron si aulo taddot od pompomakoy ahad ingkon no lugaa riyot erusalem woy waa kodaangaang din nod ponudtuu mokaatag ki isas nod ongaggon
a id pabbotlabbot ni aulo taddot mgo udio no riego kos kinohiyan iddos mokaatag ki isas woy id tavak din iddos kodapuu ran
iru id ponlangot da en sikandan woy id pomuhawang nod imatoy kandin
o nosorollan taddot mgo suwod to kopomakoy iddon puhawang id piyod dan sikandin diyot bonuwa to esarea woy id popouli ran diyot arso
a iddon timpu id soro ron iddos kodposuppit tod pompomakoy riyot langun no lugaa no sakup to udea alilea woy riyot amaria
naayun sikandan id tovangan to his no spiritu woy idda en kos unayan no mosalig kos kopomakoy ran
iyot kandan no koubpa id posivontuhan dan kos od ongaggon duma to allak
oy ukit mandad to tavang to his no spiritu id timuu peen iddos kouralloy ran
a si edro id undiyonnan din iddos nokodossoosson lugaa amoyd lowwi to mgo minuvu to onama
okkad nid undiyonnan din iddos bonuwa to ida
utun nokita rin iddos minuvu nod ngoranan ki neas
aom don to waun lahun id patoy kos lawa rin woy diid pokoonnow pomon taddot bohok din
a kahin edro kandin to neas id bowiyan kad ni isas rays
ohinat kad woy luunow kos ikam du
dda ron en mid lohinat si neas
okita taddot langun no id ubpa riyot ida woy aron no nouliyan don sikandin deen id pomakoy sikandan tod ongaggon
a riyot bonuwa to ope duwon sokkad nod pompomakoy nod ngoranan ki abita
iyot riego no kinohiyan orcas kos ngaran din no iddos kohulugan saarong ouraa kos moppiyon nopuungan din woy kodtavang to mgo worowora
ddon timpu novohokan sikandin woy idda en kos unayan to kopotayan din
a ukit to kodikuu to botasanon to mgo udio id dihus dan iddos minatoy woy id popooyyas dan diyot datas no kwartu
nis bonuwa to ope morani ra pomon diyot ida
een to norinog taddot od pompomakoy no toho ope no riyon si edro to ida id posugkawan dan sikandin to oruwon minuvu amoy goos od undiyon to ope
urisu id duma si edro taddot oruwon minuvu
o kodinguma ran dutun id piyod dan si edro riyot datas no kwartu no id pooyyasan taddot minatoy
a iddos langun no baayn bau id porani kandin no posidsinoggow woy id pokita ran ki edro iddos mgo tinobbilan ni orcas no mgo umpak to nouyag pa sikandin
ahin edro kandan to eggua kow pobbo sinahaw
o sokkad din dobbo riyot daom mid lingkood sikandin woy id dasaa
opongnga id isau sikandin diyot minatoy kahi rin to abita onnow kad
dda ron en id gimollat iddos molitan woy id unsad to nokita rin si edro
d somaddan ni edro dos bollad din woy id tovangan din nod lohinat
a id umow rin iddos mgo baayn bau woy dos dumon od pompomakoy woy id pokita rin kandan si orcas no nouyag don
okosoob diyon to intirut bonuwa to ope iddos dinoggan mokaatag taddon notomanan
omon tadda mouraa kos id pomakoy tod ongaggon
a si edro nouhoy id oubpa riyot bonuwa to ope riyot baoy ni imon no tohodtina to kindaat oyama
a riyot bonuwa to esarea duwon sokkad no minuvu nod ngoranan ki ornelio
opitan sikandin to mgo sundau nod ngoranan to atalyon to talia
nin minuvu morumoruma woy duwon allak to onama woy ungketen dad en iddos langun no sakup din diyot kandin no baoy
ovoggoyvoggoy sikandin to mgo udio no worowora woy morasaarasaa
okkad no allow to mgo alas tres to mapun duwon ponolihan to onama no id pokita kandin woy mid ikahi to ornelio
a id totongtong sikandin taddot ponolihan duma to dakkoon allak woy kahi rin to ir ondan man
id tavak dos ponolihan to orinog to onama iddos mgo dosalon du woy nahaa sikandin taddot kodtavang du to mgo worowora deen dii ka nikandin od kolingawan
oungkay poundiyonnow kos mgo minuvu ru to ope amoyd angoy ki imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro
iyon sikandin tahad id oubpa to baoy ni imon no tohodtina to kindaat oyama
ddos ubpan din diyon lomig to ibpit to dahat
o id tanan don iddos ponolihan id umow ni ornelio dos oruwa taddot sudsuhuwon din woy dos sokkad nod kosolihan no sundau no duwon mandad allak to onama
d ponudtuu rin kandan iddos langun no notomanan woy nopongnga id poundiyon din sikandan to bonuwa to ope
oop no allow to asow ron od inguma iddos id poundiyon ni ornelio to ope si edro mandad id penek diyot pattad no atop to baoy amoyd dasaa
ddon timpu mokountud don kos allow
odtahad id gutasan don sikandin woy od kopiyan don nanoy nod kaan piru laggun tod oilutu pa iddos mgo duma rin duwon id pokita to onama kandin
a nokita rin no nopokesan kos langit woy duwon id tuntun diyot morani rin no immat kesay no mowwag no id pinidbagkos dos tapad ibpit
iyot daom tadda nokotaaw dos langun no nokodossoosson monnanap dos od pomonanap woy duwon mandad mgo manuk nod layanglayang
a duwon bawos no norinog din no mid ungketen to edro lohinat ka woy sosumbali ka amoyd pokokaan ka
iru kahin edro to h ongaggon konna a
u pomon poron to koonakoy ku waa a en nokokaan to ahad ondan no molibmit no id diiyan diyot pomokayon doy no mgo udio
id ungketen mandon iddos bawos to o ru osenga no molibmit iddos id podlinis don to onama
ootollu ulita iddos nokita woy norinog ni edro woy nopongnga id polivod idda riyot datas to langit
aggun tod popoomdom si edro to kohulugan taddot id pokita kandin to onama to idda ra en mandad no timpu notuntulan don iddos baoy ni imon taddot mgo minuvu no id suhu ni ornelio woy riyon dan don to sobbangan
a id ponguras dan woy id ointud kahi ran to aay vo id oubpa si imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro
aggun tid popoomdom pa si edro to kohulugan taddot id pokita kandin to onama mid ikahi iddos his no spiritu kandin to uwon otollun minuvu nid nonangkap kikow
onog ka woy yo kod kaaangaang nod duma kandan oyyos siyak kos id poundini kandan
urisu id ponog si edro woy mid ikahi riyot mgo minuvu to iyak kos od nongkapon dow
a ondan man kos dontulon dow koddi
id tavak sikandan to d poundini koy ni ornelio no kopitan to mgo sundau
otallong sikandin woy duwon allak to onama woy mowwet kos kodontong to langun no udio kandin
a duwon ponolihan to onama nid ponudtuu kandin no od poundiyonnon ka to baoy rin su od pominog sikandin tod osengon du
a id paallus ni edro iddos mgo minuvu woy riyon dan don en noomaggi
o soop no allow id duma ron si edro kandan woy id dumannan mandad sikandin to dumon suwod diyon to kopomakoy no toho ope
a id inguma sikandan diyot esarea nopongnga iddos sokkad no allow no kodipanow
i ornelio mandad id aangat kandan duma taddot mgo korumannan woy mgo oukuy rin no id lolivuung diyot baoy rin
