o riyon don si edro to sobbangan id tommu kandin si ornelio woy mid lingkood no id ounduk diyot isowwan din
iru id poohinat sikandin ni edro woy id ikohiyan din to h konna
o kod lingkood kaayt isowwan ku su minuvu a ra mandad
a id potongkooy ran nid usok diyot daom woy rutun nokita ni edro iddos mouraan minuvu nid lolivuung
ahi rin kandan to okosaddoo kowd man no riyot konamin pomokayon no mgo udio id diiyan koy nod lommung ahad od lowwi ra to konna mgo udio
iru id pokita to onama koddi no konna ollog nod podlibmiton iddos ahad ondoy no minuvu
een to id paangoy a nikiyu waa ad en mid aangaang nid undini
a koungkay ponudtuu row koddi iddos unayan to kodpoumow row koddi
id tavak si ornelio to ddot otollun allow ron nid lihad id dasaa a rinit baoy ku to iling dad en kaayn uras to alas tres to mapun
a tigkow ron duwon minuvu nid lohinat diyot isowwan ku no orayn mosella kos umpak
oy kahi rin to ornelio norinog to onama iddos mgo dosalon du woy dii rin od kolingawan dos pinuungan du nod tavang to mgo worowora
aangoy ru riyot ope iddos sokkad no minuvu nod ngoranan ki imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro
d oubpa sikandin diyot ubpan ni imon no tohodtina to kindaat oyama woy dos ubpan din diyon lomig to ibpit to dahat
een id paangoy ku sikkow goos woy solamat su mid undini ka en
d lolivuung koy langun kaayt isowwan to onama amoyd pominog to langun nid poikahi tod ongaggon kikow
a kahin edro kandan to oungkay nosorollan kud no waa en minuvu nod podmusingon to onama
yya su iddos ahad ondoy no minuvu nid pomon to ahad ingkon no ingod no duwon allak kandin woyd puung to motallong od tonggapon din en
osorollan dowd iddos oppiyon inoggan no id popiyod to onama riyot koubbaran ni srael no duwon moppiyon koroniyan to mgo minuvu riyot kandin ukit ki isas rays nod ongaggon to langun
osorollan dowd mandad iddos notomanan no id tigkanoy riyot alilea woy riyot langun no ingod to koubbaran ni srael nopongnga iddos kodnonaw ni uan mokaatag to boutismu
osorollan dowd mandad no id aam to onama si isas no toho azaret woy id boggayan to his no spiritu woy kotuusan
d soob sikandin nid puung to moppiya woy id tovangan din iddos langun nid posupittan ni oivuyan oyyos id dumannan man sikandin to onama
d pokoposivonnaa koy taddot langun no pinuungan ni isas diyot erusalem woy riyot dumon ingod to mgo udio
d imotayan dan sikandin ukit to kodpakpak diyon to krus
iru id badnow sikandin to onama riyot ikootollun allow woy id pokita rin konami no nouyag sikandin
aa sikandin id pokita riyot langun no minuvu ko konna diyon da en to konami su id aam koy man to onama nod posivonnaa atag kandin
yya su laggun to kaay pa si isas noruma roy pa sikandin nid kaan nopongnga iddos kodbadnow
d suhu koy nikandin nod ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan woy od posivonnalan doy no sikandin en iddos id aam to onama nod hukum to langun no minuvu no nouyag woy dos id poomatoy ron
ddos langun no propeta id posivonnaa mokaatag ki isas
d ikahi ran no iddos ahad ondoy nod pomakoy kandin od posinsyan kos mgo saa ran
a laggun tid oseng pa si edro noiroomman to his no spiritu iddos langun nid pominog kandin
ddos od pompomakoy no mgo udio no toho ope nid duma ki edro nosoobbuwan oyya su ahad iddos konna mgo udio noiroomman don mandad to his no spiritu
u iddos kovonnaan tadda norinog dan no nokoooseng onsi ornelio to mgo kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi woy id doong dan kos onama
a kahin edro riyot mgo duma rin to nis mgo minuvu no konna mgo udio nokotanggap to his no spiritu iling mandad keta no mgo udio
aa minuvu nod pokobaavag nod boutismuwan sikandan ukit to oweg
urisu id poboutismuwan ni edro onsi ornelio ukit to ngaran ni isas rays
opongnga sikandan boutismui id owiran dan si edro nod oubpa pa to pilon allow riyot kandan
a iddos mgo apostoles woy dos mgo duma ran nod pompomakoy riyot prubinsya to udea norinoggan dan no iddos konna mgo udio id pomakoy ron mandad to kahit onama
o id livod si edro riyot erusalem iddos od pompomakoy no mgo udio no orayd ikuu to mgo botasanon dan id sawoy kandin
ahi ran to ambo moho tid undiyon ka to konna mgo udio no waa pontupui woy mid kaan ka duma kandan
een id amin ni edro tid ituu kandan iddos langun no notomanan pomon to tigkonayan
ahi rin to aggun tid dasaa a to riyon a pa to bonuwa to ope duwon id pokita to onama koddi
okita ku iddos immat kesay no mowwag no id pinidbagkos dos tapad ibpit woy id tuntun idda pomon diyot datas to langit taman diyot morani ku
o id ontongngan ku idda nokita ku no duwon nokotaaw no mgo oyama mgo monnanap to puwaason dos od pomonanap woy duwon mandad mgo manuk nod layanglayang
oy duwon bawos no norinog ku no mid ungketen to edro lohinat ka woy sosumbali ka amoyd pokokaan ka
iru kahi ku to h ongaggon konna a
u pomon poron to koonakoy ku waa a en nokokaan to ahad ondan no molibmit no id diiyan diyot konamin botasanon
a norinog kud mandon iddos bawos no id pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to o ru osenga no molibmit iddos id podlinis don to onama
ootollu ulita iddos nokita woy norinog ku woy nopongnga id polivod mandon idda riyot datas to langit
a idda ra en mandad no timpu duwon otollun minuvu no id pomon diyot esarea no nokoinguma riyot id ubpan ku amoyd angoy koddi
d osengan a to his no spiritu no konna a od aangaang nod duma kandan
nis annom no suwod ta no toho ope mid duma mandad koddi
o nokoinguma koyd diyot esarea id usok koy riyot baoy ni ornelio
d ituu ni ornelio konami no duwon ponolihan to onama no id pokita kandin diyot baoy rin
d ikohiyan si ornelio taddot ponolihan to uhu ka to mgo minuvu ru nod undiyon to ope amoyd angoy ki imon no id ngoranan mandad ki edro
uwon ponudtulon din no ukit tadda od kotobbus ka woy ahad iddos langun no sakup du kaayt kikown ubpan
o id tigkanoy a pa nod oseng noiroomman don sikandan to his no spiritu iling taddot siketa no mgo udio iddot unna
a nosompottan ku iddos id ikahi ni isas nod ongaggon no i uan oweg kos id boutismu rin to mgo minuvu piru pilon allow pomon koungkay his no spiritu kos id boutismu koniyu
een otik id boggayan man sikandan to onama to his no spiritu iling taddot id boggoy rin keta iddot timpu nid pomakoy kid ki isas rays nod ongaggon na ondoy a man nod baavag to onama
o norinog dan iddos id ikahi ni edro worad sikandan id sawoy ko konna id doong dan iddos onama
ahi ran to a ko ungketen ahad iddos konna mgo udio no id sondit woyd tanan to mgo saa ran id posinsyan mandad sikandan to onama woy id boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
a iddot timpu no id imotayan si steban id posupittan iddos langun nod pompomakoy deen nokodsuwoysuwoy sikandan diyot nokodossoosson lugaa
ddos duma nokoinguma riyot prubinsya to enicia riyot isla to ipre woy riyot bonuwa to ntioquia
a ahad ingkon dan od pokoinguma id ponudtuu ran iddos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays piru riyon da to mgo udio
uwon mandad duma nod pompomakoy no toho ipre woy toho irene no id undiyon to bonuwa to ntioquia amoyd ponudtuu riyot konna mgo udio to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays nod ongaggon
ddos kotuusan to onama kos id tavang kandan deen orayn mouraan minuvu riyot ntioquia no id pomakoy woy id salig don tod ongaggon
o norinog idda tod pompomakoy riyot erusalem id poundiyon dan si ernabe
a to kodinguma rin diyot ntioquia nokita rin iddos kopiyannoy to onama riyot kandan
urisu oraroy sikandin no nahaa woy id inniyat din sikandan no od ponoyunon iddos mosalig no kopomakoy ran tod ongaggon diyot tivuk no ginawa ran
ni si ernabe moppiyon minuvu noiroomman to his no spiritu woy mosalig kos kopomakoy rin
een mouraa no toho ntioquia kos id pomakoy riyon tod ongaggon
a id undiyon si ernabe to bonuwa to arso amoyd nangkap taddot id oubpan ni aulo
o notuntulan din don si aulo id duma rin sikandin nid livod poundiyon to ntioquia
aom to sokkad no lahun id oubpa sikandan dutun duma tod pompomakoy woy mouraa kos id nonawwan dan
oy dos od pompomakoy riyot ntioquia sikandan kos unnon id ngoranan no ristuhanun
ddon timpu duwon mgo propeta nid inguma riyot ntioquia no id pomon diyot erusalem
a iddos sokkad kandan no id ngoranan ki gabo id lohinat woy ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu id ponudtuu rin no duwon dakkoon gutas nod inguma riyon to intirut ingod
nin timpu to gutas notomanan laggun to si laudio pa kos hari to oma een nokodsokkad iddos od pompomakoy riyot ntioquia nod boggoy to tavang atag to mgo suwod to kopomakoy riyot udea
os ipat sokkad kandan id boggoy ko ondan kos od kogaha ran
a idda en kos id puungan dan woy id popiyod dan iddos kandan no tavang diyot od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy riyot erusalem ukit ki ernabe woy ki aulo
a iddon timpu id tigkanoy si arin erodes to kodposuppit to dumon od pompomakoy
d potompoddan din to liyog si antiago no suwod ni uan
o nosorollan din no id kahaai to mgo udio iddos id puungan din id paammot din mandon si edro
a inin notomanan nokosasang to pista to aan no aa otuvu
o naammot don si edro id poprisu woy id potomongngan din to sopuuannom no sundau no tinggoppat no id posuusuvaloy nid tamong kandin
yyos duwon puhawang ni erodes nod hukuman si edro riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu kopongnga iddos pista to odlihad to onolihan
aggun to noprisu si edro idda mandad so od lolivuung nod pompomakoy waa soroan nod dasaa atag kandin
a iddon bulli to waa pa hukumi ni erodes si edro id tinuhon sikandin no nokoollot to oruwon sundau
d baku sikandin to oruwon kodina woy duwon peen mgo sundau nid tamong diyot sobbangan to prisuwan
igkow ron id loppow kos sokkad no ponolihan tod ongaggon woy noompon to seaa kos daom to prisuwan
d sukaa taddot ponolihan si edro woy mid ikahi sikandin to oos ka onnow
dda ron en nongoakas kos kodina riyot bollad ni edro
ahi taddot ponolihan to umpak kad woy sukub du kos sandalyas du
a id puungan ni edro iddos id ikahi to ponolihan
id ikahi mandon iddos ponolihan to ukub du kos umpak du no mowwet so bollad woy tinundug ka koddi
urisu id tinundug si edro kandin no id leggua pomon diyot prisuwan piru waa saddoo rin ko bonnaa vo iddon notomanan su kunan din ko tohenoppon da idda
a id lihad sikandan diyot unnon sundau nid tamong woy riyot ikooruwa
o id inguma ran don diyot sobbangan no putow nod isau lomig diyot bonuwa noukatan bos idda ahad waa id lukat taddot lokkob
oy id leggua ran don no mid baya riyot sokkad no daan woy dos ponolihan tigkow no nowora
a nokotanud don si edro no konna vos tohenoppon da iddos notomanan din
ahi rin to oungkay nokosaddoo ad no bonnaa vos en no id popiyod tod ongaggon iddos kandin no ponolihan amoyd polegguang koddi pomon diyot bollad ni erodes woy amoy iddos morat no id kopii to mgo udio nod kopuungan kaayt koddi konna en od kotuman
o nopokes don kos poomdom ni edro id undiyon sikandin to baoy ni aria no inoy ni uan nod ngoranan mandad ki arcos
a rutun duwon mouraan od pompomakoy no id lolivuung amoyd dasaa
o kodinguma ni edro id ponguras sikandin woy id ponoktok diyot sobbangan
a si oda no sudsuhuwon no mongovay id ponog amoyd ontongngan ko ondoy idda
o nokilaa rin no bawos idda ni edro oray sikandin no nahaa deen worad diyot poomdom din no od lukatan kos lokkob su id poolivod baling nid lukutlukut diyot daom amoyd posaddoo taddot mgo duma rin
ahi rin to i edro iddot leggua
iru iyon id oseng dan kandin kahi ran to e od busawon ka ayu
iru mid ikahi peen sikandin to ooggot en no sikandin idda
een mid tavak sikandan to addoo ayu ko ponolihan din idda
iru si edro ponayun poron nid ponoktok
a to id lukatan dan don idda oraroy ran no nosoobbuwan oyya su nokita ran no mooggot bos en no duwon si edro
iyot kodusok din id sinyasan din sikandan nod poonongonong woy id ituu rin ko monnu sikandin id poleggua tod ongaggon pomon diyot prisuwan
ahi rin to onudtuu row ki antiago iddos mokaatag kaay woy dos dumon mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
opongnga id ipanow ron sikandin woy id undiyon to osson lugaa
o nosollom don nongoukag iddos mgo sundau no id tamong diyot prisuwan su worad diyon si edro woy waa ran nosorolli ko ingkon don sikandin
d ponangkap ni erodes sikandin piru waa ran en nokita
een id intudinturan din iddos mgo sundau no id tamong diyot prisuwan woy pomon to waa en id pokotavak dan id poimotayan din sikandan
a id undiyon si erodes to bonuwa to esarea pomon diyot prubinsya to udea woy riyon pa sikandin tahad id oubpa
aggun tid oubpa si arin erodes dutun tapoy ron no duwon dakkoon langot din to mgo minuvu no toho iro woy idon
een id posokaddoy iddon mgo minuvu nod porani kandin piru unna ran pa id oukuy si lasto no sinolihan to polasyu
a id porumannoy ran poundiyon to hari su amoy od poerueru nod kaawa ron kos langot din kandan oyya su iddos od solihan dan to kouyahan to kandan no ingod diyon od pomon to udea no lugaa taddot hari
o id inguma ron iddos allow no id tandu ni arin erodes amoy od kolivuung dan diyot kandin id oumpak sikandin to umpak to hari woy mid unsad sikandin diyot unsaran to hari woy id ooseng sikandin diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu
a nopongnga iddos osengan din id doong kandin iddos mgo minuvu ukit to monokkaa no kodooseng no mid ungketen to onna ini bawos to minuvu ko konna bawos to monama
dda ron en id silutan si arin erodes taddot ponolihan tod ongaggon ukit to bohok su id tanggap din iddos koddoong to mgo minuvu woy waa rin id polivod iddos bantug diyot onama
een id tagkoy sikandin woy id patoy
iru iddos kahit onama ponayun nid soob deen notimulan peen iddos kouralloy tod pompomakoy
a si ernabe woy si aulo id uli ran don diyot bonuwa to ntioquia to nopongnga ron iddos pinuungan dan diyot erusalem
d duma ran si uan no id ngoranan mandad ki arcos
a diyot id lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot bonuwa to ntioquia duwon mgo propeta woy mgo tohodnonaw
ikandan onsi ernabe si imon no iddos angga rin etom si ucio no toho irene si aulo woy si anaen no id dakkoo riyot baoy ni erodes no gubernador amoy id pooukuy kandin to anak pa sikandan
okkad no allow laggun tid puasa ran woy id simba riyon tod ongaggon mid ikahi iddos his no spiritu kandan to ssaa row si ernabe woy si aulo oyyos duwon od popuungan ku kandan
o nopongnga ran mid puasa woy id dasaa id torungngan dan to bollad dan iddos uu ni ernabe woy aulo woy id pologkiyat don sikandan
a si ernabe woy si aulo no id popiyod to his no spiritu id potupang diyot bonuwa to eleucia
omon dutun id sakoy ran to bollangay poundiyot isla to ipre
o nokorunggu ran diyot bonuwa to alamina no sakup to ipre id nonaw ran to kahit onama riyot mgo simbaan to udio
d duma ran si uan no id ngoranan mandad ki arcos amoyd tavang kandan
a id undiyon dan to dumon mgo lugaa no sakup to ipre taman to nokoinguma ran diyot bonuwa to apos
utun notommu ran iddos sokkad no udio nod ngoranan ki aresus no sokkad no tohodmadyik woy id pouvaguvag no propeta
ukuy sikandin to gubernador taddon isla no id ngoranan ki ergio aulo no mowwet kos sinorollan
d poumow rin si ernabe woy si aulo su od kopiyan sikandin nod pominog to kahit onama
iru id supak kandan iddos tohodmadyik no si limas
ni en kos ngaran ni aresus diyot riego no kinohiyan
d nangkap sikandin to poukit nod baavag taddot gubernador amoy diid pomakoy ki isas
a si aulo no id ngoranan mandad ki ablo no noiroomman to his no spiritu ayas id totongtong taddot tohodmadyik woy id ikohiyan din sikandin to nak ka ni oivuyan woy kuntra ka to langun no moppiya
oponnu ka to uhus woy kororattan
ambot inaayun du od polinuhuson iddos mooggot no kahi tod ongaggon
oungkay od silutan ka nikandin su od kovutud ka no ahad iddos seaa to allow dii ru od kokita to mouhoyn timpu
a idda ron en id mosukirom kos kodontong ni limas woy id ponamsam dobbo sikandin to minuvu nod pokopikit kandin
o nokita taddot gubernador iddos notomanan ni limas id pomakoy sikandin ki isas woy oray sikandin no nosoobbuwan taddot nonaw mokaatag tod ongaggon
a si ablo woy dos mgo duma rin mid sakoy to bollangay pomon diyot apos amoy od undiyot bonuwa to erga no sakup to prubinsya to amfilia
iru to kodinguma ran dutun id tanan kandan si uan nid ngoranan mandad ki arcos woy id uli riyot erusalem
omon diyot erga id allus si ablo woy si ernabe riyot ntioquia no sakup to prubinsya to isidia
a riyon to llowt odimolloy id undiyon dan to simbaan to mgo udio woy mid unsad dutun
a rutun duwon id basa to mgo uhu ni oises woy dos id sulat to mgo propeta
opongnga id poosengan onsi ablo taddot mgo ponguu to simbaan to mgo udio
ahi ran to go suwod otik duwon id nonaw row nod pokoinniyat kaayt mgo minuvu na osenga rowd meen
een mid lohinat si ablo woy id sinyas amoyd poonongonong iddos mgo minuvu woy mid ikahi sikandin to go duma ku no koubbaran ni srael woy sikiyu mandad no konna mgo udio no duwon allak to onama pominog kow
okosaddoo ki no iddos onama kos id aam to keton kovuyyahan no koubbaran ni srael
aggun tid oubpa pa sikandan diyot hipto no konna ran ingod dos onama id tavang kandan woy id mouraa ran
kit to kotuusan din id polegguang din sikandan pomon diyot hipto
o kodipanow ran diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa daom to oppatnopuun lahun id poowwet to onama kos posinsya rin ahad waa ran id dumoruma to kandin no kahi
opongnga idda id pohobba rin iddos pittun kohoriyan diyot ingod to anaan woy id boggoy rin iddon livuta riyot kovuyyahan ta amoy sikandan kos od pongomunoy
go oppat no gatus woy limmompuun lahun iddos kouhayyoy to kodoubpa to keton kovuyyahan diyot hipto idda ran pa nokomunoy iddon livuta
opongnga mid aam kos onama to mgo tohodhukum nod ponguu kandan taman to timpu ni amuel no propeta
a id buyu sikandan diyot onama to hari nod ponguu kandan
een id aam din si aul no anak ni is no sokkad taddot koubbaran ni enjamin
d hari si aul kandan daom to oppatnopuun lahun
o id popaawa sikandin to onama id posuvaa rin si avid nod hari kandan
a ini kos id posivonnaa to onama mokaatag ki avid kahi rin to i avid no anak ni sai nokita ku no morumoruma sikandin to langun nid kopii ku deen oraroy ku sikandin id kahaai
a pomon taddot koubbaran ni avid id popiyod to onama si isas dinit keta no koubbaran ni srael amoy od tobbus keta oyyos sikandin en kos id tandu rin
o waa pa mid inguma si isas si uan no ohodboutismu id ponudtuu ron diyot langun no toho srael no koilangan nod sondit woy od tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran woyd poboutismu
o asow ron od kopongnga iddos pinuungan no id boggoy to onama ki uan mid ikahi sikandin diyot mgo minuvu to d popoomdom kow ayu no siyak don en kos esiyas
iru konna su duwon od tundug koddi no ahad iddos kodlusut da to sandalyas din konna a en ollog
go duma ku no koubbaran ni braham woy sikiyu no konna mgo udio no duwon allak to onama siketa en kos id popiyoddan to onama to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to kodtobbus
u iddos id ponoubpa riyot erusalem woy dos kandan no mgo ponguu waa ran kilaanna no si isas kos ohodtobbus
oy waa ran mandad nokaabbot taddot id sulat to mgo propeta nod bosan dan diyon to ipat llowt odimolloy
iru ukit to kodsilut dan ki isas to kopotayan notuman iddos nosulat to mgo propeta
had waa ollog no unayan no nokita ran nod silutan si isas to kopotayan piru id buyu ran da en ki ilato nod imotayan sikandin
opongnga ran nopuungi iddos langun nid sulat to mgo propeta mokaatag ki isas id angoy tod pompomakoy iddos bangkoy rin pomon diyon to krus amoy id lobbong
iru id badnow sikandin to onama
oy daom to mouraan allow id pokita sikandin taddot id pondumoruma kandin pomon diyot prubinsya to alilea taman diyot erusalem
a sikandan don en koungkay kos id posivonnaa mokaatag kandin diyot mgo duma ta no koubbaran ni srael
dda en kos unayan no id undini koy amoyd ponudtuu koniyu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag taddot id tandu to onama riyot keton kovuyyahan
ddon tandu notuman don dinit keta no koubbaran dan ukit to kodbadnow to onama ki isas
yya su duwon id posulat to onama riyot ikooruwon kopitulu to almo no mid ungketen to ikkow en kos nak ku woy koungkay id pokita ku no siyak kos moy ru
a duwon mandad id tandu to onama mokaatag taddot kodbadnow rin ki isas no diid koobbuu kos lawa rin kahi rin to d boggoy ku koniyu iddos mgo kopiyannan no id tandu ku ki avid woy od kotuman en idda
uwon pa mandad id posulat to onama ki avid diyot almo no mid ungketen to ii ka od aman nod koobbuu kos lawa to uhis no uripon du
yya su nosorollan ta no iddot timpu ni avid nopongnga rin puungi iddos dontulon to onama kandin id patoy woy id lobbong sikandin diyot id lovongngan taddot kovuyyahan din woy noobbuu en kos lawa rin
iru si isas waa en noobbuu kos lawa rin su id badnow sikandin to onama
urisu mgo suwod koilangan nod kosorollan dow inis id ponudtuu roy koniyu no ukit ki isas rays od posinsyan to onama kos mgo saa ta
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod pomakoy ki isas motallong sikandin diyot kodontong to onama
iru waa ahad sokkad keta nod komotallong diyot kodontong din ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises
een ayyadayyad kow no konna row od kosaharan iddos id ikahi to onama no id posulat din to mgo propeta no mid ungketen to omotawi row sikiyu no mosuusumpalit
uwon od puungan ku ruwot koniyu no oraroy row id kosoobbui
oy od poomatoy kow en su konna kow man od pongimbonnaa nod kotuman idda ahad pa duwon od paabbotlabbot koniyu
a to nopongnga id oseng si ablo woy si ernabe id leggua ran don diyot simbaan to mgo udio woy id ikohiyan sikandan to mgo minuvu nod livod mandon init soop no llowt odimolloy amoyd paabbotlabbot peen taddot id ikahi ran
opongnga iddos kolivuungan id tinundug kandan dos mouraan udio woy ahad iddos konna mgo udio no nopiyod tod pomokayon to mgo udio
d inniyat sikandan onni ablo nod ponayun to kodsalig to tavang to onama
o soop don mandon no llowt odimolloy kourallan taddot mgo minuvu riyot bonuwa to ntioquia id lolivuung diyot simbaan to mgo udio amoyd pominog to kahit onama
iru to nokita to mgo udio iddos mouraan minuvu oraroy ran no nosina
een id supak dan iddos osengan ni ablo woy id sumpalit dan peen sikandin
iru si ablo woy si ernabe waa kodaangaang dan nod tavak kahi ran to oilangan no unna en id ponudtuu riyot koniyu iddos kahit onama
iru pomon to id elleyan dow ini id pokita row no konna kow ollog nod tanggap to umuun waad tomanon
een od undiyon koyd baling to konna mgo udio
u ini en kos id suhu tod ongaggon konami no id posulat din
ahi rin to d taaw ku sikkow iling to suu nod pokotaddow riyot konna mgo udio amoy ukit kikow od koowangan kos poomdom to langun no minuvu kaay to intirut ingod ko momonnu ran od kotobbus
a to norinog idda taddot konna mgo udio oraroy ran no nahaa woy id doong dan kos kahit onama
oy id pomakoy ki isas rays iddos langun no id aam to onama nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
urisu iddos kahit onama mokaatag tod ongaggon nokosoob diyot langun no lugaa no sakup taddon lugaa
iru id sutsutan to mgo udio iddos ponguu riyot ntioquia woy dos mgo boi no duwon allak to onama amoyd posupittan dan si ablo woy si ernabe woy od poowan dan diyot kandan no lugaa
iru to waa pa sikandan mid tanan id pomadpad dan kos boubbuk to livuta riyot paa ran patow no iddos mgo minuvu rutun kuntra ron to onama oyyos waa ran man id pomakoy to kahi rin
opongnga idda id tollus dan poundiyot bonuwa to conio
a iddos od pompomakoy riyot ntioquia noponnu to kahaan woy noiroomman to his no spiritu
a riyon mandad to bonuwa to conio id undiyon si ablo woy si ernabe to simbaan to mgo udio amoyd nonaw to kahit onama
omon to orayn id uddok dos nonaw riyot pusung taddot id pompominog mouraan udio woy konna udio no id pomakoy ki isas
iru iddos mgo udio no waa id pomakoy id sutsutan dan iddos konna mgo udio amoyd koiluwan kos poomdom dan mokaatag taddot od pompomakoy
had ungketen nouhoyn timpu id oubpa si ablo woy si ernabe rutun no waa kodaangaang nod ponayun to kodponudtuu mokaatag tod ongaggon
oy id posivonnalan tod ongaggon no bonnaa en iddos ponudtulon mokaatag to eru rin su id boggayan din man sikandan to kotuusan to kodpuung to mokososoobbu
iru iddos mgo minuvu riyot conio nongovaad sikandan su iddos duma id poomig diyot mgo udio woy idda mandad so duma diyon to mgo apostoles
a iddos konna mgo udio woy dos mgo udio duma to mgo ponguu ran id pomuhawang dan nod posokitan woy od lumbahon to batu si ablo woy si ernabe taman tod patoy
iru to nosorollan idda to mgo apostoles id paahuy ran poundiyot mgo bonuwa to istra woy riyot erbe no sakup to prubinsya to icaonia woy riyot mgo lugaa no morani tadda
oy rutun id ponayun dan nid ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
a riyot istra duwon sokkad no minuvu no pungku no dii en od pokoipanow pomon poron to kodtobbow rin
aggun tid pominog sikandin taddot osengan ni ablo id tongtongngan sikandin ni ablo woy nokita rin no duwon kopomakoy tat pungku nod kouliyan
een id oseng si ablo to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ohinat ka
a idda ron en id lohinat woy id umbottut iddos pungku woy nokoipanow ron
o nokita to mouraan minuvu iddos id puungan ni ablo id ponooseng dan to monokkaa riyot kandan no kinohiyan no icaonia kahi ran to h id ponog dinit keta iddos mgo monama no novauyn minuvu
urisu id ngoranan dan onsi ablo taddot ngaran to mgo monama ran
i ernabe id ngoranan dan ki eus woy si ablo id ngoranan dan mandad ki ermes oyyos ablo man kos timbang bivig
iyot morani to bonuwa to istra duwon simbaan to monama ran no si eus
a iddos tohodbuwis taddon simbaan id inguma riyot sobbangan taddon bonuwa
d totuyuk sikandin to mgo turu no baka no id boliyoggan to bulak oyya su kopii rin duma taddot mgo minuvu rutun no id buwis idda taddot oruwon apostoles
iru to nokosaddoo si ernabe woy si ablo taddot od puungan to mgo minuvu id bendas dan kos kandan no umpak amoyd pokita no waa ran nahaa tadda
oy id lungkossu ran poundiyot mgo minuvu woy id oseng to monokkaa no mid ungketen to go suwod mambot id puungan dow ini su mgo minuvu koy ra man mandad iling koniyu
d undini koy amoyd ponudtuu koniyu to oppiyon inoggan su amoy od tanan kowd taddot waa koruanon no mgo monama woy od porani kow taddot maantoyn onama no mid bovaa to langit livuta dahat woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay
angan id podtohon da to onama iddos langun no konna mgo udio nod puung to ahad ondan nid kopii ran
iru ahad ungketen inaayun din id pokita kos kopiyannoy rin amoyd posivonnaa keta no duwon en onama
yya su id boggayan kow nikandin to uran woy moppiyon bunga to mgo pinomuwa riyot ollog no timpu amoy duwon kouyahan woy kahaan dow
had iling tadda kos id ikahi onni ablo noosayan dan peen nid tohoo taddot mgo minuvu nod buwis atag kandan
a duwon mgo udio nid inguma pomon diyot conio woy riyot ntioquia no sakup to isidia
d sutsutan dan iddos mgo minuvu nod poomig kandan
oy pomon tadda id ponlumbahan dan si ablo to batu woy id goyod dan poundiyot leggua to sobbangan taddon bonuwa su kunan dan ko id patoy ron sikandin
iru todtahad to nokolingkus kandin iddos od pompomakoy id onnow sikandin su duwon don tanud din woy nopongnga id livod sikandin diyot istra
oop no allow id undiyon sikandin woy si ernabe to bonuwa to erbe
a riyot erbe id ponudtuu onni ablo iddos oppiyon inoggan woy mouraa kos id pomakoy ki isas
opongnga idda id livod dan diyon to istra conio woy riyot ntioquia no sakup to isidia
iyon to ipat bonuwa nod undiyonnan dan id ponokkaa ran iddos od pompomakoy woy id inniyat dan nod ponayun diyot kopomakoy
ahi ran to oilangan nod pokoukit ki to mouraan kosupittan idda pa od pokolonug ki riyon to kodharit onama
a riyon to ipat lugaa no duwon id lolivuung nod pompomakoy mid aam si ablo woy si ernabe to od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy
uma to koddasaa woy kodpuasa id salig dan sikandan diyon tod ongaggon no id solihan dan
opongnga idda id poolivod dan no mid baya riyot prubinsya to isidia taman to nokoinguma ran diyot prubinsya to amfilia
oy id ponudtuu ran iddos kahit onama riyot bonuwa to erga no sakup to amfilia
a id potupang dan poundiyot bonuwa to talia
omon dutun id sakoy ran to bollangay woy mid livod mandon sikandan diyot ntioquia no sakup to iria
u riyon en no lugaa id tigkanoy kos kandan no pinuungan woy riyon en id dasaa iddos od pompomakoy no iddos onama od tavang ongki ablo riyot pinuungan dan no koungkay nopongnga ran don
o id dunggu ran don diyot ntioquia id livuung dan iddos od pompomakoy woy id ituu ran iddos langun no id puungan to onama ukit kandan woy dos kodboggoy rin to daan nod pomakoy mandad iddos konna mgo udio
a rutun id oubpa pa sikandan to nouhoyn timpu duma tod pompomakoy
a duwon mgo udio nod pompomakoy no pomon diyot prubinsya to udea no id ponundiyot bonuwa to ntioquia woy id nonawwan dan iddos od pompomakoy no konna mgo udio
ahi ran to tik dii kow od potupu iling taddot botasanon no id nonaw ni oises dii kow en od kotobbus
iru iddon nonaw ayas id apuu ni ablo woy ernabe
een iddos od pompomakoy riyot ntioquia id aam ongki ablo woy taddot duma nod pompomakoy no od undiyon to erusalem amoyd potongkooy to mgo apostoles woy taddot od pombuyyahon dan mokaatag taddon nonaw
een id pologkiyat sikandan taddot od lolivuung nod pompomakoy
d tuuy ran diyot prubinsya to enicia woy riyot amaria amoyd ponudtuu ran no mouraa kos konna mgo udio no id pomakoy ron to onama
ddon ponudtulon orayn nokopahaa taddot mgo suwod to kopomakoy rutun
a to kodinguma ran diyot erusalem nahaa nid tommu kandan iddos od pompomakoy dos od pombuyyahon dan woy dos mgo apostoles
oy id ituu onni ablo iddos langun no id puungan to onama ukit kandan
iru duwon od pompomakoy no sakup to mgo ariseo no id lohinat woy mid ikahi to oilangan en nod potupu kos konna mgo udio woy od tuman to mgo uhu ni oises
urisu iddos mgo apostoles woy dos od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy id polivuungoy amoyd unsaran iddon opulanan
o mowwet don iddos kandan no kodpoopuloy id lohinat si edro woy mid ikahi to go suwod nokosaddoo kowd no id aam a dangan to onama pomon kaayt keta amoyd ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot konna mgo udio su amoy od pokorinog sikandan woyd pomakoy
ddos onama no nokosaddoo ko ondan kos diyot ginawa to mgo minuvu id pokita no id tanggap din mandad iddos konna mgo udio ukit to kodboggoy kandan to his no spiritu iling taddot id puungan din keta
d pokita to onama no siketa no mgo udio woy sikandan no konna mgo udio waa id podmusing din oyya su ukit to kopomakoy ran id posinsyan din sikandan iling taddot kodposinsya rin keta
een mambo man tod poongotton dow kos onama su id povoggatan dow iddos od pompomakoy ukit to nonaw row no koilangan nod ikuu ran to mgo botasanon ta
u ahad siketa woy dos keton kovuyyahan waa en nokogaha nid tuman tadda
oomdomma row no id pomakoy ki nod kotobbus ki ukit to eru tod ongaggon no si isas rays woy ungketen dad en mandad iddos konna mgo udio
a nopongnga dos osengan ni edro id poonongonong da iddos mgo minuvu amoyd pominog ki ernabe woy ki ablo
d ponudtuu ran iddos mokaatag to langun no mokososoobbun id puungan to onama ukit kandan diyot konna mgo udio
o nokopongnga ran don id ooseng mid ikahi si antiago to go suwod pominogga row inis od osengon ku
oituu ron gena ni edro iddos unnon kodpokita to onama to ginawa rin diyot konna mgo udio ukit to kodaam din to mgo minuvu pomon diyot kandan su amoy od kovovallan sikandan no mgo minuvu rin
ni en iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama ukit to mgo propeta no mid ungketen to opongnga kaay od livod a woy od poohinaton ku mandon iddos kohoriyan ni avid no iling to baoy no nohobba
d upiyannan ku iddos nongorattan woy od poohinaton ku en mandon idda amoy iddos langun no konna mgo udio no id aam ku od kovovallan no mgo minuvu ku
ni en kos id ikahi tod ongaggon no id posaddoo rin pomon poron dangan
a ponayun mid ikahi si antiago to een diyot koddin poomdom konna ta od povoggatan iddos konna mgo udio nid pomakoy ron to onama
yon moppiya od sulatan ta sikandan no dii ran od kaan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama woy dii ran od laayuk to konna ran sawa woy dii od kaan to monnanap no nopollong oyyos waa nokoleggua kos longossa woy dii ran mandad od kaan to longossa
een moppiya no od tuman dan kaay amoy diid kolibmit kos mgo udio kandan
yyos pomon poron dangan id nonaw ron inin mgo uhu ni oises ipat llowt odimolloy riyot mgo simbaan to udio riyon to ipat bonuwa
a iddos mgo apostoles woy dos od pombuyyahon ahad iddos langun no nolivuung nod pompomakoy rutun id pomuhawang sikandan nod aam to mgo duma ran no id poruma ki ablo woy ki ernabe nod undiyon to ntioquia
a iddos naaam si ilas woy si udas no id ngoranan mandad ki arsabas
nin mgo minuvu mowwet kos kodontong kandan to mgo suwod diyot kopomakoy
a id piyod dan iddos sulat no iling kaay kos nokotaaw
tag tod pompomakoy no konna mgo udio no mid oubpa ruwot ntioquia riyot prubinsya to iria woy riyot ilicia
ikami no mgo suwod dow to kopomakoy dos mgo apostoles woy dos od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy kaayt erusalem od intud koniyu ko momonnu kow rad duwon
orinoggan doy no duwon kun mgo udio no pomon dinit konami no nokopoukag duwot koniyu ukit to id nonaw ran no konna ollog woy idda en kos nokotaong koniyu
iru waa roy sikandan suhuwa
een nosokaddan to puhawang doy nod aam to od pounduwonnon to koniyu
oy od duma ron sikandan taddot id ginowannan ta no si ernabe woy si ablo no id buwis to umuu ran ahad pa riyot kopotayan atag to pinuungan tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
urisu id pounduwon doy si udas woy si ilas amoy od paabbotlabbot kaayt nokotaaw to sulat doy koniyu
kit to kodpomandu to his no spiritu nokodsokkad koy no dii roy en sikiyu od povoggatan ukit to kodikuu taddot duma pon mgo botasanon doy
yon da koilangan nod tumanon dow ini en so yo kow en od kaan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama yo kow od kaan to monnanap no nopollong oyyos waa nokoleggua kos longossa woy yo kow mandad od kaan to longossa woy yo kow od laayuk to konna row sawa
tid olihuwan dow ini langun moppiya kos id puungan dow
a kaay ra en taman kos sulat doy
een id pologkiyat don iddos id ponsuhu poundiyot ntioquia woy to kodinguma ran dutun id livuung dan iddos langun nod pompomakoy woy id boggoy ran iddon sulat
o kodbasa ran tadda oraroy ran no nahaa taddot mokoinniyat no mgo pomandu
a si udas woy si ilas no mgo propeta mouraa kos id nonaw ran amoyd inniyat woy od tavang nod mosalig kos kopomakoy to mgo suwod
opongnga ran id oubpa riyot ntioquia to pilon simana id pologkiyat sikandan to mgo suwod to kopomakoy rutun
o waa ran pa id ipanow id dosalan pa sikandan taddot od pompomakoy no iddos onama od boggoy to moppiyon iponawon dan to kodlivod diyot id ponsuhu kandan
iru si ablo si ernabe woy si ilas id polintotuwos pa riyot ntioquia
a duma to mouraan od pompomakoy rutun id nonaw woy id paabbotlabbot dan iddos kahi tod ongaggon
a waa nouhoy pomon tadda mid ikahi si ablo ki ernabe to d lowwiyon ta iddos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no riyon to ipat bonuwa no noponudtulan tad to kahi tod ongaggon
d ontongngan ta ko momonnu ron sikandan dutun
d aman si ernabe tadda woy id kopii rin nod porumannon si uan no id ngoranan mandad ki arcos
iru si ablo dii rin id kopii nod porumannon iddos minuvu no id tanan kandan laggun to riyon dan to prubinsya to amfilia oyyos waa sikandin id ponayun nid tavang to pinuungan dan
omon tadda duwon dakkoon kodpoopuloy ran deen id posuwayoy ran
a id duma ni ernabe si arcos woy id sakoy ran to bollangay poundiyot isla to ipre
i ablo mandad id poruma rin si ilas
o waa pa sikandan id ipanow id dasaa iddos od pompomakoy no iddos od ongaggon od tavang diyot kandan no iponawon
d tuuyan onni ablo iddos nokodossoosson bonuwa riyot prubinsya to iria woy ilicia amoyd ohotton kos kopomakoy taddot id lolivuung nod pompomakoy rutun
a ponayun si ablo woy si ilas to iponawon dan poundiyot bonuwa to erbe woy riyot istra
uwon sokkad nod pompomakoy riyot istra no id ngoranan ki imoteo
udio iddos inoy rin no od pomakoy mandad piru riego iddos amoy rin
ddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy no toho istra woy conio id doong ki imoteo no moppiya sikandin no minuvu
d kopii ni ablo nod dumannon si imoteo deen id potupuwan din sikandin amoy diid kosawoy to dumon mgo udio riyot mgo lugaa nod ponundiyonnan dan
yya su iddos langun no udio no id ponubpa rutun nokosaddoo no riego iddos amoy rin
a riyon to ipat bonuwa nod undiyonnan dan id paabbotlabbot dan tod pompomakoy iddos mgo suhu no nosokaddan to puhawang taddot mgo apostoles woy taddot od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy riyot erusalem
d ikohiyan dan no koilangan en nod tumanon dan idda
een id mosalig peen kos kopomakoy taddot nongolivuung nod pompomakoy woy ipat allow od kotimulan kos kouralloy ran
a diyon dan id baya to prubinsya to rigia woy riyot alacia oyyos waa man id aman kandan iddos his no spiritu no od ponudtuu ran to kahit onama riyot prubinsya to sia
o morani ron sikandan diyot prubinsya to isia od suwoy nanoy sikandan poundiyot prubinsya to itinia piru waad aman iddos spiritu no id pomon ki isas
een id ukit dan baling diyot prubinsya to isia woy id potupang dan poundiyot bonuwa to roas
a iddon bulli duwon id pokita to onama ki ablo
okita rin iddos sokkad no minuvu no toho acedonia no mid lohinat woy id poerueru kandin kahi rin to llus ka rinit acedonia woy tovangi koy
opongnga idda id panoypanoy koyd nod undiyon to acedonia su noheddam doy no id umow koy en to onama amoyd ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot kandan
a pomon diyot roas id logkiyat koy nid sakoy to bollangay woy id tollus koy poundiyot isla to amotrasia
oop no allow nokoinguma koy riyot bonuwa to eapolis
omon diyot eapolis id logkiyat koy mandon poundiyot ilipos
ovantug inin bonuwa riyot prubinsya to acedonia
go toho oma kos kourallan to mid oubpa rutun woy ahad iddos mgo ponguu ran id pomon en mandad diyot oma
a id oubpa koy pa rutun daom to pilon allow
a riyon to llowt odimolloy id leggua koy pomon diyot sobbangan taddon bonuwa woy id undiyon koy to ibpit to oweg su riyot poomdom doy duwon lugaa rutun nod lolivuungan to mgo udio amoyd dasaa
utun duwon mgo molitan no id lolivuung deen id unsad koy woy id ponudtuu kandan mokaatag to kahit onama
okkad taddot id pominog konami id ngoranan ki ydia no toho iatira no tohodboligya to mahaa no ogget nod momoollutu
nin molitan duwon allak din to onama
aggun tid pominog dan konami id kobbit to onama nod ongaggon kos pusung din no od tonggapon iddos id nonaw ni ablo
urisu sikandin woy dos langun to sakup din diyot kandin no baoy id poboutismu
opongnga idda id inggat koy nikandin nod allus diyot baoy rin kahi rin to tik duwon kodsalig dow no mooggot a nid pomakoy tod ongaggon diyon kow pa tahad to baoy ku
a pomon to dii en sikandin od povolivad id duma koy kandin
okkad no allow laggun tid undiyon koy to lolivuungan to koddasaa nokotommu koy to sokkad no uripon no mongovay
d losuran sikandin to busow no id boggoy kandin to kotuihan to kodotuk tod inguma pa nod pongkotomanan
kit taddot kotuihan din nokoponoopi to dakkoo iddos id ponuripon kandin
a id tintinundug ki ablo woy konami iddon mongovay woy id pehes sikandin no mid ungketen to nin mgo minuvu mgo uripon to onama no ampas to angun
d ponudtuu ran koniyu ko momonnu kow od kotobbus
aom to mouraan allow idda en kos id puungan din taman to nooppos si ablo
een id isau rin iddos mongovay woy id ikohiyan din iddos busow no mid lasud kandin to kit to kotuusan ni isas rays leggua ka pomon duwot mongovay
a idda ron en id leggua iddos busow
o nosorollan taddot id ponuripon tat mongovay no dii ran don od pokoponoopi ukit kandin id ammot dan si ablo woy si ilas woy id goyod poundiyot mgo ponguu taddon bonuwa
o id poisau ran don onsi ablo riyot mgo tohodhukum to oma mid ikahi iddos id ponuripon tat mongovay to nin mgo udio id bovaa ra en to ukahan kaayt keton bonuwa
yya su id nonaw ran to botasanon no id diiyan ta no mgo toho oma deen konna ta od tonggapon idda
a iddos mouraan minuvu no nolivuung dutun id lonug to kodposakit kandan woy id pombendas taddot mgo ponguu iddos umpak ni ablo woy ilas woy id povodasan sikandan
opongnga ran ponamantamani tid badas idda pa id poprisu woy id poupiyannan sikandan tid tamong diyot prisuwan amoy diid pokolegguang
een id piyod sikandan taddot tohodtamong to prisuwan diyot orayn nokosungguk no kwartu woy id pasung kos paa ran
o mgo tongngovulli ron id dasaa si ablo woy si ilas woy id kanta ran atag to koddoong to onama
oy idda mandad so mgo pinirisu rutun id pominog kandan
a tigkow ron duwon monokkaan linug woy nouva kos prisuwan woy idda ron en nongoukatan kos langun no lokkob woy nongoakas kos kodina taddot langun no pinirisu
o nokohimata iddos tohodtamong to prisuwan woy to nokita rin no noukatan don iddos mgo lokkob kunan din ko nokopaahuy ron sikandan
een id tadnus din kos polihuma rin su od pongoggot nanoy
iru id pehes si ablo kandin kahi rin to ya
o kod pongoggot su ini koy rad langun
a iddos tohodtamong to prisuwan id paangoy to suu woy id lukutlukut sikandin id usok woy mid lingkood diyot isowwan onni ablo no id pongookoo to mattag allak
opongnga id piyod din sikandan diyot leggua woy mid ikahi sikandin to ir ondan man kos od puungan ku amoyd kotobbus a
id tavak onsi ablo to omakoy ka tod ongaggon no si isas rays amoyd kotobbus ka woy dos langun no sakup du riyot kikown baoy
a id ponudtuu ran kandin iddos kahit onama woy riyot langun no sakup din diyot kandin no baoy
a ahad moraom don no bulli id piyod peen taddot tohodtamong to prisuwan si ablo woy si ilas diyon to oweg amoyd unavan din kos mgo pali ran
oy id poboutismu sikandin ahad iddos langun no sakup din diyot kandin no baoy
opongnga idda id piyod din onsi ablo riyot baoy rin amoy od pokannon
rayn nahaa iddos tohodtamong to prisuwan woy dos langun no sakup din diyot kandin no baoy su id pomakoy ran don to onama
a to sollom don id suhu taddot mgo tohodhukum to oma iddos mgo pulis no od undiyon to tohodtamong to prisuwan amoyd sovukan don si ablo woy si ilas
een id ponudtulan onsi ablo taddot tohodtamong to prisuwan kahi rin to d suhu iddos mgo ponguu to oma no od polegguangon kowd
a ipanow kowd bo woy muopa no moppiya kos kodipanow row
iru id osengan ni ablo iddos id ponsuhu no mgo pulis kahi rin to e
d povodasan koy nikandan diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu ahad waa koy pa intudinturi woy id prisu koy peen nikandan ahad mgo mohingod koy rad mandad to oma
a koungkay id ollos koy ra nikandan tid poleggua
onnod kopakoy ika
oilangan en no sikandan kos od undini amoyd poleggua konami
a id poolivod iddos mgo pulis woy id ponudtuu ran iddos id ikahi ni ablo riyot mgo tohodhukum
o nosorollan dan no si ablo woy si ilas mgo mohingod bos mandad to oma novaakkan sikandan
een id undiyon dan to prisuwan amoyd buyu kandan to posinsya
opongnga idda id piyod dan onsi ablo riyot leggua to prisuwan woy id buyu ran nod awa sikandan taddon bonuwa
een to nokoleggua ron si ablo woy si ilas diyot prisuwan mid undiyon sikandan to baoy ni ydia
oingumannan dan dutun iddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy woy id inniyat dan sikandan amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy ran
opongnga idda id ipanow sikandan
a pomon diyot ilipos id baya si ablo woy si ilas diyot bonuwa to mpipolis woy riyot polonia woy nokoinguma ran diyot bonuwa to esalonica
utun duwon simbaan to mgo udio
oy iling taddot nooyami rin nod puungan id usok si ablo rutun woy id paabbotlabbot diyot mgo minuvu taddot osulat no ahit onama daom to otollun obodu
d paabbotlabbot woy id posivonnaa sikandin no koilangan en nod ukit si isas rays to kosupittan woyd kovadnow
ahin ablo to i isas no id ponudtuu ku koniyu sikandin en kos esiyas
uwon dumon mgo udio no id pomakoy woy id dumoruma ki ablo woy ki ilas
ouraa mandad kos id pomakoy no riego no duwon allak to onama woy idda mandad so mgo boi
iru nongosina iddos mgo udio no waa id pomakoy deen id ponlivuung dan iddos morat no mgo minuvu no waad kopuungan
o mouraa ron kos nolivuung dan id tigkanoy ran nid bovaa to ukahan taddon bonuwa woy id lusuran dan iddos baoy ni ason su od nangkap sikandan ki ablo woy ki ilas amoyd piyoddon diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu
iru pomon to waa ran man nokita onsi ablo iyon dan baling id ammot si ason woy dos dumon suwod to kopomakoy woy id ponggoyod dan sikandan amoyd poisowwon diyot mgo ponguu to iddon bonuwa
omon to lingasa ran id oseng dan to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ddon mgo minuvu no id bovaat ukahan kaay to intirut ingod kaay ron koungkay to keton bonuwa
oy id poubpa peen mandad sikandan ni ason diyot baoy rin
angun dan id supak to mgo suhu to hari to oma su mid ikahi sikandan no duwon pa kun osson hari no id ngoranan ki isas
o norinog idda taddot mgo ponguu woy taddot mgo minuvu taddon bonuwa nongoukag sikandan
a si ason woy dos duma nod pompomakoy id povayad pa sikandan to piyansa idda pa id polegguang sikandan
a to novulli ron id pologkiyat to mgo suwod to kopomakoy si ablo woy si ilas poundiyot bonuwa to erea
o kodinguma ran dutun id undiyon dan to simbaan to mgo udio
oppiya pa kos mgo toho erea kuntra taddot mgo toho esalonica oyya su oraroy ran od kopiyan nod pominog taddot id paabbotlabbot ni ablo
pat allow od basa ran taddot osulat no ahit onama amoyd kosorollan dan ko mooggot en iddos id nonaw ni ablo
een mouraa kandan kos id pomakoy ahad iddos mgo riego no mama woy idda mandad so mgo boi
iru to nosorollan to mgo udio no toho esalonica no id nonaw si ablo to kahit onama riyot erea id undiyon mandad sikandan su amoy od sutsutan dan iddos mgo minuvu rutun nod bovaa to ukahan
een goos id poipanow to mgo suwod to kopomakoy si ablo poundiyon to ibpit to dahat
iru si ilas woy si imoteo id polintotuwos poron diyot erea
ddos mgo minuvu no mid duma ki ablo id dullung kandin taman diyot bonuwa to tenas
opongnga id uli ran diyot erea woy id ponudtuu ran ki ilas woy ki imoteo iddos ponaannon ni ablo no goos sikandan od potunduhon
a laggun tid aangat si ablo kandan diyot bonuwa to tenas id momorat kos ginawa rin to nokita rin iddos orayn mouraa no konna bonnaan mgo monama rutun
een id undiyon sikandin to simbaan to mgo udio woy id paabbotlabbot din kos kahit onama riyot mgo udio woy riyon mandad to konna mgo udio no duwon allak to onama
pat allow id undiyon mandad sikandin to od lolivuungan to mgo minuvu amoyd pabbotlabbot to ahad ondoy nod pokosasang kandin
uwon mandad mgo tohodnonaw no sakup to pomokayon no id ngoranan to pikureo woy dos duma sakup to stoiko no id apuu ki ablo
ddos duma mid ikahi to ndan ayu kos id kopii nod osengon kaayn minuvu no uvag kun tod kotuig
os duma mandad mid ikahi to mman to osson mgo monama kos id ponudtuu rin
d oseng dan idda su id ponudtuu man ni ablo iddos mokaatag ki isas woy dos mokaatag to kodbadnow
a id piyod dan si ablo riyot od lolivuungan to mgo ponguu nod ngoranan to reopago
ahi ran ki ablo to d kopii roy no id paabbotlabbot du peen iddos lammin nonaw su duwon ossa no id nonaw ru no lammi konami
een id kopii roy nod kosorollan kos kohulugan tadda
d ikahi ran idda su iyon id kopii nod puungan to langun no toho tenas woy ahad taddot pomon diyot nokodossoosson ingod no riyon don id ponoubpa idda ra en so kodponudtuu woy kodpominog to lammin mgo nonaw
een id lohinat si ablo riyot isowwan taddot mgo ponguu no sakup to reopago woy mid ikahi sikandin to ikiyu no mgo toho tenas noponulan ku no oray kow od simba taddot id pomokayan dow
u laggun to id livonglivong a kaayt koniyun lugaa noponulan ku no mouraa kos id simba row woy nokita ku mandad iddos nosulat diyot buwisanan no mid ungketen to tag taddot monama no waa poron nokilaa
a inis monama no id simba row no waa row poron nokilaa ini en kos onama no id ponudtuu ku koniyu
ddos onama no mid bovaa to intirut ingod woy taddot langun no nokotaaw kaay sikandin en kos od ongaggon diyot datas to langit woy kaay to ampowt ingod
een waa sikandin id oubpa riyot mgo simbaan no binovallan da to mgo minuvu
aa rin mandad koilongana kos tavang pomon diyot mgo minuvu oyyos sikandin man kos mid boggoy to umuu woy to langun no koilonganon ta
omon to sokkad da no minuvu id bovallan to onama kos langun no nokodossoosson minuvu woy id posoob din sikandan diyot nokodossoosson lugaa kaay to intirut ingod
omon poron to tigkonayan id puhawang din don tapoy iddos kouhayyoy woy dos tomanan to mgo lugaa nod ubpan dan
d puungan din inis langun su amoy iddos mgo minuvu od nangkap kandin woy od paaawaaw nod kokita sikandin
iru iyon bonnaa iddos onama konna moriyu to ipat sokkad keta
yyos duwon osengan dangan no mid ungketen to ikandin kos id pomonnan to keton umuu unayan nod pokowaong ki woy nominuvu ki
ling mandad taddot id ikahi taddot duma ruwot koniyu no od pongkotuig nod oseng no mid ungketen to iketa mgo anak ki to onama
a su mgo anak ki man to onama konna ki od popoomdom no iddos onama iling to konna bonnaan monama no binovallan pomon to buawan plata o batu ukit to poomdom woy bollad to minuvu
angan to waa pa nokokilaa to onama kos mgo minuvu id podtohon din pa iddos morat no pinuungan dan
iru koungkay id suhu rin iddos langun no minuvu ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod no od sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran
u duwon allow no id panoy to onama nod hukuman din iddos langun no minuvu kaay to intirut ingod woy ollog dos kandin no kodhukum ukit to sokkad no minuvu no id aam din
d posivonnalan din ini riyot langun ukit to kodbadnow rin taddon minuvu
a to norinog dan iddos id ikahi ni ablo mokaatag to kodbadnow id sosumpalit kandin iddos duma
iru iddos duma mid ikahi to ivod ka pobbo rini su od kopiyan koy peen nod pominog to kodpaabbotlabbot du mokaatag kaay
opongnga idda id tanan si ablo riyot od lolivuungan dan
a duwon dad dumon mgo minuvu rutun no id dumoruma ki ablo woy id pomakoy ki isas
okkad kandan si ionisio no sakup to reopago woy duwon mandad molitan nod ngoranan ki amaris woy duwon peen duma nid pomakoy
a nopongnga idda id tanan si ablo riyot tenas woy mid undiyon to bonuwa to orinto
utun nokilaa rin iddos sokkad no mama no udio no toho onto no id ngoranan ki quila woy dos sawa rin no si riscila
ammi pa sikandan id inguma pomon diyot ingod to talia oyyos duwon suhu ni arin laudio no iddos langun no udio koilangan nod awa riyot oma
a id undiyon si ablo to kandan amoyd lowwi
oy pomon to nokodiling man sikandan no tohodbovaa to mgo tolda diyon don sikandin id oubpa woy id potovangoy ran to kodbovaa tadda
a ipat llowt odimolloy id paabbotlabbot peen ni ablo iddos kahit onama riyot simbaan to mgo udio amoy od kopiyod diyot kopomakoy iddos mgo udio woy dos mgo riego
o kodinguma ni ilas woy imoteo pomon diyot prubinsya to acedonia iyon id puungan ni ablo idda ra en so kodponudtuu to kahit onama woy id posivonnalan din diyot mgo udio no si isas en kos esiyas
iru id supak dan ki ablo woy id doddorattan dan da en sikandin
een id pomadpad din iddos boubbuk diyot umpak din amoyd kosorollan dan no worad lavut din otid silutan sikandan
ahi rin to tid silutan kow to onama koniyu ron no saa
onna ad od kosonditan
omon koungkay diyon ad od nonaw to konna mgo udio
een id tanan si ablo riyot mgo udio woy riyon sikandin id oubpa to baoy ni ito usto no konna udio no duwon allak to onama
ddos baoy rin morani ra en to simbaan to mgo udio
a si rispo no ponguu taddon simbaan id pomakoy riyon tod ongaggon woy ahad iddos langun no sakup din diyot kandin no baoy
ouraa mandad no toho orinto no nokorinog to oppiyon inoggan no id nonaw ni ablo woy dos langun taddot id pomakoy id poboutismu
okkad no bulli id pokita kos ongaggon ki ablo ukit to tohenoppon woy kahi rin to o kod kovaakki
onayun ka to kodponudtuu to koddin kahi kaayt bonuwa to orinto woy yo kod soro
yyos siyak kos od duma kikow woy waa en od pokoposakit kikow su duwon pa mouraa nod pomakoy koddi kaayn bonuwa
urisu daom to sokkad no lahun woyd tongnga id oubpa si ablo riyot orinto woy ponayun sikandin nid nonaw to kahit onama
a to si alio ron kos gubernador to caya id posokaddoy iddos mgo udio nid ammot ki ablo woy id piyod dan sikandin diyot gubernador amoyd hukuman
ahi ran diyot ki alio to nin minuvu id piyod to mgo minuvu nod simba to onama riyot poukit no supak to keton pomokayon
o od ooseng don nanoy si ablo idda ron en mid ikahi si alio riyot mgo udio to tik nokopuung pa inin minuvu to morat woy movoggat no saa ollog nanoy nod pominoggon ku sikiyu
iru pomon to inin ukahan mokaatag da man to mgo osengan mgo ngaran to minuvu woy mokaatag da to koniyun pomokayon deen tohon dowd
u konna a od kopiyan nod usoy to iling duwon no samuk
a id paawa rin sikandan diyot hukumanan
opongnga id ammot to mgo minuvu si ostenes no ponguu to simbaan to mgo udio woy id lompossan dan sikandin diyot leggua to hukumanan
iru si ubernador alio id podtohon din da en idda
a nouhoy pa id oubpa si ablo duma taddot mgo suwod to kopomakoy riyot orinto
opongnga id undiyon sikandin to bonuwa to encrea duma iddos toosawa no si quila woy si riscila
utun id popogung si ablo patow no iddos id tandu rin diyot onama notuman din don
omon diyot encrea id sakoy ran to bollangay poundiyot prubinsya to iria
d tuuy sikandan diyot bonuwa to feso woy rutun id polintotuwos don si quila woy si riscila
o waa pa id ponayun si ablo to iponawon din id undiyon pa sikandin to simbaan to mgo udio woy mid nonaw
a id owiran sikandin tod pompomakoy no od oubpa pa rutun piru id elle si ablo
o kodipanow rin mid ikahi sikandin to d livod a rinit koniyu otik id kopiit onama
opongnga rin osenga idda id sakoy sikandin to bollangay pomon diyot feso
o id inguma sikandin diyot bonuwa to esarea id ponayun sikandin nid undiyon to erusalem amoyd lowwi tod pompomakoy rutun
opongnga id ponayun sikandin diyot ntioquia
o pilon simana to kodoubpa ni ablo rutun id ipanow ron mandon sikandin woy id pontuuyan din iddos od pompomakoy riyot prubinsya to alacia woy riyot rigia
d inniyat din iddos langun nod pompomakoy rutun no od mosalig diyon to kopomakoy ran
a iddon timpu duwon sokkad no udio no toho lejandria nod ngoranan ki polos no id inguma riyot feso
raroy sikandin od kotuig nod ooseng woy dakkoo kos sinorollan din mokaatag to osulat no ahit onama
uwon id nonaw rin dangan mokaatag tod ongaggon no si isas rays
raroy sikandin od kopiyan nod nonaw woy ollog en kos id nonaw rin
iru iddos boutismu no nosorollan din idda ra en so boutismu no id nonaw ni uan
o waa kodaangaang id ponudtuu rin kos kahit onama riyot simbaan to mgo udio no riyon to feso
a to norinog ni quila woy riscila iddos nonaw rin id piyod dan sikandin diyot kandan no baoy woy id paabbotlabbot dan peen kandin iddos mokaatag to poukit to onama to kodtobbus to minuvu
o nopuhawang ni polos nod undiyot prubinsya to caya id tovangan sikandin tod pompomakoy riyot feso
oy id popiyod sikandan to sulat diyot mgo suwod to kopomakoy no riyon to caya amoyd tonggapon dan si polos
a to kodinguma rin dakkoo kos notavang din taddot mgo minuvu no id pomakoy pomon to eru to onama
yya su riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu notalu rin iddos langun no kodapuu to mgo udio
kit to kodpaabbotlabbot din taddot osulat no ahit onama mosalig iddos kodposivonnaa rin no si isas en kos esiyas
a laggun to riyon pa si polos to bonuwa to orinto si ablo mandad id ipanow nid pommuvung woy id poundava sikandin taman to id inguma riyot bonuwa to feso
utun duwon nokita rin no pilopila nod pompomakoy
oy id inturan din sikandan kahi rin to o id pomakoy kow noiroomman kowd bo taddot his no spiritu
id tavak sikandan to ora oyyos waa koy man nokorinog no duwon bos his no spiritu
ahi ni ablo to ndan man bos kos noovottan dow to kodboutismu koniyu
d tavak sikandan to ddos noovottan doy iling taddot poukit to kodboutismu no id nonaw ni uan
ahin ablo to ddos boutismu ni uan posivonnaa idda no id sondit kos mgo minuvu woy id tanan to mgo saa ran
iru id nonaw rin mandad no koilangan nod pomakoy ran taddot od tundug kandin no si isas
a to norinog dan iddos id ikahi ni ablo id poboutismu ran patow no id pomakoy ran tod ongaggon no si isas
opongnga ran id boutismuwan id torungngan ni ablo to bollad din iddos uu ran
a idda ron en noiroomman dan to his no spiritu woy nokoooseng dan to nokodossoosson kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi woy id ponudtuu ran iddos id posaddoo to onama kandan
ddos kouralloy ran mgo sopuuoruwa
a daom to otollun buwan ponayun si ablo no id undiyon to simbaan to mgo udio
o waa kodaangaang id paabbotlabbot din iddos mokaatag to kodharit onama amoy od kopiyod din kos mgo minuvu nod pomakoy
iru iddos duma motoggas en kos pusung woy diid pomakoy
oy riyot isowwan to kourallan id podmorat dan da en iddos nonaw mokaatag ki isas no od ikulon tod pompomakoy
een id tanan si ablo rutun duma taddot od pompomakoy
a ipat allow id paabbotlabbot din iddos kahit onama riyon to mgo minuvu no riyot iskwilahan ni irano
aom to oruwon lahun idda en kos id puungan din
omon tadda iddos langun no udio woy konna mgo udio no id ponoubpa riyot prubinsya to sia nokorinog sikandan to kahit onama mokaatag tod ongaggon no si isas rays
a mouraa kos mokososoobbun pinuungan to onama ukit ki ablo
had iddos id gamit din no mgo panyu woy ogget no od piyoddon diyon tod pongkovohokan od kouliyan en sikandan woy od ponleggua kos mgo busow nid lasud kandan
uwon mandad mgo udio no id livonglivong nod pouvaguvag no duwon kotuusan dan nod pokopoleggua to mgo busow woy id geddaman dan tid gamit iddos ngaran tod ongaggon no si isas
d oungketen sikandan to d ikohiyan ku sikkow ukit to kotuusan to ngaran ni isas no id ponudtuu ni ablo leggua ka
a duwon pittun toosuwod no iling en tadda kos id puungan dan
ddos amoy ran si sceva no sokkad no udio woy ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
d geddaman dan tid poleggua iddos busow ukit to ngaran ni isas piru mid ikahi iddos busow to okokilaa a ki isas woy nosorollan ku iddos minuvu nod ngoranan ki ablo piru sikiyu ondoy kow man
dda ron en id lurog sikandan taddot id losuran woy nongovendas kos umpak dan woy langun dan waa en nokogaha
een id pomaahuy ran pomon diyot baoy no paanan waa umpak woy nongopoliyan
ddon notomanan norinog to langun no udio woy konna mgo udio no id ponoubpa riyot feso deen novaakkan dan woy ayas peen novantug kos ngaran ni isas nod ongaggon
a mouraa kos od pompomakoy no id sondit woy id ponudtuu ran diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu iddos morat no pinuungan dan
ouraa mandad no tohodmadyik no id pompiyod to libru ran to kodmadyik amoyd loowon diyot isowwan to langun
o kodiyap dan to kontidad taddot mgo libru nokoinguma idda to mgo limmompuun maan   diyot kandan no soopi
een ukit tadda nokosoob kos kahit onama woy id timuu peen kos kouralloy tod pompomakoy
opongnga iddon notomanan nopuhawang ni ablo nod baya riyot prubinsya to acedonia woy riyot caya to dii pa sikandin od undiyon to erusalem
oy mid ikahi sikandin no pomon dutun koilangan nod undiyon sikandin to oma
a id pounna rin diyot acedonia si imoteo woy si rasto no oruwa taddot id tavang kandin
oy sikandin id polintotuwos pa riyot prubinsya to sia
aggun to riyon pa si ablo to feso duwon dakkoon ukahan pomon to iddos dumon mgo minuvu rutun diid kopiyan taddot nonaw mokaatag ki isas no od ikulon tod pompomakoy
ddon ukahan id tigkonayan to sokkad no minuvu no id ngoranan ki emetrio no od kotuig nod totunow to plata
kit tadda sikandin woy dos mgo tohodpuung din id bovaa to moollimot no uvag kun to simbaan
ddos boyo tadda id poiling dan taddot simbaan ni iana no monama ran
oy pomon tadda nokoponoopi ran to dakkoo
een id poumow ni emetrio iddos mgo tohodpuung din woy dos duma pa nod pongkotuig nod totunow to plata
d ikohiyan din sikandan to go duma ku nosorollan dow no noratu ki pomon da en kaayn pinuungan
okita woy norinog dow iddos id puungan taddot id ngoranan ki ablo
d nonaw rin moho no konna kun bonnaa iddos mgo monama no binovallan da to minuvu
ouraa ron iddos id pomakoy woy nopiyod din konna ra kaayt feso ko konna ahad diyon to intirut prubinsya to sia
een worad od koponoopiyan ta woy od korattan kos bantug to keton pinuungan
onna ra idda od kowora ron iddos koruanon taddot simbaan tod bontuhon no monama ta no si iana
oungkay od simba kandin iddos langun diyot prubinsya to sia woy ahad kaay to intirut ingod piru saddook konnod kouhoy dii ron sikandin od kilaannon
o norinog idda to mgo minuvu no nongolivuung dutun oraroy ran no nolingasa woy id pomehes no mid ungketen to d povontuhon en si iana no monama ta no id simba to langun no toho feso
een nongoukag iddos langun nid ubpa taddon bonuwa
d ammot dan iddos mgo duma ni ablo no si ayo woy si ristarco no toho acedonia woy id lungkossu ran nid goyod iddos oruwa poundiyon to dakkoon od lolivuungan taddon bonuwa
a si ablo od kopiyan nanoy nod undiyon amoyd ooseng diyot isowwan to mgo minuvu piru waa id aman iddos mgo duma rin nod pompomakoy
uwon mandad mgo ponguu taddon bonuwa no mgo oukuy ni ablo
d loglohottan dan sikandin no konna en od undiyon to dakkoon lolivuungan
ddon timpu ayas peen nongoukag kos mgo minuvu
ssa kos peheson to sokkad woy ossa mandad kos duma oyya su iddos kourallan kandan waa nokosaddoo to unayan no nolivuung sikandan dutun
a duwon sokkad no minuvu nod ngoranan ki lejandro no kunan to mgo minuvu rutun ko sikandin kos unayan taddon ukahan oyyos nokita ran no id usung sikandin to mgo udio
d undiyon sikandin to isowwan woy id sinyas nod poonongonong dos mgo minuvu su amoy id paabbotlabbot din no waa lavut to mgo udio taddot id puungan onni ablo
iru to nosorollan to mgo minuvu no udio sikandin ayas dan peen id pomehes daom to oruwon uras no mid ungketen to d povontuhon en si iana no monama ta no od simbaanon to mgo toho feso
odtahad nopotivonok dad to sokkad no ponguu taddon bonuwa iddos mgo minuvu
ahi rin to go duma ku no toho feso nokosaddoo iddos langun no minuvu kaay to intirut ingod no siketa no toho feso tohodtamong to simbaan taddot novantug no monama ta no si iana woy taddot uhis no batu no nouug pomon diyot langit
aa od pokoikahi no konna bonnaa ini deen pohonnawa row kos uu row woy yo kod aawang od puung to ahad ondan
u inis mgo minuvu no id pompiyod dow kaay waa man sikandan id ponakow riyot simbaan ta woy waa ran mandad id sosumpalit to keton monama no si iana
tik duwon ukahan no id pousoy ni emetrio woy dos mgo duma rin duwon man ollog no hukumanan woy mgo tohodhukum ta
iyon dan en ollog id pouma iddos mgo ukahan
iru otik duwon pa meen ossa nod kooseng dow ongati row kos allow nod usayon idda riyot nooyami ta no timpu to kodpolivuungoy
u saddook od kointuran ki kaayn ukahan koungkayn allow woy waa ollog no id pokotavak ta mokaatag kaay
o nopongnga sikandin mid ikahi tadda id popouli rin don iddos mgo minuvu
opongnga iddon ukahan id poumow ni ablo iddos od pompomakoy woy id inniyat din sikandan nod mosalig diyot kopomakoy ran
a id obisu sikandin no od undiyon to acedonia idda pa id ipanow
d pontuuyan din iddos mgo lugaa no sakup to acedonia woy id inniyat din iddos od pompomakoy rutun ukit to kahit onama
opongnga id ponayun sikandin nid ipanow taman tid inguma riyot ingod to recia
oy rutun id ubpa si ablo daom to otollun buwan
a nopanoy ron sikandin nod sakoy nanoy to bollangay poundiyot prubinsya to iria
iru to nosorollan ni ablo no duwon puhawang to mgo udio nod imatoy kandin id poolivod sikandin nid baya riyot prubinsya to acedonia
d duma kandin si opater no anak ni irro no toho erea
d duma mandad si ristarco woy si egundo no mgo toho esalonica si ayo no toho erbe si iquico woy si rofimo no mgo toho sia woy si imoteo
o kodinguma ran diyot ilipos id unna ron sikandan konami riyot bonuwa to roas woy riyon don sikandan id aangat
ikami mandad to nopongnga ron iddos pista to aan no aa otuvu id sakoy koy mandon to bollangay daom to limmon allow idda pa nokoinguma koy riyot roas woy riyon koyd en nokodtommutommu
a id oubpa koy pa rutun daom to pittun allow
iyot unnon allow to simana id lolivuung koy amoyd sampot to kopotayan ni isas rays ukit to kodkaan to id toppiktoppik no paan
a id ponudtuu si ablo to kahit onama riyot mgo minuvu taman to tongngovulli su od ipanow man sikandin to soop no allow
a diyot ikootollun ondana to baoy no id lolivuungan doy duwon mouraan suu
utun duwon sokkad nod kongkonakan don no id ngoranan ki utico no id ounsad diyot bintana
omon to orayn mowwet kos kodponudtuu ni ablo to kahit onama nokotinuhon moho si utico deen nouug sikandin diyot livuta
o od tovangan don nanoy sikandin to mgo minuvu id patoy ron sikandin
a id ponog si ablo woy id longkobban din si utico woyd kopkoppan
oy kahi rin diyot mgo minuvu to o kowd kaanu su nouyag don sikandin
opongnga idda id livod si ablo riyot datas to baoy woy id pontoppiktoppik sikandin to paan woy id pongkaan koy
a ponayun sikandin nid ponudtuu to kahit onama taman to nosollom
opongnga id logkiyat don sikandin
a iddos od kongkonakan id atod to mgo minuvu riyot baoy rin woy id lonna kos ginawa ran su nouyag man sikandin
a nopuhawang ni ablo no od pomantok da sikandin nod ipanow poundiyot bonuwa to son
urisu id unna koy kandin woy id sakoy koy to bollangay woyd tuuyon doy sikandin dutun su idda man kos ponaannon din
o kodbaak din konami riyot son id posakoy roy sikandin woy id ponayun koy poundiyot bonuwa to itilene
omon dutun id sakoy koy mandon taddot bollangay woy id inguma koy to soop don no allow riyot pantok to isla to uio
oop no allow diyon koyd to isla to amo
oop mandon no allow nokoinguma koyd diyot bonuwa to ileto
ora koyd id tuuy riyot bonuwa to feso su konna od kopiyan si ablo nod kolewang pa riyot prubinsya to sia
yyos id kopii rin no otid kopakoy od pokoinguma goos diyot erusalem to dii pa od inguma iddos allow to entecostes
a to riyon don si ablo to ileto id poumow rin iddos od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy riyot feso
o id inguma ron sikandan mid ikahi si ablo kandan to osorollan dow iddos id puungan ku riyot langun no timpu to duma a pa nikiyu pomon poron to unnon allow to kodinguma ku rinit sia
d puungan ku en iddos id popuungan koddi to onama duma to kodpoobbava woy kodsinoggow timbang uripon tod ongaggon
d tiis ku ahad pa iddos mgo kosupittan pomon to puhawang to mgo udio nod imotayan a
osorollan dow mandad no waa en kodaangaang ku nod ponudtuu koniyu to kahit onama riyot kourallan woy riyot baoy row
d amin ku tid nonaw iddos od pokomoppiya to koniyun kopomakoy
d paabbotlabbot ku riyot mgo udio woy riyot konna mgo udio no koilangan en nod sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran woy od pomakoy riyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays
a koungkay od undiyon ad to erusalem su ini en kos id suhu koddi to his no spiritu woy waa ku nosorolli ko ondan kos od kotomanan ku rutun
iru iyon ku ra nosorollan no ipat bonuwa nod undiyonnan ku id ponudtuu koddi to his no spiritu no od koprisu a woy od koukitan ku kos dakkoon kosupittan
onna ku id konuhuni inis umuu ku kaay to ampowt ingod su iyon ku ra en id kopii no od kopongnga iddos id popuungan koddi tod ongaggon no si isas rays no idda en so kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to eru to onama
oundiyonnan kud sikiyu langun to kodponudtuu mokaatag to kodharit onama woy koungkay nosorollan ku no dii kid en od pokodkitakita
een od ikohiyan ku sikiyu koungkay no otik duwon ahad sokkad koniyu nod silutan to onama koniyu ron no saa
onna ad od kosonditan diyot isowwan to onama
yyos waa en kodaangaang ku to kodponudtuu koniyu taddot langun no dontulon woy id kopiit onama
yyadayyad kow to koniyun kopomakoy woy bontayi row iddos langun nod pompomakoy no id potomongngan to his no spiritu koniyu
yyos sikiyu meen kos timbang tohodtamong to mgo karnero no idda en so od pompomakoy to onama no id tobbus ukit to longossa taddot soosokkad no nak din
u nosorollan ku no otid tanan ad duwon od loppow pomon duwot koniyu no od pouvaguvag no mgo tohodnonaw to kahit onama
ling sikandan to movuut no tuyyang diyot puwaason no waa eru nod doraat to kopomakoy to mgo minuvu no id tomongngan dow
d inguma kos timpu no ahad iddos mgo duma row ra en od nonaw to uhus amoyd kopiyod iddos od pompomakoy no od posakup kandan
een bantoy kow
o kowd kolingow no allow bulli waa soroan ku to kodpomandu to ipat sokkad koniyu daom to otollun lahun duma to kodtihis to dayas ku
a koungkay mgo suwod id salig ku sikiyu riyon to onama woy riyot kandin no kahi mokaatag to ginawa woy eru rin
u iddos kandin no kahi od pokoponokkaa to koniyun kopomakoy woy od pokotanggap kow mandad to kopiyannan no id boggoy rin diyot langun nid ossa rin no novovallan no mgo minuvu rin
aggun to riyon a pa to koniyu waa a noima to soopi to dumon minuvu ahad iddos buawan o mgo umpak dan
osorollan dow en no id potaddu a to ating amoyd kotommu ra en kos mgo koilonganon ku ahad iddos koilonganon to mgo duma ku
een diyot langun nod puungan ku id amin ku kos koddin konokkaan amoy id pokita koniyu no koilangan en nod tovangan iddos mgo worowora
d sompotton ta inaayun iddos id ikahi tod ongaggon no si isas rays no mid ungketen to ampas pa no moppiya kod kotomanan taddot od boggoy kuntra taddot od tanggap
a to nopongnga id ooseng si ablo mid lingkood sikandin woy id dasaa duma iddos langun
d posinoggawoy ran woy id kopkoppan dan si ablo woy id orokkan
yon dan orayn naanui iddos id ikahi ni ablo no dii ran don od pokodkitakita
opongnga id atod dan sikandin diyot bollangay nod sokayan din
a nopongnga koy id obisu id sakoy koy to bollangay woyd tollus diyot isla to os
oy soop no allow id undiyon koy to isla to odas woy pomon mandon dutun mid ponayun koy poundiyot bonuwa to atara
o koddunggu roy riyot atara nokosout koy to bollangay poundiyot enicia no sakup to prubinsya to iria deen id sakoy koy tadda
a nokovaya koy riyot pantok to isla to ipre no od kopantow lomig to ivang
d ponayun koy taman tid dunggu koy riyot bonuwa to iro no sakup to prubinsya to iria
d ponog koy riyot iro su riyon man id poponog kos mgo luwan
d nangkap doy rutun iddos od pompomakoy woy riyon koy en mid oubpa to kandan daom to pittun allow
a ukit to id ponudtuu to his no spiritu riyon tod pompomakoy id osengan dan si ablo no konna od allus diyot erusalem oyya su od posupittan sikandin dutun
iru riyot allow to kodipanow roy id atod koy taddot langun nod pompomakoy rutun duma to sawa ran ahad iddos mgo anak dan taman diyot ibpit to dahat
oy rutun mid lingkood koy langun amoyd dasaa
opongnga idda id sakoy koyd to bollangay woy id ponuli ron mandad sikandan
omon diyot iro id ponayun koy poundiyot bonuwa to olemaida
o kodinguma roy rutun id olitolit koy taddot mgo suwod to kopomakoy woy id owwot koy riyot kandan to sokkad no allow
oop no allow id logkiyat koy mandon poundiyot bonuwa to esarea
o koddunggu roy rutun mid oubpa koy pa tahad diyot baoy ni elipe no tohodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
ikandin en dangan dos sokkad taddot pittu no id aam no tohodtavang to mgo apostoles diyot erusalem
uwon oppat no anak din no mongovay no duwon kogahan to kodponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandan to onama
aggun tid oubpa koy rutun to pilon allow duwon id inguma no sokkad mandad no propeta nod ngoranan ki gabo no id pomon diyot prubinsya to udea
d porani sikandin konami woy id angoy rin iddos ollon ni ablo woy id unoy rin idda tid ikot diyot paa woy bollad din
a mid ikahi sikandin to ling en kaay kos ponudtulon to his no spiritu no iddos komunoy kaayn ollon od ikottan to mgo udio riyot erusalem woy id boggoy sikandin diyot bollad to konna mgo udio
o norinog doy idda sikami woy dos dumon mgo minuvu rutun id loglohottan doy si ablo no konnad od allus diyot erusalem
iru mid ikahi si ablo to ambo moho tod sinoggow kow woy od posakit to ginawa ku
u nopanoy ad konna ra to kodpoprisu ko konna ahad peen od patoy a riyot erusalem atag tod ongaggon no si isas
a pomon to nosorollan doy no konna en sikandin od paawid deen id ikahi koyd baling to uopa no iddos id kopii tod ongaggon kos od kotuman
o id lihad don kos pilon allow id ponemmos koy woy mid logkiyat poundiyon to erusalem
a duwon od pompomakoy nid pomon diyot esarea no id duma konami riyot erusalem woy id atod koy nikandan diyot od ubpan doy no baoy ni nason no toho ipre
okkad sikandin taddot tapoy nod pompomakoy ki isas to iddon lugaa
a to id inguma koyd diyot erusalem orayn nahaa iddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy no id olitolit konami
oop no allow sikami duma ki ablo id lowwi ki antiago
iyon en mandad nolivuung iddos langun nod pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy
a id pongumusta si ablo kandan woy id ipan din tid ituu iddos id puungan to onama riyot konna mgo udio ukit kandin
o norinog dan iddos id ikahi ni ablo id doong dan kos onama
a id ikohiyan dan si ablo to uwod nosorollan dud no kaayt erusalem maanmaan kos udio nid pomakoy woy monit kos ginawa ran nod ikuu to mgo uhu ni oises
orinog dan no id nonaw ka kun to langun no udio no id ponoubpa riyot lugaa to konna mgo udio no dii ran don koilangan nod ikuu taddot mgo uhu ni oises
d ikahi ka kun no dii ron koilangan nod potupuwan iddos mgo anak dan woy dii ran don mandad od ikuu taddot duma pon botasanon to mgo udio
a ondan ayu koungkay kos moppiya nod puungan ta
u od kosorollan dan en no kaay ka
yon moppiya no od dumannan du kos pomandu roy
uwon oppat no mama kaay no id totandu riyot onama
uma ka kandan diyot templo woy lonug ka tod puungan to kodlinis no od ikuu to botasanon to mgo udio
oyariyu iddos od kahastu ran atag to mgo oyama no id buwis amoyd pokopopogung don sikandan
ni ra en kos poukit nod kosorollan to langun no minuvu no iddos soupot mokaatag kikow konna bonnaa su od kokita ran man no id ikuu ka en to mgo uhu ni oises
a mokaatag taddot od pompomakoy no konna mgo udio nokodsokkad koyd woy nopopiyoddan doyd sikandan to sulat to mgo suhu no koilangan nod tumanon dan
ii ran od kaan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama woy dii ran od kaan to monnanap no nopollong oyyos waa nokoleggua kos longossa woy dii ran od kaan to longossa woy dii ran mandad od laayuk to konna ran sawa
een soop no allow id duma si ablo taddot oppat no mama woy id tigkanoy ran don taddot od puungan to kodlinis nod ikuu to botasanon dan
opongnga idda mid undiyon si ablo to templo amoy id posaddoo rin diyot tohodbuwis ko kannu od kopongnga iddos timpu to kodlinis su otid kopongnga idda iddos ipat sokkad kandan od pokobuwis don diyon to onama
a to asow ron od kopongnga iddos pittun allow to kodlinis nod ikuu to botasanon dan duwon mgo udio no id pomon diyot prubinsya to sia no nokokita ki ablo riyot templo
d sutsutan dan iddos nolivuung no mgo minuvu no od bovaa to ukahan woyd omotton dan si ablo
d pomehes sikandan no mid ungketen to go duma roy no koubbaran ni srael tovangi koy
ni en iddos minuvu no ahad ingkon od pokoundiyon iddos nonaw rin od supak keta woy riyot mgo uhu ni oises ahad pa kaay to templo
onna ra idda id libmitan din peen inis his no ugaa su id piyod din kaayt daom to templo iddos konna mgo udio
d ikahi ran idda su nokita ran man si rofimo no toho feso no konna udio no id duma ki ablo riyot erusalem deen kunan dan ko id piyod sikandin ni ablo riyot daom to templo a to nongoukag iddos mgo minuvu riyon to intirut bonuwa to erusalem id ponlungkossu ran poundiyot ki ablo id ammot dan sikandin woy id goyod poleggua riyot templo
dda ron en id lokobban dan iddos langun no sobbangan
o od imotayan dan don nanoy si ablo duwon nokoponudtuu taddot ponguu to mgo sundau to oma no nongoukag iddos mgo minuvu riyon to intirut erusalem
a idda ron en iddos ponguu to mgo sundau id piyod din iddos duma rin no mgo sundau woy dos mgo kopitan din woy id lukutlukut dan id undiyon to nongoukag no mgo minuvu
o nokita taddot mgo minuvu iddos ponguu to mgo sundau woy dos mgo duma rin id soroan dan tid badas si ablo
a id poroniyan taddot ponguu to mgo sundau si ablo woy id paammot din woy id povaku sikandin to oruwon kodina
d inturan din iddos mgo minuvu kahi rin to ndoy man inin minuvu woy ondan kos saa no nopuungan din
iru nokodossoossa kos peheson dan to kodtavak
a pomon to orayn boosengon kos mgo minuvu waa nokaabbot iddos ponguu to mgo sundau ko ondan en kos mooggot no notomanan
een id suhu rin iddos mgo sundau no od piyoddon si ablo riyot kampu ran
o id inguma ran diyot geddan to kampu id onnat dan dobbo si ablo amoy diid kaapput taddot id pontinundug no od kopiyan nod posakit kandin
oy ayas dan id pomehes no mid ungketen to d imotayan ikon minuvu
a to id pousok dan don nanoy si ablo riyot kampu mid ikahi sikandin diyot ponguu to mgo sundau to uwon nanoy od osengon ku kikow
d tavak iddos ponguu to mgo sundau kahi rin to otuig ka vos od ooseng to kinohiyan no riego
a ko ungketen konna vos sikkow iddos toho hipto no lammi pa id supak to guberno
d ponguu sikandin to oppat no maan   no minuvun mongimatoy woy id piyod din sikandan diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
id tavak si ablo to onna
okkad a no udio woy nominuvu a riyot arso dos novantug no bonuwa no sakup to prubinsya to ilicia
tid kopakoy boggayi a to timpu nod ooseng kaayt mgo minuvu
a id aman iddos ponguu to mgo sundau deen id lohinat si ablo riyot geddan woy id sinyas sikandin amoyd poonongonong iddos mgo minuvu idda pa id oseng sikandin diyot ebreo no kinohiyan
ahi rin to go suwod woyd pombuyyahon to mgo udio pominogga row pa inis tavak ku taddot id ampoo row koddi
o norinog dan no id oseng si ablo to kinohiyan no ebreo id poonongonong dan peen
a ponayun sikandin mid ikahi to okkad a no udio no nominuvu riyot bonuwa to arso no sakup to prubinsya to ilicia piru kaay a mid dakkoo to erusalem
d pohinonaw a kaay woy si amaliel kos koddin tohodnonaw
d poooyyaran a nikandin nonawwi taddot langun no uhu woy botasanon to keton kovuyyahan
ling en mandad koniyu koungkay monit kos ginawa ku no id puung taddot kunan ku ko id kopiit onama
aa ku tokasi tid posuppit iddos mgo mama ahad iddos mgo baay no id ikuu taddot nonaw mokaatag ki isas
os duma id paammot woy id poprisu ku woy duwon pa duma nid poomatoy pomon to kodposuppit ku kandan
ddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy dos langun nod pombuyyahon ta od pokoposivonnaa no mooggot inis id ikahi ku koniyu
yyos sikandan peen dangan kos id boggoy koddi to mgo sulat amoy id pokita riyot duma ta no mgo udio no riyot bonuwa to amasco
a ukit taddon mgo sulat duwon kotungud ku nod ammot taddot od pompomakoy rutun woy od piyod kandan kaayt erusalem amoyd silutan
a to morani ad diyot amasco to mokountud don kos allow tigkow duwon seaa pomon diyot datas to langit no nokotaddow koddi
opiloy a woy nokorinog a to bawos no mid ungketen to aulo aulo mambot id posupittan a nikkow
a id intud a kandin to ndoy ka man ir
id tavak sikandin to iyak si isas no toho azaret no id posupittan du
ddos mgo duma ku nokokita taddot seaa piru waa ran nokorinog taddot bawos
a mid intud a mandon kahi ku to ongaggon ondan man kos ollog nod puungan ku
id tavak sikandin to ohinat ka woy ponayun ka undiyon to amasco
utun duwon od ponudtuu kikow ko ondan kos id popuungan to onama kikow
omon taddot lampas no seaa nod pokoselang novutud a deen id pikit a robbo taddot mgo duma ku poundiyon to amasco
a rutun duwon sokkad no minuvu no id ngoranan ki nanias
nin minuvu orayd ikuu to mgo uhu ni oises woy mowwet kos kodontong kandin to langun no udio no id ponoubpa rutun
d porani sikandin koddi woy mid ikahi to uwod ku no aulo od pokokita kad
dda ron en nouliyan ad woy nokita ku si nanias
a kahi rin to ddos onama to keton kovuyyahan id aam kikow amoyd kosorollan du iddos kandin nid kopii woy amoy od kokita ru iddos motallong no uripon din no si isas woy od korinog du iddos bawos din
yyos sikkow en kos od posivonnaa riyot langun no minuvu mokaatag taddot nokita woy norinog du
a yo kad od lewanglewang
ohinat ka woy poboutismu ka woy umow ka riyon tod ongaggon amoyd koposinsyan kos mgo saa ru
opongnga idda id livod a riyot erusalem woy laggun to id dasaa a riyot templo duwon id pokita koddi to onama iling to tohenoppon
okita ku iddos od ongaggon no mid ungketen to oos ka awa kaayt erusalem su iddos mgo minuvu diid tanggap taddot kodposivonnaa ru mokaatag koddi
a kahi ku kandin to iru od ongaggon mambo man to konna ran od pomakoy su nosorollan dan man no nolingkus ku dangan iddos langun no simbaan to mgo udio amoy id poprisu woy id povodasan iddos od pompomakoy
oy iddot timpu nid imotayan si steban no id posivonnaa mokaatag kikow nahaa a tadda woy siyak peen kos id tamong to umpak taddot id imatoy kandin
iru mid ikahi iddos od ongaggon to panow kad en su od poundiyonnon ku sikkow to moriyun lugaa amoy od ponudtuu to koddin mgo kahi riyot konna mgo udio
a to nokoikahi ra en si ablo nod poponudtulon sikandin to kahit onama riyot konna mgo udio worad sikandan id pominog woy id pomehes dan no mid ungketen to d imotayan ika
llog en no diid uyahon kos iling duwon no minuvu
a id ayas peen sikandan id pomehes no id ponlousut to umpak dan woy id ponsovuwak sikandan to boubbuk to livuta riyot davow patow to kodbovunnis dan
een id suhu to ponguu to mgo sundau iddos mgo duma rin no od pousokkon don si ablo riyot kampu woy od povodasan sikandin amoyd pokoponudtuu to unayan no id pomehes iddos mgo udio kandin
iru to id ikottan dan don si ablo amoyd bodasan mid intud sikandin diyot kopitan to sundau no id loohinat morani kandin
ahi rin to opakoy vos nod bodasan kos sokkad no minuvu no mohingod to oma no waa pa intudinturi
o norinog idda to kopitan id undiyonnan din iddos ponguu to mgo sundau woy id ikohiyan din to onnuwon ta vo ini su mohingod bos to oma inin minuvu
