een id undiyonnan taddot ponguu to mgo sundau si ablo woy id inturan din kahi rin to onudtuu ka koddi mooggot been no toho oma ka
id tavak si ablo to yya
a mid ikahi iddos ponguu to mgo sundau to akkoo kos id bayad ku amoyd kovovallan a ra en no mohingod to oma
ahi mandad ni ablo to iru siyak mohingod ad en moho to oma pomon poron to koonakoy ku
a idda ron en id ponawa iddos mgo sundau nod badas nanoy kandin woy novaakkan mandad iddos ponguu to mgo sundau oyyos si ablo no id povaku rin to kodina mohingod bos to oma
a id kopii taddot ponguu to mgo sundau nod kosorollan iddos bonnaan unayan no id ikahi iddos mgo udio no nokopuung kun si ablo to saa
een soop no allow id paakas din iddos kodina ni ablo woy id poumow rin iddos langun no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis woy dos mgo tohodhukum
opongnga id piyod din si ablo riyot isowwan dan
a id tongtongngan ni ablo iddos mgo sakup to tohodhukum woy kahi rin to go suwod nokosaddoo a no ollog kos pinuungan ku riyot isowwan to onama taman koungkay
o nooseng ni ablo idda si nanias no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis id suhu rin iddos id ponlohinat diyot morani ni ablo no od tobpiyon sikandin
a mid ikahi si ablo to ikkow kos od tobpiyon to onama
d umpak du ra kos kopiyannoy ru piru morat kos pusung du
d unsad ka ruwon amoyd hukum koddi ukit to mgo uhu ni oises piru sikkow rad man kos id supak tadda pomon to kodpotabpi ru koddi
a iddos mgo minuvu no riyot morani ni ablo id ponikahi to h od pokoakuaku ka moho nod sosumpalit to mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no id aam to onama
id tavak si ablo to go suwod waa saddoo ku no sikandin bos kos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to o kow od ooseng to morat diyot od ponguu koniyu
a nosorollan ni ablo no diid pokodsokkad iddos mgo tohodhukum su iddos duma mgo aduseo woy dos duma mgo ariseo
een mid ikahi sikandin to monokkaa riyot isowwan dan no mid ungketen to go suwod sokkad a no ariseo woy dos kovuyyahan ku mgo ariseo mandad deen dakkoo kos kodsalig ku no od kovadnow en iddos id poomatoy ron
ni en kos unayan no id intudinturan a koungkay
o nooseng din da en idda id poopuloy iddos mgo ariseo woy dos mgo aduseo woy nokodbaadbaad sikandan
yya su iddos mgo aduseo mid ikahi no konnod kovadnow iddos id poomatoy woy dii ran mandad od pomakoy no duwon ponolihan woy ispiritu to minuvu
iru iddos mgo ariseo id pomakoy ran langun kaay
een ayas dan peen id poopuloy woy id popehesoy
a duwon id lohinat no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises no sakup to ariseo woy ayas id apuu kahi ran to aa saa no nokita roy kaayn minuvu
tik duwon ispiritu o ponolihan no id ooseng diyot kandin konna man saa idda
o lampas don oraroy kos kodpoopuloy ran novaakkan iddos ponguu to mgo sundau kod oohawon dan tod goyod si ablo deen id paangoy rin goos to mgo sundau woy id polivod diyot kampu
a to iddon bulli id pokita ki ablo iddos od ongaggon woy mid ikahi to o kod kovaakki
u iling to kodposivonnaa ru mokaatag koddi kaayt erusalem koilangan nod puungan du rad mandad ini riyot oma
o nosollom don duwon mgo udio no id polivuungoy amoy od pomuhawang ko ondan kos od puungan dan
d sosapa ran no diid kaan woy diid inom taman to od koimotayan dan si ablo
ampas sikandan to oppatnopuun udio no nokodsokkad kaayn puhawang
d undiyon sikandan tod pombuyyahon to mgo udio woy riyot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis
oy mid ikahi sikandan to d sosapa koy no diid kaan to ahad ondan taman tod koimotayan doyd si ablo
een sikiyu woy dos mgo tohodhukum posorolla row iddos ponguu to mgo sundau to oma amoy id popiyod din mandon si ablo rinit koniyu
ouvaguvag kow ra nod poundiniyon dow sikandin amoyd intudinturan dow peen
iru iyon bonnaa od lipongngon doyd moho sikandin diyot daan
iru inin puhawang norinog taddot onakon ni ablo no anak taddot tobboy rin deen id undiyon sikandin to kampu woy id ponudtulan din si ablo
a id umow ni ablo iddos sokkad taddot kopitan to mgo sundau woy id ikohiyan din to tod du pa inis od kongkonakan diyot ponguu row su duwon id ponudtuu rin
een id atod sikandin taddot kopitan to mgo sundau riyot ponguu ran woy to kodinguma ran mid ikahi sikandin to ddos pinirisu no si ablo id umow koddi woy id paatod din inis od kongkonakan su duwon kun ponudtulon din kikow
a id somaddan to ponguu to mgo sundau iddos bollad taddot od kongkonakan woy id piyod din diyot ibpit no waa od pokorinog kandan
d inturan din sikandin kahi rin to to ondan man kos ponudtulon du koddi
id tavak iddos od kongkonakan to okodsokkad kos mgo udio nod buyuwon kikow no id popiyod du simag iddos anggam ku no si ablo riyot owwet no ukumanan woy od pouvaguvag da kun sikandan nod intudinturan dan peen sikandin
iru yo kod pominog kandan su duwon lampas to oppatnopuun minuvu no od lipong kandin diyot daan
d sosapa ran no diid kaan woyd inom taman to od koimotayan dan sikandin
opanoy ron sikandan woy od aangat dobbo kod aman ka
a iddos ponguu to mgo sundau mid ikahi to to yo ru vo ponudtuu riyot ahad ondoy no id ikohiyan a nikkow mokaatag kaay
opongnga id popouli rin don iddos od kongkonakan
een goos id poumow taddot ponguu to mgo sundau iddos oruwa taddot mgo kopitan din woy id ikohiyan to anoy kow to oruwon gatus no mgo sundau duma to pittumpuun tohodponguda woy oruwon gatus no sundau no od piyod to pongassu amoyd poundiyonnon to esarea kangkan to alas nuwebe to bulli
anoy kow mandad to mgo kuda no od posokayan ki ablo taman tod pokoinguma sikandin diyot ki ubernador elix
oyyari row no waa morat nod kotomanan din diyot daan
opongnga idda id sosulat iddos ponguu to mgo sundau woy ini kos nokotaaw
d bontuhon no ubernador elix siyak si laudio isias kos mid sulat kaay
omonnu ka rad duwon
nis minuvu no id popiyod ku ruwot kikow id ammot sikandin to mgo udio woy od imotayan dan don nanoy
oppiya ra en su goos ku nosorollan no mohingod bos sikandin to oma deen id tovangan ku sikandin duma to koddin mgo sundau amoy konna od imotayan
omon to id kopii ku nod pokosaddoo to unayan to id ikahi ran no nokopuung kun sikandin to saa id piyod ku sikandin diyot mgo tohodhukum to udio
oy rutun nosorollan ku no waa en nopuungan din no saa no koilangan nod imotayan o od prisuwon
u iddos ikohiyon dan no nokopuung sikandin to saa toonaw mokaatag to kodsupak to kandan no pomokayon
o duwon id ponudtuu koddi no od lipongngon sikandin to mgo udio nokopuhawang a no goos ku sikandin id popiyod duwot kikow
oy id osengan kud iddos mgo minuvu nod ikahi no nokopuung kun sikandin to saa no duwon don to kikow od pousoy
a kaay ra en taman kos sulat ku
a id puungan taddot mgo sundau iddos id suhu kandan
een to novulli ron id atod dan si ablo taman to id inguma ran diyot bonuwa to ntipatris
oop no allow id livod iddos dumon mgo sundau riyot kampu
oy idda mandad so mgo sundau no id ponguda id ponayun sikandan nid atod ki ablo
o id inguma ran don diyot esarea id boggoy ran si ablo riyot bollad ni ubernador elix woy id toyyow ran kandin iddos sulat
o novasa rin idda id inturan din si ablo ko toho ingkon sikandin
a to nosorollan taddot gubernador no toho ilicia si ablo mid ikahi sikandin to d usayon ku kos ukahan dow otid inguma ron dini iddos id ponikahi no nokopuung ka to saa
opongnga id potomongngan din to mgo sundau si ablo riyot polasyu ni arin erodes
o id lihad don kos limmon allow iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no si nanias duma taddot dumon od pombuyyahon to mgo udio woy dos obugadu no si ertulo mid undiyon sikandin to ki ubernador elix amoyd popenek to kasu ki ablo
een to kodpoumow ni ubernador elix ki ablo id tigkanoy si ertulo nid ponudtuu taddot saa no nopuungan kun ni ablo
ahi rin to d bontuhon no ubernador iddos kotuihan du to kodponguu nokovoggoy konami to mosunay no koubpa daom to mowwet no timpu
ouraa mandad kos nopuungan du no nokopoudsuu kaayn ingod
een dakkoo kos kodposolamat doy kikow woy dii roy en ini od kolingawan ahad kannu
a pomon to konna koy od kopiyan nod pokolewang kikow od buyuwon doy nod pominoggon du pa sinahaw inis moobbava nod osengon doy
u nokita roy no inin minuvu orayd pokosamuk woy sikandin kos id bovaa to langun no ukahan diyot mgo udio kaay to intirut ingod
ikandin mandad kos ponguu to mgo minuvu no id ikuu taddot pomokayon nod ngoranan no azareno
onna ra idda ahad pa iddos templo od libmitan din nanoy piru id ammot doy sikandin
a od hukuman doyd nanoy sikandin ukit to konamin pomokayon piru id inguma si isias no ponguu to mgo sundau woy id ahaw rin si ablo kaayt konami
oy id ikahi sikandin no ko ondoy iddos duwon id popenek no saa no nopuungan ni ablo koilangan no kaay kun to kikow od pousoy tid intudinturan du inin minuvu od kosorollan du no mooggot en iddos langun nid ikahi roy no nokopuung sikandin to saa
a iddos duma rin no mgo udio id lonug mandad to kodampoo ki ablo woy id ikahi no mooggot en idda langun
opongnga idda id sinyasan taddot gubernador si ablo nod ooseng
een mid ikahi si ablo to ubernador nokosaddoo a no sikkow kos ponguu woy tohodhukum konami no mgo udio daom to mouraa ron no lahun
een oray a no nahaa nod pokoooseng kaayt isowwan du amoyd pokotavak taddot id ampoo ran koddi
tid intudintud ka od kosorollan du no konna pa lampas to sopuuoruwon allow pomon to kodundiyon ku to erusalem amoyd simba
a rutun konna bonnaa no nokita a to inin mgo udio no id apuu a to ahad ondoy riyot templo woy waa a mandad id bovaa to ukahan diyot mgo simbaan to udio o ahad ingkon no sakup taddon bonuwa
aa en id pokopokita ran kikow no posivonnaa taddot id ampoo ran koddi
iru iyon id pokoponudtuu ku no id simba a en diyot onama to konamin kovuyyahan ukit to kodikuu to nonaw mokaatag ki isas woy idda en kos ikohiyon dan no uhus no nonaw
d pomakoy a mandad taddot langun no uhu ni oises woy dos id sulat dangan to mgo propeta
ddos koimmanan ku riyot onama nokodiling da en taddot koimmanan kaayn mgo minuvu no od bodnawon din iddos langun nid poomatoy motallong man o mosaasaa
ni en kos unayan no od nokkaanokkaa a inaayun nod puung to moppiya su amoy od kosorollan ku no ollog kos koddin pinuungan diyot isowwan to onama woy riyot langun no minuvu
a iddos unayan no id undiyon a to erusalem su pila ron man no lahun no waa a nokolowwi rutun
een id livod a rutun amoyd piyod to mgo soopi no id tavang to mgo worowora woy amoy od boggoy a to buwis diyot templo
o nopongnga ku puungi riyot templo iddos od puungan atag to kodlinis id inguma kos mgo udio laggun tid bovuwis a rutun
oy iddon timpu waa samuk woy disok da kos mgo minuvu
ddon mgo minuvu mgo udio no toho sia
ikandan nanoy kos ollog nod undinit kikow woy od popenek to kasu ko duwon man nokita ran no saa no nopuungan ku
iru pomon to waa man sikandan dini poosengow inis mgo minuvu no kaay koungkay ko ondan kos saa no nokita ran iddot timpu no id intudinturan a riyot isowwan to mgo tohodhukum
yyos waa ossa nod kooseng dan no nopuungan ku no saa idda ra en so laggun to id lohinat a riyot isowwan dan mid ikahi a no ddos unayan no id intudinturan a koungkay su id pomakoy a nod bodnawon to onama iddos id poomatoy ron
a si ubernador elix dakkoo kos sinorollan din taddot nonaw mokaatag ki isas no od ikulon tod pompomakoy
een id tampod din iddos kodpominog to kasu woy kahi rin to ali kud od ipongngan kos kodhukum to kasu row otid inguma ron si isias no ponguu to mgo sundau
opongnga idda id suhu rin iddos kopitan to mgo sundau no od tomongngan si ablo piru od boggayan dad sikandin to disok no kolegguangan woy dii mandad od suggan iddos mgo oukuy rin nod atod to mgo koilonganon din
o id lihad kos pilon allow pomon tadda id livod diyot polasyu si ubernador elix duma taddot sawa rin no si rusila no sokkad no udio
a id poumow rin si ablo woy id pominog sikandin taddot kodpaabbotlabbot ni ablo mokaatag to kopomakoy ki isas rays
iru laggun tid ooseng si ablo mokaatag to motallong no kodbovotasan woy dos kodtohoo to ingowollon to lawa woy mokaatag taddot od ingumon allow to kodhukum noodoratan sikandin woy id osengan din si ablo to llog pa ruwon
tid pokolugaa a id poumow ku rad mandon sikkow
iru iyon bonnaa tadda id aangat sikandin nod boggayan ni ablo to soopi amoyd pokolegguang don sikandin diyot prisuwan
een inaayun din id poumow si ablo amoyd totongko kandin
a to id lihad kos oruwon lahun si ubernador elix novuwassan don ki orcio esto
iru pomon to id kopii ni ubernador elix no id kahaai sikandin taddot mgo ponguu to udio waa rin polegguanga si ablo riyot prisuwan
a iddos lammin gubernador no si esto id inguma riyot prubinsya to udea
o id lihad kos otollun allow id logkiyat sikandin pomon diyot esarea poundiyon to erusalem
utun iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio id popenek taddot od ikohiyon dan no saa no nopuungan kun ni ablo
oy id buyu ran ki ubernador esto no od poundiyonnon si ablo to erusalem
iru iddos kovonnaan duwon puhawang dan nod lipongngon si ablo riyot daan
d tavak si ubernador esto kahi rin to oprisu poron si ablo riyot esarea woy diid kouhoy pomon koungkay od livod a rutun
een porumanna row koddi riyot esarea iddos mgo ponguu row woy riyon dowd id popenek iddos od ikohiyon dow no saa no nopuungan din
a lampas to sokkad no simana iddos kodoubpa ni ubernador esto riyot erusalem idda pa id livod sikandin diyot esarea
oop no allow id poumow rin iddos duma rin no mgo tohodhukum woy id paangoy rin si ablo riyot prisuwan
o id inguma ron si ablo id livuungan sikandin to mgo udio no id pomon diyot erusalem woy mouraa iddos movoggat no saa no id ampoo ran kandin no waa id pokoposivonnaa ran
a id tavak ni ablo iddos id ampoo ran kandin kahi rin to aa nopuungan ku no nokosupak to pomokayon to mgo udio woy riyot templo ahad diyot hari to oma
omon to id kopii ni ubernador esto no id kahaai to mgo udio id inturan din si ablo kahi rin to d aman ka vo no id popiyod ku sikkow riyot erusalem amoy riyon kud od hukuman iddos id popenek dan no id puungan du kun no saa
id tavak si ablo to d lohinat a koungkay rinit isowwan du woy kaay a en ollog nod hukuman oyyos sikkow man kos id boggayan to hari to oma to kotungud nod hukum
okosaddoo ka oraroy no waa en nopuungan ku no saa riyot mgo udio
tik nokosupak a to guberno to oma woy nokopuung a to ahad ondan no saa no ollog nod silutan to kopotayan od tonggapon ku en idda
iru pomon to waa man kovonnaan taddot id popenek dan no nopuungan ku kun no saa konna en ollog no id boggoy a riyot bollad dan
een od aput a riyot hari to oma
a id potongkooy si ubernador esto to mgo duma rin no tohodhukum woy nopongnga idda id ikohiyan din si ablo to omon to id kopii ru man no riyon od pohukum to harit oma od poundiyonnon ku en baling sikkow
a waa nouhoy id inguma riyot esarea si arin gripa duma taddot sawa rin no si ernice amoyd pongumusta ki esto no lammin id unsad no gubernador
aggun tid oubpa pa sikandan dutun to pilon allow id ponudtulan ni ubernador esto iddos hari mokaatag ki ablo
ahi rin to uwon sokkad no pinirisu kaay no waa polegguanga ni elix iddot timpu no id unsad pa sikandin no gubernador
o kodundiyon ku to erusalem iddos mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis woy dos od pombuyyahon to mgo udio id popenek dan iddos od tommanon dan no saa no nopuungan din woy id buyu ran koddi nod silutan sikandin to kopotayan
iru id ikohiyan ku sikandan no konna botasan to mgo toho oma no od silut to minuvu no waa pa nokodisau taddot od ponikahi no nokopuung sikandin to saa woy waa sikandin novoggayi to timpu nod pokotavak
een id duma sikandan koddi no id undini to esarea
oy waa ku uwakki kos timpu oyyos soop no allow tadda id tigkonayan ku iddos kodhukum woy id paangoy ku iddon minuvu
a kunan ku moho ko movoggat iddos saa no nopuungan din
iru to id ooseng don iddos id ponikahi no nokopuung to saa inin minuvu idda ku pa nosorolli no waa vos morat no nopuungan din
yon da en opulanan dan iddos mokaatag to pomokayon dan woy toonaw mokaatag taddot sokkad no minuvu no id ngoranan ki isas no id patoy ron piru inaayun od osengon ni ablo no novadnow kun en sikandin
omon to waa goli sinorollan ku mokaatag kaay deen id inturan ku si ablo kod aman sikandin no diyon don od hukuman to erusalem
iru mid ikahi si ablo no od aput don baling sikandin diyot hari to oma amoy riyon don od ipongngan iddos kodhukum
een id poprisu ku pa sikandin taman to id pokopopiyod kud sikandin dutun
a kahin arin gripa to d kopii ku nod korinog inin minuvu
d tavak si ubernador esto nid ungketen to yya simag od korinog du sikandin
oop no allow id inguma onsi arin gripa woy si ernice diyon to hukumanan
o kodusok dan id pokitakita ran iddos bantug dan amoyd doongon to mgo minuvu
oy id duma kandan iddos mgo kopitan to sundau woy dos mgo minuvu no novantug to iddon bonuwa
a id paangoy ni ubernador esto si ablo
o riyon don sikandin id ooseng si ubernador esto kahi rin to arin gripa woy langun dow no kaay koungkay ini en kos minuvu no nokopuung kun to saa no id popenek kaayt koddi to mgo udio no rinit esarea woy riyot erusalem
d pomehes dan no ollog en nod imotayan inin minuvu
tag koddi waa nokita ku no id puungan din no morat no unayan nod silutan sikandin to kopotayan
oy pomon to id kopii rin man nod pohukum diyot hari to oma deen nopuhawang ku no id popiyod sikandin dutun
iru waa en ollog no id pokosulat ku no unayan amoy id popiyod ku inin minuvu riyot hari to oma
een id poundini ku sikandin kaayt koniyu labbi ron en kikow arin gripa su otid kopongnga ron sikandin od kointudinturan duwon don id pokosulat ku
yya su riyot koddin poomdom konna ollog no id popiyod iddos sokkad no pinirisu riyot hari to oma otik waa pa id paabbotlabbot iddos saa no nopuungan din
a kahi ni arin gripa ki ablo to impu rud nod ooseng amoyd pokotavak ka taddot saa no id ikahi ran no nopuungan du
een id sinyas si ablo nod ooseng don sikandin kahi rin to arin gripa id poomdom ku no dakkoon kahaan atag koddi inis kodoseng ku kaayt isowwan du amoy od pokotavak taddot langun nid ampoo koddi to mgo udio
yyos duwon dakkoon sinorollan du taddot langun no botasanon woy pomokayon to mgo udio
a od buyuwon ku no dii ka od koobbod nod pominog koddi
osorollan to langun no udio ko ondan kos koddin koubpa pomon poron to koonakoy ku riyot konamin ingod woy ahad mandad diyon to erusalem
tid ooseng da nanoy sikandan to mooggot od pokoposivonnaa ran no pomon poron dangan nosakup a to mgo ariseo no orayn oggot nod ikuu to keton pomokayon no mgo udio
a id poisau a koungkay kaayt koniyu pomon to id imman a taddot tandu to onama to keton kovuyyahan dangan no od bodnawon din iddos id poomatoy ron
oy siketa langun no udio duwon mandad koimmanan ta nod kotuman en inin tandu
een allow bulli id simba ki to onama
a koungkay od bontuhon no hari pomon da en kaayn koimmanan id bovallan to mgo udio inin unayan amoy id ampoo koddi
a sikiyu no mgo duma ku no udio mambo man to dii kow en od pokopomakoy no iddos onama od pokovadnow taddot id poomatoy ron
yya ahad siyak kunan ku mandad dangan ko koilangan nod puungan ku iddos langun no morat nod kogaha ku amoy od pokosupak a ra en taddot id pompomakoy ki isas no toho azaret
oy ini en kos id puungan ku to riyon a pa to erusalem
kit to kotungud no id boggoy koddi taddot mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis mouraa kos id poprisu ku no mgo minuvu to onama
oy sokkad a mandad taddot id aman nod silutan sikandan to kopotayan
ouraan timpu no id undiyonnan ku iddos langun no simbaan to mgo udio amoyd bodasan iddos ahad ondoy nod koingumannan ku rutun woy od pohoson ku sikandan no od soro nod pomakoy ki isas
omon to lampas no lingasa ku kandan id ponlupug ku sikandan ahad diyot moriyun mgo ingod amoyd posupittan
a ponayun mid ikahi si ablo to ni en kos unayan no id undiyon a to amasco pomon to kotungud woy suhu no id boggoy koddi to mgo ponguu to tohodbuwis amoyd ammot to ahad ondoy no id pomakoy ki isas
arin gripa laggun tid undiyon a to amasco to mokountud don kos allow duwon seaa no id pomon diyot datas to langit no moseaa pa to allow no nokotaddow koddi woy riyot mgo duma ku
ongopiloy koy langun woy norinog ku iddos bawos no id ooseng diyot kinohiyan no ebreo no mid ungketen to aulo aulo mambot id posupittan a nikkow
okoiling ka taddot minuvu no id sosipa to moirung no kayu oyyos sikkow ra en kos od kosokitan tid puungan du
a mid ikahi a to ndoy ka man ir
id tavak iddos ongaggon to iyak si isas no id posupittan du
nnow ka woy lohinat ka
d pokita a kikow su id aam kud sikkow no koddin uripon
oy id posivonnaa ru iddos id pokita ku kikow koungkay woy dos od poninguma pa
d polegguangon ku sikkow pomon diyot bollad to mgo udio woy riyon mandad to konna mgo udio no od poundiyonnan ku kikow
kit to nonaw ru od kopokesan kos mata ran woy idda en kos od potuntuu kandan nod tanan to morat no pinuungan no timbang mosukirom
a pomon diyot kotuusan ni oivuyan od porani sikandan to onama
oy ukit to kopomakoy ran koddi od koposinsyan kos mgo saa ran woyd kosokkad don sikandan taddot mgo minuvu no id aam to onama
een arin gripa id puungan ku iddos id pokita koddi no iling to tohenoppon pomon diyot datas to langit
d tigkanoy a nid ponudtuu mokaatag tod ongaggon unna riyot amasco riyon mandon to erusalem woy riyot langun no bonuwa to udea ahad diyot konna mgo udio
d nonawwan ku sikandan no koilangan no od sondit woyd tanan sikandan to mgo saa ran woy od porani to onama
oilangan en mandad no id pokita ran iddos mooggot no kodsondit ukit to moppiyon pinuungan
a ini en kos unayan no id ammot a to mgo udio riyot templo woy od imotayan a nanoy nikandan
iru id tovangan a inaayun to onama taman koungkay deen kaay a amoyd posivonnaa riyot langun nod pombontuhon woy riyot waa novantug
oy iddos id oseng ku nokodiling da en taddot noikahi ni oises woy taddot mgo propeta mokaatag tod ingumon kotomanan
yyos id ikahi ran no iddos esiyas koilangan en nod ukit to kosupittan woyd patoy
oy id ikahi ran mandad no sikandin en kos unnon novadnow amoyd posivonnaa riyot mgo udio woy riyon mandad to konna mgo udio mokaatag to koowangan to poomdom amoy od kosorollan dan ko momonnu sikandan id tobbus to onama
aggun tid ooseng pa si ablo id ooseng to monokkaa si ubernador esto no mid ungketen to d busawon kad ayu ablo
kos lampas no kotuihan du ika en kos od pokovusow kikow
iru mid tavak si ablo to d bontuhon no ubernador konna a od busawon
ooggot en kos id ponikahi ku woy motallong kos koddin poomdom
osorollan ni arin gripa ini langun deen waa kodaangaang ku nod ooseng diyot isowwan din su nokosaddoo a no duwon sinorollan din taddot langun nid ikahi ku oyya su iddon mgo notomanan mokaatag ki isas waa nokoollos
a arin gripa od pomakoy ka vo taddot langun nid sulat to mgo propeta
okosaddoo a no id pomakoy ka
id ikahi si arin gripa to d popoomdom ka ayu no goos a ra nikkow od kopiyod to kodpomakoy ki isas
id tavak si ablo to d kouhoy man o goos ini kos koddin dosalon diyot onama no konna ra sikkow ko konna ahad iddos langun nid pominog koddi koungkay od kovovallan nod pompomakoy iling koddi piru dii a od kopiyan nod bokuwon kow to kodina iling koddi
a nopongnga idda si arin gripa si ubernador esto si ernice woy dos langun no id ponunsad dutun id lohinat su od ponuli ron
o id ponleggua ran don id poikohiyoy sikandan to nin minuvu waa morat no nopuungan din deen konna ollog nod silutan sikandin to kopotayan o od prisuwon
d osengan mandad ni arin gripa si ubernador esto kahi rin to d polegguangon nanoy sikandin diyot prisuwan otik waa id aput diyot hari to oma
o nopuhawang onni esto nod poundiyonnon koy to ingod to talia id boggayan dan to kotungud si ulio nod bantoy ki ablo woy taddot duma rin no mgo pinirisu
a ini si ulio sokkad no kopitan to mgo sundau to oma no od ngoranan no atalyon to hari to oma
iyot esarea id sakoy koy to bollangay no id pomon diyot dramitio nod logkiyat don poundiyot od ponduurungguwan to bollangay no riyot prubinsya to sia
d duma konami si ristarco no toho esalonica no sakup to prubinsya to acedonia
oop no allow id inguma koy riyot bonuwa to idon
rayn moppiya si ulio riyot ki ablo woy id aman sikandin nod undiyot kandin iddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy amoyd kotovangan to mgo koilonganon din
a id tanan koy riyot idon no id sakoy mandon to bollangay
omon to od kosuggung doy kos kaamag id liyu koy riyot divauy to isla to ipre no od pokosinaung taddot kaamag
d baya koy pantok to prubinsya to ilicia woy riyot amfilia taman to nokoinguma koy riyot bonuwa to ira no sakup to prubinsya to icia
a rutun duwon bollangay no id pomon diyot bonuwa to lejandria no nokita ni ulio no kopitan to mgo sundau
ddon bollangay od poundiyot talia deen id paalin koy nikandin tid posakoy tadda
aom to pilon allow orayn monanoy iddos id sokayan doy su od pokosuggung koy to kaamag woy noosayan koy no nokoinguma riyot pantok to bonuwa to ido
a amoy od pokoposinaung koy taddot kaamag id liyu koy riyot divauy to isla to reta woy riyon koy id baya to pantok to bonuwa to almon
oosayan koy rad en ahad id pongulibpit koy ra taman to nokoinguma koy riyot lugaa nod ngoranan to oppiya nod uurungguwan
nin lugaa konna moriyu pomon diyot bonuwa to asea
omon to orayn nolewang kos iponawon doy nosoutan koy to timpu no mosuppit don nod pomollangay su timpu ron to bagyu
een id ikohiyan dan ni ablo to go duma ku nosorollan ku no mosuppit kos od kotomanan ta otik od ponayun ki nod pomollangay
oy nosorollan ku mandad no konna ra inis mgo luwan woy inis bollangay kos od korattan ko konna saddook ahad pa inis keton umuu od kowora peen
iru iddos kopitan to mgo sundau waa rin pomokaya iddos id ikahi ni ablo
yon din baling pomokaya iddos id ikahi taddot kopitan to bollangay woy dos komunoy tadda
omon to iddos od duurungguwan to bollangay rutun konna moppiya nod tahaddan timpu to bagyu deen kourallan to duma roy od kopiyan nod ponayun su saddook od pokoinguma koy rad diyot prubinsya to enice woy riyon koy pa tahad od ubpa
u iddos enice no sakup to isla to reta od duurungguwan to bollangay no moppiya nod tahaddan timpu to bagyu oyyos dii idda od kosuhat to kaamag
a iddon timpu monanoy ra kos kaamag pomon diyot boovahan lomig to kowanan woy riyot poomdom to mgo duma roy kopakoy rad od pomollangay
een id tuntun dan iddos timboggat no batu woy nopongnga id pongulibpit koy riyot isla to reta
iru to waa nouhoy id inguma kos orayn monokkaan kaamag pomon diyot boovahan lomig to ivang no id baya riyot davow to iddon isla
okosuhat idda to bollangay roy woy pomon tadda dii koy od pokosogsog deen id potiayun koyd baling
o nokopantok koy riyot disok no isla to auda nokoposinaung koy sinahaw rutun deen id polimokutan doy tid popenek iddos disok no bollangay amoy diid koonnod
opongnga idda id ponoggasan doy tid lambod to ikot iddos bollangay amoy diid kohobba
oy pomon to allak dan nod pokosagged iddos bollangay riyot paok no pantok to ibpit to ingod to ibya id luun dan iddos layag woy id potiayun dan dobbo
yas id gusonggusong to monokkaan kaamag iddos bollangay woy id soombiyug idda to doorakkoon baud
een to soop no allow id tigkonayan dan don tid ponuug iddos dumon luwan amoyd mahan dos bollangay
a riyot soop peen no allow idda ron mandon so dumon kosongkapan taddot bollangay kos id ponuug dan
aom to mouraan allow waa seaa to allow no nokita roy ahad iddos mgo bituon woy id ponayun peen iddos monokkaan kaamag
ddon timpu wora koyd id imman nod kouyag pa
a pomon to pila ron no allow no waa koy nokokaan id lohinat si ablo woy mid ikahi to go duma ku otik id pominog kow ra nanoy taddot id ikahi ku no dii ki pa od logkiyat pomon diyot isla to reta waa ta nanoy noukiti inis kosupittan woy waa noratti kos mgo luwan
iru koungkay iyon ku od buyuwon koniyu no yo kowd kaanu oyyos waa ahad sokkad koniyu nod patoy ini ra en so bollangay kos od kohobba
u genot bulli iddos onama nid pongomunoy koddi woy id simbaanan ku id poundini rin kaayt koddi iddos sokkad taddot mgo ponolihan din
id ikahi iddos ponolihan to o kod kovaakki ablo
u koilangan en nod pokoisau ka riyot hari to oma
oy pomon da en kikow od tovangan to onama iddos langun no duma ru kaayn bollangay
een mgo suwod ohotta row kos koniyun ginawa su id salig a to onama no od tumanon din en iddos id ikahi rin koddi
iru od piyoddon to kaamag inin bollangay woy od kohobba riyot sokkad no isla
a sopuuoppat don no bulli no id potiayun koy ra en to monokkaan kaamag diyot dahat to editeraneo
o tongngovulli ron diyot poomdom taddot mgo tohodpomollangay morani koyd diyot ibpit to dahat
een id toppong dan iddos koroommoy to dahat ukit to tali
oy ukit tadda nosorollan dan no oruwompuun leppa robbo kos koroommoy
aa nouhoy pomon dutun id toppong dan mandon idda woy nosorollan dan no sopuulimma robbon leppa
omon to allak dan no od kopiyod woyd kohobba iddos bollangay riyot botuwon id uug dan iddos oppat no timboggat no batu riyon lomig to lobbut taddot bollangay amoyd soro woy id pondasaa ran nod kaallow ron
a iddos mgo tohodpomollangay id nangkap to poukit nod pokopaahuy pomon diyot bollangay deen id tigkonayan dan tid poponog diyot dahat iddos disok no bollangay su id pouvaguvag dan nod taaw to mgo timboggat no putow riyon lomig to isowwan taddot bollangay
iru id osengan ni ablo iddos kopitan to mgo sundau woy dos mgo sakup din kahi rin to tik dii sikandan od polintotuwos dinit bollangay dii kow en od kouyag
een id gottas taddot mgo sundau iddos mgo ikot taddot disok no bollangay woy id podtohon dan idda riyot dahat
o od kaallowallow ron id inggat dan ni ablo nod kaan
ahi rin to opuuoppat don koungkay no allow no id tiis kow no waa en kaan woy inaayun dow od poomdommon ko kannu od soro kos kaamag
een od buyuwon ku koniyu no kaan kow pa amoyd monokkaa kow su langun dow waa ahad songosilag to bowvuu to uu row nod kowora oyyos waa en od komonnu koniyu
opongnga osenga ni ablo idda mid angoy sikandin to paan woy id posolamat to onama riyot isowwan to langun
opongnga idda id pontoppiktoppik din idda woy mid kaan sikandin
a id moppiya kos songnga ran woy mid kaan dan langun
angun doy nid sakoy taddon bollangay oruwon gatus woy pittumpuuannom
o nongovuung don iddos langun id ponuug dan diyot dahat iddos mgo luwan no trigu amoyd mahan peen iddos bollangay
a to nosollom don waa nosorolli taddot mgo tohodpomollangay ko ingkon don sikandan lomig piru duwon nopantow ran no nokosoksok no ibpit to dahat no paokkon
een nopuhawang dan no riyon dan id poisau dos bollangay
urisu id ponggottas dan iddos ikot taddot mgo timboggat no batu woy id podtohon dobbo riyot dahat
d ponakas dan mandad iddos mgo tali taddot timun
opongnga id bollat dan iddos layag amoy od kopoled sikandan to kaamag poundiyot ibpit to dahat
iru waa koy nokoinguma rutun su nokopudsong man iddos bollangay riyot movavow no paokkon deen dii ron od pokowaong su nokopallok man kos suungan tadda
dda mandad so lomig diyot lobbut taddot bollangay nohobba ron pomon to doorakkoon baud nod pokoraag
a id pomuhawang don nanoy iddos mgo sundau nod imotayan iddos mgo pinirisu amoy waa ahad sokkad kandan nod pokolanguy poundiyot ibpit woyd pokopaahuy
omon to diid kopiyan iddos kopitan to mgo sundau nod kaapii si ablo taddot puhawang dan id toholan din sikandan nod imatoy taddot mgo pinirisu
a id pounna rin iddos langun no od pongkotuig nod languy no od timballu woyd ponlanguy poundiyon to ibpit
oy idda mandad so diid pongkotuig od tinundug da nod kapot taddot id ponggampung no kayu no nongowengkas pomon diyot bollangay
oy ukit tadda nokoinguma koy langun diyot ibpit to dahat no waa nomonnu
a to nokogoun koyd pomon diyot dahat nosorollan doy no alta vos kos ngaran to isla no norungguwan doy
ddos mgo mohingod dutun orayn noeruwan konami
omon to id uran woy orayn mohonnow id totavun sikandan amoyd pokita to kodolitolit dan konami
a si ablo id poningkayu amoy id tavun piru to kodtaaw rin tadda tigkow ron duwon uwod nod laas no id leggua pomon ayu to nomonitan woy mid tuktuk idda to bollad din
o nokita taddot mgo mohingod dutun iddos uwod nid bitinbitin poron diyot bollad din mid ikahi sikandan to okoimatoy en inin minuvu
had nokolegguang don sikandin pomon to kosupittan diyot dahat od patoy en
u iddos id pokoid kandin koungkay dii en od aman nod kouyag pa sikandin
iru id pomiligpilig ni ablo iddos uwod diyot apuy woy waa en sikandin nomonnu
d oongatan dan kod lobbag bo iddos bollad ni ablo woy tigkow sikandin od patoy piru to notahadtahad don nokita ran no waa sikandin nomonnu
een nopalin kos poomdom dan woy kahi ran to okkad sikandin no monama
a morani riyot ibpit to dahat no id gounan doy duwon dakkoon livuta no id pongomunayan ni ublio no ponguu taddon isla
d paallus koy nikandin diyot baoy rin woy dutun koy pa id poubpa daom to otollun allow
aggun to riyon koy nokosasang en mandad no novohokan iddos amoy ni ublio no id momonit woyd pongindos to longossa
een id undiyonnan sikandin ni ablo amoyd dosalan woy id torungngan din to bollad din iddos uu to amoy ni ublio woy nouliyan sikandin
a pomon tadda iddos langun nod pongkovohokan taddon isla id undiyot ki ablo woy nongouliyan en mandad sikandan
een mouraa kos kopiyannan no id pomboggoy ran konami
oy riyot kodlogkiyat doy id popiyoddan koy peen nikandan to langun nod koilonganon doy to kodipanow
o id lihad kos otollun buwan idda koy pa nokaawa riyot isla to alta
a id logkiyat koy nid sakoy to bollangay no id aangat mandad nod lihad iddos timpu to bagyu
ddon bollangay id pomon diyot lejandria no id ngoranan to sopping no monama
a id dunggu koy riyot bonuwa to iracusa woy id oubpa koy pa rutun daom to otollun allow
omon dutun id ponayun koy nid pomollangay woy nokoinguma koy riyot bonuwa to egio
oop no allow tadda id poled koy to kaamag no id pomon diyot boovahan lomig to kowanan
een to soop mandon no allow goos koy nokorunggu riyot bonuwa to uteoli
utun nokita roy iddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy woy id owiran koy pa nikandan daom to sokkad no simana
opongnga id tollus koyd nid ipanow poundiyon to oma
a nokorinog iddos mgo suwod to kopomakoy riyot oma no id inguma koyd deen id undiyon dan to olingki ni pio woy riyot sokkad no lugaa nod ngoranan to tollun imollayan amoy od tommu ra en konami
o nokita ran ni ablo id posolamat sikandin diyot onama woy nahaa kos ginawa rin
a to id inguma koyd diyot oma waa id taaw si ablo riyot prisuwan ko konna id boggayan sikandin to kolegguangan nod pokooubpa no siksikandin da piru duwon sokkad no sundau nod bantoy kandin
o id lihad kos otollun allow id poumow ni ablo iddos mgo ponguu to udio riyot oma
o nolivuung don sikandan mid ikahi si ablo to go suwod waa nopuungan ku no saa riyot mgo duma ta no udio woy waa ku mandad id supak iddos botasanon to keton kovuyyahan piru id poprisu a moho nikandan diyot erusalem woy id boggoy riyot bollad to mgo toho oma
opongnga a intudinturi to mgo toho oma od sovukan ad nanoy nikandan su nokita ran no waa en nopuungan ku no saa no unayan nod silutan to kopotayan
iru pomon to diid aman iddos dumon mgo udio nod sovukan a deen nopohos a nid aput kaayt hari to oma ahad waa id popenek ku no saa to mgo duma ta no udio oyyos waa man morat no songnga ku kandan
urisu ini en kos unayan no id buyu a nod pokitannoy woyd potongkooy ki
u noikottan a koungkay to kodina pomon da en to id pomakoy a no id inguma ron iddos esiyas nod oongatan pa to koubbaran ni srael
a kahi ran ki ablo to aa man notanggap doy no sulat pomon diyot udea mokaatag kikow
oy dos mgo duma ta no udio nid inguma pomon diyon waa man sokkad kandan nid posaddoo o id ooseng no duwon morat nid puungan du
iru id kopii roy nod korinog ko ondan kos kikown poomdom su nosorollan doy no ahad ingkon no lugaa od supak en kos mgo minuvu taddot pomokayon no id nonaw ru
een id aam sikandan to sokkad no allow nod pominog ki ablo
o id inguma ron iddon allow mouraan minuvu nid undiyon to ubpan no id tahaddan ni ablo
a pomon to sollom taman to novulli id paabbotlabbot din kandan iddos mokaatag to kodharit onama dos id sulat to mgo propeta woy dos mgo uhu ni oises amoyd pomakoy ran ki isas
uwon mgo minuvu nid pongimbonnaa taddot id ikahi ni ablo woy duwon en mandad iddos wora
a pomon to waa nokodsokkad kos poomdom dan id ponuli sikandan
iru to waa ran pa nokoipanow mid ikahi si ablo to onnaa en iddos id oseng to his no spiritu riyot keton kovuyyahan ukit ki propeta saias no mid ungketen to ndiyon ka woy osengiyu kos mgo minuvu to ahad od monnuwon dow tod pominog dii kow en od pokaabbotwoy ahad od monnuwon dow tod totongtong dii kow en od pokokita
u inin mgo minuvu mgo motoggas kos uu
uwon tolinga ran piru diid pokorinog
d sobpongngan dan kos mata woy tolinga ransu otik dii ran od puungan idda od pokorinog woyd pokokita sikandan no idda en kos unayan nod pokaabbot dan nanoy ko ondan kos motallong
a ko ungketen od aput sikandan dinit koddi woyd bowiyan ku sikandan
onayun peen mid ikahi si ablo to een koilangan nod kosorollan dow no iddos ponudtulon to onama mokaatag to kodtobbus atag en mandad to konna mgo udio woy sikandan od pominog en
o nopongnga osenga ni ablo idda id ponuli iddos mgo udio woy id ayas peen iddos kodpoopuloy ran a id oubpa si ablo riyot baoy no id boyaran din ipat buwan daom to oruwon lahun
d olitolit din iddos langun nid pongumballoy kandin
o waa kodaangaang id ponudtuu rin iddos mokaatag to kodharit onama woy id nonaw rin mandad iddos mokaatag tod ongaggon no si isas rays woy waa id baavag kandin
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay woy uripon a ni isas rays
d aam a to onama amoyd kovovallan no apostoles woy id poossa a nikandin amoy od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan to onama
nin oppiyon inoggan tapoy id tandu to onama woy nokosulat ini riyot osulat no ahit onama ukit to mgo propeta rin
ni en kos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag taddot nak din no si isas rays
ominuvu sikandin no id pomon to lubbad ni arin avid
oy noposivonnalan no nak en sikandin to onama iddot novadnow sikandin ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
kit ki isas rays notanggap ku iddos kopiyannoy to onama woy novovallan a no apostoles
yya su id kopii rin no iddos langun no konna mgo udio no riyot nokodossoosson ingod od koponudtulan to oppiyon inoggan amoyd kopiyod sikandan nod pomakoy woyd dumoruma ki isas woy od koposivontuhan kos ngaran din
a sikiyu nod pompomakoy ruwot oma apii kowd en mandad taddot mgo minuvu no id aam to onama amoyd kosokkad diyot ki isas rays
een id sulat ku ini atag koniyu langun duwon to oma no id ginowannan to onama woy id aam nod kovovallan no mgo minuvu rin
uopa nod kotanggap dow iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta woy od ongaggon no si isas rays
a unnot langun od posolamat a to onama ku ukit ki isas rays atag koniyu langun su novantug kos kopomakoy row riyon to intirut ingod
okosaddoo kos onama no allow bulli id dasaa a atag koniyu
ikandin kos od tumanon ku riyot tivuk no pusung ku ukit to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag taddot nak din
d dasaa a inaayun no otik id kopiit onama od pokounduwon a to koniyu su saddook koungkay a pa od pokosakat
akkoo en kos ginawa ku nod kokita ku sikiyu su amoy id pokononaw ku mandad koniyu iddos id nonaw koddi to his no spiritu amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy row
yon kohulugan ku no od pokodtovangoy ki nod mosalig kos keton kopomakoy oyyos od kotovangan a ukit to koniyun kopomakoy woy sikiyu mandad od kotovangan ukit to koddin kopomakoy
go suwod id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no kopila ad mid pomuhawang nod unduwon to koniyu piru duwon od pokobaavag koddi taman koungkay
d kopii ku no duwon mandad mgo minuvu ruwot koniyu nod kopiyod ku to kodpomakoy ki isas rays iling taddot id puungan ku riyot konna mgo udio no riyot nokodossoosson lugaa nid undiyonnan ku
u noheddam ku en no koilangan id ponudtuu ku kos oppiyon inoggan diyot ahad ingkon no mgo minuvu dos id ubpa riyot mgo bonuwa woy dos diyot mgo buvunganon diyon to mgo minuvu no mowwet no sinorollan ahad diyot waa mgo sinorollan
urisu dakkoo en kos ginawa ku nod pokoponudtuu a mandad to oppiyon inoggan duwot koniyu to oma
onna ku en id koilow iddos kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan oyya su ini en kos kotuusan to onama to kodtobbus to langun nid pomakoy labbi ron iddos mgo udio woy idda mandad so konna mgo udio
u ukit kaayt oppiyon inoggan od kosorollan ta no id podmotallong to onama kos minuvu ukit da en to kopomakoy
yyos noikahi riyon to osulat no ahit onama no ddos minuvu no id podmotallong to onama ukit to kandin no kopomakoy od pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
iru iddos onama riyot datas to langit id pokita to lampas no langot din taddot mgo minuvu no od ponsupak kandin woyd puung to kororattan
yyos id tombunan dan iddos kovonnaan mokaatag kandin ukit taddot morat no pinuungan dan
onna en sikandan od pokoikahi no waa saddoo ran mokaatag to onama oyyos idda ron en so onama kos id posaddoo kandan
onnaa en no diid kokita kos onama piru pomon poron to kodbovaa to ingod od kokita ran iddos waad tomanon no kotuusan woy botasanon to onama ukit taddot binovallan din
een konna ran od pokoikahi no waa saddoo ran mokaatag kandin
had nosorollan dan no duwon onama piru waa sikandan id posivantug woyd posolamat kandin
yon dan id poomdom iddos mgo ebbaw woy waa mgo koruanon woy pomon tadda nosukiromman kos poomdom dan mokaatag to kovonnaan
d tommanon dan no moraom kos koovottan dan piru mgo bangog bos sikandan
yyos waa ran simbaana iddos onama no waa kopotayan ko konna iyon dan baling simbaana iddos konna bonnaan mgo monama no iling to boyo to minuvu no duwon kopotayan dos mgo manuk nod layanglayang dos mgo oyama woy dos mgo uwod
urisu id podtohon don sikandan to onama riyot kodpuung to molibmit no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran woy pomon kaay orayn mokoilowilow iddos pinuungan dan diyot mgo duma ran
aa ran tonggapa iddos kovonnaan mokaatag to onama woy iyon dan pomokaya iddos uhus
u id simba ran baling taddot mgo binovallan to onama konna iddos ohodbovaa
ikandin da kos ollog nod doongon taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a pomon to ungketen kos pinuungan to mgo minuvu id podtohon don sikandan to onama riyot kodpuung taddot mokoilowilown mgo ingowollon to lawa ran
had iddos mgo baay konnad mama kos id kopii ran ko konna idda ron so iling dan da en no baay kos od loyukan dan
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo mama konnad mgo baay kos id kopii ran ko konna idda ron so iling dan da en no mama kos od loyukan dan
okoilowilow iddos pinuungan dan diyot iling dan no mgo mama
oy pomon taddot ebbaw no pinuungan dan od silutan en sikandan to onama loppa taddot nopuungan dan
omon to id elle ran ahad taddot kodpopoomdom mokaatag to onama id podtohon din sikandan nod kouripon taddot ebbaw no kodpopoomdom dan
een id puungan dan iddos konna nanoy ollog nod kopuungan
ouripon sikandan to nokodossoosson kororattan kodlooggod kosina kodimatoy kodpoopuloy kodloimbung woy kodpomuhawang to kodpuung to morat diyot mgo duma ran
d posoupottoy sikandan od podorattoy id kolingasai ran kos onama od ayuayu to mgo duma ran od poratasdatas od pobporoong woy od nonangkap dan to poukit nod puung to morat
ii ran od dumoruma to amoy woy inoy ran
go bangog sikandan diid tuman to mgo tandu woy waa en ginawa woy eru ran diyot dumon minuvu
had nosorollan dan don iddos ollog no suhu to onama no iddos mgo minuvu nod puung to ungketen ollog en kandan iddos kopotayan no waad tomanon piru id ponayun dan peen taddon pinuungan
oy konna ra idda od doongon dan iddos mgo minuvu nod puung to iling tadda
a saddook duwon od ikahi no ollog en nod silutan to onama iddon morat no mgo minuvu
iru sikkow nid oseng to ungketen bantoy ka su id hukuman du mandad kos kougolingun du oyyos ungketen dad en mandad kos pinuungan du
osorollan ta no ollog kos kodhukum to onama taddot mgo minuvu nod puung to morat
iru ondoy ka man nod hukum to taddot pinuungan to duma no iling dad meen tadda kos pinuungan du
addook od popoomdom ka no pomon to kopiyannoy to onama mowwet kos posinsya woy kodtiis din no kunan du kod pokolegguang ka taddot kodsilut din
aa ka vo nokosaddoo no iddos unayan nid pokita to onama kikow iddos kopiyannoy rin amoy duwon pa timpu ru nod sondit woyd tanan to mgo saa ru
iru pomon to motoggas man kos uu ru woy dii ka od sondit id podluntudluntud du kos langot to onama kikow riyot od ingumon allow nod hukum don sikandin
o iddon allow od kokita to langun iddos ollog no kodhukum din
yya su iddos onama od boggoy to ollog no ganti riyot ipat sokkad no minuvu loppa taddot nopuungan din
uwon mgo minuvu no od nokkaanokkaa nod puung to moppiya su iyon ingowollon dan no od doongon woyd posivontuhan to onama woy od boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
ddon mgo minuvu od kovoggayan en to umuun waad tomanon
iru atag taddot mgo minuvu no iyon dan od poomdommon iddos kandan no kopiyannan woy od elleyan dan iddos kovonnaan amoyd puung to morat od kosahapan dan en iddos lampas no langot to onama
yyos duwon en kosupittan woy koosayan nid pouma rin taddot langun nod puung to morat labbi ron iddos mgo udio woy idda mandad so konna mgo udio
iru iddos od puung to moppiya od doongon woyd posivontuhan to onama woy od boggayan to kosunayan diyot ginawa ran labbi ron iddos mgo udio woy idda mandad so konna mgo udio
yyos waa od podmusingon to onama
os langun no mosaasaa od silutan en to onama
a iddos konna mgo udio no waa sinorollan taddot mgo uhu ni oises od silutan en to onama piru konna ukit taddon mgo uhu
iru iddos mgo udio no duwon sinorollan taddot mgo uhu ni oises od silutan en sikandan ukit taddon mgo uhu
u konna iddos od pominog da to mgo uhu kos od komotallong diyot kodontong to onama ko konna iddos od tuman tadda
os konna mgo udio waa saddoo ran taddot mgo uhu ni oises
iru ahad iling tadda duwon dad notuman dan taddot mgo uhu su iling to nokotaaw ron tapoy riyot ginawa ran iddos kodpuung to moppiya
kit taddot pinuungan dan od kokita no nokotaaw riyot ginawa ran iddos mgo uhu
yya su riyot poomdom dan nokosaddoo ran ko moppiya o morat iddos pinuungan dan
uwon timpu no iddos poomdom dan iling tod oseng no morat kos pinuungan dan woy duwon mandad timpu no iling tod oseng idda no moppiya iddos pinuungan dan
a otid inguma ron iddos allow to kodhukum id boggoy to onama ki isas rays kos kotungud nod hukum taddot langun no nokoollos no pinuungan woy poomdom to minuvu
oy ini en kos nokotaaw riyot oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku
a sikiyu nid ikahi no mgo udio kow od pososalig kow nod tonggapon kow to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu woy id pobporoong kow peen taddot koroniyan dow riyon to onama
osorollan dow ko ondan kos id kopiit onama atag koniyu woy od kotuig kow nod podtiitimbang ko ondan kos ollog nod puungan oyyos nopohinonawwan dowd man ini riyot mgo uhu
d pososalig kow nod pokononaw kow taddot butud diyot kovonnaan mokaatag to onama woy od pokopaawang kow taddot mgo minuvu no riyot mosukirom
d pososalig kow mandad nod pokononaw kow taddot mgo minuvun waa koovottan to kovonnaan woy taddot mgo minuvu no iling to anak no tobbo poron kos koovottan mokaatag to onama oyyos diyon don man to koniyu iddos mgo uhu no noponnu to langun no sinorollan woy kovonnaan
ikiyu no mgo udio od tommanon dow nid nonaw kow to duma piru waa row man puungi kos id nonaw row
d liilivoddon dow tod nonaw no morat kos kodponakow piru iddos duma koniyu od ponakow man
omman dow no morat kos od laayuk to konna row sawa piru idda man mandad kos od puungan taddot duma koniyu
d kolingasai row iddos mgo ribultu nod simbaanon to konna mgo udio piru iddos duma koniyu od ponakow man diyot mgo simbaan dan
d pobporoong kow no sikiyu kos nokosaddoo to mgo uhu to onama piru id poilawan dow man iddos onama pomon to kodsupak dow tadda
ling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to omon da en koniyu no mgo udio od sumpoliton to konna mgo udio iddos onama
a sikiyu no mgo udio notupuwan kow patow nid aam kow to onama
os botasanon to kodpotupu duwon dad koruanon otid tumanon dow iddos mgo uhu
iru ko dii row idda od tumanon nokodiling kow ra en taddot konna mgo udio no diid potupu
ngketen dad en mandad iddos konna mgo udio
tik id tuman dan iddos mgo uhu iling dad to notupuwan sikandan diyot kodontong to onama
een ahad waa notupui iddos konna mgo udio piru ukit to kodtuman dan to mgo uhu to onama id pokita ran no sikiyu no mgo udio ollog en nod silutan to onama oyyos waa kow man id tuman taddot mgo uhu ahad duwon don en to koniyu iddos nosulat no mgo uhu woy ahad notupuwan kow
ndoy man kos mooggot no udio woy mooggot no notupuwan
onna en iddos duwon longossa to udio woy konna iddos duwon patow to lawa no notupuwan don
yya su iddos mooggot no kodpotupu no duwon dakkoon koruanon diyot kodontong to onama idda en so kodlammi to his no spiritu to ginawa to minuvu konna iddos ampow ra woy dos kodtuman taddot nosulat no mgo uhu
a inin minuvu ahad dii sikandin od doongon to duma piru od doongon en sikandin to onama
a ko ungketen saddook od pokointud kow no duwon bo koruanon to keton pogkoudio kuntra taddot konna mgo udio
oy duwon bo koruanon to keton botasanon to kodpotupu
yya dakkoo en kos koruanon tadda labbi ron to siketa kos id solihan to onama taddot kahi rin
a bonnaa en no duwon mgo udio no waa mid tuman taddot kahit onama
iru konna kohulugan no diid tumanon to onama iddos mgo tandu rin
had bouhuson peen kos langun no minuvu piru iddos onama dii en od ouhus
ling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama mokaatag kandin no mid ungketen to d koposivonnalan no motallong ka ukit to id ponikahi ru
oy ahad peen duwon od uug kikow no nokopuung ka to saa od koposivonnalan no waa en saa ru
a saddook duwon od ikahi no tid puung ki to morat moppiya idda su orayd kokita no motallong en kos onama
een konna ollog nod silutan ki nikandin
d oseng ku ini su duwon en mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no ungketen kos kodpopoomdom iru konna bonnaa idda
yya su otik konna motallong kos onama konna en sikandin od pokohukum to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
addook duwon pa od ikahi no kit to konamin botasan no bouhuson orayd kokita no dii en od ouhus kos onama woy od koroong peen sikandin
a ko ungketen mambo man tod silutan koy pa no mosaasaa
os od ikahi to ungketen nokoiling tod osengon dan no oppiya iddos kodpuung to morat su moppiya kos undahon tadda
uwon dumon minuvu nod doddoraat konami su ungketen kun kos id ponnonaw roy
iru konna bonnaa idda
urisu inin mgo minuvu ollog en nod silutan to onama
a sikiyu no mgo udio saddook od popoomdom kow no moppiya ki pa taddot konna mgo udio
onna en
u noikahi kud koniyu no iddos langun udio man o konna nouripon en to saa
yyos iling en kaay kos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to aa en ahad sokkad no motallong diyot kodontong to onama
aa en ahad sokkad no nokaabbot mokaatag to onama woy waa en od kopiyan nod tuman tid kopii rin
ddos langun no minuvu id inoyyug to onama woy nouug no waa koruanon dan diyot kodontong din
aa en ahad sokkad nid puung to moppiya
os osengan dan nokoiling to ngarog no id pomon to noukatan no lobbong su molibmit kos mgo osengan nod leggua riyot bivig dan
d gamit dan kos dila ran to kodaakaa no od pokodoraat to duma iling to laas to uwod
ddos mgo bivig dan orayd sosumpalit woy noponnut mosakit no mgo osengan
isokdisok no unayan mahan kos bollad dan nod imatoy to duma
had ingkon dan od undiyon od kotuwossan to koddoraat woy kodposuppit iddos od pongkoukitan dan
ii ran od kotuig nod oubpa no duwon kosunayan
oy waa en allak dan to onama
a koungkay nosorollan ta no iddos langun nid ikahi riyot mgo uhu atag en keta no mgo udio no noiraom taddon mgo uhu amoy waa ahad sokkad nod pokooseng no waa saa rin woy dos langun od isau en to onama amoyd hukuman
yyos waa ahad sokkad no minuvu nod komotallong diyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu
u ukit taddot mgo uhu od kosorollan to minuvu no mosaasaa en sikandin
iru koungkay id posaddoo ron to onama iddos osson poukit nod komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong din
nin poukit noposivonnalan ukit taddot nosulat no mgo uhu ni oises woy taddot id sulat to mgo propeta
d komotallong diyot kodontong to onama iddos ahad ondoy ukit to kopomakoy rin ki isas rays oyyos waa od podmusing to onama
u nokosaa iddos langun no minuvu woy waa ahad sokkad no nokoloppa to botasanon nid kopiit onama
iru pomon to kopiyannoy to onama no id gasa rin keta id podmotallong ki nikandin ukit taddot pinuungan ni isas rays no id tobbus keta
d popiyod sikandin to onama amoy id buwis atag to saa to langun no minuvu
a ukit to longossa rin nid tihis diyon to krus od koposinsyan kos mgo saa ta otid pomakoy ki kandin
d puungan ini to onama su amoy id pokita no motallong en sikandin oyyos dangan pomon to mowwet no kodtiis din id podtohon din kos saa to mgo minuvu
iru koungkay id potiyang to onama ki isas iddos saa to langun no minuvu amoy id pokita no ollog en kos kodhukum din woy amoy od komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong din ukit to kopomakoy ki isas
a ko ungketen duwon bo id pokopobporoong ta
aa en
u od komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama konna ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu ko konna ukit da en to keton kopomakoy
ling taddot noikahi kud wora osson unayan nod komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong to onama ukit da en to kopomakoy rin konna ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu
ddos onama konna ra sikandin onama to mgo udio ko konna onama sikandin to langun udio man o konna
yyos sokkad da kos onama woy sokkad da en kos poukit nod komotallong kos mgo minuvu riyot kodontong din
d podmotallong din kos minuvu ukit da en to kopomakoy udio man sikandin o konna
a saddook od ikahi kow no ko ungketen iyon bo kohulugan kaay nod worannon tad iddos mgo uhu
onna en
u ukit to kopomakoy ta ki isas rays od tumanon ta peen iddos mgo uhu to onama
oomdomma row man si braham no kovuyyahan ta no mgo udio
ndan kos unayan no id podmotallong sikandin to onama
a otik id podmotallong pa sikandin to onama pomon to moppiyon pinuungan din duwon nanoy unayan nod pokopobporoong sikandin
iru iyon bonnaa waa en id pokopobporoong din diyon to onama
osorollan ta ini oyyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no d pomakoy si braham taddot id ikahi to onama woy pomon tadda id podmotallong din sikandin
onunggeleng otik duwon minuvu nod puung od boyaran en sikandin
os bayad kandin konna od kooseng no gasa su id oiluggatan din man idda
iru iddos minuvu nod salig to onama no id posinsya taddot mosaasaa od komotallong sikandin diyot kodontong to onama ukit to kopomakoy rin konna ukit to moppiyon pinuungan din
ni en kos kohulugan taddot id ikahi ni arin avid no moppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no id podmotallong to onama konna ukit to moppiyon pinuungan
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nid posinsyanwoy dos mgo saa rin id lingawan don to onama
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no id podwora to onama iddos mgo saa rin
a mokaatag taddot moppiyon kotomanan nid ikahi ni avid atag da vo idda to mgo udio no duwon botasanon to kodpotupu
onna en
u atag en mandad idda taddot konna mgo udio ahad konna ran botasanon iddos kodpotupu
osorollan tad iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d pomakoy si braham to onama woy pomon tadda id podmotallong din sikandin
a kannu man id podmotallong to onama si braham
ddot timpu vo no notupuwan don sikandin
onna su notomanan idda to waa pa sikandin notupui
oy dos kodpotupu rin patow no tapoy ron sikandin id podmotallong to onama ukit to kopomakoy rin
een id ngoranan sikandin no amoy to langun nod pompomakoy no id podmotallong to onama ahad waa ran notopui
oy sikandin mandad kos amoy taddot mgo notupuwan konna ra pomon to notupuwan sikandan ko konna pomon to kopomakoy ran no iling taddot kopomakoy ni braham to waa pa sikandin notupui
angan id totandu kos onama ki braham woy taddot kandin no koubbaran no od kokomunoy ran inis ingod
d tandu idda to onama konna pomon to kodtuman ni braham taddot mgo uhu ko konna pomon to kopomakoy rin deen id podmotallong sikandin to onama
u otik idda ra en so mgo minuvu nid tuman to mgo uhu kos od pokotanggap taddot id tandu to onama waa koruanon to kopomakoy ta ahad iddos tandu rin
yyos od kosahapan to mgo minuvu iddos lampas no langot woy silut to onama pomon to dii sikandan od pokotuman taddot mgo uhu
onunggeleng otik waa iddos mgo uhu waa mandad od pokosupak
urisu iddos tandu to onama od kotuman ukit da en to kopomakoy
os unayan no id totandu kos onama su amoy id pokoposivonnaa rin iddos kopiyannoy rin taddot langun no koubbaran ni braham
a iddos tandu rin konna ra atag to mgo udio nod tuman taddot mgo uhu ko konna atag en to langun nid pomakoy iling ki braham
yyos sikandin kos amoy to langun nod pomakoy
ling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d aam ku sikkow nod kovovallan no amoy to mouraan ingod
a notuman idda oyyos sikandin kos amoy ta riyot kodontong to onama
oy dos onama nid pomokayan ni braham idda en mandad kos onama no duwon kotuusan nod badnow taddot id poomatoy ron woy od pokobovaa sikandin to ahad ondan nid kopii rin ukit da to sokkad no kahi
a ahad imman to dii od kotuman iddon tandu id pomakoy si braham nod tumanon en to onama iddos id tandu rin
een novovallan sikandin no amoy to mouraan ingod iling taddot id ikahi to onama kandin no os kouralloy to koubbaran du od pokoiling to mgo bituon diyot langit
o id totandu kos onama ki braham mgo sokkad no gatus don kos idad din woy nosorollan din no pomon to kovuyyahoy rin dii ron en sikandin od pokoanak pa ukit taddot sawa rin no si ara
okosaddoo mandad sikandin no iddos sawa rin dii en od pokoanak
iru ahad ungketen waa id moomet kos kopomakoy rin
aa en sikandin id duworuwa nod tumanon to onama iddos tandu rin ko konna id mosalig peen kos kopomakoy rin woy id doong din kos onama
u dakkoo kos kodsalig din no od tumanon en to onama iddos tandu rin
een pomon to kopomakoy ni braham id podmotallong sikandin to onama
iru inis kahi no id podmotallong si braham to onama waa id sulat atag da ki braham ko konna atag en mandad keta
d komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama su id pomakoy ki kandin no id badnow ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
yyos id boggoy to onama si isas no od patoy atag to mgo saa ta woy id badnow sikandin amoyd komotallong ki riyot kodontong onama
een pomon to id podmotallong kid to onama ukit to keton kopomakoy nokoduli ron kos koroniyan ta riyot kandin ukit taddot id puungan ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta
oy ukit mandad ki isas rays nid pomokayan ta od pokoporani kid to onama woy od kotanggap tad iddos kopiyannoy rin
een dakkoo kos kahaan ta koungkay oyyos od imman ki nod kolonug ki taddot bantug to onama init od ingumon allow
onna ra idda duwon mandad kahaan ta riyot mgo kosupittan su nokosaddoo ki no ukit tadda od kotuig ki nod tiis
oy otid pokotiis ki tadda od koposivonnalan no mooggot en kos keton kopomakoy
a otik mooggot kos keton kopomakoy dakkoo en kos koimmanan ta no od tumanon din iddos puhawang din atag keta
oy dos od immanon ta konna od povullug keta oyyos nokosaddoo ki no id dokollan ki to onama to ginawa ukit to his no spiritu nid boggoy rin keta
oomdomma row man iddos kodginawa to onama keta
angan dii ki od pokogaha nod leggua pomon diyot mgo saa ta piru riyot ollog no timpu nid aam to onama id patoy si isas atag to mgo mosaasaa
ovo robbo ayu ko duwon minuvu no od aman nod patoy amoy id bullas kos umuu rin atag to motallong no minuvu
uwon ta ra ayu minuvu no od aman nod patoy amoy id bullas kos umuu rin atag to moppiyon minuvu
iru iddos onama id pokita to dakkoon ginawa rin keta su id patoy si isas rays atag keta to mgo mosaasaa ki pa
a su id podmotallong kid man to onama ukit to longossa ni isas rays iyon ki pobbo diid polegguangon pomon taddot lampas no langot to onama init morin allow
angan to mgo kuntra ki pa to onama nokoduli kos koroniyan ta riyot kandin pomon to kopotayan taddot nak din
a ko ungketen lampas ki peen nikandin nod tobbuson pomon to nouyag mandon si isas rays
onna ra idda su duwon don kahaan ta koungkay pomon to nokoduli ron kos koroniyan ta riyot onama ukit taddot id puungan ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a si dan no unnon minuvu id puung to saa woy idda en kos id pomonnan to saa kaay to ampowt ingod
omon to duwon don man saa duwon don mandad kopotayan
een od patoy kos langun no minuvu su iddos langun nokosaa man
angan to waa pa id boggoy to onama iddos mgo uhu riyot ki oises mosaasaa ron kos mgo minuvu
iru pomon to waa pa meen iddos mgo uhu waa poomdomma no nokosupak sikandan tadda
had ungketen id patoy kos mgo minuvu pomon poron ki dan taman ki oises
osivonnaa idda no nokosaa sikandan ahad konna iling taddot nopuungan ni dan no id supak to suhu nid pomon diyot bivig to onama
a riyot id puungan ni dan duwon od pokodiling taddot id tundug kandin no si isas rays oyyos tapad duwon undahon tadda riyot langun no minuvu
iru duwon en koossan taddot id puungan dan oyyos pomon to saa to sokkad no minuvu duwon don kopotayan to langun no minuvu
iru lampas peen no moppiya iddos id puungan to sokkad no minuvu no si isas rays oyya su ukit kandin iddos langun no minuvu od pokotanggap to gasa to onama no idda en so kopiyannoy rin
oy duwon pa koossan taddot gasa to onama woy dos undahon taddot saa to sokkad no minuvu
os undahon taddon saa idda en so kodsilut to onama to langun no minuvu
iru pomon to gasa rin od koposinsyan kos mouraan saa to mgo minuvu woy od komotallong sikandan diyot kodontong to onama
onnaa en no od patoy kos langun no minuvu pomon taddot saa to sokkad no minuvu no si dan
iru lampas peen iddos moppiyon undahon taddot id puungan to sokkad no minuvu no si isas rays
yya su ukit kandin iddos langun no minuvu nid tanggap to waa toppong no kopiyannoy to onama id podmotallong din woy idda en kos gasa rin kandan
a od kotanggap dan kos umuun waad tomanon woy od kolonug dan diyot kodhari ni isas rays
een pomon taddot sokkad da no saa ni dan od ingumannon to langun no minuvu iddos silut
iru pomon taddot sokkad no motallong nid puungan ni isas rays od komotallong diyot kodontong to onama kos langun no minuvu woy od boggayan din sikandan to umuun waad tomanon
yyos pomon to kodsupak to sokkad no minuvu taddot suhu to onama novovallan no mosaasaa kos langun
iru pomon to kodtuman to sokkad no minuvu taddot suhu to onama od komotallong diyot kodontong din kos langun
d boggoy to onama ki oises iddos mgo uhu amoyd kosorollan to mgo minuvu no id ayas don kos saa ran
iru ahad ungketen id lampas peen kos kopiyannoy to onama no id pokita rin diyot mgo mosaasaa
a kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no noiraom kos mgo minuvu riyot kotuusan to saa deen nokosaa kos langun woyd patoy
iru koungkay noiraom kid diyot kotuusan to kopiyannoy to onama su id podmotallong kid nikandin woy id boggayan ki to umuun waad tomanon ukit taddot id puungan ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a monnu od ponayun ki vo nod puung to saa amoyd lampas peen kos kopiyannoy to onama rinit keta
onna en
yya su timbang id patoy kid diyot kodpuung to saa deen momonnu pa man od puung to saa iddos id patoy ron
osorollan dowd no iddot kodboutismu keta nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays deen timbang id patoy kid mandad duma kandin
urisu ukit kodboutismu keta timbang id patoy kid duma ki isas rays woy id lobbong duma kandin su amoy od boggayan ki to lammin umuu iling ki isas no duwon lammin umuu riyot kodbadnow kandin ukit to mokososoobbun kotuusan to onamon moy
u otik nosokkad kid diyot kopotayan din timbang nosokkad kid mandad diyot kodbadnow kandin
osorollan tad no iddos mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta timbang id pakpak don diyon to krus duma ki isas rays su amoy worad kotuusan to saa rinit keta woy dii kid od kouripon to saa
yya su otid patoy ron kos minuvu nokoleggua ron sikandin pomon diyot kotuusan to saa
oy pomon to id patoy kid man duma ki isas rays id pomakoy ki nod kouyag ki mandad duma kandin
u nosorollan tad no novadnow si isas rays woy konnad en sikandin od patoy mandon
orad kotuusan to kopotayan diyot kandin
osokkad da sikandin id patoy atag to saa to langun no minuvu
a koungkay nouyag sikandin atag to kodposivantug to onama
ling mandad tadda koilangan no nokotaaw riyot poomdom dow no timbang id patoy kowd diyot kodpuung to saa
iru nouyag kow amoyd posivantug to onama oyyos nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays
een yo kowd aman nod hari koniyu iddos saa su amoy dii kow od ikuu taddot morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa row
o row gomita kos ahad ondan no sakup to koniyun lawa riyot kodpuung to morat
yon dow puungi id boggoy row kos tivuk no lawa row riyot onama amoyd gomiton din diyot motallong no dontulon
uungi row ini su mgo minuvu kow man nid tobbus don pomon diyot kopotayan woy id boggayan to lammin umuu
urisu iddos saa konnad od hari koniyu oyyos waa kowd man id salig to kodtuman taddot mgo uhu amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama ko konna id salig kowd to kopiyannoy to onama
a saddook od pokooseng kow no a ko ungketen pomon to waa kid man noiraom taddot mgo uhu ko konna noiraom kid taddot kopiyannoy to onama od ponayun ki vo nod puung to saa
onna en
osorollan dowd no otid pouripon kow to sokkad no minuvu sikandin kos amu row
een otid pouripon kow to saa amu rowd iddos saa woy iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kopotayan
iru otid dumoruma kow to onama iyon od ingumannon tadda od komotallong kow riyot kodontong din
angan nouripon kow to saa
iru solamat to onama su koungkay id tuman dow riyot tivuk no pusung dow iddos bonnaan nonaw no id nonaw koniyu
d polegguang kowd to onama pomon diyot koduripon to saa woy koungkay novovallan kowd no uripon diyot kodpuung to motallong
d gamit ku iddos ponunggelengan mokaatag to uripon su amoy moomok dow nod koovottan kos od osengon ku
angan id pouripon dow kos koniyun lawa riyot kodpuung to molibmit woy ayas kow peen id puung to ahad ondan no morat
iru koungkay koilangan no id pouripon dow kos koniyun lawa riyot kodpuung to motallong oyyos iyon od ingumannon tadda od molinis kow riyot kodontong to onama
ddot nouripon kow pa to saa worad en diyot poomdom dow iddos kodpuung to motallong
a ko ungketen ondan man kos kopiyannan no naangoy row taddot kodpuung dow dangan to saa no koungkay id koilow rowd
aa en
u iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
iru koungkay su nokolegguang kowd pomon diyot kotuusan to saa woy id pouripon kowd to onama od kotanggap dowd iddos kopiyannan nod molinis kowd diyot kodontong to onama woy iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so umuun waad tomanon
yya su iddos bayad to saa idda en so kopotayan
iru iddos gasa to onama idda en so umuun waad tomanon pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
go suwod nokosaddoo a nod koovottan dow inis od ikohiyon ku su nokosaddoo kowd man taddot mgo uhu
osorollan dowd no iddos minuvun nouyag pa noiraom poron taddot mgo uhu piru kod patoy ron sikandin nokolegguang don sikandin tadda
onunggeleng otid osowan kos sokkad no baay noikahi riyot bolaud to kodpoosoway no iddos baay nokoikot poron diyot kandin no sawa laggun to nouyag pa iddos sawa rin
iru ko id patoy ron dos sawa rin nokolegguang don sikandin taddon bolaud woy od pokoosawa mandon
een ko id duma sikandin to osson mama to nouyag poron dos sawa rin na od kooseng ta no nosaa sikandin
iru ko id patoy ron iddos sawa rin nokolegguang don sikandin taddot bolaud to kodpoosoway woy dii ta od kooseng no nosaa sikandin kod osawa mandon
go suwod iling mandad tadda wora kowd noiraom taddot kotungud to mgo uhu oyyos timbang id patoy kowd duma ki isas rays
oy koungkay nosokkad kowd diyot kandin no novadnow pomon diyot kopotayan su amoy iddos pinuungan dow id kahaai to onama
angan to waa ki pa mid pomakoy noiraom ki taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta
a to nosorollan tad iddos mgo uhu id ayas peen baling kos morat no ingowollon to lawa ta
een iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kopotayan
iru koungkay nokolegguang kid taddot mgo uhu oyyos timbang id patoy kid duma ki isas rays woy wora kid nouripon taddon mgo uhu
urisu od puung ki atag to onama konnad ukit to kodtuman taddot nosulat no mgo uhu ko konna ukit don to lammin koubpa no id pomon to his no spiritu
a ko ungketen saddook duwon od ikahi no orat bos iddos mgo uhu
onna en
yya su otik waa iddos mgo uhu waa nanoy saddoo ta ko ondan kos saa
onunggeleng otik waa noikahi riyot mgo uhu no o kod koima na waa nanoy saddoo ku no morat bos idda
iru to nosorollan ku ukit taddot mgo uhu no morat bos iddos od koima na iddos mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit koddi nokoiling to nosukaa baling su id ayas peen moho kos ima ku
os kohulugan ku tadda no otik waa iddos mgo uhu waa nanoy saddoo ku no nokosaa a
angan id oubpa a no waa pa sinorollan taddot mgo uhu woy kunan ku uvag ko moppiya a rad no minuvu woy waa saa ku
iru to nosorollan kud iddos mgo uhu iling to nosukaa kos saa ku
oy noovottan ku no iyon od ingumannon ku idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
urisu iddos mgo uhu no iyon dontulon idda en so kodboggoy to umuun waad tomanon idda en baling kos unayan no od ingumannon ku iddos kopotayan no waad tomanon
yya su iddos saa nokoiling to id aakaa koddi su kunan ku kod pokotanggap a to umuun waad tomanon ukit to kodtuman taddot mgo uhu
iru iyon bonnaa id supak ku idda deen id silutan a to kopotayan no waad tomanon
urisu nosorollan ta no iddon mgo uhu id pomon to onama woy dos langun nid nonaw rutun ollog en motallong woy moppiya
a saddook duwon od intud no ambot iddos moppiyon mgo uhu to onama od undag to kopotayan no waad tomanon
onna ungketen
u iyon unayan nod silutan ki pomon en to mgo saa ta
oy dos saa idda en kos unayan to keton kopotayan no waad tomanon su amoy ukit taddot moppiyon mgo uhu orayd kokita kos komorattoy to saa
osorollan ta no iddos mgo uhu moppiya su id pomon man idda riyot spiritu to onama
iru siyak minuvu a ra no moomok nod pokopuung to saa
okoiling a to nouripon to saa
d kosoobbuwan a moho taddot od puungan ku su iddos moppiya no id kopii ku nanoy nod puungan idda en baling kos dii kud kopuungan
oy dos morat no dii ku id kopii nod puungan idda en baling kos od kopuungan ku
a otik dii ku id kopii iddos od puungan ku no morat patow idda no id pongimbonnaa a no moppiya iddos mgo uhu
urisu otid pokopuung a to morat konna siyak kos id puung tadda su iyon id inuruk koddi iddos saa no tapoy ron dinit koddi
okosaddoo a no waa en moppiya nid pomon to mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit koddi
yyos ahad id kopii ku nanoy nod puung to moppiya dii ku en od kopuungan
ddos moppiyon id kopii ku nod puungan dii kud kopuungan
iru iddos morat no dii ku id kopii nod puungan idda en baling kos od kopuungan ku
a otik iyon ku od kopuungan iddos dii ku nanoy id kopii nod puungan iddos kohulugan konna siyak kos id puung tadda su iyon id inuruk koddi iddos saa no tapoy ron dinit koddi
een ini kos notomanan ku
tik id kopii ku nod puung to moppiya iyon ku baling od kopuungan iddos morat no idda en kos od inuruk koddi
aayt poomdom ku oraroy a nod kahaa taddot mgo suhu to onama
iru kaayt lawa ku ossa kos od inuruk koddi no idda en so saa
d pokodsupak iddos id kopiit lawa ku taddot id kopii to poomdom ku
een nouripon a taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit koddi
kkoyoy nomonnu ad man moho ini
ndoy ayu kos od pokotavang koddi amoyd pokolegguang a pomon diyot koduripon taddot morat nid kopii to lawa ku nod piyod koddi riyot kopotayan
ora ossa nod pokotavang koddi idda ra en so onama ukit tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
olamat to onama
urisu ini kos koddin kotomanan
nis poomdom ku id tuman taddot mgo uhu to onama piru pomon to mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit koddi nouripon a poron to saa
een siketa langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays konna kid en od silutan to onama
yyos pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays duwon don lammin umuu ta no id boggoy to his no spiritu
een id polegguang ki pomon diyot kotuusan to saa no iyon od ingumannon idda en so kopotayan
ddos mgo uhu konna od pokopolegguang keta riyot kotuusan to saa oyyos pomon taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta konna ta od kotuman iddos mgo uhu
iru id puungan to onama iddos dii ta od kogaha nod puungan
d popiyod din iddos kandin no nak no nominuvu iling keta su amoy sikandin don kos od silutan to mgo saa ta
oy idda en kos poukit to kodawa to onama taddot kotuusan to saa
d puungan to onama idda amoyd pokotuman ki taddot ollog no id popuungan keta riyot mgo uhu
yya su otid pomakoy ki wora kid id ikuu taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta ko konna iddos id kopii to his no spiritu
ddos minuvu no noiraom taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron diyot kandin wora osson od poomdommon din idda ra en so morat no ingowollon din
a iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
iru iddos minuvu no noiraom to his no spiritu wora osson od poomdommon din idda ra en so id kahaai to his no spiritu
a iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kosunayan woy umuun waad tomanon
u iddos minuvu no noiraom poron kos poomdom din taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron diyot kandin id supak din kos onama
ii rin od tumanon kos mgo suhu to onama woy dii en sikandin od pokotuman tadda
a iddon minuvu dii en od pokopahaa to onama
iru sikiyu pomon tid ubpa ron diyot ginawa row iddos his no spiritu sikandin don kos id tuman dow konnad iddos mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron diyot koniyu
oomdomma row no iddos minuvun waa riyot ginawa ran iddos his no spiritu konna sikandin sakup ni isas rays
iru ko id ubpa si isas rays diyot ginawa row ahad od patoy kos koniyun lawa pomon to saa iddos his no spiritu kos od boggoy koniyu to umuun waad tomanon oyyos id podmotallong kowd man to onama
ssa pa tadda iddos onama kos id badnow ki isas rays
een otik id ubpa ruwot koniyu iddos spiritu rin sikandin mandad kos od boggoy to umuu ruwot lawa row no duwon kopotayan oyyos noiroomman kowd man to his no spiritu
urisu mgo suwod koilangan en nod dumoruma ki to onama konna riyot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta
yya su otid tumanon ta iddon mosaasaan botasan iyon od ingumannon tadda idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
iru otik ukit to tavang to his no spiritu od inoyyuhan tad iddos morat no pinuungan duwon en umuu ta no waad tomanon
ddos langun no noiroomman to spiritu to onama mgo anak sikandan to onama
angan laggun to noiraom ki to mgo uhu od kovaakkan ki to kodsilut to onama
iru koungkay konnad koilangan nod kovaakkan ki iling to uripon nod kovaakkan to amu rin
yya su id boggoy rin keta iddos spiritu rin amoyd kovovallan ki no mgo anak din
een od kongoranan tad iddos onama no moy ku
u iddos his no spiritu ron en kos id posivonnaa rinit ginawa ta no mgo anak kid to onama
oy pomon to mgo anak kid man nikandin duwon od kotanggap ta init morin allow no id panoy rin atag to mgo anak din su amoy od kolonug ki to langun nid boggoy rin taddot nak din no si isas rays
tid lonug ki to kosupittan duma kandin od kolonug ki en mandad to kodposivantug kandin
a otid popoomdom a taddot kosupittan no noukitan ta koungkay immat waa ron idda otid poomdommon ku iddos kopiyannoy to onama no id pokita rin keta init morin allow
onna ra siketa no mgo minuvu ko konna ahad iddos langun no binovallan to onama dakkoo kos ingowollon nod inguma ron iddos allow no id pokita to onama kos mgo anak din
yyos pomon poron to kodbovaa kaayt ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay dii ron od kotuman iddos dontulon atag kandan
a iddon notomanan konna pomon to kandan nid kopii ko konna puhawang en to onama
iru ahad ungketen duwon peen koimmanan
yya su puhawang to onama no inis ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay no binovallan din od polegguangon din pomon diyot kotuusan to kopotayan amoy konnad od patoy woyd koobbuu woy amoy od pokolonug dan diyot motoos no kotomanan taddot mgo anak din
osorollan ta no inis ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaayn binovallan din pomon poron dangan taman koungkay od dahong to kosokitoy iling to baay nod sokalan
onna ra inis ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay no binovallan din kos id oilasoy ko konna ahad mandad siketa no nokotanggap to his no spiritu no idda en so unnon gasa to onama keta no od pompomakoy
iyot daom to ginawa ta iling tod dahong ki to kosokitoy laggun tod aangat ki taddot allow no id pokita to onama no mgo anak ki en nikandin woy od lommiyon din kos lawa ta amoy dii ron od patoy
a ini en kos koimmanan ta pomon poron to notobbus ki
ddos koimmanan konnad od kongoranan no koimmanan otik notuman don oyyos waa en minuvu nod imman pa taddot notuman don
iru ko waa pa notuman iddos id immanan ta koilangan no konna ki od koobbod nod aangat tadda
a iling mandad tadda iddos his no spiritu kos od tavang keta riyot komoometan ta oyyos waa saddoo ta ko ondan kos ollog no dosalon ta
een iddos his no spiritu kos od nganoy to onama atag keta ko ondan kos dinit ginawa ta no konna ta od kooseng
oy dos onama no nokosaddoo ko ondan kos diyot ginawa ta nokosaddoo mandad ko ondan kos diyot poomdom to his no spiritu
u iddos id dasaa to his no spiritu riyot onama atag keta no mgo minuvu rin od ikuu en idda to id kopiit onama
osorollan ta no iddos langun no kotomanan moppiya man o morat id puungan to onama su amoy od undag idda to moppiya riyot id ginawa kandin no id aam din su idda meen kos puhawang din
yyos pomon poron dangan nosorollan don to onama ko ondoy kos od kovovallan no mgo anak din
oy id ossa rin don tapoy no od pokoiling sikandan taddot nak din su amoy sikandin kos ponganoy to mouraan toosuwod
urisu iddos langun nid ossa tapoy to onama no od kovovallan no mgo anak din id kobbit din kos pusung dan amoyd pomakoy
oy dos id kobbit din kos pusung id podmotallong din woy id posivontuhan
a otid poomdommon ta idda langun od kosorollan ta no pomon tid poomig keta iddos onama waa en od pokotalu keta
yyos waa rin id loggod iddos kandin no nak ko konna id boggoy rin nod imotayan atag keta langun
a otik id boggoy rin atag keta iddos kandin don en no nak iyon pobbo iddos langun no koilonganon ta
iketa no id aam to onama ondoy man kos od pokouug keta no nokopuung ki to saa
aa en
yya su iddos onama ron en kos id podmallong keta
ndoy man kos od pokoikahi no koilangan nod silutan ki to saa ta
aa en
yyos si isas rays don en kos id patoy atag keta
onna ra idda id badnow sikandin woy koungkay diyon don sikandin lomig to kowanan to onama woy id dasaa atag keta
een ondoy man kos od pokopodpitas keta pomon diyot ginawa ni isas rays
aa en
yya su ahad od ukit ki peen to mgo kohirapoy ahad od kotompoddan ki to puhawang ahad od posupittan ki ahad waa kokaan ta o waa od umpakon ta ahad morat kos od kotomanan ta woy ahad peen od imotayan ki piru dii en od kopalin kos ginawa ni isas rays keta
nin mgo kosupittan iling en taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to onama pomon to konamin kopomakoy kikow inaayun koy od isau to kopotayan
d podiling koy to karnero nod sumboliyon
iru ahad ungketen kos kotomanan ta od ponalu ki en ukit ki isas rays no id pokita to ginawa rin keta
u nosorollan ku no waa en od pokopodpitas keta pomon diyot ginawa to onama
d patoy ki man o od kouyag od ginowannon ki en nikandin
had iddos mgo ponolihan o mgo busow o iddos ahad ondan no duwon kotuusan dii en od pokopodpitas keta pomon diyot ginawa rin
had ondan peen kos od kotomanan koungkay o riyot od inguma pa od ginowannon ki en nikandin
oy dos ahad ondan no riyot kooowayan o riyot kinoroomman to livuta o iddos ahad ondan no mgo binovallan to onama dii en od pokopodpitas keta pomon diyot ginawa to onama no id pokita rin ukit ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a duwon pa ponudtulon ku koniyu woy bonnaa en ini
onna a en od ouhus su nosokkad a riyot ki isas rays
olinis kos poomdom ku oyyos noiraom a to kodpomandu to his no spiritu no id posivonnaa kaay
yon id kopii ku nod osengon no noponnu a to lanu woy diid kaawa kos mosakit to ginawa ku taddot iling ku no mgo udio oyyos dii ran od pomakoy ki isas rays
tid kopakoy ra en nanoy od podsuwomihon kud no siyak don kos od posahapan to onama woy od tompoddon kos koroniyan ku riyot ki isas rays amoyd pokolegguang dan da en pomon diyot kodsilut to onama
ouraa kos kopiyannan no id boggoy to onama kandan
yyos sikandan kos koubbaran ni srael no id aam to onama amoy od kovovallan no mgo anak din
ikandan kos id pokitannan din to seaa to kotuusan din
opila id potonduwoy kos onama duma kandan woy riyon din en to kandan id boggoy iddos mgo uhu
ikandan mandad kos id nonawwan din to ollog no poukit to kodsimba kandin
ouraa kos mgo tandu rin nod tovangan din en sikandan
oubbaran sikandan taddot nongovantug no kovuyyahan doy
oy dos esiyas no si isas rays lubbad dan mandad su nominuvu sikandin no sokkad no udio
ddos onama no id hari to langun ollog nod doongon to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a iyon bo kohulugan kaay no waa tumana to onama iddos tandu rin diyot koubbaran ni srael
onna en
u konna langun to koubbaran ni srael mooggot no minuvu to onama
oy konna langun to koubbaran ni braham mooggot no lubbad din su id ikahi to onama ki braham no yon da od ngoranan ku no mooggot no koubbaran du idda en so lubbad to anak du no si saac
