os kohulugan tadda no konna langun taddot koubbaran ni braham od ngoranan to onama no mgo anak din ko konna idda ra en so id tobbow ukit to tandu to onama ki braham
u id totandu kos onama ki braham mokaatag ki saac kahi rin to nit soop no lahun od livod a kaay woy od tobbawan don kos sawa ru no si ara to anak no mama
oy konna ra idda od kokita ta mandad iddos poukit to kodaam to onama
yyos si saac no kovuyyahan ta woy si ebecca no sawa rin id anak to sopping no idda en si sau woy si acob
u iddot waa pa id tobbow iddos sopping mid ikahi kos onama ki ebecca to ddos ari od hari sikandin taddot kakoy
d ikahi to onama idda to waa pa nokopuung iddos sopping to moppiya o morat su id kopii rin nid nonaw no otid aam sikandin to minuvu konna ukit to moppiyon pinuungan ko konna ukit to id kopiit onama
ni en mandad kos kohulugan taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d ginowannan ku iddos ari no si acob piru id kolingasai ku iddos kakoy no si sau
a ko ungketen iyon bo kohulugan kaay no duwon od podmusingon to onama
onna en
u mid ikahi iddos onama ki oises to iyak kos od pokita to eru taddot id kopii ku nod pokitannan to eru
een kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no iddos kodaam to onama konna ukit to id kopiit minuvu woy kodoiluggat dan ko konna ukit en to eru rin
yya su riyot osulat no ahit onama id osengan din iddos harit hipto no d bovallan ku sikkow no hari su amoy ukit kikow id pokopokita ku kos koddin kotuusan woy od koposivontuhan kos ngaran ku to intirut ingod
urisu kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no iddos onama kos id aam ko ondoy kos id kopii rin nod pokitannan to eru woy sikandin kos od potoggas to uu taddot minuvu no id kopii rin nod potoggason kos uu
a saddook duwon sokkad koniyu nod ikahi no o ungketen mambo man tod uuhon to onama no nokosaa kos minuvu oyyos waa meen od pokosupak to kandin nid kopii
iru iyon id pokotavak ku tadda minuvu ka ra
a ondoy ka man nod sawoy to onama
d koponunggelengan ku kos kuron
aa kuron no od pokosawoy taddot tohodbovaa kandin nod ikahi to e mambo moho to id ungketen a nikkow tid bovaa
u iddos tohodbovaa to kuron sikandin kos duwon kotungud ko ondan kos id kopii rin nod bovallan
onunggeleng dos sokkad no baad to basak od bovallan din to kuron no mahaa woy motoos atag to duwon koruanon no mgo dontulon woy dos sokkad atag to ahad ondan don
ngketen en mandad kos onama
uwon kotungud din nod puung to ahad ondan no id kopii rin
otungud din en iddos kodpokita to kandin no kotuusan woy langot taddot mgo mosaasaa no ollog en nod silutan
iru id poowwet din kos posinsya rin kandan
d puungan din ini su amoy id pokopokita rin iddos mokososoobbun kopiyannoy rin diyot mgo minuvu no id koerui rin woy id panoy rin tapoy sikandan no od ubpa riyot motoos no bonuwa rin
olamat su apii ki taddot mgo minuvu nid aam to onama konna ra sikami no mgo udio ko konna sikiyu en mandad no konna mgo udio
ni en kos noikahi riyot id posulat to onama ki seas no mid ungketen to ddos konna ku mgo minuvu dangan od ngoranan kud sikandan no koddin mgo minuvu
oy dos mgo minuvu no waa ku pa ginowanni koungkay od ginowannon kud sikandan
oy riyon da en no ingod to id ikohiyan ku kandan no konna ku mgo minuvu diyon ku en mandad sikandan od ngoranan no mgo anak to maantoyn onama
ni en mandad kos noikahi riyot id posulat to onama ki saias mokaatag to koubbaran ni srael no mid ungketen to had iling kouralloy to paok to dahat kos koubbaran ni srael piru disok da kos od kotobbus kandan
yyos od silutan en to onama kos mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod woy goos din don idda od puungan
id ikahi mandad si saias no iketa no koubbaran ni srael otik waa pa noerui keta kos onama nod ongaggon no otuus to langun waad en nanoy ahad sokkad keta nod kosama su od pokoiling ki taddot mgo toho odoma woy mgo toho omora no id ipannas din
a ko ungketen ondan bo kos od kooseng ta kaay
d kooseng ta no iddos konna mgo udio waa ran id nokkaanokkaa amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
iru sikandan dad en kos id podmotallong to onama ukit to kopomakoy ran
iru iddos koubbaran ni srael no id nokkaanokkaa nod tuman to mgo uhu amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama waa ran en naapput iddos puhawang dan
ambo man to ungketen
u iddos koubbaran ni srael id salig dan moho to kodtuman taddot mgo uhu
aa ran id salig ki isas rays amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
a pomon kaay nokoiling sikandan to minuvu no nokosiud taddot od pokoposiud to batu no idda en si isas rays
ling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to omotawi row
d taaw a to batu riyot ion no od pokoposiud woy od pokopiloy to mgo minuvu
iru dii en od pokodsondit iddos minuvu nod pomakoy kandin
go suwod dakkoo kos ingowollon ku nod kotobbus iddos iling ku no mgo udio woy ini en kos dosalon ku riyon to onama
d pokoposivonnaa a no mohiod dan nod puung atag to onama piru iddos kodpuung dan waa nokoikuu taddot bonnaan nonaw
u id podtohon dan iddos poukit to onama nod podmotallong to minuvu
yon dan baling noonokkali tid ikuu iddos kandan dad no poukit nod komotallong ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu woy waa ran id poiraom taddot poukit to onama
yyos notuman diyot ki isas rays iddos dontulon to kodboggoy taddot mgo uhu amoy iddos langun nod pomakoy kandin od komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
a ini en kos id sulat ni oises mokaatag to minuvu nod tuman to mgo uhu amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
ahi rin to ddos minuvu nod tuman to langun no uhu od pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
iru mokaatag to poukit nod komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kopomakoy duwon mandad noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to o kowd poomdomma no gali ra od komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong to onama otik duwon od undiyot datas to langit amoyd angoy ki isas rays
o kow mandad od poomdomma no koilangan pa no duwon od undiyot daom to lugaa tid poomatoy amoyd badnow ki isas rays
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos kahi to onama diyon don to koniyu
iyon don idda to bivig dow woy riyot ginawa row
dda en kos kahit onama no id ponudtuu roy mokaatag to kopomakoy no otik id ponudtuu row riyot duma no si isas rays kos od ongaggon woy od pomakoy kow riyot ginawa row no id badnow sikandin to onama na od kotobbus kow en
u otid pomakoy ki to bonnaavonnaa od komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama
oy pomon to id ponudtuu ta riyot duma kos kopomakoy ta od kotobbus ki
yya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos langun nid pomakoy kandin konna en od pokodsondit
nin tandu atag to langun udio man o konna oyyos sokkad da man kos od ongaggon ta no od busbus to kopiyannan diyot langun nod nganoy kandin
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos langun nod nganoy tod ongaggon od kotobbus en
iru momonnu ran man od nganoy kandin otik waa pa sikandan id pomakoy
oy momonnu ran od pomakoy kandin otik waa pa sikandan nokorinog mokaatag kandin
omonnu ran mandad od pokorinog otik waa od ponudtuu kandan
oy momonnu ran mandad od koponudtulan otik waa od popiyod amoyd ponudtuu kandan
ling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no raroy ki en nod kahaa otik duwon od inguma nod ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
iru simbokkad da kos id tanggap to oppiyon inoggan su noikahi ni saias no ongaggon pilopila ra kos id pomakoy to ponudtulon doy
iru ahad ungketen bonnaa en no iddos kopomakoy to minuvu id pomon to kodpominog dan to ponudtulon mokaatag ki isas rays
iru duwon intud ku
aa vo nokorinog kos mgo udio mokaatag ki isas rays no idda en kos unayan no waa ran id pomakoy
okorinog en sikandan su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no os kahit onama norinog to langun no minuvuwoy nokosoob don to intirut ingod
a duwon mandon intud ku
ndan waa vo nokaabbot iddos mgo udio taddot norinog dan
okaabbot en sikandan
u id oseng kos onama riyot mgo udio ukit taddot id posulat din ki oises
ahi rin to d pokita ku kos kopiyannoy ku riyot mgo minuvu nid kolingasai row amoy od kosina kow kandan
d pokita ku kos kopiyannoy ku riyot mgo minuvu no waa sinorollan mokaatag koddi amoy id kolingasai row sikandan
id ikahi mandad kos onama kandan ukit ki saias woy to waa kodaangaang mid ungketen si saias to okita a taddot mgo minuvu no waa id nangkap koddi
d pokilaa a riyot waa id intudintud mokaatag koddi
iru mokaatag taddot mgo udio mid ikahi kos onama to ouhoy ad mid umow nod porani koddi iddos mgo minuvu no diid pominog woy mgo motoggas kos uu
a ko ungketen id inoyyug bo iddos onama taddot mgo minuvu rin no udio
aa en
yya su ahad siyak udio a man no lubbad ni braham woy lubbad ni enjamin waa a en inoyyuhi to onama
d uliton ku tod oseng no waa en inoyyuhi to onama iddos mgo minuvu rin no id aam din tapoy
oomdomma row man iddos diyot osulat no ahit onama mokaatag ki lias
id nganoy sikandin to onama pomon taddot id puungan to iling din no mgo udio kahi rin to ongaggon id imotayan dan iddos mgo propeta nid popiyod du
d gobba ran kos mgo buwisanan du
iyak dobbo kos nosama woy id kopii ran peen nod imotayan a
iru mid tavak kos onama kandin kahi rin to onna ra sikkow kos nosama su duwon pa pittun maan   no minuvu no id ossa ku atag koddi woy waa ran id simba taddot konna bonnaan monama nod ngoranan ki aal
a ungketen dad en mandad koungkay su duwon pa nosama no mgo udio no id aam to onama pomon to kopiyannoy rin
ddos kodaam din kandan konna pomon to moppiyon pinuungan ko konna pomon en to kopiyannoy rin
yya su otik pomon pa idda to pinuungan dan konnad idda od kongoranan no kopiyannoy to onama
a iddos kohulugan kaay no ahad id nokkaanokkaa kos kourallan to mgo udio to kodnangkap to poukit amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama waa ran en naapput iddos puhawang dan
yon da nokaapput tadda iddos mgo udio no id aam to onama piru iddos duma id potoggas to onama kos uu ran
ni en kos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ling to id potinuhon to onama kos poomdom dan amoy diid pokaabbot
u taman koungkay ahad duwon mata ran dii ran en od pokokita woyahad duwon tolinga ran dii ran en od pokorinog
a duwon mandad id sulat ni avid no mid ungketen to uopa nod kotigkawan sikandan woy od kaammot pomon to kahaan dan diyot kodkaan iling to manuk nod sahad to lettag o saarong nod kosuhiyang su ollog en sikandan nod silutan
uopa nod mosukirom kos poomdom dan amoy dii ran od pokaabbot to kovonnaan
oy muopa no od posupittan sikandan to waad tomanon iling to minuvu nod kovokkut pomon to kovoggatoy to binovan din
a ko ungketen od intud a mandon
ndan man kos od kotomanan taddot mgo udio
d inoyyuhan bo sikandan to onama taman to waad tomanon oyyos waa ran mid pomakoy ki isas rays
aa en
iru pomon tid inoyyuhan dan kos onama id inguma iddos kodtobbus diyot konna mgo udio
kit kaay od kosina kandan iddos mgo udio woy id kopii ran don mandad nod kotobbus
d poomdommon ta ini
tik lampas kos kopiyannoy to onama no id pokita rin diyot konna mgo udio pomon taddot saa to mgo udio iyon pobbo kod livod iddos mgo udio riyon to onama
a duwon od osengon ku koniyu no konna mgo udio
d aam a to onama amoyd kovovallan no apostoles su amoy od ponudtuu koniyu mokaatag ki isas rays
een id boggayan ku to dakkoon koruanon inis pinuungan no id sanna rin koddi
u id imman a no duwon iling ku no mgo udio nod kosina koniyu amoy duwon duma kandan no od kopiyod ku nod pomakoy woyd kotobbus
yyos pomon tid inoyyuhan to onama iddos mgo udio nokoduli ron kos koroniyan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod diyon to onama
een otid tonggapon mandon to onama iddos mgo udio lampas peen no moppiya kos od kotomanan dan
yyos timbang id patoy ron sikandan piru nouyag mandon
a si braham kos id pomonnan to mgo udio woy dos onama kos komunoy kandin
oy dos koubbaran din onama en mandad kos komunoy
os od koponunggelengan to mgo udio iling kaay
tik id boggoy iddos unnon toppik to paan diyot onama sikandin en kos komunoy taddot tivuk no paan
ssa pa tadda otik id boggoy iddos dalig to kayu riyot onama sikandin en kos komunoy to mgo panga tadda
ddos mgo udio od pokoiling to mgo panga to kayu no olibo no id pomuwa woy sikiyu no konna mgo udio nokoiling kow to mgo panga to kayu no olibo nid tuvu riyot movonnos
a iyon id puungan to onama id ponompoddan din iddos dumon panga taddot kayu nid pomuwa woy id suppay rin iddos panga taddot kayu no olibo no id tuvu riyot movonnos diyot lawa taddot id pomuwa
een od pokolonug kow to koomboggan taddon kayu no idda en so kopiyannoy to onama
iru sikiyu no konna mgo udio yo kowd popoomdom no moppiya kow pa taddot mgo udio no nokoiling tid ponampod no mgo panga
oy yo row kolingawi no konna sikiyu kos od uyag to mgo dalig ko konna iddos mgo dalig kos od uyag koniyu
a saddook od ikahi kow no oppiya koy en su id ponampod iddos mooggot no mgo panga amoy sikami kos od suvaa kandan
onnaa en piru iyon unayan no id ponampod sikandan oyyos waa ran id pomakoy woy id suvaa kow kandan pomon da en to koniyun kopomakoy
urisu yo kowd pobporoong ko konna kovaakki row iddos onama
u otik id ponampod man to onama iddos mooggot no mgo panga no idda en so mgo udio sikiyu pobbo kos diid ponompoddon
a kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no eeruwon kos onama piru od kotuig mandad sikandin nod silut
u od silutan din iddos diid pomakoy piru sikiyu od pokitannan din to eru otid ponayun kow nod pomakoy
iru ko dii kow od ponayun od ponompoddon kow mandad nikandin
oy ahad iddos mgo udio otik dii ron sikandan od potoggas to uu woyd pomakoy ran od tonggapon en mandon sikandan to onama
ling to mgo panga id suppay rin mandon sikandan taddot kayu su od kopuungan din en idda
yyos sikiyu no nokoiling to mgo panga to kayu no olibo nid tuvu riyot movonnos otik id suppay kow to onama riyot pinomuwon olibo no konna mooggot nid pomonnan dow lampas peen no moomok no id suppay rin mandon iddos id ponampod no mgo panga to kayu no olibo riyot mooggot no id pomonnan dan
go suwod id kopii ku nod koovottan dow iddos kovonnaan no waa pa id posaddoo taman koungkay su amoy dii kowd pobporoong no moppiya kow pa taddot mgo udio
ddos kodpotoggas to uu taddot mgo udio duwon en sipangngan
d kotaman da ini otik ollog don kos kouralloy to konna mgo udio nod kotobbus
opongnga od kotobbus iddos koubbaran ni srael iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to os ohodtobbus od pomon diyot bonuwa to ion
d owan din iddos kororattan taddot koubbaran ni acob
d inguma kos allow nod posinsyan ku kos mgo saa ran iling taddot kodpotonduwoy ku kandan
a mokaatag taddot dumon udio mgo kuntra sikandan to onama oyyos waa ran id pomakoy to oppiyon inoggan
oy pomon to waa ran id pomakoy id undag idda to kopiyannan dow
iru pomon to id aam dan tapoy to onama id dokollan din dad sikandan to ginawa pomon taddot tandu rin dangan diyot kovuyyahan dan
u otid aam kos onama to mgo minuvu woyd boggoy to kopiyannan konnad en idda od kopalin
angan sikiyu no konna mgo udio waa kow id pomakoy to onama
iru pomon tid inoyyuhan to mgo udio kos onama sikiyu ron koungkay kos nokotanggap to eru rin
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mgo udio ahad waa ran id pomakoy to onama koungkay piru pomon tid pokita rin kos eru rin koniyu duwon allow no id pokita rin mandad kos eru rin kandan
yyos nokoiling tid podtohon to onama nod kouripon to saa iddos langun no minuvu su amoy ukit kaay id pokopokita rin kos eru rin kandan
aa en od pokotoppong to kopiyannoy to onama
rayn moraom kos koovottan woy sinorollan din
onna od kaapput to koovottan iddos puhawang woy pinuungan din
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no aa minuvun nokosaddoo to poomdom to onama woy waa en od pomandu to puungan din
aa mandad minuvu nod boggoy to ahad ondan diyot onama amoy duwon od kosukut to minuvu kandin
yya su iddos onama kos mid bovaa to langun
ikandin kos id hari to langun woy ukit to langun no binovallan od koroong sikandin
uopa nod posivontuhan sikandin taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
urisu mgo suwod pomon to eru to onama keta od loglohottan ku sikiyu no boggoy row kos koniyun kougolingun diyot onama timbang maantoyn buwis waa id pokosawoy woy id kahaai rin oyya su ungketen en kos ollog no kodsimba kandin
o kowd ikuu to kodbovotasan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna polammi row to onama kos koniyun poomdom amoyd kosorollan dow iddos id kopii rin atag koniyu
yon din id kopii idda en so moppiya dos od pokopahaa kandin woy dos waa id pokosawoy
a pomon to kotungud no id boggoy to onama koddi duwon od osengon ku riyot ipat sokkad koniyu
o ondan man kos kovonnaan mokaatag to kougolingun dow yo kowd popoomdom no lampas kow pa kaay
u otik ingkon taman kos kogahan nid boggoy to onama pomon to kopomakoy row diyon da en mandad taman kos kodpopoomdom dow to koniyun kougolingun
onunggeleng inis lawa ta sokkad da ini piru mouraa kos sakup woy dos ipat sakup nokodossoossa kos od kopuungan
a ungketen dad en mandad keta nod pompomakoy su ahad mouraa ki timbang sokkad ki ra no lawa pomon to nosokkad ki riyot ki isas rays
oy siketa langun timbang nokodsuppaysuppay
omon to kopiyannoy to onama keta id boggayan ki nikandin to nokodossoosson kogahan deen koilangan nod gomiton ta ini
tik duwon kogahan ta nod posaddoo taddot id poponudtuu to onama keta koilangan nid posaddoo ta idda loppa taddot nonaw no id pomokayan ta
tik duwon kogahan ta nod tavang to duma koilangan nod tovangan ta sikandan
tik duwon kogahan ta nod nonaw to kahit onama koilangan nod nonaw ki
tik duwon kogahan ta nod ponokkaa to kopomakoy to duma idda en kos koilangan nod puungan ta
tik duwon kogahan ta nod boggoy to duwon mgo koilonganon koilangan no movoggoyvoggoy ki
tik duwon kogahan ta nod ponguu koilangan nod oiluggat ki nod ponguu
tik duwon kogahan ta nod pokita to eru riyot od pongkosupittan koilangan nod kahaa ki nod tavang kandan
oilangan no bonnaavonnaa kos ginawa row riyot duma
olingasai row iddos langun no morat woy dokolli row to ginawa iddos moppiya
ohinowannoy kow iling to tootampod to pusod
okita row no mowwet kos kodontong dow to duma no lampas pa taddot kodontong dan koniyu
o kowd popopogguu ko konna mohiod kow riyot kodpuung atag tod ongaggon
ahaa kow inaayun pomon to koimmanan dow riyot onama
iis kow to mgo kosupittan woy yo kowd koobbod nod dasaa
ovangi row iddos mgo minuvu to onama no duwon mgo koilonganon woy tuhonula row iddos ahad ondoy nod unduwon to baoy row
uyu kow riyot onama no od pokita sikandin to kopiyannoy rin taddot od posuppit koniyu
o row buyuwa nod silutan sikandan to onama
uma kow to kahaan taddot nahaa woy duma kow to lanu taddot naanu
ubpa kow no moppiya kos koroniyan diyon to ipat sokkad
o kowd poratasdatas ko konna lommung kow taddot mgo minuvun waa novantug
oy yo kowd popoomdom nod kotuig kowd en to langun
tik duwon nokopuung to morat koniyu yo kowd balus ko konna puungi row kos langun no moppiya amoy dii kowd kosawoy to mgo minuvu
aman tod kogaha row ooyyari row kos koniyun koroniyan diyot langun no minuvu
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo kowd balus ko konna boggoy row to onama iddos kodbalus atag koniyu
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no iyak kos duwon kotungud nod balus
iyak kos od silut taddot od puung to morat kikow
iru puungi row iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to tid gutasan kos kuntra ru pokannow sikandin
tid kotokkangan boggayiu sikandin to oweg
u otik ungketen kod puungan du od koilow en sikandin
o kowd potalu taddot pinuungan no morat ko konna toluwa row iddos morat ukit to kodpuung to moppiya
a siketa langun no minuvu koilangan nod poiraom ki to kodponguu taddot duwon kotungud diyon to guberno
yya su iddos kotungud to kodponguu id pomon to id kopiit onama woy sikandin kos id boggoy taddon kotungud diyot guberno
een iddos minuvu nod supak to guberno id supak din kos onama oyya su iddos onama kos id taaw to kotundanan dan
oy dos od supak kandan od silutan en
os id puung to moppiya waa ollog nid kovaakki rin taddot mgo ponguu piru iddos id puung to morat od kovaakkan en
urisu otik dii kowd kopiyan nod kovaakkan taddot duwon mgo kotungud puungi row iddos moppiya woy od doongon kow en nikandan
u iddos mgo ponguu sikandan kos sudsuhuwon to onama atag to kopiyannan dow
iru ko nokopuung kow to morat ollog en nod kovaakkan kow oyyos duwon en kotungud dan nod silut koniyu
go sudsuhuwon sikandan to onama amoyd pouma to langot din taddot langun nod puung to morat
een koilangan no od poiraom kow to guberno konna ra pomon to duwon allak dow nod silutan ko konna pomon to nokosaddoo kow no ini en kos ollog nod puungan
ni en mandad kos unayan nod bayad kow to buhis su iddos mgo ponguu to guberno sikandan kos mgo sudsuhuwon to onama no id tuman taddot kotundanan dan
urisu boyari row ko ondan kos ollog nod boyaran dos buhis to livuta o iddos ahad ondan no buhis
ispitui row woy posivontuhi row iddos duwon mgo kotungud
tik duwon utang dow yo row ini kouhayya tod bayad
yon da moppiya nod kouhayyon idda ra en so utang to kodpohinowannoy
u iddos minuvu nod ginawa to duma id tuman din iddos mgo uhu ni oises
os mgo uhu no mid ungketen to o kowd loivug yo kowd imatoy yo kowd ponakow yo kowd koima woy dos duma pa nosokkad da kaayt suhu nid ungketen to inowanni row kos duma iling to kodginawa row to koniyun kougolingun
u otik id ginowannan ta kos duma konna ki en od puung to morat kandan
urisu iddos kodginawa idda en kos kodtuman to langun no uhu
oilangan nod puungan dow ini labbi ron to nosorollan dow no timpu ron to kodgimata oyyos konnad od kouhoy od livod don si isas rays
iyot kodtigkanoy to kopomakoy ta moriyu pa iddos allow to kodtobbus piru koungkay morani ron
nis koubpa ta kaay to ampowt ingod asow ron od kotaman iling to bulli no asow ron od kaallow su konnad od kouhoy od livod don si isas
een koilangan nod tonanan ta iddos kodpuung to morat no idda en so pinuungan diyot mosukirom
yon ta od puungan iddos moppiya su idda en kos timbang putown umpak nid sukub ta no pongallang taddot pinuungan ni oivuyan
oilangan no iddos koubpa ta moppiya iling taddot mgo minuvu nod ubpa riyot koowangan
een konna ki od lonug to pinuungan to minuvu no waa kodtohoo to ivog to lawa
onna ki od hubughubug woyd puung to mgo molibmit woy mokoilown pinuungan
onna ki mandad od poimimotayoy woyd posiisinay
yon ta od puungan od ikulon ta iddos koubpa tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays no timbang id sukub ta sikandin
oy mokaatag taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron dinit keta dii ki od boggoy to lugaa nod pokopoomdom ki nod dumoruma taddot morat no mgo ingowollon ta
a duwon pa od osengon ku koniyu
tik duwon sokkad no duma row no moomet diyot kopomakoy tonggapa row sikandin woy yo row sowaya ko nokodossa kow to poomdom
onunggeleng iddos minuvu no mosalig kos kopomakoy diyot poomdom din no waa kokaan no id diiyan deen od kaan sikandin to ahad ondan
iru iddos minuvun moomet kos kopomakoy diyot poomdom din id diiyan iddos kodkaan to karni purisu idda ra en so gulay kos od kannon din
os minuvu nod kaan to karni koilangan no konna sikandin od lommot taddot minuvu no diid kaan tadda
a iling mandad tadda iddos minuvu no diid kaan to karni koilangan no konna od hukum taddot minuvu nod kaan tadda oyyos id tanggap sikandan to onama
ndoy kow man nod hukum to sudsuhuwon to duma
onna sikiyu kos amu rin purisu idda ra en so amu rin kos od pokooseng no ollog o konna iddos pinuungan din
oy od kopuungan din en kos ollog su iddos od ongaggon kos od tavang kandin
uwon mandad mgo minuvu no atag kandan dos sokkad no allow dakkoo kos koruanon taddot dumon mgo allow
oy duwon mandad duma nod popoomdom no nokodiling da en kos koruanon to mgo allow
a mokaatag kaay koilangan no waa kodduworuwa to ipat sokkad no ollog iddos id puungan din
os minuvu nod dokollan din to koruanon kos sokkad no allow od puungan din ini atag to kodposivantug tod ongaggon
ngketen dad en mandad diyot minuvu nod kaan to karni
d kaan sikandin atag to kodposivantug tod ongaggon oyyos id posolamat man sikandin to onama taddot kokaan
dda mandad so minuvu no diid kaan to karni od posivantug mandad sikandin tod ongaggon
dda en kos unayan no dii sikandin od kaan to karni woy id posolamat sikandin to onama
yyos siketa langun nod pompomakoy nouyag ki man o id patoy konna iddos keton bantug kos od ingowollon ta
yyos laggun to nouyag ki pa id oubpa ki atag to bantug tod ongaggon
oy iyon ingowollon ta no od kovantug iddos od ongaggon ahad diyot kopotayan ta
een nouyag ki man o id patoy iddos od ongaggon kos id pongomunoy keta
u iddos unayan no id patoy si isas rays woy nouyag mandon amoy sikandin kos od ongaggon taddot nongouyag woy taddot id poomatoy ron
een mambo man tod hukuman dow iddos mgo suwod dow to kopomakoy
ambo man tod lomottan dow sikandan
oomdomma row no siketa langun od isau to onama amoyd hukuman
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to onnaavonnaa nod ikohiyon ku koniyu no od inguma kos allow no iddos langun no minuvu od lingkood diyot isowwan ku woy dos langun od oseng no siyak en kos onama
a to iddon allow iddos ipat sokkad keta od isau to onama amoyd ponudtuu to langun no nopuungan ta kaay to ampowt ingod
een konna ki od hukum to ipat sokkad ko konna od olihuwan ta kos kodpuung to ahad ondan no unayan nod pokorellos kos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
a siyak pomon to nosokkad ad diyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays waa nosorollan ku no kokaan no id diiyan
iru ko duwon man minuvu nod ikahi no duwon mgo kokaan no id diiyan atag kandin id diiyan en moho idda
tid komorat kos suwod du riyot kopomakoy pomon to kokaan no id kaan du iyon kohulugan tadda no waa ginawa ru kandin
een ayyadayyad ka no waa od korattan no kopomakoy to duma pomon da en to kokaan oyya su id patoy man mandad si isas rays atag kandan
had nosorollan du no moppiya rad kos id puungan du piru morat idda riyot suwod du to kopomakoy yo ru baling puungi idda su amoy iddos moppiya nod puungan du dii ran od podmoratton
yya su iddos kodharit onama konna iddos kokaan woy inommon kos id dokollan to koruanon ko konna idda en so kodpuung to motallong moppiyon koroniyan woy dos kahaan no id pomon to his no spiritu
a ko ungketen kos kodpuung ta atag ki isas rays od kahaa kos onama keta woy idda mandad so mgo minuvu
urisu od nokkaanokkaa ki nod puung taddot od pokomoppiya to koroniyan ta woy od potovangoy ki nod mosalig kos kopomakoy to ipat sokkad keta
onna ta od dorattan kos kopomakoy to dumon minuvu pomon taddot toonaw kokaan
onnaa en no waa id diiyan no kokaan diyot kodontong to onama piru konna moppiya no od kaan ki to ahad ondan unayan nod pokorellos to saa kos duma
oppiya pa baling no konna ki od kaan to karni od oinom woyd puung to ahad ondan otik unayan da en idda no od pokorellos kos suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
o ondan man kos poomdom du mokaatag kaay koilangan no sikkow ra en woy dos onama kos nokosaddoo
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvun nokosaddoo no ollog kos id puungan din
iru otid duworuwa kos minuvu mokaatag to kodkaan to karni woy id kaan dad sikandin tadda nokosaa sikandin su iddos id puungan din id suwoy taddot poomdom din
yya su iddos ahad ondan nod puungan ta otid duworuwa ki no saddook konna idda moppiya nod puungan piru od puungan ta rad nokosaa ki
a siketa no mosalig kos kopomakoy koilangan no mowwet kos posinsya ta taddot mgo minuvu no moomet pa riyot kopomakoy
onna no iyon ta ra en od poomdommon iddos od pokopahaa to keton kougolingun
oilangan no iddos ipat sokkad keta od puung taddot od pokopahaa to mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy atag to kopiyannan dan amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy ran
yya su ahad si isas rays waa rin poomdomma iddos od pokopahaa to kougolingun din
u duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to onama iddos kodsumpalit to mgo minuvu kikow nokosumpalit mandad koddi
ddos langun no noikahi dangan diyot osulat no ahit onama id sulat amoyd nonaw keta nod tiis ki to mgo kosupittan woy amoy od koinniyat kos ginawa ta
oy ukit kaay ponayun ki nod imman taddot mgo tandu to onama
os onama kos id pomonnan taddot botasan no od kotuig nod tiis woy sikandin mandad kos id inniyat to ginawa ta
uopa nod tovangan kow nikandin no od moppiya kos koroniyan dow riyot ipat sokkad ukit to kodikuu to kodbovotasan ni isas rays
u otid puungan dow idda od kosokkad kow riyot koddoong to onama no moy woy onama mandad tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
een tonggapa row iddos ipat sokkad koniyu iling to kodtanggap ni isas rays koniyu amoy od koposivontuhan kos onama
oomdomma row no mid undini si isas rays nod tavang to mgo udio su amoy od pokita nod kosolihan iddos onama to kodtuman to mgo tandu rin diyot kovuyyahan dan
oy sokkad pa no unayan nid undini si isas rays su amoy iddos konna mgo udio od posivantug to onama pomon to eru rin kandan
u ini en kos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d doong a kikow duma to konna mgo udio
d kanta a atag to kodposivantug to kikown ngaran
uwon mandad nosulat no mid ungketen to ikiyu no konna mgo udio kahaa kow duma taddot mgo minuvu nid aam to onama
a duwon pa mandad noikahi no ikiyu langun no konna mgo udio doonga row iddos onama nod ongaggon
angun no tribu doonga row sikandin
uwon mandad id sulat ni saias no mid ungketen to nit od ingumon mgo allow duwon od tobbow no lubbad ni sai
ikandin kos od hari taddot konna mgo udio woy sikandin kos od immanon dan
uopa no iddos onama nid pomonnan to koimmanan ta od boggoy koniyu to dakkoon kahaan woy kosunayan pomon to kopomakoy row kandin
a ukit kaay od kotimulan peen kos koimmanan dow riyot onama ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
go suwod dakkoo kos kodsalig ku no moppiya kow no mgo minuvu ollog kos koovottan dow mokaatag to onama woy od pokononaw kowd to ipat sokkad koniyu
iru ahad ungketen kaayt sulat ku dii ad od aangaang su duwon id nonaw ku no dii kud id kopii nod kolingawan dow
os unayan no dii a od aangaang oyya su id boggayan a to onama to kotungud pomon to kopiyannoy rin koddi
udsuhuwon a ni isas rays diyot kodnonaw to konna mgo udio
u nokoiling a to tohodbuwis nod ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan amoy duwon konna mgo udio no id boggoy ku timbang buwis diyot onama no id kahaai rin woy id podmolinis diyot kodontong din ukit to his no spiritu
a pomon to nosokkad ad diyot ki isas rays id pokopobporoong kud iddos pinuungan ku atag to onama
aa osson id pokopobporoong ku idda ra en so id puungan ni isas rays ukit koddi no nopiyod ku iddos konna mgo udio no od pomakoy woyd dumoruma kandin to norinog dan iddos osengan ku woy nokita ran iddos pinuungan ku
kit to kotuusan no id boggoy koddi to his no spiritu id puungan ku iddos mgo mokososoobbu
een ahad ingkon a od isau id ponudtuu ku iddos oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays pomon diyot erusalem taman diyot prubinsya to lirico
yyos waa osson ingowollon ku idda ra en so kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot mgo lugaa no waa poron nokorinog mokaatag ki isas rays
tik id ponunggeleng ku riyot kamot dii a od kopiyan nod kokamot diyot id komottan don to duma
ddos od puungan ku iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to os waa poron nokorinog mokaatag kandin od pokokita ran kandin woy dos waa poron noponudtulan mokaatag kandin od pokaabbot en
a pomon to pinuungan ku to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan idda en kos unayan no taman koungkay waa a nokounduwon to koniyu
iru koungkay su nopongnga kud kos pinuungan ku kaayn mgo lugaa saddook od pokounduwon ad en to koniyu
yyos nouhoy kud en id kopii nod lowwi koniyu
yon puhawang ku nod tuuy a ruwot koniyu to kodundiyon ku to spanya
raroy a nod kahaa otid pokodkita ki ahad daom da to pilon allow
opongnga tadda od pokotavang kow koddi no od pokoponayun a to iponawon ku
iru koungkay od undiyon a pa to erusalem su od piyoddan ku to tavang iddos mgo minuvu to onama rutun
u iddos od lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot acedonia woy riyot caya mahan to ginawa ran nod boggoy to tavang atag taddot od pompomakoy no worowora riyot erusalem
akkoo kos kahaan dan nod tavang woy ollog en idda
yyos nokoiling to id balus dan nid tavang su ukit taddot od pompomakoy no mgo udio riyot erusalem nokorinog iddos konna mgo udio to kahit onama
urisu koilangan en nod tovangan to konna mgo udio iddos mgo toho erusalem taddot mgo koilonganon dan
a otik id pokoatod kud inin tavang od tuuy a ruwot koniyu to dii a pa od tollus diyon to spanya
okosaddoo a no otid pokoinguma a ruwon lampas no kopiyannan kos od kotanggap ta riyot ki isas rays pomon to kopomakoy ta
go suwod od loglohottan ku sikiyu no ukit ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta woy ukit to kodginawa nid boggoy to his no spiritu lonug kow no monit diyot koddasaa atag koddi
asaa kow no dii a od monnuwon taddot mgo minuvu no diid pompomakoy riyot udea
asaa kow mandad no iddos mgo minuvu to onama riyot erusalem od kahaa nod tanggap taddot tavang nod piyoddon ku kandan
urisu od loglohottan ku sikiyu no dosali row ini su amoy otik id kopiit onama od pokounduwon a to koniyu no duwon kahaan woy od monokkaa kos keton ginawa riyot kodporumannoy ta
uopa no iddos onama nid boggoy to kosunayan od duma koniyu langun
yya od kotuman en ini
a duwon id pokilaa ku koniyu no sokkad no tobboy ta riyot kopomakoy no tohodtavang to od lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot bonuwa to encrea
ddos ngaran din si ebe
tid inguma sikandin duwon tonggapa row pomon to nosokkad sikandin diyon tod ongaggon oyyos ini en kos ollog nod puungan to mgo minuvu to onama
ovangi row sikandin otik duwon mgo koilonganon din su mouraa kos id tovangan din sokkad ad en tadda
a id pouma row kos kodpongumusta ku riyot ki riscila woy ki quila
ikandan kos mgo duma ku riyot pinuungan atag ki isas rays
d podsuwomihon dan nod patoy amoyd tavang da en koddi deen dakkoo kos kodposolamat ku kandan
oy konna ra siyak id posolamat mandad kandan iddos langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no konna mgo udio
d pongumusta a mandad to langun nod pompomakoy no id lolivuung diyot baoy ran
uwon pa mouraa no id kopii ku tod pongumusta
okkad don en iddos id ginowannan ku no oukuy no si peneto
ikandin kos unna nid pomakoy ki isas rays diyot prubinsya to sia
d pongumusta a ki aria no orayn id oiluggat atag koniyu
d pouma row kos kodpongumusta ku riyot ki ndronico woy ki unias
ikandan kos iling ku no mgo udio woy duma ku no noprisu dangan
ovantug sikandan no mgo apostoles woy unna peen sikandan koddi no id pomakoy ki isas rays
d pongumusta a ki mpliato no id ginowannan ku no oukuy riyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays
d pongumusta a ki rbano no duma ta riyot pinuungan atag ki isas rays woy ki staquis no id ginowannan ku no oukuy
d pongumusta a mandad ki peles
os langun no minuvu od pokooseng no morumoruma sikandin to mgo suhu ni isas rays
d pouma row kos kodpongumusta ku riyot pomilya ni ristobulo
d pongumusta a ki erodion no iling ku no udio woy taddot mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no sakup to pomilya ni arciso
d pouma ku kos kodpongumusta ku riyot ki rifena woy ki rifosa
nin mgo baay orayn id oiluggat diyot pinuungan atag tod ongaggon
d pongumusta a mandad ki ersida no id ginowannan ku no oukuy
ray mandad sikandin id oiluggat diyot pinuungan atag tod ongaggon
d pouma ku mandad kos pongumusta ku riyot ki ufo woy riyot inoy rin
ovantug si ufo riyot pinuungan atag tod ongaggon
oy dos inoy rin id poiling a nikandin to kandin don en no anak
d pongumusta a mandad ongki sincrito ki legonte ki ermes ki atrobas ki ermas woy taddot langun no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no mgo duma ran
d pouma row kos kodpongumusta ku ongki ilologo ki ulia ki ereo woy dos tobboy rin woy ki limpas woy taddot langun no duma ran no mgo minuvu to onama
a pokuukumustay kow amoyd pokita no id pohinowannoy kow
ddos langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy ki isas rays id pouma mandad to kodpongumusta ran koniyu
a mgo suwod od loglohottan ku sikiyu no bantoy kow taddot mgo minuvu nod podsuwoy koniyu riyot kodposokaddoy row oyya su iddos nonaw ran supak taddot id nonaw ron koniyu dangan
een poriyu kow kandan
u iddos mgo minuvu nod puung to ungketen waa ran idda puungi atag tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays ko konna atag da en to kandan nid kopii
kit to moppiyon kodooseng dan woy motoos no mgo kahi no uvag kun tod doongon id okalan dan iddos mgo minuvu no moobbava kos sinorollan
ovantug iddos kodtuman dow to nonaw ni isas rays deen oraroy a no nahaa koniyu
yon id kopii ku no moraom kos koovottan dow mokaatag to kodpuung to moppiya woy waa sinorollan taddot kodpuung to morat
a konnod kouhoy iddos onama no id boggoy keta to kosunayan od tavang koniyu amoyd kotalu row si oivuyan iling tod geeheddan dow sikandin
uopa no si isas rays nod ongaggon ta od pokita to kopiyannoy rin diyot koniyu langun
a si imoteo no duma ku riyot pinuungan atag to onama id pouma sikandin to kodpongumusta ruwot koniyu
nsi ucio mandad si ason woy si osipatro no iling ku no mgo udio id pouma to kodpongumusta ran koniyu
i ercio no timbang bollad ku to kodsulat kaay id pouma mandad to kodpongumusta rin koniyu
okkad sikandin no duma ta nod pompomakoy ki isas rays
d pongumusta mandad si ayo ruwot koniyu
ikandin kos komunoy to baoy nid oubpan ku woy kaay en od lolivuung kos od pompomakoy
d pongumusta mandad koniyu si rasto no tohodsomad to soopi to guberno kaayn ingod woy si uartus no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
a muopa no iddos od ongaggon no si isas rays od pokita to kopiyannoy rin diyon to koniyu langun
yya od kotuman en ini d doongon ta iddos onama nod pokomosalig to koniyun kopomakoy ukit to oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku mokaatag ki isas rays
nin oppiyon inoggan waa pa id posaddoo dangan
iru koungkay id posaddoo ron ini to onama ukit taddot id posulat din dangan to mgo propeta
ddos onama no waa tigkonayan woy waa kotompusan id suhu rin no id posaddoo inin oppiyon inoggan diyot langun no minuvu su amoy od dumoruma woyd pomakoy ran kandin
onama ra en kos duwon moraom no koovottan to langun woy od doongon ta sikandin taman to waad tomanon ukit ki isas rays
yya od kotuman en ini
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo no id aam ni isas rays amoyd kovovallan no apostoles din su ini en kos id kopiit onama
uma ku nid sulat kaay si ostenes no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
d sulat doy ini koniyu no mgo minuvu to onama no id lolivuung duwot bonuwa to orinto
d aam kow to onama amoy id ossa atag kandin pomon to nosokkad kow riyot ki isas rays
oy ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan din atag to langun no minuvu riyot ahad ingkon no mgo lugaa nid simba ki isas rays oyyos sikandin kos od ongaggon dan woy keta mandad
uopa nod kotanggap dow iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
naayun a od posolamat to onama taddot kopiyannoy no id pokita rin koniyu pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays
yyos pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot kandin noratu kow riyot langun iling taddot koovottan dow to kovonnaan woy riyot kotuihan dow to kodooseng
a pomon kaay noposivonnalan dow no bonnaa en iddos ponudtulon doy koniyu mokaatag ki isas rays
een waa kulang dow to ahad ondan no kogahan no id boggoy to onama koniyu laggun tod aangat kow to kodlivod tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
ikandin kos od ponokkaa to kopomakoy row taman to kotompusan su amoy waa en id pokosawoy koniyu riyot allow to kodlivod din
yyos od kosolihan en kos onama nod puung kaay su sikandin man kos id aam koniyu no od kosokkad taddot nak din no si isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a mgo suwod ukit to kotungud no id boggoy koddi tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays od loglohottan ku sikiyu no pooblovottoy kow
o kowd poooossay ko konna sokadda row kos koniyun poomdom woy dontulon
d pomandu ku ini koniyu su duwon sakup to pomilya ni loe no nokoponudtuu koddi no id poopopuloy kow kun
yon kohulugan ku no nokodossoossa kos osengan taddot duma koniyu
uwon od oseng no akup koy ni ablo
os duma od oseng no akup koy ni polos dos duma od oseng no akup koy ni edro woy duwon mandad od oseng no akup koy ni isas rays
onna idda moppiya
okoiling don moho to novaad si isas rays
ambo siyak bo kos id patoy riyon to krus atag koniyu
d boutismuwan kow vo ukit to ngaran ku patow no mgo tinodduwan ku sikiyu
d posolamat a no si rispo woy si ayo ra kos id boutismuwan ku ruwot koniyu
een waa sokkad koniyu nod pokooseng no id boutismuwan ku sikiyu amoyd kovovallan kow no tinodduwan ku
yya vos en duwon pobbos onsi stefanas woy dos pomilya rin no noboutismuwan ku
ssa pa kandan worad dumon nosompottan ku
aa a id popiyod ni isas rays amoyd boutismu ko konna amoy od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
oy riyot kodpuung ku tadda waa a mid gamit to motoos no mgo osengan oyyos dii a od kopiyan nod koworan to koruanon iddos nonaw mokaatag to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus
a atag taddot mgo minuvu no iyon od ingumannon iddos silut to onama koongollan iddos nonaw mokaatag to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus
iru atag keta no id tobbus inin nonaw orayd kokita iddos kotuusan to onama
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d worannon ku iddos koovottan taddot moraom kos koovottan woyid pokita ku no waa koruanon taddot kopondayan to mgo mopandoy
a ko ungketen ondan pobbo kos koruanon taddot mgo minuvun moraom kos koovottan
ndan pobbo kos koruanon taddot mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises
ndan pobbo kos koruanon taddot od pongkotuig nod ooseng kaay to ampowt ingod
orad en koruanon
u id posaddoo ron to onama no koongollan da iddos mgo moraom no koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod
yyos pomon to moraom no koovottan to onama id puhawang din no konna od pokokilaa kandin kos mgo minuvu ukit to koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod
u iyon puhawang din no od tobbuson din iddos id pomakoy to oppiyon inoggan nid ponudtuu roy ahad od tommanon taddot diid pomakoy no koongollan da idda
a iddos mgo udio dii ran od pomakoy otik waa mokososoobbu nod posivonnaa taddot norinog dan
dda mandad so mgo riego iyon od nongkapon dan iddos moraom no koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod
iru sikami id ponudtuu roy iddos mokaatag ki isas rays no id pakpak diyon to krus
nin ponudtulon dii en od kotanggap taddot mgo udio
oy idda mandad so mgo riego od tommanon dan no koongollan idda
iru atag keta no id aam to onama udio man o riego nosorollan ta no riyot ki isas rays orayd kokita iddos kotuusan woy moraom no koovottan to onama
u ahad od tommanon to mgo minuvu no koongollan da iddos id puungan to onama to kodtobbus keta piru iddos moraom no koovottan to onama lampas en to langun no koovottan to minuvu
oy ahad od tommanon to mgo minuvu no moomet kos kotuusan to onama piru waa en ahad sokkad no minuvu nod pokolampas to kotuusan din
a mgo suwod poomdomma row ko ondan kow dangan to waa kow pa id aam to onama
imbokkad da koniyu kos duwon moraom no koovottan diyot kodontong to minuvu
isok da koniyu kos duwon mowwet no kotundanan woy pilopila ra kos mgo anak to datu
iru iyon id aam to onama iddos mgo minuvu nod tommanon to duma no waa koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod su amoy od poilawan iddos duwon moraom no koovottan
d aam din mandad iddos mgo minuvu nod tommanon to duma no moomet kaay to ampowt ingod su amoy od poilawan iddos duwon konokkaan
d aam to onama iddos od koooyuwan woy dos id poddisokkan to kodontong to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod woy idda mandad so waa koruanon su amoy id pokita rin to mgo minuvu no iddos duwon koruanon diyot kodontong dan waa koruanon tadda riyot kodontong to onama
d puungan din idda amoy waa minuvu nod pokopobporoong diyot isowwan to onama
u iddos onama kos id podsokkad keta riyot ki isas rays woy si isas kos id pomonnan to moraom no koovottan ta
oy ukit kandin id podmotallong ki to onama molinis ki riyot kodontong din woy id polegguang ki riyot koduripon to mgo saa
een od puungan ta iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to os minuvu nod kopiyan od pobporoong iyon din da id pobporoong iddos id puungan tod ongaggon
a siyak mgo suwod iddot kodunduwon ku to koniyu amoyd ponudtuu taddot waa id posaddoo dangan to onama waa a mid gamit to kopondayan to kodooseng woy moraom no koovottan
u iddot duwon a pa to koniyu nopuhawang kud no waa ossa nid ponudtuu ku idda ra en so mokaatag ki isas rays woy dos kopotayan din diyon to krus
o ruwon a pa duma koniyu id moomet woy id kookoo a oyyos od kovaakkan a no saddook dii ku od kogaha tod tuman iddos id popuungan to onama koddi
oy riyot kodnonaw ku waa a mid gamit to moraom no koovottan ukit to motoos no kodooseng amoyd kopiyod ku sikiyu
u iyon nokopiyod koniyu nid pomakoy idda en so kotuusan to his no spiritu no id posivonnaa taddot id ponudtuu ku
d ungketen ku idda su amoy iddos pounsaran to kopomakoy row konna riyot moraom no koovottan to minuvu ko konna diyon en to kotuusan to onama
iru duwon en moraom no koovottan no id nonaw roy taddot mgo minuvu no buyyag don diyot kopomakoy piru konna iddos koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod woy konna mandad iddos koovottan taddot mgo ponguu kaay to ampowt ingod
yyos konnod kouhoy od kowora ron iddos kotungud dan to kodhari
iru iddos koovottan no id nonaw roy idda en so puhawang to onama to waa rin pa novovalli inis ingod amoyd kolonug ki riyot kodposivantug kandin
iru iddon puhawang waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan
ddos mgo ponguu kaay to ampowt ingod waa nokaabbot taddon puhawang to onama su otik nokaabbot pa sikandan tadda waa ran nanoy id pakpak diyon to krus iddos od ongaggon no motuus to langun
iru iddon puhawang to onama noikahi riyot osulat no ahi rin no mid ungketen to aa en minuvun nokokita nokorinog woy nokopoomdom tat id panoy to onama atag taddot id ginawa kandin
iru id posaddoo ini keta ukit to spiritu to onama
u iddos spiritu nokosaddoo to langun ahad taddot kinoroomman no poomdom to onama
tid ponunggelengan ta kos minuvu waa saddoo to duma taddot kandin no poomdom ko konna idda ra en so kougolingun din
ngketen dad en mandad kos onama waa en nokosaddoo ko ondan kos diyot poomdom din ko konna idda ra en so spiritu to onama
a siketa nod pompomakoy iddos poomdom no notanggap ta waa id pomon to poomdom to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna id pomon to spiritu to onama no id poubpa rin dinit keta amoyd koovottan ta iddos langun nid boggoy rin keta
een diyot kodponudtuu roy koniyu mokaatag to onama waa koy id gamit to mgo kahi no id pomon to koovottan to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna idda en so mgo kahi no id pomon to koovottan to spiritu to onama
oy dos bonnaan nonaw no id pomon kandin idda en kos id ponudtuu roy riyot mgo minuvu no noiroomman to spiritu to onama
os minuvu no waa riyot kandin iddos spiritu to onama dii rin od tonggapon iddos mgo nonaw no id pomon to spiritu su atag kandin koongollan idda
oy dii rin mandad od koovottan idda otik dii pa sikandin unna od koiroomman taddon spiritu
iru iddos minuvu no noiroomman to spiritu to onama od koovottan din kos koruanon tadda langun
iru dii sikandin od koovottan to duma
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to aa ahad ondoy no nokosaddoo to poomdom to onama woy waa en od pokopomandu to ollog nod puungan din
iru siketa id boggayan ki to onama to poomdom no od pokoiling to poomdom ni isas rays
a mgo suwod to ruwon a pa to koniyu waa a nokononaw koniyu to mgo moraom iling taddot id nonaw ku riyot mgo buyyag don to kopomakoy no noiroomman to spiritu to onama
d nonaw a koniyu no timbang mgo anak pa riyot kopomakoy oyyos id ikuu kow poron taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron duwot koniyu
ddos disok no anak nod susu poron konna moppiya nod boggayan to mokoggaan kokaan
ngketen dad en mandad koniyu iddos id nonaw ku ollog en taddot mgo minuvu no anak pa riyot kopomakoy
aa ku id nonaw koniyu iddos ollog taddot minuvu no buyyag don diyot kopomakoy woy ahad koungkay dii kow peen od pokaabbot tadda
yya su id ikuu kow poron to morat no ingowollon dow
d ikahi ku ini su duwon duma koniyu nod posiisinay woy dos duma od poopopuloy
nis id puungan dow patow no id ikuu kow poron taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron duwot koniyu woy id ikuu kow taddot mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa allak to onama
u otik duwon od oseng no iyak sakup a ni ablo woy dos duma od oseng no akup a ni polos na nokoiling kowd taddot mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa allak to onama
a poomdomma row ini
ndoy man si polos
oy ondoy a man nod ponguuwon dow
ikami mgo sudsuhuwon koy ra to onama woy id gamit koy ra nikandin amoyd piyod koniyu riyot kopomakoy
yon doy ra od puungan iddos id sanna to onama to ipat sokkad konami
tik id ponunggeleng ku sikiyu to kamot siyak kos id pomuwa woy si polos kos id bisbis piru iddos onama kos id potuvu taddot pinomuwa
een iddos id pomuwa woy dos id bisbis konna ollog nod doongon ko konna idda ra en so onama oyyos sikandin man kos id potuvu tadda
okkad da en kos dontulon taddot id pomuwa woy dos id bisbis
oy od pokotanggap to ganti iddos ipat sokkad kandan loppa taddot nopuungan dan
iyak woy si polos duma koy riyot pinuungan atag to onama woy sikiyu nokoiling to kamot to onama no id puungan doy
okoiling kow mandad to baoyt onama
a ukit to kotuihan no id boggoy to onama koddi nokoiling a taddot mopandoy no tohodbovaoy no id taaw to pounsaran
yon kohulugan tadda no siyak kos unnon id ponudtuu koniyu mokaatag ki isas rays
ddos duma mandad id ponayun dan nid poohinat diyot pounsaran no id taaw ku
iru iddos od poohinat tadda koilangan nod ooyyaran dan iddos od puungan dan
yyos waa ahad ondoy nod pokovullas taddot nokotaaw ron no pounsaran no idda en si isas rays
yon kohulugan tadda sikandin da en kos od pomokayan ta
a iddos ahad ondoy no moppiya kos pinuungan atag to onama nokoiling to id gamit sikandan to mgo motoggas nod korattan iling to mgo buawan mgo plata woy mahaa no mgo batu riyot kodbovaoy
os duma mandad nokoiling to id gamit sikandan to mgo moomok nod korottan iling to mgo kayu aggi woy lokkoy
een otid koloow iddos baoy od kosorollan ko motoggas o moomok nod korattan iddos id gamit taddon baoy
a iling mandad tadda iddos pinuungan to ipat sokkad no id puung atag tod ongaggon od kosorollan diyot allow to kodlivod din oyya su od geddaman iddos langun ukit to apuy
tik diid kotutung to apuy iddos id poohinat diyot pounsaran no idda en so pinuungan to minuvu na od pokotanggap en sikandin to ganti pomon to onama
iru otid kotutung idda waa en od kotanggap din
d kotobbus man sikandin piru nokoiling dobbo sikandin to minuvun nokopaahuy pomon diyot baoy rin no notirukkan
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no nokoiling kow to templo to onama woy id ubpa iddos spiritu to onama riyot koniyu
een otik duwon minuvu nod gobba to templo to onama od silutan en sikandin to onama
yya su iddon templo id ossa atag kandin woy sikiyu en iddon templo
o row okali kos kougolingun dow
tik duwon minuvu ruwot koniyu no riyot poomdom din moraom kos kandin no koovottan iling to koovottan taddot diid pompomakoy iyon moppiya nod owan din idda su amoy duwon moraom no koovottan din pomon to onama
u iddos koovottan kaay to ampowt ingod koongollan da idda riyot kodontong to onama
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to os kopondayan to minuvu nod aakaa idda rad en mandad kos id lettag to onama kandin
oy duwon mandad noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to okosaddoo kos od ongaggon no iddos poomdom to minuvu no moraom kos koovottan waa en koruanon tadda
urisu konna ollog no id pobporoong dow kos sokkad no minuvu
u iddos langun id boggoy to onama koniyu atag to kopiyannan dow
ikami ki polos woy si edro id aam koy to onama amoyd kovovallan no mgo sudsuhuwon atag to kopiyannan dow
had inis ingod inis kotomanan koungkay woy iddos od inguma pon mgo allow dos umuu woy kopotayan dow id boggoy to onama atag to kopiyannan dow
a sikiyu mgo sakup kow ni isas rays woy si isas rays mandad sakup sikandin to onama
een poomdomma row no mgo sudsuhuwon koy ra ni isas rays
d sonnan koy to onama riyot kodpaabbotlabbot to mgo nonaw no waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan
a iddos minuvu nod sonnan to pinuungan koilangan nod kosolihan
tag koddi immat waa ron man diyot koddi ko ondak kodontong dow o kodontong to dumon minuvu taddot pinuungan ku ko moppiya vo o dii
had siyak konna a man od pokooseng ko moppiya vo o dii kos pinuungan ku
olinis kos poomdom ku piru konna kohulugan no waa saa ku
dda ra en so od ongaggon kos od pokohukum koddi
een yo kowd aawang od hukum to duma ko konna angat kow to ollog no timpu no od livod iddos od ongaggon oyyos sikandin kos od hukum
d posaddoo rin iddos langun no nokoollos no pinuungan to mgo minuvu woy od ukalon din iddos dontulon to ginawa ran
oy iddon timpu od doongon to onama iddos ipat sokkad no minuvu taddot moppiyon pinuungan dan
go suwod id ponunggelengan ku si polos woy siyak su amoy od pokopohinonaw kow to kohulugan taddot osengan no mid ungketen to o row poompasi ko ondan kos nosulat diyon to ahit onama
a otid ikulon dow idda konna row id pobporoong kos sokkad no minuvu woy dos sokkad od poddisokkan dow to kodontong
ambo man tod ikahi kow no moppiya kow pa taddot duma
onna vo iddos onama man kos id boggoy koniyu to langun
a ko ungketen mambo man to id pobporoong dow no iling tid oiluggatan dow idda
u iyon bonnaa id boggoy ra idda to onama koniyu
oy koniyu no mgo toho orinto
unan dow ayu ko dii rowd od koilonganon kos onama su riyon don to koniyu kos langun
d popoomdom kow ayu no id tigkanoy kowd nod ponguu riyon to kodharit onama piru sikami moho no mgo apostoles waa poron
oppiya en ko id ponguu kowd su amoy od ponguu koy mandad duma koniyu
oikahi ku idda su riyot koddin poomdom sikami no mgo apostoles id poobbava koy to onama riyot langun no minuvu
ling koy taddot id hukuman nod imotayan diyot isowwan to mouraan minuvu laggun tod tongtongngan to intirut ingod ahad taddot mgo ponolihan
ikamin mgo apostoles od pongkoongoo koy kun pomon to koddumoruma roy ki isas rays
iru sikiyu moraom kun kos koovottan dow pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot kandin
ikami moomet kun diyot kopomakoy piru sikiyu mosalig kun
ikiyu od doongon kow to mgo minuvu piru sikami od poddisokkan to kodontong
had taman koungkay id gutas woy notokkangan koy woy morat dobbo kos umpak doy
d tiis koy to mgo kodpomadas woy waa notooo nod oubpan doy
d potaddu koy to ating amoyd kouyag
tid momorattan koy to mgo minuvu od dasaa koy no od koeruwan kos onama kandan
oy otid ooyuwon koy od tiison doy idda
tid podmoratton koy od momoppiyannan doy sikandan
iru taman koungkay id poddisokkan koy to kodontong no id poiling koy robbo taddot putput
aa a mid sulat kaay amoyd poilow koniyu ko konna amoy od pomonduwan ku sikiyu timbang mgo anak ku nid dokollan ku to ginawa
u ahad mouraa kos id inahak koniyu riyot ki isas rays siyak da en kos amoy row riyot kopomakoy pomon to nosokkad kow ki isas rays
yyos siyak man kos unna no id ponudtuu koniyu to oppiyon inoggan
een od loglohottan ku sikiyu no ikula row kos kodbovotasan ku
ni en kos unayan no id popiyod ku si imoteo ruwot koniyu su amoy od ikuu kow to kodbovotasan ku
ling to anak ku sikandin no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy od kosolihan mandad sikandin diyot pinuungan atag tod ongaggon
d posampot din koniyu iddos kodbovotasan no id ikuu ku pomon to kopomakoy ku ki isas rays woy idda en no kodbovotasan kos id nonaw ku riyot od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy ahad ingkon a od isau
a duwon kun duma koniyu no od poratasdatas don su kunan dan ko dii ad od unduwot koniyu
iru dii en od kouhoy od unduwon a to koniyu otik id kopiit onama
d kosorollan ku ko iddon od poratasdatas no mgo minuvu id dumannan bo taddot kotuusan to onama iddos osengan dan o taman da to bivig
yyos od kokilaa iddos minuvu no id horiyan to onama konna ukit to mgo osengan din ko konna ukit to kotuusan to onama no od kokita riyot moppiyon pinuungan din
a ingkon kos od aamon dow
tik dii kow od tanan to morat no pinuungan dow od unduwon a nod pokita to langot koniyu
iru ko moppiya kos pinuungan dow id pokita ku koniyu kos koddin kodginawa woy mosunay no pusung
a nokorinog a no duwon kun duwot koniyu no molibmit kos pinuungan su id unoy rin tid osawa kos inaina rin
e ahad moho iddos diid pomakoy to onama dii man od puung to ungketen
oy id pobporoong dow baling iddos id puungan din
yon nanoy ollog no mopet kos kodlanu row pomon tadda woy od poowan dow ruwot koniyu iddos minuvu no id puung to ungketen
had waa a ruwon iddos poomdom ku inaayun duwot koniyu
a ukit to kotungud no id boggoy ni isas rays koddi id hukuman kud iddos minuvu nid puung tadda timbang duwon a rad to koniyu
een ini vo kos koilangan nod puungan dow
olivuung kow woy id poiling dow no duwon a rad to koniyu
oy poomdomma row no duwon mandad to koniyu iddos kotungud taddot od ongaggon ta no si isas rays
a ukit kaayn kotungud boggoy row iddon minuvu riyot bollad ni oivuyan amoyd silutan kos lawa rin su amoy od kotobbus kos gimukud din diyot allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon
onna ollog nod pobporoong kow
okosaddoo kowd man taddot osengan no mid ungketen to tik id sambut iddos disok no potuvu riyot horina nod bovallan no paan od tuvu en iddos tivuk no horina
a iddos morat no pinuungan od pokoiling en taddot potuvu su ahad sokkad da kos od puung to morat mouraa en kos od kookoy
een koilangan nod owan dowd iddos tapoyn potuvu no idda en so morat no pinuungan dow amoy worad morat duwon to koniyu
u otid puungan dow idda od pokoiling kow to lammin horina no waa potuvu
okosaddoo a no iling kowd en kaay su id pomakoy kowd man
yyos id patoy si isas rays amoyd awa to mgo saa ta woy sikandin kos timbang karnero no id sumbali to mgo udio riyot timpu to pista to odlihad to onolihan
een diyot kodlonug ta taddon pista dii ki od kaan taddot paan no duwon potuvu
yon kohulugan ku no riyot koubpa ta nod pompomakoy dii ki od ikuu taddot morat no kodbovotasan woy mosaasaan pinuungan ko konna iyon ta od ikulon iddos moppiyon pinuungan woy dos bonnaan nonaw
iyot sulat no id popiyod ku dangan koniyu id ikahi a no konna kow od lommung taddot mgo minuvu no molibmit kos pinuungan
iru iddos kohulugan taddot id ikahi ku konna mokaatag taddot konnod pompomakoy
u otik idda pa nanoy kos kohulugan ku na koilangan en nod awa kowd kaay to ampowt ingod amoyd pokoporiyu kow taddot od laayuk to konna ran sawa dos orayd akonakon dos mgo tokawon woy dos od simba to konna bonnaan monama
yon kohulugan ku no otik duwon minuvu nod ikahi no suwod dow sikandin diyot kopomakoy piru id laayuk to konna rin sawa od akonakon od simba to konna bonnaan monama od doddoraat to duma od hubughubug woyd ponakow na yo kow ron en od lommung kandin ahad diyot kodkaan
ddos mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy waa lavut ku nod hukum su onama ra en kos od hukum kandan
iru iddos mgo duma row ayon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy duwon lavut dow nod hukum kandan
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no oilangan nod poowan dow ruwot koniyu iddos nokopuung to morat
a otik duwon sokkad koniyu no duwon ukahan diyot iling din nod pompomakoy mambot dii kow moho od koilow nod pousoy riyot tohodhukum no konnod pompomakoy
yon dow nanoy ollog nod poroniyan iddos mgo minuvu to onama su amoy sikandan kos od usoy
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no siketa no mgo minuvu to onama od lonug ki isas rays no od hukum to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod init morin allow
a ko ungketen od kogaha row en tod usoy iddos disok no mgo ukahan
aa kow vo mandad nokosaddoo no ahad iddos mgo ponolihan siketa kos od hukum
a otid kogaha row tod puung idda iyon pobbo iddos mgo ukahan kaay to ampowt ingod
een otik duwon mgo ukahan dow no iling tadda yo row id pousoy riyot mgo minuvu no waa lavut diyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy
oilowilow kow ron
aa vos ahad sokkad koniyu no od kotuig nod usoy to ukahan dow nod pompomakoy
u iyon dow moho od puungan id popenek kow to kasu to iling dow nod pompomakoy riyot mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy
ddos kodpopenek dow to mgo kasu patow idda no notalu kow ni oivuyan
oppiya pa baling kod tiis kow ra taddot od puung to morat woyd loimbung koniyu
iru sikiyu baling kos od puung to morat woyd loimbung taddot mgo suwod dow to kopomakoy
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no iddos minuvu nod puung to morat konnod pokolonug diyon to kodharit onama
een poomdomma row ini su amoy dii kow od kookalan
yya su iddos od puung to molibmit dos od laayuk to konna rin sawa dos od laayuk to iling din no mama o baay woy dos od simba to konna bonnaan mgo monama konna en sikandan od pokolonug diyon to kodharit onama
ngketen mandad iddos mgo tokawon dos orayd akonakon dos polohubug dos od doddoraat to duma woy dos od loimbung konna sikandan od pokolonug diyon to kodharit onama
angan ungketen en mandad kos pinuungan taddot duma koniyu piru koungkay molinis kowd diyot kodontong to onama woy novovallan kowd no mgo minuvu rin
oy pomon to nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays woy ukit to kotuusan to spiritu to onama ta id podmotallong kowd nikandin
a mokaatag to mgo ingowollon to lawa otik duwon od ikahi no d pokopuung a to ahad ondan nid kopii ku bonnaa rad man idda piru konna langun taddot id kopii ta nod puungan od pokomoppiya keta
tag koddi otid ikahi a no d pokopuung a to ahad ondan nid kopii ku bonnaa man idda piru konna a od kopiyan nod pouripon taddot od puungan ku
oy otik duwon od ikahi no os dontulon to kokaan atag da en to gottok woy dos dontulon to gottok atag da en to kokaan bonnaa rad man idda piru od inguma kos allow nod owan don to onama iddos koruanon kaayt oruwa
yyos waa bovalli to onama kos lawa ta amoyd puung to molibmit ko konna amoy od posivantug tod ongaggon woyd puung atag kandin
a iddos od ongaggon kos komunoy to lawa ta
oy ukit to kotuusan to onama id badnow rin iddos od ongaggon woy iling mandad tadda od bodnawon din kos lawa ta init morin allow
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no inis lawa ta nod pompomakoy mgo sakup to lawa ni isas rays
llog bo no siketa no mgo sakup taddot lawa ni isas rays od laayuk to baay nod bovoligya to lawa rin
onna en
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no iddos mama nod laayuk to baay no ungketen sokkad don sikandan no lawa
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos oruwa od kosokkad don
iru ko nosokkad ki riyon tod ongaggon iddos ginawa ta woy dos ginawa rin nosokkad don
een od loglohottan ku sikiyu no poriyu kow to molibmit no pinuungan
uwon dumon mgo saa no diid pokolibmit to lawa to minuvu piru iddos minuvu nod puung to molibmit nosaa sikandin taddot kougolingun din no lawa
aa kow vo nokosaddoo no iddos lawa row nokoiling to templo to his no spiritu no id poubpa to onama riyot koniyu
een konnad sikiyu kos komunoy to lawa row ko konna idda ron so onama
yya su id bayad sikandin to mahaa amoyd kovovallan kow no mgo minuvu rin
urisu gomita row kos koniyun lawa atag to kodposivantug to onama
a mgo suwod od tovakon ku iddos mgo intud dow riyot sulat no id popiyod dow koddi mokaatag to kodpoosoway
oppiya en ko diid osawa kos minuvu
iru pomon to mouraa kos od kopiyod nod puung to molibmit moppiya pa no iddos ipat sokkad koniyu od osawa baling amoyd pokoolihu kow tadda
a iddos mama koilangan nod tuman to id kopiit sawa rin mokaatag to pinuungan to toosawa
ngketen dad en mandad iddos baay riyot sawa rin
u iddos baay konnad sikandin kos komunoy to lawa rin ko konna idda ron so sawa rin
ddos mandad so mama konnad sikandin kos komunoy to lawa rin ko konna idda ron so sawa rin
een yo kowd bolivad taddot id kopii to sawa row
llog dad man no dii kow pa od pooyukoy ahad daom to pilon allow otik nokopuhawang kowd tapoy no iyon dow ra en od puungan iddos koddasaa
iru kopongnga tadda pooyukoy kow rad mandon su saddook dii kowd pokotohoo to koniyun kougolingun woy od kopiyod kow ni oivuyan diyot kodpuung to saa
onna kohulugan nid ikahi ku ini no id suhu ku sikiyu nod osawa ko konna kodpomandu ku ra ini
d kopii ku nanoy nod pokoiling kow koddi no waa id osawa
iru waa ki meen nokodiling su duwon man id boggayan to onama to kogahan nod osawa woy duwon mandad duma no id boggayan din to kogahan no diid osawa
a sikiyu no waa pa sawa woy sikiyu no bau ini kos od osengon ku koniyu
yon moppiya no ponayun kow no diid osawa iling koddi
iru ko dii row od kotoholan kos koniyun kougolingun na moppiya pa nod osawa kow kuntra to dii kowd pokotiis to ingowollon to lawa row
ikiyu mandad no duwon don sawa duwon od ikohiyon ku koniyu
onna inin pomon koddi ko konna suhu pomon tod ongaggon
oilangan no iddos baay diid suwoy to sawa rin
iru otik od suwoy man sikandin koilangan no konna sikandin od uman od osawa
tik konna koilangan nod pouliyoy sikandan taddot sawa rin
a riyon mandad to mama koilangan no dii rin od koddanan kos sawa rin
a riyot duma koniyu duwon mandad od osengon ku woy inin osengan waa id pomon tod ongaggon ko konna koddi ra
onunggeleng duwon mama nod pompomakoy no iddos sawa rin konnod pompomakoy
tik id kopii taddot baay no konnod pokodsuwoy tat sawa rin koilangan no iddos mama dii rin od koddanan dos sawa rin
ngketen dad en mandad diyot baay nod pompomakoy
tik iddos sawa rin no konnod pompomakoy id kopii rin no konna ran od pokodsuwoy koilangan no iddos baay dii rin od koddanan dos sawa rin
yya su iddos sawa no mama o baay no konnod pompomakoy id tanggap sikandin to onama pomon to sawa rin nod pompomakoy
u otik konna pa ungketen dii mandad od tonggapon to onama iddos mgo anak dan
iru iyon bonnaa id tanggap don sikandan to onama
iru ponunggeleng ko iddos sawa no mama o baay no konnod pompomakoy od kopiyan nod suwoy na aman kow oyyos waa kowd noiraom taddot ikot to kodpoosoway
u iddos dontulon no id aam ki to onama amoy od oubpa ki no waa samuk
ikkow nod pompomakoy waa saddoo ru no od kopiyod du kos sawa ru amoyd kotobbus
a iddos ipat sokkad keta duwon nokodossoosson kotomanan
os duma keta waa sawa dos duma duwon sawa dos duma uripon woy dos duma od koruwonnan
een ahad ondan kos kotomanan dow iddot timpu no id aam kow to onama ponayun kow dumoruma kandin
ni en kos id nonaw ku riyot langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
onunggeleng otik duwon udio no notupuwan don to waa pa sikandin id pomakoy koilangan no dii rin od bovaawan iddos patow no udio sikandin
oy dos minuvu no waa notupui to id pomakoy ron sikandin konnad koilangan nod potupu
u ahad notupuwan ki o wora waa koruanon tadda riyon to onama
iru iyon duwon dakkoon koruanon iddos kodtuman ta taddot mgo suhu rin
een ko ondan kos koniyun kotomanan iddot timpu nid aam kow to onama koilangan no iddos ipat sokkad koniyu od ponayun tadda
tik uripon ka iddot timpu no id aam ka to onama yo kod kaanu tadda
iru kod boggayan ka to kolegguangan na polimakut ka tadda
u iddos ahad ondoy no uripon iddot timpu nid aam sikandin tod ongaggon nokolegguang don pomon diyot koduripon to saa
a iling mandad tadda iddos ahad ondoy no konna uripon novovallan don sikandin no uripon ni isas rays iddot timpu nid pomakoy sikandin
ahaa kos id bayad to onama to kodbolli rin koniyu
een yo kowd pouripon to mgo minuvu ko konna pouripon kow riyon to onama
urisu mgo suwod od uliton ku tod oseng ko ondan man kos koniyun kotomanan iddot timpu nid aam kow to onama koilangan no iddos ipat sokkad koniyu od ponoyunon dow idda duma to tavang to onama
a mokaatag taddot waa sawa waa suhu no id pokopomandu ku koniyu nid pomon tod ongaggon
iru pomon to eru tod ongaggon od kosolihan inis osengan no id pouma ku koniyu
tag koddi moppiya pa no dii kowd osawa su mouraa kos kosupittan to inin mgo timpu
ikkow no mama otik duwon man sawa ru yo ru koddani
oy otik waa sawa ru yo kad od nangkap tod osowan
iru kod osawa ka meen konna saa idda
ngketen dad en mandad kikow no mongovay konna saa kod osawa ka
yon unayan no id ikahi ku no moppiya pa no diid osawa su id kopii ku nanoy no konna kow od pokoukit to allowallow no kosupittan no noukitan taddot duwon sawa
go suwod iyon id kopii ku no id paabbotlabbot koniyu no moobbava ron kos timpu nod pokopuung ki atag tod ongaggon
een pomon koungkay iddos duwon sawa koilangan no od iling dan to minuvu no waa sawa amoy iyon dan od dokollan to timpu iddos kodpuung atag tod ongaggon
ling mandad tadda iddos duwon lanu koilangan no konna sikandin inaayun od popoomdom tadda
oy dos duwon kahaan koilangan no konna sikandin inaayun od popoomdom tadda
dda mandad so od bovolli koilangan no konna sikandin od popoomdom no sikandin kos komunoy taddot id bolli rin
oilangan no iddos ahad ondan kaay to ampowt ingod konna idda kos inaayun ta od poomdommon
u inis ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay od lihad da
d kopii ku no dii kow od koikottan to mgo sasow
os konakan iyon din id kosasow iddos mgo pinuungan atag tod ongaggon woy ko ondan kos od pokopahaa kandin
iru iddos duwon sawa iyon din id kosasow iddos koubpa kaay to ampowt ingod woy ko ondan kos od pokopahaa atag to sawa rin
een od kovaad kos ginawa rin
ngketen dad en mandad iddos mongovay woy dos baay no worad sawa
yon dan id kosasow iddos pinuungan atag tod ongaggon oyyos waa osson dontulon din idda ra en so kodboggoy to tivuk no konokkaan woy ginawa rin atag to onama
iru iddos baay no duwon sawa iyon din id kosasow iddos koubpa kaay to ampowt ingod woy ko ondan kos od pokopahaa atag to sawa rin
d ikahi ku ini konna amoyd ikot koniyu no dii kow od osawa ko konna amoy od kotovangan kow no ollog iddos langun nod puungan dow woy waa en od pokobaavag to kodpuung dow atag tod ongaggon
a mokaatag mandad to mama no duwon don tongkoanan diyot sokkad no baay
tik noheddam taddot mama no konna rin don od kotoholan kos ingowollon to lawa rin woy id liharan don to mouhoyn timpu moppiya pa no od ponayun sikandin nod osawa
onna saa idda
iru ko nopuhawang don taddot mama no dii en sikandin od osawa woy od pokotohoo sikandin to ingowollon to lawa rin moppiya pa no dii en sikandin od osawa
een iddos minuvu nod osawa moppiya rad man idda piru lampas peen no moppiya iddos diid osawa
a mokaatag to baay no duwon don sawa noikottan sikandin laggun to nouyag pa iddos sawa rin
tid patoy ron iddos mama od pokoosawa mandon sikandin to ahad ondoy nid kopii rin
iru koilangan nod pomakoy iddos mama riyon tod ongaggon
iru atag koddi moppiya pa kod kotomanan din otid ponayun sikandin no bau woy id pomakoy a no id pomonduwan a to spiritu to onama
a ini kos tavak ku taddot intud dow mokaatag to kodkaan to karni taddot id buwis don no oyama riyot konna bonnaan mgo monama
ooggot en iddos od ikohiyon dow no siketa langun nokosaddoo ki no waa kotuusan to konna bonnaan mgo monama
os sinorollan ta od undag to kodpobporoong piru iddos keton kodpokita to ginawa od pokomosalig to kopomakoy to duma
os minuvu no id ikahi no duwon sinorollan din kilaannan idda no kulang peen kos kandin no sinorollan
iru iddos minuvu no id ginawa to onama idda en kos od kilaannon to onama no sakup din
a otik mokaatag to kodkaan to karni taddot id buwis don no oyama riyot konna bonnaan mgo monama nosorollan ta no id buwis idda riyot konna mooggot no monama woy nosorollan ta no sokkad da en kos onama
u ahad duwon iddos od tommanon dan no mgo monama riyot datas to langit o kaay to ampowt ingod woy duwon mouraan od ngoranan dan no mgo monama woy mgo longaggon piru atag keta sokkad da en kos onama
ikandin kos moy ta no mid bovaa to langun woy id boggoy keta to umuu amoyd posivontuhan ta sikandin
oy sokkad da kos od ongaggon ta no idda en si isas rays
kit kandin novovallan kos langun woy ukit mandad kandin duwon umuu ta
iru duwon mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no kulang pa kos sinorollan mokaatag kaay oyyos dangan nooyami ran nod simba taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama
een koungkay otid kaan sikandan to karni taddot id buwis don no oyama riyot konna bonnaan monama iyon dan od kopoomdom no nokoiling to id lonug dan poron to kodsimba taddot konna bonnaan monama
a noheddam dan no nolibmitan sikandan oyyos id popoomdom dan poron no konna ollog nod kaan tadda
iru od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no konna iddos kokaan kos unayan no od kahaa kos onama keta
tik id kaan ki man taddot id buwis o wora konna idda od pokopalin to koroniyan ta riyot onama
iru ahad od pokokaan kow to ahad ondan ayyadayyad kow no konna idda od kovovallan no unayan nod kouug diyot saa iddos duma no moomet pa riyot kopomakoy
onunggeleng sikkow no duwon sinorollan mokaatag kaay id kaan ka to karni taddot id buwis don no oyama riyot templo to konna bonnaan monama
oy rutun nokita ka taddot minuvu no moomet diyot kopomakoy na saddook od kookoy en sikandin nod kaan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan monama ahad saa en idda riyot poomdom din
een pomon taddot sinorollan du od korattan kos kopomakoy to suwod du no moomet diyot kopomakoy ahad id patoy si isas rays atag kandin
omon taddot id puungan du nokosaa ka riyot suwod du no moomet diyon to kopomakoy oyyos nookoy ru man sikandin diyot pinuungan no riyot poomdom din saa en idda
a ko ungketen nokosaa ka riyot ki isas rays
urisu otik iddos kokaan kos unayan no od kouug to saa iddos suwod ku riyot kopomakoy konna a en od kaan to karni su amoy konna od kouug to saa iddos suwod ku
a siyak duwon en kotungud ku nod puung to ahad ondan nid kopii ku
okkad a no apostoles woy matamata ku ron en tid kita ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
onna ra idda sikiyu en kos undahon taddot pinuungan ku atag tod ongaggon
had dii a od kilaannon to duma no sokkad a no apostoles piru sikiyu waa en kodduworuwa row no apostoles a pomon to sokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon woy idda en kos posivonnaa no apostoles a nikandin
a atag taddot diid pongimbonnaa no apostoles a ini kos tavak ku
iyak no sokkad no apostoles waa vo kotungud ku nod tanggap to kokaan pomon diyot mgo minuvu no id nonawwan ku
tik duwon man sawa ku nod pompomakoy waa vo kotungud ku nod poruma kandin diyot iponawon ku iling taddot id puungan ni edro woy dos dumon apostoles woy dos mgo suwod tod ongaggon
llog bo no sikami ra ki ernabe kos koilangan nod oiluggat atag to kouyahan doy piru iddos duma od boyaran dow
uwon bo sundau no sikandin kos od oiluggat sikandin mandad kos gastu
uwon bo minuvu no id pomuwa no waa kotungud nod kaan to bunga taddot pinomuwa rin
oy duwon bo tohodtamong to karnero no waa kotungud din nod inom to gatas taddot mgo karnero
nis mgo osengan ku konna ra ini kos ollog diyot kodontong to minuvu ko konna ini en mandad kos id nonaw riyot mgo uhu ni oises
yyos duwon nosulat diyot mgo uhu ni oises no mid ungketen to o row pungusi kos baka nod looyyak to ommoy amoy od pokokaan
a ondan baka ra vo kos id kosasow to onama
onna en su id posulat din ini atag keta no mgo minuvu
ddos id oiluggat nid dadu woy dos id pongkottu od imman dan nod kotaaran taddot kinottuwan
a sikami nokoiling koy to id pomuwa to kahit onama riyot koniyu
een ollog en no od kottuwon doy iddos allowallow nod koilonganon doy pomon koniyu
tik ollog man no duwon od kotanggap taddot duma no id nonaw koniyu lampas peen nanoy no ollog koy nod boggayan
iru waa koy id bovuyu koniyu ahad duwon en kotungud doy nod buyu
d tiis doy kos langun no kosupittan amoy waa od pokobaavag to kodsoob to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
okosaddoo kowd man no iddos mgo tohodpuung diyot templo dutun dan en mandad od angoy to kokaan dan
oy dos tohodbuwis to mgo oyama riyot buwisanan dutun dan en mandad od angoy to taad dan
a ungketen dad en mandad taddot mgo minuvu no id ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
u id suhu man tod ongaggon no iddos noponudtulan taddot oppiyon inoggan koilangan nod boggayan atag to kandan no kouyahan
iru siyak ahad duwon en kotungud ku wora a id bovuyu to bayad diyot id nonawwan ku
oy waa a mid sulat kaay no id imman a nod boggayan a nikiyu
d podsuwomihon ku pa nod patoy to gutas kuntra tod buyu a koniyu
u otik id povayad a pa nanoy koniyu waa id pokopobporoong ku taddot kodnonaw ku ahad waa bayad no notanggap ku
iru konna a en od pokopobporoong taddot kodponudtuu ku to oppiyon inoggan oyyos id sanna ra man ini koddi no koilangan en nod puungan ku
okaaratarat kod kosahapan ku otik dii ku id ponudtuu kos oppiyon inoggan
tik siyak pa kos id aam kaayn pinuungan na ollog en nanoy nod tanggap a to bayad
iru pomon to onama kos id sanna koddi kaay koilangan en nod tumanon ku ini
a ondan man kos bayad koddi
ora ossa idda en so kahaan ku to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan no waa id povayad ahad duwon en nanoy kotungud ku nod buyu to kouyahan
a ahad konna a uripon to ahad ondoy piru id poiling ku to uripon a to langun no minuvu amoyd kopiyod ku kos kourallan diyot kopomakoy
onunggeleng otid pokolommung a riyot mgo udio od poumidumid a to mgo botasanon dan woy taddot mgo uhu ni oises su amoy od kopiyod ku sikandan diyot kopomakoy ahad waa a noiraom taddon mgo uhu
ngketen dad en mandad kos od puungan ku otid pokolommung a riyot konna mgo udio no konnod ikuu to mgo uhu to udio
onna a mandad od ikuu taddon mgo uhu amoy od kopiyod ku sikandan diyot kopomakoy
iru konna kohulugan kaay no od podworannon kud iddos mgo suhu to onama oyyos od tumanon ku en iddos mgo suhu ni isas rays
tid pokolommung a to mgo moomet pa riyot kopomakoy od poumidumid a to botasanon dan amoyd kopiyod ku sikandan nod mosalig diyon to kopomakoy
een diyot langun no minuvu no id ponudtulan ku to kahit onama od poumidumid a kandan amoyd kopiyod ku iddos duma kandan diyon to kopomakoy
d puungan ku idda langun su amoy od lapung kos od pomakoy to oppiyon inoggan woy amoy od kolonug a taddot kopiyannan no id tandu riyot oppiyon inoggan
osodsorollan dow no otik diyot lumba to kodlungkossu iddos langun nod lonug tadda od nokkaanokkaa taman tod kogaha ran piru sokkad da en kos od ponalu woyd boggayan to ganti
a sikiyu mandad koilangan nod nokkaanokkaa amoyd kotanggap dow iddos ganti init morin allow
ddos ipat sokkad nod lonug to lumba od loyamon dan kos kandan no lawa riyot kodtohoo to id kopiit lawa ran
d puungan dan ini su amoy od pokotanggap dan to kuruna no binovallan pomot dorounon no goos od kaanos
iru siketa nod pompomakoy od nokkaanokkaa ki amoyd kotanggap ta iddos ganti no od taman to waad tomanon
een siyak od pokoiling a to minuvu no id lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu no waa kodsorosoro taman diyot kotompusan
oy riyot kodnonaw ku to mgo minuvu od pokoiling a to buksingero no konnod aawang nod ponuntuk su amoy iddos osengan ku inaayun od pokosuhat
d pohirapan ku inis koddin lawa su amoy dii ku od korumannan iddos morat no ingowollon to lawa ku
yyos saddoo moho kod kopongnga ku tod ponudtuu to kahit onama iddos duma siyak peen kangkan kos diid pokotanggap to ganti
go suwod id kopii ku nod koovottan dow iddos notomanan to kovuyyahan ta no mgo udio iddot id dumoruma ran ki oises
angun dan id torungngan to souhapun patow no id duma kandan kos onama
oy waa ran nomonnu iddot id ukit dan diyot tongannan to dahat nod ngoranan to ollutun ahat
ddos kodtoddung kandan taddot souhapun woy dos kodipanow ran diyot dahat nokoiling to id boutismuwan dan patow no mgo tinodduwan sikandan ni oises
angun dan id kaan taddot kokaan nid boggoy to onama
oy langun dan id inom to oweg nid paaus din pomon diyot atu
os ponunggelengan taddon atu idda en si isas rays no inaayun od duma kandan
iru ahad iling tadda kos kodtavang to onama kandan waa nahaa kos onama taddot pinuungan to kourallan kandan
een id poomatoy ran no nokosoob kos lawa ran diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
a iddos notomanan dan od pokononaw keta amoy od ayyadayyad ki no dii ta od ingowollon iddos morat iling taddot id puungan dan
oy konna ki od simba taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama iling taddot id puungan to duma kandan
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos mgo minuvu id ounsad amoy od kaan woyd oinom
opongnga tadda id sayow ran nod puung to molibmit no pinuungan
oy id laayuk dan to konna ran sawa
een siketa konna ki od iling taddot id puungan to duma kandan oyyos pomon taddot id puungan dan oruwompuuotollun maan   kos id poomatoy daom da to sokkad no allow
onna ki mandad od iling taddot duma kandan no id geddaman dan kos posinsya tod ongaggon
omon tadda id tuktuk sikandan to mgo uwod woy id poomatoy
onna ki mandad od pommivig iling taddot id puungan to duma kandan woy idda en kos unayan no id popiyod kos onama to ponolihan nid imatoy kandan
otomanan inis langun diyot kandan su amoy od kosorollan no iddon mgo pinuungan konna id kahaai to onama
oy nosulat en mandad ini amoy od pokononaw keta no konna ki od puung iling tadda
yyos konnod kouhoy od inguma en kos kotompusan to ingod
een iddos ahad ondoy nod popoomdom no mosalig don kos kopomakoy rin koilangan nod ayyadayyad su saddook od kouug sikandin diyon to saa
os langun no kodgeddam no id inguma koniyu id inguma en mandad diyot mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
iru od kosolihan kos onama taddot tandu rin no dii kow od geddaman taddot dii row od kogaha
oy otid inguma koniyu kos kodgeddam od boggayan kow nikandin to poukit amoyd pokotiis kow tadda
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo kow od simba to konna bonnaan mgo monama
d ikahi ku ini su od kotuig kow man nod popoomdom
een sikiyu ron kos od podtiitimbang kaayt id ikahi ku
iyot keton kodsampot to kopotayan ni isas rays od inom ki to kupa no od posolomatan ta riyot onama woy id kaan ki to paan no id toppiktoppik
u riyot kodpuung ta kaay id lonug ki to kopiyannan no id pomon to longossa woy lawa ni isas rays
yyos siketa langun ahad mouraa ki timbang sokkad ki ra no lawa su id lonug ki man nod kaan taddot sokkad da no paan
