oomdomma row man iddos koubbaran ni srael
d kaan sikandan taddot id buwis diyon to onama woy ukit to kodkaan dan tadda id pokita ran no id lonug sikandan diyot kodsimba to onama
a ondan man kos kohulugan taddot osengan ku
yon bo kohulugan tadda no duwon koruanon taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama woy dos kokaan no id buwis kandan
onna en
yon kohulugan ku no iddos id buwis to mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy diyon dan idda id buwis to mgo busow konna riyot onama
oy dii a od kopiyan nod lonug kow taddot od ponsimba to mgo busow
tid lolivuung kow no od kaan woyd inom amoyd sampot to kopotayan tod ongaggon konna kow mandad od pokolonug nod kaan woy od inom taddot id buwis don diyot mgo busow
u otik od kaan kow tadda nokoiling tid lonug kow taddot mgo busow
ndan od kopii ta vo nod pongolikud kos onama
okosaddoo kid man no otid langot sikandin konna ki en od pokoolihu to silut din
uwon duma ruwot koniyu nod ikahi no d pokopuung ki to ahad ondan no id kopii ta
onnaa man idda piru konna langun nod puungan ta od pokomoppiya keta woy od pokomosalig to kopomakoy to duma
oilangan no konna ki od poomdommon atag da to od pokomoppiya keta ko konna od poomdommon ta mandad ko ondan kos od pokomoppiya to duma
d pokokaan ki to ahad ondan no karni no id boligya riyot polingki piru iyon moppiya no konna ki od ointud ko id buwis bo idda riyot konna bonnaan monama o wora su amoy od lonna kos ginawa ta
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no nis ingod woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay dos onama nod ongaggon kos komunoy
onunggeleng otik duwon minuvu no konnod pompomakoy no id inggat koniyu nod kaan woy od kopiyan kow rad en nod duma kandin na kaan kow taddot ahad ondan no id sondad koniyu
iru yo kowd ointud ko id buwis bo idda riyot konna bonnaan mgo monama amoyd lonna kos ginawa row
iru otik duwon od kaan duma koniyu nod ikahi no nin luddung id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama yo kowd baling od kaan tadda
u otid kaan kow tadda konnod lonna kos ginawa rin oyyos diyot poomdom din saa kos kodkaan tadda
a saddook duwon od ikahi no d pokopuung a to ahad ondan no id kopii ku
a mambo moho tod kotoholan a taddot id kopii ku pomon da taddot poomdom to duma
tik id posolomatan ku to onama iddos kokaan mambot od podmoratton a su id posolomatan kud man idda
a ini kos tavak ku tadda
iyot kodkaan woy kodinom dow woy riyot ahad ondan nod puungan dow koilangan no od puungan dow idda atag to kodposivantug to onama
o kowd puung to ahad ondan no unayan nod kouug diyot saa kos duma udio man o konna ahad iddos duma ta no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama
kula a nikiyu su riyot ahad ondan nod puungan ku id noonokkalan ku no od kahaa kos langun
yyos wora a mid poomdom taddot od pokomoppiya koddi ko konna iddos od pokomoppiya to kourallan amoyd kotobbus sikandan
urisu mgo suwod ikula a nikiyu iling taddot kodikuu ku ki isas rays
a id doong ku sikiyu su inaayun kowd sampot koddi woy id tuman dow iddos id nonaw ku koniyu
iru duwon pa id kopii ku nod koovottan dow
i isas rays kos timbang uu to langun no mama
os mgo mama mandad kos timbang uu taddot sawa ran woy dos onama kos timbang uu ni isas rays
een diyot kodlolivuung dow iddos mama nod dasaa o od ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama otik id totambun sikandin to uu rin na id poilawan din si isas rays no timbang uu rin
iru iddos baay nod dasaa o od ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama otik waa tambun to uu rin na id poilawan din iddos kandin no sawa no timbang uu rin
d pokoilow idda no iling to baay nid popogung
tik diid kopiyan iddos baay nod totambun to uu rin moppiya pa kod tompoddan din kos bowvuu rin iling to bowvuut mama
iru pomon tod pokoilow meen iddos kodpotampod to bowvuu o kodpopogung na koilangan en nod totambun sikandin to uu rin
os unayan no konna od totambun to uu iddos mama diyot timpu to kodsimba su id bovallan to onama kos mama iling kandin amoy id pokita iddos kotungud woy bantug din
iru iddos baay id bovallan to onama atag to kodposivantug to mama
u riyot tigkonayan to id bovallan to onama kos minuvu waa bovalli kos mama pomon diyot baay ko konna iddos baay kos id bovallan pomon diyot mama
oy waa bovalli kos mama atag to baay ko konna id bovallan kos baay atag to mama
dda en kos unayan no iddos baay koilangan no od totambun to uu rin su amoy ahad iddos mgo ponolihan od pokosaddoo no id poiraom dos baay to kodponguu to sawa rin
iru poomdomma row no pomon to nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon konnod pokooseng dos baay no dii rin od koilonganon iddos mama
oy konna mandad od pokooseng dos mama no dii rin od koilonganon iddos baay
u ahad diyot tigkonayan id bovallan dos baay pomon diyot mama woy koungkay id tobbow kos mama ukit to baay
iru iddos langun id pomon en to onama
a poomdomma row ini
llog bo no iddos baay od dasaa riyot onama to kodlolivuung dow no waa sikandin id totambun to uu rin
onna en
ooyami tad no pomon poron moobbava en kos bowvuut mama oyyos od pokoilow man idda otik mowwet iling to bowvuut baay
iru iddos baay no mowwet kos bowvuu bantug din idda
d boggayan sikandin to mowwet no bowvuu no id tambun to uu rin
tik duwon od kopiyan nod apuu mokaatag kaay ini ra kos od kooseng ku kandin
ni en kos botasanon no id ikuu roy no iddos mgo baay od totambun to uu ran woy ini en kos id ikuu taddot id ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama
a duwon pa od osengon ku koniyu woy kaay en pantok no dii ku sikiyu od doongon
yya su riyot kodlolivuung dow to kodsimba konna moppiya kos undahon ko konna nokodoraat baling
u unnot langun nokorinog a no ipat timpu nod lolivuung kow to kodsimba od pokodbaadbaad kow woy imman tod pokopongimbonnaa a no duwon dad kovonnaan kaay
oppiya rad en ayu no od pokodbaadbaad kow amoy od kosorollan ko ondoy koniyu kos mooggot nod pompomakoy no id kahaai to onama
iyot kodlolivuung dow amoyd sampot to kopotayan tod ongaggon moriyu vos to ginawa row iddos koruanon tadda su konna man iddos kopotayan din kos diyot poomdom dow
ooseng ku ini su idda kun so ipat sokkad koniyu od unnounna nod kaan no od ottuottu taddot tannow rin
een duwon duma nid gutasan woy duwon mandad duma no nohubug
oy koniyu
aa vo baoy row nod kannan woyd inomman dow
d poddisokkan dow moho to koruanon iddos id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama woy id poilawan dow peen iddos duma no worowora
ndan kos od osengon ku koniyu
d doongon ku vo sikiyu taddot id puungan dow
onna en
u id nonaw tod ongaggon koddi inis id nonaw kud koniyu
a si isas rays iddot bulli to id boligya sikandin ni udas mid angoy sikandin to paan woy id posolomatan din idda riyot onama
opongnga id toppiktoppik din iddos paan woy kahi rin to ni en kos lawa ku no id boggoy ku atag koniyu
uungi row ini atag to kodsampot koddi
a nopongnga ran mid kaan ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan din mid angoy sikandin to kupa woy kahi rin to nis kupa ini en kos lammin kodpotonduwoy to onama no id posivonnalan ukit to longossa ku
pat timpu nod inom kow kaay puungi row ini to kodsampot koddi
u ipat timpu nod kaan kow kaayt paan woy od inom kow kaayt kupa id ponudtuu row iddos mokaatag to kopotayan tod ongaggon taman to kodlivod din
urisu iddos ahad ondoy nod kaan to paan woy od inom to kupa tod ongaggon no waa kodanonganong to ollog no dontulon tadda nokosaa iddon minuvu su id poddisokkan din to koruanon iddos lawa woy longossa tod ongaggon
een koilangan no iddos ipat sokkad od poomdommon din pa unna ko ollog bo sikandin no od lonug nod kaan to paan woy od inom to kupa riyot kodsampot to kopotayan tod ongaggon
u otid kaan sikandin to paan woyd inom to kupa no waa rin oonongnga iddos kohulugan woy koruanon to lawa tod ongaggon na iling to id buyu rin kos silut to onama riyot kandin no kougolingun
dda en kos unayan no mouraa koniyu kos moomet woyd pongkovohokan woy dos duma id poomatoy
iru kod poomdommon ta pa unna ko ondan kos nopuungan ta konna ki od silutan to onama
iru kod pipitan ki tod ongaggon ukit to kodposuppit keta poukit din ini nod potullid keta su amoy konna ki od silutan duma to mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy
urisu mgo suwod diyot kodlolivuung dow nod kaan amoyd sampot to kopotayan tod ongaggon yo kowd unnounna
tik duwon sokkad koniyu nod gutasan koilangan no unna pa sikandin od kaan diyot baoy rin amoy konnod undag diyot kodsilut to onama iddos kodlolivuung dow
a mokaatag taddot duma pon pomandu ku ini kud to kodunduwon ku
a mgo suwod mokaatag to mgo kogahan no id boggoy to his no spiritu id kopii ku no ollog kos koovottan dow tadda
osorollan dow no iddot waa kow pa id pomakoy nopiyod kow to kodsimba taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama no diid pokoooseng
iru koungkay id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no waa minuvu nod pokosumpalit ki isas rays otik noiroomman sikandin to his no spiritu
oy waa minuvu nod pokoikahi no si isas kos od ongaggon otik waa sikandin noiroomman to his no spiritu
a nokodossoossa kos kogahan ta piru sokkad da kos id pomonnan tadda no idda en so his no spiritu
okodossoossa kos pinuungan ta riyot kodtavang to duma piru sokkad da kos od tumanon ta no idda en so od ongaggon
okodossoossa kos id popuungan to onama keta piru sokkad da kos onama no id puung ukit keta
os ipat sokkad keta id boggayan to kogahan patow no noiroomman ki to his no spiritu amoy od pokotavang ki to mgo duma ta nod pompomakoy
ddos duma id boggayan to his no spiritu to kogahan nod ponudtuu to moraom no koovottan to onama woy dos duma id boggayan to kogahan nod paabbotlabbot mokaatag to onama
dda mandad so duma id boggayan to iddon spiritu to mosalig no kopomakoy woy dos duma id boggayan to kogahan nod pokouli tod pongkovohokan
os duma id boggayan to kogahan nod puung to mokososoobbu
dda mandad so duma id boggayan to kogahan nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandan to onama woy dos duma id boggayan to kogahan nod kilaa ko iddos osengan id pomon bo riyot onama o wora
os duma id boggayan to kogahan nod ooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi
dda mandad so duma id boggayan to kogahan nod paabbotlabbot to kohulugan taddon mgo kinohiyan
a langun kaayn kogahan idda ra en no spiritu to onama kos id pomonnan woy sikandin kos id puhawang ko ondan no kogahan kos id boggoy rin diyon to ipat sokkad
os keton lawa duwon mouraan sakup piru sokkad da en no lawa
a ungketen dad en mandad keta langun nod pompomakoy ahad nokodossoossa kos kogahan no id boggoy riyon to ipat sokkad piru timbang sokkad ki ra no lawa riyot ki isas rays
yyos siketa langun udio man o konna mgo uripon o konna id boutismuwan ki to idda ra en no spiritu amoyd kosokkad ki riyot sokkad da no lawa woy idda rad en no spiritu kos id oubpa riyot keta langun
os keton lawa konna ra sokkad kos sakup ko konna mouraa
onunggeleng od ikahi kos paa no onna a sakup kaayn lawa su konna a man bollad piru ahad ungketen kos od ikohiyon din konna kohulugan no konnad sikandin sakup taddon lawa
oy otid ikahi kos tolinga no iyak konna a sakup kaayn lawa su konna a man mata piru ahad ungketen kos od ikohiyon din konna kohulugan no konnad sikandin sakup taddon lawa
tik iddos tivuk no lawa paanan da en mata na momonnu man idda od pokorinog
oy otik iddos tivuk no lawa paanan da en tolinga momonnu man idda od pokoarok otik waa irung
iru konna ungketen kos kodbovaa to onama taddot lawa su id tapid din iddos ipat sokkad no sakup to lawa riyot ollog no lugaa no id kopii rin nod kotawwan
tik iddos lawa duwon sokkad da no sakup konna idda od kongoranan no lawa
yya su iddos lawa duwon mouraan sakup piru sokkad da no lawa
een diid pokooseng kos mata riyot bollad no ikkow no bollad konna ku sikkow od koilonganon
ngketen dad en mandad iddos uu konna idda od pokooseng diyot paa no ikkow no paa konna ku sikkow od koilonganon
u iddos mgo sakup to lawa no kunan ta ko waa koruanon idda en baling kos oraroy ta nod koilonganon
ddos mgo sakup to lawa no id poddisokkan ta to koruanon idda en baling kos od ooyyaran ta tod okudi
oy dos mgo sakup no konna ollog nod kokita idda en baling kos od ooyyaran ta tod umpak
iru iddos mgo sakup no moppiya nod tongtongngan konnad koilangan nod okudiyon to iling tadda
yon unayan no id tapid to onama kos mgo sakup to lawa ta amoy od ooyyaran ta tod okudi woy koddoong iddos mgo sakup no id poddisokkan ta to koruanon
d ungketen to onama iddos mgo sakup to lawa ta amoy waa kodposupakoy woy amoy od pokodtavang
tid kosokitan kos sokkad no sakup to lawa od kosokitan en mandad iddos langun
ling mandad tadda otid doongon kos sokkad no sakup to lawa od kahaa en mandad dos langun
yon kohulugan taddot id ikahi ku no siketa nod pompomakoy nokoiling to lawa ni isas rays woy ipat sokkad keta sakup en tadda
a id boggayan to onama to nokodossoosson pinuungan iddos mgo sakup to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
nna iddos mgo apostoles
kooruwa iddos mgo propeta
kootollu iddos mgo tohodnonaw to kahit onama
os duma id boggayan to kogahan nod puung to mgo mokososoobbu
os duma id boggayan to kogahan nod pokouli tod pongkovohokan
oy dos duma id boggayan to kogahan nod tavang to dumon minuvu
dda mandad so duma id boggayan to kogahan nod piyod to od lolivuung nod pompomakoy
oy dos duma id boggayan to kogahan nod ooseng to nokodossoosson kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi
osorollan dow no konna langun mgo apostoles
onna mandad langun mgo propeta
onna langun mgo tohodnonaw to kahit onama
onna mandad langun nod pokopuung to mgo mokososoobbu
onna langun duwon kogahan nod pokouli tod pongkovohokan
onna langun od pokoooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa ran nopohinonawwi woy konna langun od pokopaabbotlabbot to kohulugan tadda
een ingowolla row iddos mgo kogahan no orayd pokotavang to duma
iru koungkay duwon id posaddoo ku koniyu no lampas pa no moppiya taddot langun
had od pokoooseng a to nokodossoosson kinohiyan kaay to ampowt ingod ahad iddos kinohiyan to mgo ponolihan piru ko waa kodginawa ku to duma waa en koruanon
yyos od pokoiling a ra en tod pokoulingoo no ahung o maadting no kulintang no awang don toptapa
had duwon kogahan ku nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama koddi ahad nosorollan ku kos langun no kotuihan woy iddos waa id posaddoo to onama riyot duma woy ahad orayn mosalig kos kopomakoy ku no od pokopaalin to buvungan piru ko waa kodginawa ku to duma waa en koruanon ku
had id boggoy ku pa kos langun no korotuwan ku riyot worowora woy ahad id boggoy ku kos koddin lawa amoyd loowon piru ko waa kodginawa ku to duma waa en koruanon to kodpuung ku tadda
ddos mohingginawon minuvu mowwet kos posinsya woy eeruwon
onna sikandin od kosina konnod pobporoong woy konnod poratasdatas
onna mandad morat kos botasan din woy konnod pomohos to kandin nid kopii
onna monit kos uu woy konnod totaaw to morat no ginawa
ddos mohingginawon minuvu konnod kahaa to morat no pinuungan ko konna iyon din id kahaai iddos motallong no pinuungan
os mohingginawon minuvu motiistiis to langun no kosupittan
ii sikandin od koworan to kodsalig woy dii mandad od koworan to koimmanan diyot mgo duma rin woy konnod koobbod diyot ahad ondan nod kotomanan
ddos kogahan to kodponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama woy dos kogahan to kodooseng to nokodossoosson kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi to minuvu duwon od tomanan
ling dad en mandad tadda iddos sinorollan duwon od tomanan
iru iddos kodginawa waa en od tomanan
u iddos sinorollan ta koungkay duwon peen kulang
oy dos kodponudtuu ta taddot id poposaddoo to onama keta duwon peen mandad kulang
iru kod inguma ron kos allow no od kotuman don kos langun od kowora ron iddos langun no kogahan no duwon kulang
angan to anak a pa iddos kodpopoomdom ku iling to anak woy dos kodooseng ku iling mandad to anak woy dos kodpomuhawang ku iling en to anak
iru koungkay to buyyag ad id tonanan kud iddos botasan to koonakoy ku
ngketen dad en mandad keta nod pompomakoy koungkay iddos sinorollan ta mokaatag to onama duwon peen kulang
yyos nokoiling idda to kodontong diyot oungan no dii orayd kokilaa
iru init morin allow matamata tad en tod kita kandin
oungkay kulang peen kos sinorollan ku to onama piru init morin allow od kosodsorollan kud en sikandin iling taddot sinorollan din koddi
a duwon inis otollu no od ponayun taman to waad tomanon
dda en so kopomakoy dos koimmanan taddot id tandu to onama woy dos kodginawa
iru iddos lampas to langun kaayt otollu idda en so kodginawa
a mgo suwod koilangan nod dokollan dow to koruanon iddos kodginawa riyot duma
oy ingowolla row mandad no od pokotanggap kow to mgo kogahan no id pomon to his no spiritu labbi ron iddos kogahan to kodponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama
u iddos minuvu nod ooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa rin nopohinonawwi iyon din id tongko iddos onama konna iddos mgo minuvu oyyos dii ran meen od koovottan iddos osengan din
os spiritu to onama kos id pooseng kandin taddot diid koovottan to mgo minuvu deen nokoollos iddos kohulugan tadda
iru iddos minuvu nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama iyon din id tongko iddos mgo minuvu su amoy od mosalig kos kopomakoy ran od koinniyat sikandan woy duwon kahaan diyot timpu to mgo kosupittan
een iddos minuvu nod ooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi idda ra en so kandin no kopomakoy kos od mosalig
iru iddos minuvu nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama od pokomosalig to kopomakoy to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
d kopii ku en no od pokoooseng kow to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi
iru moppiya pa no duwon kogahan dow nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama
u iddos od ponudtuu tadda dakkoo pa kos koruanon din taddot od ooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi
oppiya rad man idda otik id pokopaabbotlabbot din mandad kos kohulugan tadda amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
a mgo suwod poomdomma row ini
tid unduwon a to koniyu nod ooseng to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi duwon bo od kaangoy row tadda
aa en
iru kod ponudtuu a koniyu mokaatag taddot id pokita to onama o mokaatag to sinorollan din o taddot id poposaddoo rin o od nonaw a koniyu na duwon en od kaangoy row
had iddos mgo porohingon no waa umuu iling to lantuy o kuglung otik dii idda od koooyyaran tod oppad dii en od koovottan ko ondak doweton tadda
ngketen dad en mandad iddos trumpeta nod porohingon to sundau amoyd kolimud kos mgo duma rin atag to kodpoimotayoy
tik dii idda od koooyyaran tod irup waa en od panoy atag to kodpoimotayoy
ngketen en mandad koniyu
tid ooseng kow to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi na waa en od pokaabbot koniyu
yya su iddos osengan dow od pokoiling da en to kaamag
uwon mouraan nokodossoosson kinohiyan kaay to ampowt ingod woy ipat kinohiyan duwon en kohulugan
iru ko dii ku od koovottan iddos kinohiyan to sokkad no minuvu na atag koddi nokoiling sikandin to id pomon diyot moriyun ingod woy atag kandin nokoiling a mandad to id pomon diyot moriyun ingod
a sikiyu mgo suwod su oraroy row man id kopii nod pokotanggap to mgo kogahan no id pomon to his no spiritu noonokkali row nod kotanggap dow iddos mgo kogahan no od pokomosalig to kopomakoy to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
een iddos minuvu nod pokoooseng to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi koilangan nod dasaa no od boggayan mandad sikandin to kogahan nod paabbotlabbot to kohulugan tadda
u otid dasaa a to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi ahad id dasaa a riyot ginawa ku piru iddos osengan to bivig ku waa nokousok diyot poomdom ku
a ko ungketen iling kaay kos od puungan ku
d dasaa woyd kanta kos ginawa ku riyot kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi piru od dasaa a woy od kanta riyot kinohiyan nod koovottan mandad to poomdom ku
u otik od posolamat to onama kos ginawa row ukit to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi na momonnu od pokooseng iddos duma no yya taddot kodposolamat dow to onama no waa ran man nokaabbot
had motoos kos kodposolamat dow to onama konna en idda od pokotavang nod mosalig kos kopomakoy to duma
d posolamat a to onama no od pokoooseng a to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi no lampas pa koniyu langun
iru otik diyon a tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy moppiya pa no od ooseng a to ahad limma ra no kahi nod koovottan amoyd nonaw to duma kuntra tod ooseng a to maanmaan no kahi riyot kinohiyan no diid koovottan
go suwod koilangan no iddos koniyun kodpopoomdom mokaatag kaay konna od pokoiling to kodpopoomdom to mgo anak
yon da moppiya nod ikulon diyot mgo anak iddos waa kinonuwan dan to morat no pinuungan
iru riyot kodpopoomdom dow mokaatag kaay koilangan nod pokoiling kow to buyyag don
ompotta row iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d ooseng a ukit to nokodossoosson kinohiyan to mgo minuvu no id pomon diyot moriyun ingod
iru ahad ungketen dii en od pominog koddi inis mgo minuvu no id aam ku
urisu kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no iddos kogahan to kodooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi id boggoy idda to onama no kilaannan atag taddot konnod pompomakoy konna atag taddot od pompomakoy
iru iddos kogahan to kodponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama id boggoy idda to onama kilaannan atag taddot od pompomakoy konna atag taddot konnod pompomakoy
een otik langun dow nod pompomakoy od lolivuung woyd ooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi woy duwon dumon minuvu no id lonug o mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy na saddook od pokooseng dan no od pombusawon kow
iru ko langun dow od ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama koniyu woy duwon minuvu nid lonug o minuvu no konnod pompomakoy ukit taddot norinog din diyon to ipat sokkad koniyu od kopokes kos poomdom din no mosaasaa sikandin woy ollog en nod silutan
d kosorollan iddos nokoollos diyot ginawa rin
a od lingkood sikandin woyd simba to onama woy od ikahi sikandin no onnaa en no iddos onama kaay en duma koniyu
a mgo suwod ondan man kos kohulugan taddot langun nid oseng ku
yon kohulugan ku no riyot kodlolivuung dow duwon od kanta atag to koddoong to onama duwon od nonaw to kahi rin woy duwon od posaddoo taddot id pokita kandin to onama
uwon mandad od ooseng to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi woy duwon od paabbotlabbot tadda
uungi row ini langun amoyd mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy
tik duwon od ooseng to kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi koilangan no oruwa o otollu ra kos od ooseng woy konnod porongnganoy
oy koilangan no duwon od paabbotlabbot taddot mgo osengan dan
iru ko waa od kotuig nod paabbotlabbot koilangan no konna sikandan od ooseng diyot kodlolivuung dow ko konna diyon da to ginawa rin woy riyon to onama
yon moppiya no oruwa o otollu kos od posudsuvaloy nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama
oy dos duma od podtiitimbang ko iddos osengan dan id pomon been diyot onama o wora
oy otik sokkad taddot id pompominog duwon id sollat din no id poposaddoo kandin to onama koilangan nod poonongonong iddos id ooseng amoyd pokoooseng mandad iddon minuvu
u otik ungketen kos od puungan dow od posudsuvaloy kow langun nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama koniyu amoy langun dow od kononawwan woyd mosalig kos kopomakoy
ddos id ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama od pokotohoo ko ondan kos od osengon din
yya su iddos onama konnod kopiyan to samuk ko konna iddos moppiyon kodporumannoy
oy ini en kos ollog nod puungan dow riyot timpu nod lolivuung kow iling taddot id puungan to langun no id lolivuung no mgo minuvu to onama
ddos mgo baay koilangan no od poonongonong diyot kodlolivuung tod pompomakoy oyyos konna ollog nod ooseng sikandan
oilangan no od poiraom dan to kodponguu to mgo mama iling taddot noikahi riyot mgo uhu
tik duwon mgo intud dan iyon moppiya no riyon don sikandan to baoy od ointud to sawa ran su mokoilow to baay nod ooseng diyot kodlolivuung tod pompomakoy
a saddook dii kow od pongimbonnaa kaayt id ikahi ku
ambo id pomon bo riyot koniyu iddos kahit onama
addook id popoomdom kow no sikiyu ra kos nokotanggap tadda
tik duwon diyot koniyu nod ikahi no id boggayan sikandin to kogahan nod ponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo kandin to onama o id boggayan sikandin to dumon kogahan no id pomon to his no spiritu na koilangan nod pongimbonnaa sikandin no inis id sulat ku koniyu suhu en tod ongaggon
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod podtohon kaayt osengan ku od podtohonon mandad sikandin
urisu mgo suwod ingowolla row iddos kogahan to kodponudtuu taddot id poposaddoo to onama
iru yo kow mandad od elle taddot kodooseng to mgo kinohiyan no waa nopohinonawwi
iru riyot langun nod puungan dow to kodlolivuung amoyd simba koilangan nod puungan dow idda riyot ollog woy moppiyon poukit
a mgo suwod id kopii ku no id posampot koniyu iddos oppiyon inoggan nid ponudtuu kud koniyu
d tanggap dow idda woy taman koungkay idda en kos mosalig nid lohinatan dow
kit kaayn oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku koniyu od kotobbus kow otid noonokkalan dow ini tod ikuu
u otid podtohonon dow ini waa en koruanon taddot kodpomakoy row
ddos nonaw no dakkoo kos koruanon to langun no notanggap ku no id nonaw ku mandad koniyu idda en so id patoy si isas rays amoyd koposinsyan kos mgo saa ta iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
d lobbong sikandin woy novadnow riyot ikootollun allow iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama
d pokita sikandin ki edro woy nopongnga id pokita mandad sikandin diyot langun no apostoles din
opongnga idda id pokita sikandin diyot lampas to limmon gatus no nolivuung no mgo suwod to kopomakoy
os kourallan kandan nouyag poron taman koungkay to kodsulat ku kaay piru iddos duma id poomatoy ron
a id pokita mandad sikandin ki antiago woy nopongnga diyon mandon to langun no apostoles
iyot mori id pokita mandad sikandin koddi
ovovallan a no apostoles diyot timpu no konna pa nanoy ollog iling to anak no id tobbow riyot konna pa ollog no buwan
d ikahi ku ini oyyos siyak kos moobbava to langun no apostoles woy konna a en ollog nod ngoranan no apostoles su id posupittan ku man iddos od lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama
iru pomon to eru to onama koungkay sokkad ad no apostoles woy moppiya en kos undahon taddot eru rin koddi
yya su riyot langun no apostoles lampas a peen nid oiluggat diyon to pinuungan
iru konna idda ukit konokkaan ku ko konna ukit en to eru to onama koddi
oy otik siyak o sikandan man kos od ponudtuu to kahit onama waa en koossan su nokodiling da en iddos ponudtulon doy woy ini en kos id pomokayan dow
a iyon ponudtulon doy koniyu no novadnow si isas rays pomon diyot kopotayan
a ko ungketen mambo man tod ikahi kos duma koniyu no konnod bodnawon iddos id poomatoy ron
u otik bonnaa pa idda waa mandad nanoy novadnow si isas rays
oy otik waa novadnow si isas rays na waa koruanon taddot kodponudtuu roy to kahit onama woy waa mandad koruanon taddot koniyun kopomakoy
onna ra idda su iling don to uhus iddos osengan doy mokaatag to onama su id oseng doy man no id badnow rin si isas rays
iru otik konnod bodnawon to onama iddos id poomatoy ron dos kohulugan waa mandad novadnow si isas rays
oy otik waa novadnow si isas rays na waa en koruanon to koniyun kopomakoy woy waa poron nanoy noposinsyan kos mgo saa row
yon mandad kohulugan tadda no iddos od pompomakoy ki isas rays nid poomatoy ron od silutan diyon to linowt apuy
u otik iddos koimmanan ta ki isas rays taman da en to umuu ta kaay to ampowt ingod siketa en kos mokoerueru to langun
iru iddos kovonnaan novadnow en si isas rays
ikandin kos unnon novadnow woy ini en kos posivonnaa no od bodnawon en to onama iddos langun nid poomatoy
yyos pomon taddot id puungan to sokkad no minuvu no si dan od poomatoy kos langun no minuvu
ling mandad tadda pomon to id puungan to sokkad no minuvu no si isas rays od kovadnow iddos langun nid poomatoy
os langun no minuvu od poomatoy pomon to koubbaran sikandan ni dan
a iling mandad tadda iddos langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays od kovadnow en
os unnon novadnow si isas rays woy idda mandad so mgo sakup din od kovadnow init kodlivod din
opongnga tadda od inguma ron kos kotompusan to ingod
d toluwon ni isas rays iddos langun nod kuntra kandin ahad ondan pa iddos kotungud dan woy kotuusan to kodhari
oy kopongnga id boggoy rin iddos kandin no kotungud to kodhari riyot onamon moy
yyos koilangan no od hari pa si isas rays taman to iddos langun nod kuntra kandin od toluwon din amoy id poiraom diyot kandin no kodponguu
a iddos mori nod toluwon din idda en so kopotayan
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos onama id boggoy kandin to kotungud diyon to langun amoy id poiraom diyot kandin no kodponguu
iru orayd koovottan no waa apii to kodponguu ni isas rays iddos onama no id boggoy kandin taddon kotungud
tik noiraom don iddos langun diyot kodponguu ni isas rays no nak to onama od poiraom mandad sikandin diyot kodponguu to onama no id boggoy kandin to kotungud to langun amoy iddos onama kos mowwet nod hari to langun
d livoddon ku mandon iddos mokaatag to kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron
uwon botasanon to dumon minuvu no od poboutismu sikandan timbang lawa taddot id poomatoy ron
a otik konna od bodnawon iddos id poomatoy ron waa en koruanon taddot id puungan dan
oy sikami otik konnod bodnawon iddos id poomatoy mambo man tod tiis koy pa taddot waa soroan no kodisau to kopotayan
go suwod od ikohiyan ku sikiyu no waa allow no dii a od isau to kopotayan
onnaa ini iling to kovonnaloy to kahaan ku pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
osuppit kos notomanan ku kaayt feso oyyos id otuwan ku iddos od pongkuntra koddi no iling to movuut no mgo monnanap to puaason
een ondan man kos od kaangoy ku to kodtiis tadda
u otik mooggot no konnod bodnawon iddos id poomatoy ron moppiya pa baling kod ikulon ta iddos osengan to duma no mid ungketen to d kaan ki robbo moho woyd oinom su od patoy ki rad man simag
iru yo kowd paakaa iddon osengan
yon dow pomokaya iddos osengan no mid ungketen to tid dumoruma ka to morat no mgo minuvu od korattan kos moppiyon botasan du
a gimata kowd woy soro kowd nod puung to saa
yyos duwon duma koniyu no waa nongnong mokaatag to onama
d ikahi ku ini su nanoy od koilow kow kaay
a saddook duwon od intud to omonnu man od kovadnow iddos id poomatoy ron
ndan don ayu kos boyo to lawa ran
ddos minuvu nod intud to ungketen waa utok
oomdomma row man iddos bonni no id pomuwa
ali idda od tuvu ko unna pa od koobbuu
tid pomuwa ka to ommoy o dumon bonni konna iddos tigkan no lawa kos id pomuwa ru ko konna idda ra en so bonni
a iddos onama nopuhawang din don tapoy ko ondan kos boyo taddot pinomuwa nod lottob diyot bonni
iyot nokodossoosson bonni od lottob iddos nokodossoosson lawa
ngketen dad en mandad iddos lawa taddot langun no duwon songnga oyyos waa nokodiling kos mgo lawa tadda
ssa kos lawa to minuvu taddot lawa to mgo oyama
ssa mandad kos lawa to mgo manuk taddot lawa to mgo ngaap
okodossoossa kos binovallan to onama kaay to ampowt ingod woy riyot datas to langit piru waa nokodiling kos kogolingoy tadda langun
ddos kogolingoy taddot diyot datas to langit ossa taddot kaay to ampowt ingod
iyot datas to langit nokodossoossa kos kogolingoy to mgo seaa
ssa kos kogolingoy to seaa to woy ossa iddos kogolingoy to seaa to buwan
ssa mandad iddos kogolingoy to seaa to mgo bituon no duwon nokodossoosson kogolingoy to kodsella ran
a ungketen dad en mandad kaayt lawa ta koungkay ossa ini taddot lawa to minuvu nod bodnawon don to onama
u otik id lobbong don kos lawa to minuvu od koobbuu idda piru kod bodnawon don idda to onama konnad en od patoy
oy inis lawa ta otik id lobbong don morat nod tongtongngan woy worad konokkaan
iru kod bodnawon don ini motoos don nod tongtongngan woy monokkaa ron
nis lawa ta koungkay ollog atag kaay to ampowt ingod woy otid bodnawon don ini ollog en ini atag diyot datas to langit
a pomon to duwon man lawa no ollog atag kaay to ampowt ingod duwon en mandad lawa no ollog atag diyot datas to langit
osorollan ta ini su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no i dan no unnon minuvu id boggayan to umuu amoyd pokooubpa kaay to ampowt ingod
iru si isas rays nod ngoranan no kotompusan no dan sikandin kos id boggoy to umuun waad tomanon amoy od pokoubpa ki riyot datas to langit
iru iyon unna nid boggoy keta iddos lawa no ollog atag kaay to ampowt ingod idda pa iddos lawa no ollog atag diyot datas to langit
i dan no unnon minuvu id pomon kaay to ampowt ingod oyyos binovallan man sikandin pomon diyot boubbuk to livuta
iru si isas rays no ikooruwon dan id pomon diyot datas to langit
a siketa mandad no koubbaran ni dan nokoiling ki kandin no id pomon diyot boubbuk to livuta
iru siketa langun no nosokkad taddot id pomon diyot datas to langit no idda en si isas rays od pokoiling ki mandad kandin init morin allow
aay to ampowt ingod inis lawa ta nokoiling to lawa ni dan no id bovallan pomon diyot boubbuk to livuta
ling mandad tadda otik diyon kid to langit od pokoiling kid ki isas rays no id pomon diyot datas to langit
go suwod iyon kohulugan ku tadda no inis lawa ta nod patoy woyd koobbuu kooilangan nod lommiyon pa amoyd kolonug diyon to kodharit onama
u iddos lawa no duwon kopotayan konna ollog diyot datas to langit oyyos worad en kopotayan dutun
a pominog kow
uwon od osengon ku koniyu no puhawang to onama no waa rin id posaddoo dangan
iketa nod pompomakoy konna langun keta od poomatoy piru od lommiyon din kos lawa ta
igkow ini nod kotomanan to songokodpollokpollok da
a idda ron en duwon dahing to trumpeta woy od kovadnow iddos id poomatoy ron woyd boggayan sikandan to lawa no konnad en od patoy
oy siketa no nouyag poron od lommiyon kos lawa ta
yya su inis lawa ta nod patoy woyd koobbuu koilangan nod buwassan to lawa no konnad en od patoy woy konnad od koobbuu
a otik inis lawa ta nod patoy woyd koobbuu od buwassan don to lawa no konnad od patoy woy konnad od koobbuu od kotuman don iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to orad en kopotayan su id talu ron idda to onama
h kopotayan ingkon don kos koponoluwan du
ngkon don kos laas du
ddos laas idda en so kodpuung to saa nod undag to kopotayan woy dos kodsupak ta taddot mgo suhu to onama idda en kos id uripon keta riyot kodpuung to saa
iru solamat to onama su id boggayan ki nikandin to koponoluwan pomon diyot koduripon to saa ukit ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod lohinat kow no mosalig woy konnod kowaong diyot koniyun kopomakoy
okkaanokkaa kow riyot pinuungan atag tod ongaggon oyyos nosorollan dow no duwon en koruanon taddot langun no kodoiluggat dow atag kandin
a mokaatag to soopi no id limud dow amoy id tavang to mgo minuvu to onama riyot erusalem iyon moppiya nod puungan dow iddos iling to id pomandu ku taddot od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot alacia
pat allown inggu koilangan no iddos ipat sokkad koniyu od ossa tapoy to soopi ko ondan kos od kogaha row
a limura row vo idda su amoy kod inguma a ruwon nopanoy ron kos tavang dow
a otid inguma ad duwon od poundiyonnon kud to erusalem iddos mgo minuvu no id aam dow nod piyod taddon tavang
d popiyoddan ku sikandan to sulat no od pokilaa ko ondoy sikandan
iru otik koilangan en nod undiyon a mandad to erusalem od dumannan ku rad sikandan
yon puhawang ku nod tuuy a pa riyot acedonia idda pa od unduwon a to koniyu
a saddook od kouhoy a pa ruwon duma koniyu o od poliharon ku pa kos timmohonnow su amoy od kotovangan a pa nikiyu to mgo koilonganon ku riyot koddin iponawon ko ingkon a man od isau
yyos dii a od kopiyan nod unduwon to koniyu no od pokoiling to kilat no sinahaw ra
d kopii ku no od kouhoy ruwot koniyu otik tonggaad to onama
iru koungkay od oubpa a pa rinit feso taman to od inguma iddos pista nod ngoranan no pista to entecostes idda pa od unduwon a
had mouraa kos od supak koddi od polimakut a nod ponudtuu to kahit onama su mouraan minuvu kaay nod kopiyan od pominog woy duwon en moppiyon undahon
a otid inguma si imoteo ruwon tuhonula row vo amoyd lonna kos ginawa rin su iling mandad sikandin koddi no id puung atag to onama
o row sikandin poddisokki to kodontong ko konna tovangi row sikandin to kodlivod din dinit koddi amoy moppiya kos kodipanow rin oyyos od aangat a to kodinguma rin dini duma taddot dumon mgo suwod ta
a mokaatag to suwod ta no si polos id loglohottan ku en sikandin no od lowwi koniyu duma to mgo suwod ta
iru dii pa sikandin od kopiyan nod unduwon koungkay
tid pokosakat don kun sikandin od unduwon dad en
a bantoy kow inaayun lohinati row kos koniyun kopomakoy ponokkala row kos koniyun ginawa woy pomosoliha row kos koniyun kopomakoy
iyot langun nod puungan dow puungi row idda duma to kodginawa
a mgo suwod nokosaddoo kowd man no si stefanas woy dos pomilya rin kos unna no nopiyod to kopomakoy riyot caya
oy taman koungkay id boggoy ran kos tivuk no ginawa ran atag to kodtavang to dumon mgo minuvu to onama
d loglohottan ku sikiyu no poiraom kow to kodponguu to mgo minuvu no iling kandan woy taddot mgo duma ran no id oiluggat atag to pinuungan tod ongaggon
a oraroy a no nahaa to kodinguma onni stefanas ortunato woy caico su noliiliyaman uvag kos kovuha ku koniyu
yyos sikandan kos nokopahaa koddi iling taddot kodpahaa ran koniyu
llog en nod rispituwon iddos mgo minuvu no iling kandan
a id pongumusta koniyu iddos id ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot prubinsya to sia
i quila mandad woy si riscila duma taddot od pompomakoy no id lolivuung diyot baoy ran id pouma to kodpongumusta ran koniyu no id pomon to pusung dan su nosokkad kow man diyon tod ongaggon
os langun no suwod ta kaay id pouma mandad to kodpongumusta ran koniyu
a pokuukumustay kow amoyd pokita to koniyun kodpohinowannoy
nis kodpongumusta ku kaayt kotompusan to sulat ku siyak si ablo bollad kud en kos mid sulat kaay
umusta kowd langun duwon
ddos ahad ondoy no waa ginawa riyon tod ongaggon od kosahapan din en kos silut to onama
ongaggon yo rud kouhayya kos kodlivod du
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon no si isas
d ginowannan ku sikiyu langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo no id aam ni isas rays amoyd kovovallan no apostoles din su ini en kos id kopiit onama
yon duma ku to kodsulat kaay si imoteo no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
ni kos sulat doy atag koniyu no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama ruwot orinto woy atag to mgo minuvu to onama no id ponubpa ruwot intirut prubinsya to caya
uopa nod kotanggap dow iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
d doongon ta iddos onama no moy woy onama mandad tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays oyyos sikandin kos moy ta no eeruwon woy id pomonnan to langun no tavang woyd uus to ginawa
u od uus sikandin to keton ginawa riyot langun no kosupittan ta amoy siketa od kotuig mandad nod uus to ginawa to duma iling taddot koduus to onama to ginawa ta
yyos ahad mouraa kos kosupittan nid tiis ta atag ki isas rays lampas peen kos koduus to onama to ginawa ta pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays
a otik nokoukit koy man to kosupittan atag idda to kodponokkaa to ginawa row woy amoy od kotobbus kow
oy otik id uus man to onama kos ginawa roy na sikami mandad od pokouus koy to koniyun ginawa
u otik ungketen od kotiis dow mandad iddos kosupittan no iling taddot noukitan doy
een pomon kaay dakkoo kos kodsalig doy koniyu oyyos nosorollan doy no ahad od ukit kow mandad to kosupittan iling taddot id tiis doy iddos onama kos od uus to koniyun ginawa iling taddot koduus din to ginawa roy
go suwod id kopii roy nod kosorollan dow iddos mosuppit no noukitan doy riyot sia
u noompasan iddos kosupittan no noukitan doy woy iling to nohipis koy tadda taman to dii royd asow od kogaha woy noworan koyd to koimmanan nod kouyag pa
unan doy ko kotompusan doyd idda
iru notomanan idda amoy konna koy od salig to kougolingun doy ko konna diyon da en to onama no od pokovadnow taddot id poomatoy ron
ddon timpu id tovangan koy en to onama pomon diyot mokaaratarat no kotomanan woy od tovangan koy peen mandon nikandin
oy dakkoo kos kodsalig doy no ponayun en sikandin nod tavang
oy koilangan nod tavang kow konami ukit to koniyun koddasaa
u otik mouraa kos od dasaa atag konami mouraa mandad kos od posolamat kandin pomon to kodtavak din to dosalon dow
go suwod iyon doy id pobporoong no sikami moppiya kos kodbovotasan doy riyot langun no minuvu woy bonnaavonnaa kos konamin dontulon no waa en id ollos labbi ron diyot koniyu
yyos iyon doy id puungan iddos id kopiit onama
aa koy id salig taddot moraom no koovottan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna id salig koy to tavang to onama
ddos langun no id sulat doy koniyu waa nokoollos kos kohulugan ko konna moomok da nod bosan woyd koovottan
uopa no ahad duwon pa dii row orayd koovottan mokaatag to konamin pinuungan od koovottan dowd en idda su amoy riyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays od pokopobporoong kow konami woy sikami mandad od pokopobporoong koniyu
a pomon to dakkoon kodsalig ku koniyu nokopuhawang a nod lowwi koniyu to kooruwa amoy kooruwa ku mandad sikiyu od kotovangan
yyos nokopuhawang a nod tuuy ruwot koniyu to kodundiyon ku to acedonia woy od tuuy a mandon duwot koniyu to kodlivod ku amoyd kotovangan a nikiyu to kodundiyon ku to udea
a pomon to waa notuman dos puhawang ku kunan dow ayu kod kopalinpalin kos poomdom ku
onna a od pomuhawang iling to dumon mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod nod ikahi to yya piru iddos diyot ginawa ran onna vos
iru sikami konna koy ungketen
ling to onama nod kosolihan od kosolihan koy mandad nikiyu su otik od ikahi koy to yya oyya en idda
yyos siyak si ablo si ilas woy si imoteo id ponudtulan doy sikiyu mokaatag to nak to onama no idda en si isas rays
oy nosorollan dow no od kosolihan kos osengan din woy od tumanon din en kos langun nid tandu rin
yya su ukit kandin od kotuman iddos langun no tandu to onama
oy ini en kos unayan no pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays od pokooseng ki no yya od kotuman en ini
a pomon kaay od koposivontuhan kos onama
ddos onama kos id oggot to koroniyan ta riyot ki isas rays woy sikandin mandad kos id aam keta amoyd kovovallan no mgo sakup din
d poubpa rin dinit keta iddos his no spiritu timbang patow no siketa kos mgo minuvu rin woy idda en kos posivonnaa no od tumanon din iddos langun nid tandu rin keta
d pokosahap a to onama otik konna bonnaa inis osengan ku
yon unayan no waa a mid unduwon to koniyu oyyos dii a od kopiyan nod langot koniyu
onna kohulugan no id kopii roy nod pohos koniyu ko ondan kos koniyun kopomakoy
yon doy ra id kopii no od tavang koy koniyu amoyd koponnu kow to kahaan su nosorollan doy no id lohinat kow no mosalig diyot kopomakoy
een nopuhawang ku no konna a pa od unduwon to koniyu otid mosakit da en mandon kos ginawa row
u ondoy man kos od pokopahaa koddi ko konna sikiyu en
oy momonnu kow man od pokopahaa koddi otik siyak kos unayan no nosokitan kow
ni en kos unayan no id sulat a koniyu iddot id lihad amoy od tuliddon dow kos koniyun pinuungan
oy ukit tadda to kodunduwon ku konna a od lanu taddot mgo minuvu no idda en nanoy kos od pokopahaa koddi
yyos nosorollan ku no otik od kahaa a od kahaa kow en mandad
urisu iddot id sulat a koniyu movoggat en kos ginawa ku woy id taddu kos dayas ku pomon to lampas no lanu
iru id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no waa a mid sulat amoyd posakit to ginawa row ko konna amoy id pokita ku no id dokollan ku en sikiyu to ginawa
a mokaatag taddot minuvu ruwot koniyu no nosaa konna a od posubra to osengan no konna ra siyak kos id boggayan din to lanu ko konna ahad sikiyu langun
llog don iddos silut kandin to kourallan koniyu
een iyon moppiya nod puungan dow posinsyai row sikandin woy inniyata row kos ginawa rin su amoy konnod pokodluntudluntud iddos lanu rin unayan nod kotalu kos kandin no kopomakoy
urisu od buyuwon ku koniyu no pokita row mandon kos kodginawa row kandin
u iyon unayan no id sulat a koniyu iddot id lihad amoy od geddaman ku kod tumanon dow veen iddos mgo suhu ku koniyu
a koungkay nosorollan ku no id tuman dow iddos id oseng ku
een otik id posinsyan dowd sikandin id posinsyan kud en mandad sikandin
tik duwon man od posinsyan ku od posinsyan ku idda atag to kopiyannan dow riyot isowwan ni isas rays
llog en nod puungan ta idda su amoy konna ki od kotalu ni oivuyan oyyos nokosaddoo kid man to morat no mgo dontulon din
a to kodinguma ku riyot roas amoyd ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays nokita ku no id panoy ron to onama iddon lugaa amoy od pokoponayun a to pinuungan ku rutun atag kandin
iru diid lonna kos ginawa ku oyyos waa man id inguma si ito no suwod ta pomon duwot koniyu
een id obisu a taddot mgo suwod ta rutun woy id ponayun a nid undiyon to acedonia
iru solamat to onama no pomon to nosokkad koy riyot ki isas rays nokoiling koy to pinirisu rin no id pokita rin diyot langun
oy ukit konami id posoob din diyot ahad ingkon iddos ponudtulon mokaatag kandin iling to id posoob no mammut no insenso
yyos sikami nokoiling koy to mammut no insenso no id buwis diyon to onama
u iddos ponudtulon doy mokaatag ki isas rays nokoiling to mammut no id posoob diyot mgo minuvu no notobbus don woy riyon mandad to waa notobbus
a atag taddot mgo minuvu no waa notobbus iddos ponudtulon doy nokoiling to ngarog to bangkoy nod pokopatoy kandan su iddos od ingumannon dan idda en so linowt apuy
iru atag taddot notobbus don nokoiling idda to mammut no od pokovoggoy kandan to umuun waad tomanon
a ko ungketen waa minuvu no ollog nod boggayan tod puungan no od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
iru id popiyod koy to onama woy dos langun nod oseng doy riyot isowwan din id pomon en to tivuk no ginawa roy oyya su nosokkad koy riyot ki isas rays
onna koy iling to duma no od ponudtuu to kahit onama amoyd ponoopi
a saddook id popoomdom kow no id pobporoong koy to kougolingun doy amoyd tonggapon koy nikiyu
iru konna
yyos konna koy iling to duma no koilangan pa od piyod to mgo sulat amoyd kokilaa riyot koniyu woy konnad koilangan nod buyu koy pa to mgo sulat pomon koniyu amoy id pokopokita riyot dumon lugaa nod undiyonnan doy
yyos sikiyu ron en kos nokoiling to sulat doy to kodpokilaa konami no nokosulat don kaayt konamin pusung
u ukit to kopomakoy row ki isas rays iling tod kovasa idda to langun no minuvu woy od kosorollan dan no moppiya kos konamin pinuungan
rayd kokita riyot koniyun koubpa no si isas rays en kos mid sulat kaay ukit konami piru konna tinta kos id gamit to kodsulat tadda ko konna idda en so spiritu to maantoyn onama
aa mandad idda id sulat riyot moumpepen mgo batu iling taddot mgo uhu ni oises ko konna diyon en to pusung to mgo minuvu
yon unayan no nokooseng koy to ungketen su iddos onama kos id solihan doy nod tavang konami ukit ki isas rays
tik sikami ra konna koy en od pokogaha nod puung kaayn pinuungan
iru iddos konamin kogahan id pomon en to onama
yyos sikandin kos id boggoy konami to kogahan amoy id pokopaabbotlabbot doy iddos lammin kodpotonduwoy
oy waa idda id boggoy keta ukit taddot nosulat no mgo uhu ni oises ko konna ukit to his no spiritu
u otik iddos kodtuman taddot langun no nosulat diyot mgo uhu kos od solihan ta od undag en idda to kopotayan no waad tomanon
iru ko iddos his no spiritu kos od solihan ta od undag en idda to umuun waad tomanon
a iddot id sulat dangan to onama iddos mgo uhu riyot moumpepen mgo batu nosealan si oises to orayn mosella no seaa to kotuusan to onama
oy pomon tadda konnad od pokotongtong iddos koubbaran ni srael taddot bonnong din ahad enotenot don no naawa iddos seaa
a otik lampas no seaa to kotuusan kos id pokita to onama iddot timpu to kodboggoy rin taddot mgo uhu nod undag to kodsilut no waad tomanon lampas peen iddos kodboggoy rin taddot kandin no spiritu
u otik lampas iddos seaa to kotuusan to onama to kodboggoy rin taddot mgo uhu no od undag to kodsilut lampas peen iddos lammin kodpotonduwoy amoyd komotallong kos mgo minuvu riyot kodontong to onama
a iddos mgo uhu no lampas kos kotuusan dangan koungkay iling to noworan don to kotuusan oyyos id buwassan don idda to lammin kodpotonduwoy no lampas peen kos kotuusan
u otik duwon man seaa to kotuusan to onama to kodpokita rin taddot mgo uhu nod lihad da lampas peen inis lammin kodpotonduwoy no od taman to waad tomanon
urisu pomon to idda en kos dakkoon koimmanan doy waa kodaangaang doy to kodponudtuu to kahit onama
onna koy iling ki oises no id totambun to bonnong din amoy konnod kokita taddot koubbaran ni srael iddos seaa no enotenot od kowora
iru iling to notombunan kos poomdom dan oyyos waa ran nokaabbot to kohulugan taddot notomanan ni oises
u ahad koungkay iling to notombunan poron kos poomdom dan diyot kodbasa ran taddot tapoyn kodpotonduwoy oyyos konna ran od pokaabbot to ollog no kohulugan tadda
oy od kaawa ra iddon tambun otid kosokkad sikandan diyot ki isas rays
yya su taman koungkay ipat timpu nod basa ran taddot id sulat ni oises dii rad en sikandan od pokaabbot su iling to waa poron nopokes kos poomdom dan
iru iddos minuvu nod pomakoy riyon tod ongaggon naawa ron iddos nokotambun to poomdom din
a iddos od ongaggon nod tommanon ku kaay idda en so his no spiritu
oy dos ahad ondoy no noiroomman to his no spiritu duwon don kolegguangan pomon diyot koduripon to mgo uhu ni oises
een mgo suwod siketa langun no id pomakoy ron worad tambun to bonnong ta woy ukit keta od kokita ron iddos seaa to kotuusan tod ongaggon oyyos iling ki to aung tadda
oy od enotenot od kopalin kos kodbovotasan ta taman to od pokoiling kid kandin
d kotuman idda rinit keta ukit taddot od ongaggon no idda en so his no spiritu
a pomon to eru to onama id sanna rin konami iddos pinuungan no idda en so kodpaabbotlabbot taddot lammin kodpotonduwoy
een waa koy en noobbod
d inoyyuhan doy iddos ahad ondan nod pokoilow no pinuungan woy waa koy id aakaa to ahad ondoy
aa roy mandad bovaawi kos kahit onama ko konna id paabbotlabbot doy en iddos kovonnaan amoy od kokita to langun no minuvu no waa en id ollos doy oyyos ini langun id puungan doy riyot isowwan to onama
iru ko duwon mgo minuvu no waa poron nopokes kos poomdom dan pomon to dii ran od pokaabbot taddot oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu roy iyon dan od ingumannon idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
ii ran od pomokayon iddos oppiyon inoggan
yyos si oivuyan no ponguu kaay to ampowt ingod id sobpongngan din kos mata ran amoy dii ran don od kokita iddos koowangan to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays no id posivontuhan woy waa en koossan din to onama
u iddos id ponudtuu roy koniyu konna mokaatag to kougolingun doy ko konna mokaatag ki isas rays
ikandin kos od ongaggon to langun woy sikami no mgo uripon din od tavang koniyu atag da en kandin
yya su iddot id bovallan to onama inis ingod mid ikahi sikandin to d seaa kos koowangan pomon diyot mosukirom
a ungketen dad en mandad kos id puungan din dinit konami
u id poseaa rin kos koowangan dinit konamin poomdom amoy od koovottan doy iddos kodposivantug to onama no od kokita riyot ki isas rays
iru sikami nokoiling koy to waa koruanon no kuron no duwon id taaw no dakkoo kos koruanon oyya su id sanna to onama rinit konami iddos kahi rin no dakkoo kos koruanon no idda en so oppiyon inoggan
d puungan idda to onama amoy id pokita riyot langun no iddos waa toppong no kotuusan din waa id pomon konami ko konna id pomon en diyot onama
yyos ahad diyon koy inaayun to tongannan to kosupittan piru waa notalu kos kopomakoy roy
uwon timpu no notompoddan koyd to puhawang piru waa koy noworan to koimmanan
naayun koy id posupittan to mgo minuvu piru waa koy podtohona to onama
uwon timpu no id pomodasan koy nikandan taman to nongopiloy piru waa koy en id poomatoy
had ingkon koy od isau woy riyot langun no kosupittan no noukitan doy iling to od kokita iddos kopotayan ni isas rays diyot konamin lawa
yon unayan no notomanan ini amoy od kokita rinit konami no nouyag en mandon sikandin su inaayun man sikandin od tavang konami
yyos laggun to kaay koy pa to ampowt ingod inaayun koy od isau to kopotayan pomon da en to koddumoruma roy ki isas rays
iru sikandin kos od tavang konami amoy od kokita to langun no minuvu no nouyag en sikandin
oy od kokita ran iddos kotuusan din kaayt konamin lawa no duwon komoometan woy kopotayan
een ahad inaayun koy od isau to kopotayan piru atag ini to koniyun kopiyannan su od undag en ini to umuun waad tomanon
uwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d pomakoy a to onama deen id ponudtuu ku ini
a iling en mandad tadda kos id puungan doy su id ponudtuu roy iddos id pomokayan doy
yyos nosorollan doy no id badnow to onama iddos od ongaggon no si isas rays woy od bodnawon koy nikandin pomon to nosokkad koy riyot kandin
oy ungketen dad en mandad koniyu od bodnawon kow nikandin woyd piyoddon diyot isowwan din
os langun no kosupittan nid tiis doy atag idda to koniyun kopiyannan amoy od lapung iddos mgo minuvu nod tanggap to kopiyannoy to onama
u otik mouraa ron sikandan od lampas mandad kos kodposolamat diyot onama woy od koroong peen sikandin
a idda en kos unayan no waa koy id obbodobbod
u ahad od kovuyyag don woyd moomet kos lawa roy piru iddos kaayt daom to ginawa roy id lammi ipat allow
yya su iddos kodposuppit nid tiis doy od lihad da woy immat waa ron idda konami otid poomdommon doy iddos diid kotoppong no kopiyannan no od kotanggap doy init morin allow su od taman en idda to waad tomanon
urisu konna iddos od kokita kaay to ampowt ingod kos od dokollan doy to ginawa ko konna idda en so konna pa od kokita no riyot datas to langit
u iddos od kokita kaayt ingod od kowora piru iddos konna pa od kokita od taman en idda to waad tomanon
a nokosaddoo ki no inis keton lawa nokoiling to baoy no id oubpan ta laggun to kaay ki pa to ampowt ingod
oy otid gobban don ini no iddos kohulugan od patoy kid od boggayan ki to onama to baoy riyot datas to langit no idda en so lammin lawa no od taman to waad tomanon
onna idda binovallan to minuvu ko konna binovallan to onama
oungkay laggun to kaay ki pa to ampowt ingod iling to od pokosongnga ki to moraom pomon to dakkoo kos ingowollon ta no od kotanggap tad iddos lammin lawa no ollog atag diyot datas to langit su amoy duwon od koubpan to keton gimukud
u laggun to nouyag ki pa kaay to ampowt ingod iling tod pokosongnga ki to moraom pomon to mgo kovoggatoy no id tiis to keton lawa
iru konna kohulugan no id kopii tad nod patoy ko konna od ingowollon ta no od kotanggap tad koungkay iddos lammin lawa amoy inis lawa nod patoy od kovuwassan don to lawa no konnad od patoy
os onama kos id panoy keta amoyd kotanggap ta iddon lammin lawa
oy id boggayan ki nikandin to spiritu rin posivonnaa no od tumanon din en idda
een dakkoo kos kodsalig ta ahad nosorollan ta no laggun to kaay ki pa to ampowt ingod waa ki poron diyot id ubpan tod ongaggon
u laggun to id oubpa ki pa kaay to ampowt ingod dos pounsaran to keton koontayan idda en so kopomakoy konna iddos od kokita
yya dakkoo en kos kodsalig ta woy od podsuwomihon ta nod tanan kaayt lawa ta amoy od pokoubpa kid duma tod ongaggon
iru ahad kaay ki man to ampowt ingod o riyot datas to langit iyon dontulon ta idda en so kodpahaa kandin
yyos siketa langun koilangan en nod isau ki isas rays amoyd hukuman ki nikandin su amoy iddos ipat sokkad keta od pokotanggap to loppa taddot moppiya o morat no pinuungan ta laggun to kaay ki pa to ampowt ingod
a pomon to nosorollan ta no mokaaratarat kos kodhukum tod ongaggon deen id noonokkalan doy nod kopiyod kos mgo minuvu riyot kopomakoy
okosaddoo kos onama no bonnaavonnaa kos dontulon doy woy muopa no nokosaddoo kow mandad tadda
onna idda kodpobporoong to kougolingun doy riyot koniyu ko konna id kopii roy ra no od boggayan kow to unayan amoy id pobporoong koy nikiyu woy amoy duwon id pokotavak dow taddot mgo minuvu nod pobporoong taddot od kokita konna iddos diyot ginawa
tid tommanon to duma no od busawon koyd tohondin su atag man idda to kodposivantug to onama
oy otid tommanon man to duma no motallong kos poomdom doy na atag meen idda to kopiyannan dow
u iddos kodginawa ni isas rays kos id inuruk konami riyot langun nod puungan doy
yyos nosodsorollan doy no id patoy sikandin atag to langun deen od koikahi ta no iling to id patoy mandad kos langun no minuvu
d patoy sikandin atag to langun su amoy siketa koungkay no nongouyag konnad od ikuu to id kopii ta ko konna idda en so id kopii ni isas rays no id patoy woy novadnow atag keta
een pomon koungkay konna koyd od popoomdom to ahad ondoy iling taddot kodpopoomdom to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
angan ungketen dad en mandad kos kodpopoomdom doy ki isas rays su kunan doy ko minuvu ra sikandin piru koungkay konnad ungketen kos kodpopoomdom doy
u iddos ahad ondoy no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays id lammi ron sikandin to onama
os tapoyn kodbovotasan woy pinuungan din id lihad don woy koungkay novuwassan don to lammi
ni langun iddos onama kos id puung su id poduli rin kos koroniyan ta riyot kandin ukit ki isas rays
oy id sanna to onama rinit konami iddos pinuungan no idda en so kodpoduli to koroniyan to mgo minuvu riyot kandin
yon kohulugan tadda no id poduli to onama kos koroniyan to mgo minuvu riyot kandin ukit to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus
orad sikandan sukuti to onama taddot mgo saa ran
oy dos kodposoob to ponudtulon mokaatag to kodpoduli to koroniyan to minuvu riyot onama id sanna rin idda konami
urisu timbang bivig koy ni isas no iling to iddos onama kos id oseng koniyu ukit to ponudtulon doy
kit ki isas rays od loglohottan doy sikiyu no poduliya row kos koroniyan dow riyon to onama
aa en saa ni isas rays piru sikandin kos id silutan to onama atag to mgo saa ta su amoy ukit kandin od komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama
a pomon to duma koy to onama riyot pinuungan od loglohottan doy sikiyu no yo row podworanni to koruanon iddos eru no notanggap dow pomon diyot onama
yya su mid ikahi iddos onama no iyot ollog no timpu no id pokita ku kos eru kikow id pominog ku kos dosalon du
oy riyot ollog no timpu to kodtobbus id tovangan ku sikkow
een mgo suwod pominog kow
oungkay ron en kos ollog no timpu
oungkay ron en kos allow to kodtobbus
d ooyyaran doy no waa koy id puung to ahad ondan no unayan no od kouug to saa kos ahad ondoy amoy waa id pokosawoy to pinuungan doy atag to onama
iyot langun nod puungan doy id pokita roy no mgo uripon koy en to onama
yya su id tiis koy to ahad ondan no mgo kodposuppit mgo koosayan woy morat no mgo kotomanan
okoukit koy no id pomodasan id prisu woy id pomilit to mgo minuvu no id bovaat samuk
uwon timpu no noompasan koyd no novolloy to kodpuung dobbo en woy duwon timpu no waa tinuhon doy woy waa mandad kokaan
d pokita roy no mooggot koy no uripon to onama ukit to molinis no pinuungan doy ukit to sinorollan doy to bonnaan nonaw ukit to mowwet no posinsya roy woy ukit to eru riyot duma
d pokita roy mandad no iddos his no spiritu kos id potuntuu konami woy bonnaavonnaa en kos kodginawa roy riyot duma
onnaa mandad kos nonaw roy woy id dumannan koy to kotuusan to onama
os motallong no kodbovotasan doy no id pomon to onama iling idda to polihuma atag to kodpoimotayoy woy kaasag atag to kodpongallang
iyot kodpuung doy atag to onama duwon iddos mowwet kos kodontong konami woy duwon en mandad iddos id poddisokkan koy to kodontong
uwon id doong konami woy duwon mandad id doddoraat mokaatag konami
go bouhuson koy kun piru bonnaa iddos langun no osengan doy
ovantug koy en piru waa koy loompiya
naayun koy od isau to kopotayan piru nouyag koy rad en
d posupittan koy to onama amoyd kotullid piru waa koy imotayi
had diyon koy to lanu piru duwon inaayun kahaan doy
had worowora koy piru ukit to kodnonaw roy iling to mouraa kos id poratu roy taddot korotuwan no od taman to waad tomanon
aa ahad ondan no koruwonnan doy kaay to ampowt ingod piru sikami kos komunoy to langun
go suwod doy ruwot orinto id aminamin doyd tid ponudtuu iddos langun no rinit ginawa roy
d dokollan doy sikiyu to ginawa
tik duwon man kodginawa nid disok konna iddos konamin kodginawa ko konna idda en so kodginawa row konami
d oseng ku ini koniyu no iling to mgo anak ku sikiyu
een pokita row mandad kos kodginawa row konami
go suwod yo kow ron en od pokidsokkad diyot konnod pompomakoy oyyos konna od pokodduma iddos moppiya woy morat
ling mandad tadda dos maawang woy mosukirom konna en od pokodduma
ii en od pokodsokkad kos puhawang ni isas rays woy dos puhawang ni oivuyan
ling mandad tadda iddos od pompomakoy woy konnod pompomakoy konna en od pokodsokkad
onna mandad ollog no id lommung iddos konna bonnaan mgo monama riyot templo
a ungketen dad en mandad keta oyyos nokoiling ki to templo to maantoyn onama
u mid ikahi iddos onama no d ubpa a woyd duma kandan
iyak kos onama ran woy sikandan kos mgo minuvu ku
oy id ikahi peen iddos onama to een awa kow pomon diyot morat no mgo minuvu woy ossa kow pomon kandan
o kow ron en od lonug to ahad ondan no molibmit diyot koddin kodontong woy od tonggapon ku sikiyu
iyak od kaamoy rowd woy sikiyu od kaanak kud
ni en kos osengan tod ongaggon no otuus to angun
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod pomon to id tandu man to onama keta ini langun koilangan no od tonanan tad iddos langun nod pokolibmit keta no idda en so morat no pinuungan woy poomdom
oilangan no od noonokkalan ta nod oubpa no molinis diyot kodontong to onama pomon to duwon allak ta kandin
a mgo suwod od buyuwon ku koniyu no pokita row kos kodginawa row konami
aa man ahad sokkad koniyu no nopuungan doy to morat woy waa koy mandad ahad sokkad koniyu no id okoy roy nod puung to morat
aa koy mandad id loimbung to ahad ondoy koniyu
nis osengan ku konna kodsawoy koniyu su od uliton ku iddos id oseng kud iddot id lihad no id dokollan doy en sikiyu to ginawa
iyot ahad ondan no kotomanan od kouyag ki man o od patoy inaayun kow rinit pusung doy
akkoo kos kodsalig ku koniyu woy id pokopobporoong ku oraroy sikiyu riyot duma deen noponnu a to kahaan
oy pomon tadda lampas peen kos kahaan doy ahad mouraa kos kosupittan no noukitan doy
u ahad diyot kodinguma roy to acedonia waa en imolloy roy su ahad ingkon nolingkus koy inaayun to mgo kosupittan
yyos duwon id supak konami woy duwon mandad mgo lanu to ginawa roy
iru iddos onama no od uus to ginawa taddot duwon mgo lanu sikandin kos id uus to ginawa roy ukit to kodinguma ni ito
onna ra iddos kodinguma rin kos nokopahaa konami ko konna idda mandad so ponudtulon din mokaatag to koduus dow to ginawa rin
d ponudtulan koy nikandin no novuhan kowd koddi woy dakkoo kos kodsondit dow taddot morat no pinuungan dow
opanoy kow kun mandad nod ponavang koddi deen oraroy a peen no nahaa
u ahad id mosakit kos ginawa row taddot sulat ku koniyu waa a mid sondit no id sulat ku idda
onnaa en no riyot unna id sondit a en to norinog ku no id mosakit kos ginawa row oyyos dii a od kopiyan nod koungketen kow ahad sinahaw ra
iru koungkay nahaa a no id popiyod ku iddon sulat
onna kohulugan no nahaa a su id mosakit kos ginawa row ko konna pomon to iddos mosakit no ginawa row id undag to kodsondit woy kodtanan dow to koniyun saa
os mosakit no ginawa row tonggaad to onama amoy konnod korattan kos koniyun kopomakoy
u iddos mosakit no ginawa no id pomon to onama od undag idda to kodsondit to minuvu woy kodtanan to saa rin amoyd kotobbus
oy konna morat iddos kodmosakit to ginawa oyya su od undag idda to umuun waad tomanon
iru iddos mosakit no ginawa to minuvu atag kaay to ampowt ingod od undag en idda to kopotayan no waad tomanon
oomdomma row iddos moppiyon id puungan to onama ukit taddot mosakit no ginawa row
u ukit tadda id noonokkalan dowd no motallong kos pinuungan dow
d noonokkalan dow mandad no id posaddoo koddi no waa en lavut dow taddot morat no pinuungan woy id kolingasai row iddos mokoilowilown pinuungan
ovaakkan kow mandad no saddook od kaapii kow to kodsilut to onama
oy oraroy kowd kun no novuhan koddi woy mohiod kow nod tuman taddot mgo suhu ku koniyu
onna ra idda goos dow id silutan iddos minuvu no nosaa
a pomon kaayt langun nid puungan dow id pokita row no waa en lavut dow taddot saa rin
een iddos sulat ku konna ra atag taddot minuvun nokopuung to saa o atag to minuvu no nopuungan din to saa ko konna id sulat ku ini amoy od koovottan dow no riyot isowwan to onama bonnaavonnaa en kos ginawa row konami
omon tadda nahaa kos ginawa roy
oy konna ra idda nahaa koy peen to nokita roy no nahaa si ito pomon to id lonna ron kos ginawa rin mokaatag koniyu
u iddot id lihad id pobporoong doy sikiyu riyot ki ito woy waa koy en nikiyu poilawi deen noposivonnalan din no bonnaa en iddos osengan doy kandin oyyos kovonnaan meen inaayun kos langun nod osengon doy
a koungkay id dokollan kow peen ni ito to ginawa su od kosompottan din no nahaa kow nod tuman taddot langun no pomandu rin woy moppiya mandad kos kodtanggap dow kandin ahad duwon allak dow no saddook konna sikandin od kahaa koniyu
omon kaay dakkoo kos kahaan ku oyyos nokosaddoo a no od kosolihan kowd en
a mgo suwod id kopii roy nod kosorollan dow iddos moppiyon undahon taddot kopiyannoy to onama no id pokita rin diyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy kaayt prubinsya to acedonia
u ahad nohipis dan to movoggat no mgo kodposuppit piru noponnu rad en sikandan to kahaan
omon to dakkoon kahaan dan ahad worowora sikandan piru movoggoyvoggoy ran no od tavang diyot mgo duma ran nod pompomakoy
d pokoposivonnaa a koniyu no iddos kodboggoy ran konna ra taman tod kogaha ran ko konna ahad lampas peen tadda
aa id pohos kandan oyyos id pomon en idda riyot mahan no ginawa ran
u id poerueru ran konami no od apii ran mandad diyot kodtavang taddot od pongkohirapan no mgo minuvu to onama riyot erusalem
oy dos id puungan dan lampas pa taddot id imman doy
u unnot langun id boggoy ran iddos kougolingun dan diyon tod ongaggon woy pomon tid ikuu sikandan to id kopiit onama id poiraom dan mandad kos kougolingun dan kaayt konami
a pomon taddot id puungan to mgo toho acedonia idda en kos unayan no id suhu roy si ito nod polivoddon duwot koniyu
yyos sikandin meen kos id tigkanoy no id tavang koniyu nid loimud taddot id boggoy row
een koilangan mandad no od tavang sikandin nod ipongnga taddot pinuungan dow to kodpokita to koniyun eru
okosaddoo a no noratu kow riyot langun no moppiyon pinuungan
oratu kow riyot kopomakoy diyot kotuihan to kodooseng diyot sinorollan diyot kodpotovangoy woy riyon to ginawa row konami
een iyon ingowollon doy no od koratu kow mandad diyot kodpokita to eru ukit to kodtavang dow to duma
onna ini kodsuhu koniyu ko konna id kopii ku ra no od kosorollan dow iddos kodginawa to dumon od pompomakoy riyot kodtavang dan to duma
d ponudtuu ku ini koniyu amoy otik od ikulon dow sikandan od kosorollan ku no bonnaavonnaa en kos kodginawa row to duma
osorollan dow iddos lampas no eru ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta
had dakkoo kos korotuwan din diyot datas to langit piru id tonanan din idda pomon to eru rin keta
yya su iddot nominuvu sikandin novovallan sikandin no worowora amoy od koratu ki riyot kodontong to onama
ni kos od kooseng ku mokaatag tadda
yon moppiya no ipongngaa row iddos notigkonayan dowd iddot id lihad no lahun oyyos sikiyu man kos unna no nokopuhawang to kodboggoy woy sikiyu mandad kos unna nid loimud to tavang
urisu puungi row ini amoy iddos kahaan dow riyot kodpomuhawang ungketen dad en mandad kos kahaan dow riyot kodipongnga tadda taman tod kogaha row
u otik mahan kos ginawa ta nod tavang woy od boggoy ki ko ondan kos diyot keta na od kahaa en kos onama nod tanggap tadda
ii sikandin od buyu taddot konna ta od kogaha nid boggoy
onna kohulugan no od kopiyan a no iddos duma od koratu pomon to kodboggoy row woy sikiyu od kohirapan
iru pomon to noruwonnan kow man koungkay iyon moppiya no od tovangan dow iddos duwon mgo koilonganon su otik sikiyu ron mandon kos duwon koilonganon sikandan no noruwonnan kos od tavang koniyu
a ko ungketen kos od puungan dow nokodiling kowd no nokodtovangoy
yya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos minuvu no id loimud to dakkoo waa subrawoy dos id loimud to disok waa mandad kulang
d posolamat a to onama su id boggoy rin ki ito iddos dakkoon ginawa no od tavang koniyu iling to ginawa roy koniyu
u iddot id suhu roy si ito nod livod duwot koniyu nahaa sikandin taddon puhawang
ddos kovonnaan tadda ginawa rin don en moho tapoy nod unduwon to koniyu
a od porumannan doy sikandin to sokkad no suwod ta no orayn novantug diyot langun no od lolivuung nod pompomakoy pomon to kodponudtuu rin to oppiyon inoggan
onna ra idda sikandin en mandad kos id aam to od lolivuung nod pompomakoy no od duma konami to kodatod to tavang no id limud dow atag to mgo suwod ta no duwon koilonganon
d puungan doy ini amoyd koposivontuhan kos onama woy amoy id pokopokita roy no bonnaavonnaa koy en nod tavang
d porumannon doy sikandin ki ito oyyos od ooyyaran doy no waa en unayan nod kosawoy kos poukit to kodsomad doy taddot dakkoon tavang
u id kopii roy no motallong kos pinuungan doy konna ra riyot kodontong tod ongaggon ko konna diyon mandad to kodontong to mgo minuvu
uwon pa sokkad no suwod ta no od porumannon doy ongki ito
nin suwod ta komouraa rin id pokita konami no mohiod sikandin diyot pinuungan atag to onama
oy labbi ron en koungkay su oraroy rin id kopii nod duma pomon to dakkoo kos kodsalig din koniyu
a mokaatag ki ito duma ku sikandin diyot pinuungan to kodtavang koniyu
oy idda mandad so oruwon suwod ta nod duma kandin id popiyod sikandan taddot od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
ddos kandan no pinuungan od posivantug ki isas rays
a otid inguma ran don duwot koniyu pokita row kos kodginawa row kandan amoy od koposivonnalan no bonnaa en iddos kodpobporoong doy mokaatag koniyu
oy ukit kandan od kosorollan mandad ini taddot od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a nokosaddoo a no konnad koilangan no od sulatan ku pa sikiyu mokaatag taddot tavang no id popiyod dow riyot duma ta no mgo minuvu to onama riyot erusalem
yyos nokosaddoo a no oraroy row id kopii nod tavang woy ini en kos id pobporoong ku to mgo minuvu kaayt acedonia
d osengan ku sikandan no sikiyu ruwot caya nopanoy kowd nod tavang pomon poron iddot id lihad no lahun
een to norinog dan idda dos kourallan kandan noinniyat nod tavang
a koungkay id pounna ku ruwon iddos mgo suwod ta no onsi ito no od tavang koniyu amoy od kosorollan to mgo minuvu no bonnaa en kos id pobporoong doy koniyu woy nopanoy kowd en nod boggoy to tavang iling taddot noikahi kud
u saddook duwon mgo toho acedonia no od duma koddi to kodunduwon ku woy od kokita ran no waa kow pobbos nokopanoy to tavang dow na od koilawan koy en
iru lampas kow peen nod koilawan su id pobporoong doyd sikiyu no nopanoy ron kos tavang dow
urisu nopuhawang ku no koilangan no od pounnan kud inis mgo suwod ta amoy od kolimud dowd tapoy iddos tavang no id tandu row to dii a pa od inguma ruwon
a ko ungketen kos od puungan dow od kokita no iddos kodboggoy row konna pomon to nopohos kow ko konna pomon to mahan kos ginawa row nod tavang
a poomdomma row ini
os od pomuwa to disok disok mandad kos od kokottu
iru iddos od pomuwa to dakkoo dakkoo en mandad kos od kokottu
een iddos ipat sokkad koilangan no nokopuhawang don tapoy ko pila kos id boggoy rin konna no nopohos da sikandin o movoggat diyot ginawa rin
yya su id ginowannan to onama iddos minuvu no duwon kahaan nod boggoy
oy dos onama od pokovoggoy en koniyu to langun no kopiyannan no lampas pa taddot od koilonganon dow amoy waa kulang diyot koniyu woy od pokotavang kow peen taddot duwon mgo koilonganon
yya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ovoggoyvoggoy sikandin diyot mgo worowora purisu dii en od kolingawan iddos kopiyannoy rin taman to waad tomanon
ddos onama kos id boggoy to bonni riyot tohodpuung to livuta woy sikandin kos id boggoy to kokaan diyot mgo minuvu
a iling mandad tadda sikandin kos id boggoy to langun no koilonganon dow su amoy od pokotavang kow to duma
okoiling idda to bonni woy dos onama kos od potuvu taddot moppiyon pinuungan dow no nokoiling to dakkoon kinottu
d busbus kos onama to langun no kopiyannan duwot koniyu amoy inaayun kow movoggoyvoggoy riyot ahad ondoy no duwon koilonganon
oy ukit kaay mouraa kos od posolamat to onama pomon to tavang no id popiyod dow ukit konami
u iddos kodboggoy row konna ra no notovangan dow iddos mgo minuvu to onama taddot koilonganon dan ko konna daan ini no mouraa peen kos od posolamat to onama
oy pomon to bonnaavonnaan kodtavang dow od koposivonnalan no mooggot en kos koniyun kopomakoy
oy mouraa kos od doong to onama pomon to kodtuman dow taddot oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays oyyos movoggoyvoggoy kow kandan woy riyot duma
a od dasaa peen sikandan atag koniyu su id dokollan kow man nikandan to ginawa pomon taddot konnod kotoppong no kopiyannoy to onama koniyu
urisu od posolomatan ta kos onama pomon taddot konnod kotoppong no gasa no id boggoy rin keta
a duwon duma ruwot koniyu nod ikahi no siyak si ablo taawon a otik duwon a to koniyu
iru ko waa a ruwon woy id poukit ku ra to sulat waa kun kodaangaang ku nod ooseng
iru koungkay duwon od buyuwon ku koniyu ukit to mopoobbava woy mosunay no pusung iling ki isas rays
o row pohosa no od pokorinog kow to waa kodaangaang no kodooseng ku otid inguma ad duwon
yyos duwon duma ruwon nod ikahi no iddos botasan doy iling da en to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
a ko ungketen kos od osengon dan to kodinguma ku ruwon id porinog ku en kandan kos waa kodaangaang no kodooseng ku
onnaa en no minuvu koy ra piru waa koy id gamit to kotuihan to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod amoy od supak taddot konna bonnaan nonaw
yyos konna iddos kotuihan to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod kos id gamit doy ko konna idda en so kotuihan no id pomon to onama
oy iddon kotuihan duwon kotuusan deen od kotalu roy iddos monokkaa nod supak to bonnaan nonaw
d talu roy iddos langun no ebbaw no kodpopoomdom taddot mgo minuvu nod poratasdatas no idda en kos od pokobaavag to kodkilaa ran to onama
d puungan doy idda su amoy od kopalin kos kodpopoomdom dan woy amoy od ikuu ran don taddot id kopii ni isas rays
a koungkay to nokita royd no mooggot en no id tuman kowd taddot mgo suhu rin nopanoy koyd nod silut to ahad ondoy no diid dumoruma kandin
oomdomma row ini
ikiyu ampow ra kos od ontongngan dow to minuvu konna iddos diyot ginawa rin
yyos duwon duma ruwot koniyu no id ikahi no sikandan da kos mgo uripon ni isas rays
a ko ungketen kos od osengon dan koilangan nod koovottan dan no sikami mandad mgo uripon ni isas rays iling kandan
u ahad lampas don boyow kos kodooseng doy mokaatag to kotungud no id boggoy konami tod ongaggon piru dii a en od koilow oyyos konna man ini od pokodoraat to kopomakoy row ko konna od pokomosalig en
ii a od kopiyan no od pongimallak koniyu ukit to mgo sulat ku
u iddos duma ruwon od ikahi no riyon kun to mgo sulat ku movuut woy movoggat kun kos osengan ku
iru otid isau a kun koniyu taawon a woy waa kun taaw to mgo osengan ku
ddon mgo minuvu koilangan no od koovottan dan no iddos id ikahi roy riyot konamin mgo sulat to waa koy ruwon waa koossan taddot od puungan doy otid isau koy koniyu
onna koy od kopiyan no id podiling doy kos konamin kougolingun diyot dumon mgo minuvu ruwon no od bokkaa kos atoy
go bangog sikandan
yya su id popoomdom dan no iddos kandan no botasan kos ollog nod ikulon
d unoy ran tid doong kos kandan no kougolingun woy riyot ahad ondan nod puungan dan moppiya en kun idda langun
iru sikami dii roy od poompasan kos kodpobporoong doy ko konna taman da en diyot pinuungan no id sanna to onama konami ahad iddos pinuungan doy ruwot koniyu
een pomon to naapii kow man taddon pinuungan waa nokolampas kos kotungud doy koniyu oyyos sikami man kos unnon nokounduwon no id nonaw to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
urisu konna lampas kos kodpobporoong doy oyyos waa roy man id pobporoong iddos pinuungan no id oiluggatan to duma
iru laggun tod ponayun nod mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy id imman koy no dakkoo peen kos pinuungan doy ruwot koniyu su ini en kos od ikuu taddot pinuungan no id sanna to onama konami
a ukit kaay id pokoponudtuu roy iddos oppiyon inoggan diyot mgo lugaa no moriyu pa ruwot koniyu no waa pa duma nid nonaw
yyos dii roy id kopii no id pobporoong iddos pinuungan no id oiluggatan to duma
d ikulon ta iddos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to os minuvu no od kopiyan nod pobporoong koilangan no iyon din id pobporoong iddos pinuungan tod ongaggon
u iddos od tonggapon to onama konna iddos od pobporoong to kougolingun din ko konna idda en so id pobporoong tod ongaggon
uopa no konna kow od koobbod nod pominog koddi ahad nopoomdom dow no iddos mgo kodpobporoong ku iling tod koongoo a
a od buyuwon ku koniyu no tiis kow koddi
u id pongolikud a koniyu iling to onama no od pongolikud to mgo minuvu rin
okoiling kow to mongovay woy siyak kos timbang melow no od podosawa koniyu riyot sokkad no mama no idda en si isas rays
een id kopii ku no id poisau sikiyu no molinis nod osowan din
iru noipong a su saddook od pokosuwoy kos poomdom dow woy od tanan kowd taddot bonnaavonnaan ginawa row ki isas rays
oy saddook od pokoiling kow ki va no nookalan tat uwod no od kotuigtuig nod ouhus
yyos od tonggapon dow man iddos ahad ondoy nod unduwon to koniyu no od ponudtuu mokaatag ki isas rays ahad ossa idda taddot id ponudtuu roy koniyu mokaatag kandin
oy od tonggapon dow mandad iddos nonaw mokaatag to ispiritu no ossa taddot his no spiritu woy dos od tommanon dan no moppiyon dinoggan no ossa taddot id ponudtuu roy koniyu
a pomon to id tanggap dow man sikandan pominogga a mandad nikiyu su riyot koddin poomdom konna moobbava kos kotungud ku kuntra taddot mgo minuvu no mowwet kun no apostoles
onnaa man no waa kotuihan ku nod ooseng piru nooblovottan ku en ko ondan kos bonnaan nonaw
oy ini en kos nouhoy royd id nonaw koniyu riyot langun no timpu woy riyon to nokodossoosson poukit
iyot kodponudtuu ku to oppiyon inoggan duwot koniyu waa a mid povayad ahad songosingkusing
yyos id poobbava ku kos koddin kougolingun su amoy sikiyu id poowwet kow riyot kodontong to onama
a ondan morat bo iddos id puungan ku
os kovonnaan tadda nokoiling a to tokawon oyya su laggun to ruwon a pa to koniyu id tanggap ku iddos tavang pomon diyot dumon od lolivuung nod pompomakoy amoyd pokononaw koniyu
u ahad duwon mgo koilonganon ku waa a mid bovuyu riyot ahad ondoy oyya su iddos mgo suwod ta nod pompomakoy no id pomon diyot acedonia kos id piyod to mgo koilonganon ku
d olihuwan ku nod kovoggatan kow koddi woy od ponoyunon ku en ini tod puung
onna od kotoholan kos kodpobporoong ku mokaatag kaay
yyos konna a en od buyu to tavang pomon duwot koniyu o pomon to dumon minuvu ruwot mgo bonuwa to caya
onnaa en inis osengan ku oyyos dini man to koddi si isas rays
a ondan id popoomdom kow no waa ku sikiyu ginowanni
onna bonnaa ika
okosaddoo iddos onama no id ginowannan ku en sikiyu
oy od ponoyunon ku no diid povayad koniyu su amoy iddos od pouvaguvag no mowwet no mgo apostoles konna ran od pokopobporoong no iddos pinuungan dan nokodiling da en taddot konamin pinuungan
u iddon mgo minuvu konna sikandan bonnaan apostoles ni isas rays ko konna od pouvaguvag da sikandan woy od aakaa taddot id ponnonawwan dan
iru konna ki od kosoobbuwan tadda
yya su ahad si oivuyan od kovauy rin man kos boyo rin no iling to orayn moseaa no ponolihan to onama
urisu konna ki mandad od kosoobbuwan no iddos mgo uripon din od kotuig nod pouvaguvag no motallong sikandan no mgo uripon to onama
iru iyon od ingumannon dan idda en so kodsilut no toppong taddot morat no pinuungan dan
a od uliton ku tod oseng yo row poomdomma nod koongoo a pomon to kodpobporoong ku to kougolingun ku
iru ko ungketen meen kos poomdom dow na pominogga a kaayt disok uvag no kodpobporoong ku
nin kodpobporoong konna pomon tod ongaggon ko konna iling a uvag taddot minuvu nod koongoo
iru pomon to mouraa man kos od pobporoong to pinuungan dan kaay to ampowt ingod na od pobporoong a mandad
omon to orayn moraom kos koovottan dow od kotuig kow nod tiis to kodpominog taddot koongollan to mgo minuvu woy od kahaahaa kow peen tadda
d tiis kow ra en ahad id uripon kow nikandan
had id aminamin dan don kos koniyun korotuwan immat waa ron moho koniyu
had id poddisokkan kow nikandan to kodontong woy id poilawan kow peen moppiya rad moho idda riyot koniyu
iru posinsyai koy oyyos waa kogahan doy nod puung to iling tadda riyot koniyu
iru otid pokoaku man sikandan nod pobporoong iyon a pobbo od pobporoong a en su od koongoo a meen ayu
tik id pobporoong dan no mgo ebreo sikandan na siyak mandad ebreo a man
omman dan no lubbad sikandan ni srael na siyak mandad lubbad a man ni srael
omman dan no kovuyyahan dan si braham na siyak kovuyyahan ku man mandad si braham
tik id pobporoong dan no mgo uripon sikandan ni isas rays lampas a pa no moppiyon uripon kuntra kandan
okosaddoo a no iling tod busawon a to kodoseng ku kaay piru tohondin su iddos bonnaa lampas peen kos kodoiluggat ku atag ki isas rays
omouraa a noprisu konnad od koiyap kos kodbadas koddi woy komouraa ad mid isau to kopotayan
olimmon timpu nid lompossan a to latigu taddot iling ku no mgo udio to tinotollumpuusiyow no kodlampos
ootollun timpu nid bodasan a to mgo sundau to oma woy kosokkad a lumbaha to mgo batu
ootollu a nokoukit to noonnod kos barku no id sokayan ku
