oy duwon timpu tadda no laroyt allow woy bulli no id gampunggampung a riyot dahat
iyot mgo iponawon ku mouraa kos mokaaratarat no noukitan ku
d batas a to dakkoon lanog woy id tulis a to mgo tulisan
okoukit a to mokaaratarat no id puungan taddot iling ku no mgo udio taddot konna mgo udio woy dos od pouvaguvag no mgo suwod to kopomakoy
okoukit a to mokaaratarat no kotomanan diyot mgo bonuwa diyot lumut woy riyot dahat
iyon to pinuungan ku atag tod ongaggon id oiluggat a taman tod kogaha ku woy kopila ron no timpu waa tinuhon ku
omouraa a notokkangan woy id gutasan pomon to waa kokaan
d kookoo a to mohonnow su kulang kos umpak ku
onna ra idda inaayun diid lonna kos ginawa ku pomon to ipong ku atag to langun no od lolivuung nod pompomakoy
u otik duwon od moomet diyot kopomakoy od geddamon ku kos lanu
oy otik duwon nouug diyon to saa orayd mosakit kos ginawa ku
onna a nanoy od pobporoong piru otik koilangan man nod puungan ku idda iyon ku id pobporoong iddos mgo noukitan ku no od pokita to koddin komoometan
ddos onama no moy woy onama mandad tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays nokosaddoo no waa a mid ouhus
llog en sikandin nod doongon taman to waad tomanon
angan to riyon a pa to amasco duwon sokkad no gubernador no noiraom to kotungud ni arin retas
ddon gubernador id suhu rin iddos mgo sundau rin no od bantoy to sobbangan taddon bonuwa su amoy kod leggua a od omotton a nikandan
iru duwon mgo minuvu nid tavang koddi
d posakoy a nikandan to bukag no id tuntun dan ukit diyot bintana taddot motikang no aavat no binovallan pomot batu no nokolingkus taddon bonuwa deen nokopaahuy a
een pomon to koilangan en nod pobporoong a od ovayon ku ron baling ahad waa koruanon tadda
oungkay od itulon ku koniyu iddos id pokita tod ongaggon koddi no iling to mgo tohenoppon woy dos id posaddoo rin koddi
uwon id kilaa ku no sokkad no minuvu no id pomakoy ki isas rays
nin minuvu novatun diyot datas to langit
otomanan ini iddot sopuuoppat don no lahun kos mid lihad
aa saddoo ku ko id undiyon en iddos lawa rin o idda ra en so ispiritu rin
dda ra en so onama kos nokosaddoo tadda
iru nokosaddoo a no id batun sikandin diyot motoos no ingod to onama
d uliton ku tod oseng waa saddoo ku ko id undiyon en iddos lawa rin o idda ra en so ispiritu rin
dda ra en so onama kos nokosaddoo
utun norinog din iddos mgo mokososoobbun kahi no konnod kooseng to kinohiyan to minuvu woy id diiyan idda to onama no id ponudtuu riyot mgo minuvu
a ollog en nid pobporoong ku iddon minuvu no id pokitannan to onama to iling tadda piru konna a od pobporoong to kougolingun ku
yon ku id pobporoong idda ra en so koddin komoometan
had peen id kopii ku nod pobporoong taddot id pokita to onama koddi konna a od koongoo nod puung tadda oyyos bonnaa man kos id ikahi ku
iru od poonongonong a baling su amoy konnod lampas kos koddoong koddi to mgo minuvu
u iyon ku id kopii no iddos poomdom dan koddi od loppa ra taddot pinuungan no nokita ran woy taddot osengan ku no norinog dan
a pomon to konna id kopiit onama no od pobporoong a pomon taddot mgo mokososoobbu nid pokita rin koddi id aman sikandin nod poumannan a ni oivuyan to kosupittan iling to duhi no inaayun od posuppit koddi amoyd poobbava a
ootollu a mid nganoy riyon tod ongaggon nod owan din inin kosupittan
iru waa rin ini owaa ko konna id ikohiyan a nikandin to ddos koddin tavang inaayun ollog atag taddot langun no noukitan du su orayd kokita kos kotuusan ku riyot komoometan du
een pomon taddon tavak tod ongaggon konna a od ponayun nod nganoy no od owan din idda ko konna nahaa a taddot komoometan ku su amoy orayd kokita kos kotuusan ni isas rays dinit koddi
ni en kos unayan no ahad od koheddam ku kos komoometan ahad od poilawan a od poosayan od posupittan woy ahad diyot mokaaratarat no kotomanan od kahaa a oyyos atag ini ki isas rays
angun kaay od kotiis ku ukit kandin
u otid koheddam ku kos komoometan od monokkaa a pomon to od ponokkalon a nikandin
a ontongngi row
oongoo a nod pobporoong to kougolingun ku piru sikiyu meen kos unayan no nopohos a nod puung tadda
yyos sikiyu nanoy kos ollog nod pobporoong mokaatag koddi
u ahad waa koruanon ku piru konna moobbava kos kotungud ku kuntra taddot mgo minuvu no mowwet kun sikandan no apostoles
u nokita row man no mooggot a no apostoles pomon to mgo mokososoobbun pinuungan no id posivonnaa to kotuusan to onama
yyos id tiis ku en iddos kosupittan to kodpuung tadda laggun to ruwon a pa to koniyu
ndan man kos saa ku koniyu
ddos id puungan ku riyot dumon od lolivuung nod pompomakoy nokodiling da en taddot id puungan ku ruwot koniyu
yon ku ra waa nopuungi idda ra en so waa a mid bovuyu to tavang pomon koniyu su amoy dii kow od kovoggatan koddi
a otik idda man kos koddin saa posinsyai a nikiyu
oungkay nopanoy ad to ikootollun kodunduwon ku to koniyu
onna a rad en mandon od buyu to tavang koniyu amoy dii kowd kovoggatan
yyos konna man iddos koniyun koruwonnan kos od ingowollon ku ko konna sikiyu en
u nokoiling kow to mgo anak ku woy konna iddos mgo anak kos od uyag to inoy woy amoy ran ko konna iddos amoy woy inoy kos od uyag to mgo anak dan
d kahaai ku peen no id amin ku atag koniyu kos langun no rinit koddi woy ahad pa inis umuu ku otik ini en kos od pokotavang koniyu
d dokollan ku peen sikiyu to ginawa piru imman to id dorisok kos kodginawa row koddi
okosaddoo kow man no waa a en mid bovuyu to tavang koniyu
iru duwon poron duma koniyu nod ikahi no id ponoopi a ukit to kodaakaa ku koniyu
iru momonnu ku man idda od kopuungan
a tovaka row veen
u nokosaddoo kow en no waa a mid ponoopi koniyu ukit taddot mgo minuvu no id popiyod ku ruwon
d pounduwon ku to koniyu si ito woy id porumannan ku to sokkad no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
onna row en od kooseng no id luku kow ni ito amoyd ponoopi koniyu oyyos nokita rowd man no nokodiling no motallong kos konamin botasan woy dontulon
addook nopoomdom dow tapoy no id ikahi roy ini amoy id posaddoo koniyu no waa soyup nid puungan doy
iru konna idda kos dontulon doy
yya su inis langun nid ikahi roy koniyu id ikahi roy riyot isowwan to onama su nosokkad koyd man diyot ki isas rays
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod waa osson dontulon taddot langun no id puungan doy idda ra en so kodoggot to koniyun kopomakoy
d koipong a su saddoo moho kangkan kod inguma a ruwon od kokita ku no iddos botasan dow dii ku id kopii
oy ko ungketen od kokita row mandad kos botasan ku no dii row id kopii
d kovaakkan a no saddook od ingumannan ku sikiyu no od poopopuloy od posiisinay od poloolongottoy od poloolohoddoy od pouuusihoy od posoosoupottoy od poratasdatas woyd kosamuk
d koipong a mandad no otik od inguma ad duwon od koilawan a to onama pomon koniyu
addook od kaanu a ra en pomon to mouraa koniyu kos nosaa dangan no taman koungkay waa poron id sondit woy id tanan to molibmit no pinuungan dan iling to kodpouuunnay kodlaayuk to konna ran sawa woy waa kodtohoo nod puung to od pokoilowilow no pinuungan
a ini en kos ikootollun kodunduwon ku to koniyu
oikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no tik duwon od popenek to kasu koilangan no duwon oruwa o otollu nod posivonnaa tadda
ddot ikooruwon kodunduwon ku to koniyu id osengan kud iddos nokopuung to saa dangan woy dos duma koniyu ruwon no waa en od pokoolihu to kodpotullid ku
oy koungkay od uliton ku mandon idda tod oseng ahad waa a poron duwot koniyu
d puungan ku ini su id nangkap kow to posivonnaa ko iddos langun nid ponikahi ku id pomon been ki isas rays
d kosorollan dow iddos kovonnaan init kodunduwon ku woy od tuliddon ku iddos id puung to morat
yyos konna moomet si isas rays nod potullid koniyu ko konna id pokita rin kos kandin no kotuusan
u ahad iling to moomet sikandin diyot timpu no id pakpak sikandin diyon to krus piru nouyag sikandin pomon to kotuusan to onama
a iling ki isas rays imman tod moomet koy mandad piru nouyag koy iling kandin pomon to kotuusan to onama deen od kokita row iddos kandin no kotuusan diyot konami
onongnga row kos koniyun kougolingun ko bonnaavonnaa kos kopomakoy row o konna
aa row vo nosorolli no id ubpa man si isas rays diyot ginawa row
a otik wora iyon kohulugan no konna kow bonnaa nod pompomakoy
d kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no sikami kos mooggot no apostoles ni isas rays
d dasaa koy riyot onama no konna kow od puung to ahad ondan no morat
aa roy dosala ini amoy od kokita to mgo minuvu no id ikuu row iddos id nonaw roy koniyu
een ahad konna koy nikiyu od kilaannon no mgo apostoles ni isas rays tohondin su iyon doy id kopii no od puungan dow iddos moppiya
yyos konna koy od pokopuung to ahad ondan no od supak to bonnaan nonaw ko konna idda ra en so od pokotavang koniyu nod ikuu tadda
d kahaa koy ahad moomet koy riyot kodontong to mgo minuvu su imman to waa kotungud doy nod hukum koniyu
u iyon duwon dakkoon koruanon no mosalig kos kopomakoy row
oy od dasaa koy no od mosalig kow peen taman to worad id pokosawoy to kodikuu row kandin
urisu id sulat ku ini to waa a pa ruwon su amoy otid pokoinguma ad konnad koilangan no id pokita ku kos kotungud ku ukit to mosakit no osengan nod potullid koniyu
yya su id boggoy koddi tod ongaggon inin kotungud konna amoy od doraat to koniyun kopomakoy ko konna amoy od mosalig peen idda
a mgo suwod kaay ra en taman kos sulat ku
iyon to kotompusan od buyuwon ku no ooyyari row kos koniyun kodbovotasan
kula row iddos mgo pomandu ku koniyu
ubpa kow no moppiya kos koroniyan diyot duma
u otik ungketen kos od puungan dow inaayun od duma koniyu iddos onama no id pomonnan to ginawa woy kosunayan
okuukumustay kow no od pokita to kodpohinowannoy
ddos langun no minuvu to onama kaay id pongumusta koniyu
uopa no langun dow od pokotanggap to kopiyannoy tod ongaggon no si isas rays woy muopa no inaayun id pokita to onama iddos ginawa rin koniyu
oy muopa nod kosokkad kos ginawa row oyya su noiroomman kowd man to his no spiritu
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay atag koniyu no od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy ruwot mgo bonuwa no sakup to prubinsya to alacia
iyak woy dos langun no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy kaay id pouma to kodpongumusta koniyu
d posampot ku koniyu no inis kotundanan ku no apostoles konna minuvu kos id aam woy mid suhu koddi ko konna si isas rays en woy dos onamon moy no id badnow kandin pomon diyot kopotayan
uopa nod kotanggap dow iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays no id boggoy to kandin no umuu amoyd koposinsyan kos mgo saa ta
d puungan ni isas rays ini oyyos id kopii to onamon moy no od pokolegguang ki pomon diyot kororattan no id hari koungkay rinit ampowt ingod
d doongon ta kos onama taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
go suwod nosoobbuwan a moho oraroy koniyu su goos kow id inoyyug to onama no id aam koniyu ukit to kopiyannoy ni isas rays
d pomakoy kow kun to osson nonaw no kunan dow ko moppiyon dinoggan
yon bonnaa waa osson oppiyon inoggan ko konna idda ra en so id ponudtuu ku koniyu mokaatag ki isas rays
iru duwon mgo minuvu nid unduwon to koniyu no id ponudtuu to osson nonaw su id kopii ran nod bovaawan iddos oppiyon inoggan
omon tadda nongotaong kow
iru poomdomma row ini
tik duwon od ponudtuu koniyu to ossa pa taddot oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku koniyu ahad ponolihan peen sikandin pomon diyot datas to langit o sikami vo od pokosahap en taddot lampas no silut to onama
d ikahi royd dangan ini koniyu piru od uliton ku mandon no otik duwon od ponudtuu koniyu to ossa pa taddot oppiyon inoggan no notanggap dow pomon konami od pokosahap en taddot lampas no silut to onama
o kowd popoomdom no iyon dontulon kaayt koddin osengan no id kopii ku nod koroong a to mgo minuvu su iyon ku id kopii no od koroong a to onama
yya su otik idda pa so koddoong to minuvu kos od ingowollon ku konna a en mooggot no uripon ni isas rays
go suwod id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no iddos oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku koniyu waa idda bobbovalli to minuvu
aa ku mandad idda notanggap pomon diyot mgo minuvu woy waa id nonaw koddi tadda ko konna si isas rays da en kos id posaddoo koddi
orinog dow iddos kodbovotasan ku dangan to oraroy a pa nid ikuu to pomokayon to mgo udio
u iddos od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama id posupittan ku no waad en ahad disok no eru ku kandan woy id noonokkalan ku no waa sokkad nod kosama riyot kodpomakoy ki isas rays
tik mokaatag to kodikuu to pomokayon to mgo udio waa od pokotoppong koddi to langun no iling to idad ku
yyos oraroy a no mohiod nod ikuu taddot botasanon to kovuyyahan doy
iru id pokita to onama kos kopiyannoy rin koddi oyya su iddot waa a pa id tobbow id ossa ad tapoy nikandin woy id aam nod kovovallan no uripon din
oy id inguma kos timpu no id pokita to onama koddi iddos nak din no si isas rays su amoy id pokoponudtuu ku iddos oppiyon inoggan diyot konna mgo udio
ddon timpu waa a mid porani to ahad ondoy amoyd buyu to mgo pomandu
aa a mandad id undiyon to erusalem amoyd buyu to mgo pomandu taddot mgo apostoles no unna pa koddi ko konna id tollus a riyot ingod to rabia woy kopongnga tadda id livod a riyot bonuwa to amasco
o id lihad kos otollun lahun idda pa id undiyon a to erusalem amoyd lowwi ki edro
a id oubpa a rutun duma kandin to mgo oruwon simana
o iddon timpu waa dumon apostoles no nokita ku ko konna si edro ra en woy si antiago no suwod tod ongaggon
onnaa en inis id sulat ku woy nokosaddoo kos onama no waa a mid ouhus
omon diyot erusalem id undiyon a to prubinsya to iria woy ilicia
ddon timpu waa a poron nokilaa taddot od ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy ki isas rays no id ponubpa riyot prubinsya to udea
yon dan da nosorollan mokaatag koddi idda ra en so od osengon to duma no ddos minuvu nid posuppit keta dangan koungkay id nonaw ron mokaatag to kopomakoy no id noonokkalan din dangan tid doraat
een id doong dan kos onama pomon to id lammi a nikandin
a to id lihad kos sopuuoppat no lahun id livod a mandon diyot erusalem
ddos duma ku si ernabe woy id poruma ku mandad si ito
d livod a rutun su id pokita to onama koddi no koilangan en nod undiyon a to erusalem
o kodinguma roy id lolivuung koy duma taddot novantug no mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy no siksikami ra
d paabbotlabbot ku kandan iddos oppiyon inoggan no noponudtuu kud diyot konna mgo udio
d puungan ku idda amoy od kosorollan taddot mgo ponguu no ollog kos id nonaw ku oyyos dii a od kopiyan no waa koruanon taddot kodoiluggat ku dangan woy koungkay
iru waa kodsawoy ran taddot id ikahi ku su iddos duma ku no si ito ahad konna sikandin udio waa ran man sikandin pohosa nod potupu ahad pa duwon dumon udio rutun nod ikahi no koilangan en sikandin nod puung tadda
ddon mgo minuvu id pouvaguvag no mopompomakoy no id ollos nid lonug to konamin kolivuungan su amoy od poniid ko id tuman ki taddot mgo uhu ni oises
yyos id kopii ran no od ponoyunon ki to koduripon ukit to kodtuman ta taddon mgo uhu ahad duwon don kolegguangan ta pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays
iru waa koy ron en moho id dumoruma taddot id kopii ran su amoy od ponayun kow nod pomakoy taddot bonnaan nonaw no idda en so oppiyon inoggan
oy dos novantug no mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy waa id pokosawoy ran taddot id nonaw ku
had ondan kos kotundanan dan piru immat waa ron moho idda riyot koddi oyyos nosorollan ku no waa en od podmusingon to onama ora id pokosawoy ran taddot nonaw ku oyyos nokaabbot don sikandan no id solihan a to onama to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot konna mgo udio iling taddot kodsalig din ki edro to kodponudtuu tadda riyot mgo udio
u iddos onama no id boggoy to kogahan ki edro to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot mgo udio sikandin en mandad kos id boggoy koddi to kogahan to kodponudtuu tadda riyot konna mgo udio
een si antiago si edro woy si uan no novantug no mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy riyot erusalem to noovottan dan no id solihan a to onama kaayn pinuungan siyak woy si ernabe id tanggap koy nikandan no mgo duma ran diyot kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
a nopuhawang doyd no od ponayun to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot konna mgo udio woy sikandan mandad kos diyot mgo udio
yon da id buyu ran konami no konna roy od kolingawan tod tavang iddos mgo worowora nod pompomakoy riyot erusalem woy tapoy ron ini riyot ginawa ku nod puungan
a waa nouhoy pomon tadda id lowwi si edro konami riyot bonuwa to ntioquia
okkad no allow id sugga ku sikandin oyyos duwon soyup nid puungan din
u iling kaay kos notomanan
o lammi pa id inguma si edro ollog kos id puungan din su id lommung sikandin nid kaan duma to konna mgo udio nod pompomakoy
iru to id inguma iddos mgo udio no id popiyod ni antiago id poriyu ron moho si edro taddot konna mgo udio woy worad id lommung kandan nid kaan
yyos od kovaakkan sikandin kod sowayon taddot mgo udio nod pompomakoy no dii en od lommung nod kaan duma to konna mgo udio no diid potupu
a iddos dumon mgo udio nod pompomakoy riyot ntioquia id iling don mandad taddot id puungan ni edro ahad nokosaddoo ran no konna soyup kos kodkaan duma to konna mgo udio
oy ahad si ernabe nopiyod don en mandad
o nosorollan ku no iddos id puungan dan nokosuwoy to bonnaan nonaw no idda en so oppiyon inoggan id sugga ku si edro riyot isowwan to langun kahi ku to d kosoobbuwan a moho kikow edro
udio ka man nanoy piru waa ru ikula iddos dumon botasanon ta no imman kad to konna udio
een mambo man tod pohoson du kos konna mgo udio no od ikuu to botasanon ta no mgo udio
a id osengan ku mandad sikandan langun kahi ku to ominuvu koy no mgo udio woy ossa koy taddot konna mgo udio no od ikohiyon doy dangan no mgo mosaasaa oyyos dii ran od tuman to mgo uhu ni oises
iru koungkay nosorollan doyd no id podmotallong to onama kos minuvu konna ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises ko konna ukit to kopomakoy ki isas rays
een sikami mandad no mgo udio id pomakoy koy kandin su amoy od komotallong koy riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kopomakoy ki isas
yyos waa en minuvu nod komotallong ukit to kodtuman taddon mgo uhu
a sikami no mgo udio id pomakoy ki isas rays amoyd komotallong diyot kodontong to onama
iru otid ngoranan koy to dumon mgo udio no sikami mgo mosaasaa pomon to waa koy id ikuu taddot konamin botasanon iyon bo kohulugan tadda no si isas rays kos id inuruk keta nod puung to saa
onna en
iru otid livoddon ku mandon to kodtuman iddos mgo uhu nid tonanan kud na nokosaa a en
angan oraroy a nid oiluggat to kodtuman taddon mgo uhu piru koungkay noovottan kud no konna a od komotallong ukit to kodtuman tadda
een id inoyyuhan kud idda su amoy iyon kud od tumanon iddos id kopiit onama
omon to kopomakoy ku ki isas rays timbang id pakpak a duma kandin diyon to krus
oy koungkay timbang id patoy ad piru nouyag a mandon oyyos si isas rays don kos id ubpa rinit koddi
aggun tid oubpa a kaay to ampowt ingod od ponayun a nod pomakoy riyot nak to onama no id ginawa koddi woy id boggoy to umuu rin atag koddi
onna ku en od inoyyuhan kos kopiyannoy to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu
u otid komotallong pa nanoy kos sokkad no minuvu riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu na waa en koruanon taddot kopotayan ni isas rays
uu koniyu no mgo toho alacia
aa mgo utok dow
ambo moho tid pominog kow taddot mgo minuvu nod aakaa koniyu no koilangan en no od tumanon dow iddos mgo uhu ni oises
u id ooyyaran kud man nanoy tid paabbotlabbot koniyu iddos mokaatag to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus
a od intud a koniyu ukit bo taddot kodtuman dow to mgo uhu no nokotanggap kow to his no spiritu
aa en
u id tanggap dow iddos his no spiritu ukit to kodpominog woy kodpomakoy row to oppiyon inoggan
go bangog kow en
d tigkonayan dow kos koniyun kopomakoy ukit to tavang to spiritu to onama
een koungkay mambo man tod oiluggat kow nod tuman to mgo uhu ni oises amoy od komotallong kow riyot kodontong to onama
ndan waa vo koruanon taddot langun no noukitan dow pomon to koniyun kopomakoy ki isas rays
uwon en koruanon tadda
os onama id boggoy koniyu to his no spiritu woy id puung to mgo mokososoobbu riyot koniyu konna pomon to kodtuman dow to mgo uhu ni oises ko konna pomon to id pominog woy mid pomakoy kow taddot oppiyon inoggan
oomdomma row man si braham
u iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d pomakoy sikandin to onama deen id podmotallong din sikandin
urisu kaay ta en pantok od koovottan no iddos ahad ondoy nod pomakoy to onama od kongoranan no bonnaan koubbaran ni braham
oy pomon poron dangan nopuhawang don to onama no od komotallong diyot kodontong din iddos konna mgo udio ukit to kandan no kopomakoy
yya su ini en kos oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu rin tapoy ki braham
ahi rin to kit kikow id pokita ku kos koddin kopiyannoy riyot langun no tribu kaay to ampowt ingod
een od pokita kos onama to kopiyannoy rin diyot ahad ondoy nod pomakoy kandin iling taddot kodpokita rin to kopiyannoy ki braham
iru iddos langun no minuvu no iyon dan od solihan iddos kodtuman to mgo uhu noiraom da en baling sikandan to kodsilut din
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d silutan en to onama iddos ahad ondoy no diid pokotuman to langun no uhu no id sulat ni oises
a kaay ta en pantok od koovottan no waa minuvu nod komotallong diyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no kit to kopomakoy od komotallong kos minuvu riyot kodontong to onama woy duwon umuun waad tomanon
iru otik duwon pa nanoy minuvu nod pokotuman to langun no uhu konnad koilangan nod pomakoy sikandin amoyd kotanggap din kos uumu waad tomanon
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ddos minuvu nod tuman to langun no uhu od pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
a pomon to dii ta meen od kogaha tod tuman kos langun no uhu ollog en nod silutan ki
iru solamat su id tobbus ki ni isas rays ukit to kodsuvaa rin keta taddot silut no atag nanoy keta
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos ahad ondoy nid pakpak diyon to krus id pokita no id silutan en sikandin to onama
kit to kopotayan ni isas rays id pokita to onama kos kopiyannoy rin ahad diyot konna mgo udio iling taddot id tandu rin ki braham
oy pomon tadda ukit to keton kopomakoy od kotanggap ta iddos his no spiritu no id tandu to onama
go suwod duwon ponunggelengan ku koniyu
tik duwon kodpotonduwoy to oruwon minuvu no id posivonnalan dan ukit to kodperma dii ron en idda od podworannon to ahad ondoy woy konnad mandad od kovovaawan
a iling mandad tadda kos mgo tandu to onama ki braham woy riyot lubbad din
aa noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no koubbaran du no iddos kohulugan mouraan lubbad ko konna noikahi no lubbad du
os kohulugan tadda sokkad da no lubbad no idda en si isas rays
yon kohulugan ku duwon id tandu to onama ki braham woy tapoy rin don posivonnali iddon tandu
oy id boggoy idda to onama to waa poron id inguma iddos mgo uhu oyya su oppat no gatus woy otollumpuun  lahun kos mid lihad idda pa id posulat to onama ki oises iddos mgo uhu
iru ahad duwon don iddon mgo uhu waa en nowora kos tandu rin ki braham woy notuman en idda
u otid kotanggap ta pa nanoy iddos kopiyannoy to onama ukit to keton kodtuman to mgo uhu na waa koruanon taddot tandu to onama
iru iddos notanggap ni braham id boggoy idda to onama pomon to id tandu rin en idda
a ko ungketen ondak koruanon to kodboggoy to onama taddot mgo uhu ni oises
d boggoy idda to onama idda amoy od pokosaddoo kos mgo minuvu no mosaasaa sikandan
iru taman da idda to kodinguma taddot lubbad ni braham no si isas no id tonduwan to onama
d suhu to onama iddos mgo ponolihan din no od boggoy taddon mgo uhu riyot ki oises no tohodpotongnga nod ponudtuu tadda riyot mgo udio
iru iddos tandu konna iling taddon poukit

u otik duwon pa nanoy mgo uhu no od pokovoggoy keta to umuun waad tomanon od komotallong ki nanoy riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman tadda

een iyon da od pokotanggap taddot tandu rin idda ra en so minuvu nod pomakoy ki isas rays
angan to waa ki pa id pomakoy ki isas rays timbang noprisu ki woy id tomongngan to mgo uhu ni oises taman tid poleggua ki ukit to kodinguma ni isas no id pomokayan ta
ddos mgo uhu nokoiling mandad to tohodpotuntuu keta taman to kodinguma ni isas rays amoy od komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama ukit to keton kopomakoy

a mgo suwod ukit to kopomakoy row ki isas rays nosokkad kowd diyot kandin woy langun dow mgo anak don to onama
u langun dow no noboutismuwan don kilaannan no nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays no iling sikandin to umpak no id sukub dow oyyos od kokita riyot koniyu iddos kandin no kodbovotasan

oy pomon to mgo sakup kowd nikandin timbang mgo lubbad kowd ni braham woy od kotanggap dow en mandad iddos langun nid tandu to onama kandin
a duwon pa osson ponunggelengan mokaatag taddot id ikahi ku
uwon sokkad no anak no id tuwossan to amoy rin to langun no korotuwan piru konna pa ongngad kos idad din
een ahad sikandin kos id pongomunoy taddot langun no korotuwan nokoiling da sikandin to uripon
yya su noiraom poron sikandin taddot od okudi kandin woy taddot id solihan to korotuwan din taman to od inguma iddos timpu nid puhawang to amoy rin no duwon don kogahan din nod okudi tadda
a dangan to waa ki pa mid pomakoy od pokoiling ki en mandad taddon anak su nouripon ki poron taddot mgo nonaw to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
iru to id inguma ron iddos ollog no timpu no tapoy id puhawang to onama id poundini rin kos kandin no nak
ominuvu sikandin woy noiraom to kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises su amoy od pokolegguang ki pomon to koduripon to mgo uhu woy amoy od kovovallan ki no mgo anak din
a su mgo anak kowd man to onama id popiyod din iddos spiritu to kandin no nak su amoy id poubpa rin diyot ginawa row
oy pomon to kaay ron sikandin to ginawa ta od pokoumow kid to onama no moy ku
urisu konna kowd mgo uripon ko konna mgo anak kowd to onama
oy pomon to mgo anak kowd man nikandin od kokomunoy rowd iddos langun no id panoy rin atag koniyu
angan to waa kow pa nokokilaa to onama nouripon kow to konna bonnaan mgo monama
iru koungkay su nokokilaa kowd man to onama no unnon id kilaa koniyu mambo man to id kopii row pa nod livoddan iddos mgo pomokayon kaay to ampowt ingod no waa kotuusan woy waa koruanon
yon dow ayu id kopii no od pouripon mandon tadda
d oseng ku ini su oraroy kow nod ikuu to botasanon to mgo udio mokaatag to mgo allow mgo buwan mgo lahun woy nokodossoosson timpu no duwon koruanon atag kandan
akkoo kos laggow ku su saddook iddos langun no kodoiluggat ku atag koniyu od undag to waa koruanon

raroy kow man nanoy nod kahaa dangan to nokodduma ki pa piru nomonnu kowd man koungkay

h mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy no id dokollan ku to ginawa

os sokkad anak din taddot uripon din no si gar
a idda mandad so sokkad anak din taddot sawa rin no konna uripon
os anak din taddot uripon id tobbow ukit da to puhawang to minuvu
iru iddos anak taddot sawa rin no konna uripon id tobbow ukit en to puhawang to onama no id tandu rin ki braham
nis oruwon baay no si gar woy si ara id ponunggelengan ku to oruwon kodpotonduwoy to onama riyot mgo minuvu
i gar nokoiling taddot kodpotonduwoy to onama iddot timpu no id boggoy rin kos mgo uhu riyot buvungan to inai woy dos langun no minuvu no noiraom taddon mgo uhu nokoiling sikandan to mgo uripon iling ki gar woy taddot anak din
i gar nokoiling mandad taddot buvungan to inai no riyot rabia woy nokoiling mandad sikandin to erusalem
yya su iddos mgo minuvu to erusalem nouripon to mgo uhu

imbang inoy ta sikandin oyyos nokolegguang kid man pomon diyot koduripon to mgo uhu ni oises
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ikkow baay no diid pokoanak kahaa ka
had waa ka poron nokovaya nid sokalan pehes ka to kahaan
u ahad id tonanan ka to sawa ru od livoddan ka nikandin woy lampas pa no mouraa kos anak du taddot baay no waa tonanit sawa
a mgo suwod siketa nod pompomakoy nokoiling ki taddot anak ni ara no si saac no id tobbow ukit to kodtuman taddot tandu to onama ki braham
o iddon timpu iddos anak no id tobbow ukit da to puhawang to minuvu id posupittan din iddos ari rin no si saac no id tobbow ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
a ungketen dad en mandad keta koungkay od posupittan ki taddot mgo minuvu no nouripon to mgo uhu
iru ondan kos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama

urisu mgo suwod konna kid mgo anak taddot baay no uripon ko konna mgo anak kid taddot baay no konna uripon oyyos duwon kolegguangan ta pomon diyot mgo uhu ni oises
a id polegguang ki ni isas rays amoy dii kid od kouripon to kodtuman taddot mgo uhu ni oises

antoy kow taddon mgo minuvu nod posuwoy koniyu su iddos nonaw ran no konna bonnaa nokoiling taddot disok da no potuvu no id bukbuk diyot horina nod bovallan no paan no od pokoposoob en tadda langun

a mokaatag taddot mgo minuvu no id taong koniyu od kosahapan dan en kos silut to onama ahad ondoy peen sikandan
go suwod duwon mgo minuvu nid ikahi no id ponayun a kun id nonaw no koilangan ki od potupu amoy od komotallong ki riyot kodontong to onama
iru yo kowd pomakoy tadda su otik bonnaa pa idda mambot ponayun poron kos kodposuppit to mgo udio koddi

a sikiyu mgo suwod id aam kow to onama amoy duwon kolegguangan dow

yon moppiya nod puungan potovangoy kow ukit to kodpohinowannoy
u iddos langun no uhu ni oises nosokkad da kaayt nonaw no mid ungketen to inowanniyu kos duma iling to kodginawa ru to kikown kougolingun

oomok nod kokilaa iddos pinuungan to mgo minuvu no od dumoruma to morat nid kopii to lawa iling to kodaalig molibmit no poomdom mokoilowilow no pinuungan kodsimba to konna bonnaan mgo monama kodlaambus kodpoimimotayoy kodpoopopuloy kodpongolikud kodpolongottoy kodporatasdatas kodpoooossay kodposiisinay kodhubughubug lampas no kahaan no waa kodtohoo to morat no ingowollon to lawa woy duma pon morat no pinuungan

a otid puungan ta ini dii ki en od pokolempas to suhu to onama

a su id boggayan kid man to his no spiritu to lammin umuu koilangan mandad no sikandin kos od potuntuu keta riyot langun nod puungan ta

u otid puungan dow ini od kotuman dow iddos suhu ni isas rays
tik duwon minuvu no diid tavang su kunan din ko moppiya pa sikandin to duma id okalan din kos kougolingun din
yon moppiya no ipat sokkad keta od anonganong to keton pinuungan ko moppiya vo o morat
a otik moppiya kos pinuungan ta od kahaa ki piru dii ta od podilingon iddos nopuungan ta taddot nopuungan to duma
yya su ipat sokkad keta koilangan nod isau to kougolingun no pinuungan ta

aa en minuvu nod pokoaakaa to onama
u otik ondan kos id pomuwa to minuvu idda en mandad kos od kottuwon din
u iddos minuvu no iyon din id pomuwa iddos morat nid kopii to lawa rin od kokottu rin en iddos kopotayan no waad tomanon

yyos waa koruanon ko notupuwan kos minuvu o wora
yon duwon dakkoo kos koruanon iddos id lammi kid to onama

iyak si ablo novovallan a no apostoles ni isas rays ukit to id kopiit onama

d puungan din ini amoy od doongon woyd posivontuhan ta sikandin

een inaayun a od posolamat diyon to onama atag koniyu woy inaayun ku sikiyu od opilon diyot koddin dosalon
d dasaa a riyot od posivontuhon no onama no moy ta woy onama mandad tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays no od tovangan kow to his no spiritu
ikandin kos od boggoy koniyu to moraom no koovottan mokaatag to onama amoyd kokilaa row peen sikandin
d dasaa a mandad no od kopokes kos koniyun poomdom su amoy od koovottan dow kos koimmanan no idda en kos unayan no id aam kow to onama amoyd kovovallan no mgo anak din
d kopii ku nod koovottan dow mandad iddos lampas no kopiyannan no id tandu rin atag keta no mgo minuvu rin
oy id dasaa a nod koovottan dow iddos waa toppong no kotuusan to onama no od tavang dinit keta nod pompomakoy
ni en no kotuusan kos id badnow ki isas rays pomon diyot kopotayan woy id pounsad kandin lomig to kowanan din diyot datas to langit
utun si isas rays kos lampas to langun no hari taddot duwon mgo kotungud woy taddot duwon kotuusan ahad iddos diid kokita no duwon mgo kotungud
aa en od pokolampas kandin konna ra koungkayn mgo timpu ko konna ahad init od inguma pa
d poiraom to onama kos langun diyot kotungud ni isas rays woy id aam sikandin no timbang uu to langun nod pompomakoy
a iddos langun nid pomakoy kandin kos timbang lawa rin
iyot kandan nosokkad iddos langun no botasanon woy koovottan ni isas rays
oy ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod woy riyot datas to langit diyon en sikandin
angan to waa kow pa mid pomakoy timbang id patoy kowd diyot kodontong to onama pomon to mgo saa row
yon dow id ikuu iddos morat no kodbovotasan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
d dumoruma kow ki oivuyan no ponguu to mgo busow woy sikandin mandad kos id ponguu taddot mgo minuvu no id supak to onama
iketa langun nokoiling kandan dangan su iyon id duurumannan ta iddos morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa woy poomdom ta
een waa koossan ta taddot mgo minuvu no ollog nod silutan pomon to langot to onama
iru ahad iling tadda orayn eeruwon kos onama woy id dokollan ki nikandin to ginawa
u ahad timbang id patoy kid diyot kodontong din pomon to mgo saa ta id uyag ki nikandin duma ki isas rays
kit da en to kopiyannoy to onama notobbus ki
oy pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays timbang id badnow ki duma kandin woy id hari ki duma kandin diyot datas to langit
d puungan idda to onama su amoy riyot od inguma pon mgo allow id pokita rin keta iddos waa toppong no kopiyannoy woy eru rin ukit ki isas rays
a pomon to waa toppong no kopiyannoy to onama notobbus ki ukit to kopomakoy ta
onna ini pomon to keton pinuungan ko konna gasa to onama keta
urisu waa en od pokopobporoong no od kotobbus sikandin ukit to moppiyon pinuungan
u iddos onama ra en kos id lammi keta ukit to kodsokkad ta ki isas rays amoy od puungan ta iddos moppiya no tapoy rin id puhawang nid popuungan keta
a sikiyu no konna mgo udio poomdomma row ko ondan kow dangan to waa kow pa mid pomakoy ki isas rays
d poddisokkan kow to kodontong to mgo udio su konna kow od potupu
ikandan kun kos bonnaan mgo minuvu to onama su mid ikuu ran to botasanon to kodpotupu
iru iddon botasanon pinuungan to minuvu riyon da to lawa
oomdomma row mandad no dangan waa en koroniyan dow ki isas rays woy waa kow naapii to koubbaran ni srael no id aam to onama no mgo minuvu rin
aa kow mandad naapii taddot tandu to onama duma kandan
een id oubpa kow kaay to ampowt ingod no waa od koongatan woy waa kow id kilaa to onama
iru pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays ahad moriyu kow dangan to onama koungkay morani ron ukit to longossa rin no id tihis diyon to krus
angan sikami no mgo udio woy sikiyu no konna mgo udio oraroy ki nod pokodsupak
iru koungkay si isas rays kos id poduli to koroniyan ta woy id podsokkad kid nikandin
yya su ukit to kopotayan din diyon to krus id gobba rin iddos morat no ginawa no idda en kos allang no nokopoddiyu keta
os allang no id gobba rin idda en so kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises apii iddos mgo suhu mokaatag to botasanon to mgo udio
d puungan idda ni isas rays su amoy sikami no mgo udio woy sikiyu no konna mgo udio od kosokkad ukit to kodsokkad ta riyot kandin timbang sokkad no lawa
oy ukit tadda nokoduli ron kos keton koroniyan
oy pomon to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus id poduli rin kos koroniyan to mgo udio woy konna mgo udio riyon to onama timbang sokkad no lawa
kit tadda id gobba rin don iddos morat no ginawa ta
id undini si isas rays amoy od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan no od poduli to koroniyan ta riyon to onama
d ponudtuu rin idda koniyu no konna mgo udio no moriyu dangan to onama woy riyon mandad to konami no mgo udio no morani kandin
a siketa langun mgo udio woy konna mgo udio notovangan ki to sokkad da en no his no spiritu su amoy od pokoporani ki to onamon moy ukit taddot id puungan ni isas rays
een sikiyu no konna mgo udio konna kowd mgo moholiyug ko konna mohingod kowd no duma to mgo minuvu to onama no id aam din tapoy woy naapii kowd diyot mgo anak to onama
iketa nod pompomakoy nokoiling ki to baoy
a iddos mgo apostoles woy dos mgo propeta kos mgo tuddok woy dos batu no pounsaran kaayn baoy idda en si isas rays
kit kandin novagkos iddos langun no sakup diyot baoy amoy od mosalig taman tod kopoohinat don no templo atag tod ongaggon
oy pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays naapii kowd mandad taddot langun nod pompomakoy no timbang id podubpuubpu amoy od kopoohinat no baoy nod ubpan to onama ukit to spiritu rin
a ini en kos unayan no id apii ku sikiyu to koddin dosalon
iyak si ablo noprisu pomon to kodponudtuu mokaatag ki isas rays atag koniyu no konna mgo udio
okorinog kowd man no ukit to waa toppong no kopiyannoy to onama id salig din koddi inis pinuungan to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan woy inin pinuungan atag en to kopiyannan dow
u inin puhawang to onama no waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan id posaddoo rin don koddi koungkay
okosulat ad to moobbava mokaatag kaay
oy otid bosan dow ini od kosorollan dow iddos koddin noovottan taddon puhawang to onama mokaatag ki isas rays
angan waa id posaddoo to onama riyot mgo minuvu iddon puhawang din
iru koungkay id posaddoo ron idda to spiritu to onama riyot id aam din no mgo apostoles woy mgo propeta
yon puhawang to onama no id posaddoo rin konami no ukit to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays sikiyu no konna mgo udio od kolonug kow taddot kopiyannoy to onama no id pokita rin konami no mgo udio
een mgo sakup kowd taddot lawa ni isas rays no idda en so od pompomakoy
oy od kolonug kowd mandad taddot tandu to onama no id boggoy rin to langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
omon to waa toppong no kopiyannoy to onama rinit koddi woy ukit to kandin no kotuusan id solihan a nikandin to pinuungan no idda en so kodponudtuu taddon oppiyon inoggan
iyak moobbava a to langun diyot mgo minuvu to onama piru ahad iling tadda id pokita rin iddos kandin no kopiyannoy ukit to kodboggoy rin koddi to pinuungan no od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan diyot konna mgo udio mokaatag taddot waa toppong no kopiyannoy ni isas rays
oy id popiyod a nikandin su amoy id paabbotlabbot ku riyot langun no minuvu iddos kodtuman to onama taddot puhawang din
yya su iddos onama no mid bovaa to langun waa rin ini id posaddoo pomon poron to tigkonayan su amoy id posaddoo ini ukit keta no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
u otik iddos duwon mgo kotuusan woy duwon mgo kotungud no id ponubpa riyot kooowayan woy kaay to ampowt ingod od kokita iddos kodtuman to puhawang din od kosorollan dan iddos moraom no koovottan to onama riyot nokodossoosson poukit
apoy ron ini nopuhawang to onama pomon poron to tigkonayan woy notuman ini ukit to kodpopiyod din ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays woy pomon to id pomakoy kid kandin konna kid od kaaangaang nod porani to onama oyyos duwon don kodsalig ta no od pominoggon din kos keton dosalon
urisu od buyuwon ku koniyu no yo kowd kotompoddi to puhawang pomot koosayan no noukitan ku pomon to kodponudtuu ku koniyu to oppiyon inoggan diyot koniyu oyyos atag idda to kopiyannan dow
a otid popoomdom a taddot puhawang to onama od lingkood a riyot isowwan to onamon moy ta
d ngoranan sikandin no moy oyyos sikandin kos id pomonnan to nokodossoosson tribu kaay to ampowt ingod woy taddot mgo ponolihan diyot datas to langit
d dasaa a no pomon taddot waa toppong no kopiyannoy woy kotuusan din od ponokkalon din kos ginawa row ukit to spiritu rin
oy od dasaa a no od oubpa si isas rays duwot koniyun ginawa ukit to kopomakoy row kandin woy od doralig peen kos kodginawa row atag to onama woy riyot duma
d dasaa a mandad no sikiyu duma taddot langun no minuvu to onama od kosorollan dow iddos lampas woy waa toppong no kodginawa ni isas rays atag keta
had konna row orayd koovottan iddos kodginawa ni isas rays piru od dasaa a nod koponnu kow to koovottan amoy od pokoloppa kos koniyun kodbovotasan to langun no botasanon to onama
d doongon ta iddos onamon motuus to langun su od pokopuung sikandin dinit keta to lampas peen taddot od buyuwon woyd kopoomdomman ta
angun ta no od lolivuung nod pompomakoy od doongon ta iddos onama pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays
d doongon ta en sikandin taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
een siyak no noprisu pomon to kodponudtuu mokaatag tod ongaggon od buyuwon ku koniyu no iddos kodbovotasan dow od loppa to id kopiit onama oyya su id aam kow nikandin no od kovovallan no mgo anak din
oilangan nod poobbava kow inaayun id pokita row no mosunay kow woy poowetta row kos koniyun posinsya
oilangan mandad no duwon kodtiis dow riyon to ipat sokkad pomon to koniyun kodpohinowannoy
oonokkali row nod ponayun kos koniyun kodposokaddoy no id boggoy to his no spiritu ukit to moppiyon koroniyan dow
yya su langun ta nod pompomakoy timbang sokkad ki ra no lawa sokkad da no spiritu to onama kos mid ubpa rinit keta woy sokkad da kos koimmanan ta pomon to id aam ki to onama
okkad da kos od ongaggon sokkad da no kopomakoy woy sokkad da kos boutismu
uwon sokkad da en no onama woy sikandin kos moy ta
ikandin kos od hari keta langun woy id puung ukit keta langun amoyd kotuman kos id kopii rin woy mid ubpa sikandin dinit keta langun
iru ahad sokkad ki ra no lawa duwon nokodossoosson kogahan no id boggoy ni isas rays diyon to ipat sokkad keta ukit to kandin nid kopii
u iling taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no o id batun sikandin diyot datas to langit id piyod din iddos mouraan notalu rin woyduwon id pomboggoy rin diyot mgo minuvu rin
a ondan man kos kohulugan taddot osengan no d batun sikandin
yon kohulugan tadda no unna pa sikandin od ponog kaay to ampowt ingod
oy sikandin no mid ponog kaayt ingod id batun mandad diyot datas to langit su amoy ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod woy riyot datas to langit sikandin kos od ponguu to langun
uwon mandad mgo kogahan no id boggoy rin diyot mgo minuvu rin
os duma id bovallan din no mgo apostoles dos duma mgo propeta dos duma tohodposoob to oppiyon inoggan dos duma mgo pastor woy mgo tohodnonaw tod pompomakoy
d puungan din ini amoy iddos langun no minuvu to onama od kononawwan woy od kopanoy nod puung atag kandin woy atag to duma su amoy siketa langun no timbang lawa ni isas rays od mosalig peen diyon to kopomakoy
kit kaay od pokodsokkad ki riyot kopomakoy woy sinorollan mokaatag ki isas rays no nak to onama taman tod buyyag kid diyot kopomakoy woy dos kodbovotasan ta od pokoiling don to langun no kodbovotasan ni isas rays
a ko ungketen dii kid od pokoiling to anak no moomok nod kopiyod kos poomdom su konna kid od kopiyod to ahad ondan no nonaw to mgo minuvu no mopandoy nod aakaa
yya su iddos minuvu no konna mosalig kos kopomakoy nokoiling to bollangay no od kopiyodpiyod ahad ingkon od poisau iddos mgo baud woy kaamag
iru siketa diyot ahad ondan nod osgenon woyd puungan ta koilangan nod ikulon ta kos bonnaan nonaw duma to kodginawa
tid puungan ta ini od mosalig peen kos keton kopomakoy su iddos langun no kodbovotasan woy kodpopoomdom ta od pokoiling don ki isas rays no timbang uu ta
omon tadda sikandin en kos od pomandu keta no timbang lawa rin
tid ponunggelengan ta kos lawa to minuvu nokodubpuubpu kos langun no sakup tadda
oy otid puung dos ipat sakup to lawa taddot id popuungan kandan od mosalig en iddon lawa
a iling mandad tadda otik iddos ipat sokkad keta no timbang sakup to lawa ni isas rays od puung taddot id popuungan din keta od monokkaa woyd mosalig kos kopomakoy ta ukit to keton kodpohinowannoy
een duwon suhu ku koniyu no id poikahi tod ongaggon koddi
o kowd ikuu to kodbovotasan to mgo minuvu no waa onama oyyos waa koruanon taddot kodpopoomdom dan
okoiling to mosukirom kos poomdom dan woy nokoporiyu ran taddot umuu nid boggoy to onama oyyos waa en sinorollan dan pomon to motoggas kos uu ran
omon to dii ron sikandan od geddam to ilow iyon dan da en od puungan iddos morat no ingowollon to lawa woy dii ran od kotoholan dos kodpuung to ahad ondan no molibmit no pinuungan
iru sikiyu konna iling tadda kos nopohinonawwan dow mokaatag ki isas rays
yya su iyon norinog dow iddot lammi kow pa mid pomakoy idda en so bonnaan nonaw mokaatag kandin
d nonawwan kowd no od owan dow iddos tapoyn kodbovotasan iling taddot kodlusut to molibmit no umpak
u iddos kodpuung to morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa row idda en kos od pokoaakaa woyd pokodoraat koniyu
oilangan nod buyuwon dow riyon to onama no od kolammi kos koniyun ginawa woy poomdom
ukub dow kos lammin kodbovotasan no id boggoy to onama koniyu
a ukit kaay od pokoiling kow kandin oyyos motallong kowd en woy molinis diyot kodontong to onama
een yo kowd ouhus ko konna iyon dow osenga riyot duma iddos bonnaa oyya su iddos ipat sokkad keta no timbang sakup to lawa ni isas rays nosokkad kid langun diyot kandin
tid langot kow bantoy kow no dii kowd pokopuung to saa pomon tadda woy koilangan no dii row idda od posooppan to allow
o row boggayit daan si oivuyan no ukit to koniyun kodlangot od kolonuhan kow nikandin taman tod pokopuung kowd to morat
ddos minuvu nod pomurut to konna kandin koilangan nod soroan din idda woy od potallong baling nod oiluggat nod puung su amoy duwon id pokotavang din diyot mgo worowora
oilangan no konna kowd ooseng to morat ko konna idda ra en so moppiya woyd pokotavang to duma su amoy iddos langun nod osengon dow od pokoinniyat taddot od pominog koniyu
o row boggayi to lanu iddos his no spiritu oyyos sikandin man kos id boggoy to onama timbang id patow no sikiyu en kos mgo minuvu rin
oy ukit kandin od kosorollan dow no init morin allow od kotobbus kow
een owaa rowd iddos kodtotaaw to langun no mosakit no ginawa lingasa woy langot
o kowd popehesoy woyd ooseng to od pokodoraat to duma
o kow mandad od puung to morat diyot duma
yon dow puungi pokita kow to kopiyannoy woy eru riyon to ipat sokkad
oposinsyay kow iling to kodposinsya to onama koniyu ukit ki isas rays
a pomon to mgo anak kowd man to onama no id dokollan din to ginawa koilangan nod ikulon dow iddos kandin no kodbovotasan
oilangan no id pokita row inaayun iddos koniyun kodginawa riyot duma iling taddot kodginawa ni isas rays keta su id boggoy rin kos kandin no umuu timbang mammut no buwis no orayd pokopahaa to onama
omon to mgo minuvu kowd man to onama yo kowd od aalig od pouuunnay od puung to molibmit no pinuungan woy yo kowd looggod ahad od oituu ra en mokaatag tadda
onna mandad ollog koniyu iddos waa koruanon no mgo osengan woy molibmit no mgo kowoliyan
yon moppiya gomita row kos bivig dow riyot kodposolamat to onama
omotawi row konna en od kolonug diyon to kodharit onama woy riyot ki isas rays iddos minuvu nod aalig dos od pouuunnay dos od puung to molibmit no pinuungan woy dos od akonakon oyya su iddos kodakonakon nokodiling da en idda to kodsimba to konna bonnaan monama
o kowd paakaa taddot mgo minuvu nod ponikahi no iddon pinuungan konna morat
yyos pomon taddon pinuungan id pouma en to onama iddos silut din pomon to langot din taddot diid dumoruma kandin
urisu yo kowd lonug to pinuungan to iling kaayn mgo minuvu
u dangan diyon kow pa to mosukirom piru koungkay diyon kowd to maawang pomon to nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon
een koilangan no iddos koniyun kodbovotasan od loppa taddot mgo minuvu no riyot koowangan
yya su otik iddos minuvu no riyon don to koowangan iddos kodbovotasan din moppiya motallong woy od ikuu to kovonnaan
oonokkali row to kodpohinonaw ko ondan kos od pokopahaa tod ongaggon woy puungi row ini
o kowd lonug taddot waa koruanon no pinuungan to mgo minuvu no riyot mosukirom ko konna pokita row no morat iddos id puungan dan
u iddos id ollos dan no pinuungan od pokoilowilow ahad iddos kodoituu ra en tadda
iru pomon to moppiyon pinuungan dow orayd kokita no morat bos iddos pinuungan dan
yya su iddos moppiyon pinuungan iling to suu nod pokotaddow kandan
u otid kotorawwan iddos diyot mosukirom od maawang en kos langun
dda en mandad kos kohulugan taddot osengon no mid ungketen to ikkow no id tinuhon gimata kad
ikkow nid patoy onnow kadsu od torawwan ka ni isas rays
een oupiya kow to koniyun kodbovotasan
o kow od ikuu taddot mgo minuvu no movavow kos koovottan ko konna iyon dow ikula iddos mgo minuvu no moraom kos koovottan
olimakut kow to kodpuung to moppiya laggun to duwon pa timpu su inis ingod noponnu ron to kororattan
urisu yo kowd povovangog ko konna ooyyari row tod labbotlabbot ko ondan kos id kopii tod ongaggon nod puungan dow
o kowd poiraom taddot od pokohubug no inommon nod pokodoraat to koniyun koubpa ko konna poiraom kow to kotuusan to his no spiritu
u otik sikandin kos od potuntuu to koniyun poomdom na iling en kaay kos od puungan dow
iyot kodpolivuungoy row poinniyatoy kow ukit to kodkanta to mgo kanta atag to koddoong to onama woy duma pon mgo kanta nod pokomosalig to koniyun kopomakoy woy kanta kow no od pomon diyot pusung dow
oy riyot ahad ondan nod kotomanan dow inaayun kow posolamat diyon to onamon moy pomon to nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
oilangan mandad nod poobbava kow riyon to ipat sokkad koniyu pomon to duwon allak dow ki isas rays
ikiyu no mgo molitan poiraom kow to kodponguu to koniyun sawa iling taddot kodpoiraom dow to kodponguu ni isas rays
u iddos mama kos timbang uu to kandin no sawa iling to si isas rays kos timbang uu to langun nod pompomakoy
oy sikandin kos id tobbus keta nod pompomakoy no timbang lawa rin
een iling keta nod pompomakoy no id poiraom to kodponguu ni isas rays koilangan mandad no iddos mgo molitan od poiraom inaayun to kodponguu to kandan no sawa
a sikiyu no mgo mama koilangan nod ginowannan dow kos koniyun sawa iling to kodginawa ni isas rays to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy
yyos pomon to kodginawa rin id boggoy rin kos kandin no umuu atag keta su amoy od kovovallan ki no mgo minuvu rin
imbang id unavan ki nikandin woy id awa rin kos mgo saa ta amoyd molinis ki riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kandin no kahi
d puungan din ini su amoy siketa nod pompomakoy od kotanggap ki nikandin no timbang od osowan din no orayn molihonnoy riyot kodontong din iling taddot od osawa no orayd kahaa nod nod tanggap taddot od osowan din no waa ahad ondan no molibmit
yya su id kopii ni isas rays no molinis ki riyot kodontong to onama woy waa id pokosawoy keta
a iling mandad tadda sikiyu no mgo mama koilangan nod ginowannan dow kos koniyun sawa iling to kodginawa row to koniyun lawa
u iddos mama nod ginawa to kandin no sawa id ginawa mandad to kandin no lawa oyya su iddos toosawa nosokkad don man sikandan
aa minuvu no konnod ginawa to kandin no lawa ko konna od tuhonulon din ini
ling en mandad kaay kos kodtuhanuu ni isas rays keta no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy su timbang mgo sakup kid man to lawa rin
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos mama od tanan to amoy woy inoy rin woyd poroomoy ron sikandan to sawa rin su amoy iddos oruwa od pokodsokkad don
a duwon dakkoon koruanon woy moraom no nonaw nod koovottan ta kaay
oy riyot kodlabbotlabbot ku iyon id ponunggelengan ku kaay no iddos langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy woy si isas rays od pokodsokkad don
iru iddos movavow no kodlabbotlabbot kaay idda en so mokaatag koniyun toosawa
een sikiyu no mgo mama ginowanni row kos koniyun sawa iling to kodginawa row to koniyun lawa
oy sikiyu mandad no mgo molitan rispitui row kos koniyun sawa
a sikiyu no mgo anak koilangan no morumoruma kow to koniyun amoy woy inoy su ini en kos ollog nod puungan to mgo minuvu no nosokkad diyon tod ongaggon
yyos duwon suhu to onama no mid ungketen to ispituiyu ka to amoy woy inoy ru
ni en kos unnon suhu rin no duwon tandu
a otid tumanon du ini od moppiya kos koubpa ru woyod lowwet kos kikown umuu kaay to ampowt ingod
ikiyu mandad no mgo amoy yo row bosuliya kos koniyun mgo anak su amoy diid mosakit kos songnga ran koniyu
yon moppiya no od nonawwan woyd pomonduwan dow sikandan to ollog no kodbovotasan no id pomon diyon tod ongaggon
a sikiyu no mgo uripon dumoruma kow to osengan to koniyun amu woy rispitui row sikandan no id pomon diyot pusung dow timbang si isas rays kos koniyun amu
onna no gali kow ra od paayyadayyad nod puung otid tongtong sikandan amoyd koroong kow ko konna puung kow no timbang uripon ni isas rays woy puungi row iddos id kopiit onama pomon diyot tivuk no ginawa row
een puung kow no mahan diyot ginawa row su iling to id puungan dow ini atag tod ongaggon konna atag to minuvu
u nosorollan dow no duwon en ganti no id boggoy tod ongaggon diyon to ipat sokkad pomon to moppiyon pinuungan din uripon man sikandin o konna
ikiyu mandad no mgo amu ooyyari row kos koniyun mgo uripon
o kowd oivuut nod pokovoggoy to allak kandan oyya nosorollan dow no sikiyu woy dos koniyun mgo uripon nokodiling da en diyot isowwan taddot mu row no riyot datas to langit woy waa en od podmusingon din
a mgo suwod ini robbo kos od osengon ku koniyu
oilangan nod mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy riyon tod ongaggon ukit taddot waa toppong no kotuusan din no od pokoponokkaa koniyu
omita row kos langun no timbang goggot woy kaasag no id boggoy to onama koniyu su amoy dii kow od kotalu to mgo kodaakaa ni oivuyan
yya su iddos pongkuntra keta konna iling keta ko konna iddos morat no mgo ispiritu dos mgo ponguu ran no duwon mgo kotungud woy mgo kotuusan no mid ubpa riyot kooowayan woy kaay to ampowt ingod
ikandan kos od ponguu to mgo minuvu no riyon poron to mosukirom
een gomita row kos langun no timbang goggot woy kaasag no id boggoy to onama koniyu su amoy dii kow od komonnu woy od pokoatu kow taddot od pongkuntra koniyu ahad kannu sikandan od inguma
a ahad od monnuwon kow ni oivuyan konna en sikandin od pokotalu koniyu
een timbang mgo sundau panoypanoy kow
os timbang ollon dow idda en so oggot no kodikuu row to bonnaan nonaw woy dos umpak no putow no timbang pongallang to kabpa row idda en so motallong no kodbovotasan no id pomon to onama
a iddos timbang sopatus dow no orayd kabbang to livuta idda en so moppiyon dinoggan mokaatag to kodpoduli to koroniyan to minuvu riyot onama
iipiyodda row inaayun iddos timbang kaasag no idda en so kopomakoy row ki isas rays
omita row idda amoy diid pokouddok kos kodaakaa ni oivuyan no iling to golid loglog no id pana rin koniyu
d sukub dow iddos timbang somboriru no putow no pongallang to uu no idda en so dakkoon kodsalig nod kotobbus kow
oy ponlipi row mandad iddos timbang polihuma no idda en so kahit onama no id boggoy rin koniyu ukit to his no spiritu
a riyot kodgamit dow langun kaay dasaa kow inaayun mokaatag taddot id posampot to his no spiritu koniyu riyot ahad ondan no kotomanan
iyot koddasaa row yo kowd popopogguu ko konna ponayun kow dasaa atag to langun no minuvu to onama
oy opila a nikiyu riyot dosalon dow no od boggayan a to onama to kotuihan no id pokopaabbotlabbot ku to waa kodaangaang iddos oppiyon inoggan no waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan
u iyon unayan no novovallan a no uripon ni isas rays amoy id pokoponudtuu ku iddos oppiyon inoggan
oy pomon to kodponudtuu ku kaay noprisu a koungkay
een tovangi a nikiyu tod dasaa amoy waa kodaangaang ku to kodponudtuu to kahi rin su ini en kos koilangan nod puungan ku
a si iquico no id ginowannan ta no suwod diyon to kopomakoy woy morumorumon uripon tod ongaggon sikandin kos od posaddoo koniyu mokaatag to langun no kotomanan woy pinuungan ku kaay
d pounduwonnon ku sikandin to koniyu su amoy od kosorollan dow ko momonnu koyd dini woy amoy od inniyat kow nikandin
go suwod muopa no iddos onamon moy woy si isas rays nod ongaggon od boggoy koniyu to kosunayan
oy muopa mandad no od monit peen kos kodpohinowannoy row woyd mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy
uopa no sikiyu langun nod ginawa tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays duma to kodginawa no od taman to waad tomanon od pokotanggap to kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo woy si imoteo mgo uripon koy ni isas rays
d sulat koy koniyu no toho ilipos no mgo minuvu to onama no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays duma to mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy woy taddot mgo diyakono
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
a ipat timpu nod pokopoomdom a koniyu od posolamat a to onama ku woy inaayun a nod kahaa ipat timpu no od dasaa a atag koniyu langun
yyos pomon to kodtigkanoy row to kodpomakoy ki isas rays taman koungkay id tovangan a nikiyu to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
oy dakkoo kos kodsalig ku nod ponoyunon to onama iddos moppiyon pinuungan no id tigkonayan din diyot ginawa row taman tod kopongnga rin idda riyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays
llog en no iling kaay kos od geddamon ku atag koniyu langun oyyos id dokollan ku man sikiyu to ginawa
u noukitan dow duma koddi iddos kopiyannoy to onama laggun to kaay a to prisuwan woy riyot kodlohinat to kovonnaan atag to oppiyon inoggan
osorollan to onama no oraroy a nod pingpingawon koniyu su iddos kodginawa ku koniyu iling taddot kodginawa ni isas rays
a od dasaa a nod lampas peen kos kodginawa row
d dasaa a mandad no iddos kodginawa row od dumannan to sinorollan woy moraom no koovottan
kit tadda od kosorollan dow ko ondan iddos lampas no moppiya nod puungan su amoy molinis kow riyot kodontong to onama woy worad en id pokosawoy koniyu riyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays
uopa no ukit to tavang ni isas rays inaayun motallong kos langun nod puungan dow amoy od koroong woyd koposivontuhan kos onama
go suwod id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no iddos koddin notomanan nokotavang baling no od soob kos oppiyon inoggan
yyos nosorollan to langun no sundau nid tamong to polasyu woy taddot dumon minuvu kaayt bonuwa to oma no iyon unayan no id prisu a pomon da en to kodponudtuu ku mokaatag ki isas rays
oy pomon tid prisu a id mosalig peen kos kopomakoy to kourallan to mgo suwod ta woy pomon tadda waa kodaangaang dan nod ponudtuu to kahit onama
onnaa en no duwon mgo minuvu no id ponudtuu mokaatag ki isas rays pomon to nosina sikandan su id kopii ran nod lampas pa koddi
iru duwon mandad duma no moppiya kos dontulon dan
yyos mid nonaw sikandan pomon to ginawa ran koddi su nokaabbot dan no id boggayan a to onama to pinuungan no idda en so kodlohinat to kovonnaan atag to oppiyon inoggan
iru iddos nongosina koddi id ponudtuu ran iddos mokaatag ki isas rays konna pomon to bonnaavonnaan ginawa ran ko konna pomon to idda ra en so kandan no kopiyannan kos od poomdommon dan
yya su kunan dan ko ukit taddot id puungan dan od pokodluntudluntud kos kosupittan ku kaayt prisuwan
iru waa id mosakit kos ginawa ku tadda su mooggot man o konna kos dontulon dan to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan od kahaa a oyyos id ponudtuu ran iddos mokaatag ki isas rays
oy ponayun a nod kahaa su nosorollan ku en no ukit to dosalon dow koddi woy ukit to kodtavang to spiritu ni isas rays od pokolegguang a kaayt prisuwan
akkoo kos ingowollon woy koimmanan ku no inaayun waa kodaangaang ku to kodponudtuu to kahit onama su amoy dii a od koilawan diyot isowwan to onama ahad kannu
yyos od kouyag a man o od patoy id kopii ku nod koposivontuhan si isas rays ukit koddi
u atag koddi laggun to nouyag a pa kaay to ampowt ingod waa osson dontulon ku idda ra en so kodposivantug ki isas rays
iru otik od patoy a lampas pa no moppiya oyyos od duma ad kandin
iru otid kouyag a pa duwon od kopuungan ku no dakkoo kos koruanon atag koddi
een otik siyak kos od aam waa ku nosorolli ko ingkon musing kaay kos od aamon ku od kouyag bo o od patoy
u novaad kos ginawa ku oyyos dakkoo kos ingowollon ku no od tanan ad kaay to ampowt ingod amoyd pokoruma ad ki isas rays su idda en kos lampas no moppiya
iru koilangan en nod kouyag a pa atag koniyu
een dakkoo kos kodsalig ku no dii a pa od patoy su amoy od kotovangan ku sikiyu nod udsuu peen diyot kopomakoy woy od koheddam dow kos kahaan diyot ki isas rays
u otid pokolivod a rad diyot koniyu oraroy row no id pokoposivantug si isas rays pomon tid puungan din atag koddi
had ondan kos od kotomanan ku koilangan no iddos koniyun koubpa od pokoikuu to nonaw riyot oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
u otik od pokoundiyon a man to koniyu o dii od korinog ku no nosokkad kos ginawa woy poomdom dow to kodlohinat riyot kovonnaan atag to oppiyon inoggan
oy od kosorollan ku mandad no waa kow novaakki taddot od supak koniyu su ini en kos kilaannan nod silutan sikandan to onama
iru atag koniyu ini en kos kilaannan nod kotobbus kow oyyos id pomon en ini to onama
u id boggayan kow to kopiyannan konna ra nod pomakoy ki isas rays ko konna od tiis mandad to kosupittan atag kandin
oy pomon tadda od koukitan dowd mandad kos kodposuppit iling taddot nokita row no noukitan ku dangan woy nosorollan dow no taman koungkay id tiis a poron to kodposuppit
osorollan ku no noinniyat kow pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays woy nahaa kow su id dokollan kow nikandin to ginawa
okodsokkad kow mandad ukit to his no spiritu woy id pohinowannoy kow woy eeruwon diyot ipat sokkad
een od buyuwon ku koniyu no iponnuwa a nikiyu to kahaan ukit to kodpohinowannoy woy kodposokaddoy row woy ukit to kodsokkad to koniyun poomdom woy dontulon
o kowd puung to ahad ondan ukit to kodporatasdatas to koniyun kougolingun ko konna koilangan nod poobbava kow riyot duma woy mowwet pa kos kodontong dow kandan kuntra taddot kodontong dow to koniyun kougolingun
onna ra iddos koniyun kopiyannan kos od poomdommon dow ko konna idda mandad so kopiyannan to duma
oilangan no iyon dow od ikulon iddos botasan ni isas rays
had onama sikandin piru waa sikandin id popoomdom nod pokidtoppong to onamon moy rin ukit to kandin no konokkaan
aa rin gomita kos pogkomonama rin woy nominuvu sikandin iling ketawoy id bovotasan to botasan to uripon
d poobbava sikandin woy id tuman to langun no id kopiit onama ahad pa taman to mokoilowilow no kopotayan din diyon to krus
een id poratas sikandin to onama ukit to waa toppong no kodposivantug woy id boggayan din sikandin to ngaran no lampas to langun no ngaran no iddos kohulugan motuus to langun no motuus
d puungan ini to onama su amoyiddos langun no id ponoubpa riyot datas to langit woy dos kaay to ampowt ingod ahad pa iddos diyot daom to livuta od lingkood diyot isowwan ni isas rays amoyd simba kandin
oy dos langun od ikahi no si isas rays en kos od ongaggon woy ukit kaay od koposivontuhan kos onamon moy
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod su inaayun kow man id tuman to nonaw ku to riyon a pa to koniyu lampas peen koungkay no wora ad duwot koniyu
oilangan no duwon allak dow to onama woy koilangan no iddos ipat sokkad koniyu od nokkaanokkaa nod ipongnga taddot pinuungan no id tigkonayan to onama riyot ginawa row iddot kodtobbus din koniyu
u iddos onama od boggoy koniyu to ingowollon woy kogahan no od puung to kandin nid kopii
a riyot langun nod puungan dow puungi row idda no wora kodpommivig woy kodpoopopuloy su amoy waa id pokosawoy koniyu no mgo anak to onama
oilangan no molinis kos koubpa row laggun tod oubpa kow duma to mgo ebbaw woy morat no mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
d pokoiling kow to mgo bituon diyot datas to langit no od pokotaddow kandan
onudtuu row kandan iddos kahit onama no od pokovoggoy to umuun waad tomanon
a otik idda en kos od puungan dow duwon id pokopobporoong ku riyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays oyyos od kokita no waa nonuhuni iddos kodoiluggat ku dangan to ruwon a pa to koniyu
os kopomakoy row ki isas rays idda en kos timbang buwis diyon to onama
oy otik od imotayan a iddos longossa ku kos timbang buwis no id busbus diyot koniyun buwis
a ko ungketen od kahaa woyd lonug a to koniyun kahaan
ikiyu mandad lonug to koddin kahaan
a otik id kopii tod ongaggon no si isas rays konnod kouhoy od pounduwonnon ku si imoteo to koniyu su amoy riyot kodlivod din kaay od kosorollan ku ko momonnu kowd duwon woy od kahaa a mandad
o langun no duma ku kaay sikandin da en kos iling koddi no orayd kosowkuu koniyu
u iddos duma iyon dan da en od poomdommon iddos kandan no kopiyannan
onna ran oray id kosowkuu dos id popuungan ni isas rays kandan
iru ini si imoteo nosorollan dowd no od kosolihan en sikandin oyyos id tovangan a nikandin to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan iling to anak no id tavang to amoy rin
een od pounduwonnon ku sikandin to koniyu otid kosorollan kud kos od kotomanan ku kaayt prisuwan
oy dakkoo kos kodsalig ku tod ongaggon no si isas rays no konnod kouhoy od pokounduwon a mandad to koniyu
opuhawang ku mandad no koilangan od pouliyon ku ruwot koniyu iddos suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no si pafrodito no id suhu row amoyd tavang koddi
uma ku sikandin diyot pinuungan atag to onama woy riyot kodlohinat to kovonnaan atag to oppiyon inoggan
d pouliyon kud sikandin duwon oyyos od pingpingawon don koniyu woy dii ron sikandin od pokodtoii to nosorollan din no norinoggan dow no id dorau sikandin kaay
onnaa en no id dorau si pafrodito woy disoksama en sikandin id patoy piru noeruwan kos onama kandin woy nouliyan dad
onna ra sikandin kos noerui to onama ko konna siyak mandad oyya su otik id patoy pa sikandin dii ku od kogaha kos lanu ku
urisu id kopii kud en nod pouliyon sikandin amoy od kahaa kow mandon otid kokita rowd sikandin woy amoyd lonna uvag kos ginawa ku
iyot kodinguma rin duwot koniyu tonggapa row sikandin duma to dakkoon kahaan oyyos suwod ta man sikandin to kopomakoy diyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays
ispitui row sikandin woy dos duma no iling kandin
yyos pomon to kodpuung din atag ki isas rays disoksama sikandin id patoy
aa sikandin nonuhuni to umuu rin amoyd kotovangan a ra en su sikandin kos timbang lawa row no id tavang koddi
a mgo suwod duwon pa od osengon ku koniyu
ahaa kow oyyos nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon
onna a od koobbod nod ulit taddot id ponudtuu kud dangan koniyu su atag man ini to kopiyannan dow amoy dii kowd pokosuwoy to kopomakoy
antoy kow taddot mgo minuvu no nokoiling to mgo tuyyang nod busawon oyyos morat kos pinuungan dan
d nonaw ran no koilangan en od potupu su kilaannan kun idda no mgo minuvu ki to onama
iru siketa kos duwon bonnaan kilaannan no mgo minuvu ki to onama oyyos id simba ki man kandin ukit to his no spiritu woy od pobporoong ki mokaatag ki isas rays
okkad mandad no kilaannan no mgo minuvu kid to onama idda en so kodsalig ta no od komotallong diyot kodontong din ukit da en ki isas rays konna ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu
tik duwon minuvu nod ikahi no od komotallong sikandin ukit to kodoiluggat din to kodtuman to mgo uhu lampas a pa tadda
u iddot kodtobbow ku id tupuwan a riyot ikowaun allow oyyos idda meen kos botasanon to mgo udio woy sokkad a taddot koubbaran ni enjamin no anak ni srael deen paong a en no udio
a mokaatag mandad to kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises id tuman ku idda langun su sakup a man to ariseo
omon to oraroy ku nid lohinatan iddon mgo uhu id posupittan ku iddos ahad ondoy no id pomakoy ki isas rays
oy mokaatag to kodtuman taddon mgo uhu wora en id pokosawoy koddi
iru pomon ki isas rays iddos langun no duwon dakkoon koruanon dangan atag koddi koungkay nosorollan kud no waa vos koruanon tadda
onna ra idda iddos langun no duwon koruanon dangan dinit koddi nosorollan kud no waa en koruanon
u otid podilingon ku idda lampas pa kos koruanon to kodkilaa ku ki isas rays nod ongaggon ku
yyos pomon da en kandin id tonanan kud iddos langun no timbang putput amoyd kokilaa ku peen si isas rays woy od kosokkad a riyot kandin
aa a mid ikahi nod komotallong a riyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman to mgo uhu ni oises ko konna ukit da en to kopomakoy ku ki isas rays
yon ku id kopii no od kokilaa ku peen si isas rays woy od koukitan ku iddos kotuusan to kodbadnow kandin
d kopii ku mandad no od pokolonug taddot koosayan nid tiis din taman tod pokoiling a kandin ahad pa riyot kopotayan din
yya su id imman a nod bodnawon a to onama
a konna kohulugan no naapput kud iddos langun woy worad id pokosawoy koddi piru od ponayun a nod nokkaanokkaa amoyd kaapput ku kos dontulon ni isas rays to kodaam koddi
go suwod nosorollan ku no waa ku pa naapput iddos langun no dontulon ni isas rays koddi
iru iyon ku ra od puungan no konna kud en od loingayon iddos id lihad no pinuungan ku ko konna diyon don to kounnan kos kodontong ku woy idda en kos od noonokkalan ku
okoiling a taddot minuvu no id lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu poundiyon tod tomanan amoy od pokotanggap to ganti
yya su od ponayun a nod nokkaanokkaa taman tod kotanggap ku iddos ganti no id boggoy to onama su id umow a nikandin nod ubpa riyot datas to langit pomon to nosokkad ad diyot ki isas rays
iketa langun no buyyag don diyot kopomakoy koilangan en no iling mandad tadda kos od poomdommon ta
iru ko duwon duma koniyu no ossa kos poomdom na iddos onama kos od paabbotlabbot kandan to kovonnaan
iru ahad ondan kos od poomdommon to duma koilangan en no od ponayun ki nod tuman taddot kovonnaan no id posaddoo to onama keta
go suwod ponayun kow ikuu koddi riyot kodtuman to id kopiit onama
kula row mandad iddos mgo minuvu ruwon no iling konami kos kodbovotasan
yyos duwon mouraan minuvu no id poddisokkan dan to koruanon iddos kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus ukit to morat no pinuungan dan
omouraa kud ini id oseng koniyu woy koungkay od uliton ku mandon ini tod posampot koniyu duma to kodsinoggow
yon od ingumannon dan idda en so linowt apuy oyya su iddos monama ran idda en so langun no id koivoggi to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
yon dan baling id pobporoong iddos pinuungan nod pokoilow kandan woy iyon dan da en od poomdommon iddos kaay to ampowt ingod
iru siketa iddos langit kos bonnaan ingod ta ahad id oubpa ki pa kaay to ampowt ingod woy pomon tadda od aangat ki to kodlivod taddot ohodtobbus woyd ongaggon no si isas rays
a riyot kodlivod din od lommiyon din kos lawa ta no duwon kopotayan woy id poiling din to kandin no lawa no waa kopotayan
d puungan din ini oyyos id poiraom din kos langun ukit to kotuusan din diyot kandin no kodhari
een mgo suwod lohinat kow no mosalig kos kopomakoy riyon tod ongaggon
d dokollan ku sikiyu to ginawa woy od pingpingawon ad koniyu oyyos sikiyu meen kos kahaan ku woy ganti to koddin pinuungan
ikiyu uodia woy intique mambo man to dii kow od pokoduung
olimulimu yo kowd oungketen oyyos nosokkad kowd man diyon tod ongaggon
oy sikkow mandad nod kosolihan no duma ku riyot pinuungan ni isas rays tovangiyu inin mgo molitan no od pokoduli
u oraroy ran id oiluggat duma koddi riyot kodposoob to oppiyon inoggan duma mandad si lemente woy dos langun nid pontavang koddi
ddos mgo ngaran dan nokosulat don diyot libru taddot langun nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
a kahaa kow langun su nosokkad kowd man diyon tod ongaggon
d uliton ku tod oseng kahaa kow
okita row kos moppiyon kodbovotasan diyot langun no minuvu su asow ron od livod kos od ongaggon
o kowd kaaggow to ahad ondan no kosupittan nod inguma koniyu ko konna buyuwa row riyot onama iddos mgo koilonganon dow ukit to koddasaa duma to kodposolamat
o ungketen kos od puungan dow od boggayan kow to onama to kosunayan no konnod kaapput to koovottan to minuvu
oy inin kosunayan od tavang nod lonna kos ginawa woy poomdom dow pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays
a mgo suwod ini kos mori nod osengon ku koniyu
yon dow ra inaayun poomdomma iddos ahad ondan no mooggot dos ollog nod rispituwon dos motallong no pinuungan dos molinis diyot kodontong to onama dos mgo motoos dos ollog nod posivontuhon woy dos ahad ondan no moppiya
ni langun ollog en nod poomdommon
os langun no nopohinonawwan dow no nokita woy norinog dow pomon koddi idda en kos inaayun dow puungi
oy dos onama no id boggoy keta to kosunayan od duma koniyu
rayn dakkoo kos kahaan ku riyon tod ongaggon su id pokita row mandon koddi kos koniyun ginawa ukit to tavang no notanggap ku
okosaddoo a no duwon ginawa row nod tavang koddi piru waa kow ra nokosakat
onna kohulugan no id ikahi ku ini pomon to waa notommu kos mgo koilonganon ku su koungkay nopohinonawwan kud no od koongaddan to ahad ondan no kaayt koddi ahad pa ondan kos koddin koubpa
oukitan kud no waa notommu kos mgo koilonganon ku woy noukitan kud mandad no noruwonnan a
opohinonawwan kud no od koongaddan diyot ahad ondan no kotomanan ahad od kovuung a woy gutasan diyot timpu nod koruwonnan woy riyot timpu no worowora
d kopuungan ku iddos langun ukit ki isas rays no id boggoy koddi to konokkaan
iru id posolomatan ku en iddos koniyun kodtavang dow koddi riyot kohirapoy ku
yyos sikiyu no toho ilipos nokosaddoo kowd no iddot kodlogkiyat ku pomon diyot acedonia to lammi ku pa id ponudtuu koniyu iddos oppiyon inoggan waa osson id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no id potommu to mgo koilonganon ku sikiyu ra en
oy ahad iddot diyon a pa to bonuwa to esalonica konna a ra kosokkad nikiyu popiyoddi to tavang
aa ku osenga ini nod aangat a to id boggoy row ko konna id kopii ku no od boggayan kow peen to onama to ganti pomon to kodtavang dow koddi
oungkay notommu ron kos langun no koilonganon ku woy lampas peen su notanggap ku iddos langun nid popiyod dow no tavang ukit ki pafrodito
a inin tavang iling to mammut no buwis diyot onama no id kahaai rin
oy dos onama ku od potommu mandad to langun no koilonganon dow pomon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays oyyos konna en od kotoppong kos korotuwan to onama
d doongon ta kos onamon moy ta taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a pouma row kos koddin kodpongumusta riyot langun no minuvu to onama no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
oy inis mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no duma ku kaay od pongumusta mandad koniyu ko momonnu kow rad duwon
d pongumusta mandad koniyu kos langun no minuvu to onama kaay labbi ron iddos od pompomakoy no id puung diyot polasyu to hari to oma
uopa no iddos od ongaggon no si isas rays inaayun od pokita to kopiyannoy rin koniyu
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo novovallan a no apostoles ni isas rays ukit to id kopiit onama
iyak woy si imoteo no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy id pongumusta koniyu
d sulat ku ini atag koniyu no toho olosas no mgo minuvu to onama woy morumorumon mgo suwod doy no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta
a ipat timpu nod dasaa koy atag koniyu inaayun koyd posolamat to onama no moy tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
yya su norinog doy iddos mokaatag to kopomakoy row ki isas rays woy dos kodginawa row to langun no minuvu to onama
d puungan dow idda su id imman kow taddot id panoy atag koniyu riyot datas to langit
nin koimmanan tapoy rowd nosorolli iddot norinog dow kos bonnaan nonaw no idda en so oppiyon inoggan
oy nokosoob don inin oppiyon inoggan diyon to intirut ingod taman to mouraa kos id pomakoy woy nopalin kos kodbovotasan dan
ngketen dad en mandad kos notomanan diyot koniyu iddot norinog woy nooblovottan dowd iddos mokaatag to kopiyannoy to onama
a iyon mid nonaw koniyu kaay si pafras no id dokollan doy to ginawa
uma roy sikandin no morumorumon uripon ni isas rays woy timbang bivig doy riyot kodponudtuu to kahit onama
ikandin mandad kos id ponudtuu konami mokaatag to kodginawa row no id boggoy to his no spiritu
een pomon taddot allow no norinog doy iddos mokaatag koniyu id dasaa koy inaayun diyot onama atag koniyu
d buyu roy no od iponnuwon kow to moraom no koovottan nid pomon to spiritu rin su amoy od kosorollan dow iddos id kopii rin atag koniyu
yya su ukit kaay od loppa iddos koniyun kodbovotasan taddot mgo minuvu nid pomakoy tod ongaggon amoy od kopuungan dow inaayun kos id kahaai rin
d dasaa koy nod puungan dow iddos langun no moppiya woy od kotimulan peen kos sinorollan dow mokaatag to onama
uopa nod ponokkalon to onama kos koniyun ginawa ukit to lampas no kotuusan din amoy mowwet kos posinsya row woy kodtiis to mgo kosupittan
oy ahad ungketen kos od kotomanan duwon en kahaan dow
d dasaa a mandad no od ponayun kow nod posolamat to onamon moy ta oyyos ukit taddot id puungan din ollog kow nod pokotanggap taddot id panoy rin atag to keta no mgo minuvu rin no od kolonug diyot maawang no kohoriyan din
yya su id polegguang ki to onama pomon diyot kotuusan ni oivuyan no od hari riyot mosukirom woy id alin ki nikandin diyot kohoriyan taddot nak din no si isas rays no id dokollan din to ginawa
a ukit kandin nokolegguang kid pomon diyot koduripon ni oivuyan woy id posinsyan don kos mgo saa ta
a riyot ki isas rays od kokita ta iddos botasanon to onama no konnod kokita
o waa pa novovalli inis ingod duwon don tapoy si isas rays woy lampas sikandin to langun
u ukit kandin novovallan iddos langun no riyot datas to langit woy dos kaay to ampowt ingod dos langun nod kokita woy dos konnod kokita ahad iddos nokodossoosson ispiritu no duwon kotuusan woy kotungud
angun kaay novovallan ukit ki isas rays woy atag to kodposivantug kandin
o waa pa novovalli kos ahad ondan duwon don tapoy sikandin woysikandin kos id tapid to langun no binovallan woy noiraom idda to kandin no kotungud
ikandin kos timbang uu to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no idda en kos timbang lawa rin
ikandin mandad kos id pomonnan to lammin umuu oyyos sikandin kos unnon novadnow pomon diyot kopotayan woy pomon kaay lampas sikandin to langun
yya su iyon id kopiit onama no iddos langun no pogkomonama rin od kokita riyot kandin no nak
oy ukit kandin id kopiit onama no od pokoduli riyot kandin iddos koroniyan to langun kaay to ampowt ingod woy riyot datas to langit
d puungan din idda ukit to kodtihis to longossa taddot nak din diyon to krus
a sikiyu dangan moriyu kow to onama woy kuntra kow nikandin pomon to morat no poomdom woy pinuungan dow
iru koungkay nokoduli ron kos koroniyan dow kandin ukit to kopotayan ni isas rays
omon tadda id poisau kow to onama no molinis diyot kodontong din woy worad id pokosawoy
iru koilangan no od ponayun kow no mosalig woy diid kaantog diyot koniyun kopomakoy
onayun kow mandad nod imman taddot langun no id tandu to onama riyot oppiyon inoggan no norinog dow no id ponudtuu riyon to intirut ingod
oy siyak si ablo kos novovallan no sudsuhuwon amoy od ponudtuu kaay
had id tiis a to kosupittan pomon to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan no atag to kopiyannan dow od kahaa a
yya su inis kosupittan nod geddamon ku ini en kos od ponayun taddot kosupittan no id tiis ni isas rays atag to langun nod pompomakoy no timbang lawa rin
ovovallan a no sudsuhuwon to onama atag to langun nod pompomakoy su id sanna rin koddi iddos pinuungan no idda en so kodponudtuu to langun no kahi rin diyot koniyu no konna mgo udio
a iddon ponudtulon waa pa id posaddoo to onama pomon poron dangan piru koungkay id posaddoo rin don ini kaayt keta no mgo minuvu rin
yya su id kopii rin nid posaddoo keta iddos orayn moppiya woy mokososoobbun puhawang no id panoy rin atag to langun no minuvu ahad diyot konna mgo udio
a iddos puhawang no waa rin id posaddoo dangan idda en si isas rays no id ubpa riyot ginawa row
oy pomon kaay duwon don dakkoon koimmanan dow no od pokolonug taddot bantug to onama riyot datas to langit init morin allow
een id ponudtuu roy iddos mokaatag ki isas rays woy inaayun koy od pomandu woy od nonaw riyot ahad ondoy ukit to langun no moraom no koovottan no id pomon kandin su amoy id poisau sikandan diyon to onama no buyyag don diyot kodsokkad dan ki isas rays
ni en kos unayan no oraroy a nid oiluggat su amoy od kotuman idda ukit to kotuusan ni isas rays no id boggoy rin koddi
d ponudtuu ku ini koniyu oyyos id kopii ku nod kosorollan dow no oraroy a nid oiluggat amoy od kotovangan ku sikiyu nod pompomakoy ruwon to olosas woy ruwot aodicea ahad iddos langun no iling koniyu no waa pa nokokita koddi
d puungan ku ini su amoy od koinniyat kow ukit to koniyun kodposokaddoy no nooggot diyot kodpohinowannoy
yya su id kopii ku no oraroy row od koovottan iddos puhawang to onama mokaatag ki isas rays no waa rin pa id posaddoo dangan
u riyot ki isas rays iddos langun no moraom no koovottan woy sinorollan to onama
d ponudtulan ku sikiyu kaay su amoy dii kow od kookalan taddot konna bonnaan mgo nonaw no uvag kun to ollog
u ahad waa a ruwon inaayun a od popoomdom koniyu
oy oraroy a nod kahaa pomon to nosokkad kos koniyun ginawa woy id mosalig kos kopomakoy row ki isas rays
a pomon to id tanggap dowd man si isas rays nod ongaggon dow ponoyuna row iddos koniyun kodbovotasan no ollog en taddot minuvu no nosokkad diyot kandin
oilangan no iddos koniyun kopomakoy od pokoiling to kayu no nokounsob kos dalig woy od pokoiling to baoy no mosalig kos pounsaran
hotta row kos koniyun kopomakoy iling taddot id nonaw koniyu woy inaayun kow posolamat diyon to onama
oyyari row no dii kow od pokosahad taddot nonaw no imman to bonnaa piru uhus bos woy waa koruanon
ddon mgo nonaw waa id pomon diyot ki isas rays ko konna id pomon to mgo botasanon to kovuyyahan woy kodpopoomdom to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
u iddos kovonnaan mokaatag ki isas rays nominuvu sikandin no duwon lawa iling keta piru riyot kandin iddos langun no botasanon to onama
oy sikiyu nod pomakoy kandin worad kulang pomon to nosokkad kowd man diyot kandin
ampas sikandin to langun no duwon kotuusan woy taddot duwon kotungud no konnod kokita
omon to nosokkad kowd diyot ki isas rays iling to notupuwan kowd
onna idda kodpotupu to lawa iling tod puungan to minuvu ko konna idda en kos kodawa rin taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron diyot koniyu
