a iddot kodboutismu koniyu timbang id lobbong kow duma ki isas rays
oy timbang novadnow kowd diyot lammin umuu duma kandin oyya su id salig kowd man to kotuusan to onama no id badnow kandin
angan timbang id patoy kowd diyot kodontong to onama pomon to mgo saa row oyyos sikiyu no konna mgo udio konna kow pa mgo minuvu to onama
iru koungkay id lonug kow taddot lammin umuu no id boggoy rin ki isas rays su id posinsyan din don kos langun no saa ta
os id puungan to onama iling kaay
d piyod din kos listahan to keton mgo saa pomon to kodsupak ta taddot mgo suhu rin woy id pakpak din idda riyon to krus
os kohulugan ukit to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus id awa rin kos mgo saa ta
een worad unayan nod silutan ki nikandin
kit taddot kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus id awa rin iddos kotuusan taddot langun no morat no ispiritu woy dos duwon mgo kotungud
d poilawan din sikandan diyot isowwan to langun su id pokita rin no id ponalu sikandin
een yo row pominogga iddos od ponsawoy koniyu pomon to waa kow id ikuu taddot id diiyan no kokaan woy inommon
oy id sawoy ran koniyu pomon to waa kow id sampot to mgo pista ipat lahun mgo pista to lammin buwan woy mgo allow to kodimolloy
yya su inin mgo botasanon to udio nokoiling to aung da taddot od inguma pa
iru iyon bonnaa id inguma ron iddos od oongatan dan no idda en si isas rays
o kow od ikuu taddot mgo minuvu nod ikahi no konna kow od kotobbus pomon to dii kow od simba to mgo ponolihan woy konna kow kun od poobbava iling kandan
d ikahi ran no lampas sikandan koniyu su mouraa kun kos id pokita to onama kandan
iru waa koruanon tadda oyyos inaayun dan od poratasdatas pomon to noiraom poron sikandan taddot mosaasaan botasan no tapoy ron diyot kandan
aa sikandan nokosuppay riyot ki isas rays no timbang uu tod pompomakoy
ikandin kos id ponokkaa keta no mgo sakup to lawa rin woy nosokkad ki langun iling taddot lawa to sokkad no minuvu no nokodsuppaysuppay ukit to mgo uhat woy mgo tullan
een od tuvu ki pomon taddot konokkaan no id boggoy to onama keta
a pomon tod pompomakoy kowd man timbang id patoy kow duma ki isas rays woy nokolegguang kowd pomon diyot mgo suhu no binovallan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
een mambot iyon dow poron od ikulon iddos mgo suhu nod ungketen to o kowd gamit kaay o kowd kaan duwon o kowd somad tadda
a inis langun no id diiyan dan iling da to kokaan no kopongnga od kahamit od kowora
oy inin mgo suhu no id nonaw ran binovallan da to minuvu
tid poomdommon ta imman to ollog iddos nonaw ran no koilangan nod oiluggatan tod tuman iddos mgo botasanon no id bobbovallan dan
oy id pouvaguvag dan nod poobbava ukit to kodposuppit to lawa ran
iru idda langun waa koruanon oyyos dii en idda od pokotavang to kodtohoo to molibmit no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran
a pomon to timbang novadnow kowd duma ki isas rays woy duwon don lammin umuu row iyon dow inaayun ingowolla iddos diyot datas to langit no riyon en mid unsad si isas rays lomig to kowanan to onama
naayun dow poomdomma iddos diyot datas to langit konna iddos kaay to ampowt ingod
yyos timbang id patoy kowd deen worad iddos ingowollon dow kaay to ampowt ingod
oungkay duwon don lammin umuu row no konna pa oraroy od kokita su riyon pa idda to bollad ni isas rays woy sikandin nosokkad diyon to onama
a to kodlivod ni isas rays no iyon id pomonnan taddot lammin umuu row od kolonug kow mandad taddot kopiyannoy woy kodposivantug kandin
een tonani rowd kos morat no mgo ingowollon kaay to ampowt ingod iling to kodloivug molibmit no pinuungan morat no ivog to lawa ahad iddos ginawa ra en to kodpuung kaay
o kow mandad od akonakon su iddos kodpuung to ungketen nokoiling to idda ron kos id simba row konnad iddos onama
a pomon kaayn pinuungan od ingumannon dan en iddos lampas no langot to onama woyd silutan din en sikandan oyyos waa ran id dumoruma kandin
ling en mandad kaay kos nooyami row dangan nod puungan
iru koungkay koilangan nod tonanan dow iddos morat no kodbovotasan iling to loongotton inaayun od kolingasa od totaaw to morat no ginawa od doddoraat to duma woy od ikahi to molibmit no osengan
o kowd pouhusoy su iddos tapoyn kodbovotasan dow no iling to tapoyn umpak id lusut dowd
oungkay id sukub dowd kos lammin kodbovotasan
oy inaayun ini id lammi to onama nid boggoy kaay amoy id poiling din to kandin no kodbovotasan su iyon din id kopii no od kokilaa row peen sikandin
een siketa no id lammi ron to onama worad koossan udio man o konna id tupuwan man o wora duwon kotuihan o wora uripon man o konna
yyos si isas rays kos lampas to langun woy id ubpa riyot langun nod pompomakoy
go suwod koilangan no eeruwon kow motavangtavang mopoobbava mosunay woy mowwet kos kodtiis dow riyot duma oyya su id aam kow to onama no mgo minuvu rin woy id dokollan kow nikandin to ginawa
oilangan nod poowetton dow kos koniyun posinsya riyon to ipat sokkad oyyos id posinsyan kowd man tod ongaggon
een koilangan nod posinsya kow mandad
a riyot langun kaayn kodbovotasan id polampas dow iddos kodginawa su ini en kos timbang id bagkos amoyd kooggot kos koniyun kodposokaddoy
ohoriya row riyot koniyun ginawa iddos moppiyon koroniyan no id boggoy ni isas rays su id aam kow to onama no od oubpa no moppiya kos koroniyan timbang sokkad da no lawa
oy inaayun kow mandad posolamat diyot kandin
omuwa row riyot tivuk no pusung dow iddos nonaw ni isas rays
ononawwoy kow woy popomonduwoy kow ukit to moraom no koovottan no id boggoy rin
anta kow to mgo kanta atag to koddoong to onama woy taddot mgo kanta nod pokopahaa kandin duma to kodposolamat no id pomon diyot tivuk no pusung dow
had ondan kos od puungan woyd osengon dow poomdomma row no si isas rays kos od ongaggon dow woy ukit kandin posolamat kow riyot onamon moy
a sikiyu no mgo molitan poiraom kow to kodponguu to koniyun sawa su ini en kos ollog nod puungan dow nod pompomakoy
ikiyu mandad no mgo mama ginowanni row kos koniyun sawa woy yo row sikandan ooyuwa
oy sikiyu no mgo anak dumoruma kow inaayun to mgo suhu to koniyun amoy woy inoy oyyos ini en kos id kahaa tod ongaggon
ikiyu mandad no mgo amoy yo row bosuliya kos koniyun mgo anak su saddook od koobbod sikandan to kodpuung to moppiya
a sikiyu no mgo uripon dumoruma kow to langun no osengan to koniyun amu
onna no gali kow ra od paayyadayyad nod puung otid tongtong sikandan amoyd koroong kow
uungi row ini no mahan diyot ginawa row oyyos duwon man allak dow tod ongaggon
had ondan kos od puungan dow puungi row ini pomon diyot pusung dow su iling to id puungan dow ini atag tod ongaggon konna atag to minuvu
o kowd kolingow no duwon ganti nod kotanggap dow pomon tod ongaggon no id panoy rin atag to mgo minuvu rin
yyos si isas rays man kos bonnaan mu row
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod puung to morat od silutan to onama loppa taddot morat no nopuungan din su wora od podmusingon din
a sikiyu no mgo amu ooyyari row to kodpiyod kos koniyun mgo uripon woy boggoy row kos ollog atag kandan
oomdomma row no duwon mandad mu row riyot datas to langit
a sikiyu langun dasaa kow inaayun woy yo kowd koobbod woy posolamat kow riyot onama taddot kopiyannoy rin koniyu
asaa kow mandad atag konami no od boggayan koy to onama to timpu no id pokoponudtuu roy iddos mokaatag ki isas rays no waa id posaddoo dangan to onama
ni en kos unayan no noprisu a poron koungkay pomon to kodponudtuu ku kaay
oy dasaa kow mandad no od koooyyaran ku to kodponudtuu iddos oppiyon inoggan amoy moomok nod koovottan su idda en kos ollog nod puungan ku
oyyari row kos koniyun kodbovotasan diyot mgo minuvu no waa pa id pomakoy ki isas woy polimakuti row kos timpu riyot kodponudtuu kandan to oppiyon inoggan
oyyari row mandad kos koniyun kodooseng amoyd kotoosan woy od koinniyat sikandan nod pominog koniyu
oy koilangan no od kotuig kow nod tavak diyot ahad ondoy nod intud koniyu mokaatag ki isas rays
a mokaatag to koddin kotomanan kaay si iquico no id ginowannan ta no suwod diyot kopomakoy kos od ponudtuu koniyu
d kosolihan sikandin no tohodponudtuu to kahit onama woy duma ku sikandin no uripon tod ongaggon
yon unayan no id pounduwon ku sikandin to koniyu su amoy od kosorollan dow kos kotomanan doy rini woy od inniyat sikandin koniyu
uma rin si nesimo no od kosolihan woy id ginowannan ta no suwod diyot kopomakoy
oho ruwon en sikandin to koniyu
ikandan no oruwa kos od ponudtuu koniyu taddot langun no notomanan dini
nis duma ku kaayt prisuwan no si ristarco id intud ko momonnu kowd duwon
d pongumusta mandad si arcos no igagaw ni ernabe
a id ponaannan kud sikiyu mokaatag kandin no otid inguma sikandin duwot koniyu tonggapa row sikandin
i osue no id ngoranan mandad ki usto id pongumusta mandad koniyu
ikandan da en no otollu kos mgo udio nod pompomakoy kaay kos id tavang koddi to kodponudtuu mokaatag to kodharit onama
oy orayn nahaa kos ginawa ku pomon kandan
d pongumusta si pafras no toho ruwon en mandad to koniyu
okkad mandad sikandin no uripon ni isas rays
ray sikandin no morasaarasaa atag koniyu amoy od lohinat kow no waa kulang diyot kopomakoy woy bonnaavonnaa kow nod puung to langun nid kopiit onama no waa kodduworuwa
d pokoposivonnaa a no si pafras oray nid oiluggat atag koniyu woy taddot mgo suwod ta to kopomakoy riyot aodicea woy ierapolis
i ucas no id ginowannan ta no doktor woy si emas id pouma mandad to kandan no kodpongumusta koniyu
ouma row mandad kos konamin kodpongumusta riyot mgo suwod ta to kopomakoy no toho aodicea woy riyon mandad to tobboy ta no si infa woy riyon tod pompomakoy no od lolivuung inaayun diyot baoy rin
tid kopongnga rowd tod basa inin sulat povasa row mandad ini riyot id lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyon to aodicea
a duwon mandad sulat ku riyot kandan
uyuwa row idda su amoy od kovasa row mandad
sengi row pobbo si rquipo nod ipongngan din iddos pinuungan no id salig kandin tod ongaggon
a kaayt kodpongumusta ku siyak don en si ablo kos mid sulat kaay
o kow vod kolingow no kaay a to prisuwan
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay duma ki ilas woy ki imoteo
d sulat doy ini atag koniyu no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy ruwot esalonica no nosokkad diyon to onamon moy woy ki isas rays nod ongaggon
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kandin no kopiyannoy woy kosunayan
naayun koy od posolamat to onama pomon koniyu langun woy dii koy en od kolingow nod apii koniyu riyot mgo dosalon doy
naayun doy od sompotton diyot onamon moy ta iddos moppiyon pinuungan dow no id pomon to koniyun kopomakoy
aa koy mandad nolingow taddot kodoiluggat dow no id pomon to koniyun kodginawa woy dos kodtiis dow pomon to mosalig no kodimman dow to kodlivod tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
go suwod no id ginowannan to onama nokosaddoo koy no id aam kow nikandin
yya su iddot id nonaw koy koniyu to oppiyon inoggan konna ra no id oseng koy koniyu ko konna iddos osengan doy id dumannan to kotuusan to his no spiritu woy idda en kos id boggoy konami to kodsalig no bonnaa en kos id nonaw roy
osorollan dow man iddos kodbovotasan doy to ruwon koy pa to koniyu
os langun nod puungan doy atag da en to koniyun kopiyannan
d ikuu kow konami woy riyon tod ongaggon oyya su ahad diyot dakkoon kodposuppit id tanggap dow kos kahit onama duma to kahaan no id pomon to his no spiritu
urisu novovallan kow no moppiyon ponunggelengan to langun nod pompomakoy ruwot prubinsya to acedonia woy kaay to caya
yyos pomon koniyu nokosoob kos kahi tod ongaggon konna ra riyot acedonia woy caya ko konna ahad ingkon norinog to mgo minuvu iddos mokaatag to kopomakoy row to onama
een konnad koilangan nod itulon doy pa ini su sikandan don en kos od ponudtuu mokaatag taddot moppiyon kodtanggap dow konami iddot kodunduwon doy to koniyu
d ponudtulan koy nikandan no id tanan kowd taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama amoy od dumoruma kowd taddot mooggot woy maantoyn onama
oy id ponudtuu ran mandad no id aangat kow to kodinguma taddot nak din no si isas pomon diyot datas to langit
d badnow sikandin to onama woy sikandin kos od poleggua keta taddot od ingumon mokaaratarat no kodsilut to onama pomon to langot din
go suwod nokosaddoo kowd man no waa en nonuhuni iddos timpu to kodunduwon doy to koniyu
okosaddoo kow mandad no to riyon koy pa to ilipos id posupittan woy id poilawan koy nikandan
iru ahad iling tadda id ponokkaa to onama kos ginawa roy to kodponudtuu koniyu to oppiyon inoggan ahad mouraa kos id supak
iyot kodinniyat doy nod tonggapon dow kos konamin ponudtulon waa koy id nonaw to uhus waa molibmit no dontulon doy woy waa koy mandad id aakaa koniyu
iru iddos kovonnaan pomon to nokita to onama no od kosolihan koy to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan id sanna rin dinit konami inin pinuungan
een diyot kodponudtuu roy kaay waa dontulon doy nod pahaa to minuvu ko konna od pahaa to onama no iyon nokosaddoo ko ondan kos kaayt ginawa roy
okosaddoo kow no waa koy id gamit to motoos no mgo osengan amoy uvag kun tod doongon kow woy waa koy mandad id pouvaguvag nod oukuy koniyu amoyd ponoopi
os onama kos od pokoposivonnaa kaay
aa mandad dontulon doy nod nangkap to koddoong to minuvu pomon duwot koniyu o ahad ondoy pa
llog en nanoy no kotungud doy nod doongon dow su mgo apostoles koy man ni isas rays
iru konna koy ungketen ko konna id oupiyannan doy sikiyu iling to kodokudi to inoy riyot kandin no mgo anak
omon to dakkoon ginawa roy koniyu duwon kahaan doy no id boggoy koniyu konna ra iddos oppiyon inoggan to onama ko konna ahad pa inis umuu roy oyyos id dokollan doy sikiyu to ginawa
go suwod nokosampot kow poron man taddot konamin kodoiluggat to ruwon koy pa to koniyu
llow bulli id potaddu koyt ating atag to kouyahan doy su amoy waa ahad ondoy koniyu nod koudluran laggun to id ponudtuu roy koniyu iddos oppiyon inoggan to onama
ikiyu woy dos onama kos od pokoposivonnaa no molinis koy riyot kodontong din motallong woy waa id pokosawoy to kodbovotasan doy riyot koniyu nod pompomakoy
u nokosaddoo kow no iddos kodbovotasan doy riyon to ipat sokkad koniyu iling to kodbovotasan to amoy riyot kandin no mgo anak
d inniyat woy id loglohottan doy sikiyu amoy iddos koniyun koubpa id kahaai to onama woy ollog en nod ngoranan no mgo minuvu rin
yyos sikandin man kos id aam koniyu amoy od kolonug diyot kodhari rin woyd posivantug kandin
naayun koy mandad od posolamat diyot onama oyya su iddot norinog dow konami iddos kandin no kahi id pomakoy kow tadda konna pomon to kahi idda to minuvu ko konna pomon to bonna en idda no kahit onama
oy od ponayun en idda nod undag to moppiya ruwot koniyu nod pompomakoy
u iddos notomanan dow nokoiling to notomanan taddot od lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama riyot udea no nosokkad ki isas rays
yya su id posupittan kow to iling dow ra en no konna mgo udio iling taddot od pompomakoy no toho udea no id posupittan taddot iling dan da en no mgo udio
a idda en no mgo udio kos id imatoy tod ongaggon no si isas rays woy taddot mgo propeta dangan
ikandan en mandad kos id posuppit woy id paawa konami
een id supak dan to id kopiit onama woy kuntra ran to langun no minuvu
d boovahan koy nikandan no od ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan riyot konna mgo udio no idda en kos od pokotobbus kandan
omon tadda ponayun peen nod mokodluntudluntud kos mgo saa ran woy od kosoutan en sikandan taddot langot to onama
iru sikami mgo suwod laggun to nokodpitas ki to moobbavon timpu duwon da en inaayun to koniyu kos konamin poomdom
ray koyd nod kovuhan koniyu deen id nokkaanokkaa koy nod pokolivod amoyd pokodkita kid mandon
u dakkoo en kos ginawa roy no od livod duwot koniyu labbi ron en siyak
opila ron no timpu nod unduwon koy nanoy piru inaayun koy od boovahan ni oivuyan
d kopii roy nod pokodkita ki mandon oyyos sikiyu en kos unayan nod kahaa koy woy duwon koimmanan doy
ikiyu mandad kos id pokopobporoong doy to konamin koponoluwan diyot isowwan tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays init kodlivod din
yya sikiyu en kos bantug woy kahaan doy
a pomon to dii royd od kotiis kos kovuha roy koniyu nopuhawang doy nod polintotuwos koy riyot bonuwa to tenas woy si imoteo kos id pounduwon doy
uwod ta sikandin diyot kopomakoy woy duma roy riyot pinuungan to onama to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
d popiyod doy sikandin amoyd ponokkaa to koniyun ginawa woy kopomakoy su amoy waa sokkad koniyu nod kaantog pomon to mgo kodposuppit no noukitan dow
okosaddoo kowd man no nopuhawang don idda tapoy to onama
yya su laggun to noruma roy pa sikiyu tapoy royd sikiyu id ikohiyan no od tiis ki en to mgo kodposuppit woy nosodsorollan dowd no ini en kos notomanan
een pomon to dii kud od kotiis kos ipong ku koniyu id pounduwon ku si imoteo amoyd kosorollan ko momonnu ron kos kopomakoy row
iid lonna kos ginawa ku su saddook od kookalan kow ni oivuyan woy od kouug no waa koruanon to kodoiluggat doy
a koungkay id livod don si imoteo rini pomon duwot koniyu woy moppiya kos ponudtulon din mokaatag to kopomakoy woy kodginawa row
d ponudtuu rin mandad no inaayun kow od sampot konami woy od ingowollon dow no od kokita koy nikiyu iling to ingowollon doy nod kokita roy mandad sikiyu
een mgo suwod ahad diyon koy to mouraan koosayan woy mgo kodposuppit noinniyat koy en pomon to kopomakoy row
oy od pokosongngasongnga koyd su mosalig don kos koniyun kopomakoy riyon tod ongaggon
aad kotawwan to kodposolamat doy to onama atag koniyu pomon taddot dakkoon kahaan doy riyot isowwan to onama
llow bulli id dasaa koy en no od kokita roy mandon sikiyu amoyd pokotavang koy ko ondan kos kulang to kopomakoy row
uopa no iddos onamon moy ta woy si isas nod ongaggon ta od tavang konami amoyd pokounduwon koy to koniyu
oy muopa no iddos od ongaggon od tavang nod monit peen kos kodpohinowannoy row woy idda mandad so duma iling to kodginawa roy koniyu
uopa mandad no od ponokkalon din kos ginawa row amoy waa id pokosawoy koniyu woy od molinis kow riyot kodontong to onamon moy ta init allow to kodlivod ni isas nod ongaggon ta duma to langun no minuvu to onama
a koungkay mgo suwod nokopohinonaw kowd en konami taddot koubpa no id kahaait onama woy idda en kos kodbovotasan dow pomon poron dangan
kit to kotungud no id boggoy konami ni isas nod ongaggon od buyuwon doy woyd pomonduwan doy sikiyu no od timulan dow peen iddon kodbovotasan
yyos nosorollan dowd man iddos mgo suhu roy koniyu ukit to kotungud no id boggoy konami tod ongaggon no si isas rays
yon id kopiit onama no molinis kow riyot kodontong din deen koilangan nod poriyu kow to molibmit no pinuungan
ikiyu no mgo mama koilangan no od kotuig kow nod tohoo to ingowollon to koniyun lawa su amoy molinis kow riyot kodontong to onama woy riyot kodontong to mgo minuvu
o kowd iling taddot mgo minuvu no waa onama su iyon dan da en od puungan iddos kodikuu to morat no ivog to lawa ran
een yo kowd puung to saa riyot suwod dow to kopomakoy ukit to kodahaw to kandin no sawa
yya su tapoy royd sikiyu id loglohottan tid oseng no od silutan en tod ongaggon iddos od puung to ungketen
u iddos onama id aam keta konna amoy od oubpa riyot kolibmitoy to saa ko konna od oubpa no molinis diyot kodontong din
een iddos ahad ondoy nod elle kaayn nonaw konna minuvu kos id elleyan din ko konna iddos onama no id boggoy keta to his no spiritu rin
a mokaatag to koniyun kodginawa atag to suwod dow riyot kopomakoy konnad koilangan nod sulat koy pa koniyu mokaatag kaay oyya su id nonawwan kowd man to onama no od pohinowannoy kow
oy bonnaa en su id ginowannan dow iddos langun no suwod to kopomakoy riyon to intirut acedonia
iru mgo suwod od pomonduwan doy sikiyu no od ohotton dow peen kos koniyun kodpohinowannoy
yon moppiya no noonokkali row tod oubpa no waa samuk woy yo kowd ponginlavut to pinuungan to duma ko konna puung kow ron mandad to koniyu iling taddot nooseng doyd tapoy koniyu
uungi row ini amoy od korispituwan kow to mgo minuvu no konnod pompomakoy woy amoy dii kowd od salig diyot ahad ondoy taddot mgo koilonganon dow
a koungkay mgo suwod id kopii roy no od kosorollan dow en iddos kovonnaan mokaatag taddot od pompomakoy nid poomatoy ron amoy dii kow od kaanu iling taddot mgo minuvu no waa koimmanan
omon to id pomakoy ki man no id patoy si isas woy novadnow deen id pomakoy ki mandad no iddos od pompomakoy nid poomatoy ron od bodnawon woyd porumannon to onama ki isas init kodlivod din
ni en kos osengan tod ongaggon no id ponudtuu roy koniyu no siketa no nouyag poron diyot kodlivod din dii ki od unna nod tommu kandin ko konna od porumannoy ki taddot id poomatoy ron no novadnow
o iddon timpu od ponog pomon diyot datas to langit iddos od ongaggon duma to monokkaan bawos to kodsuhu
oy od korinog ta iddos kodumow to ponguu to mgo ponolihan woy dos dohingon to trumpeta to onama
a iddos id poomatoy ron no nosokkad ki isas unna nod kovadnow
opongnga tadda siketa mandad nod pompomakoy no nouyag pa to iddon timpu od botunon duma kandan diyon to souhapun amoy od tommu tod ongaggon diyot kooowayan
a od duma kid inaayun tod ongaggon
een mgo suwod poinniyatoy kow ukit kaayn mgo nonaw
a mgo suwod mokaatag to kouhayyoy woy ko kannu ini od kotomanan konnad koilangan nod sosulat koy pa koniyu
yyos nokosaddoo kowd man no iddos allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon tigkow od inguma iling to tokawon diyot bulli
d ponikahi kos mgo minuvu no aa samuk to koubpa ta woy moriyu ki to kororattan
iru tigkow od inguma kandan kos kororattan iling to baay nod sokalan
oy iddon timpu waa en minuvu nod pokoolihu to silut to onama
iru sikiyu mgo suwod waa kowd diyot mosukirom deen otid inguma ron iddon allow no iling to tigkow no kodinguma to tokawon konna kow od kotigkawan
u langun dow mgo minuvu ron man to koowangan woy allow
aa kid diyon to mosukirom woy bulli
een konna ki od tintinuhon to keton kopomakoy iling to duma ko konna koilangan no nopanoy ki woy duwon kodtohoo ta to keton kougolingun
yyos bulli kos timpu to kodtinuhon to mgo minuvu woy dos polohubug bulli rad en mandad kos timpu nod kohubug
iru siketa su riyon kid man to koowangan koilangan no od toholan ta kos keton kougolingun
oilangan nod iling ki to sokkad no sundau no od sukub to putow no umpak no idda en so keton kopomakoy woy kodginawa woy id sukub ta mandad kos putow no somboriru no idda en so mosalig no koimmanan ta nod kotobbus ki
yyos waa ki id aam to onama amoyd silutan ko konna amoy od kotobbus ukit tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
d patoy sikandin atag keta su amoy ahad id patoy kid o nouyag poron diyot kodlivod din od pokoubpa ki duma kandin
een ponayun kow poinniyatoy woy potovangoy no od mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy iling taddot id puungan dow koungkay
a mgo suwod od buyuwon doy koniyu no od rispituwan dow iddos id oiluggat atag koniyu
d aam sikandan nod ponguu koniyu amoy od pomandu mokaatag to kopomakoy row tod ongaggon
een ginowanni row woy rispitui row sikandan pomon taddot id puungan dan atag koniyu
ubpa kow no moppiya kos koroniyan diyon to ipat sokkad
go suwod od loglohottan doy sikiyu no suhuwa row iddos mgo poggulon no koilangan nod puung sikandan
nniyata row iddos mgo taawon woy tovangi row iddos mgo moomet diyon to kopomakoy
oy poowetta row kos posinsya row riyot langun no minuvu
oonokkali row no waa sokkad koniyu nod puung to morat diyot id puung to morat koniyu ko konna noonokkali row inaayun no od puung to moppiya riyon tod pompomakoy woy riyot langun no minuvu
ahaa kow inaayun woy inaayun kow dasaa
iyot ahad ondan no kotomanan posolamat kow inaayun oyya su ini en kos id kopiit onama taddot langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
o row boovahi kos his no spiritu woy yo row poddisokki to koruanon iddos osengan taddot minuvu no duwon id poposaddoo to onama kandin
onongnga row pa iddos langun no nonaw ko mooggot bo no id pomon to onama
yon dow ikula iddos moppiya woy poriyu kow to ahad ondan no kororattan
uopa no iddos onama no id boggoy to kosunayan od tavang koniyu amoyd molinis kow riyot kodontong din
uopa no iddos tivuk no ispiritu row gimukud woy lawa waa id pokosawoy riyon to kodlivod tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
os onama no id aam koniyu od kosolihan woy od puungan din en ini
go suwod dasaa kow atag konami
ouma row kos kodpongumusta roy riyot langun no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy duma to kodginawa
kit to kotungud no id boggoy koddi tod ongaggon od suhuwon ku sikiyu no bosaa row inin sulat diyot langun no suwod ta to kopomakoy
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay duma ki ilas woy ki imoteo
a id sulat doy ini atag koniyu no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy ruwot esalonica no nosokkad diyon to onamon moy ta woy riyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon diyot onamon moy ta woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
go suwod inaayun koy od posolamat to onama atag koniyu woy ollog en nod puungan doy ini oyya su id mosalig peen kos koniyun kopomakoy woy id monit peen kos kodpohinowannoy row
een id pobporoong doy sikiyu riyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama
d pobporoong doy iddos kodtiis dow woy mosalig no kopomakoy ahad diyot langun no kodposuppit woy koosayan dow
ni langun od posivonnaa no motallong en kos kodhukum to onama
yya su amoy ukit to mgo kosupittan no id tiis dow od kokita no ollog kow en nod lonug to kodhari rin
otallong kos kodhukum to onama su iddos od posuppit koniyu od posupittan din mandad
oy sikiyu no id posupittan od poimaayyon kow nikandin ahad mandad sikami
d puungan din idda init od kokita iddos kodlivod tod ongaggon no si isas rays duma to motuus no mgo ponolihan din woy od kolingkus sikandin to apuy
d silutan din iddos waad pomakoy to onama woy dos waa id tanggap to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas nod ongaggon ta
d oilasoy sikandan to silut no waad tomanon woy od poowan diyot isowwan tod ongaggon woy dii ran en od kokita iddos seaa to kotuusan din
d kotuman ini langun diyot kodlivod tod ongaggon su amoy iddos mgo minuvu to onama od doong woyd posivantug kandin
d kolonug kow mandad to koddoong kandin oyya su id pomakoy kow man taddot id posivonnaa roy mokaatag kandin
ni en kos unayan no inaayun koy id dasaa atag koniyu no od tovangan kow to onama ta no iddos pinuungan dow od loppa taddot kodaam din koniyu
d dasaa koy mandad no ukit to kotuusan din od kotuman kos langun no moppiyon puhawang woy pinuungan dow pomon to koniyun kopomakoy
ni en kos dosalon doy su amoy od koposivontuhan iddos od ongaggon no si isas rays ukit koniyu woy od kovantug kow mandad ukit kandin
d kotuman ini langun pomon to kopiyannoy to onama ta woy taddot od ongaggon no si isas rays
a mgo suwod mokaatag to kodlivod tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays woy dos kodtommu ta kandin duwon pomandu roy koniyu
olimulimu yo kow vo goos od kotaong woyd kosasow taddot od osengon to mgo minuvu waa no id inguma ron kun iddos allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon
o kowd pomakoy ahad od ikahi peen sikandan no idda en kos id oseng kandan to his no spiritu o duwon kun ponudtulon o sulat pomon dinit konami
had ondan kos od osengon dan yo kow ron en od paakaa
yyos to dii pa od inguma iddon allow mouraa kos od ponatu to onama idda pa od loppow iddos minuvu nod supak to langun no suhu to onama
os silut nod ingumannon din idda en so linowt apuy
d supakon din kos onama dos langun nod ngoranan to mgo minuvu no monama ran woy dos ahad ondan ondan nod ponsimbaanon dan su amoy sikandin don kos od simbaanon
d unsad peen sikandin diyot templo woy od ikahi no sikandin kun kos onama
aa row pa ayu nolingawi inis langun su inaayun ku man ini id ponudtuu to ruwon a pa to koniyu
oy nokosaddoo kowd ko ondan kos id baavag kandin su amoy gali sikandin od loppow ko timpu rin don
yya su iddon minuvu nod supak to langun no suhu to onama id waong don koungkay piru gali ra idda od kosorollan otik od poowan don iddos id baavag kandin
ddon timpu od loppow ron iddos od supak to langun no suhu to onama
a od imotayan ni isas nod ongaggon iddon minuvu ukit da to kodirup woy seaa to kotuusan to kodinguma rin
iyot timpu nod loppow iddon minuvu od koiroomman sikandin to kotuusan ni oivuyan woy od pokita sikandin to nokodossoosson mokososoobbun pinuungan amoyd aakaa
d puungan din kos ahad ondan no morat amoyd kookalan peen iddos mgo minuvu no iyon od ingumannon iddos linowt apuy oyyos waa ran tonggapa dos kovonnaan mokaatag ki isas no idda en nanoy kos od pokotobbus kandan
omon tadda od aman kos onama no od kookalan sikandan su amoy od pomakoy ran to uhus
a od silutan iddos langun no diid pomakoy to kovonnaan su iyon dan da en id kahaai iddos kodpuung to saa
a sikiyu mgo suwod no id ginowannan tod ongaggon inaayun koy od posolamat to onama atag koniyu
yyos pomon poron to tigkonayan id aam kowd to onama amoyd kotobbus ukit to pinuungan to his no spiritu no id ossa koniyu atag to onama woy ukit to kopomakoy row to bonnaan nonaw mokaatag ki isas rays
d aam kow to onama amoyd kotobbus ukit to oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu roy koniyu su amoy od kolonug kow to bantug tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
een mgo suwod lohinat kow no mosalig diyot kopomakoy woy pomuwa row riyot pusung dow iddos id nonaw roy to ruwon koy pa to koniyu woy dos diyon to sulat doy
d dasaa koy atag koniyu riyon tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays woy riyot onamon moy ta no id pokita to ginawa rin keta
omon to eru rin od koinniyat ki taman to waad tomanon woy duwon mosalig no koimmanan ta
d dasaa koy no od ponokkalon din inaayun kos ginawa row su amoy moppiya kos od puungan woyd osengon dow
a mgo suwod dasaa kow atag konami su amoy goos od pokosoob kos kahi tod ongaggon woy amoy iddos od pokorinog tadda od dokollan dan idda to koruanon iling taddot id puungan dow
asaa kow mandad nod tovangan koy to onama no dii koy od posupittan to morat no mgo minuvu oyyos konna langun od pomakoy to oppiyon inoggan
iru od kosolihan en kos od ongaggon
ikandin kos od tavang nod ponokkaa to koniyun ginawa woy od tomongngan kow nikandin amoy dii kow od komonnu ni oivuyan
oy pomon to nosokkad kowd diyon tod ongaggon duwon dakkoon kodsalig doy no od tumanon dow iddos suhu roy koniyu woyd ponoyunon dow idda tod puung
uopa no iddos od ongaggon od potuntuu koniyu no iddos kodginawa row riyot duma od pokoiling to kodginawa to onama woy dos kodtiis dow to kosupittan od pokoiling to kodtiis ni isas rays
a mgo suwod ukit to kotungud no id boggoy konami tod ongaggon no si isas rays od pomonduwan doy sikiyu no konna kow od lommung to duma row nod pompomakoy no poggulon woy waa id tuman to nonaw no norinog dow konami
yyos sikiyu nosorollan dow en no ollog nod ikulon koy nikiyu su iddot duwon koy pa to koniyu waa koy en id popopogguu
aa koy id aammok ko konna id bayad koy en to kokaan doy
llow bulli id oiluggat koy su amoy waa sokkad koniyu nod koudluran to mgo koilonganon doy
d puungan doy ini konna pomon to waa kotungud doy nod buyu to tavang koniyu ko konna id oiluggat koy oyyos id kopii roy nod koilingan koy nikiyu
u iddot timpu no ruwon koy pa to koniyu id suhu roy sikiyu no iddos ahad ondoy no diid puung koilangan no dii mandad od pokannon
d oseng doy ini oyyos duwon kun duma koniyu no mgo poggulon no iyon da en od puungan iddos kodponginlavut to pinuungan to duma
een ukit to kotungud no id pomon tod ongaggon no si isas rays od suhuwon woyd inniyaton doy iddon mgo minuvu no od potallong nod puung amoy od nangkap to kandan no kouyahan
a sikiyu mgo suwod yo kowd koobbod nod puung to moppiya
tik duwon minuvu no diid tuman to id oseng doy kaayn sulat pomotawi row sikandin woy yo kowd laampi kandin su amoy od koilawan sikandin taddot id puungan din
iru yo row poomdomma no kuntra row sikandin ko konna pomondui row sikandin timbang suwod dow riyot kopomakoy
uopa no iddos od ongaggon no id pomonnan to kosunayan inaayun od boggoy koniyu to kosunayan to ahad kannu woy riyot ahad ondan no kotomanan
uopa mandad no od dumannan kow langun tod ongaggon
a kaayt kodpongumusta ku siyak don en si ablo kos mid sulat kaay
ling en kaay kos od puungan ku riyot kotompusan to langun no sulat ku patow no id pomon en dinit koddi iddon mgo sulat
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay woy apostoles a ni isas rays pomon to suhu to onama no ohodtobbus ta woy ki isas rays no id immanan ta
ni en kos sulat ku kikow imoteo no mooggot no anak ku riyon to kopomakoy
uopa nod kotanggap du kos kopiyannoy eru woy kosunayan no id pomon diyot onamon moy woy ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a imoteo od uliton ku iddos id pomandu ku kikow iddot timpu to kodundiyon ku to acedonia
andobbo oubpa ka pa ruwot feso su koilangan nod suggan du kos mgo minuvu no id ponnonaw to ossa taddot konamin nonaw
sengiyu sikandan no od soroan dan iddos kodpopoomdom dobbo en mokaatag taddot binovallan no mgo itulon woy dos koduwakuwak to timpu to kodoituu mokaatag to mgo ngaran woy koroniyan to kovuyyahan dan
yya su unayan da en idda to kodpoopuloy woy konna idda od pokotavang to kopomakoy ta amoyd tuman to id kopiit onama
yon unayan no id ikahi ku ini su amoy iddon mgo tohodnonaw od pokita to mooggot no kodpohinowannoy
d kopuungan dan ini otik molinis kos pusung dan woy nokosaddoo sikandan no ollog kos pinuungan dan diyot kodontong to onama woy bonnaavonnaa kos kandan no kopomakoy
uwon mgo tohodnonaw no worad mid ikuu kaayn kodbovotasan woy iyon dan moho od puungan iddos waa koruanon no kodpoopuloy
d kopii ran nod kilaannon no mgo tohodnonaw to uhu ni oises piru waa man koovottan dan taddot id ponikahi ran woy taddot dontulon to mgo suhu no id pomohos dan tid nonaw
a mokaatag taddot suhu to onama no id posulat din ki oises nosorollan ta no moppiya idda otik ollog kos kodgamit
osorollan ta mandad no iddon suhu waa bovalli atag to motallong no mgo minuvu ko konna atag taddot mid supak to suhu taddot diid ikuu to nonaw taddot waa allak to onama woy taddot mgo mosaasaa
d bovallan mandad idda atag taddot diid posivantug to onama woyd sumpalit kandin woy atag mandad taddot mgo mongimatoy no ahad peen iddos amoy o inoy ran od imotayan dan
ddon suhu id bovallan mandad atag taddot od aalig taddot od laayuk to iling dan no mama o baay taddot od pongammot to mgo minuvu amoy id boligya nod uriponnon taddot mgo bouhuson taddot od posivonnaa to uhus woy taddot ahad ondoy nod supak to ollog no nonaw
nin nonaw id pomon mandad diyot oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays no id sanna koddi to onama nod bontuhon woy mowwet to langun
d posolamatan ku si isas rays nod ongaggon ta no id boggoy koddi to konokkaan amoyd kopuungan ku iddos id popuungan din koddi su riyot kodontong din od kosolihan a en
urisu id aam a nikandin amoyd kovovallan no sudsuhuwon din
d puungan din idda ahad id sumpalit ku sikandin dangan id posupittan woy id poilawan ku iddos mid pomakoy kandin
iru noeruwan sikandin koddi oyya su iddon timpu waa a pa mid pomakoy deen waa ku nosorolli no morat bos iddos id puungan ku
d busbus tod ongaggon ta iddos eru rin koddi su id boggayan a nikandin to kopomakoy woy kodginawa atag to duma
oy ini en kos notanggap to langun no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays
a bonnaa en woy ollog nod tonggapon to langun iddos osengan no si isas rays mid undini to ingod amoyd tobbus to mgo mosaasaa
oy nosorollan ku no siyak en kos lampas no mosaasaa to langun
iru ahad ungketen noeruwan kos onama koddi woy id posinsyan a nikandin su amoy id pokita ni isas rays kos mowwet no posinsya rin
kit kaay novovallan a no ponunggelengan atag to langun nid pomakoy kandin init od ingumon mgo allow woy od kotanggap dan kos umuun waad tomanon
a ollog en nod posivontuhan woyd doongon inaayun iddos onamon ari woy dos kodhari rin od taman to waad tomanon
ikandin da kos onama no waa kopotayan woy diid kokita
yya od kotuman en ini
a imoteo no anak ku riyot kopomakoy yo ru vo kolingawi inis pomandu ku kikow su iyon id pomonnan kaay idda en so id poponudtuu to onama mokaatag kikow dangan
een yo ru kolingawi ini su amoy duwon kovuut du nod lohinat to bonnaan nonaw iling to sundau nod kosolihan
hottow kos kopomakoy ru woy ayyadayyad ka no iyon du od puungan iddos nosorollan du no id kopiit onama
yyos duwon mgo minuvu no id puungan dan en ahad iddos nosorollan dan no konna moppiya woy pomon tadda norattan kos kopomakoy ran
os oruwa taddot id puung to ungketen idda en si imeneo woy si lejandro
d podtohonon kud sikandan diyot bollad ni oivuyan su amoy od pokoanonganong dan no konna en ollog nod sumpalit to onama
a unnot langun od inniyaton ku sikiyu no koilangan od dasaa woyd buyu ki riyot onama to ahad ondan no koilonganon to langun no minuvu duma to kodposolamat
oilangan mandad no od dasaa ki atag to mgo hari woy taddot langun no duwon kotungud su amoy iddos keton koubpa waa samuk laggun to id tuman ta iddos id kopiit onama woy dos ollog no kodbovotasan
a otik iling tadda kos dosalon ta moppiya idda woy id kahaai to onama no ohodtobbus ta
u id kopii rin no iddos langun no minuvu od kotobbus woyd pokaabbot taddot bonnaan nonaw
yyos sokkad da en kos onama woy sokkad da kos tohodpotongnga no od poduli to koroniyan to minuvu riyot onama
ikandin en kos nominuvu no si isas rays
d boggoy rin kos kandin no umuu amoyd pokolegguang iddos langun no nouripon to saa
opuungan idda riyot ollog no timpu nid aam to onama su amoy ukit kaay id posivonnaa rin iddos kandin nid kopii no od kotobbus kos langun no minuvu
ni en kos unayan no id aam a no apostoles woy tohodponudtuu to kahit onama su amoy id nonaw ku riyot konna mgo udio iddos mokaatag to kopomakoy woy bonnaan nonaw
had duwon diid pomakoy no apostoles a piru nokosaddoo a no mooggot en inis id ikahi ku woy waa ku ini bobbovalli
a id kopii ku no riyot ahad ingkon od lolivuung kos od pompomakoy iddos mgo mama kos od piyod to koddasaa
iru koilangan no iddos koubpa ran id kahaai to onama waa id kolingasai woy waa kodpoopuloy
a mokaatag mandad to mgo baay id kopii ku no konnod kosawoy kos kodoumpak dan
oilangan no konna lampas iddos kodpolihonnoy ran iling to kodsaapid to bowvuu woy kodsukub to mgo mahaa iling to buawan perlas woy mahaa no mgo umpak
yya su iyon koilangan nod puungan dan konna iddos ampow ra no kodpolihonnoy ko konna iddos moppiyon pinuungan no ollog en taddot mgo baay nod ikahi no mopompomakoy sikandan
oilangan no iddos mgo baay od poonongonong nod pominog to nonaw riyot kodlolivuung tod pompomakoy duma to kodpoobbava
ii a od aman no iddos mgo baay kos od nonaw woyd ponguu to mgo mama
oilangan nod poonongonong da sikandan
u riyot timpu no id bovallan to onama kos minuvu si dan kos unna idda pa si va
oy konna si dan kos nookalan ni oivuyan ko konna iddos baay woy sikandin kos unna nid supak to suhu to onama
ni en kos unayan no od koosayan kos mgo baay riyot kodpototobbow ran
iru ahad iling tadda od kotobbus dad sikandan otid ponayun dan nod pomakoy od ginawa to duma od poriyu taddot id kolingasai to onama woy od oupiya to langun nod puungan dan
onnaa en iddos osengan no otik duwon od kopiyan nod ponguu tod pompomakoy od ingowollon din kos moppiya
een koilangan no iddos ponguu tod pompomakoy mama sikandin no waa id pokosawoy sokkad da kos sawa od pokotohoo to kougolingun od kotuig nod podtiitimbang ko ondak moppiya o morat od korispituwan moppiya kos kodolitolit din woy od kotuig sikandin nod nonaw
oilangan no konna sikandin polohubug konna monit kos uu woy konna mahan kos bollad ko konna od pokita sikandin to moppiyon kodbovotasan woy konna bonnong to soopi
oilangan no moppiya kos kodpiyod din to kandin no pomilya woy od nonaw kandan su amoy iddos mgo anak din od dumoruma woyd rispitu kandin
u otik dii sikandin od kotuig nod piyod to kandin no pomilya na monnuwon din man tod piyod iddos od lolivuung nod pompomakoy to onama
oilangan no konna sikandin lammin nopiyod diyon to kopomakoy su saddoo kangkan kod pobporoong sikandin taddot kotundanan din woy idda en kos unayan nod kouug diyot kandin iddos silut to onama iling taddot notomanan ni oivuyan
oilangan mandad no moppiya sikandin no minuvu riyot kodontong to konnod pompomakoy su otik duwon id pokosawoy ran kandin saddook idda en kos unayan nod sahad sikandin to lettag ni oivuyan
a ungketen dad en mandad iddos mgo diyakono koilangan no od korispituwan sikandan od kosolihan kos osengan konna polohubug woy konna bonnong to soopi
oilangan no oggot kos kopomakoy ran taddot bonnaan nonaw no id posaddoo to onama
oy koilangan mandad no nosorollan dan no waa nopuungan dan no morat diyot kodontong to onama
a ini sikandan koilangan no od geddaman pa kos kodbovotasan dan
tid kokita no waa id pokosawoy kandan idda pa od kotoddu sikandan no diyakono
ngketen dad en mandad iddos kandan no sawa koilangan no od korispituwan sikandan konna bousihon od kotuig nod tohoo to kougolingun woy od kosolihan to langun nod puungan dan
ddos mgo diyakono koilangan no sokkad da kos sawa woy moppiya kos kodpiyod dan to kandan no mgo anak woy taddot langun no sakup diyot baoy ran
u otik moppiya kos pinuungan dan od rispituwan en sikandan woy waa kodduworuwa ran nod ponudtuu mokaatag to kopomakoy ran ki isas rays
a imoteo id imman a nod pokounduwon a to kikow to diid kouhoy
iru id sulat ku rad en ini kikow su otid kolewang a man inin sulat kos od nonaw kikow ko ondan kos ollog no kodbovotasan tod pompomakoy riyot pomilya to onama
iketa no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy nokoiling ki to baoy to maantoyn onama
okoiling ki to tuddok woy pounsaran taddon baoy oyyos siketa kos od kosolihan din taddot bonnaan nonaw
okosaddoo ki no dakkoo kos koruanon taddot id pomokayan ta no waa pa id posaddoo dangan piru koungkay id posaddoo ron idda keta ukit ki isas rays
yya su id pokita sikandin kaay to ampowt ingod iddot nominuvu sikandin woy id pakpak diyon to krus
d posivonnalan to his no spiritu no nak en sikandin to onama
okita mandad sikandin to mgo ponolihan
oponudtuu iddos mokaatag kandin diyot nokodossoosson tribu kaay to ampowt ingod
d pomakoy kandin kos mgo minuvu riyon to intirut ingod
oy id batun sikandin diyot datas to langit amoyd posivontuhan
a oraroy nod koovottan iddos id posaddoo to his no spiritu no init morin mgo allow duwon mgo minuvu nod tanan to mooggot no kopomakoy su iyon dan od pominoggon iddos uhus no nonaw to morat no mgo ispiritu
ddon nonaw id ponudtuu taddot mgo minuvu no uvag kun to mopompomakoy piru bouhuson sikandan
nin pinuungan dan dii ron od pokomosakit to ginawa ran oyyos naayam dan don nod ouhus
d diiyan dan kos minuvu nod poosoway woy duwon mandad mgo kokaan no id diiyan dan
iru iddos onama kos mid bovaa taddon mgo kokaan su amoy siketa nod pompomakoy no nokosaddoo to bonnaan nonaw od kaan tadda duma to kodposolamat
u iddos langun no binovallan to onama moppiya
een koilangan no waa od diiyan ta ko konna od tonggapon ta idda langun duma to kodposolamat
yyos nosorollan ta no waa id diiyan no kokaan pomon to idda en kos id ikahi to onama woy pomon to id posolamatan tad idda
tik id nonaw ru inis pomandu ku kikow ruwot mgo suwod to kopomakoy moppiya ka no uripon ni isas rays
yyos id ponayun ka nid labbotlabbot to kovonnaan mokaatag to keton kopomakoy woy taddot bonnaan nonaw no id ikuu ru
o kod pominog taddot binovallan no mgo itulon no waa koruanon no konna pomon diyon to onama
oyamow baling kos kougolingun du nod ikuu to id kopiit onama
uwon koruanon to kodlayam to lawa amoyd monokkaa
iru lampas pa kos koruanon to kodlayam ta riyot kodikuu to id kopiit onama oyya su od undag ini to kopiyannan to lammin umuu koungkay woy init morin allow
nin osengan bonnaa en woy ollog nod tonggapon to langun
ni en kos unayan no od oiluggat ki woy od nokkaanokkaa to kodponudtuu to ahit onama
u iddos id immanan ta idda en so maantoyn onama no ohodtobbus to langun labbi ron en keta nod pompomakoy
a imoteo inis langun no id nonaw ku kaayn sulat nonaw ru ruwon tod pompomakoy su amoy od tumanon dan
oilangan no dii ka od kosawoy to mgo minuvu pomon to anak ka pa
okita ru to langun no moppiya ka no ponunggelengan ukit to kodooseng du kodbovotasan kodginawa kopomakoy woy koubpa no molinis diyot kodontong to onama
a laggun to waa a pa ruwon boggayiu to dakkoon timpu kos kodbasa to ahit onama dos kodponudtuu woy kodnonaw tadda riyot ipat timpu no od lolivuung kow
omitow kos kotuihan no id boggoy to his no spiritu
d boggoy idda kikow iddot timpu no duwon id poposaddoo to onama ukit to mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy timpu no id torungngan dan kos uu ru to bollad dan diyon to koddasaa
uungiyu riyot tivuk no ginawa ru iddos pomandu ku kikow amoy od kokita to langun no id udsuu ka riyot kodtuman to id kopiit onama
oyyariyu kos kodbovotasan du woy kodnonaw ru
yya su otid ponayun ka to kodtuman tadda od kotobbus ka woy idda mandad so od pominog kikow
o kod esa taddot buyyag pa kikow no mgo mama ko konna ooyyariyu sikandan tod pomandu iling to amoy ru
a idda mandad so ari ra kikow no mgo mama poiling du sikandan to mgo suwod du
os buyyag pa kikow no mgo baay poiling du sikandan to inoy ru
oy idda mandad so ari ra kikow no mgo baay poiling du sikandan to mgo tobboy ru no waa morat no ingowollon du
a mokaatag to mgo baayn bau nonaw ru riyon tod pompomakoy no koilangan nod rispituwan woyd tovangan dan iddos mgo bau no worad od kooputan
iru ko duwon pa mgo anak woy mgo apu taddot bau sikandan kos ollog nod tuhanuu kandin
u otik mopompomakoy sikandan koilangan no iddos unnon od puungan dan idda en so kodtuhanuu to mgo buyyag dan amoyd balus kandan oyya su idda en kos id kahaai to onama
a iddos baayn bau no worad en od kooputan koilangan no od tovangan sikandin tod pompomakoy su worad ossa nod koimmanan din idda en so onama
een ponayun sikandin od dasaa woyd nganoy to onama allow bulli
iru iddos baayn bau no iyon din da en ingowollon iddos kahaan kaay to ampowt ingod timbang id patoy ron sikandin ahad nouyag pa oyyos waa riyot kandin kos umuun waad tomanon
onaw ru inis mgo pomandu ku riyon tod pompomakoy amoy waa id pokosawoy kandan
u otik duwon od pompomakoy no diid tuhanuu to kandin no korumannan labbi ron en to pomilya rin id inoyyuhan din kos kandin no kopomakoy
ddos iling taddon minuvu lampas pa kos komorattoy rin taddot konnod pompomakoy
een mokaatag taddot mgo baayn bau lista ru iddos ollog nod tovangan
oilangan no lampas don to annomnopuu kos idad woy waa sikandan id uman mid osawa
oilangan no novantug sikandan diyot moppiyon pinuungan iling to moppiyon kodpiyod to kandan no mgo anak moolitolit od puung no duwon kodpoobbava atag to mgo minuvu to onama od tavang tod pongkohirapan woy id boggoy ran kos tivuk no ginawa ran to kodpuung to ahad ondan no moppiya
iru iddos mgo baayn bau no anak poron yo ru opila tod lista su moomok nod kopalin kos poomdom dan
yya su otid inguma kos ingowollon dan nod uman od osawa od inoyyuhan dan baling iddos ingowollon dan nod puung atag ki isas rays
a ko ungketen od kosawoy sikandan oyyos waa ran man tumana iddos kandan no tandu iddot novau sikandan no dii ran od uman od osawa amoyd puung dan atag ki isas rays
ssa pa tadda otid opilon iddon mgo bau tod lista amoyd tovangan saddook od popopogguu ron sikandan woy iyon dan don od puungan iddos kodpongumballoy
yon pobbo en nokomorat tadda su od sosoupot dan woyd ponginlavut to pinuungan to duma woy od osengon dan iddos konna nanoy ollog nod osengon
een atag koddi moppiya pa ko iddos mgo baayn bau no anak pa od uman baling nod osawa od anak woy od tuhanuu to sakup dan diyot baoy
a ukit kaay iddos id supak to kopomakoy waa unayan dan nod oseng to morat mokaatag keta
d ikahi ku ini oyyos duwon mgo bau no id suwoy ron su iyon dan id ikuu si oivuyan
os od pompomakoy no duwon korumannan no mgo bau sikandin don en kos od tavang kandan amoy diid kovoggatan iddos od lolivuung nod pompomakoy su amoy od pokotuhanuu ran taddot mgo bau no worad od kooputan
a mokaatag taddot mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy no moppiya kos kodpiyod dan koilangan en nod rispituwan woy od boggayan to ollog no daddas to buwoo labbi ron en iddos id oiluggat to kodponudtuu woy kodnonaw to kahit onama
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no o row pungusi kos baka nod looyyak to ommoy amoyd pokokaan
oy duwon mandad noikahi no mid ungketen to ddos id puung ollog en nod boyaran
tik duwon minuvu nod uug taddot mgo ponguu tod pompomakoy no nokopuung sikandin to saa yo ru idda loompiya otik waa oruwa o otollu nod posivonnaa tadda
iru ko bonnaa man no nokopuung sikandin to saa suggaaw sikandin diyot isowwan to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy amoyd sondit sikandin woy dos duma od kovaakkan nod iling kandin
a imoteo diyot isowwan to onama woy ni isas rays woy taddot mgo ponolihan no id aam din od suhuwon ku sikkow no puungiyu inis pomandu ku kikow no waa od poomihan du woyd podmusingon
o kod goosgoos nod aam ko ondoy kos od kilaannon no ponguu tod pompomakoy su saddook iyon du od kaaam iddos minuvu no nokopuung to saa woy od kopoletan ka
een ayyadayyad ka no waa id pokosawoy kikow
a mokaatag tod geddamon du ini kos pomandu ku kikow
o kod inom to oweg da ko konna inom ka rad mandad to disok uvag no binu amoy od kovowiyan kos gottok du su komouraa kad id dorau
oy yo ru kolingawi no duwon mgo minuvu no iddos saa ran orayd kokita ahad waa pa id inguma iddos kodhukum
uwon mandad mgo minuvu no iddos saa ran nokoollos piru od kosorollan dad en idda riyot mori
a iling dad en mandad tadda iddos moppiyon pinuungan
uwon moppiyon pinuungan no orayd kokita woy ahad iddos konna pa orayd kokita od kosorollan en idda riyot mori
a mokaatag to langun no uripon nod pompomakoy koilangan no dakkoo kos rispitu ran to kandan no amu su amoy waad sosumpalit to ngaran to onama woy taddot id nonaw ta
a atag taddot uripon no iddos amu rin od pompomakoy konna ollog nod poomdommon din no pomon to suwod sikandan diyot kopomakoy od pososalig don sikandin
yon koilangan no od upiyannan din peen kos kodpuung din su iddos notovangan din duma rin man nod pompomakoy no id ginowannan to onama
ni en kos id nonaw woy id inniyat du tod pompomakoy ruwon no od tumanon dan en ini
tik duwon minuvu no ossa kos nonaw rin woy konnod ikuu taddot nonaw tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays woy konna idda od potuntuu keta riyot koubpa nid kahaai to onama iddon minuvu orayd poratasdatas woy waa nongnong
yon din inaayun od ingowollon iddos waa koruanon no kodpoopuloy mokaatag to kohulugan to mgo kahi
a iyon od undahon tadda idda en so kosina ukahan morat no mgo osengan woy kodampoo to duma
nin mgo minuvu waa soroan dan nod pokidapuu su ebbaw kos poomdom dan woy dii ran don od pokaabbot to bonnaan nonaw
oy id imman dan no od koratu ukit to kodnonaw mokaatag to onama
iru bonnaa rad en no iddos minuvun mopompomakoy lampas pa sikandin nod koratu otid koongaddan sikandin taddot koubpa rin
u riyot kodtobbow ta kaay to ampowt ingod waa en nopiyod ta
ling mandad tadda riyot timpu nod patoy kid waa en mandad od kopiyod ta
een otik duwon od kannon woyd umpakon ta od koongaddan kid
iru iddos mgo minuvu no od kopiyan nod koratu moomok nod kouug diyot saa
ling to od sahad sikandan to lettag to langun no koongollan woy mokodoraat no ingowollon no od lonnod kandan diyot kororattan
u iddos lampas no kodginawa to soopi idda en kos dalig to langun no morat no pinuungan
uwon mgo minuvu no pomon to ingowollon dan to soopi nokosuwoy baling sikandan diyot kopomakoy woy pomon tadda iling to nounoy ran taddot kandan no pana no idda en so mouraan laggow nod inguma kandan
iru sikkow imoteo pomon to minuvu ka man to onama poriyu ka to langun no morat no pinuungan
yon du puungi noonokkaliyu iddos motallong no pinuungan dos id kopiit onama dos kikown kopomakoy dos kodginawa to duma dos kodtiis to kosupittan woy dos mowwet no posinsya
okkaanokkaa ka ponayun to kodpomakoy iling to minuvu nod lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu taman to kotompusan
iis ka amoyd kotanggap du iddos umuun waad tomanon no id tandu to onama iddot id aam ka nikandin to id punudtuu ru riyot isowwan to mgo minuvu no id pomakoy kad ki isas rays
a diyot isowwan to onama no id boggoy to songnga to langun woy riyot isowwan ni isas rays no id ponudtuu to kovonnaan no waa kodaangaang diyot ki oncio ilato duwon pomandu ku kikow
oyyariyu to kodtuman iddos langun no suhu to onama su amoy waa morat nod pokosambut tadda woy diid kosawoy
uungiyu ini taman to kodlivod ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a otid inguma ron kos ollog no timpu od polivoddon sikandin to onama
llog en nod doongon kos onama woy sikandin da kos od ponguu to langun
ikandin kos ari to langun no hari woy ongaggon to langun nod longaggon
ikandin da kos waa kopotayan
id ubpa sikandin diyot orayn mosella no diid koporoniyan
aa minuvu no nokokita kandin woy waa en od pokokita kandin
d povontuhon ta iddos onama no motuus taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a mokaatag to mgo minuvu no dakkoo kos korotuwan kaay to ampowt ingod pomonduiyu sikandan no konna ran od pobporoong woy konnod salig taddot korotuwan dan nod lihad da
yon dan od solihan iddos onama nod busbus to langun no koilonganon ta amoyd kahaa ki
omonduiyu mandad sikandan no od puung to moppiya amoy od koratu ran diyot moppiyon pinuungan
oy koilangan no konna ran od koohoddan ko konna movoggoyvoggoy ran diyot duwon mgo koilonganon
tid puungan dan ini id loimud dan to korotuwan diyot datas to langit iling to mosalig no pounsaran no diid kowora
oy ini en kos koimmanan dan init morin allow amoy od kotanggap dan iddos bonnaan umuu no idda en so umuun waad tomanon
a imoteo ooyyariyu kos mgo nonaw no id sanna to onama kikow amoy diid kovovaawan
o kod ilingiling taddot mgo osengan no waa koruanon no dii id kahaai to onama ahad iddos kodpoopuloy mokaatag taddot od tommanon to duma no mowwet kun no sinorollan piru konna man
yyos duwon duma nid ikahi no riyot kandan iddos mowwet no sinorollan
iru pomon tadda nokosuwoy ran da en baling to bonnaan nonaw no id pomokayan ta
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay woy apostoles a ni isas rays pomon to id kopiit onama
d popiyod a nikandin amoyd ponudtuu mokaatag to umuun waad tomanon no id tandu rin keta no nosokkad ki isas rays
d popiyod ku inin sulat duwot kikow imoteo no timbang anak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa
uopa nod kotanggap du kos kopiyannoy eru woy kosunayan no id pomon diyot onamon moy woy ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a imoteo id posolamat a to onama nod simbaanon ku iling taddot id puungan to kovuyyahan ku woy nosorollan ku no iddos kodpuung ku atag to onama waa lomig diyon
llow bulli waa ku sikkow lingawi riyot koddin dosalon
d pingpingawon a kikow to nosompottan ku iddos kikown dayas iddot kodlogkiyat ku dangan woy id kopii ku en nod pokodkita ki mandon amoyd kahaa kos ginawa ku
d posolamat a su nosorollan ku iddos bonnaavonnaan kopomakoy ru iling taddot kopomakoy to apu ru no si oida woy taddot inoy ru no si unice no unna pa kikow nid pomakoy
okosaddoo a no ungketen dad en mandad kos kopomakoy ru
ni en kos unayan no id posampot ku kikow no koilangan nod poogloggon du kos kotuihan no id boggoy to onama kikow iling to koduyag to baha
otanggap du iddon kotuihan iddot id torungngan ku to koddin bollad kos uu ru
yyos waa id boggoy to onama iddos spiritu rin amoyd taawon ki ko konna amoy od mosalig kos ginawa ta od tavang keta nod mohingginawa ki riyot duma woy amoy od kotuig ki nod tohoo to keton kougolingun
een yo kod koilow nod posivonnaa mokaatag tod ongaggon ta
o ru mandad id koilow no noprisu a pomon to kodpuung atag kandin ko konna tiis ka duma koddi riyon to mgo kosupittan no noukitan ta riyot kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan
iis ka su iddos onama kos od boggoy to konokkaan
ikandin kos id tobbus keta woy id aam ki nikandin su amoy id poossa ki no mgo minuvu rin
d puungan din ini konna pomon to pinuungan ta su iddot waa pa bovalli inis ingod id puhawang din don tapoy no id pokita kos eru rin keta ukit ki isas rays
a koungkay id pokita rin don iddos eru rin keta ukit to kodundini ni isas rays no ohodtobbus ta
d talu rin kos kotuusan to kopotayan su amoy kod pomakoy ki to oppiyon inoggan od pokotanggap ki to umuun waad tomanon
oy id aam a no apostoles amoy od ponudtuu woyd nonaw kaayn oppiyon inoggan
oy ini en kos unayan no id tiis a to kosupittan dinit prisuwan
iru konna ku ini id koilow oyyos nokilaa ku iddos id solihan ku woy nokosaddoo a no od bontayan din en kos langun no id sanna rin koddi taman to allow to kodlivod ni isas rays
a imoteo ikulow iddos bonnaan nonaw no norinog du koddi
onayun ka riyot kopomakoy woy kodginawa ru pomon to nosokkad ki riyot ki isas rays
oy ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu no id ubpa rinit keta bontayiu iddos bonnaan nonaw no id sanna to onama kikow amoy diid kovovaawan
osorollan du no kourallan tod pompomakoy riyot prubinsya to sia mid tanan don koddi apii ron en si igelo woy si ermogenes
iru si nesiforo waa mid tanan koddi
uopa no id pokita to onama kos eru rin diyot langun no sakup to pomilya rin oyyos komouraa a nikandin id inniyat
onna a mandad nikandin id koilow ahad noprisu a ko konna to id inguma sikandin kaayt oma id nangkap a nikandin taman to nokita a
okosaddoo ka mandad taddot dakkoon tavang din to riyon a pa to feso
uopa no iddos od ongaggon od pokita kandin to eru init allow to kodhukum
a sikkow imoteo no anak ku riyot kopomakoy ponokkalow kos ginawa ru ukit to tavang ni isas rays
ddos nonaw no norinog du no id nonaw ku riyot mouraan minuvu nonaw ru mandad idda riyot od kosolihan no mgo minuvu amoy id pokononaw ran mandad diyon to duma
onug ka riyot kodtiis to kosupittan timbang od kosolihan no sundau ni isas rays
aa sundau nod poikot taddot pinuungan to konna mgo sundau
u iyon dontulon din no od kahaa kos ponguu rin
a iling dad en mandad taddot minuvu nod lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu waa en od kotanggap din no ganti otik dii rin od ikulon kos mgo poukit to kodlumba
ngketen dad en mandad iddos minuvu no id oiluggat to kodkamot ollog en no sikandin kos unna nod tanggap to taad taddot bunga to pinomuwa rin
oomdommow inis mgo osengan ku su od tovangan ka tod ongaggon amoyd koovottan du ini langun
oy riyot kosupittan poomdommow no si isas rays novadnow pomon diyot kopotayan woy lubbad ni arin avid
ni en kos oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu ku
omon to kodponudtuu ku kaayn oppiyon inoggan id tiis a to kosupittan dinit prisuwan woy id baku a to kodina iling to sokkad no kriminal
iru ahad id baku a iddos kahit onama konna en od kovaku
een od tiison ku kos langun no kosupittan atag to mgo minuvu no id aam to onama su amoy od kotobbus sikandan ukit to kopomakoy ran ki isas rays woy od kolonug dan to waad tomanon no seaa to kotuusan din
onnaa en iddos osengan no mid ungketen to tik id lonug ki to kopotayan ni isas rays od kolonug ki mandad duma kandin diyot lammin umuu rin
tid ponayun ki nod tiis to kosupittan od hari ki mandad kangkan duma kandin
iru kod ikahi ki no waa ki id kilaa kandin od ikohiyon din mandad kangkan no waa sikandin id kilaa keta
tik dii ki od kosolihan ponayun en sikandin nod kosolihan oyyos od tumanon din en ko ondan kos id oseng din
a posampot du ruwot od pompomakoy iddos mgo osengan ku
oy loglohottiyu sikandan diyot isowwan to onama no konna ran od poopuloy mokaatag to kohulugan to mgo kahi su iddon od kopuungan waa koruanon woy od pokodoraat da en to kopomakoy taddot od pominog
oonokkaliyu tod tuman iddos id kopiit onama amoyd kahaa sikandin kikow
a otik iling tadda kos od puungan du waa id koilow ru su ollog man iddos kodpaabbotlabbot du taddot bonnaan nonaw
o kod ilingiling taddot mgo osengan no waa koruanon no konna id kahaai to onama su iddos od puung to iling tadda od pokoriyu peen to onama
ddos nonaw ran nokoiling to mokaaratarat no bohok no kanser no enotenot od kotkot to tivuk no lawa
os oruwa taddot od ponnonaw to ungketen si imeneo woy si ileto
d suwoy ran taddot bonnaan nonaw oyyos tomman dan no id lihad don kos kodbadnow deen worad kun od ingumon kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron
a iddon nonaw nokodoraat to kopomakoy to duma
iru ahad ungketen dii en od kovovaawan iddos bonnaan nonaw to onama iling to mosalig no batu no pounsaran no diid kowaong
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to okilaa to onama ko ondoy kos kandin no mgo minuvu
uwon peen nokosulat dutun no ddos ahad ondoy nod ikahi no minuvu sikandan to onama koilangan nod tanan to langun no morat no pinuungan
a imoteo duwon ponunggelengan ku
iyot dakkoon baoy to minuvu nod koruwonnan duwon mgo tootawwan no binovallan pomot buawan woy plata no od gomiton atag to kolivuungan no dakkoo kos koruanon
uwon mandad mgo tootawwan no binovallan pomot kayu woy livuta no iling to kuron atag to ahad ondan nod kohomitan
a siketa nod pompomakoy od pokoiling ki en mandad taddot mgo binovallan no dakkoo kos koruanon
tid tonanan ta kos langun no morat no pinuungan dakkoo kos koruanon ta riyot kodontong to onama oyyos od kahamit ki atag kandin woy nopanoy kid nod puung to ahad ondan no moppiya
oriyu ka taddot nooyami no morat no ingowollon to mgo sudduwan poron
yon du moho noonokkali iddos motallong woy ohottow kos kopomakoy ru
oonokkaliyu mandad iddos kodpokita to ginawa riyot duma woy oubpa ka no moppiya kos koroniyan du riyot mgo minuvu no iddos kodnganoy ran to onama id pomon diyot molinis no pusung
oriyu ka mandad taddot mgo koongollan woy waa koruanon no mgo kodpoopuloy
okosaddoo kad man no od undag da en idda to ukahan
os uripon tod ongaggon koilangan no konna boopulon ko konna moppiya sikandin diyot langun no minuvu
oilangan mandad nod kotuig sikandin od nonaw woy mowwet kos posinsya
oilangan no od oupiyannan din to kodpomandu duma to mosunay no pusung iddos od supak to bonnaan nonaw
u saddook od boggayan sikandan to onama to timpu no od sondit to kodsupak dan amoyd pokohimata ran taddot bonnaan nonaw
a od kopokes don kos koovottan dan woy od pokolegguang sikandan pomon diyot lettag ni oivuyan nopongnga ran nokosahad to kodpuung tid kopii rin
a imoteo pomotawiyu inis od osengon ku
nit morin mgo allow oraroy ron no mosuppit kos kotomanan
yya su iyon od dokollan to mgo minuvu to ginawa iddos kandan no kougolingun woy dos soopi
raroy ran nod pobporoong od poratasdatas od doddoraat to duma konnod dumoruma to amoy woy inoy ran konna od kotuig nod posolamat woy waad en allak dan to onama
aad en ginawa woy eru ran diyot duma konna ran od posinsya od bovaavovaa ran to uhus mokaatag to dumon minuvu woy waa kodtohoo ran to ingowollon to kougolingun
onna ran od aangaang nod posakit to duma woy od kolingasa ran to ahad ondan no moppiya
ray sikandan nod aakaa to mgo oukuy ran woy aawang don od puung to ahad ondan no waa kodpopoomdom
ampas don kos kodpobporoong dan woy iyon dan od dokollan to ginawa iddos kahaan kaay to ampowt ingod konna iddos onama
d pouvaguvag dan no mopompomakoy piru id elleyan dan iddos kotuusan to onama no od pokopalin to morat no kodbovotasan dan
a imoteo poriyu ka to mgo minuvu no iling tadda
u iddos duma kandan od kotuigtuig nod nangkap to poukit amoyd pokousok diyot mgo ubpan oyyos od aakaa ran to mgo baay no moomok nod kopiyod to nonaw ran
ddon mgo baay noonnod don to saa woy nouripon to morat no ingowollon
d pominog sikandan to ahad ondoy ron nod nonaw kandan woy pomon tadda dii ran don od kosorollan iddos bonnaan nonaw
ddon mgo tohodnonaw od supak taddot bonnaan nonaw
go ebbaw kos poomdom dan woy uhus kos kopomakoy ran
okoiling sikandan ki annes woy ki ambres no mid supak dangan ki oises
iru iddos kopondayan dan nod aakaa dii en od kouhoy oyyos od kosorollan dad en to mgo minuvu kos koongollan dan iling taddot notomanan onni annes woy ambres
iru sikkow imoteo nosodsorollan du iddos nonaw ku dos kodbovotasan woy dontulon ku
osorollan du mandad iddos kopomakoy ku dos mowwet no posinsya dos kodginawa ku to duma woy dos kodtiis ku to kosupittan
osorollan du mandad iddos kodposuppit woy kodoilasoy no noukitan ku riyon to ntioquia conio woy riyot istra
iru id poleggua a tod ongaggon diyot langun no morat no puhawang dan atag koddi
yya bonnaa en no iddos langun no od kopiyan nod dumoruma to id kopiit onama pomon to nosokkad sikandan diyot ki isas rays od ukit en to mgo kodposuppit
a iddos morat no mgo minuvu woy dos od aakaa to duma od morat peen iddos pinuungan dan
d aakaa ran to duma woyd kookalan mandad sikandan
iru sikkow ponayun ka taddot langun no nopohinonawwan woy id pomokayan du
yyos nokilaa ru man no iddos id ponnonaw kikow od kosolihan en
omon poron to koonakoy ru nononawwan kad taddot osulat no ahit onama no idda en kos od pokovoggoy kikow to moraom no koovottan amoyd kotobbus ka ukit to kopomakoy ru ki isas rays
os langun no osulat no ahit onama idda en so onama kos id pomonnan
rayn dakkoo kos koruanon tadda su idda en kos od nonaw keta ko ondak bonnaa od sugga to kodpuung to saa od potullid to morat no kodbovotasan woy od nonaw keta to motallong no koubpa
kit to kodpohinonaw tadda iddos minuvu no uripon to onama worad en kulang to kodpuung din to langun no moppiyon pinuungan
a imoteo od loglohottan ku sikkow tod pomandu kaayt isowwan to onama woy riyot ki isas rays no od hukum to langun no minuvu no nouyag woy taddot id poomatoy ron
oy pomon to od livod en sikandin amoyd hari od pomonduwan ku sikkow no koilangan id ponudtuu ru kos kahit onama
d kopiyan man kos mgo minuvu nod pominog o dii ahad ondan no timpu ponudtuu ru en idda
otullid du sikandan suggaaw taddot morat no pinuungan dan woy inniyatow sikandan duma to mowwet no posinsya riyot kodnonaw ru
yya su od inguma kos timpu no iddos mgo minuvu konnad od kopiyan nod pominog to bonnaan nonaw
yon dan baling od puungan od angoy ran to mouraan minuvu nod nonaw taddot id kotoosi ran tod pominog
d povovongoo ran taddot bonnaan nonaw su iyon dan od pominoggon iddos binovallan no mgo itulon
iru sikkow imoteo koilangan no duwon kodtohoo ru to kikown kougolingun diyot ahad ondan nod kotomanan
iis ka to mgo kosupittan ponayun ka nod ponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan woy puungiyu kos langun no id sanna to onama kikow
u mokaatag koddi id inguma ron kos timpu no inis umuu ku iling to id buwis don diyot onama oyyos asow ad od tanan kaay to ampowt ingod
okoiling a to minuvu no id lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu no nokoinguma ron diyot kotompusan
d noonokkalan ku mandad tid puung iddos langun no id sanna to onama koddi woy waa a mid suwoy to mooggot no kopomakoy
oy koungkay id panoy koddi tod ongaggon iddos ganti no idda en so kuruna to kotoongngan no id boggoy rin diyot timpu nod hukuman din kos langun no minuvu woy dos kandin no kodhukum motallong
onna ra siyak kos od pokotanggap to ganti ko konna idda mandad so langun nod aangat to kodlivod din
oonokkaliyu no goos ka od pokoundini
yyos si emas id tonanan ad nikandin su iyon din id dokollan to ginawa iddos kahaan kaay to ampowt ingod woy mid undiyon don sikandin to esalonica
a mokaatag ki resente id undiyon sikandin to alacia woy si ito diyon mandad to almacia
yon ku robbo duma kaay si ucas
tid undini ka tuuyow vo si arcos su oray sikandin nod pokotavang to pinuungan ku
a mokaatag ki iquico id poundiyon ku sikandin to feso
nit kodundini ru piyoddow iddos umpak ku no mowwet so bollad no id tuwos ku riyon to baoy ni arpo no riyot bonuwa to roas
iyoddow mandad iddos mgo libru labbi ron en iddos id luun no mgo sulat ku
a si lejandro no tohodsayab orayn morat kos id puungan din koddi
iru iddos onama ron kos od kotuig taddot nopuungan din
antoy ka su oray sikandin nod supak to keton nonaw
ddot unnon timpu no id intudinturan a riyot hukumanan waad en ahad sokkad nid lohinat to kodtavang koddi ko konna langun dan mid tanan koddi
uopa no dii sikandan od sukutan to onama
iru ahad iling tadda waa a en tonani tod ongaggon woy id boggayan a nikandin to konokkaan su amoy id pokoponudtuu ku iddos oppiyon inoggan diyot langun no konna mgo udio
d polegguang a nikandin pomon diyot bollad to mgo minuvu nod imatoy nanoy koddi
oy nosorollan ku nod tovangan a en tod ongaggon pomon diyot ahad ondan no kororattan woy od piyoddon a nikandin diyot datas to langit no riyon en iddos kodhari rin
d doongon sikandin to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a od pongumusta a ki riscila woy ki quila woy riyon mandad to pomilya ni nesiforo
i rasto id polintotuwos diyot orinto woy mokaatag ki rofimo id tuwos ku sikandin diyot ileto su novohokan
oonokkaliyu no od pokoundini ka to dii pa od inguma kos timmohonnow
a id pongumusta kikow onsi ubulo ahad si udente si ino si laudia woy dos langun no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
uopa no inaayun od duma kikow iddos od ongaggon woy od kotanggap du kos kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo kos mid sulat kaay woy sokkad a no uripon to onama woy apostoles ni isas rays
d aam woy id popiyod a nikandin su amoy od mosalig kos kopomakoy to mgo minuvu no id aam din woy amoy od paabbotlabbot kandan taddot bonnaan nonaw no od undag to koubpa nod ikuu to id kopiit onama
oy pomon taddon bonnaan nonaw duwon dakkoon kodsalig dan nod pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
d tandu to onama inin umuu pomon poron to tigkonayan woy nosorollan ta no dii en sikandin od ouhus
oy riyot ollog no timpu no tapoy id puhawang din id posaddoo rin to mgo minuvu inin oppiyon inoggan
een id solihan a to kodponudtuu kaay ukit to suhu to onama no ohodtobbus ta
a ini veen kos sulat ku kikow ito no timbang mooggot no anak ku pomon to keton kopomakoy
uopa nod kotanggap du iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy woy ki isas rays no ohodtobbus ta
a ito id posampot ku ra kikow no id tuwos ku sikkow riyot isla to reta su amoy od ipongngan du iddos waa nopongnga no pinuungan ta woy amoy od aam ka to od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy riyon to ipat bonuwa
o ru kolingawi iddos pomandu ku kikow mokaatag taddot od aamon du
yon du aama iddos mgo minuvu no waa id pokosawoy woy sokkad da kos sawa
oilangan no iddos mgo anak dan od pompomakoy mandad woy waa novantug no morat kos kodbovotasan woy konna motoggas kos uu
u iddos od pombuyyahon no sinolihan to pinuungan to onama koilangan no waa id pokosawoy
een koilangan no konna sikandan od pobporoong konna moomok nod langot konna polohubug konna mahan kos bollad woy konna bonnong to soopi
oilangan no iddos od pombuyyahon moppiya kos kodolitolit dan woy iyon dan od dokollan to ginawa iddos moppiya
oilangan no od kotuig sikandan nod podtiitimbang ko ondak moppiya o morat motallong sikandan od oubpa no molinis diyot kodontong to onama woy od kotuig nod tohoo to kougolingun dan
oy koilangan no od lohinatan dan iddos bonnaan nonaw no nopohinonawwan dan su amoy ukit to kodponudtuu ran tadda od mosalig kos kopomakoy to duma woyd kosugga iddos od ponsupak tadda
d ikahi ku ini oyyos duwon mouraan minuvu no od supak to bonnaan nonaw woy id aakaa to duma ukit to waa koruanon no mgo osengan
ourallan taddon mgo minuvu iddos od pompomakoy no mgo udio no mid nonaw no koilangan od potupu amoyd kotobbus
oilangan nod suggan du sikandan su id samuk dan kos mouraan pomilya ukit to kodnonaw ran to konna ollog
ddon mgo minuvu kodponoopi ra en kos dontulon dan
had iddos sokkad taddot mgo propeta ran no toho reta mid ikahi no ddos mgo toho reta mgo bouhuson
okoiling sikandan to mgo movuut no monnanap woy mgo poggulon no iyon da en od puungan iddos kodkaan
yya mooggot en iddos id oseng din
een suggaaw sikandan to waa kodaangaang su amoy od mosalig kos kodpomakoy ran taddot bonnaan nonaw woy amoy konnad sikandan od pominog taddot binovallan no mgo itulon to mgo udio woy taddot mgo suhu no binovallan to minuvu nod elle to bonnaan nonaw
u iddos mgo minuvu no id linisan don to onama atag kandan molinis iddos ahad ondan
iru iddos mgo minuvu no molibmit kos poomdom woy diid pomakoy atag kandan molibmit iddos ahad ondan oyyos molibmit man kos poomdom dan woy dii ron od kotuig nod podtiitimbang ko ondak moppiya o morat
d ooseng sikandan no id kilaa ran kun to onama piru ukit to pinuungan dan od kokita no waa ran id kilaa kandin
raroy ran id kolingasai to onama konna ran morumoruma kandin woy waa kogahan dan nod puung to ahad ondan no moppiya
iru sikkow ito iyon du id nonaw iddos od ikuu riyot bonnaan nonaw
onawwow iddos buyyag no mgo mama no koilangan no od kotuig sikandan nod tohoo to kougolingun dan
oilangan nod korispituwan sikandan woy od kotuig nod podtiitimbang ko ondak moppiya o morat
oilangan mandad no mosalig kos kopomakoy ran mohingginawa woy motiistiis to kosupittan
a iling dad en mandad tadda kos id nonaw ru taddot buyyag no mgo baay
oilangan no iddos koubpa ran od loppa taddot kodbovotasan tod pompomakoy
oilangan no konna sikandan od doddoraat to duma woy konna polohubug
oilangan no iyon dan id nonaw iddos moppiya su amoy od kononawwan dan iddos sudduwan pa no mgo baay to kodginawa to sawa ran woy mgo anak dan
d nonawwan dan mandad sikandan no koilangan od kotuig dan nod podtiitimbang ko ondan kos moppiya o morat woyd oubpa no molinis diyot kodontong to onama
oy od nonawwan dan sikandan no koilangan od kotuig dan nod tuhanuu riyot kandan no baoy moppiya kos botasan dan woy od poiraom to kodponguu to sawa ran
yya su ko ungketen kos od puungan dan waa od pokosumpalit to kahit onama
a iling mandad tadda nonawwow iddos mgo konakan no koilangan od kotuig sikandan nod tohoo to kougolingun dan
ikkow mandad ito id pokita ru no od koponunggelengan ka ukit to moppiyon pinuungan du
oy riyot kodnonaw ru koilangan no bonnaavonnaa idda woy dos kikown kodbovotasan koilangan nod loppa taddot kahit onama no id nonaw ru
oilangan no bonnaa iddos langun nod osengon du amoy diid kosawoy
tik ungketen kos od puungan du od koilawan iddos mgo minuvu no id supak keta pomon to waa od kooseng dan no morat mokaatag keta
a mokaatag mandad to mgo uripon nonawwow sikandan no koilangan od poiraom dan to kodponguu to kandan no amu ukit to koddumoruma to mgo suhu amoyd kahaa kos amu ran
oilangan no dii ran od apuu woy konnod aawang od pomurut ko konna id pokita ran nod kosolihan en sikandan
a riyot langun no pinuungan dan od kooseng to mgo minuvu no moppiya en kos nonaw mokaatag to onama no ohodtobbus ta
oilangan mandad no id nonaw ru kandan iddos langun nid pomandu ku oyya su id pokita to onama kos kopiyannoy rin amoy od kotobbus kos langun no minuvu
oy ukit kaayn kopiyannoy id nonaw rin keta no koilangan nod tonanan tad iddos koubpa no konna id kahaai to onama ahad iddos morat no mgo ingowollon ta
aggun to kaay ki pa to ampowt ingod koilangan od kotuig ki nod tohoo to keton kougolingun motallong ki woy dos pinuungan ta id kahaai to onama
dda en kos od botasanon ta laggun tod aangat ki taddot moppiya nod kotomanan ta init allow no od kokita tad iddos seaa to kotuusan ni isas rays no onamon motuus woy ohodtobbus ta
d boggoy rin kos kandin no lawa atag keta ukit to kopotayan din su amoy od kotobbus ki pomon diyot langun no saa ta
oy nolinisan ki amoy od kovovallan no mgo minuvu rin no dakkoo kos ginawa nod puung to moppiya
a ito nonaw ru ini langun
nniyatow sikandan nod puung kaay woy yo kod aangaang nod sugga to morat no pinuungan dan
iyot kodpuung du tadda pokita ru no duwon kotungud du amoy dii ka od kosawoy to dumon minuvu
osampot du riyon tod pompomakoy no koilangan nod poiraom sikandan to mgo ponguu woy taddot duwon kotungud diyon to guberno
oilangan nod dumoruma sikandan woy nopanoy inaayun nod puung to ahad ondan no moppiya
oilangan mandad no konna sikandan od doddoraat to duma woy konnod poopuloy ko konna id pokita ran no mosunay sikandan woy bonnaavonnaa kos kodpoobbava ran diyot langun no minuvu
u ahad siketa dangan to waa ki pa id pomakoy waa nongnong ta to onama woy konna ki morumoruma
d tarin ki woy id uripon to nokodossoosson ingowollon woy kahaan kaay to ampowt ingod
d oubpa ki nod posakit to ginawa to duma woy od kosina
d kolingasai ki to mgo minuvu woy id kolingasai ta mandad sikandan
iru iddos onama no ohodtobbus ta id pokita to kopiyannoy woy ginawa rin keta
d tobbus ki nikandin konna pomon to motallong no pinuungan ta ko konna pomon to eru rin
d tobbus ki nikandin ukit to kodlinis to his no spiritu amoyd pokotanggap ki to lammin umuu woy amoy od kolammi kid
aa kodaangaang no id boggoy to onama iddos his no spiritu rin ukit ki isas rays no ohodtobbus ta
d puungan ini to onama su amoy ukit to kopiyannoy rin keta od komotallong ki woy od kotanggap ta iddos umuun waad tomanon no id immanan ta
nis id ponikahi ku ito mooggot en
een id kopii ku no id nonaw ru ini su amoy iddos od pomakoy to onama od boggoy to dakkoon timpu to kodpuung to moppiya
a inin mgo nonaw orayn moppiya woy dakkoo kos koruanon atag to langun no minuvu
iru poriyu ka taddot koongollan no idda en so kodpoopuloy dos kodpoituloy mokaatag to mgo ngaran woy koroniyan to kovuyyahan dan
oriyu ka mandad taddot kodpoopuloy mokaatag to mgo uhu ni oises oyyos waa koruanon taddon pinuungan woy konnod pokotavang to keton kopomakoy
tik duwon mgo duma ru nod gobba to kodposokaddoy tod pompomakoy suggaaw sikandan to kosokkad o kooruwa
iru ko dii peen sikandan od pominog na podtohonowd sikandan
yyos nokosaddoo ka no iddon mgo minuvu ebbaw kos poomdom woy mgo mosaasaa su ahad nosorollan dan no morat iddos id puungan dan id ponayun dan peen nid puung tadda
a nopuhawang ku no od pounduwonnon to kikow si rtemas o si iquico
tid inguma ron sikandin duwon goos ka vo tommu koddi riyot icapolis oyyos nokopuhawang a nod ubpa pa tahad dutun to timmohonnow
oglohottiyu tod tavang no od pokologkiyat don si enas no obugadu woy si polos su amoy waa kulang to mgo koilonganon dan
onawwow kos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no od boggoy to dakkoon timpu to kodpuung to moppiya amoy od pokotavang dan taddot orayd kohirapan
u otik iling tadda kos od puungan dan duwon moppiyon undahon diyot koubpa ran
d pongumusta kikow inis mgo duma ku rini
ouma ru vo mandad kos kodpongumusta roy ruwot langun nod pompomakoy no id ginawa konami
uopa no langun dow od pokotanggap to kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si ablo no noprisu pomon to kodponudtuu mokaatag ki isas rays
d sulat ku ini duma ki imoteo no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
nin sulat atag kikow ilemon no id ginowannan doy no suwod woy duma riyot pinuungan atag to onama
oy atag mandad ini ki pia no tobboy ta riyot kopomakoy woy ki rquipo no duma ta no timbang sundau ni isas woy riyon to langun nod pompomakoy no id lolivuung diyot kikown baoy amoy od simba
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onamon moy ta woy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
a suwod ku no ilemon inaayun a nod posolamat to onama ipat timpu nod dasaa a atag kikow
yyos norinog ku iddos mokaatag to kodginawa ru to langun no minuvu to onama woy dos mooggot no kopomakoy ru riyon tod ongaggon no si isas rays
d dasaa a no od ponayun ka nod tavang tod pompomakoy su amoy od moraom peen kos kikown koovottan mokaatag to langun no kopiyannan no notanggap ta pomon to nosokkad kid diyot ki isas rays
d ginowannan ku no suwod orayn nokopahaa woy nokoinniyat koddi kos kikown kodginawa oyyos nokovoggoy ka to kahaan to mgo minuvu to onama
een duwon od buyuwon ku kikow
omon to kotungud no id boggoy koddi ni isas rays od pokosuhu a en nanoy kikow no od puung taddot ollog nod puungan piru pomon to ginawa od poerueru a kikow
iyak si ablo no sokkad no buyyag woy noprisu pomon to kopomakoy ku ki isas rays od buyuwon ku kikow no pokita ru kos kikown kopiyannoy ki nesimo
yyos nokoiling to anak kud sikandin su ukit koddi kaayt prisuwan sokkad don sikandin nod pompomakoy ki isas rays
angan waa pa koruanon din diyot kikow piru koungkay duwon don dakkoon koruanon din diyot kikow woy kaayt koddi
a od pouliyon ku pobbo si nesimo ruwot kikow ahad mosakit to ginawa ku kos kodpopitasoy roy
d kopii ku nanoy no od polintotuwos pa sikandin duma koddi su amoy ukit kandin od pokotavang ka koddi laggun tid prisu a pomon to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
iru konna ku sikandin od koowiran otik dii kod aman oyyos dii a od kopiyan nod pohoson ka nod tavang koddi su iyon moppiya no mahan diyot ginawa ru iddos kikown kodtavang
addook puhawang to onama no od pokoddiyu kow ki nesimo to moobbavon timpu su amoy riyot kodlivod din dii kowd en od pokodpitas ahad kannu
oy poomdommow no koungkay konna ra sikandin uripon ko konna id ginowannan dud no suwod diyon to kopomakoy
d dokollan ku sikandin to ginawa piru lampas du peen sikandin nod ginowannan konna ra pomon to uripon du sikandin ko konna pomon to suwod dud en diyon tod ongaggon
een otid kilaannon a man nikkow no mooggot no duma ru riyot kopomakoy tonggapow sikandin iling to kodtanggap du koddi
oy otik nokopuung man sikandin to saa o nokoutang kikow kaay rud to koddi sukuta
kit kaayt bollad ku siyak don en kos id sulat no siyak si ablo kos od bayad kikow
iru waa a mid ikahi kaay amoyd posampot kikow taddot timbang utang du koddi oyya su ukit to koddin kodnonaw nokotanggap ka to umuun waad tomanon
een suwod kolimulimu puungiyu ini koddi su nosokkad ki man to kopomakoy riyon tod ongaggon
oggayiu to kahaan inis pusung ku timbang toosuwod ki riyot ki isas rays
d sulat ku ini kikow oyyos id salig a nod puungan du en inis od buyuwon ku kikow
