oy nosorollan ku no lampas peen kaay tod buyuwon ku kos od puungan du atag ki nesimo
ssa pa tadda panoy ka vo tapoy tod kotinuhonnan ku ruwot kikown baoy oyya su id imman a no ukit to tavak to mgo dosalon dow od polegguangon ad dinit prisuwan woy od pokolowwi a en duwot koniyu
a id pongumusta koniyu si pafras no duma ku no noprisu pomon to kodponudtuu to oppiyon inoggan mokaatag ki isas rays
d pongumusta mandad koniyu iddos id tavang koddi riyot pinuungan to onama no onsi arcos si ristarco si emas woy si ucas
uopa nod kotanggap dow kos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
a kaay ra en taman
a dangan no timpu komouraa id posaddoo to onama iddos ponudtulon din diyot keton kovuyyahan ukit to mgo propeta woy nokodossoossa kos poukit to kodposaddoo rin tadda
iru inin morin mgo allow id posaddoo idda to onama keta ukit to nak din
oy ukit en kandin id bovallan to onama kos langun diyon to langit woy kaayt ingod woy id aam sikandin to onama no od pongomunoy to langun
iyot kandin od kokita kos langun no seaa to kotuusan woy kopiyannoy to onama oyyos waa koossan din to onama
ikandin kos id somad to langun no riyot langit woy kaayt ingod ukit to kotuusan to kahi rin
opongnga ki nikandin id linisan pomon diyot mgo saa ta id livod sikandin diyot datas to langit woy mid unsad lomig to kowanan to onama no otuus to langun
a pomon kaay id pokita to onama no lampas iddos nak din taddot mgo ponolihan su iddos ngaran no id boggoy kandin to onama lampas pa kos bantug taddot ngaran to mgo ponolihan
yyos waa en ponolihan no id osengan to onama no ikkow en kos nak ku
nin allow id pokilaa ku no moy a nikkow
oy waa en mandad id oseng kos onama mokaatag taddot ahad ondoy no ponolihan no mid ungketen to iyak od kaamoy rin donwoy sikandin od kaanak kud
a diyot timpu no id popiyod don to onama kaay to ampowt ingod iddos nak din no ponganoy mid ikahi sikandin to oilangan no od simba kandin iddos langun no ponolihan
oy ini en kos id oseng to onama mokaatag to mgo ponolihan kahi rin to inuhuwan ku iddos mgo ponolihan woy kopakoy nod bovallan ku sikandan iling to apuy woy kaamag no od tuman to suhu ku
iru riyot nak din mid ikahi iddos onama to ikkow en kos onama
d hari ka to waad tomanon woy motallong kos kodhari ru to kikown mgo minuvu
d kahaai ru kos motallong no pinuungan piru id kolingasai ru kos kororattan
dda en kos unayan no siyak no onama ru id aam ku sikkow nod boggayan to bantug woy kahaan no lampas pa taddot langun no duma ru
uwon mandad id ikahi to onama riyot nak din no mid ungketen to ikkow od ongaggon diyot tigkonayan mid bovaa ka to ingodwoy ukit to bollad du novovallan iddos langun no riyot langit
d kowora man kos langun piru sikkow od taman en to waad tomanon
angun kaay iling to tapoyn umpak no dii ron od kahamit
oy iling to tapoyn umpak od luppiyon du kos langit woy ingod woy od buwassan du to lammi
iru sikkow dii ka en od kopalin woy dos umuu ru od taman to waad tomanon
a atag mandad taddot mgo ponolihan waa en ahad sokkad kandan no id osengan to onama iling kaayt id oseng din diyot nak din kahi rin to nsad ka lomig to kowanan ku taman tod kotalu kud iddos od pongkuntra kikow woy id poiraom ku sikandan to kikown kodponguu
a ko ungketen iddos mgo ponolihan mgo ispiritu sikandan no sinuhuwan to onama amoy od tavang to langun nod kotobbus
een pomon to lampas man to langun iddos nak to onama koilangan no id pomuwa ta riyot keton pusung iddos bonnaan nonaw no norinog ta su amoy dii ki od pokosuwoy tadda
osorollan ta no mooggot en iddos mgo uhu no id posaddoo to onama riyot kovuyyahan ta ukit to mgo ponolihan
oy dos waa id tuman taddon mgo uhu id silutan en sikandan loppa taddot saa no nopuungan dan
a otik id silutan man dangan to onama iddos waa id tuman to mgo uhu no id posaddoo ukit to mgo ponolihan lampas ki peen nod silutan otik od podtohonon ta inis dakkoon koruanon to kodtobbus
yya su iddos od ongaggon don en no si isas kos id ponudtuu kaayn kodtobbus woy dos nokorinog kandin id posivonnaa keta no mooggot en ini
oy dos onama id posivonnaa mandad taddon kodposivonnaa ran ukit to kotuusan no id boggoy rin kandan diyot kodpuung to nokodossoosson mokososoobbu woy riyot mgo kotuihan no id pomon to his no spiritu nid boggoy rin ukit to id kopii rin
a mokaatag taddot od inguma pa no lammin ingod no noikahi royd konna en mgo ponolihan kos id boggayan to onama to kotungud nod ponguu tadda init morin timpu ko konna idda en so mgo minuvu
yyos duwon osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to onama ondan man kos diyot minuvu mambot od kosowkuu ka kandan
inuvu ra sikandan mambo man tod okudiyon du
d poobbava ru sikandan taddot kotungud to mgo ponolihan to moobbavon timpu
d boggayan du sikandan to bantug woy koddoong iling to hari woy id poiraom du mandad kos langun diyot kandan no kodponguu
a noikahi kaay no iddos langun noiraom to kandan no kotungud
yon kohulugan tadda no waa en ahad ondan no diid poiraom kandan
iru to inin timpu waa ki nokokita no duwon minuvu no id ponguu to langun
iru si isas da en kos nosorollan ta no nokotuman tadda
yya su iddot timpu no kaay pa sikandin to ampowt ingod id poobbava sikandin to onama taddot mgo ponolihan to moobbavon timpu su amoy od patoy sikandin atag to langun no minuvu pomon to ginawa woy eru to onama atag keta
oy koungkay pomon to noukitan din don iddos kopotayan id boggayan sikandin to bantug woy koddoong iling to hari
ddos onama kos tohodbovaa to langun woy id bovallan kos langun amoyd koposivontuhan sikandin
urisu ollog en iddos puhawang din no ukit to kodtiis ni isas to langun no kosupittan od kovovallan si isas no ohodtobbus no waa id pokosawoy
oy ukit kaay mouraa kos od kovovallan no mgo anak to onama no od posivontuhan din
yyos si isas kos id tagkas to daan atag to kodtobbus keta
a koungkay si isas no id awa to mgo saa ta woy siketa no nolinisan don sokkad da en kos moy ta no idda en so onama
een od kahaa si isas nod ngaran keta no mgo suwod din
u mid ikahi sikandin diyot onama no mid ungketen to d pokilaa ku sikkow riyot mgo suwod ku to kopomakoy
d kanta a to koddoong kikow riyot id lolivuung no id ponsimba kikow
d ikahi mandad sikandin to d salig a en to onama
oy mid ungketen peen sikandin to ni ad duma to mgo anak to onama no id sanna rin koddi
a siketa no mgo anak to onama mgo minuvu ki no duwon kopotayan
een si isas mandad nominuvu iling keta su amoy od ukit sikandin to kopotayan
oy ukit taddot kopotayan din id talu rin si oivuyan no id pomonnan to kopotayan
a ko ungketen duwon don kolegguangan taddot mgo minuvu no nouripon to allak dan nod patoy pomon poron to koonakoy ran
aay ta en pantok od kosorollan no konna iddos mgo ponolihan kos id tovangan din ko konna idda en so koubbaran ni braham
urisu koilangan en nod kominuvu sikandin iling keta woy od koukitan din mandad iddos langun no noukitan ta amoyd kovovallan sikandin no eeruwon woy morumoruma no owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis
oy tohodpotongnga sikandin atag keta riyot isowwan to onama amoy od koposinsyan kos mgo saa ta
a pomon to nokoukit don sikandin to kodposuppit woy kodgeddam od pokotavang en sikandin taddot langun no minuvu nod ukit to kodgeddam
urisu mgo suwod no id aam to onama amoyd kovovallan no mgo minuvu rin no od lonug kandin diyot datas to langit poomdomma row si isas nid pomokayan ta
ikandin en kos id popiyod to onama amoyd ponudtuu to kahi rin
oy sikandin mandad kos owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis no id lohinat atag keta riyot isowwan to onama
orumoruma sikandin to onama no id aam kandin iling mandad ki oises no morumoruma to kotundanan din to kodpiyod taddot mgo minuvu to onama no idda en kos od ngoranan no aoyt onama
iru si isas ollog en no lampas nod posivontuhan kuntra ki oises su otid ponunggelengan ta kos baoy iyon lampas no od posivontuhan iddos mid bovaa konna iddos baoy
yyos nosorollan ta no iddos ipat baoy duwon en id bovaa tadda piru iddos onama kos tohodbovaa to langun
a si oises morumoruma sikandin no sudsuhuwon diyon to baoyt onama
os pinuungan din ponunggelengan idda taddot kovonnaan no id posaddoo to onama init od ingumon timpu
iru si isas rays konna ra sikandin sudsuhuwon to onama ko konna nak din en no morumoruma no od ponguu taddot baoyt onama no idda en so langun no mgo sakup din
a siketa kos mgo sakup din otid ohotton ta peen kos kodsalig ta taddot id pobporoong ta no koimmanan
een poomdomma row iddos pomandu to his no spiritu no mid ungketen to ni en no allow otid korinog dow kos bawos to onama yo row potoggasa kos pusung dow iling taddot id puungan to koniyun kovuyyahan
u iddon timpu to riyon pa sikandan to nokaawoyawoyn lugaa id supak woy id geddaman dan ko ingkon taman kos posinsya to onama
yya su mid ikahi iddos onama to had nokita ran don iddos mokososoobbun pinuungan ku daom to oppatnopuun lahun piru id geddaman a peen nikandan kod poowetton ku kos posinsya ku taddot motoggas no uu ran
een oray a no nolingasa taddon mgo minuvu woy mid ikahi a to naayun od polinsuwoy kos poomdom kaayn mgo minuvu woy dii ran od tuman to mgo suhu ku
omon to langot ku id sosapa a no ii ran en od pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy ku
urisu mgo suwod ooyyari row inaayun no waa en sokkad koniyu no morat kos kodbovotasan pomon to diid pomakoy oyyos idda en kos od pokoporiyu koniyu pomon diyot maantoyn onama
yon dow puungi poinniyatoy kow ipat allow laggun to duwon pa timpu su amoy dii kow od kookalan to saa no od pokopotoggas to koniyun pusung
u otik mosalig kos kopomakoy ta riyot ki isas rays pomon to tigkonayan taman to kotompusan od kolonug ki en taddot langun no riyot kandin
o kowd kolingow taddot noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ni en no allow otid korinog dow kos bawos to onama yo row potoggasa kos pusung dow iling taddot id puungan dangan to koniyun kovuyyahan no id supak dan kos onama
a ondoy man iddos mgo minuvu no nokorinog don to bawos to onama piru mid supak peen sikandan
aa ossa idda en so mgo ebreo no id ponguuwan ni oises to kodleggua ran pomon diyot hipto
oy ondoy man iddos mgo minuvu no id kolingasai to onama daom to oppatnopuun lahun
dda rad en so mgo ebreo no nokosaa kandin no id poomatoy riyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
oy ondoy man iddos mgo minuvu no id ikohiyan to onama iddot sosapa sikandin no dii ran en od pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy rin
dda rad en so mgo minuvu no waa id dumoruma kandin
a kaay ta en pantok od koovottan no iddos unayan no waa sikandan nokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy to onama oyyos waa ran id pomakoy to kahi rin
a ahad waa nokousok iddon mgo minuvu riyot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy to onama waa en nopalin iddos tandu rin nod pokousok kos mgo minuvu rutun
urisu od ayyadayyad ki su saddook iddos duma keta diid pokousok
yya su nokorinog kid man to oppiyon inoggan no norinog dangan to keton kovuyyahan mokaatag taddon imooyyan
iru ahad norinog dan idda waa koruanon tadda riyot kandan oyyos waa ran id pomakoy
a iyon da od pokousok taddon imooyyan siketa en no mid pomakoy
iru iddos waa id pomakoy dii en od pokousok tadda oyyos mid ikahi iddos onama to omon to langot ku id sosapa a no dii ran en od pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy ku
d oseng din ini ahad tapoy rin don nopanoy iddon imooyyan pomon poron to kodbovaa to ingod
yya su riyot osulat no ahit onama duwon osengan mokaatag to ikopittun allow no mid ungketen to a to ikopittun allow id imolloy ron iddos onama to langun nid puungan din
oy mokaatag kaay duwon mandad id ikahi to onama riyot kovuyyahan ta no mid ungketen to ii ran en od pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy ku
een iddos mgo minuvu dangan no nokorinog taddot oppiyon inoggan mokaatag to imooyyan waa ran nokousok tadda oyyos waa sikandan id pomakoy to onama
iru duwon en dumon mgo minuvu no id kopiit onama nod pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy rin
urisu id boggoy peen iddos onama to timpu amoyd pokousok tadda woy iddon timpu ini ron en no allow
yyos pomon poron ki osue nouhoy pa iddos timpu nid lihad idda pa mid ikahi mandon iddos onama ukit ki arin avid no mid ungketen to ni en no allow otid korinog dow kos bawos to onama yo row potoggasa kos pusung dow
osorollan ta no iddos mooggot no imooyyan no id panoy to onama konna en iddos ingod to anaan no id piyoddan ni osue to kovuyyahan ta
u otik diyon pa to anaan iddon imooyyan worad nanoy id ikahi iddos onama no duwon pa osson allow nod boggayan din to imooyyan kos mgo minuvu
a ko ungketen duwon peen mooggot no imooyyan atag to mgo minuvu to onama amoy od pokoimolloy sikandan iling to onama no id imolloy riyot ikopittun allow to kodbovaa rin to ingod
u iddos ahad ondoy nod pokousok taddot ingod no imooyyan no id panoy to onama od pokoimolloy ron to pinuungan din iling to onama no id imolloy to langun nid puungan din
urisu od noonokkalan ta en nod pokousok taddon imooyyan su amoy waa sokkad keta no od pokoiling taddot kovuyyahan ta no waa nokousok oyyos waa sikandan id tuman taddot id ikahi to onama
u maantoy kos kahit onama woy motuus
otaom pa ini to polihuma no oruwok taom no od pokouddok taman diyot kinoroomman to poomdom woy ginawa ahad pa riyot loosoan woy utok to tullan
yya su iddos kahit onama od pokopokita to langun no ingowollon to minuvu ahad iddos nokoollos no puhawang din
yyos waa en id pokoollos pomon to onama su nosorollan din kos langun mokaatag taddot mgo binovallan din woy od isau ki en kandin atag taddot langun no nopuungan ta
een pomon to siketa duwon motuus no owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis no riyot datas to langit no idda en si isas no nak to onama od ohotton ta kos keton kopomakoy woy konna ki od soro nod ponudtuu no si isas rays kos od ongaggon ta
u iddos keton owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis nokaabbot to mgo komoometan ta oyya su iddos langun nod koukitan ta no kodgeddam noukitan din en mandad piru waa en sikandin nopiyod nid puung to saa
urisu dii ki od kaaangaang no porani amoyd dasaa riyon to onama oyyos mohingginawa sikandin woy eeruwon
d koerui ki nikandin woy od tavang sikandin diyot timpu no duwon mgo koilonganon ta
ddos minuvu no id aam no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis pomon to mgo duma rin no ebreo id solihan sikandin nod isau to onama atag taddot mgo duma rin
ikandin kos od bovuwis taddot id pomboggoy atag to onama woy od poongossa to oyama atag to kodposinsya to mgo saa
a pomon to minuvu ra meen iddon tohodbuwis duwon komoometan din
urisu od kotuig sikandin nod poowwet to posinsya rin taddot mgo minuvu no nokosuwoy to id kopiit onama oyyos waa saddoo ran no saa vos iddos id puungan dan
oy pomon to duwon mandad komoometan din koilangan no unna pa sikandin od poongossa to oyama atag to mgo saa rin idda pa od poongossa sikandin atag to dumon minuvu
aa minuvu nod unoyunoy od aam to kougolingun din amoyd kovovallan no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis su id kopii rin iddos bantug
yyos idda ra en so onama kos od aam to minuvu no od boggayan taddon bantug iling taddot kodaam din dangan ki aron
ngketen dad en mandad si isas rays waa sikandin id unoyunoy nid povantug to kougolingun din amoy od kovovallan no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis ko konna idda en so onama kos id puung tadda
yya su mid ikahi sikandin to ikkow en kos nak ku
nin allow id pokilaa ku no moy a nikkow
uwon mandad id ikahi rin no mid ungketen to ohodbuwis ka to waad tomanon iling taddot pogkotohodbuwis dangan ni elquisedec
ddot timpu no kaay pa si isas to ampowt ingod diyot koddasaa rin id nganoy sikandin diyot onama duma to monokkaan kodsinoggow oyyos nokosaddoo sikandin no od pokopolegguang kandin iddos onama pomon diyot kopotayan
a id tavak to onama iddos dosalon din su mopoobbava sikandin woy morumoruma to mgo suhu
yya su ahad nak sikandin to onama notuig sikandin nod tuman to mgo suhu to onama ukit taddot kosupittan no noukitan din
kit tadda novovallan si isas no ollog woy waa id pokosawoy no tohodtobbus taddot langun no morumoruma kandin amoy od kotanggap dan iddos umuun waad tomanon no id pomon kandin
oy id aam mandad sikandin to onama no owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis iling ki elquisedec
a mouraa pa nanoy kos od kooseng doy mokaatag to pogkotohodbuwis ni elquisedec woy ni isas rays piru mohirap ini no id paabbotlabbot koniyu su motoggas kow nod poovotton
anoy od pokononaw kowd diyon to duma su nouhoy kowd man diyot kopomakoy
iru taman koungkay koilangan kow peen nod nonawwan mokaatag to kahit onama no norinog dowd diyot unna
okoiling kow poron to mgo anak no koilangan pa od susu oyyos dii kow pa man od pokosoppa to mokoggaan mgo kokaan
yya su iddos minuvu no iling tadda waa pa saddoo ko ondan kos ollog nod puungan din su nokoiling sikandin to anak poron
iru iddos mokoggaan kokaan idda en kos ollog nod kannon to mgo buyyag don diyot kopomakoy oyyos od kotuig don man nod podtiitimbang ko ondan kos moppiya woy morat
urisu pomon to nouhoy kid man id pomakoy koilangan nod udsuu ki pomon diyot unnon mgo nonaw mokaatag ki isas rays woy od ponayun ki riyot mgo nonaw no od pokomosalig to keton kopomakoy
onna tad od liilivoddon iddos nopohinonawwan tad iling to kodtanan taddot waa koruanon no pinuungan woy dos mokaatag to kopomakoy ta riyot onama
onna tad mandad od liilivoddon iddos nopohinonawwan tad mokaatag to kodpoboutismu dos koddasaa ukit to kodtoddung to bollad diyot uu dos kodbadnow taddot id poomatoy ron woy dos kodhukum no waad tomanon kos undahon
yon moppiya otik id kopiit onama ponayun ki nod udsuu riyot kodpohinonaw taddot moraom no mgo nonaw mokaatag kandin
yyos motoggas don en nod polivoddon woyd posonditon kos mgo minuvu otik id inoyyug dan don ki isas
u dangan noowangan don man kos poomdom dan woy noheddaman dan don iddos kopiyannan no id pomon diyot datas to langit woy nolonug sikandan taddot mgo noiroomman taddot kotuusan to his no sipiritu
oheddaman dan don mandad iddos kopiyannoy to kahit onama woy dos kotuusan to kodponguu rin init od inguma pon timpu
iru ahad noukitan dan don idda langun id inoyyuhan dan dad en si isas
a ko ungketen waa en od pokopiyod kandan no od sondit woyd livod diyot kopomakoy
u iddos nopuungan dan nokoiling to id ulit dan id pakpak diyon to krus iddos nak to onama woy id poilawan diyot isowwan to langun
iketa no mgo minuvu nokoiling ki to kamot no inaayun od uranan
tid pontuvu ron iddos mgo pinomuwa duwon koruanon tadda riyot komunoy
a iddos minuvu no iling taddon kamot od busbusan en to onama to kopiyannan
iru ko iyon od pontuvu taddon kamot iddos mgo aggi woy sopinit waa en koruanon tadda riyot komunoy
yon din od puungan od tirukkan din iddon kamot woy konnad en idda od tuvuwan to pinomuwa
a iling mandad tadda od silutan en to onama iddos mgo minuvu nod inoyyug kandin
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod ahad ungketen kos mgo osengan ku dakkoo kos kodsalig ku no konna kow od puung to iling tadda su iddos moppiyon pinuungan dow kilaannan no notobbus kowd en
yya su ollog en kos langun nod puungan to onama
ii rin en od kolingawan iddos kodtavang dow taddot mgo minuvu rin pomon to koniyun kodginawa kandin woy id puungan dow idda taman koungkay
yon dakkoon ingowollon doy no ipat sokkad koniyu od ponayun nod nokkaanokkaa no od puung tadda taman to kotompusan amoyd kotuman iddos langun nid immanan dow
d oseng doy ini su amoy dii kow od popopogguu riyot kopomakoy ko konna ilingi row iddos mgo minuvu no pomon to dakkoon kodsalig dan woy mowwet no kodtiis notanggap dan iddos mgo tandu to onama
oomdomma row man iddos tandu to onama ki braham
omon to waa od pokolampas to onama waa osson ngaran no id posivonnaa rin taddot kandin no tandu idda en so kandin don en no ngaran
id ikahi iddos onama kandin to d totandu a kikow no od boggayan ku en sikkow to kopiyannanwoy od pourallon ku kos koubbaran du
a si braham pomon to waa id takas nid aangat taddot tandu to onama kandin notanggap din en idda
tid posivonnaa kos mgo minuvu no bonnaa en kos osengan dan od pongulivot dan diyot ngaran to onama no lampas pa kandan
u ukit tadda od kosoro en kos kodpoopuloy ran
ngketen dad en mandad kos id puungan dangan to onama
d kopii rin no id pokita ki braham woy taddot koubbaran din no dii en od kopalin kos puhawang din
een id posivonnalan din idda ukit to kodpongulivot to kandin no ngaran
yya su otid totandu kos onama woy od posivonnalan din peen idda ukit to kodpongulivot to ngaran din od kotuman en idda oyyos dii sikandin od ouhus
a ukit kaayt oruwa no id puungan din od kosorollan ta no dii en od kopalin kos tandu to onama
urisu siketa no nokaaput don kandin mosalig kos ginawa ta riyot kodimman no od tumanon din en iddos tandu rin keta
nin kodimman ini en kos nokomosalig to keton kopomakoy iling to batu no diid kowaong
kit en mandad taddon kodimman iling to nokousok kid diyot ampas no his no ugaa no riyot divauy to mokoppaan kurtina no riyot daom to templo
os kohulugan tadda worad od pokoallang to kodporani ta riyon to onama
yya su id unna ron man si isas rays diyot datas to langit atag keta
ikandin kos owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis woy waad tomanon taddot pogkotohodbuwis din iling ki elquisedec
a si elquisedec sokkad no hari dangan diyot bonuwa to alem woy tohodbuwis mandad sikandin to onama no ampas to angun
ddot timpu no id ponalu si braham to kodpoimotayoy ran taddot oppat no hari duma to mgo sundau ran id tommu si elquisedec kandin diyon to koduli rin woy id dosalan din si braham no od boggayan sikandin to onama to kopiyannan
opongnga idda id boggoy ni braham ki elquisedec iddos ikosopuu taddot langun no korotuwan no naawi rin diyot kodpoimotayoy
os kohulugan to ngaran no elquisedec ari no otallong woy dos ingod no id horiyan din id ngoranan no alem no iddos kohulugan kosunayan
een id ngoranan mandad sikandin no ari to osunayan
aa noituu riyot osulat no ahit onama ko ondoy kos amoy woy inoy ni elquisedec ahad iddos kovuyyahan din
aa mandad noituu iddos mokaatag to kodtobbow woy kopotayan din
urisu nokoiling sikandin taddot nak to onama oyyos waa mandad od tomanon taddot pogkotohodbuwis din
oomdomma row iddos lampas no bantug ni elquisedec
u unna ahad si braham no novantug no kovuyyahan ta id boggayan din si elquisedec to ikosopuu taddot korotuwan no naawi rin diyot kodpoimotayoy
tik lubbad pa ni evi si elquisedec moomok nod koovottan iddos kodboggoy ni braham kandin
yyos duwon uhu ni oises no mid ikahi no iddos koubbaran ni evi no novovallan no tohodbuwis koilangan no iddos duma ran no mgo udio od boggoy kandan to ikosopuu taddot korotuwan dan ahad peen langun dan koubbaran ni braham
iru si elquisedec ahad konna sikandin lubbad ni evi id boggayan sikandin ni braham to ikosopuu
kooruwa si elquisedec peen kos id dasaa riyon to onama amoyd pokotanggap si braham to kopiyannan no iyon id tonduwan to onama
okosaddoo ki man no iddos minuvu nod dasaa riyot onama amoyd boggoy to kopiyannan lampas pa no novantug taddot minuvu no id porasaa kandin
kootollu mokaatag taddot mgo tohodbuwis no koubbaran ni evi no id tanggap to ikosopuu minuvu mandad sikandan no duwon kopotayan
iru si elquisedec waa noituu riyot osulat no ahit onama no id patoy sikandin ko konna id posivonnalan no diid kotaman iddos pogkotohodbuwis din
kooppat od pokoikahi ki no ahad si evi no id pomonnan taddot mgo tohodbuwis nid tanggap to ikosopuu iling dad to nokovoggoy sikandin to ikosopuu riyot ki elquisedec ukit ki braham
yya su ahad waa poron nominuvu si evi iddot timpu no id tommu si elquisedec ki braham piru riyon don sikandin to lawa ni braham no kovuyyahan din
osorollan ta no dangan iddos koubbaran ni evi no onsi aron id aam to onama no mgo tohodbuwis woy id nonaw sikandan to mgo minuvu mokaatag to mgo uhu ni oises
a otik ukit to pogkotohodbuwis dan od komotallong kos mgo minuvu riyot kodontong to onama konnad nanoy koilangan to ossa pa no tohodbuwis no id popiyod to onama
iru konna idda iling taddot pogkotohodbuwis ni aron ko konna iling en ki elquisedec
a otik od buwassan man iddos pogkotohodbuwis to koubbaran ni evi koilangan en mandad nod buwassan kos mgo uhu
osorollan ta no iddos od ongaggon ta no si isas rays no id bullas taddot tapoyn tohodbuwis lubbad sikandin ni uda konna lubbad ni evi
aa en ossa no tohodbuwis pomon diyot lubbad ni uda idda ra en so od ongaggon
yyos waa en mandad osengan ni oises mokaatag to lubbad ni uda no od kovovallan no tohodbuwis
aay ta en pantok orayd koovottan no id buwassan don iddos mgo tohodbuwis no koubbaran ni evi woy dos mgo uhu oyyos duwon don osson tohodbuwis no iling ki elquisedec
ovovallan sikandin no tohodbuwis konna ukit to kodtuman to uhu no koilangan nod pomon sikandin to koubbaran ni evi ko konna ukit to motuus no umuu rin no waad tomanon
yya su ini en kos posivonnaa mokaatag kandin diyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ohodbuwis ka to waad tomanon iling taddot pogkotohodbuwis ni elquisedec
een id buwassan don to onama iddos tapoyn uhu mokaatag to mgo tohobuwis su iling to worad ngipon tadda woy konnod od pokotavang keta
yyos dii ki en od komotallong diyot kodontong to onama ukit to kodtuman taddon mgo uhu
iru koungkay duwon don lampas pa no moppiyon od immanan ta oyya su ukit ki isas od pokoporani kid to onama
yon nokomoppiya tadda su id pongulivot kos onama riyot ki isas no dii od kotaman kos pogkotohodbuwis din
iru iddos mgo tohodbuwis dangan no koubbaran ni evi waa en id pongulivot kos onama kandan to iling tadda
iru to si isas don kos id boggayan taddon kotundanan id dumannan idda to kodpongulivot to onama
ahi rin to iyak kos onama nod ongaggon id pongulivot kikow woy dii en od kopalin kos poomdom ku no ohodbuwis ka to waad tomanon
a pomon taddon kodpongulivot to onama nosorollan ta no si isas kos posivonnaa no od kotuman en iddos lampas no moppiya no lammin kodpotonduwoy
angan mouraa kos tohodbuwis su otik duwon sokkad nod patoy duwon od pokosuvaa amoyd pokoponayun iddos pinuungan dan
iru si isas rays waa kopotayan deen konnad koilangan nod suvalan iddos pogkotohodbuwis din oyya su od taman en idda to waad tomanon
urisu od pokotobbus en si isas to langun nod porani to onama ukit kandin
d pokotobbus sikandin koungkay woy ahad kannu taddot id ponsalig kandin su maantoy man sikandin to waad tomanon amoy od dasaa riyot onama atag kandan
llog en no si isas kos owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis nod koilonganon ta oyyos uhis sikandin motallong woy waa id pokosawoy
d poossa sikandin to onama pomon diyot mgo mosaasaa woy id posivontuhan sikandin no lampas to langun diyot datas to langit
ssa sikandin taddot dumon mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis
yya su koilangan pa sikandan nod poongossa amoyd bovuwis ipat allow atag to kandan no mgo saa woy atag mandad to saa to mgo minuvu
iru si isas rays kosokkad da sikandin id bovuwis atag to saa to mgo minuvu woy iyon din id poongossa riyon to krus iddos kandin no lawa
os id aam no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no id ikuu to mgo uhu ni oises mgo minuvu ra mandad sikandan nod pokopuung to saa
iru nopongnga iddon mgo uhu id pongulivot kos onama no iyon din od aamon iddos kandin no nak nod kovovallan no owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis no waa en id pokosawoy woy od taman to waad tomanon iddos pogkotohodbuwis din
a iyon kohulugan taddot langun no nooseng doyd koniyu no siketa duwon don owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis no riyot datas to langit
id unsad sikandin lomig to kowanan to onama no otuus to angun
utun id puung sikandin timbang tohodbuwis diyot ampas no his no ugaa no iddos kohulugan diyon en to mooggot no tolda no simbaan no konna binovallan to minuvu ko konna binovallan to onama
os langun no mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis id aam amoyd bovuwis taddot id pomboggoy woy id poongossa to oyama ayon to onama
een iddos keton owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis koilangan en mandad duwon id poongossa rin
tik kaay pa sikandin to ampowt ingod konna en sikandin od kovovallan no tohodbuwis oyyos duwon don man mgo tohodbuwis dini no id pomon diyot koubbaran ni evi iling taddot noikahi riyot mgo uhu ni oises
a iddos pinuungan dan diyot tolda no simbaan kaay to ampowt ingod nokoiling to aung da taddot tolda no simbaanan diyot datas to langit su id ikuu ran iddos id puungan diyot datas to langit
osorollan ta ini oyyos dangan to id poohinat pa si oises to tolda no simbaanan id pomonduwan en sikandin to onama no mid ungketen to oilangan nod ooyyaran du tod bovaa iddos langun woy id poiling du idda taddot id pokita kud kikow riyot bovungan
iru iddos pinuungan no id sanna to onama ki isas rays koungkay lampas pa no moppiya taddot pinuungan to mgo tohodbuwis kaay to ampowt ingod
ling mandad tadda inis lammin kodpotonduwoy no id puungan ni isas no keton tohodpotongnga moppiya pa taddot unna oyyos id pomon ini riyot lampas pa no moppiyon mgo tandu to onama
tik waa pa nanoy kulang taddot unnon kodpotonduwoy konnad koilangan nod buwassan pa idda
yyos waa nahaa kos onama taddot pinuungan to mgo minuvu no od ikuu taddot unnon kodpotonduwoy
een mid ikahi sikandin to d inguma kos allow no od bovaa a to lammin kodpotonduwoy atag to koubbaran ni srael woy koubbaran ni uda
onnad ini iling taddot unnon kodpotonduwoy to kovuyyahan dan iddot kodpolegguang ku kandan pomon diyot hipto
yyos waa ran ponoyuna tid tuman iddos kodpotonduwoy roy purisu id podtohon kud sikandan
a ini en kos lammin kodpotonduwoy nod puungan ku riyot mgo minuvu to srael init od ingumon mgo allow
d taaw ku kos koddin mgo uhu riyot poomdom dan woy id pomuwa ku ini riyot pusung dan
d kovovallan a no onama ran woy sikandan od kovovallan no mgo minuvu ku
een to iddon allow konnad koilangan no od nonaw sikandan mokaatag koddi riyot mgo korumannan dan woy riyot mg oiling dan
yya su langun no minuvu od pokokilaa ron koddi dos waa novantug woy dos novantug
d posinsyan ku kos morat no pinuungan dan woy dii kud en od sompotton iddos mgo saa ran
a pomon to id ikahi man kos onama no od bovaa sikandin to lammin kodpotonduwoy dos kohulugan tadda no iddos unna dii ron od kahamit woy to diid kouhoy od kowora en
a riyot unnon kodpotonduwoy to onama riyot kovuyyahan ta duwon mgo nonaw mokaatag to ollog no poukit to kodsimba kandin
oy mid bovaa mandad iddos keton kovuyyahan to tolda no simbaanan atag kandin kaay to ampowt ingod
ddon tolda no simbaanan duwon oruwon kwartu
os unna od ngoranan no his no ugaa
iyot daom tadda duwon tootawwan to pittun ilowan woy duwon lomisa nid tawwan to mgo paan no id buwis diyot onama
os ikooruwon kwartu id ngoranan no ampas no his no ugaa no nokorivauy ra en taddot unnon kwartu woy id pooottan idda to mokoppaan kurtina
a rutun nokotaaw iddos od lolaawan no binovallan pomot buawan no riyon en od loowon kos insenso no id buwis diyot onama
iyon en mandad iddos kavan no buawan nod ngoranan to avan to odpotonduwoy
iyot daom tadda duwon kuron no buawan no id tawwan to kokaan nod ngoranan to mana
iyon en mandad iddos tukod ni aron no mid sosuving woy dos oruwon moumpepen batu no id sulatan to mgo suhu to onama
a riyot ampow taddot kavan duwon oruwon binovallan no iling to boyo to ponolihan patow no riyon en kos onama
okodisau sikandan woy nokoduma kos pakpak dan no nokotoddung taddot kavan no riyon en no lugaa od posinsyan kos mgo saa
iru konna pa koungkay kos timpu no od koipan ini to kodpaabbotlabbot
ngketen en dangan kos kodtooo taddot langun diyot daom to tolda no simbaanan
a ipat allow od usok iddos mgo tohodbuwis diyot unnon kwartu amoy od tuman to kandan nod puungan atag to onama
iru riyot ampas no his no ugaa idda ra en so mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis kos od pokousok woy kosokkad da to ipat lahun
iyot kodusok din koilangan nod piyod sikandin to longossa to oyama no id buwis atag to mgo saa rin woy atag to waa tongoddi no saa to mgo minuvu
a ukit tadda id posaddoo to his no spiritu no waa en od pokousok diyot ampas no his no ugaa laggun to noiraom poron kos mgo minuvu riyot mgo suhu mokaatag to kodusok tadda
dda langun iling da to mgo ponunggelengan no od nonaw keta koungkayn timpu
u iddos kodboggoy woy kodbuwis amoyd simba to onama konna en od pokolinis to poomdom to mgo minuvu nod puung tadda
yya su idda langun nod puungan mokaatag da to lawa iling taddot id diiyan no mgo kokaan inommon woy nokodossoosson poukit to kodlinis
iru dii en idda od pokolinis to poomdom to mgo minuvu
oy ponayun dan nid ikuu taddon mgo uhu taman to id inguma kos timpu no id buwassan idda to onama taddot lammin kodpotonduwoy
iru koungkay mid undini ron si isas rays woy sikandin don en kos owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis
a ukit kandin notanggap ta iddos kopiyannan taddot lammin kodpotonduwoy no nopongnga rin
id usok sikandin diyot tolda no simbaanan no riyot datas to langit no lampas pa no moppiya woy uhis
oy konna idda binovallan to minuvu oyyos konna man idda kaay to ampowt ingod
osokkad da sikandin id usok diyot ampas no his no ugaa no riyot datas to langit
oy konna longossa to kambing woy longossa to natit baka kos id buwis din ko konna iddos kandin don en no longossa
kit tadda notanggap ta iddos kodtobbus taman to waad tomanon
a riyot unnon kodpotonduwoy otik duwon mgo minuvu no nolibmitan pomon to nokosaa sikandan diyot id diiyan to pomokayon dan dii sikandan od pokolonug to kodsimba riyot onama
oilangan nod poongossan sikandan to turun baka o kambing woy od bukbukan to avu taddot id loow no natit baka amoy od kolinisan mandon sikandan
a otid pokolinis man iddos longossa to oyama lampas peen iddos longossa ni isas rays
yyos ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu no waa kopotayan id buwis ni isas rays kos kandin no lawa no waa en saa riyot onama
u iddos longossa rin od pokolinis en to poomdom ta no nolibmitan to waa koruanon no pinuungan amoy od pokosimba kid diyon to maantoyn onama
urisu ukit kaayn lammin kodpotonduwoy si isas rays kos tohodpotongnga atag keta riyon to onama su amoy iddos langun nid aam din od pokotanggap taddot waad tomanon no kopiyannan no id tandu rin
onnaa en ini oyyos pomon to kopotayan ni isas rays nokolegguang don sikandan pomon diyot langun no morat no pinuungan dan iddot timpu no noiraom pa sikandan taddot unnon kodpotonduwoy
u otik duwon od bovallan no kodpotonduwoy koilangan en no duwon id poongossa no oyama no id buwis atag taddon kodpotonduwoy
yya su iddos pounsaran tadda koilangan ukit to kopotayan taddot buwis woy dii idda od koposivonnalan otik nouyag pa iddos oyama no id buwis taddon kodpotonduwoy
urisu idda en kos unayan no ahad iddos unnon kodpotonduwoy nid puungan to onama waa koruanon otik waa idda poongossai
u id posaddoo ni oises diyot mgo minuvu iddos langun no suhu to onama
opongnga idda id angoy rin kos longossa to natit baka woy kambing woy id podsambut din idda to oweg
a id angoy rin mandad kos bowvuut karnero no id tinan to moollutu woy id takos din idda riyot panga to kayu no isopo
d aggom din idda riyot longossa woy id povossik din diyot libru no id sulatan to mgo uhu ahad diyot langun no minuvu
a mid ikahi si oises to nin longossa kos od pokomosalig to kodpotonduwoy no id suhu to onama no od tumanon dow
ling mandad tadda id povossikan ni oises to longossa iddos tolda no simbaanan woy dos langun no kosongkapan atag to kodsimba to onama
u riyot mgo uhu ni oises koilangan no duwon en longossa amoy id linis taddot langun oyyos gali od koposinsyan kos mgo saa otik duwon id potihis no longossa
a koilangan nod linisan to longossa to mgo oyama iddos langun no id ilingan da riyot datas to langit
iru lampas pa no moppiya iddos mooggot no simbaan no riyot datas langit deen koilangan en idda to lampas pa no moppiyon buwis
urisu waa id usok si isas rays diyot tolda no simbaanan no binovallan to minuvu no id poiling da taddot mooggot diyot datas to langit
u riyon don en sikandin to langit woy koungkay diyon sikandin amoyd isau to onama atag keta
ddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis no ebreo koilangan no ipat lahun od bovuwis sikandan to longossa to oyama
iru si isas rays waa id bovuwis to kandin no lawa ipat lahun ko konna kosokkad da en
u otik ungketen pa kos id puungan din komouraa nanoy sikandin id oilasoy to kopotayan pomon poron to kodbovaa to ingod
iru iyon id puungan din diyot morin timpu kosokkad da en sikandin mid undini to ingod amoyd awa to keton mgo saa ukit to kodbuwis to kandin no lawa
a mokaatag to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod kosokkad da sikandan od patoy woy kopongnga od isau ron diyot kodhukum
ngketen dad en mandad si isas rays kosokkad da sikandin id patoy amoyd tiyang to saa to mouraan minuvu
oy od livod sikandin kaayt ingod piru konnad atag to mgo saa ta ko konna amoy od tobbus taddot langun no id aangat kandin
a iddos mgo uhu no id boggoy to onama ki oises iling da idda to aung nod posaddoo taddot mooggot no kopiyannan nod inguma pa ukit ki isas rays
een ipat lahun ahad od liilivoddon dan iddos kodbovuwis nod ikuu to mgo uhu konna en idda od pokotavang kandan no od kovovallan no mgo minuvu no waa id pokosawoy
u otik molinis don en sikandan pomon to kodbovuwis konnad nanoy sikandan od popoomdom no nokosaa poron woy dii ron nanoy koilangan nod bovuwis pa sikandan
iru iyon mooggot mokaatag taddot kodbovuwis dan ipat lahun od posampot idda kandan no duwon poron mgo saa ran
yya su iddos longossa to mgo turu no baka woy mgo kambing dii en od pokoawa to mgo saa
ni en kos unayan no iddot kodundini ni isas rays to ampowt ingod mid ikahi sikandin diyot onamon moy rin to onna iddos kodboggoy to mgo buwis woy dos kodpoongossa to mgo oyama kos id kopii ru
urisu id boggayan a nikkow to lawa amoy id buwis
yyos waa ka en nahaa taddot id loow no mgo oyama no id buwis woy taddot id poongossa atag to kodawa to mgo saa
a mid ikahi mandon si isas to h onama ini ad amoyd tuman to id kopii ru iling taddot osengan du mokaatag koddi riyot osulat no ahi ru
a od livoddon ta iddos kohulugan taddot id oseng ni isas
nna mid ikahi sikandin no waa nopii woy waa nahaai to onamon moy iddos mgo buwis no id boggoy kandin to mgo minuvu
d ikahi rin idda ahad nokoikuu rad diyot mgo uhu
id ikahi mandon ni isas no kaay ron sikandin amoyd tuman to id kopiit onama
urisu od kosorollan ta no id awa to onama iddos tapoyn poukit to kodbuwis ukit to mgo oyama woy id buwassan din idda to lammin poukit no idda en so lawa ni isas rays
oy pomon to id tuman din iddos id kopiit onama naawa ron kos mgo saa ta ukit to kosokkad da no kodbuwis ni isas rays to kandin no lawa
a iddos mgo tohodbuwis no ebreo koilangan allowallow en nod lohinat diyot tolda no simbaanan woy od ulitulit sikandan nod bovuwis diyon to onama
iru inin kodbovuwis dan dii en od pokoawa to saa to mgo minuvu
iru si isas rays kosokkad da en mid buwis to kandin no lawa atag to mgo saa ta woy konnad koilangan nod ulituliton pa
a nopongnga rin puungi idda id unsad sikandin lomig to kowanan to onama
oy koungkay diyon don si isas id aangat taman tod kotalu ron to onama iddos od pongkuntra ki isas woy id poiraom din sikandan to kodponguu ni isas
a ukit taddot sokkad da no buwis iddos mgo minuvu no id linisan din worad id pokosawoy kandan taman to waad tomanon
osorollan ta no bonnaa en ini su id posivonnaa iddos his no spiritu riyot osulat no ahit onama taddot id ikahi tod ongaggon no mid ungketen to ni en kos lammin kodpotonduwoy no id puungan ku riyot mgo minuvu init od ingumon mgo allow
a id pomuwa ku kos koddin mgo suhu riyot pusung danwoy id taaw ku idda riyot poomdom dan
id ikahi mandon sikandin to ii kud en od sompotton iddos mgo saa ran woy dos morat no pinuungan dan nod supak to suhu to onama
een konnad koilangan nod bovuwis pa to oyama atag to saa oyyos noposinsyan kid man to onama
urisu mgo suwod pomon to longossa ni isas no id tihis duwon don kodsalig ta nod usok diyot ampas no his no ugaa riyot datas to langit no iddos kohulugan od pokoporani kid to onama
u ukit to kodbuwis to kandin no lawa iling to novendas don iddos mokoppaan kurtina no nokoallang to daan to kodusok diyot ampas no his no ugaa
yya su id lukatan din don iddos lammin daan atag keta amoy od pokoporani kid to onama woy inin daan kos od tuntuu keta riyot umuu no waad tomanon
oy koungkay siketa duwon don motuus no owwet no onguu to mgo ohodbuwis woy sikandin en kos ponguu ta no mgo minuvu to onama
een koilangan nod porani ki riyot onama to bonnaavonnaa duma to dakkoon kodsalig kandin su nosorollan ta no nolinisan don kos kodpopoomdom ta no nokosaa ki poron
yya su iling to id povossikan don idda to longossa ni isas rays woy nounavan don kos lawa ta ukit to molinis no oweg
onayun ki no mosalig diyot koimmanan no id ponudtuu ta woy konna ki od duworuwa oyyos od kosolihan kos onama no od tuman taddot tandu rin keta
ii ki od kolingow nod potovangoy inaayun su amoy od monit peen kos kodpohinowannoy ta woyd puung ki to moppiya
ii ki od iling to duma no id soro to kodlolivuung atag to kodsimba to onama ko konna od poinniyatoy ki labbi ron en to od kokita tad no asow ron od inguma iddos allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon ta
u otik duwon don koovottan ta taddot bonnaan nonaw piru od tongoddan ta peen nod puung to saa worad en id buwis ta no od pokoawa to keton mgo saa
orad od immanon taddot minuvu no id puung tadda su idda ra en so mokaaratarat no kodsilut to onama kos od ingumannon din woy dos golid luhindab no apuy no od tutung taddot langun nod ponsupak kandin
angan otik duwon od supak to mgo uhu ni oises od imotayan sikandin to waa eru otid koposivonnalan to oruwa o otollun minuvu no bonnaa en no nokosaa sikandin
a ko ungketen kos kosupittoy to silut taddot id supak to mgo uhu ni oises lampas peen iddos minuvu nod poddisokkan din to kodontong iddos nak to onama
yyos waa rin boggayi to koruanon iddos longossa ni isas no id posivonnaa taddot kodpotonduwoy to onama woy id linis to kandin no mgo saa
u riyot kodpuung din tadda id sumpalit din iddos his no spiritu no od koeruwan kandin
yya su nokilaa ta iddos onama no mid ikahi to iyak kos duwon kotungud nod balus
iyak kos od silut taddot od puung kikow to morat
oy duwon peen id ikahi rin no mid ungketen to d hukuman tod ongaggon iddos mgo minuvu rin
okaaratarat en kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod poumannan to silut to maantoyn onama
ompotta row iddot unnon timpu to lammi pa nopokesan kos koniyun poomdom taddot bonnaan nonaw no id pomokayan dow
a ahad lampas kos kodposuppit koniyu id tiis dow idda woy waa naantog kos koniyun kopomakoy
uwon timpu no id poilawan kow riyot isowwan to mouraan minuvu woy id ponlompossan pomon to kopomakoy row ki isas rays
uwon mandad timpu no ahad konna sikiyu kos id poosayan id tovangan woy id pokita row no duma row en iddos id posupittan
oeruwan kow taddot duma row nod pompomakoy no id prisu
oy ahad id ahawan kow to langun no koruwonnan dow piru ungketen dad en kos koniyun kahaan
yya su nosorollan dow no lampas pa no dakkoo kos koruanon taddot od kokomunoy row riyot datas to langit woy dii en idda od kowora woyd taman to waad tomanon
een yo row woranna kos koniyun kodsalig to onama su dakkoo en kos ganti nod kotanggap dow pomon kandin
oilangan no motiistiis kow amoyd kotuman dow iddos id kopiit onama woy od pokotanggap kow taddot id tandu rin
yyos duwon osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to onnod kouhoy od inguma ron iddos od oongatan dow su dii en sikandin od lewanglewang
ddos minuvu nid podmotallong ku ukit to kopomakoy rin koddi od pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
iru kod inoyyuhan a nikandin dii a en od kahaa kandin
iru siketa konna ki iling taddot mgo minuvu no id inoyyug to onama onama woyd silutan ko konna mosalig kos keton kopomakoy woy pomon tadda od kotobbus ki
a ondan man kos kopomakoy
os kopomakoy idda en so kodsalig ta nod kotuman en iddos mgo tandu to onama no id immanan ta
oy ahad waa ta poron idda nokita oraroy ta no nosorollan nod inguma en idda
ddos kovuyyahan ta id kahaai to onama pomon to kopomakoy ran
omon to kopomakoy od koovottan ta no inis ingod woy dos langit binovallan to onama ukit da en to kandin no kahi
een inis langun nod kokita waa bovalli pomon diyot od kokita
oomdomma row man si bel
omon to kopomakoy rin lampas no moppiya iddos kodbuwis din diyot onama kuntra taddot kodbuwis to kakoy rin no si ain
een ukit to kopomakoy ni bel id kahaai sikandin to onama woy id podmotallong din sikandin su id tanggap din man iddos buwis ni bel
had nouhoy ron sikandin id patoy piru id inniyat ki poron nikandin ukit taddot moppiyon ponunggelengan to kopomakoy rin
a si noc mandad pomon to kopomakoy rin waa sikandin id ukit to kopotayan su id batun man sikandin to onama deen worad sikandin nokita kaay to ampowt ingod
oy noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no iddot waa poron novatun si noc id kahaai sikandin to onama
aa en minuvu no id kahaai to onama otik waa kopomakoy rin
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod porani to onama koilangan nod pomakoy sikandin no duwon en onama woy od boggayan din to ganti iddos minuvu nod nangkap kandin
a si oe mandad pomon to kopomakoy rin id tuman din iddos id ikahi to onama mokaatag to od ingumon mgo kotomanan no waa rin pa nokita
urisu id bovaa sikandin to arka amoy dii sikandin od kaapii nod koonnod woy dos kandin no pomilya
kit to kopomakoy rin id podmotallong sikandin to onama
iru iddos dumon minuvu noipannas sikandan pomon to waa ran id pomakoy to onama
a si braham pomon to kopomakoy rin id tuman din iddos suhu to onama no od poundiyonnon sikandin to ingod no id tandu kandin
d tanan sikandin diyot ingod din ahad waa saddoo rin ko ingkon sikandin od isau
oy pomon to kopomakoy rin ahad diyon don sikandin to ingod no id tandu kandin to onama waa sikandin id tullid nid bovaoy su id oubpa ra sikandin diyot tolda iling to konna mohingod dutun
ngketen dad en mandad iddos anak din no si saac woy dos apu rin no si acob
os id ubpan dan tolda ra ahad id tandu ron to onama no od kokomunoy ran iddon lugaa
u iyon din od immanon iddos bonuwa no riyot datas to langit no od taman to waad tomanon oyyos onama kos id puhawang woy mid bovaa tadda
a si ara mandad pomon to kopomakoy rin nokoanak poron sikandan ahad buyyag don woy dii nanoy od pokoanak woy buyyag don mandad oraroy si braham woy worad en koimmanan nod pokoanak pa ukit ki ara
iru pomon to kopomakoy ni braham no iddos onama od tuman en taddot tandu rin novovallan sikandin nid pomonnan to mouraan koubbaran iling kouralloy to bituon diyot langit woy paok to dahat no diid koiyap
a iddon mgo minuvu id poomatoy ron no mosalig kos kandan no kopomakoy
had waa ran notanggap iddos tandu to onama iddot nouyag pa sikandan piru iling to nopantow ran don tapoy no od kotanggap dan en iddos tandu to onama init morin mgo allow
een waa kodduworuwa ran nid ikahi no mgo moholiyug da sikandan kaay to ampowt ingod
aay ta en pantok od kosorollan no iddos mgo minuvu nid ikahi to iling tadda duwon pa osson ingod nod immanon dan no kandan don en
u otik diyon pa to poomdom onni braham iddos ingod nid pomonnan dan nokolivod poron nanoy sikandan dutun
iru iyon dan en od immanon iddos lampas pa no moppiyon ingod no riyot datas to langit
urisu konna id koilow to onama no od ngoranan sikandin no onama ran su id panoy rin don man iddos bonuwa atag kandan
omon to kopomakoy ni braham iddot id geddaman sikandin to onama nopanoy sikandin nod imatoy taddot soosokkad no anak din no si saac amoy id buwis diyot onama ahad peen si saac kos id tonduwan to onama no od pomonnan to kandin no koubbaran
yya su id pomakoy si braham no otid patoy man si saac od pokovadnow en kandin iddos onama
u otik waa pa suggaa to onama si braham od patoy en nanoy si saac
een nokoiling dad to novadnow si saac pomon diyot kopotayan
a si saac pomon to kopomakoy rin id dosalan din no iddos mgo anak din no si acob woy si sau amoy od pokotanggap to kopiyannan init morin mgo allow
i acob mandad pomon to kopomakoy rin to asow ron sikandin od patoy id dasaa sikandin nod boggayan to onama to kopiyannan iddos oruwon apu rin no anak ni ose
oy mid unduk sikandin diyot tukod din amoyd simba riyon to onama
a si ose pomon to kopomakoy rin to asow ron sikandin od patoy mid ikahi sikandin no od inguma kos timpu nod awa iddos koubbaran ni srael diyot ingod to hipto
oy id ponaantaan sikandin no od piyoddon dan iddos tullan din amoy id lobbong diyot ingod nod undiyonnan dan
omon to kopomakoy to amoy woy inoy ni oises id ollos dan sikandin daom to otollun buwan nopongnga sikandin id tobbow
aa ran novaakki ahad id supak dan iddos suhu to hari no od imotayan iddos langun no anak no mama to mgo ebreo no lammid tobbow oyyos nokita ran no konna awang no anak si oises
a si oises mandad pomon to kopomakoy rin iddot id dakkoo ron sikandin id bolivad sikandin nod ngoranan no apu to harit hipto ahad id onnat sikandin taddot baay no anak en to harit hipto
uwamig id tiis din iddos kodposuppit duma taddot iling din no mgo minuvu to onama kuntra tod oubpa sikandin diyot baoy to hari no od kahaahaa nod puung to saa oyyos iddon kahaan od lihad da
d popoomdom sikandin no moppiya pa nod tiis sikandin to kodsumpalit pomon to koimmanan din taddot od ingumon esiyas kuntra tod koratu sikandin diyot hipto
yya su iyon din od ingowollon nod kotanggap din iddos ganti no id pomon diyot onama init morin allow
oy pomon to kopomakoy ni oises id tanan sikandin diyot hipto woy waa sikandin novaakki taddot langot to hari
had mosuppit kos noukitan din waa en sikandin id livod oyya su iling to nokita rin no id duma kandin iddos onama no diid kokita
omon to kopomakoy id tuman din iddos suhu to onama mokaatag taddot odlihad to onolihan
d pomonduwan din iddos langun no koubbaran ni srael no od poletan to longossa to karnero iddos mgo sobbangan su amoy diid opilon tod imatoy taddot ponolihan to onama iddos ponganoy no mgo anak dan
a iddos koubbaran ni srael pomon to kopomakoy ran id batas sikandan diyot oollutun ahat no nokodbaad woy notokkang don iddos livuta nid boyan dan
iru iddos langun no sundau to hipto no id loupug kandan nongoonnod su id podkoot don man to onama iddos dahat
oy pomon to kopomakoy to koubbaran ni srael nongohobba iddos motikang no aavat no batu no nokolingkus diyon to intirut bonuwa to erico nopongnga ran idda lingkuslingkusi daom to pittun allow
a si ahab no id bovoligya dangan to lawa rin pomon to kopomakoy rin waa sikandin opila tid imatoy duma taddot mgo mohingod diyot erico no id ponsupak to onama
yya su id tovangan din man iddos oruwon minuvu no id popiyod ni osue amoyd poniid ko ingkon lomig kos kotoluwan to erico
a kaay ra en taman kos kodoituu ku mokaatag to kopomakoy taddot kovuyyahan ta oyyos kulang don kos timpu to kodoituu mokaatag ongki ideon ki arac ki amson ki efte ki avid ki amuel woy taddot mgo propeta
u iddon mgo minuvu pomon to kopomakoy ran id talu ran to kodpoimotayoy iddos doorakkoon ingod
os duma kandan motallong kos kodponguu diyot kandan no ingod woy dos duma nokotanggap taddot mgo tandu to onama kandan
oy dos duma kandan id talu ran iddos movuut no mgo liyun no iling tid takkom kos bivig amoy diid pokokahat
os duma kandan id loow riyot golid luhindab no apuy piru waa ran nomonnu
oy duwon duma no nokopaahuy pomon diyot od ponimatoy kandan
dda mandad so duma ahad duwon komoometan piru id boggayan sikandan to onama to konokkaan
oy novovallan sikandan no movuut diyot kodpoimotayoy woy nokopaahuy kandan iddos mgo sundau pomon diyot dumon ingod
uwon mandad mgo baay no pomon to kopomakoy ran nouyag mandon iddos mgo anak dan no id poomatoy ron
oy duwon duma no id podsuwamig dan nod patoy riyot kodposuppit woy id elle ran nod polegguangon diyot prisuwan kuntra tod inoyyuhan dan kos kandan no kopomakoy
yya su id salig dan nod kovadnow sikandan woy od kotanggap dan iddos lampas pa no moppiyon umuu
dda mandad so duma pomon to kopomakoy ran id poilawan sikandan woy ayas id pomodasan woy duwon peen duma no id pombaku to kodina woy id pomprisu
uwon mandad duma no id ponlumbahan to batu taman tid patoy dos duma id podtongnga tid gavas kos lawa ran woy dos duma id pomonibbas
uwon duma kandan no iyon dan dobbo id umpak iddos kindaat karnero woy kambing
oompasan dan no worowora od ooyuwon woy id posupittan
een iddon mgo minuvu ahad ingkon dobbo sikandan od ubpa riyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa woy id oollos dan diyot buvunganon diyot mgo langub to daama woy mgo bobbo riyot livuta
mmat wora koruanon dan piru iyon bonnaa konna ollog nod pokodduma ran taddot mgo minuvu no kaay to ampowt ingod
omon taddot kopomakoy ran orayn nahaa kos onama kandan
iru ahad ungketen waa ran pa notanggap iddos id tandu to onama kandan taman tid poomatoy ran
yyos duwon lampas pa no moppiyon puhawang to onama atag keta
d kopii rin no od kolonug ki kandan diyot kodtuman din taddot tandu rin amoy od kovovallan ki no mgo minuvu rin no waa id pokosawoy
a siketa koungkay nokoiling ki to id lonug to lumba to kodlungkossu no id tonuran taddot mouraan od pompomakoy dangan no noposivonnalan no mooggot kos kandan no kopomakoy riyon to onama
een koilangan no od iling ki to tohodlungkossu woy id sowela ta kos langun nod pokobaavag keta riyot kodpuung to id kopiit onama labbi ron iddos saa nod pokoporellos keta
d nokkaanokkaa ki to kodlungkossu riyot daan no id aam to onama atag keta taman tod pokoinguma ki riyot od tomanan
onna ta id posuwoy kos kodtongtong ta riyot ki isas oyyos sikandin kos id pomonnan to keton kopomakoy woy sikandin kos tohodipongnga tadda taman to worad kulang
yya su id tiis sikandin diyon to krus woy id podtohon din iddos ilow tadda su iyon din id poomdom iddos kahaan to kodtobbus din keta
a koungkay diyon don sikandin mid unsad lomig to kowanan to onama
oomdomma row iddos kodtiis ni isas to langun no mosaasaa no id supak kandin amoy dii kow od koobbod woyd soro riyot kopomakoy
u iddos kovonnaan waa pa sokkad koniyu no id imotayan pomon to kodatu row to saa
olingawan dowd bo iddos osulat no ahit onama atag koniyu no id ngoranan no mgo anak din
u mid ikahi iddos onama no nak ku yo ru poddisokki to koruanon iddos kodpotullid kikow tod ongaggon woy yo kod koobbod otik od suggan ka
yya su iddos langun no id dokollan ku to ginawa od tuliddon ku en
oy dos langun nid ngoranan ku no koddin mgo anak od pipitan ku en amoyd suggan
een otik duwon mgo kosupittan nod inguma koniyu tiisa row su ini en kos poukit to onama to kodnonaw koniyu pomon to mgo anak kow meen nikandin
yyos waa anak no diid tuliddon to amoy rin
os onama od potullid to langun no anak din
tik waa kow id posupittan to onama amoyd potullid koniyu konna kow mooggot no mgo anak din ko konna nokoiling kow to mgo anak to daan
uhang pa tadda otid poiraom ki to kodpotullid to mgo amoy ta kaay to ampowt ingod woy id rispituwan ta sikandan lampas peen nod poiraom ki to kodpotullid taddot onamon moy no riyot datas to langit amoyd pokotanggap ki to umuun waad tomanon
os mgo amoy ta id potullid keta to moobbava ra no timpu woy od puungan dan iddos diyot poomdom dan nod pokomoppiya atag keta
iru iddos onama id potullid keta atag to kopiyannan ta amoyd od pokoiling ki kandin no waa en saa
onnaa en no konna ki od kahaa otik id potullid ki su mosakit en idda
iru kopongnga tadda od kotullid kos kodbovotasan ta woy mosunay ron kos ginawa ta
een yo kowd koobbod ko konna ohotta row kos koniyun ginawa woy kodsalig diyon to onama
kula row kos motullid no daan su amoy od ilingan kow taddot mgo minuvu no iling tod tengkod dobbo kos kopomakoy
kit kaay konnad sikandan od moomet ko konna od monokkaa en mandon
oonokkali row no moppiya kos koroniyan dow riyot langun woy poriyu kow to saa amoyd kahaa kos onama
u iddos minuvu no konna molinis diyot kodontong to onama konna en od pokokita tod ongaggon
oyyari row no waa sokkad koniyu no od inoyyug woyd elle taddot kopiyannoy to onama
yya su iddos minuvu nod puung to ungketen mouraa kos od kookoy rin diyot kodpuung to saa su od pokoiling sikandin to mopet no pinomuwa no od tuvu nod pokosamuk ukit to ilu tadda
oyyari row mandad no waa sokkad koniyu nod laayuk to konna rin sawa woy yo kowd ikuu taddot mgo minuvu no waa onama iling ki sau no id bullas din kos pogkoponganoy rin taddot toonaw sokkad no yohung no kokaan
yyos nosorollan ta no kopongnga tadda id ayas peen id buyu si sau riyot amoy rin no od dosalan sikandin amoyd pokotanggap mandad to kopiyannan
iru ondan pobbo su dii rin don en od kaawi iddos pogkoponganoy rin ahad od patoy pa sikandin to kodsinoggow
urisu noonokkalan ta nod poriyu to saa su iddos kodporani ta riyot onama konna iling taddot kovuyyahan ta
yyos id porani ran diyot uvungan to inai no duwon nokita ran no mid loglog no apuy woy mokaaratarat no mosukirom woy duwon monokkaan kaamag
okorinog sikandan to morahingdahing no trumpeta woy mokaaratarat no bawos to onama
o norinog dan idda id poerueru ran no dii ron sikandan od porinoggon tadda
yya su oray sikandan no nooratan taddot osengan din no mid ungketen to tik duwon od pokohedda kaayn buvungan ahad pa iddos oyama od lumbahon en to batu taman tod patoy
ampas en no mokaaratarat iddos nokita ran to iddon timpu su ahad si oises nokoikahi no goli sikandin id pongookoo to mattag allak din
iru siketa koungkay iyon tad id poroniyan iddos uvungan to ion no idda en kos bonuwa nod ngoranan to ammin erusalem diyot datas to langit no id ubpan to maantoyn onama
oy riyon en iddos maanmaan no ponolihan no od pongokahaa nod simba to onama
olonug kid duma taddot od lolivuung nod pompomakoy timbang ponganoy no mgo anak to onama no nosulat don kos mgo ngaran diyot datas to langit
utun od pokoporani kid to onama no tohodhukum to langun
oy riyon ki en mandad duma taddot mgo gimukud to motallong no minuvu no id poomatoy ron woy waa id pokosawoy
d pokoporani ki mandad ki isas rays no keton tohodpotongnga no id posivonnaa taddot lammin kodpotonduwoy ukit to longossa rin nid tihis
yya su lampas pa no moppiya iddos longossa rin no timbang id ponudtuu mokaatag to kodposinsya to saa kuntra taddot longossa ni bel no timbang id nganoy ra to kodbalus
oyyari row no dii kow od povovongoo taddot id ikahi to onama koniyu
u otik id silutan man iddos kovuyyahan ta no waa id pominog taddot id ikahi ni oises kaay to ampowt ingod iyon ki pobbo no diid silutan otid elleyan ta iddos kahi no id pomon diyot datas to langit
angan to mid ikahi iddos onama riyot uvungan to inai goli naantog kos livuta
iru koungkay id totandu sikandin no od umanon din tod antog kos livuta woy konna ra inis livuta ko konna ahad mandad iddos diyot langit
os kohulugan taddon osengan no od inguma kos timpu no iddos langun no binovallan nod kaantog od kowora su amoy iddos diid kaantog idda en kos od kosama
urisu od posolamat ki to onama oyyos od kolonug kid to kodhari rin no diid kaantog
d simbaanon ta sikandin woyd posivontuhon nod dumannan to allak su ini en kos id kahaai rin
yya su iddos onama nod simbaanon ta od silut to mgo minuvu iling tod luhindab no apuy nod pokoibmuk to langun
onayun kow pohinowannoy timbang toosuwod diyon to kopomakoy
o kowd kolingow nod olitolit woy od tuhanuu to mgo moholiyug nod inguma riyot ubpan dow
yyos duwon id puung to ungketen no waa saddoo ran no mgo ponolihan bos kos id olitolit dan
o kowd kolingow nod tavang taddot mgo minuvu no noprisu pomon to kopomakoy ran woy koerui row sikandan no iling to riyon kow en mandad to prisuwan duma kandan
oomdomma row mandad iddos id posupittan woy tovangi row sikandan no iling to id posupittan kow mandad
oilangan nod boggayan dow to dakkoon koruanon kos kodpoosoway woy yo row libmiti kos koniyun kodpoosoway su od silutan en to onama iddos od loivug woy dos ahad ondoy nod laayuk to konna ran sawa
o row dokolli to ginawa kos soopi woy koilangan nod koongaddan kow ko ondan kos diyot koniyu
yya su mid ikahi iddos onama to ii ku en sikiyu od tonanan woy dii ku en sikiyu od podtohonon
een waa id kovaakki ta oyyos od pokoikahi ki man no ddos od ongaggon kos od tavang koddi deen waa id kovaakki ku ahad ondan kos puungan to minuvu rinit koddi
oomdomma row iddos mgo ponguu row no unnon id nonaw koniyu to kahit onama
oomdomma row mandad iddos moppiyon undahon to kandan no koubpa woy ikula row iddos kopomakoy ran
i isas rays waa en kopolinan pomon poron dangan koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
o kowd popiyod taddot nokodossoosson mgo nonaw no od pokoposuwoy koniyu pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw
u iyon od pokoponokkaa to keton ginawa idda en so kopiyannoy to onama konna iddos kodtuman to mgo suhu mokaatag to kokaan oyyos waa en koruanon to kodtuman tadda
iketa nod pompomakoy noposinsyan don kos mgo saa ta ukit to kopotayan ni isas rays diyon to krus
iru iddos mgo minuvu nod bovuwis poron to mgo oyama amoyd koposinsyan kos mgo saa ran waa lavut dan taddot kodposinsya no nopuungan diyon to krus
tik od bovuwis iddos mowwet no ponguu to mgo tohodbuwis atag to kodposinsya to mgo saa ran od piyoddon din iddos longossa taddot id buwis diyot ampas no his no ugaa
iru od loowon dan iddos lawa taddot id buwis diyot leggua to bonuwa
a ungketen dad en mandad kos notomanan ni isas rays su riyon man sikandin id imotayan to leggua to bonuwa amoy ukit to longossa rin od kolinisan kos mgo minuvu taddot mgo saa ran
een mgo suwod od undiyon kit kandin diyot leggua to bonuwa no iddos kohulugan od tonanan tad iddos pomokayon to mgo udio ahad od poilawan ki iling kandin
yyos konna kaay to ampowt ingod kos od ubpan ta taman to waad tomanon ko konna iyon ta od immanon iddos bonuwa nod ubpan ta no riyot datas to langit
urisu ukit ki isas rays koilangan no inaayun ki od doong woyd posolamat diyon to onama
u ini en kos ollog no buwis taddot mgo minuvu nod ponudtu no sikandin kos od ongaggon ta
o kowd kolingow nod puung to moppiya riyot duma woy potobtovangoy kow oyya su inin pinuungan iling to buwis no id kahaai to onama
umoruma kow to pomandu to koniyun mgo ponguu woy poiraom kow to kandan no kotungud
yyos sikandan kos od tamong koniyu amoy dii kowd pokosuwoy pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw woy nosorollan dan no od isau ran kangkan diyot onama amoy od ponudtuu to nopuungan dan
een dumoruma kow kandan amoyd kahaa ran nod tuman to kandan no pinuungan
u otik dii kowd dumoruma od kaanu sikandan woy dii idda od pokomoppiya koniyu
onayun kow dasaa atag konami
osorollan doy no molinis kos konamin poomdom diyot isowwan to onama woy ingowollon doy no od oubpa no inaayun motallong kos langun nod puungan doy
d loglohottan ku sikiyu no ponayun kow dasaa atag koddi amoyd pokolivod a ruwot koniyu to diid kouhoy
uopa no iddos onama no id pomonnan to kosunayan od potommu to langun no koilonganon dow amoyd kopuungan dow iddos id kopii rin
ikandin kos id badnow ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta no ukit to longossa rin noposivonnalan iddos lammin kodpotonduwoy no od taman to waad tomanon
yyos sikandin en kos motuus no ohodtamong ta no timbang mgo karnero rin
oy ukit ki isas rays muopa nod puungan to onama rinit keta iddos id kahaai rin
d doongon ta sikandin taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
go suwod od loglohottan ku sikiyu no yo kowd koobbod nod pominog to kodpomandu ku ukit kaayn sulat su moobbava ra man ini
d kopii ku mandad nod kosorollan dow no iddos suwod ta no si imoteo id poleggua ron pomon diyot prisuwan
tik goos da sikandin od pokoinguma rini od dumannon kud sikandin to kodunduwot koniyu
a id pongumusta a vo riyot langun no ponguu row to kopomakoy woy riyot langun no minuvu to onama
ddos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no toho talia id pongumusta mandad koniyu
uopa no langun dow od pokotanggap to kopiyannoy to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si antiago sokkad no uripon to onama woy tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
d sulat a koniyu no duma ku no mgo udio nod pompomakoy no nokodsuwoysuwoy kaay to ampowt ingod
omonnu kowd duwon
go suwod ku riyon to kopomakoy ahad duwon nokodossoosson kosupittan nod inguma koniyu yo kowd kotompoddi to puhawang ko konna kahaai row idda oraroy
yyos nokosaddoo kowd no iddos kodgeddam no noukitan dow idda en kos od pokomosalig to koniyun kopomakoy amoyd pokotiis kow tadda
een ponayun kow kos tiis to ahad ondan no kosupittan amoyd buyyag kow riyot kopomakoy no waa kulang
ddos ahad ondoy koniyu no kulang kos moraom no koovottan iyon moppiya nod buyu sikandin diyot onama no movoggoyvoggoy woy dii en sikandin od koohoddan taddot od buyu kandin
iru otid buyu sikandin diyot onama koilangan no dii sikandin od duworuwa
u iddos minuvu nod duworuwa od pokoiling to baud to dahat no od piyoddon to monokkaan kaamag ahad ingkon
een iddos iling kaayn minuvu konna sikandin od pokoimman nod kotanggap din iddos od buyuwon din diyon tod ongaggon
yyos id duworuwa man sikandin to kodsalig diyon to onama woy dii mandad od kotooo iddos langun nod puungan din
a sikiyu no mgo suwod diyot kopomakoy no worowora kahaa kow su mowwet kow riyot kodontong to onama
oy sikiyu nod koruwonnan kahaa kow otid kosorollan dow no iddos koniyun korotuwan waa koruanon diyot kodontong to onama oyyos od pokoiling idda to kovukaran no goos od kahangu
u otid moohiting don kos allow od kaanos kos mgo sabbot woyd pongoumpad kos mgo kovukaran woy od kaawa ron kos kogolingoy tadda
ling en mandad tadda kos minuvu nod koruwonnan su laggun tod kosasow sikandin to mgo korotuwan din tigkow od inguma kandin kos kopotayan
a moppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod pokotiis to mgo kodgeddam
yya su otid pokotiis sikandin tadda od kotanggap din iddos ganti no idda en so umuun waad tomanon no id tandu to onama atag to langun nid ginawa kandin
tik duwon minuvu no nopiyod diyot kodpuung to saa konna en ollog nod ikahi sikandin no iddos onama kos id piyod kandin to kodpuung to saa
yyos konna en od kopiyod kos onama riyot kodpuung to kororattan woy konna mandad sikandin kos od piyod to ahad ondoy riyot kodpuung to saa
u iyon od pokopiyod to minuvu nod puung to saa idda en so morat no ingowollon din no iling to oppan nod pokoposahad kandin
u otid duurumannan din iddos morat no ingowollon iyon od ingumannon tadda iddos saa
oy dos ponayun nod puung to saa iyon od ingumannon tadda iddos kopotayan no waad tomanon
een id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo kowd paakaa to poomdom dow no onama kos od piyod koniyu riyot kodpuung to saa
yya su iddos langun no moppiya woy waa kulang nod kotanggap ta id pomon diyot onama no mid bovaa to langun nod ponseaa riyot datas to langit
had od kopalin iddos od ponseaa riyot langit dii en od kopalin kos onama
yyos pomon to kandin nid kopii novovallan ki no mgo anak din ukit to kodpaabbotlabbot keta taddot bonnaan nonaw
d puungan din ini amoy siketa kos lampas kos koruanon to langun no binovallan din
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod poomdomma row ini
oilangan nod kotuig kow od pominog konnod awang od ooseng woy konna moomok od langot
u iddos langot konna od undag to motallong no koubpa no id kopiit onama
een tonani row iddos langun nod pokolibmit woy morat no pinuungan dow
oobbava kow riyot onama woy tumana row iddos kahi rin no nokopomuwa riyot pusung dow su idda en kos od pokotobbus koniyu
o row okali kos koniyun kougolingun ukit to kodpominog da to kahit onama ko konna tumana row idda
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod pominog to kahit onama woy diid tuman tadda nokoiling sikandin taddot minuvu no id ontong diyot oungan
o nokita rin kos kougolingun din id ipanow sikandin woy idda ron en nolingawan din don kos boyo rin
iru iddos minuvu nod pominog to suhu to onama no idda en kos od pokopolegguang kandin pomon diyot saa woy dii rin idda od kolingawan ko konna od tumanon din od tovangan en sikandin to onama taddot langun nod puungan din
a otik duwon minuvu nod ikahi no mopompomakoy sikandin piru dii rin od kotoholan kos bivig din id okalan din kos kougolingun din woy waa en koruanon to kandin no kopomakoy
iru iddos mooggot no kopomakoy no waa id pokosawoy riyot kodontong to onamon moy ta idda en so kodtavang to mgo ilu woy mgo bau nod kohirapan woy dii mandad sikandin od kopiyod to morat no botasan to mgo minuvu no waa onama
go suwod otik mooggot kow nod pomakoy ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta no orayd posivontuhan to langun koilangan no waa od podmusingon dow
onunggeleng duwon oruwon minuvu no mid usok diyot simbaan dow no mgo udio
os sokkad id sosising to buawan woy id oumpak to mahaa no umpak woy dos sokkad worowora no morat kos umpak
tid poooyyaran dow tod olitolit iddos id oumpak to mahaa woy od osengan dow to ir dini ka unsad to moppiyon unsaran piru od osengan dow iddos morat kos umpak to ohinat ka ra ruwon o lappag ka ra ruwot osag na ko ungketen kos od puungan du duwon en od podmusingon dow
oy morat kos koniyun poomdom oyya su id hukuman dow iddos worowora su atag koniyu lampas kos koruanon taddot noruwonnan kuntra taddot worowora
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod pominogga row ini
okosaddoo kow man no iddos mgo worowora kaay to ampowt ingod id aam sikandan to onama no od koratu riyot kopomakoy woy od kolonug diyot kandin no kodhari no id tandu rin to langun nid ginawa kandin
iru sikiyu id poddisokkan dow to kodontong iddos mgo worowora
ndan konna vo iddos mgo noruwonnan kos od ayuayu woyd ampoo koniyu riyot isowwan to mgo tohodhukum
oy sikandan en mandad kos id sosumpalit to od bontuhon no ngaran ni isas rays nod ongaggon no id pongomunoy keta
een moppiya no od tumanon dow iddos dakkoo kos koruanon to langun no suhu riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to inowanniyu kos dumon minuvu iling to kodginawa ru to kikown kougolingun
iru otik duwon od podmusingon dow nokosaa kow su nokosupak kowd to suhu
u iddos ahad ondoy nod tuman to langun no suhu to onama piru duwon sokkad no waa rin notuman nokosaa sikandin su iling dad to id supak din iddos langun no suhu
yya su iddos onama no mid ikahi to o kowd loivug mid ikahi mandad to o kowd imatoy
urisu ahad waa kow id loivug piru nokoimatoy kow nokosupak kow en taddot mgo uhu to onama
een koilangan nod ooyyaran ta kos keton kodooseng woy pinuungan su riyot morin allow od hukuman ki to onama ukit taddot kandin no suhu no od pokopolegguang to minuvu riyon to saa
yya su riyot allow to kodhukum dii od koeruwan kos onama taddot minuvu no waa id pokita to eru riyot duma
iru iddos eeruwon worad id kovaakki rin diyot allow to kodhukum
go suwod duwon bo koruanon otid ikahi kos minuvu no d pomakoy a piru waa pinuungan din nod posivonnaa taddot kopomakoy rin
d pokotobbus bo kandin iddos iling tadda no kopomakoy
ii en
onunggeleng duwon sokkad no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy nod kohirapan su kulang kos umpak din woy worad kokaan
a otid osengan dow ra sikandin to upiya ka
umpak ka to moppiya woy oivuung ka
tik taman da en tadda kos osengan dow piru waa row man sikandin boggayi taddot koilonganon din ondan duwon bo koruanon tadda
aa en
a iling dad en mandad tadda kos kopomakoy ta
u otid ikahi ki no id pomakoy ki piru waa pinuungan nod posivonnaa tadda waa en koruanon taddon kopomakoy
iru saddook duwon minuvu nod ikahi to uwon nokodossoosson poukit to kopomakoy su iddos sokkad taman da to kopomakoy woy dos duma taman da to pinuungan
a ini kos id pokotavak ku tadda
tik waa pinuungan du waa id pokoposivonnaa ru to kikown kopomakoy
iru siyak id pokita ku kikow kos kopomakoy ku no od posivonnalan to moppiyon pinuungan
d pomakoy ka no sokkad da kos onama
oppiya idda
iru ahad iddos mgo busow od pomakoy mandad tadda woy od kookollon dan to mattag allak oyyos nosorollan dan no od hukuman en sikandan diyot morin allow
aa utok du
oilangan pobbo no id paabbotlabbot ku kikow no iddos kopomakoy no waa posivonnali to moppiyon pinuungan waa en koruanon
ompottow man si braham no koopuwan ta
ddos unayan no id podmotallong sikandin diyot kodontong to onama su id tuman din en iddos suhu to onama kandin ukit to kodbuwis taddot anak din no si saac
a kaay ta en pantok od kosorollan no nokodduma iddos kopomakoy ni braham woy dos pinuungan din
yya su ukit to kandin no pinuungan waa kulang to kopomakoy rin
een ukit tadda notuman iddos osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to d pomakoy si braham taddot id ikahi to onama kandin deen id podmotallong sikandin to onama
oy idda en kos unayan no id ngoranan sikandin no oukuy to onama
aay ta en mandad pantok od kosorollan no riyot kodontong to onama od komotallong kos minuvu pomon to pinuungan din konna ra pomon to kopomakoy rin
a iling mandad tadda iddos kopomakoy ni ahab ahad sokkad sikandin no baay nod bovoligya dangan to lawa rin piru id podmotallong sikandin to onama pomon to moppiyon pinuungan din
u id tanggap din iddos oruwon udio no id suhu nod poniid diyon to erico woy id toddu rin kandan dos osson daan amoy diid sikandan od kokita taddot mgo kuntra ran
oomdomma row ini
ddos kopomakoy nokoiling to lawa to minuvu
yyos waa koruanon to lawa ta otik waa songnga su id patoy ron meen
ling mandad tadda waa koruanon to kopomakoy otik waa pinuungan
go suwod iyon moppiya no konna mouraa koniyu kos od kovovallan no tohodnonaw tod pompomakoy
u nokosaddoo kowd no sikami no mgo tohodnonaw movoggat pa kos kodhukum konami kuntra taddot duma
iketa langun no minuvu moomok ki nod kosoyup
iru iddos minuvu nod kotuig od tohoo to bivig din waa en id pokosawoy kandin oyyos od kotuig man sikandin nod tohoo to kougolingun din
onunggeleng otid kokangan ta kos kuda ahad dakkoo kos lawa tadda od kopiyod ta en ahad ingkon id poisau
ngketen dad en mandad iddos barku
had dakkoo idda woy ahad monokkaa kos kaamag od kopiyod idda to minuvu ahad ingkon din id poisau ukit to disok no timun
a ungketen dad en mandad inis dila su ahad oraroy inin disok no sakup to lawa piru dakkoo kos od kopuungan
oomdomma row man iddos disok da no apuy od pokotidduk idda to mowwag no puwaason
a inis dila nokoiling en mandad to apuy
d pomonnan ini to kororattan no od pokodoraat to intirut kominuvuwan ta
u iddos morat nod ponosengon ta no iling to loglog no apuy id pomon ki oivuyan
d pokogaha kos minuvu nod layam to nokodossoosson mellat no monnanap kaay to ampowt ingod dos mgo manuk to puwaason ahad iddos mgo ngaap diyot dahat
iru waa poron minuvu nod pokotohoo to dila
yya su inis dila noponnut morat iling to laas to uwod nod pokopatoy woy inaayun ini nopanoy nod ooseng to morat
d gamit ta inis keton dila to kodposolamat diyot onama nod ongaggon woy moy ta woy id gamit ta rad mandad ini to koddoddoraat to mgo duma ta ra en no id bovallan to onama no iling kandin
omon to sokkad da no bivig od leggua kos moppiya woy morat no osengan
go suwod konna en ini ollog nod puungan ta
yyos konna od leggua iddos motabbang woy mosupollod no oweg diyot sokkad da no sobsob
oy waa kayu no igera no od bovunga to olibo woy waa ubas nod bovunga to igera
aa mandad od kaangoy no motabbang no oweg diyot dahat
een konna ollog nod leggua kos moppiya woy morat no osengan pomon diyot sokkad da no bivig
a otik duwon minuvu riyot koniyu no moraom kos koovottan woy mowwet kos sinorollan koilangan no id pokita rin ini ukit to moppiyon pinuungan no duwon kodpoobbava no id pomon to moraom no koovottan
iru otik duwon kosina riyot ginawa row woy idda ra en so koniyun kougolingun kos inaayun dow od poomdommon konna ollog nod pobporoong kow to koniyun koovottan oyyos id polinuhus dow iddos bonnaan nonaw
os moraom no koovottan no iling tadda waa id pomon to onama ko konna id pomon da kaay to ampowt ingod woy ki oivuyan
u ahad ingkon kos minuvu no duwon kosina woy idda ra en so kougolingun din kos od popoomdommon din diyon en mandad kos ukahan woy langun no morat no pinuungan
iru iddos minuvu no duwon moraom no koovottan pomon diyot onama unnot langun waa id pokosawoy kandin mohingginawa to kosunayan mopoobbava morumoruma eeruwon woy movoggoyvoggoy woy motallong kos langun nod puungan din
aa od podmusingon din woy konnod pouvaguvag
ddos minuvu nod poduli to koroniyan nokoiling sikandin to minuvu no id pomuwa to bonni to kosunayan woy dos nokottu rin idda en so motallong no kodoubpa
ndan kos id pomonnan to koniyun kodpoimotayoy woy ukahan
d pomon en ini to morat no mgo ingowollon dow no id samuk to koniyun poomdom
uwon nanoy od ingowollon dow piru waa row idda naangoy deen od pokidimatoy kow amoyd kaangoy row idda
oy duwon mandad id koimai row no waa row naangoy deen nokodimatoy woy nokodukag kow
yon unayan no idda waa riyot koniyu oyyos waa kow man id buyu riyon to onama
iru ahad pa od buyuwon dow idda riyot onama waa kow boggayi pomon to morat man kos koniyun dontulon oyyos od uuwakkan dow ra en idda atag to kougolingun no kahaan
okoiling kow to baay nod lappang to sawa rin su konna iddos onama kos id dokollan dow to ginawa ko konna iddos morat no ingowollon
aa row vo nosorolli no iddos minuvu nod ginawa to morat no ingowollon kaay to ampowt ingod kuntra sikandin to onama
een iddos ahad ondoy nod ginawa to ingod od kovovallan en sikandin no kuntra to onama
o row poomdomma no waa koruanon taddot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ddos spiritu no id popiyod to onama nod ubpa keta orayd pongolikud otid kovaad kos ginawa ta
iru ahad iling tadda lampas kos eru to onama keta amoy dii ki od kopiyod to morat no ingowollon ta
yya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no untra to onama iddos od poratasdatas piru id koerui rin iddos od poobbava
een poiraom kow to kodponguu to onama woy atui row si oivuyan amoy od paahuy sikandin pomon koniyu
orani kow to onama woy od porani sikandin koniyu
ikiyu no mgo mosaasaa tanan kowd to mgo saa row amoy molinis kos koubpa row
oy sikiyu nod duworuwa pomakoy kowd to bonnaavonnaa riyon to onama
anu kow woy sondit kowd to morat no nopuungan dow
o kowd kosuat woyd kahaa taddot mgo saa row ko konna sinoggow woy lanu kow tadda
u otik od poobbava kow riyot isowwan tod ongaggon od porotason kow nikandin
go suwod yo kowd podorattoy
yya su iddos minuvu nod doddoraat woy od hukum to duma rin nod pompomakoy iling to id hukuman din kos suhu to onama
u otid hukuman dow iddos suhu to onama konna kowd tohodtuman to suhu rin ko konna tohodhukum don
okkad da kos id pomonnan to suhu idda ra en so onama deen sikandin da kos tohodhukum to pinuungan to langun no minuvu
ikandin da kos od pokotobbus woy od pokosilut to minuvu riyot kopotayan no waad tomanon
urisu ondoy ki man nod hukum to mgo duma ta
ominog kow sikiyu nod ikahi to oungkay o simag od undiyon koy to osson bonuwa woyd oubpa koy rutun daom to sokkad no lahun woy od nigusyu koy amoyd pokosoopi to dakkoo
aa kow nokosaddoo ko ondan kos od kotomanan dow simag
u inis umuu ta kaay to ampowt ingod od lihad da iling to obboo nod kokita sinahaw woy od kowora mandon
yon da ollog nod osengon dow no tik id kopiit onama od kouyag koy pa woy od kopuungan doy poron kos mgo puhawang doy
iru sikiyu noponnu kow moho to kodpobporoong mokaatag tod puungan dow simag
os iling tadda no kodpobporoong morat en
een pomotawi row iddos minuvu no nokosaddoo ron ko ondan kos ollog nod puungan piru waa rin idda puungi nokosaa en sikandin
a pominog kow sikiyu no noruwonnan
yas kow sinoggow to mosuppit no kotomanan nod inguma koniyu init morin allow
d koobbuu kos koniyun koruwonnan woy od kotkotton to anoy kos mgo umpak dow
had iddos buawan woy soopi row od tongison woy dos tangis od posivonnaa to koniyun saa no lohoddon
onna ra koruwonnan kos nolimud dow atag to morin allow ko konna ahad iddos silut no iling to apuy nod kotkot to lawa row
ominog kow
ddos mgo tohodkottu riyot kamot dow no waa row boyari id pomehes to kodsinoggow woy norinog idda to onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun
ikiyu no noruwonnan moppiya kos koubpa row kaay to ampowt ingod woy inaayun od kahaahaa
iru nokoiling kow to mgo oyama no id paambog da atag to allow to kodsumbali no idda en so od inguma no kodhukum to onama koniyu
u id hukuman dow kos mgo minuvu no waa nokosaa koniyu woy id imotayan dow sikandan ahad waa id atu koniyu
a mgo suwod tiis kow to mgo kosupittan taman to kodlivod tod ongaggon
oomdomma row man iddos minuvu nod puung to livuta dii sikandin od koobbod nod aangat no od tuvu kos pinomuwa rin
d kotuig sikandin nod tiis od aangat to uran no od potuvu to mgo pinomuwa woy taddot uran nod povunga amoyd pokokottu sikandin
een iling mandad tadda koilangan nod tiis kow
hotta row kos koniyun kopomakoy su asow ron iddos kodlivod tod ongaggon
go suwod yo kowd popoommivihoy amoy dii kow od silutan to onama oyya su iddos od hukum keta asow ron od inguma iling to ika ron to sobbangan
d ilingan ta iddos kodtiis taddot mgo propeta no id poponudtuu to onama to kahi rin
yyos ahad dakkoo kos kodposuppit kandan ponayun dan en nid tiis
osorollan ta no moppiya kos kotomanan taddot mid tiis to mgo kosupittan
okosaddoo kowd mokaatag to kodtiis ni ob no ahad lampas don kos kosupittan din piru ponayun en sikandin nid pomakoy
a riyot mori od kokita ta no moppiya iddos dontulon atag kandin oyya su eeruwon kos od ongaggon woy noponnut kopiyannoy
go suwod duwon pa od osengon ku koniyu no dakkoo kos koruanon
o kowd pongulivot to ahad ondan diyot datas to langit o kaay to ampowt ingod woy duma pa
yon dow ra osenga no yya otid aman kow woy onna otik dii kow od aman su amoy dii kow od silutan to onama
a otik duwon od kohirapan diyot koniyu koilangan nod dasaa sikandin
tik duwon od kahaa koilangan nod kanta sikandin atag to koddoong to onama
