tik duwon od kovohokan diyot koniyu koilangan no id poumow rin kos od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy amoyd dasaa atag kandin
iyot koddasaa ran od doddasan dan sikandin to lana ukit to ngaran tod ongaggon
ddos koddasaa nod dumannan to kodsalig od pokouli taddot od kovohokan
d pouli tod ongaggon iddos moppiyon kodlolaawa rin woy otik nokosaa sikandin od posinsyan sikandin to onama
een poponudtuloy kow to koniyun mgo saa duma to kodsondit woy porosaloy kow amoyd kouliyan kow
u iddos dosalon to motallong no minuvu duwon dakkoon undahon oyyos od pominoggon en to onama
oomdomma row man si lias no propeta
inuvu sikandin iling keta piru id dasaa sikandin to bonnaavonnaa no diid uran woy waa en id uran daom to otollu woy tongngot lahun
opongnga idda id dasaa ron mandon sikandin no od uran woy id uran en to dakkoo woy mid tuvu mandon kos mgo pinomuwa woy id bovunga
a mgo suwod otik duwon diyot koniyu no nokosuwoy pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw koilangan no duwon od nonaw kandin amoy od livod nod tuman tadda
oomdomma row no iddos minuvu nod pokotavang to sokkad no mosaasaa amoyd tonanan din kos kororattan id polegguang mandad sikandin pomon diyot kopotayan no waad tomanon woy od posinsyan to onama kos mouraan saa rin
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si edro no sokkad no apostoles ni isas rays
ni en kos sulat ku atag koniyu no id ponaam to onama no mgo moholiyug kaay to ampowt ingod no nokodsuwoysuwoy nid ponoubpa riyot mgo prubinsya to onto alacia apadocia sia woy riyot itinia
apoy kowd id aam to onamon moy ta woy id poossa kow to his no spiritu amoyd kovovallan no mgo sakup to onama
d puhawang din ini su amoy morumoruma kow ki isas rays woy od kolinisan kowd pomon diyot koniyun saa ukit to longossa rin nid tihis diyon to krus
uopa nod kotanggap dow pa en iddos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan no id pomon to onama
d doongon ta iddos onama no moy woy onama mandad tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
yyos pomon to dakkoon eru rin keta id boggayan ki nikandin to lammin umuu ukit to kodbadnow ki isas rays
een dakkoo kos kodsalig ta no od kotuman en iddos od immanan ta
yya su nosorollan ta no duwon id panoy to onama riyot datas to langit atag keta no mgo anak din woy dii en idda od koobbuu diid kolibmitan woy dii mandad od kowora
oy ukit to kopomakoy row to onama od pongollangan kow to kotuusan din laggun tod aangat kow taddot allow to kodtobbus koniyu taman to id pokita rin idda init morin allow
een kahaa kow oraroy ahad od kaanu kow to moobbavon timpu taddot nokodossoosson kodgeddam nod inguma koniyu
os dontulon taddon mgo kodgeddam idda en so kodposivonnaa to koniyun kopomakoy iling to buawan no id subbuk diyot apuy amoyd kosorollan ko mooggot bo iddon buawan o konna
iru iddos kopomakoy ta lampas pa kos koruanon taddot buawan su iddos buawan od korattan man
een otid pokoponalu ki taddot mgo kodgeddam mooggot en kos keton kopomakoy
a od koroong ki woyd koposivontuhan diyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays
had waa row poron nokita si isas rays id dokollan dow en sikandin to ginawa
oy ahad waa kow pa nokokita kandin koungkay piru mid pomakoy kow en kandin deen duwon kahaan dow no diid toppong woy waad koilingan
yyos od kotanggap dow en iddos od immanon dow no idda en so kodtobbus pomon to koniyun kopomakoy kandin
a ukit to mgo propeta dangan tapoy ron id poponudtuu to onama iddos mokaatag to kopiyannoy rin no idda en so kodtobbus din koniyu
d ooyyaran dan idda to kodpohinonaw amoyd koovottan inin kodtobbus
yyos id kopii ran nod kosorollan ko ondan kos poukit taddon kodtobbus woy kannu idda od kotuman
u iddos his no spiritu no id ubpa riyot kandan tapoy ron id posaddoo mokaatag taddot koosayan nod koukitan ni isas rays woy kopongnga tadda od posivontuhan sikandin
a id posaddoo mandad to onama riyot mgo propeta no iddos id poponudtuu rin kandan konnad atag kandan ko konna atag en keta
oy dos oppiyon inoggan nid ponudtuu ran dangan norinog dowd mandad koungkay riyot duma no id ponudtuu koniyu ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu no id popiyod to onama pomon diyot datas to langit
a ahad iddos mgo ponolihan oraroy ran nid kopii no od pokaabbot mokaatag tadda
een pomon to kodtobbus to onama koniyu koilangan no nopanoy kos poomdom dow riyot kodpuung to id kopiit onama
oilangan mandad no duwon kodtohoo row to koniyun kougolingun woy mosalig kos koimannan dow taddot id boggoy to onama koniyu riyot allow to kodlivod ni isas rays
a pomon to mgo anak kowd man to onama koilangan no morumoruma kow to kandin nid kopii
o kow od ikuu taddot morat no mgo ingowollon no nooyami row dangan to waa kow pa nokosaddoo taddot bonnaan nonaw
iru koungkay diyot langun nod puungan dow ilingi row kos onama oyyos uhis man sikandin no id aam keta
u noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no lingi a nikiyu oyyos siyak uhis a
oomdomma row no iddos onama no od ngoranan dow no moy riyot dosalon dow sikandin mandad kos od hukum to langun no minuvu loppa taddot nopuungan to ipat sokkad woy waa en od podmusingon din
een koilangan nod posivontuhan dow sikandin duma to allak laggun tod oubpa ki pa kaay to ampowt ingod
yya su id tobbus kow nikandin pomon diyot waa koruanon no kooubpa no noikuu row pomon diyot koniyun kovuyyahan
oy nokosaddoo kow no iddos bullas din amoyd kotobbus kow konna iling taddot buawan woy soopi nod kowora
yon din id bullas idda en so mahaa no longossa ni isas rays nid tihis diyon to krus timbang natin karnero no waa sarii no id buwis amoy od awa to keton mgo saa
o waa pa novovalli inis ingod tapoy ron id aam to onama si isas rays amoy od tobbus to mgo minuvu
iru id pokita sikandin to onama atag koniyu init morin mgo allow
kit ki isas rays id pomakoy kowd to onama no id badnow kandin woy id posivontuhan sikandin lampas to langun
een iddos kodsalig woy kodimman dow diyon da en to onama
a pomon to nolinisan kowd diyot langun no morat no pinuungan dow ukit to kodtuman taddot bonnaan nonaw duwon don mooggot no kodginawa row to mgo duma row nod pompomakoy
urisu pohinowannoy kow peen pomon diyot tivuk no pusung dow
u nominuvu kowd mandon konna ukit to kodanak to minuvu no duwon kopotayan ko konna ukit to waa kopolinan woy maantoy no ahit onama
yyos duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to ddos langun no minuvu nokoiling to sabbot woy dos bantug dan nokoiling to bulak
os sabbot goos od kahangu woy dos mgo bulak od pongoumpad
iru iddos kahi tod ongaggon od taman en to waad tomanon
a ini en kos oppiyon inoggan no id ponudtuu riyot koniyu
een pomon to id lammi kowd to onama tonani rowd iddos langun no morat no pinuungan no idda en so kodaakaa kodpouvaguvag od kosina woy dos osengan nod pokoddoraat to duma
a iling to anak no lammid tobbow no inaayun od kopiyan nod susu koilangan mandad no inaayun kow od kopiyan to kahit onama no waa sambut su amoy od tuvu peen kos koniyun kopomakoy taman tod kopongnga iddos kodtobbus din koniyu
yyos noheddaman dowd iddos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon
orani kow ki isas rays nod ongaggon su maantoy sikandin woy od boggoy to umuun waad tomanon
yyos sikandin kos maantoyn batu no od pokomosalig to baoy woy sikandin en kos id aam to onama woy id dokollan din to koruanon
iru inin batu id oovoddan to mgo tohodbovaoy
a sikiyu pomon to novoggayan kowd man to umuun waad tomanon nokoiling kowd mandad to maantoyn mgo batu nod kovovallan no baoyt onama
okoiling kow mandad to mgo tohodbuwis no id poossa atag kandin
oy ukit to tavang ni isas rays od pokobovuwis kowd diyot onama taddot id kahaai rin no idda en so kodsimba riyot kandin ukit to spiritu rin
yya su noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no mid ungketen to omotawi row
d aam ku iddos batu no orayn dakkoo kos koruanon no mosalig no pounsaran taddot baoy ku riyot bonuwa to ion
os ahad ondoy nod pomakoy kandin konna en od pokodsondit su od kosolihan man sikandin
tag koniyu nod pomakoy dakkoo en kos koruanon kaayn batu
iru atag taddot diid pomakoy duwon noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos batu no id oovoddan to mgo tohodbovaoy idda en baling kos od pokomosalig taddot baoy
oy duwon mandad noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ni en kos batu no od pokoposiud to mgo minuvu woy od pokoporudsu kandan
d pokorudsu sikandan oyyos dii ran man od pomakoy to kahit onama su ini en kos tapoyn puhawang din taddot konnod pomakoy
iru sikiyu id aam kow to onama no mgo minuvu rin
go hari kow riyot kohoriyan din woy mgo tohodbuwis kow no id puung atag kandin
d ossa kow nikandin amoy od dumoruma kandin diyot tivuk no ginawa row
onama kos id pongomunoy koniyu woy id aam kow nikandin amoyd posoob taddot nonaw mokaatag to mokososoobbun pinuungan din
yya su dangan diyon kow to mosukirom pomon to koniyun mgo saa piru id polegguang kow nikandin pomon diyot mosukirom woy id alin diyot mokososoobbun koowangan din
angan konna kow pa mgo minuvu to onama piru koungkay mgo minuvu kowd nikandin
angan waa row notanggap iddos eru to onama piru koungkay notanggap dowd en
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod nokoiling to mgo moholiyug ki ra kaay to ampowt ingod oyyos konna kaay kos bonnaan ingod ta
urisu od buyuwon ku koniyu no yo kow od ikuu to morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa row su ini en kos od pokopiyod koniyu riyot kodpuung to saa no od supak to ginawa row riyot kodpuung to id kopiit onama
oilangan no inaayun motallong kos kodbovotasan dow riyot mgo minuvu no waa onama
u otid puungan dow ini ahad pa od osengon dan koungkay no morat kow piru od kokita ran diyot mori no motallong bos kos pinuungan dow
omon kaay od posivontuhan dan kos onama riyot kodundini rin amoy od hukum keta
a atag to bantug tod ongaggon koilangan nod poiraom kow to kodponguu taddot langun no duwon kotungud koniyu
umoruma kow taddot hari to oma oyyos sikandin man kos duwon lampas no kotungud
oiraom kow mandad to kodponguu to mgo gubernador su sikandan kos id solihan to hari no od silut taddot od puung to morat woy od doong taddot od puung to moppiya
yya su iyon id kopiit onama no motallong kos pinuungan dow amoyd kotampod iddos kodsawoy koniyu to mgo minuvu no waa sinorollan to kovonnaan
a sikiyu su duwon don man kolegguangan dow worad od pokobaavag koniyu to ahad ondan no id kopii row nod puungan
iru yo row ini bovalli no unayan nod puungan dowd iddos ahad ondan no morat
yon dow puungi pokita row no mgo uripon kow en to onama
ispitui row iddos langun no minuvu woy ginowanni row iddos mgo suwod dow riyon to kopomakoy
oilangan no duwon allak dow to onama woy rispitui row iddos hari to oma
a sikiyu mandad no mgo uripon rispitui row kos koniyun mgo amu woy poiraom kow to kandan no kotungud
onna no iyon dow ra od rispituwan iddos mgo amu no moppiya kos botasan ko konna ahad iddos amu nod ayuayu koniyu
d kahaa en iddos onama otid kotiis dow iddos kodposuppit to koniyun mgo amu ahad waa saa no nopuungan dow
yyos waa koruanon otid tiis kow to mgo lampos pomon to morat kos id puungan dow
iru otik od kotiis dow iddos kodposuppit pomon to motallong no pinuungan dow id kahaai kow en to onama
d aam kow to onama amoyd tiis to mgo kodposuppit oyyos si isas rays id tiis mandad to kodposuppit atag koniyu woy id boggoy koniyu to ponunggelengan amoyd ikulon dow iddos kodbovotasan din
aa sikandin id puung to saa woy waa en id ouhus
o id sumpalit sikandin waa rin idda tovaka to morat
o id posokitan sikandin waa en sikandin id balus nid oseng to morat
yon din id puungan id salig din baling iddos langun diyon to onama no ollog kos kodhukum
i isas rays kos id tiyang to keton mgo saa ukit to kodpakpak kandin diyon to krus su amoy konna kid od puung to saa woy iyon tad od puungan iddos motallong
oy pomon taddot mgo pali nid tiis din idda en kos nokouli keta
angan to waa kow pa mid pomakoy ki isas rays nokoiling kow to notarin no mgo karnero
iru koungkay nokolivod kowd diyot ki isas rays no ohodtamong woy ohodokudi koniyu
a sikiyu mandad no mgo baay koilangan nod poiraom kow to kodponguu to koniyun sawa
u ahad waa ran id pomakoy to kahit onama piru ukit to moppiyon botasan dow od kopiyod en sikandan ahad dii row od ponudtulan to kahit onama
yya su od kokita ran man no molinis kow riyot kodontong to onama woy duwon allak dow kandin
a mokaatag to kodpolihonnoy yo row poomdomma no iyon od pokomolihonnoy koniyu iddos od kokita iling to kodsaapid to bowvuu woy kodsukub to mgo buawan woy motoos no mgo umpak
iru iyon dow polihonnaya iddos diyot daom to ginawa row no idda en so moppiyon kodbovotasan woy kodpoobbava
nin kodpolihonnoy dii en od kowora woy dakkoo kos koruanon diyot kodontong to onama
ling en kaay iddos mopompomakoy no mgo baay dangan no mid salig to onama
os kodpoiraom dan to kodponguu to sawa ran idda en kos nokopolihonnoy kandan
ngketen dad en mandad si ara
yyos morumoruma sikandin ki braham no sawa rin woy id rispituwan din sikandin timbang amu rin
a sikiyu no mgo baay koungkay od kongoranan kow en no koubbaran ni ara otid puung kow to ollog woy konna kow od kovaakkan to ahad ondan
a sikiyu mandad no mgo mama koilangan no moppiya kos koroniyan dow to koniyun sawa woy rispitui row sikandan
yya su ahad konna iling koniyu kos konokkaan dan piru iling sikandan koniyu no id boggayan to onama to umuun waad tomanon
o ungketen kos kodginawa no id pokita row kandan waa od pokobaavag to koddasaa row riyon to onama
a duwon pa od osengon ku koniyu langun
oilangan nod posokaddoy kow woy od pokaabbot kow tod geddamon to duma
ohinowannoy kow timbang mgo toosuwod woy pokita kow to eru riyon to ipat sokkad woy poobbava kow
tik duwon nokopuung to morat koniyu yo kowd balus
tid porinoggon kow to mosakit no osengan yo kowd oseng to morat
yon dow baling puungi dasaa kow no od pokita kandan to kopiyannoy iddos onama
u iyon dontulon nid aam kow nikandin amoy id pokita rin mandad koniyu iddos kandin no kopiyannoy
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no ddos ahad ondoy nod kopiyan no moppiya kos koubpa rin woy inaayun duwon kahaan koilangan no konna sikandin od oseng to morat woy diid ouhus
d inoyyuhan din kos morat no pinuungan woy iyon din od puungan iddos moppiya
oilangan no od noonokkalan din no inaayun moppiya kos koroniyan din diyot duma
yyos od tomongngan tod ongaggon iddos mgo motallong woy od pominoggon din kos dosalon dan piru id kolingasai rin iddos od puung to morat
aa ayu minuvu nod posuppit koniyu otik iyon dow od puungan iddos moppiya
iru ahad duwon od posuppit koniyu pomon to motallong no pinuungan dow moppiya kod kotomanan dow
o kowd kovaakki kandan woy yo kowd kaanu ko konna posivontuhi row riyot tivuk no pusung dow si isas rays su sikandin kos od ongaggon dow
naayun kow panoy to kodtavak to ahad ondoy nod ointud koniyu mokaatag to koimmanan dow riyot ki isas
iru riyot kodtavak dow ooyyari row to kodooseng no duwon kodrispitu
oilangan mandad no inaayun molinis kos poomdom dow su amoy otik duwon od sosumpalit koniyu od koilawan baling sikandan taddot id ikahi ran otid kokita ran kos moppiyon botasan dow oyyos nosokkad kow man diyot ki isas rays
u moppiya pa nod tiis kow to kosupittan pomon to kodpuung dow to moppiya otik idda en kos id kopiit onama kuntra tod tiis kow to kosupittan pomon to kodpuung to morat
oomdomma row no id imotayan si isas rays ahad waa saa no nopuungan din
osokkad da sikandin id patoy atag to saa to langun amoy od pokoduli kos koroniyan ta riyot onama
d imotayan kos kandin no lawa piru maantoy iddos kandin no ispiritu
a iddos ispiritu rin id undiyon to lugaa no id prisuwan taddot mgo ispiritu woy id ponudtulan din sikandan to kahit onama
ikandan en iddos waa id dumoruma to kahit onama iddot timpu no mid bovaa si oe to arka
ddon timpu mowwet kos posinsya to onama no id aangat nod pomakoy kandin iddos mgo minuvu taman to nopongnga ni oe iddos arka
iru wau ra no minuvu kos nokousok tadda woy notovangan pomon taddot oweg
a iddon oweg ponunggelengan to kodboutismu
yyos pomon to kodboutismu koniyu notovangan kow to onama ukit to kodbadnow ki isas rays
oy inin boutismu konna kodunab to bungit to lawa row ko konna kilaannan ini to koddasaa row riyot onama amoy od molinis kos koniyun poomdom
a novatun si isas diyot datas to langit woy koungkay diyon sikandin lomig to kowanan to onama woy id poiraom to kandin no kodponguu iddos langun no ponolihan dos langun no duwon kotuusan woy dos duwon mgo kotungud
a pomon to kodtiis ni isas rays taddot kodposuppit to lawa rin koilangan no nopanoy kow mandad nod tiis iling kandin
u iddos minuvu no mid tiis to kodposuppit id tanan don sikandin to saa
omon kaay konnad sikandin od poiraom taddot morat no mgo ingowollon kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna od poiraom don sikandin to id kopiit onama laggun to nouyag pa sikandin
owwet don kos timpu no id uwakkan dow to kodpuung to pinuungan to mgo minuvu no waa onama
u dangan ahad ondan don kos od pongkopuungan dow no molibmit woy od pokoilowilown pinuungan
naayun kow od kohubug woy od lonug to lampas no kahaan no waa kodtohoo to morat no ingowollon to lawa
oy id ponsimba kow taddot konna bonnaan mgo monama no id kolingasai taddot bonnaan onama
iru koungkay od kosoobbuwan kos mgo minuvu no waa onama oyyos dii kowd man od lonug taddot noompasan no pinuungan dan deen od doddorattan kowd nikandan
iru od inguma en kos allow no od isowwon dan diyot onama iddos pinuungan dan oyya su nopanoy sikandin nod hukum taddot nongouyag pa woy taddot id poomatoy ron
u iddos mgo minuvu nid poomatoy ron id ponudtulan dangan to oppiyon inoggan
yon dontulon tadda amoy od pokotanggap sikandan to umuun waad tomanon ahad od patoy kos lawa ran oyyos ini meen kos id hukum to onama to langun no minuvu
a asow ron kos kotompusan to ingod deen ooyyari row woy toholi row kos koniyun kougolingun su amoy waa od pokobaavag to mgo dosalon dow
ampas to langun ohotta row kos koniyun kodpohinowannoy su amoy moomok kow nod pokoposinsya ahad mouraa kos saa to duma riyot koniyu
o kow od tammud otik duwon duma row nod pompomakoy no od allus diyot koniyun mgo baoy ko konna tonggapa row sikandan no mahan diyot ginawa row
a su id boggayan man to onama to nokodossoosson kogahan iddos ipat sokkad koniyu upiyanni row idda tod gamit amoy od pokodtovangoy kow
tik id boggayan kow to kogahan to kodponudtuu to kahit onama poomdomma row no onama kos id ooseng ukit koniyu
tik id boggayan kow to kogahan to kodtavang to duma puungi row ini ukit to konokkaan no id boggoy to onama su amoy riyot langun nod puungan dow od koroong kos onama ukit ki isas rays
yyos sikandin en kos ollog nod posivontuhan woy motuus no od hari taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo kowd kosoobbui taddot lampas no kodposuppit no id inguma koniyu no immat od koommiyan kow
yyos od koukitan dow en inis langun namoyd geddaman kos koniyun kopomakoy
yon dow puungi kahaa kow su timbang id lonug kow duma ki isas rays diyot kodtiis to mgo kodposuppit woy ukit kaay oraroy kow peen od kahaa otid kokita ron to langun iddos seaa to kotuusan din
een moppiya kod kotomanan dow otik duwon od doddoraat koniyu pomon to kopomakoy row ki isas rays oyyos kilaannan ini no noiroomman kow taddot motuus no spiritu to onama
tik id posupittan kow muopa no konna ini pomon to duwon nopuungan dow no morat iling to kodimatoy kodponakow woy duma pon morat no pinuungan woy dos kodpongilavut to pinuungan to duma
iru otid posupittan kow pomon to kopomakoy row ki isas rays yo kowd koilow ko konna posolomati row iddos onama oyyos si isas rays kos id pongomunoy koniyu
u id inguma ron kos timpu no od tigkanoy ron kos onama to kodhukum to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
oy dos od unnan din to kodhukum idda en so mgo sakup din
a otik mosuppit man kos id hukum din keta lampas peen no mosuppit kos od ingumannon taddot waa id pomakoy to oppiyon inoggan pomon diyot onama
yyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no tik mosuppit man nod kotobbus iddos motallong no mgo minuvu iyon pobbo iddos mgo mosaasaa woy waa onama
urisu otik puhawang man to onama nod tiis kow to mgo kodposuppit salig dow kos koniyun kougolingun diyot kandin no mid bovaa koniyu woy ponayun kow to kodpuung to moppiya
u od tumanon en to onama iddos tandu rin no dii kow en nikandin od tonanan
a sikiyu no od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy duwon od osengon ku koniyu
yyos siyak sokkad a mandad nod buyyahon woy matamata ku ron en moho tid kita taddot mgo kodposuppit no id tiis ni isas rays
oy sokkad a en mandad nod kolonug to kodposivantug kandin otid kokita ron sikandin to langun no minuvu init morin allow
yon od osengon ku koniyu no ooyyari row to kodpiyod kos od pompomakoy ruwot koniyu
u nokoiling sikandan to mgo karnero to onama no id sanna rin koniyu
oilangan no konna movoggat diyot ginawa row iddos kodtuhanuu row kandan ko konna mahan diyot ginawa row oyyos ini en kos id kopiit onama
uhonula row sikandan no konna soopi kos dontulon dow ko konna pomon to id kopii row en nod tavang
o kow mandad od loupig ko ondan kos id kopii row taddot mgo minuvu nid sanna koniyu ko konna koilangan no id pokita row kandan kos moppiyon kodbovotasan su amoy od ilingan kow nikandan
a otid livod don si isas rays no onguu to langun no ohodtamong tod pompomakoy od boggayan kow nikandin to ganti no orayn motoos woy diid kowora no idda en so kodlonug dow taddot bantug din no od taman to waad tomanon
a sikiyu mandad no mgo sudduwan poiraom kow to kodponguu tod pombuyyahon
oy langun dow koilangan nod poobbava woyd potovangoy oyyos noikahi riyot osulat no ahit onama no untra to onama iddos od poratasdatas piru id koerui rin iddos od poobbava
een poobbava kow nod poiraom to kotuusan to onama su otid inguma ron iddos ollog no timpu od posivontuhan kow en nikandin
d salig dow riyot kandin iddos ahad ondan no id kaanui row oyyos od kosowkuu woy od tavang sikandin koniyu
antoy kow woy yo kowd tintinuhon oyya su iddos kuntra row no si oivuyan od lingkuslingkus iling to movuut no liyun nod inihoo amoy od nangkap tod dowiyon
urisu koilangan no mosalig kow riyot kopomakoy woy yo kowd potalu kandin su nosorollan dow no konna ra sikiyu kos id ukit to mgo kodposuppit ko konna ahad peen iddos mgo suwod woy mgo tobboy row to kopomakoy no riyot ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod
iru konnod kouhoy kos kodtiis dow taddon mgo kodposuppit
opongnga tadda iddos onama no id pomonnan to langun no kopiyannoy od tavang koniyu amoy worad en kulang to kopomakoy row
d ohotton din kos koniyun kopomakoy amoy diid kowaong woyd ponokkalon kow peen nikandin
d aam kow nikandin amoyd pokolonug taddot bantug din no waad tomanon pomon to nosokkad kowd ki isas rays
a od doongan ta sikandin no motuus to langun woy od hari sikandin taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
d sulatan ku sikiyu ukit to tavang ni ilas no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no od kosolihan ku
a ukit kaayt moobbavon sulat ku id kopii ku nod koinniyat kow woy id posivonnaa ku koniyu no mooggot en iddos kopiyannoy to onama
een yo kowd pitas taddon kopiyannoy
a id pongumusta koniyu iddos od pompomakoy rinit bonuwa to abilonia no id aam to onama iling koniyu
oy si arcos no anak ku riyot kopomakoy id pongumusta mandad koniyu
okuukumustay kow amoyd pokita no id pohinowannoy kow
uopa no langun dow no nosokkad diyot ki isas rays od pokotanggap to kosunayan no id pomon to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si imon edro no uripon ni isas rays woy sokkad a mandad taddot mgo apostoles din
d sulat ku ini atag koniyu no nokotanggap to kopomakoy no dakkoo kos koruanon iling to konamin kopomakoy ukit to kotoongngan ni isas rays no onama woy ohodtobbus ta
uopa nod kotimulan peen kos kopiyannoy woy kosunayan diyot koniyu pomon to nosodsorollan dowd iddos onama woy si isas rays nod ongaggon ta
a ukit to kotuusan to onama id boggayan ki nikandin to langun no koilonganon ta amoy od oubpa ki nod ikuu to id kopiit onama
d kopuungan ta ini pomon to nosodsorollan ta en sikandin no id aam keta ukit to kandin no bantug woy kopiyannoy
oy ukit to kandin no kotuusan id boggoy rin keta iddos mgo tandu rin no orayn dakkoo kos koruanon
kit kaay od pokoporiyu ki mandad taddot morat no mgo ingowollon kaay to ampowt ingod woy od pokoikuu ki taddot botasanon to onama
een nokkaanokkaa kow amoy iddos koniyun kopomakoy od kotimulan peen taddot moppiyon kodbovotasan
a riyot moppiyon kodbovotasan id timuu row iddos koovottan mokaatag to onama
a riyot koniyun koovottan id timuu row iddos kodtohoo to kougolingun woy riyot kodtohoo to kougolingun id timuu row iddos kodtiis to kosupittan
oy riyot kodtiis to kosupittan id timuu row iddos botasanon to onama
oy riyot botasanon to onama id timuu row iddos kodginawa riyot mgo suwod to kopomakoy ahad mandad diyot konnod pompomakoy
u otik inaayun dow ini od puungan moppiya en kos od undahon to langun nod puungan dow woy od kosodsorollan dowd si isas rays nod ongaggon ta
iru ko duwon od pompomakoy no waa riyot kandan inin mgo kodbovotasan nokoiling sikandan to butud no diid pokokita ko ondan kos diyot kounnan woy id lingawan dan no iddos id lihad no mgo saa ran id posinsyan don to onama
urisu mgo suwod konna kow od popoomdom to iling tadda ko konna nokkaanokkaa kow no moppiya kos kodbovotasan dow amoyd koposivonnalan no id aam kow en to onama woy tapoy rin don ini id puhawang
u otik ungketen kos od puungan dow konna kow en od pokorellos diyot koniyun kopomakoy
a ukit kaay duwon en dakkoon kahaan ni isas rays nod ongaggon woy ohodtobbus ta no od tanggap koniyu riyot waad tomanon no kodhari rin
een ahad nokosaddoo kowd tapoy tadda woy nokodoralig don kos koniyun kodpomakoy taddot bonnaan nonaw no notanggap dow ponayun a nod posampot koniyu mokaatag tadda
u atag koddi moppiya en no id posampot ku ini koniyu laggun to nouyag a pa
yyos nokosaddoo a no konna ad od kouhoy kaay to ampowt ingod su ini en kos id posaddoo koddi taddot od ongaggon ta no si isas rays
urisu od noonokkalan ku no ahad ponunggeleng wora ad kaay to ampowt ingod od kosompottan dow inaayun inis id nonaw ku koniyu
ddos id ponudtuu roy koniyu mokaatag taddot kotuusan ni isas rays nod ongaggon ta woy dos kodlivod din waa idda id bobbovallan no mgo itulon su matamata roy ron en moho tid kita taddot seaa to kotuusan din
yya su id duma koy en kandin diyot uhis no buvungan iddot id posivontuhan sikandin to onamon moy woy id pokita rin iddos seaa to kotuusan din
olinga roy ron en moho tid dinog taddot bawos to onamon otuus no id pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ni en kos anak ku no id dokollan ku to ginawa woy oraroy ku sikandin id kahaai
a idda en kos unayan no oggot peen kos kodsalig doy taddot id ikahi to mgo propeta
een ollog nod pominoggon dow iddos id ikahi ran oyyos nokoiling idda to suu no od pokomaawang diyot mosukirom
onayun kow nod pomakoy tadda taman tod loppow iddos bituon to sollom diyot od kaallow ron no iddos kohulugan idda en so allow to kodlivod ni isas rays no od pokomaawang to koniyun poomdom
urisu koilangan nod koovottan dow no waa en id poponudtuu to onama taddot mgo propeta riyot osulat no ahi rin no id pomon diyot kandan no koovottan
yya su iddos id poponudtuu kandan waa id pomon diyot kodpopoomdom to minuvu ko konna id pomon en diyot onama ukit to kodpotuntuu kandan to his no spiritu
a dangan duwon mandad mgo minuvu nid lommung to mgo toho srael no id pouvaguvag no mgo propeta sikandan
ngketen dad en mandad koungkayn timpu duwon od ponnonaw to konna bonnaa nod lommung duwot koniyu woy od oollos dan nod ponnonaw to uhus no od pokodoraat to koniyun kopomakoy
d elleyan dan si isas nod ongaggon ta no id patoy amoyd tobbus kandan
een tigkow od inguma kandan iddos silut to onama
ouraa mandad nod pompomakoy kos od ikuu taddot mgo molibmit no pinuungan taddon mgo minuvu
oy pomon tadda od kosumpalit don iddos bonnaan nonaw mokaatag tod ongaggon
ddon od ponnonaw to konna bonnaa bonnong to soopi deen od bovaavovaa ran to mgo osengan su amoy od pokoponoopi ran koniyu
aa saddoo ran no konnod tinuhon kos onama woy tapoy rin don id panoy iddos silut atag kandan woy od kosahapan dan en ini
yya su ahad iddos mgo ponolihan no nokosaa dangan waa en noerui iddos onama kandan ko konna id lumbag din da en sikandan diyot kinoroomman no bobbo
oy noprisu sikandan diyot lugaa no lampas no mosukirom taman tod inguma iddos allow to kodhukum
had iddos mgo minuvu dangan no waa allak to onama waa mandad sikandin noerui kandan su id popiyod din iddos dakkoon lanog kaay to ampowt ingod
yon din da id poleggua si oe woy dos pittun duma rin oyyos id nonaw man ni oe riyot mgo minuvu no koilangan no motallong kos pinuungan dan
a poomdomma row mandad iddos kodsilut to onama taddot mgo toho odoma woy mgo toho omora
d loow rin sikandan woy dos mgo bonuwa ran taman to naavu su amoy id posaddoo ko ondan kos od ingumannon to langun no waa allak to onama
iru si ot id polegguang din oyyos motallong sikandin woy orayn naaggow taddot molibmit no pinuungan to mgo minuvu rutun no od supak to suhu to onama
u iddot id ubpa pa si ot duma kandan inaayun od mosakit kos ginawa rin pomon to morat no pinuungan no od kokita woyd korinog din allowallow
a ukit taddot langun no notomanan od kosorollan ta no iddos onama od kotuig nod tavang to mgo minuvu no mopompomakoy otid inguma kandan kos kosupittan
oy od kotuig en mandad sikandin nod silut taddot mgo mosaasaa init od inguma no allow to kodhukum
abbi ron en nod silutan din iddos mgo minuvu no od ponayun to kodpuung to molibmit no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran woy dos dii od poiraom to kodponguu taddot duwon kotungud
nin mgo minuvu waa kodaangaang nod ponnonaw to konna bonnaa woy mgo motoggas kos uu
aa allak dan nod sumpalit taddot mgo motuus diyot datas to langit
yya su ahad iddos mgo ponolihan no lampas pa kos kotuusan taddon mgo minuvu konna man od pokoaku nod doddoraat to duma ran diyot isowwan to onama
iru iddon mgo minuvu od sumpoliton dan ahad iddos waa ran nosorolli
okoiling sikandan to mgo monnanap to puwaason no waa poddu no iyon od ingumannon od omotton woyd imotayan
a iling mandad tadda iyon od ingumannon taddon mgo minuvu idda en so kopotayan no waad tomanon
yya su iddos morat no pinuungan dan od livod en diyot kandan iling to minuvu nid tabpit oweg
yon dan id kahaai iddos od kodpuung to molibmit no ingowollon to lawa ran ahad dakkoon allow
raroy sikandan nod pokoilow koniyu woyd kosawoy kow su ahad diyot timpu nod lommung dan nod kaan duma koniyu od kahaa ran nod aakaa koniyu
tid pokokita ran to baay iyon dan od poomdommon iddos molibmit woy dii en sikandan od soro nod puung to saa
d okoy ran peen iddos mgo minuvu no moomet kos kopomakoy amoy od puung to saa woy mgo boomamon sikandan
nin mgo minuvu od kosahapan dan en kos langot to onama
d suwoy ran pomon diyot tullid no daan woy id ikuu ran iddos pinuungan taddot propeta no si alaam no anak ni eor
yyos si alaam iyon din id dokollan to ginawa iddos kodponoopi ukit to kodpuung to morat
iru id sugga sikandin to onama taddot saa rin ukit to asnu no id sokayan din
d pooseng to onama iddon asnu iling to minuvu deen notoholan iddos koongollan taddon propeta
a iddos mgo minuvu nod nonaw to konna bonnaa waa mgo koruanon dan oyyos nokoiling sikandan to sobsob no noottiyan
okoiling mandad sikandan to souhapun nod layap to kaamag no waad en ahad songotaddun uran
een id panoy ron tapoy to onama kandan iddos lugaa no lampas no mosukirom
d kotuig sikandan nod ooseng piru waa vos taaw tadda
a ukit to nonaw ran no konna morat iddos kodikuu to molibmit no ingowollon to lawa ini en kos oppan dan amoy od pokosahad iddos mgo minuvu no lammi pa id tanan pomon diyot mosaasaa no koubpa
d totandu sikandan no iddos minuvu nod ikuu to nonaw ran od pokopuung don to ahad ondan no id kopii rin
iru iyon bonnaa nouripon sikandan taddot mgo saa nod pokolibmit woy od pokodoraat kandan
yya su iddos minuvu nouripon taddot ahad ondan nod talu kandin
u iddos mgo minuvu no nokokilaa ron ki isas rays nod ongaggon woy ohodtobbus ta nokolegguang don sikandan pomon diyot molibmit no koubpa kaay to ampowt ingod
iru otid kopiyod mandon sikandan diyot kodpuung to saa woy od pouripon tadda lampas peen no mosuppit kos od kotomanan dan taddot unna
oppiya pa nanoy ko waa ran nosorolli iddos daan to kotoongngan kuntra to nopongnga ran nosorolli idda id inoyyuhan dan mandon iddos mgo suhu to onama no id ponudtuu ron diyot kandan
os id puungan dan id posivonnaa taddot oruwon osengan no mid ungketen to ddos tuyyang od kaan taddot id ilob din don woy os bavuy no id dihus don od loumbuk en mandon to basak
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod ikooruwa kud inin sulat koniyu
nin mgo sulat id noonokkalan ku tid posampot koniyu su amoy waa morat diyot poomdom dow
d kopii ku no id posampot koniyu iddos id ikahi dangan taddot mgo propeta to onama woy dos mgo suhu tod ongaggon no ohodtobbus ta no id posaddoo rin ukit to mgo apostoles nid nonaw koniyu
nnot langun koilangan nod koovottan dow no init morin mgo allow duwon od poninguma no mosuusumpalit no waa soroan nod puung to morat no ingowollon dan
d yangyang dan koniyu no od ponikahi to onna vo id totandu man si isas rays nod livod kaay to ampowt ingod
a ingkon don man sikandin
d poomatoy ron moho iddos kovuyyahan ta piru waa ron man sikandin
yyos pomon poron to kodbovaa to ingod taman koungkay waa man kopolinan
ngketen kos od osengon dan su od tongoddan dan tod lingow no pomon poron to tigkonayan id bovallan to onama kos langit woy livuta ukit to kandin no kahi
oy dos livuta id bovallan din ukit to oweg woy pomon diyot oweg
oy oweg dad en mandad kos id ipannas din dangan kaayt ingod to id polonoggan to din ini
a ukit mandad to idda ra en no kahi dos langit woy inis livuta nod kokita ta koungkay od loowon en diyot allow to kodhukum din to mgo minuvu no waa allak kandin woy od silutan dan langun taman to waad tomanon
iru id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo row kolingawi ini
iyot kodontong tod ongaggon dos sokkad no allow iling to sokkad no maan   no lahun woy dos sokkad no maan   no lahun iling da to sokkad no allow
uwon minuvu nod ikahi no od lewanglewang iddos onama to kodtuman taddot tandu rin mokaatag to kodlivod ni isas rays piru konna bonnaa idda
yya su mowwet kos posinsya rin nod aangat taddot mgo minuvu no od sondit woyd tanan to mgo saa ran oyyos dii sikandin od kopiyan no duwon ahad sokkad nod silutan to kopotayan no waad tomanon
d inguma en kos allow to kodlivod tod ongaggon iling to tigkow no kodinguma to tokawon
o iddon allow duwon monokkaan dohonoggon woy od kowora iddos langit
oy dos allow buwan woy mgo bituon od kotunow to apuy
d kaamin od kotutung inis ingod woy od kowora mandad iddos langun no nokotaaw kaay
a pomon tod kowora man kos langun kaayt ingod to ungketen no poukit koilangan no iddos koubpa row molinis diyot kodontong to onama woy od dumoruma kow kandin diyot tivuk no pusung dow
uungi row ini laggun tod aangat kow to allow taddot kodhukum to onama
okkaanokkaa kow puung to id kopii rin su amoy od kogoos iddos kodinguma rin
a iddon allow od loowon kos langit woy od kotunow kos langun no nokotaaw rutun pomon to komonitoy
iru siketa id aangat ki to kodtuman to onama taddot tandu rin no idda en so lammin langit woy lammin ingod
aanan motallong kos kodbovotasan to langun no id ubpa rutun
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod laggun tod aangat kow tadda noonokkali row no molinis kow no waa id pokosawoy riyot kodontong to onama woy amoy moppiya kos koroniyan dow kandin
oomdomma row no iddos unayan no mowwet kos posinsya tod ongaggon ta su id boggayan din peen to timpu kos mgo minuvu amoyd kotobbus
ngketen dad en mandad kos id nonaw to suwod ta no si ablo riyot mgo sulat din koniyu ukit to moraom no koovottan no id boggoy kandin to onama
oy ini en kos inaayun din od liilivoddon tod nonaw riyot langun no mgo sulat din
uwon en dumon osengan din no motoggas nod loblovotton deen iddos mgo minuvu no waa sinorollan to bonnaan nonaw woy dos mgo moomet diyot kopomakoy od bovaawan dan kos bonnaan kohulugan tadda
ngketen dad en mandad kos id puungan dan diyot dumon osulat no ahit onama
a pomon kaayt id puungan dan od silutan en sikandan to onama
iru sikiyu no id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod id posaddoo kud tapoy koniyu iddos mokaatag kaay
een bantoy kow no dii kow od kopiyod to konna bonnaan nonaw taddot mgo minuvu nod supak to mgo suhu to onama
yyadayyad kow no dii kow od suwoy taddot bonnaan nonaw woy dii kow mandad od takas taddot kovonnaan no id pomokayan dow
yon dow puungi no ukit to kopiyannoy ni isas rays nod ongaggon woy ohodtobbus ta od kotimulan peen kos koniyun koovottan mokaatag kandin
ikandin en kos ollog nod doongon ta koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a kaay ra en taman
d sulat ku ini amoy od ponudtuu koniyu mokaatag kandin no id ngoranan no ahi no od pokovoggoy to umuun waad tomanon
uwon don sikandin pomon poron to tigkonayan
a sikami no mgo tinodduwan norinog doy ron en sikandin matamata roy tid kita woy nosomaddan doy sikandin
d pokita sikandin kaay to ampowt ingod
oy pomon to nokita roy en sikandin id posivonnaa woy id ponudtuu roy koniyu iddos mokaatag kandin no id pomonnan to umuun waad tomanon
uma sikandin to onama pomon poron to tigkonayan woy id pokita sikandin konami
a inis nokita woy norinog doy id ponudtuu roy koniyu amoy od kosokkad kow konami riyot kodposokaddoy roy to onamon moy woy ki isas rays no nak din
d sulat doy ini su amoy duwon mooggot no kahaan ta
a iyon nonaw no norinog doy pomon diyot ki isas no id ponudtuu roy koniyu no iddos onama koowangan woy waa en mosukirom diyot kandin
een otid ikahi ki no nosokkad kid diyot onama piru riyon ki poron to mosukirom id ouhus ki oyya su iddos koubpa ta waa id ikuu to kovonnaan
iru otik od ubpa ki riyot koowangan iling to onama no riyot koowangan na duwon kodposokaddoy ta
oy dos longossa ni isas no nak din od awa to langun no saa ta deen od kolinisan kid
tid ikahi ki no waa en saa ta id uhusan ta kos keton kougolingun woy waa rinit keta iddos kovonnaan
iru ko bonnaavonnaa ki nod ponudtuu to keton mgo saa riyot onama od posinsyan din idda woy od linisan ki nikandin to langun no morat no pinuungan ta
yya su od kosolihan sikandin nod puung tadda woy ollog en kos langun nod puungan din
iru otid ikahi ki no waa ki nokosaa iling to id polinuhus ta iddos onama
a sikiyu no mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy id sulat ku ini koniyu amoy dii kow od puung to saa
iru ko duwon man nokopuung to saa duwon od lohinat atag keta riyot isowwan to onamon moy
ikandin si isas rays no otallong
ikandin don en kos buwis atag to keton mgo saa amoy dii ki od silutan woy konna ra atag keta ko konna atag en to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
a ukit to keton kodtuman to mgo suhu to onama od kosorollan ta en no oraroy ta sikandin nokilaa
ddos ahad ondoy nod ikahi no oraroy rin nokilaa kos onama piru waa rin tumana iddos kandin no mgo suhu na iddon minuvu bouhuson woy waa riyot kandin kos kovonnaan
iru iddos ahad ondoy nod tuman to mgo suhu to onama waa kulang to kodginawa rin diyot onama
oy ukit kaay od kosorollan ta en no nosokkad ki riyot kandin
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod ikahi no nosokkad sikandin diyon to onama koilangan no iddos kodbovotasan din od pokoiling to kodbovotasan ni isas rays
d ginowannan ku no mgo suwod inis id sulat ku koniyu konna lammin suhu oyyos pomon poron to tigkonayan to kodpomakoy row ki isas norinog dowd man no koilangan od pohinowannoy ki
iru od kooseng ta rad mandad no lammi ini oyyos nokita tad inin kodginawa riyot ki isas rays woy riyon mandad to koniyu
yya su od kowora ron iddos mosukirom woy ukit taddot motallong no pinuungan dow iling to id seaa ron kos mooggot no koowangan
a iddos od ikahi no riyon don sikandin to koowangan piru duwon poron id totaaw rin no morat no ginawa riyot suwod din to kopomakoy iddon minuvu diyon poron to mosukirom
u iddos id ginawa to suwod din to kopomakoy diyon sikandin to koowangan woy waa ahad ondan diyot kandin no unayan nod pokoporellos to duma
iru iddos duwon poron id totaaw no morat no ginawa riyot suwod din to kopomakoy diyon poron sikandin to mosukirom
oy waa sikandin nokosaddoo ko ingkon sikandin od isau su iddos mosukirom kos od pokovutud kandin
go anak ku riyot kopomakoy id sulat a koniyu oyyos id posinsyan don to onama kos koniyun mgo saa ukit ki isas rays
oy sikiyu no buyyag don diyot kopomakoy id sulat a koniyu su nokilaa rowd oraroy si isas rays no duwon don pomon poron to tigkonayan
ikiyu mandad no mgo sudduwan id sulat a koniyu oyyos id talu rowd si oivuyan
go anak ku riyot kopomakoy id sulat a koniyu su nokilaa rowd oraroy iddos onamon moy ta
ikiyu no buyyag don diyot kopomakoy id sulat a koniyu oyyos nokilaa rowd sikandin no duwon don pomon poron to tigkonayan
oy sikiyu mandad no mgo sudduwan id sulat a koniyu su mosalig don kos koniyun kopomakoy oyyos nokopomuwa ron man iddos kahit onama riyot pusung dow woy id talu rowd si oivuyan
o row dokolli to ginawa inis ingod woy dos ahad ondan kaay to ampowt ingod no od supak to onama
u iddos ahad ondoy no id ginawa tadda waa riyot kandin iddos ginawa to onamon moy
yya su iddos langun no morat kaay to ampowt ingod iling to morat no ingowollon to lawa dos id koimait mata dos kodpobporoong to korotuwan woy pinuungan ini langun waa id pomon diyot onamon moy ko konna id pomon kaay to ampowt ingod
nis ingod woy dos langun no morat no ingowollon to minuvu od lihad da
iru iddos minuvu nod tuman taddot id kopiit onama duwon umuun waad tomanon
go anak ku riyot kopomakoy asow ron kos kotompusan to ingod
oponudtulan kowd no init od inguma pa no timpu od loppow iddos od supak ki isas rays
iru ahad koungkay mouraa ron kos id ponloppow nod supak kandin
kit kaay od kosorollan ta no asow ron kos kotompusan to ingod
ddon mgo minuvu nod supak ki isas rays id lonug pa keta riyot unna
iru konna ta sikandan mooggot no duma riyot kopomakoy oyyos id pitas man sikandan keta
u otik mooggot pa no duma ta sikandan to kopomakoy id ponayun dan nanoy nid duma keta
a iddos kodpitas dan id posivonnaa no konna en sikandan mooggot no duma ta
iru sikiyu novoggayan kowd ni isas rays to his no spiritu
een nosorollan dow langun iddos bonnaan nonaw
yon unayan no id sulat a koniyu konna pomon to waa kow pa nokosaddoo taddot bonnaan nonaw ko konna pomon to nokosaddoo kowd tadda woy nosorollan dow mandad no waa en uhus no id pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw
a ondoy man kos bouhuson
dda en so minuvu nod ikahi no konna bonnaa no si isas kos esiyas
ddos minuvu nod oseng to ungketen id supak ki isas rays su id elleyan din man iddos onamon moy woy dos nak din
os minuvu nod elle no si isas rays kos nak to onama waa sikandin nosokkad diyot onama
iru iddos od ponudtuu no si isas rays kos nak to onama nosokkad en sikandin diyot onama
een ponayun kow pomakoy taddot kahit onama no norinog dow pomon poron to kodtigkanoy to koniyun kopomakoy
tid puungan dow ini na ponayun kow no nosokkad diyot nak to onama woy riyot moy rin
yyos iyon id tandu ni isas rays idda en so umuun waad tomanon
d sulat ku ini koniyu mokaatag taddot mgo minuvu no od kopiyan nod podsuwoy koniyu pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw
iru sikiyu konnad koilangan no duwon pa osson minuvu nod nonaw koniyu oyya su iddos his no spiritu no notanggap dow pomon ki isas rays id ubpa riyot koniyu woy sikandin kos id nonaw koniyu to langun
onnaa en kos id nonaw rin konna uhus
een dumoruma kow taddot langun no id nonaw rin koniyu amoy ponayun kow nod kosokkad diyot ki isas rays
a koungkay mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy ponayun kow to kodsokkad diyot ki isas rays su otid livod don sikandin kaay to ampowt ingod dii ki od kaaangaang woy duwon kodsalig ta nod isau kandin
osorollan tad no motallong si isas rays deen iddos ahad ondoy nod puung to motallong od kokilaa no anak en sikandin to onama
a od poomdommon ta iddos lampas no kodginawa to onamon moy keta oyyos pomon tadda id ngoranan kid no mgo anak din woy bonnaa en ini
iru iddos diid pomakoy waa ran kilaanna iddos onamon moy ta deen dii ki nikandan od kilaannon no mgo anak din
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod diyot kopomakoy mgo anak kid koungkay to onama piru waa ta pa nosorolli kos kopolinan to keton kominuvuwan init morin allow
yon ta ra nosorollan no init kodlivod ni isas rays od pokoiling kid kandin oyyos od kokita tad ko ondoy en sikandin
urisu iddos ipat sokkad no duwon kaayn koimmanan diyot ki isas rays inaayun molinis kos pusung din ukit to kodtanan to saa amoyd pokoiling sikandin ki isas rays no waa en saa
a iddos ahad ondoy nod puung to saa id supak din kos suhu to onama oyya su iddos saa idda en so kodsupak to onama
iru nokosaddoo kow no mid undini si isas rays to ampowt ingod amoy od awa to keton mgo saa woy waa en saa rin
een iddos nosokkad diyot ki isas rays dii od ponayun nod puung to saa
u iddos id ponayun nod puung tadda waa poron nokaabbot mokaatag ki isas woy waa nokosaddoo ko ondoy sikandin
a mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy yo kowd paakaa taddot ahad ondoy nod posuwoy koniyu pomon diyot bonnaan nonaw
os id puung to moppiya motallong en sikandin iling ki isas rays no motallong
iru iddos od ponayun nod puung to saa sakup sikandin ni oivuyan oyyos si oivuyan ponayun nod puung to saa pomon poron to tigkonayan taman koungkay
yon unayan no mid undini iddos nak to onama su amoy od gobban din iddos pinuungan ni oivuyan
aa minuvu no anak don to onama no od ponayun nod puung to saa oyyos diyon don man to kandin iddos botasanon to moy rin
een dii ron sikandin od ponayun nod puung to saa su anak don man sikandin to onama
a ukit kaay od kokilaa ta ko ondoy kos mgo anak to onama woy ko ondoy kos mgo anak ni oivuyan
yya su iddos ahad ondoy no diid puung to motallong woy waa ginawa riyot duma konna en sikandin anak to onama
a iddos nonaw no norinog dow pomon poron to tigkonayan to kodpomakoy row ki isas rays idda en so koilangan nod pohinowannoy ki
onna ki od iling ki ain su sakup sikandin ni oivuyan woy id imotayan din kos ari rin
a mambo man to id imotayan din idda
yya su morat kos pinuungan ni ain woy motallong kos pinuungan to ari rin
go suwod yo kowd kosoobbui otik od totaaw koniyu to morat no ginawa iddos mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa onama
iru siketa nosorollan ta no iling to id polegguang kid pomon diyot kopotayan poundiyon to lammin umuu oyyos id ginowannan ta man iddos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
iru iddos minuvu no waa kodginawa timbang id patoy poron sikandin
os minuvu no id totaaw poron to morat no ginawa riyot suwod din to kopomakoy nokoiling sikandin to mongimatoy woy nosorollan dow no waa mongimatoy nod pokotanggap to umuun waad tomanon
a ukit to kodboggoy ni isas rays to kandin no umuu atag keta nosorollan ta ko ondan kos bonnaan ginawa
een siketa mandad koilangan no nopanoy ki nod boggoy to keton umuu atag to mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy
os ahad ondoy no duwon od koongayan woy nokita rin iddos suwod din to kopomakoy nod kohirapan piru waa rin tovangi na inin minuvu waa en ginawa rin to onama
go anak ku riyot kopomakoy koilangan no konna ra taman to bivig kos keton kodpohinowannoy ko konna id pokita ta ini ukit to keton pinuungan posivonnaa no mooggot en kos kodginawa ta
a ukit kaay od kosorollan ta no id ikuu ki taddot bonnaan nonaw deen maawang kos songnga ta otid porani ki riyon to onama
had duwon timpu nod kopoomdom ta no nokosaa ki od maawang kos songnga ta su iddos onama lampas pa to keton poomdom oyyos nosorollan din kos langun mokaatag keta
urisu id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod otik id lonna kos ginawa ta pomon to nosorollan ta no waa ki nokosaa worad allak ta nod porani to onama
oy od kotanggap ta iddos ahad ondan nod buyuwon ta riyot kandin oyya su id tuman ta iddos kandin no mgo suhu woy id puungan ta man iddos id kahaai rin
a iyon id suhu rin keta koilangan nod pomakoy woyd salig ki taddot nak din no si isas rays woy od pohinowannoy ki iling taddot id suhu rin keta
ddos od tuman to mgo suhu to onama nosokkad sikandan diyot kandin woy dos onama riyon to kandan
osorollan ta no ponayun id ubpa kos onama rinit keta pomon taddot his no spiritu no id boggoy rin keta
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod diyot kopomakoy yo kow goos od pomakoy taddot ahad ondoy nod ikahi no id dumannan sikandan to spiritu to onama
nnaa row pa oonongnga ko bonnaa en no id pomon to onama iddos nonaw rin
yyos mouraa ron koungkay kos od pouvaguvag no propeta no id soob to intirut ingod nid ponnonaw to uhus
yon poukit nod kosorollan dow no bonnaa no id dumannan to spiritu to onama iddon minuvu otik id pongimbonnaa sikandin no si isas rays nominuvu
tik idda en kos id nonaw rin od kosorollan dow no iddon nonaw id pomon en to onama
iru iddos ahad ondoy no diid pongimbonnaa no nominuvu si isas rays waa id pomon to onama ko konna id pomon taddot od supak ki isas rays
orinog dowd nod loppow idda woy ahad koungkay dini ron idda to ampowt ingod
iru sikiyu no mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy id pomon kow to onama woy id talu rowd iddos od pouvaguvag no mgo propeta
yya su iddos onama no id ubpa koniyu lampas pa kos kotuusan din ki oivuyan no ponguu to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa onama
os od pouvaguvag no mgo propeta iyon dan od ikulon iddos botasanon to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa onama
urisu iyon dan id nonaw idda ra en so kaay to ampowt ingod woy od pominoggon sikandan to mgo minuvu no waa onama
iru siketa id pomon to onama
een iddos od pominog to nonaw ta nokokilaa to onama
iru iddos waa id pomon to onama dii en od pominog keta
urisu ukit kaay od kosorollan ta ko iddon nonaw id pomon to spiritu to onama no id pomonnan to kovonnaan o id pomon ki oivuyan no id pomonnan to uhus
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod koilangan nod pohinowannoy ki oyyos onama man kos id pomonnan to ginawa
os ahad ondoy no duwon kodginawa riyot duma mgo anak don sikandan to onama woy oraroy ran no nokilaa sikandin
ddos ahad ondoy no waa kodginawa riyot duma waa sikandan nokokilaa to onama su iddos onama mohingginawa man
d pokita to onama iddos kodginawa rin keta ukit to kodpopiyod din taddot soosokkad no nak din kaay to ampowt ingod amoy od pokotanggap ki to umuun waad tomanon ukit kandin
a iyon bonnaan kodginawa konna no siketa kos id ginawa to onama ko konna sikandin kos id ginawa keta
yya su id popiyod din iddos kandin no nak no id buwis atag to keton mgo saa amoy dii ki od silutan
een id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod otik iling tadda kos kodginawa to onama keta koilangan en mandad nod pohinowannoy ki
aa poron minuvu no nokokita to onama piru otid pohinowannoy ki nosokkad ki riyot onama woy waa en kulang to kodginawa rin keta
yon poukit no nosorollan ta no nosokkad ki riyon to onama woy sikandin mandad dinit keta otik id boggoy rin keta iddos kandin no spiritu
onna ra idda su nokita roy en woy od pokoposivonnaa koy no id popiyod to onamon moy iddos kandin no nak amoy od tobbus to langun no minuvu
ddos ahad ondoy nod pongimbonnaa no si isas rays nak to onama nosokkad en sikandin diyot onama woy dos onama diyon mandad to kandin
urisu nosorollan ta woy id salig ki no id ginowannan ki to onama
os onama mohingginawa
een iddos ahad ondoy nod ponayun to kodginawa to onama woy riyot duma nosokkad don sikandin diyot onama woy dos onama diyon mandad to kandin
kit kaay od kotimulan kos keton kodginawa taman to worad kulang su amoy waa allak ta riyot allow to kodhukum
yya su laggun tod oubpa ki pa kaay to ampowt ingod dos kodbovotasan ta od pokoiling to kodbovotasan ni isas rays
os ahad ondoy no waa kulang to kodginawa riyot onama dii ron koilangan nod kovaakkan
u iyon id kovaakki to minuvu iddos kodsilut to onama
urisu iddos od kovaakkan poron kulang poron kos kodginawa rin to onama
iru siketa id ginawa ki to onama oyyos onama man kos unna nid ginawa keta
tik duwon od ikahi no id ginowannan din kos onama piru id totaaw poron to morat no ginawa riyot suwod din to kopomakoy bouhuson sikandin
u otik konna od kokita kos ginawa rin diyot duma iyon pobbo riyon to onama no dii rin od kokita
yon suhu ni isas rays keta no iddos id ginawa to onama koilangan nod ginowannan din mandad kos suwod din to kopomakoy
a iddos ahad ondoy nid pomakoy no si isas rays kos esiyas anak don sikandin to onama
oy dos id ginawa to onamon moy id ginawa mandad diyot kandin no mgo anak
oy iyon poukit nod kosorollan ta no id ginowannan ta en kos duma ta no mgo anak to onama otid ginowannan ta iddos onama woy od puungan ta iddos mgo suhu rin
u iddos mooggot no kodginawa ta riyot onama od kokita ukit to kodtuman to mgo suhu rin
oy dos mgo suhu rin konna mohirap nod tumanon
yyos siketa no mgo anak don to onama od ponalu ki to kodatu to mgo morat kaay to ampowt ingod
oy dos poukit kaayn koponoluwan idda en so kopomakoy ta
ndoy man kos od pokoponalu to kodatu to mgo morat kaay to ampowt ingod
ora ossa ko konna idda ra en so mid pomakoy no si isas rays nak to onama
i isas rays no mid undini to ingod id posivonnalan no sikandin en kos nak to onama ukit to oweg diyot kodboutismu kandin woy dos longossa rin nid tihis diyon to krus
onna ra ukit to oweg ko konna ukit to oweg woy longossa
yon peen od pokoposivonnaa tadda idda en so his no spiritu woy bonnaa en kos langun nod osengon din
een otollu kos id posivonnaa mokaatag ki isas rays
nna iddos his no spiritu ikooruwa dos oweg diyot kodboutismu kandin woy ikootollu dos longossa rin nid tihis diyon to krus
a nokodsokkad kos kodposivonnaa kaayt otollu no si isas rays nak en to onama
tid tonggapon ta kos kodposivonnaa to minuvu lampas peen nod tonggapon ta iddos kodposivonnaa to onama
yya su id posivonnaa sikandin no si isas rays nak din
een iddos langun nod pomakoy to nak to onama nosorollan dan no riyot kandan no pusung bonnaa en idda
iru iddos diid pomakoy tadda id polinuhus dan kos onama oyyos waa sikandan id pomakoy to kodposivonnaa to onama mokaatag taddot nak din
yon id posivonnaa to onama no id boggayan ki nikandin to umuun waad tomanon woy inin umuu diyon en to nak din
een iddos nosokkad diyot nak to onama diyon mandad to kandin iddos umuun waad tomanon
iru iddos waa nosokkad diyot nak to onama waa riyot kandin iddon umuu
a sikiyu nid pomakoy woy id salig to nak to onama iyon unayan no id sulat ku koniyu ini langun su amoy od kosorollan dow no duwon en umuu row no waad tomanon
oy iyon unayan no duwon kodsalig ta nod porani to onama oyyos od pominoggon din en iddos ahad ondan nod buyuwon ta no od ikuu tid kopii rin
a otik nosorollan ta nod pominoggon ki nikandin ahad ondan kos od buyuwon ta nosorollan ta mandad no od kotanggap ta en idda
tik duwon nokita ta no suwod ta riyot kopomakoy no nokopuung to saa no diid undag to kopotayan no waad tomanon koilangan nod dosalan ta sikandin
oy dos onama od boggoy kandin to umuun waad tomanon
uwon en saa nod undag to kopotayan no waad tomanon piru dii a od ikahi no od dosalan ta pa idda
ddos langun no morat no pinuungan saa en
iru konna langun to saa od undag to kopotayan no waad tomanon
okosaddoo ki no iddos anak don to onama dii ron od ponayun nod puung to saa su iddos soosokkad no nak to onama od tamong kandin
een dii sikandin od komonnu ni oivuyan
okosaddoo ki no siketa id pomon to onama woy dos mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa onama noiraom poron sikandan to kotuusan ni oivuyan
okosaddoo ki mandad no mid undini kos nak to onama kaay to ampowt ingod woy id pokesan din kos poomdom ta amoyd kokilaa ta iddos bonnaan onama
oungkay nosokkad kid diyot kandin oyyos nosokkad ki man diyot nak din no si isas rays
ikandin en kos bonnaan onama woy id pomonnan to umuun waad tomanon
go anak ku riyot kopomakoy poriyu kow to konna bonnaan mgo monama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak no sokkad taddot od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy mid sulat a kikow boi no id aam to onama woy atag mandad to mgo anak du
d dokollan ku sikiyu to ginawa woy konna ra siyak ko konna ahad iddos langun no nokaabbot to bonnaan nonaw
d ginowannan doy sikiyu pomon to iddos bonnaan nonaw nokopomuwa riyot pusung ta woy od ponayun idda taman to waad tomanon
tid ikuu ki to bonnaan nonaw woyd pohinowannoy ki od pokoriyon to keta iddos tavang eru woy kosunayan no id pomon diyot onamon moy woy ki isas rays no nak din
akkoo kos kahaan ku to norinog ku no iddos dumon mgo anak du id dumoruma to bonnaan nonaw oyyos ungketen meen kos suhu keta to onamon moy
a oi od buyuwon ku kikow no od pohinowannoy ki langun
onna ini lammin suhu su nosorollan tad man ini pomon poron tid pomakoy ki
os ginawa idda en so kodtuman to mgo suhu to onama
oy id suhu ki nikandin nod pohinowannoy oyyos ini en kos norinog ta pomon poron to tigkonayan to keton kodpomakoy
d posampot ku ini koniyu su mouraa ron koungkay iddos od ponnonaw to konna bonnaa
d soob sikandan kaay to intirut ingod woy od nonaw no si isas rays waa kun naanak to minuvu
go bouhuson sikandan woy id supak kandin
urisu ayyadayyad kow amoy diid konuhunan iddos langun no id oiluggatan dow su otik od puungan dow ini od kotanggap dow iddos langun nid panoy to onama atag koniyu
ddos ahad ondoy no diid ponayun nod ikuu to nonaw ni isas rays woy od timulan din baling idda waa sikandin nosokkad diyon to onama
iru iddos ponayun nod ikuu taddon nonaw nosokkad don sikandin diyot onamon moy woy riyon to nak din
een otik duwon od unduwot koniyu no ossa kos nonaw rin yo row sikandin tonggapa riyot ubpan dow woy yo kow mandad od pongumusta kandin
yya su iddos ahad ondoy nod pongumusta kandin nokoiling tid lonug sikandin to morat no pinuungan taddon minuvu
ouraa pa nanoy kos od osengon ku koniyu piru dii kud id poukit to sulat oyyos id pomuhawang a nod lowwi koniyu amoy od pokodunoy ki nod poponudtuloy woy od koponnu ki to kahaan
a id pongumusta koniyu iddos mgo anak to suwod du rini no id aam mandad to onama
a kaay ra en taman
iyak no sokkad taddot od pombuyyahon tod pompomakoy id sulat a kikow ayo no id dokollan ku en to ginawa
d ginowannan ku no suwod od dasaa a no inaayun moppiya kos koubpa ru woy moppiya mandad kos kikown kodlolaawa iling to mosalig no kopomakoy ru
akkoo kos kahaan ku to mid inguma rini iddos mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy woy id ponudtuu ran koddi no bonnaavonnaa ka nid ikuu to bonnaan nonaw su idda en kos nooyami ru nod puungan
orad ossa nod pokovoggoy koddi to dakkoon kahaan idda en so od korinog ku no iddos mgo anak ku riyot kopomakoy ponayun nid ikuu to bonnaan nonaw
d ginowannan ku no suwod oraroy ka no mooggod nod tuhanuu to mgo duma ta nod pompomakoy no id owwot duwon to koniyu ahad idda ru peen sikandan nokilaa
d ponudtulan dan kos od lolivuung nod pompomakoy rini mokaatag to ginawa no id pokita ru kandan
a otid livod sikandan duwot koniyu moppiya nod tovangan du mandon sikandan diyot poukit no od pokopahaa to onama su amoy od pokoponayun sikandan to iponawon dan
oy idda en kos od pokopahaa to onama
u iyon dontulon to iponawon dan idda en so kodponudtuu mokaatag ki isas rays woy waa en sikandan id buyu to tavang diyon to diid pompomakoy
een siketa ollog en nod tavang ki kandan amoy od pokolonug ki mandad to pinuungan dan to kodponudtuu to bonnaan nonaw
d sulat a dangan mokaatag kaay riyot id lolivuung nod pompomakoy ruwon piru si iotrefes no od kopiyan nod ponguu kandan waa rin loompiya iddos id ikahi ku riyot sulat
urisu otid unduwon a id posaddoo ku riyot langun iddos morat no mgo osengan din no id soupot din mokaatag konami
onna ra idda to kodinguma to mgo suwod ta riyot kopomakoy waa rin en sikandan tonggapa woy id boovahan din peen iddos duma no od kopiyan nod tanggap kandan
oy dos id tanggap kandan id paawa rin diyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy
d ginowannan ku no suwod yo kod ikuu to morat no pinuungan ko konna dos moppiya su iddos od puung to moppiya anak sikandin to onama
iru iddos od puung to morat waa id kilaa to onama
a mokaatag ki emetrio id posivonnaa kos langun no moppiya sikandin no minuvu woy od kokita ta riyot kandin no koubpa no id ikuu en sikandin to bonnaan nonaw
had sikami od pokoikahi no moppiya en sikandin no minuvu woy nosorollan du no bonnaa inis id oseng doy kikow
ouraa pa nanoy kos od osengon ku kikow piru dii kud id poukit to sulat
yyos duwon puhawang ku nod unduwon to kikow to diid kouhoy amoy od pokodunoy ki nod poponudtuloy
uopa no iddos onama od boggoy kikow to kosunayan nod pomaawang to ginawa row
d pongumusta kikow kos mgo oukuy ta rini
oy pouma ru mandad kos koddin kodpongumusta riyon to ipat sokkad no suwod ta to kopomakoy ruwon
a kaay ra en taman
iyak si udas no uripon ni isas rays woy suwod a mandad ni antiago
d sulat ku ini atag koniyu no id aam to onamon moy
d dokollan kow nikandin to ginawa woy od tomongngan kow nikandin taman to kodlivod ni isas rays
uopa no id busbus to onama riyot koniyu iddos eru kodginawa woy kosunayan no id pomon diyot kandin
a id ginowannan ku no mgo suwod id kopii ku en nanoy nod sulat koniyu mokaatag to kodtobbus to onama keta
iru iyon nopoomdom ku no koilangan en nod pomonduwan ku sikiyu no od noonokkalan dow tod lohinat kos koniyun kopomakoy no id boggoy to onama riyot mgo minuvu rin su amoy dii idda od kovovaawan
d oseng ku ini oyyos duwon mgo minuvu no id lommung duwot koniyu no waa row nosorolli no duwon bos nokoollos no dontulon dan
aa allak dan to onama woy id kopii ran nod bovaawan iddos bonnaan kohulugan mokaatag to kopiyannoy woy eru rin amoy od kopuungan dan iddos ahad ondan no morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran
yyos mid ikahi ran peen no konna od silut kos onama su eeruwon kun sikandin
aa ran mandad id pomakoy no si isas rays da en kos od ongaggon ta woy onama no id pongomunoy keta
urisu nosulat don tapoy no od silutan en iddon mgo minuvu
een ahad nokosaddoo kowd kaay langun id kopii ku nid posampot koniyu no od silutan en to onama iddos mgo mosaasaa
yya su iddos mgo minuvu to onama no nouripon dangan diyot hipto ahad id polegguang din sikandan piru riyot mori id silutan din dad en iddos waa mid pomakoy deen id poomatoy ran
ompotta row mandad iddos mgo ponolihan dangan no id podtohon dan kos kotungud nid boggoy kandan to onama woy id tonanan dan peen iddos id poubpan kandan to onama
een id povaku rin sikandan to kodina no diid kovudtus woy id poprisu riyot lugaa no lampas no mosukirom taman tod inguma iddos mokaaratarat no allow to kodhukum
ompotta row mandad iddos mgo toho odoma woy mgo toho omora ahad iddos mgo ingod no morani tadda
okosaa mandad sikandan iling taddon mgo ponolihan oyyos od ponlaayuk sikandan to konna ran sawa ahad taddot konna ollog nod loyukan
een id silutan sikandan to onama ukit to apuy no diid koovukkan amoy id pokita to langun no iling en tadda kos od ingumannon to mgo mosaasaa
a iling en mandad tadda kos mgo minuvu nod ikohiyon ku no nokoommung duwot koniyu
yyos nopiyod sikandan taddot tohenoppon dan nod inuruk kandan diyot kodpuung to molibmit no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran
dda en kos unayan no dii ran od poiraom to kodponguu tod ongaggon woy od sumpoliton dan iddos motuus no mgo binovallan diyot datas to langit
oomdomma row no ahad iddos ponguu to mgo ponolihan no si iguel waa man nokoaku nid puung to iling tadda
u iddot id apuu si oivuyan kandin ko ondoy kos duwon kotungud nod angoy taddot bangkoy ni oises waa sikandin id oseng to morat no od sumpalit ki oivuyan
yon din da id ikahi no onama ron kos od kotuig nod silut kikow
iru iddos mgo minuvu no nokoommung duwot koniyu id sumpalit dan peen ahad iddos langun no dii ran od koovottan
okoiling sikandan to mgo monnanap no waa poddu oyyos iyon dan da en od ikulon iddos nooyami ran nod puungan no idda en kos od pokopiyod kandan diyot kororattan
okaaratarat kod kotomanan dan oyya su id ikuu ran iddos morat no pinuungan ni ain
d ikuu ran mandad iddos saa ni alaam su id posuwoy ran kos minuvu pomon diyot onama amoyd pokoponoopi ran
okoiling mandad sikandan ki ore no mid supak to onama purisu od silutan en sikandan iling ki ore
ddon mgo minuvu nokoiling to dita nod pokolibmit to molinis no umpak
yya su iddot timpu no id lonug dan koniyu to kodsampot to kopotayan ni isas ayasayas dan mid kaan woy id oinom no waa ron en od geddamon no ilow
onna ran od lolaampi to duma su atag da en to kandan no kopiyannan kos od ingowollon dan
aa en koruanon taddon mgo minuvu oyyos nokoiling sikandan to souhapun nod layap to kaamag no waad en ahad songotaddun uran
okoiling mandad sikandan to kayu no waa bunga ahad timpu ron nanoy to kodbovunga
d patoy idda woy noluwaa peen
okoiling sikandan to baud nod piyod to molibmit no buwak diyot ibpit to dahat oyya su iddos mokoilowilown pinuungan dan orayd kokita iling taddot buwak
okoiling mandad sikandan to mgo bituon no nokosuwoy riyot od boovoyan dan
een id panoy ron tapoy to onama kandan iddos lugaa no lampas no mosukirom woy riyon en sikandan taman to waad tomanon
a poomdomma row mandad si noc no ikopittun koubbaran to langun no minuvu pomon ki dan
apoy ron sikandin id poponudtuu to onama mokaatag taddon mgo minuvu
ahi rin to omotawi row
d undini kos od ongaggon duma to maanmaan no ponolihan din woy od hukum sikandin to langun
d silutan din en kos langun no waa allak to onama pomon to morat no pinuungan dan woy morat no mgo osengan to kodsupak kandin
a iddos mgo minuvu no nokoommung diyot koniyu orayd pommivig woy orayd nangkap to soyup to duma
yon dan od ikulon iddos morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa ran
yon dakkoo kos kodpobporoong dan to kandan no kougolingun woy od kotuigtuig dan nod gamit to motoos no mgo osengan amoy uvag kun tod doong woy ukit tadda od kaangoy ran iddos id kopii ran
iru sikiyu nid ginowannan ku no mgo suwod yo kowd kolingow taddot id posaddoo tapoy koniyu to mgo apostoles tod ongaggon ta no si isas rays
id ikahi sikandan no nit morin timpu duwon od ponloppow no mosuusumpalit no mgo minuvu no od ikuu to morat no mgo ingowollon to lawa
a iddos mgo minuvu no nokoommung diyot koniyu od nangkap dan to poukit nod korattan kos kodposokaddoy row nod pompomakoy
ouripon sikandan taddot nooyami ran no mgo ingowollon to lawa oyyos waa en diyot kandan iddos his no spiritu
iru sikiyu nid ginowannan ku no mgo suwod potovangoy kow woy poinniyatoy kow amoyd mosalig kos koniyun kopomakoy riyon to onama
oy dasaa kow ukit to kotuusan to his no spiritu
onayun kow ubpa riyot kodginawa to onama laggun tod aangat kow no od kotanggap dow iddos umuun waad tomanon pomon to eru tod ongaggon no si isas rays
oerui row mandad iddos od ponduworuwa amoyd mosalig kos kopomakoy ran
ovangi row iddos duma amoyd pokoleggua sikandan to kodsilut to onama pomon diyon to linowt apuy iling to kodsaak dow to minuvu nod pokosubbuk don diyot apuy
oerui row mandad ahad iddos duma no id loumbuk don to kolibmitoy to saa piru bantoy kow no dii kow od kopoletan taddot molibmit no pinuungan dan
oerui row sikandan piru kolingasai row iddos morat no pinuungan dan
a od doongon ta kos onama no sikandin en kos od tavang koniyu amoy dii kow od kopiyod diyot kodpuung to saa
d piyoddon kow nikandin diyot isowwan din no waa id pokosawoy koniyu
oy od kahaa kow en oraroy otid kokita rowd iddos seaa to kotuusan din
d doongon iddos onama no ohodtobbus ta ukit ki isas rays nod ongaggon ta
llog en no riyot kandin iddos langun no bantug woy kotuusan
ampas kos kandin no kotungud woy ponguu sikandin to langun pomon poron to tigkonayan koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
a kaay ra en taman
okosulat kaayn libru iddos id pokita to onama ki isas rays amoy id posaddoo rin mandad diyon tod pompomakoy iddos od inguma pon od kotomanan to diid kouhoy
oy id pokita ni isas rays ini ukit to ponolihan no id suhu rin dinit koddi no uripon din no si uan
d sulat ku kaay iddos langun no nokita ku mokaatag taddot ponudtulon to onama no id posivonnalan ni isas rays
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu no od basa kaayt id poponudtuu to onama riyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy
oppiya mandad kod kotomanan taddot od pominog woy taddot od tuman to langun no nokosulat kaay oyya su diid kouhoy od inguma en inin kotomanan
iyak si uan kos id popiyod kaayn sulat atag to pittun id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no id ponubpa riyot mgo bonuwa no sakup to sia
uopa no iddos onama dos spiritu woy si isas rays od pokita koniyu to eru woy kosunayan
os onama duwon don tapoy to waa pa iddos tigkonayan to ingod ahad koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
a mokaatag taddot spiritu diyon sikandin to isowwan to trunu to onama
i isas rays kos od kosolihan no tohodposivonnaa to kahit onama
ikandin kos unnon novadnow woy od hari to langun no ponguu kaay to ampowt ingod
d ginowannan ki nikandin woy id polegguang to kodsilut atag to keton mgo saa ukit to longossa rin
d polonug ki nikandin to kodhari rin amoyd ponguu duma kandin woy id bovallan ki no mgo tohodbuwis no od puung atag to onama no moy rin woy onama rin mandad
een muopa nod posivontuhon si isas rays woy od hari sikandin to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
omotawi row
d livod si isas rays duma to souhapun woy od pokokita kandin kos langun ahad iddos id pakpak kandin diyon to krus
oy mopet kos sinoggawon to langun no tribu kaay to ampowt ingod pomon to allak dan
yya od kotuman en ini
os onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun mid ikahi to iyak kos lpa woy mega no iddos kohulugan dos tigkonayan woy dos kotompusan
uwon ad to waa pa iddos tigkonayan to ingod ahad koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
iyak si uan no suwod dow to kopomakoy no duma row riyon to kodharit onama woy riyot kodtiis to mgo kodposuppit
u id pohos a tid piyod diyot isla to atmos pomon to kodponudtuu ku to kahit onama woy pomon to kodposivonnaa ku mokaatag ki isas
okkad no allow to allown inggu timpu to kodsimba riyon tod ongaggon noiroomman a to kotuusan to spiritu to onama
a riyot inoyyuhan ku norinog ku no duwon morahing no bawos iling to trumpeta no mid ungketen to ulat du kos langun nod kokita ru woy popiyod du riyon to pittun id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no riyot mgo bonuwa to feso mirna ergamo iatira ardis iladelfia woy riyot aodicea
o norinog ku idda mid loingoy a amoyd kokita ku iddos id ooseng koddi
a iyon ku nokita iddos pittun tootawwan to suu no buawan no id poohinat
iyot tongannan tadda duwon id lohinat no immat minuvu no mowwet kos umpak taman to paa rin woy riyot kabpa rin duwon ollon no buawan
os bowvuut uu rin moputiputi woy dos mata rin iling to loglog to apuy
ddos paa rin od sellow iling to brunsi no id tunow to apuy woy id posellow
os bawos din golid gohonugguu iling to dakkoon tousuvan
a riyot kowanan no bollad din duwon pittun molison no bituon no id somaddan din
oy riyot bivig din duwon id leggua no polihuma no oruwa kos taom
os bonnong din od pokoselang iling to allow timpu to mokountud
o nokita ku sikandin nopiloy a riyon lomig to paa rin no immat id patoy ad
iru id somaddan a nikandin to kowanan no bollad din woy kahi rin to o kod kovaakki
iyak kos igkonayan woy dos otompusan
iyak kos maantoy
d patoy a piru ontongngiyu maantoy a taman to waad tomanon
oiraom to koddin kotungud iddos kopotayan woy dos ingod tid poomatoy no id ngoranan no ades
een sulat du kos langun no id pokita ku kikow dos od kotomanan koungkay woy ahad init morin allow
a id ponudtuu ku kikow kos kohulugan taddot waa id posaddoo dangan mokaatag taddot pittun bituon no nokita ru kaayt kowanan no bollad ku woy dos pittun ilowan no buawan no id poohinat
os pittun bituon idda en kos pittun sinuhuwan to onama no od tamong taddot id lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot pittun bonuwa
oy dos pittun suu nid poohinat idda en kos pittun id lolivuung nod pompomakoy riyot pittun bonuwa
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to feso
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos id somad to pittun bituon kaayt kowanan no bollad ku woy siyak mandad kos id ipanow riyot tongannan to pittun suu no buawan no id poohinat
osorollan ku kos langun no pinuungan dow dos kodoiluggat woy kodtiis dow
osorollan ku mandad no waa row podtohona iddos id puung to kororattan
oy id intudinturan dow iddos id pouvaguvag no mgo apostoles deen nokita row no bouhuson sikandan
osorollan ku mandad no id tiis kow to kosupittan pomon to kopomakoy row koddi woy waa kow en noobbod
iru iyon id pokosawoy ku koniyu idda en so kodginawa row koddi koungkay no konnad iling taddot unna
een poomdomma row iddos dakkoon ginawa row koddi iddot unna
ondit kow woy tanan kowd to koniyun saa woy puungi row iddos moppiyon pinuungan dow dangan
u otik dii kow od sondit od unduwonnan ku sikiyu amoyd ongayon iddos suu no id poohinat pomon duwot koniyu
iru duwon pinuungan dow no nokopahaa koddi oyyos id kolingasai row iddos morat no pinuungan to mgo minuvu no id ikuu to mgo icolaita woy id kolingasai ku en mandad idda
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi od boggayan ku sikandin to kotungud nod kaan taddot bunga to kayu no od pokovoggoy to umuu woy iddon kayu id tuvu riyot motoos no ingod to onama
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to mirna
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos igkonayan woy dos otompusan to langun
d patoy ad piru maantoy a taman to waad tomanon
osorollan ku iddos kodposuppit koniyu woy mgo worowora kow piru iddos kovonnaan noratu kow riyot datas to langit
osorollan ku mandad iddos koddoddoraat koniyu taddot od ponikahi no sikandan mgo udio no sakup to onama piru konna su sakup sikandan ni oivuyan
o kowd kovaakki to ahad ondan no kodposuppit nod inguma koniyu
omotawi row
o diid kouhoy dos duma koniyu id poprisu ni oivuyan amoyd geddaman kos kopomakoy row koddi woy od posupittan kow nikandin daom to sopuun allow
een ponayun kow to koniyun kopomakoy ahad pa riyon to kopotayan su od boggayan ku sikiyu to ganti no idda en so umuun waad tomanon
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi konnad sikandin od silutan to ikooruwon kopotayan
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to ergamo
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos duwon polihuma no oruwok taom
osorollan ku no id oubpa kow riyot bonuwa no noiraom to kodponguu ni oivuyan
iru ahad iling tadda id dumoruma kow rad en koddi
aa kow id tanan to koniyun kopomakoy ahad diyot timpu no id imotayan si ntipas nod kosolihan no tohodposivonnaa koddi riyot lugaa row no id ingoddan ni oivuyan
iru iyon id pokosawoy ku koniyu idda en so duwon duma no id ikuu taddot id nonaw ni alaam ki alak
yya su id okoy rin iddos koubbaran ni srael nod puung to saa ukit to kodkaan dan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama woy ukit to kodlaayuk dan to konna ran sawa
a iling mandad tadda duwon duma koniyu no id ikuu to uhus no nonaw to mgo icolaita
een sondit kow woy tanan kowd to koniyun mgo saa su otik konna kow od sondit diid kouhoy od unduwon a to koniyu amoyd okedimatoy taddon mgo minuvu ukit to polihuma nod leggua kaayt bivig ku
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi od boggayan ku to kokaan no mana no id panoy ku atag kandin
d boggayan ku mandad sikandin to moputin batu no id sulatan to lammin ngaran woy waa ossa nod pokosaddoo tadda idda ra en so id boggayan
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to iatira
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos nak to onama no inis mgo mata ku iling tod loglog no apuy woy inis paa ku od sellow iling to brunsi no id tunow to apuy woy id posellow
osorollan ku kos langun no moppiyon pinuungan dow dos koniyun kodginawa dos koniyun kopomakoy dos kodtiis dow to mgo kodposuppit woy dos kodtavang dow to duma
osorollan ku mandad no iddos pinuungan dow koungkay lampas pa no moppiya taddot unna
iru iyon id pokosawoy ku koniyu idda en so kodpodtohon dow taddot molitan no si ezabel no id pouvaguvag no propeta
u ukit to kodnonaw rin id okoy rin iddos mgo minuvu ku amoy od laayuk to konna ran sawa woy od kaan dan taddot id buwis don diyot konna bonnaan mgo monama
d boggayan ku sikandin to timpu no od sondit woyd tanan taddot saa rin no idda en so kodlaayuk to konna rin sawa piru waa en sikandin id sondit
een od silutan ku sikandin to bohok amoy konnad od pokoonnowonnow woy od poumannan ku mandad to lampas no kodpooilasoy iddos langun nod laayuk kandin otik dii sikandan od sondit taddot mgo morat no nopuungan dan duma kandin
d imotayan ku mandad iddos id dumoruma ki ezabel amoy id kokita to langun no id lolivuung nod pompomakoy no siyak da en kos nokosaddoo to poomdom woy ginawa to mgo minuvu
d boggayan ku kos ipat sokkad taddot loppa to pinuungan dow
iru iddos duma koniyu no riyot iatira waa id ikuu taddot morat no nonaw no moraom kun no id pomon ki oivuyan
een konna kud od timulan iddos mgo suhu ku koniyu
yon ku ra id suhu no ponoyuna row en kos koddumoruma koddi taman to kodlivod ku
os od pokotalu to kororattan woy ponayun nod puung to koddin id kopii taman to kotompusan sikandin en kos od boggayan ku to kotungud nod ponguu to langun no ingod iling taddot kotungud no notanggap ku pomon to moy ku
ddos kodponguu ran mosalig iling to putow no tukod woy od kotalu ran iddos diid poiraom to kandan no kotungud woy od iponnason dan iddos od pongkuntra kandan iling to minuvu nod lubpot to kuron
d boggoy ku mandad kandan iddos bituon to sollom
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to ardis
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos id somad to pittun bituon woy kaayt koddi iddos spiritu to onama
osorollan ku iddos pinuungan dow woy ahad novantug no duwon umuu row piru iddos kovonnaan id patoy kowd diyot kodontong to onama
een gimata kowd woy ponokkala row kos moomet no kopomakoy row no asow ron od kowora oyyos nokita ku no iddos koniyun pinuungan konna pa ollog diyot kodontong to onama ku
a poomdomma row iddos nonaw no norinog woy notanggap dow woy tumana row idda
ondit kow woy tanan kowd kos koniyun mgo saa su otik konna kow od sondit od unduwon a to koniyu iling to tokawon nod loppow no dii kow od pokosaddoo
iru duwon poron duwot koniyu to ardis no waa novungiti kos umpak
een sikandan kos ollog nod duma koddi no od ponoumpak to moputi oyyos waa ran en novungiti to saa
a iddos od pokotalu to kororattan idda en kos od pokooumpak to moputi
ii ku od owan kos kandan no ngaran no nokosulat don diyot libru taddot langun nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
oy id ponudtuu ku riyot isowwan to moy ku woy riyot mgo ponolihan no mgo sakup ku sikandan
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to iladelfia
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos od kosolihan woy uhis
oy siyak en mandad kos id somad taddot tusi to kodponguu riyon to kodharit onama iling taddot kotungud to kodhari ni avid
aa en od pokolokkob to sobbangan otid lukatan ku idda woy worad en od pokolukat tadda otid lokobban kud
osorollan ku iddos pinuungan dow
oy nosorollan ku mandad no konna kow mouraa woy disok da kos koniyun kogahan piru id ponayun kow nid tuman to koddin kahi woy waa kow mid elle koddi
een id lukatan ku iddos sobbangan atag koniyu no waa ahad ondoy nod pokolokkob tadda
a mokaatag taddot od ponikahi no mgo udio sikandan no sakup to onama uhus idda su iyon bonnaa mgo sakup sikandan ni oivuyan
omotawi row
d polingkooron ku sikandan diyot isowwan dow woy od kosorollan dan no id ginowannan ku en sikiyu
omon to id tuman dow iddos koddin suhu no od tiis to mgo kodposuppit od tovangan ku sikiyu no diid komonnu riyot timpu nod inguma iddos dakkoon kosupittan kaay to ampowt ingod
a idda en kos poukit to onama to kodgeddam to langun no minuvu
d livod a to diid kouhoy
een ponoyuna row iddos koddumoruma koddi amoy waa mokaahaw taddot ganti no id panoy ku atag koniyu
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi od bovallan ku sikandin iling to mosalig no tuddok to templo woy riyon don sikandin od ubpa taman to waad tomanon
d sulatan ku sikandin taddot ngaran to onama ku woy dos ngaran taddot bonuwa to onama no idda en so ammin erusalem no id poonna to onama pomon diyot datas to langit
oy od sulatan ku mandad sikandin taddot lammin ngaran ku
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a mid ikahi sikandin koddi to ulatow ini atag to sinuhuwan to onama riyon to id lolivuung nod pompomakoy to aodicea
ni kos od osengon ku no id sulat du iyak kos od ngoranan no onnaa su kosolihan a woy dos langun no id posivonnalan ku mooggot en
oy siyak en mandad kos id pomonnan to langun no binovallan to onama
