osorollan ku iddos pinuungan dow no konna oraroy oggot kos kopomakoy row koddi
yyos od pokoiling kow to oweg no konna monit woy konna mandad mohonnow
d kopii ku nanoy no gowang monit kow monit kow ra en woy gowang mohonnow mohonnow kow ra en
iru pomon to nokoiling kow man to oweg no konna monit woy konna mandad mohonnow id ilob ku sikiyu
d pobporoong kow no dakkoo kos korotuwan dow woy waa ahad ondan no kulang diyot koniyu
iru waa row nosorolli no sikiyu vos iddos minuvu no orayd koooyuwan mokoerueru nokoiling to mgo butud worowora woy waa oumpakon diyot isowwan to onama
een od pomonduwan ku sikiyu no bolli kow kaayt koddi to buawan no nolinisan ukit to apuy amoy duwon bonnaan korotuwan dow
oy bolli kow kaayt koddi to moputin umpak amoyd kaawa kos ilow row pomon to waa oumpakon dow woy bolli kow mandad to id bawit mata row amoyd pokokita kowd
ddos langun no id ginowannan ku od suggan ku en woyd pipitan amoy od pokopuung sikandan to motallong
een sondit kow woy tanan kowd to koniyun mgo saa
omotawi row
d lohinat a riyot sobbangan woyd ponoktok
ddos ahad ondoy nod pokorinog to koddin bawos woyd lukatan a nikandin od usok a woy od lommung a kandin nod kaan
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi od poruuhon ku sikandin diyot koddin trunu iling taddot kodporuug koddi to moy ku riyot kandin no trunu oyya su id talu kud si oivuyan
een su duwon man tolinga row koilangan nod pominoggon dow inis id ikahi to his no spiritu riyon tod ponlolivuung nod pompomakoy
a nopongnga idda nokita ku no duwon sobbangan no noukatan diyot datas to langit
oy norinog ku mandon iddos bawos iling to dohingon to trumpeta no mid ungketen to ndini ka su id pokita ku kikow iddos od kotomanan init morin allow
dda ron en noiroomman a to kotuusan to spiritu to onama woy nopiyod a riyot datas to langit
a rutun nokita ku iddos trunu woy dos mid unsad tadda
os boyo rin iling to mosella no mahaa no mgo batu nod ngoranan no haspe woy kornalina
iyot kandin no trunu duwon bountu no nokolingkus iling to mosella no mahaa no batu nod ngoranan no esmeralda
a duwon mandad oruwompuuoppat no trunu no nokolingkus taddon trunu
utun duwon id ponounsad no oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon no id ponoumpak to moputi woy id kokuruna to buawan
omon diyot nokotongannan no trunu id kokilat id lolouhung woy id pomaansi
iyot isowwan tadda duwon pittun suu no id ponloglog
ni en kos spiritu to onama
iyot isowwan to trunu duwon immat lanow no motingngow iling to oungan
a duwon oppat no maantoyn binovallan no nokolingkus diyon to ipat ibpit taddon trunu
os mgo lawa ran nosoob to mgo mata riyot isowwan woy riyon mandad to oyyug
ddos unnon maantoyn binovallan iling to boyo to liyun
oy dos ikooruwa iling to boyo to turun baka dos ikootollu iling to bonnong to minuvu woy dos ikooppat iling to banug nod layang
pat sokkad kandan duwon annom no pakpak woy nosoob idda to mgo mata ahad diyot silob to pakpak dan
a allow bulli waa soroan dan to kodkanta no mid ungketen to his uhis uhis kos onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun
uwon don sikandin to waa pa iddos tigkonayan to ingod ahad koungkay woy taman to waad tomanon
a iddos mgo maantoyn binovallan id kanta id posivantug woy id posolamat taddot mid unsad diyot trunu no maantoy taman to waad tomanon
aggun tod puungan dan idda od ponlingkood mandad iddos oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon diyon to isowwan taddot mid unsad diyot trunu woy id ponsimba ran kandin no maantoy taman to waad tomanon
a id savuk dan kos mgo kuruna ran diyot isowwan to trunu woy mid ikahi sikandan to ongaggon doy no onama
llog ka en nod doongon woyd posivontuhon pomon to kotuusan du oyyos sikkow kos mid bovaa to langun
omon to kikown id kopii novovallan idda woy id boggayan du to umuu
a nokita ku no duwon id luun no popii riyot kowanan no bollad taddot mid unsad diyot trunu
d sulatan idda riyot tapad divauy woy duwon pittun silyu no id porokkot tadda
okita ku mandad iddos sokkad no motuus no ponolihan nid ooseng to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ndoy kos ollog nod lokkat taddot mgo silyu no id porokkot taddot id luun no popii amoyd kovollat idda
iru waa en ahad ondoy riyot datas to langit woy kaay to ampowt ingod woy ahad diyot silob to livuta no duwon kotungud nod bollat taddon popii amoy od kovasa idda
een ayas a mid sinoggow oyyos waa en ahad sokkad no ollog nod pokovollat taddot id luun no popii woy od pokovasa tadda
iru sokkad taddot od pombuyyahon mid ikahi koddi to o kad od sinoggow su iddos id ngoranan no iyun no id pomon to koubbaran ni uda woy koopuwan ni avid id ponalu sikandin ki oivuyan
een sikandin da kos ollog nod lokkat taddot pittun silyu tat id luun no popii amoyd kovollat idda
o kodontong ku mandon nokita ku iddos atin arnero no mid lohinat diyot isowwan to trunu no id potongannan to oppat no maantoyn binovallan woy taddot oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon
iyot lawa taddon atin arnero duwon patow no id imotayan sikandin dangan
oy nokita ku mandad no duwon pittun suwag din woy pittu mandad kos mata rin no idda en kos spiritu to onama no id popiyod kaay to intirut ingod
a mid porani iddos atin arnero riyot trunu woy id angoy rin iddos id luun no popii pomon diyot kowanan no bollad taddot mid unsad dutun
o naangoy taddot atin arnero iddos id luun no popii id ponlingkood diyot isowwan din iddos oppat no maantoyn binovallan woy dos oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon
pat sokkad kandan id pompiyod to alpa woy id ponsomad to yohung no buawan no noponnut id ay no insenso no idda en so dosalon to mgo minuvu to onama
a id kanta sikandan to lammin kanta no mid ungketen to ikkow en kos ollog nod angoy taddot id luun no popii woy od lokkat taddot mgo silyu no id porokkot tadda
yyos id imotayan ka woy pomon to longossa ru nid tihis id tobbus du kos mgo minuvu atag to onama
otobbus sikandan pomon diyot langun no nokodossoosson tribu nokodossoosson kinohiyan woy ayon to nokodossoosson ingod
d bovallan du sikandan no mgo hari woy mgo tohodbuwis atag to onama ta woy od ponguu mandad sikandan kaay to ampowt ingod
o kodontong ku mandon norinog ku no duwon bawos to maanmaan woy diid koiyap no mgo ponolihan no id lingkus diyot trunu diyot oppat no maantoyn binovallan woy riyon tod pombuyyahon
oy id kanta ran to orayn monokkaa no mid ungketen to os atin arnero no id imotayan ollog en nod posivontuhon iddos kandin nokotuusan korotuwan moraom no koovottan konokkaan woyollog en sikandin nod doongon woyd posolomatan
opongnga idda norinog ku no id pongkanta iddos langun no binovallan to onama no id ponubpa riyot datas to langit kaay to ampowt ingod diyot silob to livuta woy dos diyot dahat
id ungketen sikandan to d doongon iddos mid unsad diyot trunu woy dos atin arnero woy od posivontuhon ta sikandan taman to waad tomanon oyyos sikandan en kos motuus to langun
a iddos oppat no maantoyn binovallan mid ikahi to yya od kotuman en ini
oy idda mandad so oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon id ponlingkood sikandan amoyd simba to onama woy taddot atin arnero
opongnga idda nokita ku no id lokkat to atin arnero iddos unna taddot pittun silyu tat id luun no popii
orinog ku no id ooseng iddos sokkad taddot oppat no maantoyn binovallan woy dos bawos din iling to luhung no mid ungketen to ndini kad
a nokita ku no idda ron en duwon id loppow no moputin kuda woy dos id ponguda tadda id somad to pana woy id boggayan sikandin to kuruna to koponoluwan
id ponayun sikandin to iponawon din amoy od talu to langun nod supak kandin
opongnga idda id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikooruwon silyu woy norinog ku no id ooseng iddos ikooruwon maantoyn binovallan no mid ungketen to ndini kad
a idda ron en duwon id loppow no moollutun kuda woy dos id ponguda tadda id boggayan to mowwet no polihuma woy id boggayan to kotungud nod doraat to moppiyon koroniyan to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod amoy od poimotayoy ran
opongnga idda id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikootollun silyu woy norinog ku no id ooseng iddos ikootollun maantoyn binovallan no mid ungketen to ndini kad
a idda ron en duwon id loppow no metom no kuda woy dos id ponguda tadda id piyod to timbangan
a norinog ku no duwon immat bawos no id pomon diyot tongannan taddot oppat no maantoyn binovallan no mid ungketen to omahalow kos mgo bolliyon
ddos sokkad no allow no kodurunaa od pokovolli ra to otollun supa no boggas o sokkad no gantang no tuppas to giniling
iru yo ru pomahala kos montika woy binu
opongnga idda id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikooppat no silyu woy norinog ku iddos bawos to ikooppat no maantoyn binovallan no mid ungketen to ndini kad
a idda ron en duwon id loppow no mountak no kuda woy dos id ponguda tadda id ngoranan to opotayan
oy duwon id tundug kandin nod ngoranan no ngod tid oomatoy
d boggayan sikandan to kotungud nod imatoy taddot ikooppat no baad to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ukit to polihuma gutas mgo bohok woy movuut no mgo monnanap to puwaason
opongnga idda id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikolimmon silyu woy riyot silob to buwisanan atag to onama nokita ku iddos mgo gimukud taddot id ponimotayan pomon to kodponudtuu ran to kahit onama woy oggot no kodposivonnaa ran tadda
a id nganoy ran ukit to monokkaan kodooseng no mid ungketen to ongaggon no otuus uhis woyd kosolihan ka
annu ru pa man od hukuman woy od silutan iddos mgo minuvu nid ponoubpa riyon to ampowt ingod pomon to kodimatoy konami
a id boggayan kos ipat sokkad kandan to moputin umpak no mowwet woy id ikohiyan sikandan no od aangat pa to moobbavon timpu taman tod kolimud don langun iddos suwod dan to kopomakoy no duma ran no mgo uripon to onama no id ponimotayan iling kandan
opongnga idda nokita ku no id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikoannom no silyu
a idda ron en mid linug to orayn monokkaa woy dos allow id mosukirom iling to metom no ogget woy dos buwan id moollutu iling to longossa
ongouug mandad kaay to ampowt ingod iddos mgo bituon diyot datas to langit iling to ayon no bunga to kayun igera nod pongoumpad to monokkaan kaamag
a nowora kos langit iling to id luun no popii woy nongoossud kos langun no buvungan woy mgo isla pomon diyot notawwan kandan
ddos mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod dos od kilaannon no mgo minuvu dos mgo ponguu to ayon dos nongoruwonnan dos duwon mgo kotundanan woy dos langun no minuvu uripon man o konna id ponoollos diyot mgo langub woy silob to doorakkoon batu riyot buvungan
a id ponumow ran iddos mgo buvungan woy dos doorakkoon batu kahi ran to ombuni koy woy ollos koy taddot mid unsad diyot trunu woy taddot atin arnero amoy dii roy od kosahapan iddos silut pomon to lampas no langot din
yya su id inguma ron kos mokaaratarat no allow no od silut iddos onama woy dos atin arnero pomon to lampas no langot dan woy waa en ahad ondoy nod pokogaha nod tiis tadda
a nopongnga idda nokita ku no duwon oppat no ponolihan no id ponloohinat diyot oppat no sungguk to ingod
d toholan dan kos oppat no id pomonnan to monokkaan kaamag amoy diid koumannan to kaamag iddos livuta dos dahat woy dos langun no kayu
okita ku mandad iddos ossa pa no ponolihan no id inguma pomon diyon tid tollak
uwon id piyod din no silyu to maantoyn onama woy id ikohiyan din to monokkaan bawos iddos oppat no ponolihan no id boggayan to kotungud nod doraat to livuta woy dahat
ahi rin to o row pa doratti kos livuta dahat woy mgo kayu taman to od kotawwan doyd to patow iddos kiloy taddot mgo uripon to onama ta
a duwon mid ikahi koddi no iddos kouralloy taddot id ponpotawan sokkad no gatus woy oppatnopuu oppat no maan   langun pomon diyon to koubbaran ni srael
opuuoruwon maan   kos id potawan pomon diyot koubbaran ni uda
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni uben
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni ad
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni ser
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni eptali
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni anases
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni imeon
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni evi
opuuoruwon maan pomon   diyot koubbaran ni sacar
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni abulon
opuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni ose woysopuuoruwon maan   pomon diyot koubbaran ni enjamin
a nopongnga idda nokita ku iddos mouraan minuvu no diid koiyap
d pomon sikandan diyot nokodossoosson ingod nokodossoosson tribu woy nokodossoosson kinohiyan
d ponlohinat dan diyot isowwan to trunu woy riyot isowwan to atin arnero
d oumpak sikandan to moputi no mowwet woy posidpiyod dan to mgo lokkoy to palmera
d porongnganoy sikandan nid ooseng to monokkaa kahi ran to d doongon ta kos onama no mid unsad duwot trunu woy dos atin arnerosu notobbus ki pomon kandan
a iddos langun no ponolihan mid loohinat no nokolingkus taddot trunu diyot od pombuyyahon woy riyot oppat no maantoyn binovallan
d ponlingkood sikandan diyot isowwan taddot trunu woy id simba ran iddos onama
ahi ran to yya od kotuman en ini
d doongon ta kos onama ta woy od posivontuhon ta sikandinsu moraom kos kandin no koovottan woy dakkoo kos kotungud woy kotuusan din
d posolomatan ta sikandin taman to waad tomanon
yya od kotuman en ini
opongnga idda mid intud koddi iddos sokkad taddot od pombuyyahon kahi rin to osorollan du vo ko ondoy kos mgo minuvu no id oumpak to moputi no mowwet woy ko ingkon dan id pomon
id tavak a to aa saddoo ku ir
onudtuli a su sikkow kos nokosaddoo
een kahi rin koddi to ikandan en kos nokoukit to koosayan diyon to ampowt ingod
kos mgo umpak dan id pippiyan woy id pomoputi ran ukit to longossa to atin arnero
dda en kos unayan no riyon sikandan to isowwan taddot trunu to onama
a allow bulli duwon kahaan dan no od tuman to kandin nid kopii riyot templo rin
oy dos mid unsad to trunu kos od kupkup kandan
ii ron en sikandan od gutasan woyd kotokkangan woy dii ran don mandad od koilad to monit woy taddot ahad ondan no mosakit no monit
yya su iddos atin arnero no riyot isowwan to trunu kos od tamong kandan
d piyoddon din sikandan diyot mgo sobsob to oweg no od pokovoggoy to umuu
oy dii ron sikandan od lanu oyyos od punason don to onama iddos mgo dayas dan
o id lokkat to atin arnero iddos ikopittun silyu taddot id luun no popii idda ron en id tivonok kos langun diyot datas to langit daom to mgo tongngot uras
a nokita ku no duwon pittun ponolihan no id ponloohinat diyot isowwan to onama woy dos ipat sokkad kandan id boggayan to trumpeta
uwon mandad ossa pa no ponolihan no id inguma woy id lohinat diyot buwisanan
d piyod sikandin to buawan no tootawwan to mammut no insenso
oy id boggayan sikandin to mouraan insenso amoy id timuu taddot mgo dosalon to langun no minuvu to onama woy od loowon din idda riyot buawan no buwisanan no riyot isowwan to trunu
een iddos obboo taddot insenso no id pomon diyot tootawwan no buawan nid somaddan tat ponolihan id poundatas diyot isowwan to onama duma taddot dosalon to mgo minuvu rin
opongnga idda id angoy to ponolihan iddos tootawwan no buawan woy id iponnu rin to baha no pomon diyot buwisanan woy id sovuwak din idda ayon to ampowt ingod
a idda ron en id kokilat woy id pomaansi to monokkaa woy id linug
a iddos pittun ponolihan id panoypanoy amoyd porahing taddot kandan no mgo trumpeta
os unnon ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en id uran to ays woy apuy no nokodsambut to longossa
een nongoloow iddos ikootollun baad to livuta dos ikootollun baad to kokoyuwon woy dos langun no sabbot
opongnga idda dos ikooruwon ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en duwon iling to dakkoon buvungan nid loglog no id antug diyot dahat
a iddos ikootollun baad to dahat novauy ron no longossa
d poomatoy dos ikootollun baad to langun no ngaap diyot dahat woy nongohobba mandad iddos ikootollun baad to langun no bollangay
a iddos ikootollun ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en duwon dakkoon bituon no nouug pomon diyot datas to langit iling to suu nid loglog
ouug idda riyot ikootollun baad to langun no oweg woy riyot mgo sobsob
os ngaran taddon bituon opet
een id mopet iddos ikootollun baad to mgo oweg woy mouraa kos minuvu nid poomatoy pomon to kodinom dan tadda
opongnga idda dos ikooppat no ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en norattan iddos ikootollun baad to allow dos ikootollun baad to buwan woy dos ikootollun baad to mgo bituon
omon tadda worad iddos ikootollun baad to seaa ran
een id mosukirom iddos ikootollun baad to allow woy dos ikootollun baad to bulli worad en id maawang
a nopongnga idda nokita ku no duwon banug no mid layang diyot kooowayan woy norinog ku iddos monokkaan bawos din no mid ungketen to rayn mokaaratarat
okaaratarat en kos od kotomanan to langun no minuvu nid oubpa ayon to ampowt ingod otid porohingon don taddot otollun ponolihan iddos mgo trumpeta ran
a iddos ikolimmon ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en nokita ku no duwon bituon pomon diyot datas langit no nouug diyon to livuta
d boggayan sikandin to tusi amoy od pokes taddot bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman
d pokesan din iddos bobbo woy idda ron en id leggua dos mokoppaan obboo no iling tid pomon diyot orayn dakkoon apuy
een pomon tadda id mosukirom kos ingod su nosoungan don man kos allow taddot obboo
a pomon diyot obboo id ponleggua kos mgo apang no id lonna riyon to ampowt ingod
oy id boggayan sikandan to kotuusan no od soggod to mgo minuvu
os laas dan iling to laas to topilak
d diiyan sikandan nod doraat to mgo sabbot mgo kayu woy duma pon mgo pinomuwa
yon dan od posokitan idda ra en so mgo minuvu no waa id potaaw to silyu to onama riyot kiloy ran
aa sikandan boggayi to kotuusan nod imatoy ko konna od posakit da daom to limmon buwan
ddos kosokitoy nod tiison dan iling to laas to topilak
een daom to iddon mgo buwan od kopiyan don nanoy nod patoy kos mgo minuvu piru od poriyu kandan iddos kopotayan
os boyo taddon mgo apang od pokoiling to kuda no nopanoy ron nod sokayan atag to kodpoimotayoy
iyot uu ran id sukuvan to immat kuruna no buawan woy dos bonnong dan iling to bonnong to minuvu
ddos bowvuut uu ran mowwet iling to bowvuut baay woy dos mgo ngipon dan immat ngipon to liyun
iyot kabpa ran id sukuvan to pongallang no putow
oy dos dohingon to mgo pakpak dan od pokoiling to gohonuggulon to mouraan kolisa no id goyod to mgo kuda nod lungkossu poundiyon to kodpoimotayoy
os mgo ikug dan duwon soggod iling to topilak woy idda en kos id posakit dan to mgo minuvu daom to limmon buwan
ddos hari ran idda en so morat no ponolihan no od ponguu riyot bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman
os ngaran din si baddon otik diyot ebreo no kinohiyan
oy otik diyot riego no kinohiyan polyon no iddos kohulugan ohoddoraat
a nopongnga ron iddos unnon mokaaratarat no kotomanan piru duwon pa oruwa nod inguma
os ikoannom no ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en norinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot oppat no sungguk taddot buawan no buwisanan no riyot isowwan to onama
d osengan din iddos ikoannom no ponolihan no duwon trumpeta kahi rin to ovukiyud iddos oppat no morat no ponolihan no id baku riyot dakkoon oweg to ufrates
een id sovukan din iddos oppat no morat no ponolihan no id panoy ron tapoy atag to iddon lahun buwan allow woy uras amoy od ponimotayan kos ikootollun baad to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
a duwon od tundug kandan no mgo sundau nid ponguda woy norinog ku no oruwon gatus no milyun    kos kouralloy ran
okaatag taddot id pokita koddi no boyo to mgo kuda woy dos id ponguda iling idda kaay
os id ponguda duwon pongallang no putow riyot kabpa ran no iddos mgo batok tadda moollutu iling to apuy melom iling to obboo woy maag iling to asupre
os uu taddon mgo kuda iling to liyun woy duwon apuy obboo woy asupre nod ponleggua riyot bivig dan
a ukit en kaayt otollun kororattan no id ponleggua riyot bivig taddon mgo kuda id poomatoy iddos ikootollun baad to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
yya su iddos kotuusan to kodimatoy taddon mgo kuda id pomon diyot bivig dan
oy idda mandad so ikug dan duwon mgo uu iling to uwod nod laas no id posakit dan to mgo minuvu
iru iddos dumon minuvu no waa id poomatoy ukit taddot otollun kororattan waa en sikandan id sondit woyd tanan to morat no pinuungan dan
yyos ponayun peen iddos kodsimba ran to mgo busow woy taddot ribultu no binovallan pomot buawan plata brunsi mgo batu woy mgo kayu no dii en idda od pokokita diid pokorinog woy diid pokoipanow
aa en mandad sikandan id sondit woy id tanan to kodimatoy ran kodloommoy kodlaayuk to konna ran sawa woy to kodponakow
a nopongnga idda nokita ku iddos ossa pa no ponolihan no motuus no id pomon diyot datas to langit
ovukusan sikandin to souhapun woy duwon nokolingkus no bountu riyot uu rin
os bonnong din iling to seaa to allow woy dos paa rin iling to tuddok no apuy
uwon id somaddan din no disok no sulat no waa id luun
d gedda rin kos kowanan no paa rin diyot dahat woy dos ivang id gedda rin diyot livuta
a id pehes sikandin to orayn monokkaa no immat peheson to movuut no liyun nod inihoo
opongnga idda id tavak iddos pittun baansi
d sulat kud nanoy iddos id oseng taddot pittun baansi piru norinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to o ru id posaddoo iddos id oseng taddot pittun baansi woy yo ru idda sulata
a iddos ponolihan no nokita ku no id lohinat diyot dahat woy riyot livuta id poratas din kos kowanan no bollad din su od totandu sikandin ukit to ngaran to onamon maantoy taman to waad tomanon
ikandin kos mid bovaa to langit livuta dahat woy dos langun no nokotaaw kaay
a id totandu iddos ponolihan kahi rin to opongnga ron kos timpu to kodaangat oyyos koungkay od kotuman don en kos langun
yya su riyot timpu nod porohingon don taddot ikopittun ponolihan iddos trumpeta rin od tumanon don en to onama iddos puhawang din no waa pa id posaddoo riyot mgo minuvu piru id posaddoo rin idda dangan diyot sinuhuwan din no mgo propeta
a norinog ku mandon iddos bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ndiyonniyu iddos ponolihan no id lohinat diyon to dahat woy riyot livuta woy ongayow dos disok no sulat no waa id luun nid somaddan din
een id poroniyan ku iddos ponolihan woy id buyu ku kandin iddos disok no sulat
ahi rin koddi to ni rad kos sulat ongayow woy kannow
ammis idda iling to tonnob otik duwon pa to bivig du piru mopet don otik diyon don to gottok du
a id angoy ku iddos disok no sulat pomon diyot bollad din woy id kaan ku idda
ling en to tonnob kos komommisoy tadda to riyon pa to bivig ku piru to noommod kud id mopet don diyot gottok ku
opongnga idda id ikohiyan a nikandin to oilangan no id posaddoo ru mandon iddos id poponudtuu to onama kikow ko ondan kos od kotomanan diyot nokodossoosson tribu nokodossoosson kinohiyan woy riyon to nokodossoosson ingod woy riyot mgo hari ran
a nopongnga idda id boggayan a to toppong no iling to tukod woy id ikohiyan a to ohinat ka woy topongngow iddos templo to onama woy dos buwisanan woy iyapow iddos id ponsimba
iru yo ru opila tod toppong iddos lama to templo su atag idda taddot diid pomakoy to onama
yyos od geeheddan dan en iddos uhis no bonuwa to erusalem daom to oppatnopuu oruwon buwan no idda en so sokkad no maan woy oruwon gatus annomnopuu   no allow
aom taddon timpu id popiyod ku iddos oruwon tohodposivonnaa mokaatag koddi
d oumpak sikandan to saku woy id posaddoo ran iddos id poponudtuu ku kandan
os oruwon tohodposivonnaa sikandan en iddos noponunggelengan dangan to oruwon kayu no olibo woy dos oruwon suhu no id poohinat diyot isowwan to onama nod ongaggon no od ponguu to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
tik duwon od posakit kandan od leggua kos apuy riyot bivig dan amoyd loow taddot od pongkuntra kandan
ling en taddon kopotayan kos od kosahapan to ahad ondoy nod posakit kandan
d boggayan sikandan to kotuusan nod tohoo to souhapun amoy diid pokouran laggun tod posaddoo ran taddot id poponudtuu to onama kandan
d boggayan mandad sikandan to kotuusan nod kovauy no longossa kos mgo oweg woy id boggayan sikandan to kotungud nod pouma to nokodossoosson kororattan kaay to ampowt ingod ahad kannu ran id kopii
a otid kopongnga ran don tod posaddoo iddos id poponudtuu to onama kandan od lusuran sikandan to mokaaratarat no monnanap nod leggua pomon diyot bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman
d toluwon taddon monnanap iddos oruwon tohodposivonnaa woyd imotayan din sikandan
a iddos mgo bangkoy ran id tonanan da riyot koosada tod bontuhon no bonuwa no riyon en no lugaa id pakpak to krus iddos kandan no ongaggon
ddon bonuwa od koponunggelengan to odoma woy hipto oyya su morat kos pinuungan to mgo minuvu rutun
aom to otollu woy tongngot allow iddos mgo minuvu no id pomon diyot nokodossoosson ingod nokodossoosson kinohiyan woy nokodossoosson tribu id undiyonnan woyd tongtongngan dan iddos mgo bangkoy
oy id diiyan dan idda no id lobbong
ahaa kos langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod woy id pista ran woyd povoggayoy to rigalu pomon to kopotayan taddot oruwon tohodposivonnaa no id posuppit kandan
iru to nopongnga iddos otollun allow woyd tongnga id polivod to onama iddos songnga rin nod pokovoggoy to umuu woy idda ron en id lohinat sikandan
een id pongkookoo to mattag allak iddos langun nod pokokita kandan
a norinog taddot oruwon tohodposivonnaa iddos monokkaan bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ndini kow
a novatun sikandan diyot datas to langit duma to souhapun laggun tid ontong kandan iddos od pongkuntra kandan
dda ron en tigkow id linug to orayn monokkaa
ohobba iddos ikosopuun baad taddon bonuwa woy pittun maan   no minuvu kos id poomatoy
ddos waa id poomatoy id geddam don to dakkoon allak woy id posivantug don sikandan to onama no riyot datas to langit
a idda en kos ikooruwon mokaaratarat no kotomanan nod inguma kaay to ampowt ingod woy od tinundug mandon iddos ikootollun mokaaratarat no kotomanan
a iddos ikopittun ponolihan id porahing to trumpeta rin woy idda ron en duwon monokkaan mgo bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to oungkay worad osson od hari kaay to ampowt ingod ko konna idda ra en so onama nod ongaggon ta woy esiyas no id popiyod din woy od hari sikandin to waad tomanon
dda mandad so oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon no mid unsad diyot mgo trunu ran no riyot isowwan to onama id ponlingkood sikandan woy id simba kandin
ahi ran to onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun sikkow en kos onama to waa pa kos tigkonayan to ingod ahad koungkay
d posolomatan doy sikkow su id pokita ru kos mokososoobbun kotuusan du woy id tigkanoy kad nid hari
ampas kos langot to mgo minuvu no waa id pomakoy kikow piru id inguma ron en kos timpu no id pokita ru iddos lampas no langot du kandan oyya su od hukuman du iddos id poomatoy ron
d inguma ron en kos timpu nod boggayan du to ganti iddos sinuhuwan du no mgo propeta dos langun no minuvu ru dos langun no duwon allak kikow dos novantug woy dos waa novantug
oy od imotayan dud iddos id puung to kororattan kaay to ampowt ingod
a nopokesan iddos templo to onama no riyot datas to langit
iyot daom taddon templo nokita ku iddos kavan no id tawwan to mgo tandu to onama no nosulat dangan
oy idda ron en id kokilat to mokaaratarat id pomaansi id linug woy ayas id uran to doorakkoon ays
a duwon orayn mokososoobbun kotomanan diyot datas langit
okita ku iddos sokkad no molitan no id oumpak to allow woy dos buwan diyot dosiyung to paa rin
d kokuruna sikandin to sopuuoruwon bituon
ddon molitan movoddos woy id pomehes sikandin to kosokitoy su od pototobbow ron
uwon mandad ossa pa no mokososoobbun kotomanan diyot datas to langit
uwon dakkoon moollutun dragon no pittu kos uu sopuu kos suwag woy duwon kuruna riyot ipat uu rin
d lompossan din to ikug din iddos ikootollun baad to mgo bituon diyot langit woy id ponlumbag din idda riyot livuta
a iddon dragon mid loohinat diyot morani taddot molitan nod pototobbow oyyos od dowiyon din kos anak otid leggua ron
a id tobbawan don iddos molitan to anak no mama woy waa idda norawi taddot dragon oyya su id sukabmit idda to onama woy id piyod diyot trunu rin
ddon anak idda en kos od ponguu to langun no ingod woy waa od pokogaha nod atu kandin su mosalig kos kodponguu rin iling to putow no tukod
a iddos molitan id paahuy riyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no id panoy to onama kandin su amoy riyon od possiyan sikandin daom to no maan woy oruwon gatus annomnopuu   no allow
opongnga idda duwon dakkoon kodpoimotayoy riyot datas to langit
i iguel woy dos mgo duma rin no ponolihan to onama id lusuran dan iddos dragon woy dos sakup din no morat no mgo ponolihan
a id atu iddos dragon woy dos sakup din
iru notalu iddos dragon woy dos mgo sakup din woy id paawa sikandan pomon diyot datas to langit
a id lumbag iddos dakkoon dragon kaay to ampowt ingod woy dos sakup din no mgo ponolihan
ikandin en iddos uwod dangan nod ngoranan ki oivuyan woy od ngoranan mandad no ponguu to mgo busow no id aakaa to mgo minuvu kaay to intirut ingod
opongnga idda norinog ku no duwon monokkaan bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to d inguma ron kos allow to kodtobbus to onama to mgo minuvu
d pokita rin don iddos kotuusan din to kodhari woy dos esiyas no id popiyod din od pokita ron to kandin no kotungud
yya su id paawa rin don diyot datas to langit si oivuyan no allow bulli od ampoo to mgo suwod ta nod pompomakoy riyot isowwan to onama
iru id talu ran si oivuyan ukit to longossa to atin arnero woy ukit taddot kovonnaan no id ponudtuu ran mokaatag ki isas rays
yyos waa en sikandan nonuhuni to umuu ran ahad pa riyon to kopotayan
urisu kahaa kow sikiyu no id ponubpa rinit langit
iru mokoerueru kow no id ponubpa ruwot livuta woy dahat su id ponog don si oivuyan duwot koniyu no lampas kos langot din oyya su nosorollan din no moobbava robbo kos kandin no timpu
a to nosorollan taddot dragon no id lumbag don sikandin kaayt livuta id loupug din iddos molitan nid anak to mama
iru id boggayan to oruwon pakpak iddos molitan iling to pakpak to dakkoon banug amoy od pokolayang sikandin diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa no id panoy nod oubpan din
utun od possiyan sikandin daom to otollu woy tongngot lahun woy dii sikandin od komonnu taddot dragon
a id paaus taddot dragon kos oweg pomon diyot bivig din no iling to dakkoon lanog amoy od kaanud iddos molitan
iru id tovangan sikandin to livuta su novokka idda woy noseddop iddos oweg no id paaus taddot dragon pomon diyot bivig din
d ayas peen kos langot taddot dragon diyot molitan
een id undiyonnan din iddos ossa pa no koubbaran taddot molitan amoy od pokidimatoy kandan woy taddot mgo minuvu no id tuman to mgo suhu to onama woy taddot mgo minuvu nod posivonnaa mokaatag ki isas rays
a iddos dragon diyon don mid loohinat to ibpit to dahat
a nokita ku no duwon mokaaratarat no monnanap no id goun pomon diyot dahat
ittu kos uu rin sopuu kos suwag woy riyon to ipat suwag din duwon kuruna
iyon to ipat uu rin duwon nokosulat no ngaran nod sumpalit to onama
ddon monnanap no nokita ku od pokoiling to liyopardu
os paa rin od pokoiling to paa to usu woy dos bivig din od pokoiling to bivig to liyun
d boggayan taddot dragon iddos monnanap to kandin no kotuusan woy dakkoon kotungud to kodhari
ddos sokkad no uu taddot monnanap duwon dakkoon pali nod pokopatoy nanoy kandin piru nouliyan dad idda
een nosoobbuwan kos langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod woy id dumoruma ran don kandin
a id ponsimba ran taddot dragon su id boggoy rin man kos kotuusan din taddot monnanap
d ponsimba mandad sikandan taddon monnanap woy kahi ran to aa en od pokoiling to kotuusan kaayn monnanap woy waa od pokoatu kandin
d podtohon poron to onama iddon monnanap no od ooseng to kodporatasdatas woy kodsumpalit woy id podtohon din sikandin nod ponayun to kodpuung tadda daom to oppatnopuu oruwon buwan
a id sumpalit din iddos onama woy dos ngaran to onama dos id ubpan din diyot datas to langit ahad iddos langun nid ponubpa rutun
d podtohon sikandin to onama no od pokidimatoy to mgo minuvu rin woy od talu kandan
d boggayan din mandad sikandin to kotungud no od hari to langun no minuvu pomon diyot nokodossoosson tribu nokodossoosson kinohiyan woy nokodossoosson ingod
ddon monnanap od simbaanon to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no waa nosulat kos mgo ngaran diyot libru to atin arnero
o waa pa novovalli inis ingod duwon don iddos libru no id sulatan to ngaran taddot langun nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
een su duwon man tolinga row ooyyari row ini tod pominog
u iddos ahad ondoy no tapoy ron nopuhawang to onama nod omotton od kaammot en
oy dos ahad ondoy no tapoy rin don nopuhawang nod patoy ukit to polihuma od patoy en ukit to polihuma
urisu koilangan no iddos mgo minuvu to onama od tiis to kosupittan woyd mosalig diyot kopomakoy
a nopongnga idda duwon ossa pa no mokaaratarat no monnanap no nokita ku no id leggua pomon diyot daom to livuta
nin monnanap duwon oruwon suwag iling to suwag to natin karnero piru iddos bawos din iling to bawos to dragon
nin ikooruwon monnanap id gamit to kotungud no id boggoy taddot unnon monnanap amoy od pohoson din kos langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod no od simba taddot unnon monnanap no duwon pali nod pokopatoy nanoy kandin
ouraan mokososoobbun id puungan taddot ikooruwon monnanap ahad pa iddos kodpouran to apuy pomon diyot datas to langit su amoy od kokita to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod
a id podtohon sikandin to onama no od puung to mgo mokososoobbu ukit to kotuusan nid boggoy kandin taddot unnon monnanap
een ukit tadda nookalan din iddos mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod woy id suhu rin sikandan nod bovaa to ribultu taddot unnon monnanap no nopoliyan ukit to polihuma piru nouyag dad mandon
d podtohon din mandad iddos ikooruwon monnanap no od boggoy to songnga taddot ribultu to unnon monnanap amoyd pokoooseng idda woy od pokosuhu nod imotayan iddos ahad ondoy no diid simba kandin
d pohos mandad taddot ikooruwon monnanap iddos langun no minuvu no od tawwan to patow kos kowanan no bollad o kiloy ran
os id potawan din iddos novantug woy dos waa novantug dos od koruwonnan woy dos worowora dos uripon woy dos konna uripon
a iddos ahad ondoy no diid potaaw to patow to ngaran taddot unnon monnanap o numero taddot ngaran din dii en od pokovolli woy diid pokobovoligya
oilangan en kos moraom no koovottan amoy od kosorollan ko ondan kos kohulugan taddot numero to unnon monnanap
yya su ini en no numero kos ngaran to minuvu woy inin numero annom no gatus woy annomnopuu annom 
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos atin arnero no id lohinat diyot uvungan to ion
uma kandin iddos sokkad no gatus woy oppatnopuu oppat no maan   no minuvu
iyot kiloy ran nokosulat iddos ngaran din woy dos ngaran to moy rin no onama
a norinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no iling to gohonuggulon to dakkoon tousuvan woy iling to monokkaan baansi
ddon bawos iling mandad to dohingon to mgo alpa
d pongkanta to lammin kanta iddos sokkad no gatus woy oppatnopuu oppat no maan   diyot isowwan to trunu diyot oppat no maantoyn binovallan woy ayon tod pombuyyahon
aa ossa nod kotuig taddon kanta idda ra en so sokkad no gatus woy oppatnopuu oppat no maan   no id pontobbus pomon kaay to ampowt ingod
ikandan iddos mgo minuvu no waa molibmit diyot ginawa ran
okoiling dan to konakan no waa nokopuung to saa riyot baay deen molinis kos pinuungan dan
d dumoruma ran taddot atin arnero ahad ingkon sikandin od undiyon
d pontobbus sikandan amoy id poossa pomon diyot kourallan atag to onama woy atag to atin arnero iling to kodboggoy to unnon bunga to mgo pinomuwa riyot onama
aa en sikandan id ouhus woy waa id pokosawoy kandan
a nokita ku iddos ossa pa no ponolihan no id layang diyot kooowayan woy id ponudtuu rin iddos waa kopolinan no oppiyon inoggan
d ponudtuu rin idda riyot langun no minuvu no id pomon diyot nokodossoosson ingod nokodossoosson tribu woy nokodossoosson kinohiyan
d ooseng sikandin to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ovaakki row kos onama woy posivontuhi row sikandin oyya su id inguma ron kos timpu no od hukuman din kos langun no minuvu
imbaana row sikandin no mid bovaa to langit livuta dahat woy langun no sobsob to oweg
a duwon mandon ikooruwon ponolihan no nokotinundug no mid ikahi to ohobba ron
ohobba ron en iddos od bontuhon no bonuwa to abilonia
yya su iddon bonuwa od pokoiling to molitan nod bovoligya to lawa rin
d poinom din tod pokohubug iddos mgo minuvu riyon to nokodossoosson ingod amoy od okoy kandan nod puung to molibmit unayan nod silutan sikandan to onama
uwon mandon ikootollun ponolihan no nokotinundug no mid ikahi to ddos langun no id simba taddot monnanap woy taddot ribultu rin woy dos id tanggap taddot patow riyot kiloy o bollad dan od kosaharan dan iddos langot to onama no waad en eru
d posupittan sikandan ukit to od loglog no asupre riyot isowwan to mgo ponolihan to onama woy taddot atin arnero
d poundatas iddos obboo to apuy no id posuppit kandan taman to waad tomanon
llow bulli waa en imooyyan dan nod tiis to kodposuppit oyyos id ponsimba sikandan taddot monnanap woy taddot ribultu rin woy id potaaw ran taddot patow to ngaran to monnanap
a sikiyu no mgo minuvu to onama no id tuman to mgo suhu rin koilangan nod tiis kow to kodposuppit woy koilangan no mosalig kow riyot koniyun kopomakoy ki isas
opongnga idda norinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ulat du ini omon koungkay moppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nid patoy no riyot bollad tod ongaggon
a iddos spiritu to onama mid tavak to yya bonnaa en ini
yyos od pokoimolloy ron sikandan to kodoiluggat dan woy duwon od kotanggap dan pomon to moppiyon pinuungan dan
a nokita ku no duwon moputin souhapun woy duwon mid unsad dutun no iling taddot nak to inuvu no id kurunan to buawan woy riyot bollad din duwon gaab no motaom
uwon mandad ossa pa no ponolihan no id leggua pomon diyot templo no riyot datas to langit woy id osengan din to monokkaa iddos mid unsad diyot souhapun
ahi rin to omitowd kos gaab du su id inguma ron kos timpu to kodkottu oyyos noutuwan don kos od kottuwon diyon to ampowt ingod
een id gamit taddot mid unsad diyot souhapun iddos gaab din woy id kottu rin kos inirut ingod taman to nopongnga idda langun
a duwon ossa pa no ponolihan no id leggua pomon diyot templo no riyot datas to langit woy duwon mandad gaab din no motaom
uwon mandad ossa pa no ponolihan no id leggua pomon diyot buwisanan
ikandin en kos id tamong taddot apuy rutun
a id osengan din to monokkaa iddos ponolihan no duwon motaom no gaab
ahi rin to omitowd kos gaab du woy pupuwow kos mgo bunga taddot pinomuwon ubas diyon to ampowt ingod su noutuwan don idda
een id gaab din iddos mgo ubas woy id limud din idda woy id lumbag diyon to dakkoon toviran
ni en kos ponunggelengan taddot mokaaratarat no langot to onama
a id tovid iddos mgo ubas diyot leggua to bonuwa woy pomon diyon tid toviran id ponaus kos longossa no mgo otollun gatus no kilometro kos koriyuwoy woy sokkad no leppa kos koroommoy
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos ossa pa no orayn mokososoobbun kotomanan diyot datas to langit
uwon pittun ponolihan no id piyod to pittun kororattan woy ini en kos kotompusan no mgo kororattan su kaay en od kotaman kos langot to onama
a nokita ku iddos immat lanow no motingngow iling to oungan no duwon nokosambut no apuy
okita ku mandad dutun iddos mgo minuvu no id talu taddot mokaaratarat no monnanap oyyos waa ran en id simba taddot ribultu rin woy waa ran mandad id potaaw taddot numeru no idda en kos patow to ngaran din
os ipat sokkad kandan id ponsomad to mgo alpa no id boggoy to onama
d pongkanta ran to kanta ni oises no uripon to onama woy kanta rad en mandad idda taddot atin arnero
ddos kanta ran mid ungketen to onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun rayn motoos woy mokososoobbu kos pinuungan du
ari ka to langun no ingod
otallong ka woy ollog kos langun no poukit du
aa en ahad ondoy no waa allak kikow od ongaggon
aa ahad ondoy no diid posivantug kikow oyyos sikkow ra en kos uhis
os langun no minuvu no id pomon diyot nokodossoosson ingod od porani woyd ponsimba kikow su nokita ran iddos langun no motallong no pinuungan du
opongnga idda nokita ku no nopokesan kos templo no riyot datas to langit
iyot daom tadda nokita ku iddos lampas no his no ugaa no notawwan taddot nosulat no mgo suhu to onama
oy pomon diyot templo id leggua iddos pittun ponolihan no id piyod to pittu mandad no kororattan
d oumpak dan to moputin ogget no mosella woy duwon ollon no buawan diyot kabpa ran
a sokkad taddot oppat no maantoyn binovallan id boggoy rin diyot pittun ponolihan iddos pittun yohung no buawan no noponnut langot to onamon maantoy taman to waad tomanon
os templo noponnut obboo no patow to seaa to kotuusan din woy waa en od pokousok dutun taman tod kopongnga ron iddos pittun kororattan no id piyod taddot pittun ponolihan
opongnga idda norinog ku no duwon monokkaan bawos pomon diyot templo no mid ungketen to usbus dowd diyon to ampowt ingod iddos pittun yohung no noponnut langot to onama
een id ipanow iddos unnon ponolihan woy id busbus din iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to livuta
a idda ron en id inguma iddos mokaaratarat woy mosakit no pidsa riyot mgo minuvu no id potaaw to patow taddot monnanap woy dos id ponsimba taddot ribultu rin
a id busbus taddot ikooruwon ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to dahat
dda ron en novauy idda no longossa iling to longossa to minatoy woy dos langun no ngaap diyot dahat id poomatoy
opongnga idda id busbus taddot ikootollun ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to mgo oweg woy riyot mgo sobsob woy idda ron en novauy idda no longossa
a norinog ku iddos ponolihan no id tamong to oweg no mid ikahi to his no onama duwon kad to waa pa iddos tigkonayan to ingod ahad taman koungkay woy ollog kos kodhukum du
u id potihis dan kos longossa ukit to kodimatoy taddot mgo minuvu ru woy taddot mgo propeta
een koungkay longossa rad mandad kos id poinom du oyyos idda en kos ollog kandan
orinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot buwisanan no mid ungketen to onama nod ongaggon no otuus to angun motallong ka woy ollog en kos kodhukum du
a id busbus taddot ikooppat no ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to allow
oy idda ron en ayas id monit kos allow taman to noupitan kos mgo minuvu
iru ahad noupitan don sikandan waa ran en id sondit woyd tanan to morat no pinuungan dan woy waa ran posivontuhi iddos onama no duwon kotungud taddon mgo kororattan ko konna id sumpalit dan da en baling
a id busbus taddot ikolimmon ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to trunu taddot monnanap no id goun diyot dahat
oy idda ron en id mosukirom kos intirut kohoriyan din
yon id puungan to mgo minuvu id pongahat dan kos dila ran pomon to dii ran od pokotiis to kosokitoy
oy id sumpalit dan da en iddos onama no riyot datas to langit pomon taddot kosokitoy woy mgo pidsa ran
iru ahad ungketen kos notomanan dan waa en sikandan id sondit woy id tanan to morat no pinuungan dan
a id busbus taddot ikoannom no ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyot dakkoon oweg to ufrates
dda ron en noottiyan iddos oweg su amoy od kovoyan taddot mgo hari no id pomon diyon tid tollak
okita ku iddos otollun mokaaratarat no busow no id loppow no iling to bakbak
os sokkad id leggua riyot bivig taddot dragon dos ikooruwa id leggua riyot bivig taddot unnon monnanap woy dos ikootollu id leggua riyot bivig taddot ikooruwon monnanap no idda en so od pouvaguvag no propeta
ni en kos mgo busow no od puung to mgo mokososoobbu
d undiyonnan woy id livuung dan kos mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod amoy od atu to onama no otuus to angun init od inguma no dakkoon allow to kodhukum din
een id livuung dan iddos mgo hari duma to mgo sundau ran diyot lugaa nod ngoranan to rmagedon diyot ebreo no kinohiyan
a mid ikahi iddos od ongaggon to omotawi row
igkow a od inguma iling to tokawon
oppiya kod kotomanan to minuvu no diid tintinuhon woy inaayun od oumpak oyyos konna sikandin od koilawan init kodinguma ku
a id busbus taddot ikopittun ponolihan iddos taaw taddot kandin no yohung diyon to kaamag
dda ron en norinog ku no duwon monokkaan bawos pomon diyon to trunu no riyot templo no mid ungketen to opongnga ron
a tigkow id kokilat id pomaansi woy id linug to orayn monokkaa
omon poron to kodbovaa to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod waa pa linug no iling tadda kos konokkaloy
dda ron en novaad don to otollu iddos novantug no bonuwa to abilonia woy nongohobba kos langun no bonuwa kaay to ampowt ingod oyyos waa lingawi to onama iddos saa to mgo toho abilonia
okoiling to id paamin to onama tid poinom kandan iddos taaw to pokawan no idda en so kodsilut din kandan pomon to lampas no langot din
a nongowora ron kos langun no isla ahad iddos mgo buvungan
oy id uranan peen kos mgo minuvu to ays no mgo limmompuun kilu kos kovoggatoy to ipat sokkad
iru id sumpalit dan da en baling kos onama pomon taddot mokaaratarat no kororattan
opongnga idda id porani koddi iddos sokkad taddot pittun ponolihan no id piyod taddot mgo yohung dan woy kahi rin to uma ka koddi
d pokita ku kikow iddos kodsilut taddot novantug no molitan nod bovoligya to lawa rin no idda en so novantug no bonuwa no riyon lomig to mouraan oweg
d loyukan sikandin to mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod woy id okoy rin kos mgo minuvu ukit taddot molibmit no pinuungan din
okoiling to id hubug din sikandan taddot kandin no binu taman to worad ilow ran nod puung to iling tadda
a noiroomman a to spiritu to onama woy id piyod a taddot ponolihan diyot nokaawoyawoyn lugaa
utun nokita ku iddos molitan no id sakoy to mokaaratarat no moollutun monnanap
ittu kos uu taddot monnanap sopuu kos suwag woy dos lawa rin noponnu to nosulat no mgo ngaran nod sumpalit to onama
ddon molitan id oumpak to melom woy moollutu iling to umpak to hari
d sukuvan sikandin to mgo buawan mgo mahaa no batu woy mgo perlas
oy riyot bollad din duwon pokawan no buawan no noponnut binu no idda en so mokoilowilow woy orayn molibmit no pinuungan din
iyot kiloy rin duwon nosulat no ngaran no nokoollos kos kohulugan
id ungketen idda to ovantug no bonuwa to abilonia no inoy to langun nod bovoligya to lawa ran woy id pomonnan to langun no molibmit no pinuungan kaay to ampowt ingod
oy nokita ku no nohubug iddos molitan pomon taddot longossa to mgo minuvu to onama no id ponimotayan pomon to kodposivonnaa ran mokaatag ki isas
a nokohinganga a ra en to kodtongtong ku kandin su oraroy a no nosoobbuwan
iru mid ikahi iddos ponolihan koddi to o kod kosoobbui oyyos od ponudtulan kud sikkow mokaatag to nokoollos no kohulugan taddot molitan woy dos monnanap no id sokayan din no duwon pittun uu woy sopuun suwag
os monnanap no nokita ru nouyag dangan piru koungkay worad
onnod kouhoy od leggua sikandin pomon diyot bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman woy od kosaharan din kos kodsilut to onama
d kosoobbuwan iddos langun no minuvu no waa nokosulat kos ngaran dan diyot libru to umuun waad tomanon no id panoy to onama to waa pa novovalli inis ingod oyyos od kokita ran iddos monnanap no nouyag dangan no worad koungkay piru od kouyag dad mandon
a ponayun mid ikahi iddos ponolihan to oilangan en iddos moraom no koovottan amoy od kosorollan ko ondan kos kohulugan kaay
u iddos pittun uu idda en so pittun buvungan no id unsaran taddot molitan
oy dos kohulugan kaay idda en so pittun hari
ddos limma taddot pittun hari worad
os sokkad id ponguu poron koungkay woy dos sokkad mandad waa pa id ponguu piru od hari sikandin daom to moobbavon timpu
ddos monnanap no nouyag dangan piru worad koungkay sikandin en kos ikowaun hari no od tundug taddot pittun hari woy od kosaharan din en mandad iddos silut to onama
os sopuun suwag no nokita ru idda en so sopuun hari no waa pa id ponguu
iru od boggayan sikandan to kotungud no od hari to orayn moobbavon timpu duma taddot monnanap
ddos sopuun hari sokkad da kos dontulon dan deen id boggoy ran kos kandan no kogahan woy kotungud diyon to monnanap
d pokidimatoy sikandan taddot atin arnero piru od kotalu en sikandan
yya su iddos atin arnero sikandin en kos od ongaggon to langun nod longaggon woy ari to langun no hari
a iddos duma kandin idda en so id ossa rin dos id aam din woy dos morumoruma kandin
a mid ikahi mandon iddos ponolihan koddi to ddos mouraan oweg no nokita run nid unsaran taddot molitan no id bovoligya to lawa rin idda en kos nokodossoosson tribu nokodossoosson ingod woy nokodossoosson kinohiyan
ddos nokita ru no sopuun suwag no idda en so sopuun hari sikandan woy dos monnanap id kolingasai ran iddos molitan no id bovoligya to lawa rin
d ahawon dan iddos langun no korotuwan din taman to worad en od kosama riyot kandin ahad iddos id sukub din no umpak
d kannon dan kos sapu rin woy od loowon dan sikandin
yya su id taaw to onama riyot ginawa ran nod puung to iling tadda su amoy od kotuman iddos kandin no dontulon
dda en kos unayan no nokodsokkad kos poomdom taddot mgo hari no od poiraom diyot kohoriyan to monnanap taman tod kotuman don iddos id oseng to onama
os molitan no nokita ru idda en kos novantug no bonuwa no od ponguu taddot mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos ossa pa no ponolihan no id inguma pomon diyot datas to langit
nin ponolihan duwon dakkoon kotungud din woy id maawang kos intirut ingod pomon to seaa to kotuusan din
a id ooseng sikandin to monokkaa no mid ungketen to ohobba ron
ohobba ron en kos novantug no bonuwa to abilonia
ovovallan don ini nod oubpan to mgo busow taddot nokodossoosson mokaaratarat no ispiritu taddot nokodossoosson molibmit no mgo monnanap woy taddot mgo manuk nod layanglayang
yya su iddon bonuwa nokoiling to molitan no id bovoligya to lawa rin nod ookoy to langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ukit to kodinom dan taddot kandin no binu no idda en so molibmit no pinuungan din
d ponlaayuk kandin iddos mgo hari to intirut ingod
oy idda mandad so mgo nigusyanti nongoratu pomon to lampas no ivog tat molitan taddot mahaa no mgo impon nod bolliyon din diyot kandan
a norinog ku no duwon ossa pa no bawos pomon diyot datas to langit no mid ungketen to ikiyu no mgo minuvu ku awa kow pomon duwon no bonuwa su amoy konna kow od kolonug to mgo saa rinwoy konna kow od kaapii to kodsilut kandin
yyos nokodluntudluntud don kos saa rin no iling to nokosungkuu ron diyot langit woy dii en od kolingawan to onama iddos morat no pinuungan din
een od silutan en sikandin taddot morat no pinuungan din
os langun no kodposuppit din to mgo minuvu od livod en idda riyot kandin
tik ondan kos kovuutoy taddot binu no id poinom din to duma od kooruwannon peen tadda kos kovuutoy taddot id poinom kandin
o momonnu kos kodpobporoong din to kandin no kougolingun woy ko momonnu sikandin id opetan to korotuwan din ungketen en mandad kos kovoggatoy to mgo kosupittan woy mgo lanu no id pouma riyot kandin
yya su kohingginawa rin to ayna a konna a bau
een dii a od ukit to kodlanu
urisu pomon to kodpobporoong din tigkow od inguma kandin iddos mgo kororattan
d pokoddongngan nod inguma kandin iddos lanu gutas woy kopotayan
d loowon sikandin oyya su motuus en kos onama nod ongaggon no od silut kandin
a iddos mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod no id ponlaayuk kandin woy id lonug kandin nid opetan to korotuwan od sinoggow woy od pondaawit sikandan otid kokita ran don iddos obboo taddot apuy no id loow kandin
d pomantow ra sikandan pomon diyot moriyu su od kovaakkan dan kod kaapii taddot kodsilut kandin
a od pondaawit sikandan nod ungketen to kkoyoy worad
onuhun duwot novantug no bonuwa to abilonia
yyos songokodpollokpollok da id ingumannan idda to kodsilut
d sinoggow woyd pondaawit mandad kos mgo nigusyanti to intirut ingod pomon tod kotomanan taddon bonuwa su worad od bovolli to kandan no boligya
orad od bovolli to kandan no mgo buawan mgo plata mgo mahaa no batu woy mgo perlas
orad mandad od bovolli taddot mgo mahaa no ogget no moputi moollutu woy melom woy dos ogget no od sella nod ngoranan no sida
orad mandad od bovolli to mgo mammut no kayu ran mgo impon no binovallan pomot bangkil to elepante mgo kayu no mahaa mgo brunsi mgo putow woy mgo batu no marmol
ndoy pobbo kos od bovolli to boligya ran no mgo mammut no iling to koringag mgo loggu mgo insenso woy mgo mira
orad od bovolli to kandan no mgo binu mgo montika mgo horina woy mgo trigu
orad od bovolli to kandan no mgo baka mgo karnero mgo kuda woy mgo kolisa ahad iddos mgo minuvu nod bovallan no uripon
d osengan taddot mgo nigusyanti iddos molitan no id ponunggelengan no bonuwa to abilonia kahi ran to orad en iddos langun nid koivoggi ru
orad mandad iddos langun no korotuwan woy mgo impon no id pobporoong du
ongowora ron idda ruwot kikow woy idda langun dii rud en od kokita
os mgo nigusyanti no nongoratu to kodbovoligya ran dutun no bonuwa od pomantow robbo pomon diyot moriyu oyyos od kovaakkan sikandan kod kaapii taddot kodsilut kandin
d sinoggow woyd pondaawit sikandan
d oungketen sikandan to kkoyoy worad
onuhun duwot novantug no bonuwa no nokoiling to molitan no id oumpak to mahaa no moputin mgo ogget moollutu woy melom woy id sosukub to mgo buawan mgo mahaa no batu woy mgo perlas
iru to songopollokpollok da nongowora iddos langun no korotuwan din
a od pomantow robbo pomon diyot moriyu iddos langun no kopitan to doorakkoon bollangay dos mgo tohodpuung tadda dos id ponsakoy woy dos langun no minuvu no riyon da en to dahat kos kouyahan dan
o nokita ran iddos obboo to apuy no id loow taddon bonuwa id pomehes dan no mid ungketen to aa en bonuwa nod pokoiling duwot novantug no bonuwa
a id bukbukan dan to livuta kos mgo uu ran pomon to lanu ran
d ponsinoggow sikandan woy id pondaawit no mid ungketen to kkoyoy worad
onuhun duwot novantug no bonuwa
yyos pomon kandin nongoratu iddos langun no duwon mgo sokayan to dahat
iru to songopollokpollok da nongowora ron iddos langun no korotuwan din
een sikiyu langun no riyot datas to langit kahaa kow pomon taddot notomanan din
ahaa kow no mgo minuvu to onama mgo apostoles woy mgo propeta
yya su id silutan don sikandin to onama taddot morat nid puungan din diyot koniyu
a duwon sokkad no motuus no ponolihan no id onnat to batu no iddos korokolloy iling to dakkoon gilingan no batu
dda ron en goli sikandin id biidbiid to kodlumbag tadda riyot dahat woy kahi rin to ling en tadda kos kodlumbag taddot novantug no bonuwa to abilonia woy dii ron en idda od kokita
kkoyoy worad
ii ron en od korinog iddos dohingon to mgo alpa dos mgo kodkanta dos mgo lantuy woy dos mgo trumpeta taddon bonuwa
ii ron mandad od kokita iddos mgo panday woy worad od korinog nod bovinayu
orad od kokita nod lottom to suu woy worad en od korinog nod poosoway
yon unayan nod silutan kos abilonia su iddos mgo nigusyanti id pobporoong dan no sikandan kos duwon dakkoon korotuwan kaay to ampowt ingod woy nouhusan kos langun no minuvu ukit to kodoonitu
onna ra idda oyyos dutun en no bonuwa id imotayan iddos mgo propeta dos mgo minuvu to onama woy dos langun nid ponimotayan kaay to ampowt ingod
opongnga idda norinog ku no duwon bawos no immat mouraan minuvu riyot datas to langit no id ponooseng to monokkaa no mid ungketen to d doongon ta kos onama
ikandin en kos motuus to langun od bontuhon woy od tobbus keta
onnaa woy ollog en kos kandin no kodhukum
yya su id silutan din iddos novantug no molitan no id bovoligya to lawa rin no idda en kos id okoy to mgo minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod ukit to molibmit no pinuungan din
d sukut to onama riyot kandin iddos kodimatoy rin taddot mgo sinuhuwan to onama
ahi ran mandon to d doongon ta kos onama
u iddos obboo taddot id loow no novantug no bonuwa od poundatas to waad tomanon
a iddos oruwompuuoppat nod pombuyyahon woy dos oppat no maantoyn binovallan to onama id ponlingkood woy id doong dan kos onama no mid unsad diyot trunu
ahi ran to yya notuman don en ini
d doongon ta kos onama
a norinog ku no duwon bawos pomon diyot trunu no mid ungketen to ikiyu langun no sinuhuwan to onama woy duwon allak kandin sikiyu no novantug woy waa novantug doonga row kos onama ta
orinog ku mandad no duwon immat bawos to mouraan minuvu no id ponooseng iling to gohonuggulon to dakkoon tousuvan woy iling to monokkaan baansi
ahi ran to d doongon ta kos onama
yya su id hari ron kos onama ta nod ongaggon no otuus to angun
d pehes ki woyd sayow to kahaan woy od posivontuhon ta sikandin su id inguma ron kos timpu to kosaa to atin arnero
oy dos od osowan din nopanoy ron
d posukub kandin iddos mahaa no umpak no orayn moputi od sella woy molinis
os kohulugan taddot moputin umpak idda en so motallong no pinuungan to mgo minuvu to onama a mid ikahi iddos ponolihan koddi to ulatow ini oppiya kod kotomanan to minuvu no id inggat nod sakup to kosaa taddot atin arnero
onayun sikandin mid ikahi to ooggot en ini no mgo kahi to onama
dda ron en id lingkood a riyot isowwan taddot ponolihan oyyos od simba a nanoy kandin
iru mid ikahi sikandin koddi to o kod puung to ungketen
onama ra kos simbaanow
yyos sinuhuwan a ra en mandad iling kikow woy nokodiling ki ra en taddot mgo duma ru no mid posivonnaa mokaatag ki isasd oseng din ini su iddos id posivonnaa ni isas idda en mandad kos id posivonnaa to mgo propeta a nokita ku no nopokesan kos langit woy idda ron en nokita ku iddos moputin kuda
os id sakoy tadda id ngoranan no osolihan woy onnaa
llog kos kandin no kodhukum ahad iddos poukit din to kodpoimotayoy
os mata rin iling to loglog to apuy woy mouraan kuruna riyot uu rin
uwon ngaran no nokosulat diyot uu rin piru waa osson nokosaddoo to kohulugan tadda ko konna sikandin da en
id sukub sikandin to ogget no id aggom to longossa woy id ngoranan sikandin no ahit onama
d tinundug kandin iddos mgo sundau no id pomon diyot datas to langit
d sakoy sikandan to moputin mgo kuda woy id sukub dan to mahaa no ogget no orayn moputi woy molinis
a riyot bivig din duwon id leggua no motaom no polihuma no od gomiton din to kodtalu to mgo ingod
os kodponguu rin kandan mosalig iling to putow no tukod oyyos od silutan din en iddos diid poiraom to kotungud din
d posahap en to onama no otuus to angun iddos silut din kandan pomon to lampas no langot din no od pokoiling to kodtovid to ubas taman tod kotostossan to ammis
iyon to ogget woy riyot buvun din duwon ngaran no nokosulat no mid ungketen to ari to langun no hari woy ongaggon to langun nod longaggon
a nopongnga idda nokita ku iddos sokkad no ponolihan no id loohinat diyot allow
d umow rin kos langun no manuk nod layanglayang diyon to kooowayan
ahi rin to ndini kow
olivuung kow su duwon dakkoon kodpokaan to onama atag koniyu
anna row kos sapu to mgo hari mgo sundau woy mgo kopitan dan dos mgo tohodponguda woy dos mgo kuda ran
anna row mandad kos sapu to langun no minuvu dos mgo uripon woy konna uripon ahad iddos novantug woy waa novantug
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos mokaaratarat no monnanap woy dos mgo hari kaay to ampowt ingod duma to mgo sundau ran
d lolivuung sikandan amoyd pokidimatoy taddot id sakoy to moputin kuda duma to mgo sundau rin
iru naammot iddos monnanap woy dos od pouvaguvag no propeta no id puung to mgo mokososoobbu ukit to kotuusan nid boggoy kandin taddot monnanap
d puungan din idda amoy od aakaa to mgo minuvu no id potawan taddot monnanap woy dos id ponsimba taddot ribultu rin
a ahad nouyag dan poron id lumbag sikandan diyon to linowt apuy no idda en so od loglog no asupre
os mgo duma ran id ponimotayan ukit to polihuma no id leggua pomon diyot bivig taddot id sakoy to moputin kuda woy nongovuung iddos langun no manuk no mid daas taddot sapu tid poomatoy
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos sokkad no ponolihan no id inguma pomon diyot datas to langit
d piyod sikandin to tusi atag taddot bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman woy id piyod mandad sikandin to dakkoon kodina
a id ammot din iddos dragon no idda en so uwod dangan nod ngoranan ki oivuyan woy id baku rin sikandin daom to sokkad no maan   no lahun
d uug sikandin taddot ponolihan diyon to bobbo no waad tomanan kos koroomman
d ponoggasan idda tid lokkob amoy dii ron sikandin od pokoaakaa to mgo ingod daom to sokkad no maan   no lahun
opongnga tadda od sovukan pa sikandin to moobbavon timpu
a nokita ku iddos mgo trunu woy dos id ponunsad dutun no id boggayan to kotungud nod hukum
ikandan en iddos gimukud taddot mgo minuvu no id pontompoddan to liyog pomon to kodposivonnaa ran ki isas woy pomon to kodponudtuu ran to kahit onama
aa ran id simba taddot monnanap woy taddot ribultu rin
oy waa ran mandad id potaaw taddot patow to monnanap diyon to kiloy o riyot bollad
ouyag mandad sikandan woy id hari duma ki isas rays daom to sokkad no maan   no lahun
dda en kos unnon kodbadnow to onama taddot id poomatoy ron
iru iddos duma dii pa od bodnawon taman tod kopongnga iddos sokkad no maan   no lahun
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot mgo minuvu no od kaapii riyot unnon kodbadnow oyyos sikandan en kos mgo minuvu to onama
yya su riyot kandan worad kotuusan taddot ikooruwon kopotayan
d kovovallan sikandan no tohodbuwis atag to onama woy ki isas rays woy od hari sikandan duma ki isas daom to sokkad no maan   no lahun
a kopongnga iddos sokkad no maan   no lahun od sovukan si oivuyan pomon diyon tid prisuwan kandin
d leggua sikandin woyd undiyon to ahad ingkon kaay to ampowt ingod amoy od aakaa to mouraan minuvu
ddos mgo ingod nod undiyonnan din od ngoranan idda no og woy agog
d livuungon din sikandan amoyd pokidimatoy to mgo minuvu to onama
os kouralloy taddot od livuungon din iling to paok diyot ibpit to dahat no diid koiyap
a od soovon dan kos intirut ingod amoy od lingkusan iddos bonuwa nid ginowannan to onama no id ubpan to mgo minuvu rin
iru duwon apuy pomon diyot datas to langit no id pouran diyot kandan woy noloow ran taman to naavu
a si oivuyan no id aakaa kandan id lumbag diyon to linowt apuy no idda en so od loglog no asupre
oy riyon en mandad id lumbag iddos monnanap woy dos od pouvaguvag no propeta
d posupittan sikandan dutun allow bulli taman to waad tomanon
opongnga idda nokita ku iddos dakkoon trunu no orayn moputi woy nokita ku mandad iddos mid unsad dutun
a iddos langit woy livuta tigkow nowora pomon diyot isowwan din woy dii ron en idda od kokita
okita ku mandad iddos id poomatoy no novantug woy dos waa novantug no id ponloohinat diyot isowwan taddot trunu
a id bollat kos mgo libru ahad iddos libru no id sulatan to mgo ngaran taddot langun nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
d hukuman iddos id poomatoy ukit taddot nokosulat diyot mgo libru mokaatag taddot mgo pinuungan dan to nouyag pa sikandan
a nongovadnow iddos id poomatoy pomon diyon to ades no idda en so ingod tid poomatoy
ongovadnow mandad iddos langun nid poomatoy riyon to dahat woy riyot livuta
oy langun dan id hukuman ukit to pinuungan dan to nouyag pa sikandan
opongnga idda id lumbag diyon to linowt apuy iddos opotayan woy dos ades
a iddos linowt apuy idda en kos od ngoranan no ikooruwon kopotayan
oy dos ahad ondoy no waa nokosulat kos ngaran diyot libru to umuun waad tomanon id lumbag diyon to linowt apuy
a nokita ku iddos lammin langit woy lammin livuta su iddos tapoyn langit woy tapoyn livuta ahad iddos dahat nongowora ron
okita ku mandad iddos uhis no bonuwa no idda en so ammin erusalem no id poonna to onama pomon diyot datas to langit
nin bonuwa nopanoy ron iling to baay nod kosalon no nokooumpak to umpak atag to kosaa woy id pogondan amoyd tommu taddot od osawa kandin
a norinog ku no duwon monokkaan bawos pomon diyot trunu no mid ungketen to oungkay iddos ubpan to onama diyon don to mgo minuvu rin woy od ubpa sikandin duma kandan
d kilaannon din sikandan no mgo sakup din woy od kilaannon dan mandad sikandin no onama ran
d punason to onama kos mgo dayas dan woy worad kopotayan kodlanu kodsinoggow ahad iddos mgo bohok oyya su iddos langun no riyot tapoyn ingod nongowora ron
a iddos id unsad diyot trunu mid ikahi koddi to oungkay id lammi kud kos langun
oy kahi rin mandon to ulat du inin mgo osengan oyyos od kosolihan ini woy bonnaa en
onayun sikandin mid ikahi to otuman don kos langun
iyak kos lpa woy mega no iddos kohulugan dos tigkonayan woy dos kotompusan
ddos minuvu no notokkangan od poinommon ku to oweg no waa bayad pomon diyot sobsob no od pokovoggoy to umuun waad tomanon
a iddos od pokoponalu to kopomakoy rin koddi od pokotanggap to langun tadda pomon koddi
iyak kos onama ran woy sikandan kos mgo anak ku
iru iddos taawon dos konnod pompomakoy dos morat kos pinuungan dos mongimatoy dos od laayuk to konna ran sawa dos od loommoy dos od ponsimba to konna bonnaan monama woy dos langun no bouhuson iyon dan od ingumannon iddos linowt apuy no idda en so od loglog no asupre
a idda en kos ikooruwon kopotayan
a id porani koddi iddos sokkad taddot pittun ponolihan no id pompiyod taddot pittun yohung no noponnu mandad to pittun kotompusan no kororattan
id ikahi sikandin koddi to uma ka koddi su id pokita ku kikow iddos od osowan to atin arnero
a noiroomman a to spiritu to onama woy id piyod a taddot ponolihan diyot orayn mowwet no buvungan
d pokita rin koddi iddos uhis no bonuwa no idda en so erusalem no id poonna to onama pomon diyot datas to langit
osoob idda to seaa to kotuusan to onama woy od sella idda iling to mahaa no batu no haspe no motiaw iling to oungan
ddon bonuwa nolingkus to motikang no aavat no duwon sopuuoruwon sobbangan
oy riyon to ipat sobbangan tadda duwon ponolihan no id tamong woy nokosulat dutun iddos ipat sokkad no ngaran taddot sopuuoruwon anak ni srael
tollun sobbangan kos diyon lomig tid tollak otollu kos diyon lomig tid saop otollu kos diyon lomig to boovahan to kowanan woy otollu mandad kos diyon lomig to boovahan to ivang
os motikang no aavat id pounsad diyot sopuuoruwa no doorakkoon batu
oy riyon to ipat batu nokosulat iddos ipat sokkad no ngaran taddot sopuuoruwon apostoles to atin arnero
a iddos ponolihan nid oseng koddi id piyod to buawan no toppong no iling to tukod su amoy od topongngon din iddos bonuwa dos mgo sobbangan woy dos mgo aavat tadda
ppat no sungguk iddon bonuwa no nokodiling da en kos koowettoy woy koowaggoy
o id toppong idda to ponolihan oruwon maan woy oppat no gatus   no kilometro kos koowettoy
ngketen dad en mandad kos koowaggoy woy kotikangoy
o id toppong mandad taddot ponolihan iddos kotikangoy to aavat annomnopuun metro idda
os topongngan no id gamit din iling dad en taddot od gomiton to mgo minuvu
ddon bonuwa paanan buawan woy motiaw iling to oungan woy dos aavat tadda orayn mahaa no batu nod ngoranan no haspe
os mgo batu no pounsaran taddot motikang no aavat id tawwan to nokodossoosson mahaa woy motoos no mgo batu
ddos unnon pounsaran batu no haspe dos ikooruwa sapiro dos ikootollu kalsedonia dos ikooppat esmeralda dos ikolimma sardonika dos ikoannom kornalina dos ikopittu krisolito dos ikowau berilo dos ikosiyow topasio dos ikosopuu krisopraso dos ikosopuu sokkad hasinto woydos ikosopuu oruwa batu no amatista
os sopuuoruwon sobbangan paanan perlas su iddos ipat sobbangan sokkad no dakkoon perlas
aanan buawan kos koosada taddon bonuwa woy orayn motiaw iling to oungan
aa nokita ku no templo taddon bonuwa
onnad koilangan iddos templo rutun oyya su riyon en iddos onama no otuus to angun woy dos atin arnero
onnad mandad koilangan dutun iddos taddow to allow woy buwan
yya su iddos id pomonnan to seaa rutun idda en so seaa to kotuusan to onama woy dos suu idda en so atin arnero
os langun no minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod od kotorawwan tat seaa taddon bonuwa
oy dos mgo hari to intirut ingod od piyod to mgo korotuwan dan dutun
naayun od lukatan iddos mgo sobbangan taddon bonuwa woy dii ron en idda od lokobban oyyos worad man bulli
oy dos langun to minuvu kaay to ampowt ingod od piyod mandad to kandan no korotuwan dutun
iru diid pokousok iddos ahad ondoy no konna molinis diyot isowwan to onama dos molibmit kos pinuungan woy dos mgo bouhuson
yon da od pokousok dutun iddos mgo minuvu no nokosulat kos ngaran diyot libru to umuu taddot atin arnero
a idda en kos id sulatan to ngaran taddot langun nod boggayan to umuun waad tomanon
a id pokita koddi to ponolihan iddos od aus no oweg no od ngoranan no oweg nod pokovoggoy to umuu
otingngow idda iling to oungan woy id pomon diyot trunu to onama woy riyot atin arnero
oy id aus idda riyot tongannan to koosada taddon bonuwa
iyot tapad ibpit taddon oweg duwon kayu nod pokovoggoy to umuu
aom to sokkad no lahun od bovunga idda to kosopuuoruwa woy ipat buwan nokodossoossa kos bunga tadda
a iddos mgo doun taddon kayu bawi atag to langun no ingod
utun worad kosupittan no id silut to onama to mgo minuvu woy riyon en iddos trunu to onama woy dos atin arnero
oy dos langun no minuvu nod puung to id kopii rin od ponsimba kandin
d kokita ran kos bonnong to onama woy dos ngaran din id sulat diyon to kiloy ran
orad bulli rutun woy dii ron od koilonganon kos suu ahad iddos seaa to allow oyya su iddos koowangan dan idda en so onama nod ongaggon
oy od hari sikandan duma kandin taman to waad tomanon
a mid ikahi iddos ponolihan koddi to nin osengan bonnaa woy od kosolihan
os onama nod ongaggon no id pomandu to mgo propeta ukit to spiritu rin id popiyod a nikandin amoy od posaddoo koniyu no mgo sinuhuwan din mokaatag taddot asow ron od ingumon kotomanan
id ikahi si isas to omotawi row
d livod a to diid kouhoy
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot minuvu nod tuman to langun no id poponudtuu to onama no nokosulat kaayn libru
iyak si uan no nokorinog woy nokokita to langun nid sulat ku kaay
o norinog woy nokita ku idda mid lingkood a riyot isowwan to ponolihan no id pokita koddi tadda langun oyyos od simba a nanoy kandin
iru id ikohiyan a nikandin to o kod puung to ungketen
onama ra kos simbaanow
yyos sinuhuwan a ra en mandad iling kikow woy nokodiling ki ra en taddot mgo duma ru no mgo propeta woy taddot langun no id tuman to nokosulat kaayn libru
a ponayun sikandin mid ikahi to o ru vo id ollos inis id poponudtuu to onama no nokosulat kaayn libru oyya su diid kouhoy od inguma en inin kotomanan
os mgo minuvu no morat woy molibmit kos pinuungan od podtohonon nod puung to morat woy molibmit
iru iddos mgo minuvu no motallong woy molinis kos pinuungan ollog en nod ponayun nod puung to motallong woy molinis
id ikahi si isas to omotawi row
d livod a to diid kouhoy
oy duwon ganti no id boggoy ku riyon to ipat sokkad loppa taddot pinuungan dan
iyak kos lpa woy mega oyyos siyak kos unna woy dos mori dos tigkonayan woy dos kotompusan
oppiya kod kotomanan taddot mgo minuvu no id pippiyan iddos mgo ogget dan oyya su duwon kotungud dan nod usok diyon to sobbangan taddot bonuwa woy od pokokaan sikandan taddot bunga to kayu nod pokovoggoy to umuu
iru diid pousokkon dutun iddos mgo minuvu no morat kos pinuungan dos od loommoy dos od laayuk to konna ran sawa dos mongimatoy dos od ponsimba to konna bonnaan monama woy dos mgo bouhuson
iyak si isas id popiyod ku iddos koddin ponolihan amoy od posaddoo kikow mokaatag kaayn kotomanan su amoy id ponudtuu ru mandad ini langun diyon tod lolivuung nod pompomakoy
iyak kos lubbad ni arin avid woy siyak en iddos orayd seaa no bituon to sollom
a iddos spiritu to onama woy dos od osowan to atin arnero mid ikahi to ndini kow
oy dos langun no nokorinog tadda od ikahi mandad to ndini kow
os ahad ondoy no notokkangan undini kow woy inom kow kaayt oweg nod pokovoggoy to umuu su iddos od kopiyan kaay od pokoinom no waa bayad
a od osengon kud tapoy riyot langun nod pokorinog to mgo kahi no id poponudtuu to onama kaayn libru
ddos ahad ondoy nod duhang to nosulat kaay id duhang mandad to onama riyot kandin iddos silut no idda en so mgo kororattan no nosulat kaayn libru
os ahad ondoy nod liyam taddot nosulat kaay od liyaman mandad to onama iddos kotungud din nod kaan taddot bunga to kayu nod pokovoggoy to umuu woy idda mandad so kotungud din nod usok diyot uhis no bonuwa no nosulat kaayn libru
a id posivonnalan ni isas iddos langun no nosulat kaayn libru kahi rin to d livod a to diid kouhoy
onnaa en
ahi ku mandad to yya livod ka en isas nod ongaggon
uopa no inaayun diyon to koniyu iddos kopiyannoy tod ongaggon no si isas rays
yya od kotuman en ini
